title: PhoneHarness: Harnessing Phone-Use Agents through Mixed GUI, CLI, and Tool Actions
summary: Phone agents are increasingly expected to complete real mobile workflows rather than merely predict the next screen action. However, much of the current mobile-agent literature still evaluates agents primarily as GUI controllers that observe a screen, emit taps and swipes, and are scored by target app state. Real phone-use tasks are broader: they require deciding when to use app GUIs, device-side commands, or structured tools, while leaving evidence that the intended side effect actually occurred. We introduce PhoneHarness, a mixed-action benchmark and execution harness for studying phone-use agents on verifiable mobile workflows. PhoneHarness runs a device-side agent loop over GUI, CLI, and host-side tool actions, combining deterministic action routing with bounded GUI delegation and auditable execution traces. Its benchmark, PhoneHarness Bench, evaluates whether agents complete tasks with observable side effects, not only whether they produce plausible final answers. On the annotated evaluation split, PhoneHarness reaches a 75.0% pass rate, outperforming the strongest non-PhoneHarness settings by 12.9 percentage points. PhoneHarness and PhoneHarness Bench therefore play distinct but mutually dependent roles: the harness makes mixed phone workflows executable, while the benchmark measures whether agents can use that harness reliably and safely. Our findings suggest that reliable phone automation depends on action-surface routing and verifiable execution, not only visual GUI control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PhoneHarness，用于更真实和可验证的手机端智能体任务评测。该工具支持混合操作（如GUI、命令行、宿主工具），强调最终可观察副作用的验证。实验显示，PhoneHarness显著提升了任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 现有手机智能体研究多关注GUI界面操作和状态预测，难以覆盖实际手机使用场景中更丰富的任务需求，如需结合不同操作方式并可验证其成效。
AI.method: 提出PhoneHarness框架，集成GUI、命令行（CLI）、宿主工具操作，通过可控的动作路由、有限GUI委托和全程审计日志，支撑混合型手机端任务执行。伴随PhoneHarness Bench评测基准，根据实际可观测副作用验证任务完成，而非仅凭结果合理性判断。
AI.result: 在标注数据集上，PhoneHarness框架取得75.0%的任务通过率，比最佳非PhoneHarness设置高12.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 混合操作界面调度和可验证执行是实现可靠手机自动化的关键，仅依靠视觉GUI控制远远不足。PhoneHarness及其基准工具为手机端智能体发展提供了新范式。

title: Evaluating the Robustness of Proof Autoformalization in Lean 4
summary: Proof autoformalization aims to translate a mathematical informal proof written in natural language into a formal proof in a formal language such as Lean~4. Several works have developed LLM-based models for proof autoformalization. However, existing evaluations have typically focused on translating well-formed informal proofs from curated datasets. We argue that a robust proof autoformalizer must remain faithful even for informal proofs that diverge from these idealized ones, and we present the first study on the robustness of proof autoformalization models. We formulate two categories of perturbations and evaluate robustness under each: a global perturbation paraphrases the informal proof in a different style, under which the formalization should remain consistent; a local perturbation alters a value, symbol, or proof step, possibly in a counterfactual way, and a robust formalization should faithfully reflect the perturbation rather than reverting to the original one or inferring a different one on its own. We build a benchmark with both perturbations on miniF2F and MATH-500, and automatically measure how stable a proof autoformalization's correctness is under global perturbations and how faithfully its output reflects local perturbations. We evaluate seven recent models, all of which are sensitive to global perturbations and mostly fail to remain faithful under local perturbations. Code and data are available via https://github.com/ucr-rai/robust-proof-autoformalization.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性研究大语言模型（LLM）驱动的数学证明自动形式化工具的鲁棒性，设计两类扰动并构建基准进行评估，发现现有方法在应对风格变化和细节修改时表现较差。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有的大模型可将非正式数学证明翻译为正式证明，但主要针对理想、格式规范的数据集，缺乏对现实中各种非规范表达和扰动下鲁棒性的测试。本文提出对不同类型的输入扰动（如重述、细节改动）下，自动化工具应保持准确和忠实性。
AI.method: 将输入扰动分为两类：全局扰动（文本风格变换，不影响证明内容）与局部扰动（细节或符号改动，可能是反事实）。基于miniF2F和MATH-500数据集生成带扰动的基准，并评测主流7种LLM自动证明工具下，全局扰动的输出稳定性与局部扰动的忠实反映能力。
AI.result: 全部7个评测模型对全局扰动较为敏感，输出稳定性较差；而局部扰动下大多未能忠实反映变动，容易回归原文或出现错误推断，表现出较大的鲁棒性短板。
AI.conclusion: 当前的自动证明形式化工具在现实多样输入和扰动下远未足够鲁棒，未来需针对风格和内容变化提升模型的泛化与忠实能力。

title: Context Compression Is Not One Thing: Readable Symbolic Re-expression vs. Coherent Summary at Matched Budget
summary: We study context compression for multi-hop question answering with small language models. We propose Telegraph English, a readable symbolic format that rewrites retrieved passages into structured entity-relation statements, preserving reasoning evidence at lower token cost. In controlled experiments on MuSiQue, TwoWiki, and HotpotQA, Telegraph English outperforms three matched-budget compression baselines (character-level deletion, truncation, and random sub-sampling) on every dataset, with gains of 13 to 20 F1 percentage point. It also outperforms a coherent prose summary produced by the same encoder on the hardest dataset. A pre-registered depth-interaction hypothesis is null: the advantage does not grow with reasoning depth within datasets. We interpret these results as evidence that readable symbolic re-expression preserves entity content more densely than either natural language or coherent summarization at matched token budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的上下文压缩方法Telegraph English，能以更少的token保留多跳推理所需的信息，并在多个问答数据集上显著优于常见压缩基线。
AI.motivation: 在多跳问答任务中，小型语言模型由于token预算有限，难以有效处理长上下文。现有压缩方法往往丢失关键信息，影响模型推理能力，因此需要一种既保留推理证据又节省token的压缩方案。
AI.method: 作者提出Telegraph English格式，将检索到的文本改写为结构化的实体-关系陈述。这样可以以更低的token成本保留关键的实体与证据信息。作者设置对照实验，将该方法与删字符、截断、随机抽样等三种常见压缩方法，以及同一模型生成的连贯摘要进行对比评测。
AI.result: 在MuSiQue、TwoWiki和HotpotQA三个数据集上，Telegraph English相比各压缩基线，F1提升13到20个百分点，并且在最难的数据集上也优于摘要法。深度-交互假设检验结果为零，说明在数据集内部推理深度增加时，并未使优势扩大。
AI.conclusion: Telegraph English能更高密度地保留实体内容，相比自然语言原文或摘要，在token预算受限情况下为小型语言模型多跳问答任务提供了更优的上下文表示。

title: Simplifying the Modeling of Arbitrary Conditionals in Natural Language
summary: Causal Transformers model sequences through an autoregressive factorization of the joint distribution, which enables efficient left-to-right decoding and conditional likelihood computation. However, they cannot tractably sample from or evaluate arbitrary conditionals -- e.g., a block of text conditioned on past and future tokens. Recent work aims to solve this problem through novel architectures, but they often lead to sub-optimal modeling of such conditionals and degraded generations. We propose Arbitrary Conditionals GPT (AC-GPT) which introduces a simple modification to standard causal Transformers to enable evaluating and sampling from arbitrary conditionals -- including past, future, and mixed contexts -- within a single forward pass. Unlike prior approaches, our method preserves the standard left-to-right ordering and next-token prediction objective essential for both strong performance and efficient training on natural language. Crucially, this compatibility allows existing LLMs to be fine-tuned for arbitrary conditioning. Our empirical results indicate that our method outperforms baselines on modeling arbitrary conditionals, without degrading standard left-to-right performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对标准因果Transformer（如GPT）的小改动，使其能够高效处理和采样任意条件（包括对过去、未来或混合上下文的条件），而不影响原有的从左到右解码和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的因果Transformer只能处理从左到右的序列预测，难以有效处理给定任意上下文（如同时给定前后文）时的条件概率评分和采样。之前虽有新架构尝试解决此问题，但常损失建模效果并降低生成质量。因此需要一种更优的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Arbitrary Conditionals GPT（AC-GPT），在保持标准因果Transformer结构及左到右目标的基础上，以简单的方式支持任意条件建模。其方法仅需一次前向传播即可计算、采样任意条件（包括历史、未来及混合上下文），而且无需大幅改变现有模型结构。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AC-GPT对任意条件下的建模效果显著优于现有方法，并且不会影响常规左到右预测任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: AC-GPT在不牺牲传统解码能力的前提下，显著提升了对任意条件序列的建模和采样能力，为增强大语言模型的通用性和灵活性提供了简便有效的方案。

title: RAMS: Resource-Adaptive and Detection-Conditioned Model Switching for Embedded Edge Perception
summary: Edge object detection on embedded hardware requires balancing inference latency and detection quality under changing resource pressure. We present RAMS, a lightweight runtime controller that monitors device pressure, calibrates switching thresholds from idle behavior, and dynamically selects among three resident YOLOv8 tiers (NANO/SMALL/MEDIUM at 320/416/640 px) without model-reload latency. RAMS defines five switching policies, including two detection-conditioned variants that prevent aggressive downgrades after recent vulnerable-road-user (VRU) detections. We further introduce the VRU-Weighted Accuracy Score (SWAS), a scalar metric for offline policy comparison without ground-truth annotations, together with an oracle-bounded variant that separates detector circularity from genuine tier-retention benefit. Across Raspberry Pi 5, x86 laptops, and Jetson Orin ONNX/TensorRT deployments, the same controller equations operate over a 37x latency range. On Jetson Orin TensorRT under heavy load, the safety2 policy achieves 3.41 ms mean latency, 5.6x faster than fixed-MEDIUM inference, while retaining 74% of its proxy accuracy through near-NANO operation with selective SMALL and MEDIUM locks during VRU-positive windows. Detection-conditioned switching improves SWAS by 25.4% under oracle scoring and 47.3% under detector-derived scoring relative to threshold-only policies under heavy load. Live KITTI evaluation reports per-tier VRU recall of 24.2%, 41.2%, and 59.0%, showing that reactive overrides are fundamentally limited by baseline detector recall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向嵌入式硬件的边缘对象检测控制器RAMS，可以在不同资源压力下动态切换YOLOv8多种模型规格，实现低延迟和高检测质量的平衡，并设计了新的准确性度量方法和多种切换策略。
AI.motivation: 传统的对象检测在嵌入式设备上受制于有限算力，无法同时兼顾推理速度（低延迟）和检测效果（高质量），尤其在系统负载波动或遇到关键检测对象（如弱势道路用户VRU）时现有方案表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计RAMS运行时控制器，基于设备资源压力和历史检测结果，动态切换YOLOv8三种模型规格，无需模型加载延迟；定义五种切换策略，两种考虑检测结果（特别是VRU检测）以防止过早降级；提出VRU加权准确度分数（SWAS）及其oracle变体，无需标签即可离线评估策略优劣。
AI.result: 在多平台（树莓派、x86笔记本、Jetson Orin）部署，RAMS适应不同延迟需求；Jetson Orin重载下，safety2策略延迟为3.41ms，比固定中型模型快5.6倍，且在大多时间采用NANO模型、在有VRU时提升到SMALL或MEDIUM，准确性达固定MEDIUM模型的74%；带检测依赖切换的策略，SWAS提升25.4%（oracle打分）至47.3%（检测器自身打分）；KITTI实测显示各模型VRU召回率分别为24.2%、41.2%、59.0%。
AI.conclusion: RAMS方法可在边缘设备显著降低延迟并兼顾检测准确率，通过检测结果感知的策略能有效保留关键对象检测效果，但整体效果受限于所用基础检测器的召回率。

title: Bayesian Optimization for Learning Nonlinear MPC in Autonomous Agent Navigation
comment: Published at the IEEE ICRA 2026 Xplore Workshop (Oral), Cross-Disciplinary aspects of Exploration in Robotics, Reinforcement Learning, and Search
summary:
Real-time autonomous navigation in dynamic, unknown environments remains a fundamental challenge for mobile robotics. We propose a map-free framework that tightly integrates reactive rolling-horizon planning with nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC). At each control cycle, a LiDAR-based Gaussian occupancy representation is constructed and used to generate collision-free trajectories via A* search, which are then tracked by a CasADi/IPOPT MPC formulation incorporating a smooth sigmoid obstacle barrier. To improve robustness to parameter sensitivity, we adopt an offline Bayesian optimization scheme based on Tree-structured Parzen Estimators (TPE), which identifies near-optimal controller parameters with respect to a composite navigation objective. In addition, a Gaussian Process surrogate is used to analyze parameter sensitivity and provide insight into the optimization landscape.
  The proposed framework is robot-agnostic and is evaluated on the Unitree Go2 quadruped in simulation using Gazebo, followed by deployment on the physical robot. Experimental results show that parameters tuned in simulation transfer effectively to hardware, maintaining comparable performance without additional tuning. The full system achieves up to a 90.0\% navigation success rate when deployed, along with a 38.9\% average improvement in the evaluation metrics across simulated environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种无需地图的移动机器人自主导航系统，将实时滚动规划与非线性MPC紧密结合，并通过贝叶斯优化自动调整控制参数。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人在动态未知环境中的即时导航存在鲁棒性和泛化性挑战，尤其是在传感数据不完美且环境未知时。作者希望提升导航系统在实际硬件上的通用性和性能。
AI.method: 方法包括利用LiDAR生成高斯占据概率图，经A*搜索生成无碰撞轨迹，结合带障碍平滑函数的CasADi/IPOPT MPC跟踪轨迹；采用基于TPE的贝叶斯优化线下调整控制参数，并使用高斯过程分析参数敏感性。该系统不依赖SLAM地图且与机器人平台无关。
AI.result: 该方法在Unitree Go2四足机器人上仿真和真实硬件测试。实验表明，仿真调优的参数可直接迁移到真实机器人，导航成功率高达90.0%，同时在多个仿真环境中评测指标平均提升38.9%。
AI.conclusion: 论文展示了一种高鲁棒性、强泛化能力的自主导航框架。离线贝叶斯优化提升了系统参数的迁移能力和导航成功率，验证了方法的无平台相关性、实际可用性和有效性。

title: CoRA: Confidence-Rationale Alignment for Reliable Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning can improve LLM performance, but high answer confidence may be misleading when the accompanying CoT rationale is plausible yet incomplete or poorly supported. We study confidence--rationale alignment: whether a model's confidence in its committed answer is justified by its generated rationale. We introduce a GRPO-based reinforcement learning framework that jointly rewards answer correctness, committed-answer probability, and rubric-based rationale support, where the rubric assesses grounding, coherence, task match, and connection to the selected answer without revealing the gold answer to the judge. Across MedQA, MathQA, and OpenBookQA using three open-weight LLMs, our method reduces the confidence--rationale alignment error by up to 26.51% compared with untuned checkpoints, SFT, and correctness-only GRPO, while maintaining competitive accuracy and often improving calibration. These results show that reliable CoT reasoning requires not only confident answers, but rationales that substantively support them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GRPO的强化学习方法，同时优化大模型回答的正确性、置信度与解释的合理性，有效减少了模型自信但理由站不住脚的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的链式思维(CoT)推理虽然提升了LLMs的表现，但模型有时会对其答案极有信心，即使其给出的理由并不充分或存在漏洞。解决答案置信度与理由合理性不一致的问题，提升模型解释的可靠性，是本文的主要动机。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新的基于GRPO（Generalized Reinforce Policy Optimization）的强化学习框架，同时奖励答案的正确性、模型对答案的置信度、以及基于评分规则的理由支持。评分规则（rubric）从四个维度对理由进行评价：依据充分性、连贯性、匹配任务、与所选答案的关联性，且评分过程不暴露正确答案。
AI.result: 在MedQA、MathQA、OpenBookQA等任务以及多个开源大模型上实验表明，该方法最多能将置信度-理由一致性错误率降低26.51%，且模型准确率与标定性能与现有方法相比保持竞争力甚至有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 仅有自信的答案不足以实现可靠的链式思维推理，理由的支持强度同样重要。本文方法能显著提升大模型理由与答案置信度的一致性，朝着更可靠的模型推理迈出了一步。

title: AI for Maritime Security: Comparative Evaluation of CNN and Vision Transformer Architectures for Maritime Object Detection
summary: This study aims to enhance maritime security by using advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Computer Vision (CV) techniques. For this purpose, it was designed and assessed intelligent object detection systems that can detect the presence of ships on the sea surface under different real-time environments. To achieve this goal, a maritime image dataset with 6,468 images was used, covering different weather conditions like cloudy, foggy, rainy, and sunny environments. Six deep learning architectures were evaluated, including a base Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model, four transfer learning models (Xception, VGG16, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNetV2L), and a Vision Transformer (ViT) model. The models were compared using multiple performance indicators, including accuracy, Type I and Type II errors, model size, and video processing time. The results show that model performance varies depending on computational constraints and deployment conditions. While lightweight architectures are suitable for resource-limited devices, the ViT achieved the best overall performance, reaching 100% accuracy with the lowest error rates and the fastest video processing time. The findings highlight the potential of AI-driven computer vision systems for maritime surveillance, border protection, and autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用先进的人工智能与计算机视觉技术提升海上安全，通过多种深度学习模型对船只进行智能检测。
AI.motivation: 在保障海洋安全、边境保护和自主航行等背景下，亟需高效、准确的船只检测技术以应对复杂多变的海上环境。
AI.method: 构建并评估了六种深度学习架构：基础CNN、四种迁移学习模型（Xception、VGG16、MobileNetV2、EfficientNetV2L）及一种Vision Transformer（ViT），在包含6468张不同天气下的海上图像数据集上进行训练与测试，以多项性能指标（如准确率、类型一/二错误、模型体积及视频处理时长）进行对比分析。
AI.result: 轻量化模型适用于资源受限设备，但ViT在所有指标上表现最佳：达到100%准确率、最低错误率及最快视频处理速度。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的计算机视觉系统在海事监控、边境保护和自主航行等应用中具有极大潜力，特别是在复杂环境下表现优异。

title: Synthetic-to-Real Pipeline for Safe Landing Zone Detection
comment: Proceedings of Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV) 2026, Vancouver, British Columbia , Canada
summary: As Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) transition toward higher levels of autonomy, the ability to perform unassisted recovery in non-cooperative, unstructured environments becomes critical. Achieving safe autonomous landing requires high-fidelity semantic resolution to distinguish navigable terrain from hazardous obstacles, yet development is often hindered by the scarcity of annotated aerial datasets. This work proposes a comprehensive perception and data generation pipeline designed to bridge the sim-to-real gap for autonomous landing tasks. We introduce a procedural synthetic data engine that generates photorealistic urban environments with automated semantic annotations through domain randomization. A Transformer-based OneFormer architecture is fine-tuned exclusively on this synthetic data, leveraging multi-head self-attention mechanisms for global context resolution. To ensure operational safety, a deterministic landing module utilizes a Euclidean Distance Transform (EDT) and dynamic inference logic to identify the largest inscribed safe landing zones while maintaining strict clearance buffers around obstacles. Quantitative benchmarking against the UAVid dataset demonstrates robust semantic segmentation performance, while qualitative validation on real-world UAV footage confirms the system's ability to identify collision-free landing sites in unseen environments. Our results highlight the potential of high-fidelity procedural simulation to eliminate the need for manual annotation while providing robust, edge-deployable situational awareness for autonomous UAV recovery.

AI.tldr: 提出了一套利用合成数据增强无人机自主降落能力的感知与数据生成系统，无需人工标注即可实现高精度地形理解，并在仿真及实地均验证有效。
AI.motivation: 无人机在非合作且无结构环境下的自主回收对安全着陆要求高，但受限于缺乏高质量有标注的航拍数据，阻碍了语义分割和地形识别能力发展。
AI.method: 构建了一个合成数据生成引擎，通过域随机化自动生成带语义标注的逼真城市环境。利用改进的Transformer-based OneFormer网络，仅在合成数据上微调以提升全局地形理解。引入确定性着陆模块，结合欧几里得距离变换（EDT）及动态推理逻辑，在障碍物周围设置安全缓冲区，自动识别最大安全着陆区。
AI.result: 基于UAVid数据集的定量评测显示，系统的语义分割性能稳定强健；在真实无人机航拍视频上定性测试，系统能够识别前所未见场景下的安全着陆区，展示良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 高逼真度程序化仿真和自动语义标注，有望消除对人工标注的依赖，为无人机自主回收任务提供了高鲁棒性、可边缘部署的感知解决方案。

title: Nemotron 3 Ultra: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
summary: We introduce Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550 billion total and 55 billion active parameter Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Attention language model. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Ultra on 20 trillion text tokens, then extended the context length to 1M tokens, and post-trained using Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT), Reinforcement Learning (RL), and Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD). Nemotron 3 Ultra is our most capable model yet, employing multiple key technologies - LatentMoE, Multi Token Prediction (MTP), NVFP4 pre-training, multi-environment RLVR, MOPD, and reasoning budget control. Nemotron 3 Ultra achieves up to ~6x higher inference throughput as compared to state-of-the-art publicly available LLMs while attaining on-par accuracy. The state-of-the-art accuracy, high inference throughput, and 1M token context length make Nemotron 3 Ultra ideal for long-running autonomous agentic tasks. We open-source the base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints, along with the training data and recipe on HuggingFace.

AI.tldr: Nemotron 3 Ultra 是一种5500亿参数的混合专家（MoE）大模型，具备超长1M上下文、高推理速度和开源优势，适合复杂的自主智能体任务。
AI.motivation: 推动大语言模型（LLM）在推理效率、超长文本处理与高准确率方面的新突破，尤其满足长时且复杂任务场景对大模型的需求。
AI.method: 预训练采用20万亿文本tokens，采用混合Mamba-Attention结构，核心技术为LatentMoE、多Token预测（MTP）、专用量化NVFP4预训练、多环境强化学习（RLVR），还包括多指导老师策略（MOPD）及推理预算控制。先基于大规模SFT，再通过RL和MOPD进行后训练，并开放源代码及数据。
AI.result: Nemotron 3 Ultra 在推理吞吐量上达到主流开源LLM的6倍，并持平于当前精度最好模型。具备百亿级参数和百万Token级上下文，兼顾高精度与推理速度，在大规模任务及长序列场景表现优秀。
AI.conclusion: Nemotron 3 Ultra 实现了公有LLM在推理吞吐量、准确性与上下文长度的新高，具体适用于复杂、自主、长时任务，并以完全开源方式促进学术及产业发展。

title: Disagreement-Based Cross-Model Routing for Implicit Video Question Answering
summary: We study multiple-choice video question answering on the ImplicitQA benchmark, where the correct answer is never explicitly shown but must be inferred from off-screen events, line-of-sight cues, causal structure, and cross-shot spatial layout. On this benchmark a single frontier video LLM already operates near its accuracy ceiling, and we observe that conventional self-consistency strategies -- majority voting across repeated samples of the same model -- can hurt rather than help, because the model's errors on hard questions are correlated. We propose disagreement-based cross-model routing, a pure inference-time procedure that requires no labels and no training. We triple-sample a native-video model (Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview) at temperature zero, exploit the genuine sample-to-sample variance of its video-processing pipeline to identify the roughly 20% subset of questions where the three samples disagree, and route only that subset to a second model from a different family (Claude Opus 4.8) that consumes uniformly sampled frames with adaptive thinking. On the 1001-question validation set with public ground truth -- our main evaluation -- the method improves AvgAcc by +1.43 over the best single sample of the primary model, with per-category gains concentrated on Motion & Trajectory (+5.49), Inferred Counting (+3.45), and Vertical Spatial Reasoning (+1.82) -- the categories most dependent on cross-shot reference resolution. The same pipeline applied to the held-out 172-question CVPR 2026 ImplicitQA challenge test set achieves 82.03 AvgAcc / 79.71 MacroAvgAcc (+1.81 over the best single sample of the primary model), confirming the validation result on an independent split.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多项选择视频问答的新方法，通过检测模型间的不一致性，将难题自动转给另一模型判断，有效提升了现有模型的准确率，尤其是在跨镜头时空推理任务上取得显著进步。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式视频问答（ImplicitQA）基准上，前沿大模型在准确率上已接近天花板，并且用常规的自洽策略（如多次采样投票）在难题上效果反而变差，原因在于模型错误高度相关。因此需要一种能突破现有单模型极限、能智慧利用多模型互补性的推理方法。
AI.method: 本文提出“基于分歧的跨模型路由”策略：对每道题，先在主模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview）上采样三次，若三次答案不一致，则将该问题转交给第二个结构/族系不同的大模型（Claude Opus 4.8）处理，其余采用主模型结果。全流程无需额外训练或标签，仅依赖模型自身推理分歧。
AI.result: 在包含1001道题的验证集上，整体平均准确率比主模型单次最佳提升了1.43个百分点，尤其在“运动与轨迹”、“推理计数”和“垂直空间推理”这几类题目上提升明显（最高+5.49点）。在独立的172题CVPR 2026挑战集上，也获得了+1.81个百分点效果提升，验证了方法通用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用不同视频大模型的互补性，对答案分歧的题目进行动态跨模型路由，无需训练即可有效提升隐式视频问答表现，尤其适用于需要跨镜头空间推理的复杂任务。

title: Deep Learning-Based Lunar Crater Terrain Relative Navigation
summary: Accurate position estimation is crucial for the successful implementation of future lunar landings using autonomous vehicles, especially in dangerous environments with sparse terrain features. In this paper, we propose a terrain relative navigation (TRN) algorithm combining our deep-learning crater detector, which was designed specifically for the NASA Crater Detection Challenge problem, and an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Our detector analyzes crater features from the monocular images acquired from orbit, and their matches with craters from a global database are identified via a Hungarian assignment approach followed by the consensus-based outliers removal method. The estimated measurements are then used to refine an EKF, where spacecraft pose estimation in the Lunar-Centered Lunar-Fixed (LCLF) frame of reference, augmented with altitude aiding information, constrains radial drift. The simulation results indicate that even if the spacecraft is off from its actual location up to 5 km, TRN could recover from this situation, achieving navigation error reduction to a few hundred meters. It should be noted that in order to maintain crater feature correspondences, it is important to match the image resolution and the scales within the scene to the detector training set distribution.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于深度学习陨石坑检测器和扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）结合的月球地形相对导航（TRN）算法，实现了即使初始误差较大也能有效提高月球着陆器的位置估计精度。
AI.motivation: 未来月球自主着陆任务需要在地形特征稀疏、环境危险的条件下实现高精度的定位。当前传统方法在特征稀少或误差较大时性能有限，因此亟需更智能、鲁棒的位置估计算法。
AI.method: （1）使用专为NASA陨石坑检测挑战设计的深度学习陨石坑检测器，从单目轨道影像中提取陨石坑特征；（2）通过匈牙利算法与全球陨石坑数据库匹配，并采用基于共识的方法去除离群值；（3）将估算结果输入扩展卡尔曼滤波器，在月球固定坐标系下结合高程辅助信息，限制径向漂移，连续修正和提升着陆器定位精度。
AI.result: 仿真表明：即使初始定位误差高达5公里，该方法也能将导航误差降低到几百米，并有效从较大误差中恢复。保持特征匹配效果需确保输入图像分辨率和场景尺度与训练集分布一致。
AI.conclusion: 该TRN方法结合深度学习和EKF，显著提升了月球着陆器在高风险、特征稀疏环境下的定位鲁棒性与精度，对未来月球自主着陆任务具有重要参考价值。

title: Are Online Skill and Memory Modules Always Worth Their Tokens? A Budget-Constrained Study of Web Agents
summary: Online web agents often augment a base actor with memory, workflow, or skill modules. These modules can improve performance, but they also consume test-time tokens, a cost rarely reported alongside the actor's inference cost. We study online augmentation, where this overhead is paid on every task, and re-evaluate its benefits under a fixed total inference budget. We compare AWM, ASI, and ReasoningBank with a token-matched vanilla baseline that uses the same budget for additional actor steps. Across three WebArena domains and three models, Gemini 3 Flash, GPT-5.4-mini, and Qwen 3.6-27B, the vanilla baseline matches or surpasses all three augmentation methods in aggregate success rate while often using fewer total tokens. We observe a similar trend on WorkArena-L1 with Qwen 3.6-27B, indicating that the effect extends to enterprise knowledge-work tasks. Our results suggest that skills and workflow memory can be useful in specific domains, but their apparent gains often vanish against a budget-matched actor. We further show that run-to-run variance materially affects outcomes and should be reported as a core evaluation criterion for online web agents.

AI.tldr: 本论文重新评估了在线web代理常用的记忆、工作流和技能模块的实际效益，并在有限推理预算下与标准方法进行了对比。结论显示，许多增强方法的优势在预算匹配的情况下并不明显。
AI.motivation: 现有web代理常通过附加模块增强性能，但这些模块带来推理成本提升，这部分消耗常被忽略。论文希望揭示在固定预算下，这类增强是否真正带来收益。
AI.method: 作者对AWM、ASI和ReasoningBank三种增强方法进行了系统测试，并与在相同token预算下运行更多actor步数的标准方法进行比较，测试涵盖三种主流模型和多个web相关任务领域。
AI.result: 在大多数情况下，预算匹配的标准方法在整体成功率上与增强方法持平或更优，且token消耗更少。在知识型任务场景（如WorkArena-L1）也得到了类似结论。
AI.conclusion: 增强模块在特定领域有一定作用，但其总体提升多被严格预算限制下的标准方法抵消。作者建议未来评测需重视推理成本和实验波动，并将其作为关键指标公开汇报。

title: VigilFormer: Deformable Attention for Video Anomaly Detection with Causal Risk Inference
summary: Video anomaly detection in surveillance settings must balance detection accuracy against real-time throughput, a tension that existing methods address either through stronger feature extractors or more efficient architectures, but rarely both. We present VigilFormer, a unified framework that combines deformable spatio-temporal attention with causal temporal modeling to detect anomalies in untrimmed surveillance video. The proposed Deformable Spatio-Temporal Encoder (DSTE) attends to a sparse set of informative locations across frames, avoiding the quadratic cost of dense attention while retaining the ability to capture irregular motion patterns. A Causal Anomaly Classifier (CAC) applies dilated causal convolutions over snippet-level features and optimizes a contrastive multiple-instance learning objective that separates anomalous and normal representations without frame-level labels. To meet deployment constraints, an Adaptive Confidence Scheduler (ACS) dynamically skips low-information frames at inference time, reducing redundant computation in static scenes. Evaluated on UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech, and CUHK Avenue, VigilFormer achieves AUC scores of 87.83%, 97.21%, and 89.74% respectively, at 41.5 FPS on a single GPU, outperforming recent weakly-supervised methods in both accuracy and speed.

AI.tldr: VigilFormer是一种新的视频异常检测方法，在保证高准确率的同时，实现了实时处理速度，兼顾特征提取能力和架构效率，并显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有监控视频异常检测方法在准确性和实时性之间权衡，通常只能优化其一，难以兼顾高效的特征提取和网络结构的计算效率，实际部署面临瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出VigilFormer，包括：1）变形时空注意力编码器（DSTE），只聚焦于跨帧稀疏关键区域，降低注意力计算量同时能捕捉异常运动；2）因果异常分类器（CAC），用膨胀因果卷积和对比式多实例学习，无需帧级标注区分正常与异常片段；3）自适应置信度调度器（ACS），在推理时跳过信息量低的帧，减少冗余运算。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime、ShanghaiTech、CUHK Avenue数据集上，AUC分别达87.83%、97.21%、89.74%，处理速度41.5 FPS，准确性和速度均超过当前先进的弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: VigilFormer实现了高准确和高效并存的视频异常检测，特别适合实际监控环境部署，在多个公开数据集上展现出优异性能，优于现有主流方法。

title: Computing Smooth Geodesics under Two-Sided Curvature Bounds with Applications to Robotics and Image Analysis
summary: Curvature of planar curves serves as a key regularization term for computing second-order minimal paths, due to its tight relevance to desirable geometric properties such as smoothness, rigidity, and elasticity. In this paper, we tackle a more challenging problem in computational physics and geometry problem: tracking minimal paths whose curvature is constrained by arbitrary upper and lower bounds. For that purpose, we propose a new curvature-bounded geodesic model, developed under the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) partial differential equation (PDE) framework. It provides strong geometric control over minimal paths by enforcing curvature range constraints, whose paths are smooth and of bounded curvature limitation. We also present a discretization scheme for the Hamiltonian and the HJB PDE incorporating curvature bounds, allowing efficient solver for estimating numerical solutions to the model. Finally, we illustrate the capability of the proposed curvature-bounded geodesic model in applications of robot path planning and curvilinear structures tracking from images. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed curvature-bounded geodesic model serves as a powerful and robust tool for finding satisfactory paths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的曲率约束测地线模型，可有效计算满足曲率上下界约束的最短路径，并验证了其在机器人路径规划和曲线结构提取中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统的最小路径计算主要关注路径的光滑性，但很少考虑路径曲率的上下界。实际工程和物理应用中，如机器人路径规划等，常需路径不仅平滑而且曲率受限。因此，需要研究满足指定曲率区间约束的最短路径问题。
AI.method: 作者提出在Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman（HJB）偏微分方程框架下，建立曲率区间约束的测地线模型，并对哈密顿算子和HJB方程进行离散化，设计了高效的数值解法，以便计算满足曲率约束的最短路径。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提模型能有效约束路径曲率，生成的路径不仅光滑而且满足用户设定的曲率上下界要求。特别是在机器人路径规划和图像曲线提取等应用中，模型表现出较强的几何控制能力和稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 文章验证了曲率约束测地线模型在多个实际场景中的有效性和鲁棒性，为受曲率影响的路径规划和结构提取等任务提供了有力工具。

title: Deep Temporal Modeling and Ensemble Fusion for Multimodal Emotion Recognition from Physiological Signals
comment: Accepted for publication in the 17th ACM International Conference on Bioinformatics, Computational Biology and Health Informatics (ACM BCB 2026). DOI: https://doi.org/10.1145/3807503.3819363
summary: Physiological stress and emotion recognition are important for health monitoring and affective computing. In this work, we present a comprehensive evaluation of deep learning models such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN), and Transformer on the WESAD dataset for multimodal affect recognition using wrist and chest sensor signals. We perform ablation studies to assess the individual contributions of each modality by training models on wrist-only and chest-only inputs. In addition, we implement a late-fusion ensemble strategy that combines predictions from all three architectures trained on multimodal input. We also employ early fusion at the sensor level by concatenating wrist and chest signals before feeding them into each model. Our results show that Transformer models consistently achieve the highest accuracy in multimodal settings, while TCN models perform best in the wrist-only configuration. The ensemble method yields the highest overall accuracy (98.91 +/- 0.13%) and macro-F1 score (98.56 +/- 0.17%). These findings demonstrate the effectiveness of sensor fusion and ensemble-based fusion in developing robust systems for physiological emotion recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种深度学习模型（LSTM、TCN、Transformer）在多模态生理应激与情感识别上的表现，并提出集成融合策略大幅提升了准确率。
AI.motivation: 生理压力和情绪识别对于健康监测和情感计算至关重要，现有多模态信号的融合方式尚不明确其优劣，因此需要全面评估深度学习和融合策略在此领域的表现。
AI.method: 在WESAD数据集上，分别用来自手腕和胸部传感器的数据，测试LSTM、TCN和Transformer模型。采用消融实验，分别评估手腕、胸部单独输入，以及传感器级早期融合（信号拼接）；并提出后期集成融合（结合三种模型预测结果）策略以提升整体表现。
AI.result: Transformer在多模态条件下表现最佳，TCN在单手腕传感器下表现最优。集成融合方法取得了最高的整体准确率（98.91%）和macro-F1分数（98.56%）。
AI.conclusion: 传感器信号融合和模型集成大大增强了生理情感识别的鲁棒性和准确性，这对构建更强健的健康与情感监测系统具有重要意义。

title: Interpolation between Convolution and Attention via K-Nearest Neighbors
comment: Undergraduate Thesis in Computer Science at Bowdoin College
summary:
The shift from Convolutional Neural Networks to Transformers has reshaped computer vision, yet these two architectural families are typically viewed as fundamentally distinct. Convolutional Neural Networks are defined by spatially local convolution operations, while Transformers rely on global self-attention. We argue that convolution and self-attention, despite their apparent differences, can be unified within a single k-nearest neighbor aggregation framework. The critical insight is that both operations are special cases of neighbor selection and weighted aggregation. Convolution selects neighbors by spatial proximity while self-attention selects by feature similarity, revealing that they lie on a continuous spectrum rather than representing categorically different computations.
  We introduce Convolutional Nearest Neighbors (ConvNN), a unified framework that formalizes this connection. ConvNN exactly recovers standard and depthwise convolution by restricting neighbor selection to normalized spatial coordinates, and exactly recovers self-attention and its sparse variants, including KVT-attention, by replacing spatial proximity with scaled dot-product similarity. Beyond these special cases, ConvNN serves as a drop-in replacement for both convolution and attention layers, enabling systematic exploration of the intermediate spectrum between local and global aggregation through configurable similarity functions, neighbor selection strategies, positional encodings, and aggregation kernels.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一个统一框架（ConvNN），能够将卷积操作与自注意力操作整合在一起，并揭示二者之间本质的相似性。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer架构在计算机视觉领域通常被视为完全不同的体系结构，但它们实际上有深层的统一基础。作者希望揭示并利用卷积和自注意力之间的内在联系。
AI.method: 作者将卷积和自注意力都视为一种k近邻选择与加权聚合的操作。卷积通过空间邻近选择邻居，自注意力通过特征相似度选择邻居。基于这一视角，作者提出了ConvNN统一框架，可以通过不同的邻居选择准则（空间或特征）和加权方式对原有操作进行推广，并实现两者之间的连续转换。
AI.result: ConvNN框架能够在相应条件下完全等价地还原卷积和自注意力，包括相关变种如深度卷积和KVT-Attention。同时，它可以作为替换层，灵活探索局部到全局的信息聚合范围。
AI.conclusion: 卷积和自注意力本质上是基于近邻选择和聚合的特例，属于同一连续谱。ConvNN为后续分析和架构设计开辟了新思路，可系统性地研究和拓展局部与全局聚合方式。

title: TacStyle: Personalizing Tactile Robot Policies using Structured Behavior Representations
summary: Robotic systems that assist humans should be capable of adapting their behaviors to individual user preferences. For instance, users may want a robot arm to adjust the amount of force it applies while folding their laundry or cleaning furniture. Natural language provides an intuitive way for humans to communicate such preferences. Recent progress in language-conditioned robot policies has shown that robots can successfully use language prompts to determine what task to perform. However, extending the same approach to realize how the task should be performed requires detailed labels describing the preferences or styles of trajectories in the task data. Not only is collecting such annotations challenging, but conditioning directly on these labels may also fail to provide fine-grained control over a continuous range of behaviors. For example, it can be difficult to convey the exact force that a robot must apply through abstract instructions like "apply a bit more pressure than before". Therefore, in this work, we propose using language to reason over preferred behaviors instead of directly generating them. We first learn a structured latent representation that organizes user preferences according to differences in the corresponding trajectories. Then, given a preference prompt, we use a foundation model to interpret this latent space and choose a value that produces the desired behavior. Through both simulation and real-world experiments, we show that selecting robot behaviors from an intuitively structured latent space enables more precise adaptation to user preferences while requiring significantly fewer preference labels than language-conditioned policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构化潜变量的机器人个性化行为自适应方法，允许机器人更准确地依据用户自然语言偏好进行任务细致调控。
AI.motivation: 现有的语言驱动机器人行为策略主要集中在'做什么'，而难以精准控制'怎么做'，因为需要繁琐的偏好/风格标签，且难以实现对连续性偏好的微调。人类用户却希望通过自然语言，便捷地表达如施力大小等个性化要求。
AI.method: 本方法首先通过实际任务数据学习了一个结构化潜变量空间，以区分不同用户偏好对应的动作轨迹。随后，使用基础大模型解析用户的偏好提示，将其映射到该潜空间中，从而选择实现期望行为的具体取值。
AI.result: 通过仿真与真实机器人实验验证，该方法在只需较少偏好标签的情况下，实现了比传统语言驱动策略更精细的用户偏好自适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 结构化潜空间结合大模型解释能力，使机器人能更自如地理解和执行用户通过自然语言表达的操作偏好，提升了人机交互的灵活性和实用性。

title: ReportQA: QA-Based Radiology Report Evaluation
summary: Radiology report evaluation is essential for advancing automated report generation. Natural language generation metrics have limited clinical relevance. Clinical efficacy (CE) metrics evaluate important medical findings, but focus mainly on presence and cover only a limited set of entities. Due to heavy reliance on manual annotations, it is difficult for CE metrics to extend clinical entities or attributes. In clinical practice, radiology reports serve as a medium for information transfer. Clinicians use them to perform downstream diagnostic tasks without directly inspecting images. Based on this insight, we propose ReportQA, a clinical-related and flexible radiology report evaluation framework, supporting detailed quantitative analysis of radiology report generation systems. We first collect datasets covering multiple imaging modalities and anatomical regions. We then construct knowledge trees of clinical entities and attributes with radiologist guidance, and use large language models (LLMs) to extract structured information from raw reports. Next, we generate QA pairs from predefined templates and apply quality control through self-filtering and report-based filtering. During evaluation, the report is treated as context, and an LLM acts as a judge model to answer the QA pairs. Based on the resulting QA accuracy, we introduce QAScore metric. Compared with existing metrics, QAScore shows better alignment with radiologist judgments. Experiments on multiple state-of-the-art vision-language models reveal that current report-based inference paradigms struggle to learn fine-grained clinical representations and exhibit strong negative prior biases. In contrast, question-driven inference provides a more effective alternative. For reproducibility and extensibility, we release the knowledge trees, structured reports, and QA pairs, along with the pipeline code for QA construction and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新的名为ReportQA的放射科报告评估框架，通过生成和评判问答对，更好地评估自动化报告生成系统，并引入了QAScore指标，该指标与放射科医生判断高度一致。
AI.motivation: 当前的自然语言生成评估指标在临床相关性上有限，临床效能（CE）指标虽然关注重要医学发现，但覆盖的实体有限且难以扩展。自动化手段下，现有CE方法难以摆脱人工标注对实体和属性扩展的限制。
AI.method: 1. 收集涵盖多种影像模态和解剖区域的数据集；2. 在放射科医师指导下，构建临床实体和属性的知识树；3. 利用大语言模型（LLM）进行报告的结构化信息抽取；4. 基于预定义模板生成QA对，并通过自过滤和报告过滤进行质量控制；5. 在评估过程中，用LLM作为评判模型，基于报告内容回答QA对，并用QA准确率（QAScore）作为最终评价指标。
AI.result: QAScore在与放射科医生判断的一致性上优于现有评价指标。实验发现，现有基于报告的推理范式难以学习细粒度的临床表征，并存在强烈的负向先验偏差，而基于问题驱动的推理效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: ReportQA框架能提供更灵活、更精细的自动化报告评估手段，对提升下游诊断任务的有效性有实际意义，并促进了自动化评估方法的可复现性与可扩展性。研究还公开了相关的知识树、结构化报告、QA对及评价流程代码，有助于学界和业界进一步研究。

title: FairGen: Preference-Aligned Diffusion for Demographically Equitable Medical Image Synthesis
comment: Accepted for publication in npj Digital Medicine. 20 pages, 6 figures
summary: Medical imaging is central to modern diagnostics, and artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly used to support image-based analysis by improving efficiency, accuracy, and access to care. However, inequities in healthcare access and differential disease prevalence create severe demographic imbalances in clinical image data. Such imbalances are compounded by the fact that diseases can manifest with distinct features across demographic groups, rendering certain phenotypic presentations naturally rare. AI models trained on such imbalanced data risk perpetuating diagnostic bias and widening healthcare disparities. Here we introduce FairGen, a fairness-aware diffusion framework that synthesizes demographically balanced medical images while preserving pathology-relevant visual features. By embedding physician-aligned preferences into the generation process, FairGen improves subgroup coverage during synthesis and downstream classification. Applied to dermatology, radiology, and neuroimaging benchmark tasks, FairGen achieves fairness improvements of 95.9% for skin images, 80.0% for chest radiography, and 35.2% for brain MRI, while maintaining competitive diagnostic accuracy relative to models trained on original clinical data. Clinician-facing expert review and external validation on independent cohorts further support that these gains extend beyond standard fidelity metrics and are not confined to the original in-distribution datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了FairGen框架，能够生成具有公平性的医学影像数据，从而提升AI在不同人群中的泛化与诊断公平性。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据在不同人群中的分布严重不均，导致AI模型在诊断过程中容易加剧医疗不平等和偏见，因此迫切需要一种能够生成平衡人群分布影像的方法来减少诊断偏差。
AI.method: 提出了一种公平性感知的扩散生成框架FairGen，在影像生成过程中引入临床医师的群体偏好引导，实现不同亚群体特征的平衡生成，并应用于皮肤病、放射学和神经影像等多领域任务中。
AI.result: FairGen在生成影像时有效提高了少数群体覆盖率，在皮肤、胸部X光和脑MRI等任务中公平性指标分别提升95.9%、80.0%和35.2%。同时与传统方法相比，在保证诊断准确率的前提下实现了更好的公平性。
AI.conclusion: FairGen不仅可以提升生成影像的群体代表性和数据公平性，还能使下游AI模型在不同人群中的诊断更加公平，为减少医疗AI系统中的健康不平等提供了一种有效解决方案。

title: VANDERER: Map-Free Exploration using Future-Aware and Visual-Curiosity-Guided Diffusion Policy
summary: Mobile agents require efficient exploration strategies to map unseen environments and autonomously plan tasks. Traditional methods rely on generating occupancy maps and optimizing the sequence in which unexplored regions are visited. However, in sensor-constrained settings, such as those limited to monocular cameras, generating accurate occupancy maps is challenging. To address this, we propose VANDERER, an exploration framework that leverages a Visual Curiosity Module (VCM) to guide pre-trained diffusion policies using only monocular image data. This curiosity module predicts the outcomes of proposed actions via a navigation world model and evaluates them through a curiosity cost. The cost then guides the diffusion process toward generating actions that maximize exploration. Evaluated across diverse simulated environments, VANDERER consistently outperforms established baselines, exploring an average of 13.4% more area than NoMaD. Our results reveal a direct correlation between visual and geometric curiosity in outdoor environments, demonstrating that VANDERER can effectively leverage this relationship for efficient exploration using sensor-constrained agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VANDERER，一个仅利用单目视觉进行高效环境探索的新方法，通过视觉好奇心模块引导探索行为，有效提升了移动智能体的自主探索能力。
AI.motivation: 在传感器受限（如仅有单目相机）的环境下，传统构建占用地图的探索方法难以获得准确的环境信息，限制了智能体的自主探索能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于视觉好奇心模块（VCM）的方法。VCM预测智能体执行候选动作后的视觉结果，并结合导航世界模型计算好奇心代价，引导扩散策略生成最大化探索性的动作。该方法完全基于单目相机视觉输入，无需传统占用网格图。
AI.result: 在多种模拟环境中，VANDERER在平均探索区域面积上相比NoMaD方法提升了13.4%，整体优于现有主流方法。实验还发现视觉好奇心和几何好奇心之间在户外场景存在直接相关性。
AI.conclusion: VANDERER方法能在传感器受限的场景下，有效利用视觉与几何好奇心的关联，引导智能体高效自主地探索未知环境。

title: Equity with Efficiency: An Empirical Study of Tokenizers for Multilingual Large Language Models
summary: Multilingual large language models (LLMs) depend on subword tokenization to bridge discrete text and continuous neural representation. State-of-the-art multilingual LLMs often use Byte-level Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenizers that structurally favor high-resource languages and Latin scripts. For speakers of underrepresented languages, particularly those across Southeast Asia, this bias inflates inference costs and widens cross-lingual capability gaps. We present the first systematic comparison of equitable tokenizers on a unified benchmark spanning 11 Southeast Asian languages. Beyond tokenizer-level analysis of compression efficiency and cross-lingual equity, we assess downstream task performance through controlled 1.5B-parameter language model training using the same training data. Our results show that Parity-aware BPE lies on the Pareto frontier of the efficiency-equity trade-off, achieving strong compression parity at competitive cost. Morphology-Driven Byte Encoding delivers the best semantic reasoning performance through morphologically richer representations, albeit at a higher computational expense. Byte Latent Transformer underperforms on downstream tasks, possibly because its architectural assumptions misalign with the constraints of limited low-resource training data. Together, our findings demonstrate that cross-lingual fairness and tokenization efficiency are not fundamentally at odds, and offer practical guidance for designing equitable multilingual models.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统比较了不同子词分词器在11种东南亚语言上的公平性与效率，评估其对多语大模型下游任务表现的影响，并提出了更公平高效的分词方案。
AI.motivation: 多语大模型常用的BPE分词器对高资源语言更友好，导致低资源语言（尤其是东南亚语种）推理代价高、表现不佳。因此，研究公平、高效的分词方法非常有必要。
AI.method: 论文采用统一基准，系统比较多种分词器（包括常规BPE、公平BPE、形态驱动编码和字节潜变量Transformer），评估其压缩率、公平性和在1.5B参数大模型下的下游任务性能。
AI.result: Parity-aware BPE在效率与公平性之间取得最佳平衡；形态驱动编码在语义推理上表现最优但计算开销大；Byte Latent Transformer 在低资源下表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 分词公平性和效率并非根本矛盾，合理设计可兼顾两者。论文为多语模型公平分词提供实践建议。

title: FUSE: Quantifying Uncertainty in Vision-Language Models by Bayesian Fusing Epistemic and Aleatoric Uncertainty
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are playing an increasingly important role across multiple domains. In many applications, such as robotics, it is crucial to quantify the uncertainty in the output of these models. } We develop FUSE, a probabilistic framework for capturing two complementary sources of uncertainty in vision-language modeling: (i) aleatoric embedding-level uncertainty derived from input data vision-language ambiguity, and (ii) epistemic model-level uncertainty estimated from the semantic response diversity of VLMs. Our approach formulates a Bayesian fusion mechanism that analytically combines these uncertainty sources to produce a scalar measure of uncertainty. This measure can be used to reliably predict the model's output correctness for downstream applications. We demonstrate that our method outperforms baselines and achieves SOTA uncertainty calibration.

AI.tldr: 提出了FUSE框架，通过融合不同来源的不确定性，更可靠地衡量视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的输出可信度，提升了机器人等应用领域的安全性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在实际领域（如机器人）应用时，模型输出的不确定性评估不足，影响其可靠性与安全性。因此，亟需对VLMs输出不确定性进行精准量化。
AI.method: 提出一个概率框架FUSE，结合了：（1）输入层面的不确定性（即视觉-语言数据本身的模糊性带来的Aleatoric不确定性）；（2）模型层面的不确定性（通过模型语义响应多样性估计Epistemic不确定性）。两者用贝叶斯融合分析方法综合，得出单一标量的不确定性度量。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在基准测试中优于主流基线，且在不确定性校准方面达到最新水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: FUSE能够有效融合多种不确定性来源，为VLM输出提供可靠的不确定性评估，有助于提升下游任务的安全性和效果。

title: DynaHMRC: Decentralized Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Collaboration for Dynamic Tasks with Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) provide robots with richer task understanding and adaptability, making them promising for coordinating heterogeneous multi-robot systems in long-horizon tasks. Despite this potential, several challenges remain underexplored: (1) Centralized LLM schedulers scale poorly as team size and environmental complexity increase. A single model must process excessive contextual information, and long-context approximation may degrade reasoning quality; (2) Existing task formulations insufficiently consider dynamic settings, while robust adaptation to evolving task conditions is essential for real-world deployment; (3) Domain-specific data scarcity limits specialized robotic reasoning, making proprietary general-purpose models inefficient for expert tasks. To address these limitations, we propose DynaHMRC, a decentralized framework in which each robot acts as a role-aware LLM agent. This design mitigates the single-model context bottleneck and supports flexible collaboration across heterogeneous team configurations. DynaHMRC organizes collaboration as a four-stage closed-loop process: self-description, task allocation with leadership bidding, leader election, and reflective execution, supported by executable robot interfaces. We further develop a benchmark covering three task families, four dynamic variations, and six team configurations to systematically study dynamic task modeling. In addition, we conduct an empirical analysis to guide the construction of domain-specific expert datasets and fine-tune pretrained LLMs to improve specialized competence. Experiments show that DynaHMRC achieves higher success rates than strong baselines with fewer action and communication steps, while demonstrating promising scalability trends as team size grows within the evaluated settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DynaHMRC框架，使每个机器人都作为具备角色意识的LLM智能体进行分布式协作，显著提升异构多机器人系统在复杂动态任务中的适应性和扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多机器人系统在团队规模和环境复杂性提升时存在中心化调度模型效率低、任务动态适应不足、行业特定数据匮乏等问题，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: DynaHMRC采用分布式架构，通过四阶段闭环流程（自我描述、任务分配与领导力竞标、领导者选举、反思性执行），让每个机器人以LLM智能体方式独立决策并协作。同时，提出覆盖三类任务、四类动态变化和六种团队组合的评测基准，系统性评估任务动态建模。此外，通过构建领域专用数据集和微调LLM提升专业推理能力。
AI.result: DynaHMRC在实验中相较强基线方法，以更少的动作和沟通步骤取得更高任务完成率，并在扩大团队规模时展现良好扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DynaHMRC框架有效缓解单模型瓶颈，提升团队协作的灵活性和任务适应性，为多机器人系统在动态、复杂场景中的落地应用提供了有力支撑。

title: A Practical Evaluation Method for Long-Form Simultaneous Speech-to-Speech Translation
summary: Simultaneous speech-to-speech translation (SimulS2ST) enables real-time cross-lingual communication, but existing evaluation has focused largely on short or pre-segmented speech rather than long-form, continuous input. Prior approaches are difficult to reproduce and make assumptions that do not hold for end-to-end systems. We present a practical evaluation method for long-form SimulS2ST. Given source speech, pre-segmented source transcripts, and reference translations, we run automatic speech recognition (ASR) and forced alignment on the generated target speech to recover token-level timestamps, then apply a sentence-embedding-based aligner to match the target text to its corresponding source sentences. This enables sentence-level computation of latency and quality metrics, including YAAL and xCOMET, which are then aggregated into final system-level scores. Experiments on representative SimulS2ST systems show that the method is effective in practice and reveal that current systems suffer from substantial latency accumulation on long speech.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实用的长篇实时语音到语音翻译（SimulS2ST）系统评测方法，用以克服当前评测多以短语音为主且难以复现的问题。文中通过时间戳和语句嵌入对齐，实现句级别延迟和质量评估，并在实际系统实验中验证了方法有效性和现有系统的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前SimulS2ST的评估方法主要针对短语音或预分段语音，且难以复现，并对端到端系统做出不适用的假设，难以准确评价长篇连续输入下系统的实际表现。
AI.method: 方法流程包括：1）对输入的源语音采用ASR和强制对齐，获取目标语音的token级时间戳；2）利用基于句嵌入的对齐工具将目标文本对齐到对应的源句子，实现句级别的映射；3）据此可以精确计算包括YAAL、xCOMET在内的延迟和质量度量，并汇总为最终系统评分。
AI.result: 实验在有代表性的SimulS2ST系统上进行，表明该方法可行，并揭示了当前系统在处理长段连续语音时存在显著的延迟累积问题。
AI.conclusion: 该评测方法对长篇SimulS2ST系统评估具有实用价值，可为系统改进和社区发展提供基础，并指明目前系统在长语音处理方面仍有待提升。

title: Hierarchical GRU with Input-Conditioned Slot Queries for Ball Action Anticipation
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet Ball Action Anticipation Challenge, Validated Rank 4
summary: We present a hierarchical model for ball action anticipation in football broadcast video. Given a 30-second observation window, the system predicts actions occurring in the subsequent 5-second window across 10 classes. A shared local Transformer encodes clip-level features within each 5-second sub-window; a GRU then aggregates temporal context across all sub-windows; finally, a Transformer decoder with K input-conditioned event slots decodes the anticipation target via three decoupled heads (objectness, class, temporal offset). We introduce frequency-reweighted Hungarian matching that systematically favours rare action classes, and Gaussian soft targets for temporal bin supervision. On the SoccerNet Ball Action Anticipation benchmark, our method achieves 17.91% mAP on the test server.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种分层模型，用于在足球转播视频中预测球的动作。该系统在30秒观察窗口后，预测接下来5秒内可能发生的10类动作。利用Transformer和GRU相结合，以及创新的匹配和监督机制，实现了在SoccerNet基准上17.91%的mAP表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的球类动作预测方法难以高效捕捉复杂的时空关系，且对稀有事件的识别能力有限。因此，作者希望通过结构化、分层的模型和优化的匹配机制，提高预测准确性，特别是对罕见动作类别的识别。
AI.method: 方法包括三个主要步骤：1）用共享的局部Transformer对每个5秒子窗口内的视频片段进行特征编码；2）用GRU在不同子窗口间汇聚时序上下文信息；3）用带有K个事件槽的Transformer解码器和三分支输出（目标性、类别、时间偏移）完成动作预测。此外，作者引入了频率重加权匈牙利匹配机制处理类别不平衡，并采用高斯软标签进行时间监督。
AI.result: 在SoccerNet Ball Action Anticipation基准测试中，该方法在官方测试服务器上达到了17.91%的mAP。
AI.conclusion: 新模型有效提升了足球视频中球类动作预测的表现，尤其在处理较为罕见的动作类别方面。提出的建模和匹配方案为时序动作预判任务带来了改进。

title: Multimodal Physiological Assessment of Contact-Rich Physical Human-Robot Interaction Under Varying Environmental Conditions
summary: Physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) in real-world settings exposes operators to fluctuating environmental conditions during contact-rich tasks. Traditional task-centric evaluations overlook the physiological burdens imposed by these stressors. Therefore, we conducted a multimodal empirical study involving contact-rich tracing tasks under 18 distinct combinations of temperature, acoustic noise, and illuminance. Synchronously, we recorded electrodermal activity (EDA), surface electromyography (sEMG), eye-tracking data, and subjective environmental comfort ratings. Evaluating these physiological signals alongside execution data revealed hidden physiological costs not captured by objective performance. The results revealed that task performance remained stable across all environmental conditions. Autonomic workload, indexed by tonic skin conductance level (SCL), increased with temperature, while physical and cognitive workload were unaffected. Perceived environmental comfort showed no significant association with tracing error or completion time. These findings reveal a compensatory mechanism where operators maintain consistent performance by increasing their physiological effort to suppress thermal discomfort. Such insight motivates the development of physiology-aware control architectures that leverage real-time physiological metrics to reduce operator workload in unstructured environments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了现实环境下不同温度、噪声和照度组合对人体与机器人物理交互过程中操作员生理负担的影响，发现操作员维持任务表现时会付出额外的生理努力。
AI.motivation: 以往对人机协作的评估主要关注任务执行效果，忽略了各种环境压力对操作员生理负担的影响。实际应用场景中，操作员需长时间在多变环境下完成体力和注意力要求较高的任务，有必要全面评估环境因素对操作员负担的影响。
AI.method: 设计包括温度、噪声和照度18种组合的实验环境，志愿者在与机器人物理交互的追踪任务中同步采集EDA（皮肤电活动）、sEMG（表面肌电）、眼动数据和主观环境舒适度评分，并评估生理信号与任务表现的关系。
AI.result: 任务表现（误差与完成时间）在所有环境下保持稳定；温度升高时自主神经系统负荷（皮肤电平SCL）增加，但体力和认知负荷无显著变化。舒适感与任务表现无显著相关。
AI.conclusion: 结果揭示了操作员通过增加生理努力来维持任务表现、压制热不适的补偿机制。这一发现启发开发基于实时生理信号反馈、能主动减轻操作员负担的人机协作新方法。

title: CoCoGEC: Counterfactual Generation for Robust Grammatical Error Correction
summary: Grammatical error correction (GEC) systems are usually trained and evaluated on GEC benchmarks, but their performance often drops sharply once the surrounding context is slightly perturbed or extended. This indicates that the existing GEC models usually fail to understand the error patterns in the varying contexts. In this paper, we thoroughly investigate the counterfactuals for GEC tasks, where the subtle changes to the contexts could lead to the label flipping issue. We propose CoCoGEC, a counterfactual generation framework that creates copies of training instances with error-irrelevant contexts altered. Our framework systematically generates counterfactuals by (1) generating intra- and inter-sentence counterfactuals that maintain the error patterns as well as syntax of the original instances by altering the word-level and sentence-level contexts; (2) revising the generated counterfactuals by selecting the instances with flipped labels and high GEC Mutual Information (MI) coefficient. Extensive experiments show that our method substantially improves the stability of GEC models, outperforming a set of data augmentation baselines. Particularly, it could achieve absolute F0.5 gains of +9.9, +11.3, and +20.8 points on the perturbed BEA-19*,CoNLL-14*, and TEM-8* data set.Our code is released at https://github.com/Quinnok/CoCoGEC

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反事实数据生成（counterfactual generation）的新方法CoCoGEC，用于提升语法纠错（GEC）系统在环境变化下的稳定性和鲁棒性，并在多个数据集上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的语法纠错（GEC）模型在训练和测试环境稍有变化时性能急剧下降，说明它们无法有效理解不同上下文下的错误分布。本研究动机是提升GEC模型对上下文变化的适应能力和语法错误识别的稳健性。
AI.method: 提出CoCoGEC框架，通过自动生成反事实样本来扩充训练集。具体包括：（1）在词级和句级对原始样本的语境进行改动，创造语法错误不变但环境改变的新样本（即intra-和inter-sentence反事实）；（2）进一步筛选高相关性（高互信息MI）且标签发生翻转的反事实样本以增强模型训练。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，CoCoGEC显著提升了主流GEC模型在上下文扰动情况下的鲁棒性。针对BEA-19*、CoNLL-14*和TEM-8*等数据集，经反事实增强后的模型在F0.5指标上比分别高出9.9、11.3和20.8个点，优于常规数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 反事实样本生成能显著改善GEC模型在多变环境下的识错能力和稳定性，具有实际应用价值。相关代码已开源。

title: BBR-Net: Boundary-Balanced Replay for Continual Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Continual learning for medical image segmentation remains challenging under domain shift because replay-based methods often preserve appearance information without explicitly modeling anatomical structure. This study investigates whether structural consistency governs knowledge retention in continual cardiac ultrasound segmentation. We propose the Boundary-Balanced Replay Network (BBR-Net), which selects replay samples using boundary-aware priority and class balance to preserve anatomically informative regions. The method is evaluated on CAMUS and CardiacNet under forward (CAMUS to CardiacNet) and reverse (CardiacNet to CAMUS) task orders. In the forward setting, BBR-Net retains source-task performance close to an offline joint-training reference, while markedly reducing catastrophic forgetting and preserving competitive target-task adaptation. Ablation results show that boundary-aware prioritization contributes to retention and improves the balance between source-task preservation and target-task adaptation when combined with class-aware sampling. In contrast, the reverse setting reveals that structure-aware replay fails when initial representations are learned from noisy and structurally inconsistent data. To isolate this effect, we conduct a controlled structural perturbation analysis by progressively corrupting source-task boundaries while keeping the dataset, architecture, and training protocol fixed. Forgetting increases consistently as structural reliability decreases, suggesting that replay effectiveness is strongly influenced by the quality of stored structural information, rather than by memory capacity alone. These findings indicate that preserving anatomical structure under domain shift is a central factor in continual medical image segmentation, and that replay mechanisms should account for structural reliability to support robust knowledge retention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的持续学习方法BBR-Net，用于在医学图像分割任务中更好地应对不同数据域之间的迁移，并证明结构信息的保留对于抗灾难性遗忘至关重要。
AI.motivation: 主流replay持续学习方法主要保留了图像的外观信息，而忽略了对解剖结构的显式建模，导致在医学图像分割中难以在不同数据域之间有效迁移。为此，作者关注结构一致性在持续学习中的作用。
AI.method: 提出边界平衡重放网络（BBR-Net），通过边界感知优先级和类别平衡采样选择replay样本，突出结构信息在记忆中的作用。方法在两个心脏超声公开数据集（CAMUS、CardiacNet）上进行不同顺序的域迁移实验，并通过消融和边界扰动实验进一步评估关键机制的有效性。
AI.result: 在CAMUS到CardiacNet迁移时，BBR-Net保留了接近离线联合训练的源任务性能，大幅减缓遗忘，并兼顾目标任务适应。消融表明，边界优先机制和类别采样协同促进防遗忘。反向迁移时，结构感知replay难以抵御噪声、结构不一致带来的遗忘。边界扰动实验显示，结构可靠性下降会显著加剧遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 回放机制的有效性强烈依赖于被记忆的结构信息质量。持续医学图像分割任务中，仅靠记忆容量无法保证知识保留，需关注结构可靠性，优化回放策略。

title: Inference-time Policy Steering via Vision and Touch
summary: Inference-time steering adapts pre-trained generative robot policies during deployment by verifying candidate actions before execution. While prior methods typically perform this verification only with visual observations, vision alone is often insufficient for contact-rich manipulation, where success depends on both global task progress and subtle local interactions such as contact force. We introduce ViTaL, a visuo-tactile inference-time steering framework that formulates multimodal guidance as a bi-level optimization problem. At the high level, visual sampling-and-verification performs long-horizon mode selection, deciding what behavior the robot should execute. At the low level, tactile-guided diffusion editing refines the selected action sequence over a shorter horizon to satisfy local contact requirements. To support outcome-based steering, ViTaL learns a visuo-tactile latent world model and employs semantically aligned visual and tactile verifiers, including a novel text-conditioned tactile reward that scores predicted tactile futures directly in latent space. Across three real-world contact-rich manipulation tasks, ViTaL improves overall success by 51% over the base policy, outperforms unimodal steering by at least 33%, and exceeds naive multimodal fusion by at least 20%. Website: https://yilin-wu98.github.io/vital_website.

AI.tldr: ViTaL是一个在推理时同时结合视觉和触觉的引导框架，能大幅提升机器人在接触密集操作任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的推理时引导方法多仅依赖视觉信息，但在涉及精细接触的操作任务中，仅靠视觉不足以确保任务成功，需要同时结合触觉来感知接触动态。
AI.method: ViTaL提出将多模态（视觉与触觉）指导建模为双层优化问题：高层通过视觉实现行为的长时序选择，低层则利用触觉微调短时序动作序列以满足接触需求。此外，ViTaL训练了结合视觉与触觉的世界模型，并引入了文本驱动的触觉奖励机制。
AI.result: 在三个真实的接触密集操作任务中，ViTaL较基础策略成功率提升51%，较单一模态引导提升至少33%，较简单多模态融合提升至少20%。
AI.conclusion: ViTaL有效利用视觉与触觉信息，显著增强了机器人精细操作的表现，为多模态实时引导提供了新思路。

title: Stop When Further Reasoning Won't Help: Attention-State Adaptive Generation in Reasoning Models
summary: By incorporating test-time compute scaling, large reasoning models (LRMs) can solve complex problems through explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning processes. However, they often suffer from overthinking, resulting in redundant token outputs and degraded accuracy. Current methods to mitigate this issue remain limited: training-based approaches require substantial computational resources, while training-free methods rely on well-crafted prompts or unreliable confidence signals. In this work, we investigate early stopping from the perspective of attention distributions and propose a simple method, ASAG, which infers the model's reasoning state and adaptively adjusts the generation strategy. The proposed framework is training-free and plug-and-play, enabling seamless integration into existing LRMs. Extensive experiments on nine benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements across mainstream LRMs with varying parameter scales, including the DeepSeek-R1-Distill and Qwen3 series. Specifically, ASAG improves average accuracy by 3.2% while reducing the number of generated tokens by nearly 40% across all reasoning tasks on Qwen3-8B.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种简单的训练无关方法ASAG，通过自适应生成策略减少大规模推理模型（LRMs）在Chain-of-Thought推理中的冗余“过度思考”，提升了准确率并减少生成token数量。
AI.motivation: 在大模型的链式推理过程中，为了获取更复杂的思考链路，常需要扩展推理流程，但容易导致冗余推理（即‘过度思考’），造成输出冗余和准确率下降。现有解决方法要么需要大量训练资源，要么依赖复杂提示工程或可信度信号，效果有限。因此，需要一种高效、无需额外训练的方案。
AI.method: 作者提出基于注意力分布的早停方法ASAG，该方法无需额外训练，能够实时推断模型的推理状态，并根据当前状态自适应调整序列生成方式。ASAG以插件化形式接入现有LRMs，实时决定是否继续推理或提前停止生成。
AI.result: 在九个主流推理任务基准上，大量实验证明ASAG能在不同规模的主流LRMs（如DeepSeek-R1-Distill和Qwen3系列）上稳定提升效果，平均提升Qwen3-8B模型的推理准确率3.2%，同时减少近40%的生成token数。
AI.conclusion: ASAG无需重新训练，可以作为插件无缝集成到现有大模型中，在提升推理准确率的同时大幅降低计算与输出冗余，为大模型推理提供了一种高效实用的过度思考缓解方案。

title: Steady-Forcing: Balancing Spatial Persistence and Motion Continuity in Long-Horizon Nature Video Diffusion
summary: Autoregressive video diffusion models enable streaming generation but often degrade over long rollouts: static scene layouts drift, while mechanisms that improve spatial stability tend to suppress motion, causing natural flows such as water, fire, or smoke to stagnate. We study this stability-motion trade-off in fixed-camera long-horizon nature video generation, where the two failure modes can be more clearly separated than in moving-camera settings. We propose Steady-Forcing, a memory and training framework combining a persistent visual anchor (V-Sink), an exponential moving-average motion memory (EMA-Sink), block-relative temporal encoding, periodic cache purification, and distillation from a Wan2.1-14B teacher with motion-rewarded priors under task-focused configurations. Together, these components are designed to preserve background identity while sustaining visually plausible fluid dynamics over multi-minute autoregressive rollouts. Evaluations across seven baselines show that Steady-Forcing improves long horizon background consistency and imaging quality, while a blind user study indicates stronger perceived stability and motion continuity. The benchmark evaluation further suggest that generic VBench aggregate scores under-penalize fixed-camera artifacts as well as rewarding drift-induced optical flow as Dynamic Degree while not directly penalizing texture hardening or flow stagnation - motivating future task-specific benchmarks for static-camera nature-flow evaluation. Project page: https://minar09.github.io/steadyforcing/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Steady-Forcing的自回归视频扩散模型方法，提升了长时间固定摄像机视频生成中的场景稳定性与动态运动表现。
AI.motivation: 当前自回归视频扩散模型在长视频生成时，容易在场景布局保持（稳定性）与运动流畅性之间产生权衡，相关机制往往会抑制运动，导致如水流、火焰等自然流动停滞，尤其在固定摄像机视频中这一问题更突出。
AI.method: 提出Steady-Forcing框架，结合了视觉锚点（V-Sink）、指数滑动平均运动记忆（EMA-Sink）、分块相对时间编码、周期性缓存净化，以及结合运动奖励先验的蒸馏训练方法，以强化背景一致性的同时保持自然流动。
AI.result: 在七个基线方法对比下，Steady-Forcing在长视频场景下一致性和画质表现均有提升。用户盲测显示其在稳定性和运动连续性上优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: Steady-Forcing解决了固定摄像头场景下长时间自然流动的稳定性—运动性难题，现有基准可能低估相关假象，未来应开发专门的评价标准。

title: LV-Calib: LiDAR-Camera Extrinsic Calibration with Boundary-Response Modeling
summary: We present LV-Calib, a calibration framework for LiDAR-camera extrinsic estimation and LiDAR boundary-response calibration using a printable planar target. The target serves as a shared observation carrier: visual fiducials provide indexed image measurements, while circular reflectivity boundaries provide LiDAR-observable structural feature points. Instead of directly fitting boundary points as ideal geometric contours, LV-Calib automatically crops background points, estimates the target plane, and iteratively refines accurate LiDAR-side 3-D feature points from intensity and geometric constraints. The refinement explicitly handles the broadened and distorted transition band induced by finite beam footprint and mixed-intensity returns around black-white reflectivity discontinuities. Given these refined LiDAR features, we formulate a weighted reprojection-consistent extrinsic optimization with LiDAR feature alignment, where image observations are kept in the reprojection domain and LiDAR feature residuals are weighted by refinement confidence. Finally, using the estimated extrinsic and the extracted transition band, LV-Calib calibrates the LiDAR boundary response by estimating pitch-yaw-range residual statistics of boundary-overlap samples. Experiments on printed-board calibration data demonstrate sub-pixel reprojection accuracy, millimeter-level LiDAR feature consistency, and improved odometry performance. Code and calibration data will be released for reproducible evaluation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了LV-Calib，一种基于可打印平面标定板实现LiDAR与相机外参估计及LiDAR边界响应校准的通用框架。通过融合视觉fiducial点和激光雷达强度边界，实现高精度标定，提升了LiDAR-视觉融合系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-相机标定方法中，LiDAR特征回波易受边界模糊、混叠影响，导致外参标定不精确。同时LiDAR边界响应特性缺少高效自动的估计机制，制约了高精度多传感器融合与定位应用的发展。
AI.method: 使用含可视fiducial和圆形黑白反射边界的可打印标定板，通过自动剔除背景点、估算目标平面，结合强度与几何约束迭代精化激光点的三维坐标，显式建模和校正LiDAR边界响应的模糊带。在变换优化中，将图像点保持在重投影域，LiDAR残差按置信度加权，最终基于标定外参和边界样本统计，量化并校正LiDAR边界响应特性。
AI.result: 在实物标定板数据上，LV-Calib实现了像素级视觉重投影精度、毫米级LiDAR特征对齐一致性，并显著提升了基于LiDAR和视觉的里程计性能。
AI.conclusion: LV-Calib为LiDAR-相机系统外参和特性校准提供了统一且自动化的解决方案，可重复评测，兼具实用性和高精度，有助于推进多传感器融合定位的落地。

title: Ling and Ring 2.6 Technical Report: Efficient and Instant Agentic Intelligence at Trillion-Parameter Scale
summary: Efficient and scalable agentic intelligence requires models that can deliver both low-latency responses and strong reasoning capabilities while remaining practical to train, serve, and deploy. In this report, we present Ling-2.6 and Ring-2.6, a family of models designed to address this challenge at scale. Ling-2.6 is optimized for instant response generation and high capability per output token, whereas Ring-2.6 is tailored for deeper reasoning and more advanced agentic workflows. Instead of training from scratch, we upgrade the Ling-2.0 base model through architectural migration pre-training and large-scale post-training. This upgrade is guided by a unified co-design of model architecture, optimization objectives, serving systems, and agent training environments, enabling improvements in both model capability and deployment efficiency. At the architectural level, we introduce a hybrid linear attention design that integrates Lightning Attention with MLA, improving the efficiency of long-context training and decoding. To further enhance token efficiency, we optimize capability per output token through Evolutionary Chain-of-Thought, Linguistic Unit Policy Optimization, bidirectional preference alignment, and shortest-correct-response distillation. For agentic capabilities, we propose KPop, a reinforcement learning framework designed to support stable training of Ring-2.6-1T on large-scale environment-grounded data. KPop improves training efficiency through asynchronous scheduling across coding, search, tool use, and workflow execution, enabling scalable learning from complex agent-environment interactions. Together, Ling-2.6 and Ring-2.6 provide a practical pathway toward efficient, scalable, and open agentic systems. We open-source all checkpoints in the 2.6 family to support further research and development in practical agentic intelligence.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Ling-2.6和Ring-2.6两类面向高效、可扩展的智能体模型，在保证推理能力的同时兼顾低延迟、易部署。
AI.motivation: 当前高效且可扩展的智能体系统需要模型兼具快速响应和强大推理能力，且易于训练和部署。然而现有模型在实用性、效率和推理能力方面难以平衡。
AI.method: 作者对Ling-2.0模型进行了架构迁移预训练和大规模后训练，并通过模型架构、优化目标、服务系统与训练环境协同设计。架构层面引入了Lightning Attention和MLA混合线性注意机制，并结合多种提高输出token效率的方法（如进化链式思维、语言单元策略优化等）。为增强智能体能力，设计了KPop强化学习框架，提升大规模数据下的训练稳定性与效率。
AI.result: Ling-2.6在极速响应和单token能力上表现优异，Ring-2.6在复杂推理和智能体流程中效果显著，KPop框架和混合注意力机制提升了大规模环境下的训练与推理效率。所有2.6家族模型已开源以促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: Ling-2.6和Ring-2.6模型为高效、可扩展、易部署的智能体系统提供了实际路径，有望推动实用智能体技术发展。

title: UtVAA: Ultra-tiny Vision Transformer with Affix Attention for Mobile Image Classification
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have demonstrated strong representation capability in image classification. However, their quadratic self-attention complexity and large parameter counts limit deployment on resource-constrained mobile and edge devices. This paper introduces UtVAA, an ultra-tiny Vision Transformer architecture designed for efficient visual recognition under strict computational budgets. It incorporates a novel Affix Attention block that combines depthwise-pointwise local feature extraction, linear self-attention, coordinate attention for spatial dependency modelling, and a lightweight ternary fusion strategy to integrate local and global representations. In addition, Dilated Bottleneck blocks expand the receptive field using dilated depthwise separable convolutions while maintaining low FLOPs and stable optimisation through residual connections. UtVAA is implemented in scalable Tiny, Medium, and Large variants, with the smallest model containing 204.67K parameters and 53.95M FLOPs. Experimental results on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, PlantVillage-Tomato and SLIF-Tomato datasets show that UtVAA achieves competitive accuracy within a sub-million-parameter regime. Overall, the results demonstrate that transformer-based vision models can be redesigned into ultra-tiny architectures without significant loss in discriminative performance, making UtVAA suitable for mobile and edge deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/romiyal/UtVAA

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种超小型ViT架构UtVAA，兼顾高准确率与极低算力和参数需求，适用于移动和边缘设备。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在图像分类上表现强大，但其高计算复杂度和参数量限制了在资源受限的场景（如移动端与边缘设备）的部署，因此需要设计更高效的ViT架构。
AI.method: UtVAA通过设计创新的Affix Attention模块以及Dilated Bottleneck块来降低复杂度。Affix Attention集成了深度可分卷积的局部特征提取、线性自注意力和坐标注意力，并通过轻量化融合策略结合局部与全局信息。Dilated Bottleneck利用扩张的深度可分卷积增加感受野，同时采用残差结构维持优化稳定。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、PlantVillage-Tomato与SLIF-Tomato等数据集上，UtVAA在参数量不足百万的情况下依然获得了媲美主流模型的分类准确率。最小模型仅含20多万参数和不到5400万FLOPs。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了视觉Transformer可通过结构创新被简化为超小型架构，而不会显著损失判别能力，使其更加适于移动或边缘设备部署。

title: Steering Autoregressive Vision-Language-Action Policies via Action Token Intervention
summary: We present Token Steering (TS), a method for dynamically steering trajectories generated by an autoregressive vision-language-action (VLA) model through direct intervention in the action-token space. TS injects low-dimensional user inputs into the model's native action-token representation, allowing users to influence trajectory generation without modifying the underlying vision-language model (VLM) architecture. Because TS operates entirely at inference time, it requires no additional training or finetuning. User inputs guide rather than override the pretrained policy, allowing users to influence robot actions while preserving the dexterity, smoothness, and task priors learned by the VLA. We evaluate TS on two household manipulation tasks -- drawer closing after object placement and state-aware object swapping -- and improve success rates from 10.0% to 72.5% and from 16.7% to 93.8%, respectively. By enabling lightweight, intuitive steering over robot foundation models, our interface has the potential to improve human-robot interaction in consumer environments and broaden accessibility for individuals with limited physical control. Project website: https://jasontchan.github.io/token-steering/ .

AI.tldr: 本文提出Token Steering（TS）方法，通过对自回归视觉-语言-动作模型的动作token空间进行直接干预，实现了用户对机器人行为生成过程的动态引导，显著提升了任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型在实际任务中缺乏易于用户交互的动态指引能力，尤其是无需修改模型结构或重新训练的情况下，难以满足人类与机器人自然直观的互动需求。
AI.method: Token Steering方法在推理阶段将低维用户输入注入至模型的动作token表示中，实现对预训练策略的引导而非完全覆盖，且无需对底层视觉-语言模型进行结构修改与再训练。
AI.result: 在家庭场景下的两个操作任务中，TS方法将成功率从10.0%提升至72.5%（抽屉关闭任务），从16.7%提升至93.8%（对象交换任务），显著提升了机器人的实际表现。
AI.conclusion: TS为机器人基础模型提供了轻量化且直觉的交互接口，提升了人机交互质量，为行动受限人群等用户群体降低了使用门槛，在消费级机器人环境中具有广泛的应用前景。

title: AdaMame: A Training Recipe for Adaptive Multilingual Reasoning
summary: While Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) show strong performance in English, they often fail to reason in the language of the query, a phenomenon known as language collapse. Existing RL-based fixes typically add a binary language fidelity reward to the accuracy objective, yet still incur trade-off in accuracy, mid-trace code-switching, and excessive token usage. In this work, we propose AdaMame, a two-stage training recipe for multilingual mathematical reasoning that addresses these limitations by adaptively aligning the reasoning language to the query language without compromising accuracy. The first SFT stage fine-tunes on naturally occurring reasoning traces across five languages to establish multilingual reasoning capability. In the subsequent RL stage, we introduce AdaMame-GRPO, an adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) in which a query-conditioned alignment factor grows progressively during training, guiding the model to first explore diverse reasoning languages before exploiting reasoning in the query language. Evaluated across two benchmarks, two LRMs, and 12 languages, AdaMame-GRPO achieves Pareto-optimal performance across reasoning accuracy, language fidelity, and token efficiency over all baselines, with the strongest gains on out-of-domain, lower-resource languages.

AI.tldr: AdaMame提出了一种自适应对齐推理语言的方法，使多语言大模型在推理时更好地使用查询语言，无需牺牲准确率，还能提升语言一致性和效率，尤其对低资源语言提升明显。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在非英语语言推理时常出现语言崩溃，无法坚持用用户查询语言进行推理，而现有强化学习方法虽然引入语言奖励，但难以兼顾准确率、语言一致性与计算效率。
AI.method: 提出AdaMame，两步训练方法：先用多语言推理数据监督微调（SFT）建立多语能力，再在RL阶段采用AdaMame-GRPO（引入查询条件下逐步增加的对齐因子）引导模型探索多语言推理，最终聚焦于与查询语言一致的推理。
AI.result: 在两个基准任务、两种大模型、12种语言的评测中，AdaMame-GRPO在推理准确率、语言一致性和token效率三方面都优于现有方法，尤其对低资源语言与非领域数据提升显著。
AI.conclusion: AdaMame有效解决多语推理时的语言崩溃问题，实现了准确、语言一致且高效的多语言数学推理，对提升低资源语言大模型推理表现具有显著意义。

title: GridVQA-X: A Framework for Evaluating Multimodal Explainability Methods
comment: 23 pages, 15 Figures, Accepted for poster presentation at CVPR 2026 TRUE-V Workshop
summary: With the increasing development of Vision-Language Models, it becomes imperative that their predictions are readily explainable to relevant stakeholders. However, the field of explainability has not kept pace with the multimodal surge. While recent Multimodal Explainable AI (MxAI) methods generate explanations to attribute the interaction between different modalities, current evaluation protocols lack the ground truth required to distinguish between true cross-modal reasoning (e.g., spatial composition) and shallow cross-modal shortcuts (e.g., Bag-of-Words attribute matching). It remains unknown whether MxAI methods faithfully capture synergistic interactions or merely hallucinate reasoning on models acting as simple feature detectors. In this paper, we introduce GridVQA-X, the first diagnostic framework specifically designed to evaluate cross-modal explainability. Unlike natural datasets, GridVQA-X leverages a closed-world synthesis logic to generate unique, mathematically guaranteed explanations. We utilize this controlled environment to train paired ground-truth models on identical architectures: $M_{\text{pure}}$, which learns robust spatial-relational reasoning and $M_{\text{spur}}$, which is structurally forced to rely on cross-modal shortcuts. This behavioral divergence creates a rigorous testbed: a faithful explainer must report distinct reasoning pathways for each model. Our findings reveal that widely used methods fail to distinguish between models relying on genuine spatial-relational reasoning and those exploiting cross-modal shortcuts, highlighting a critical gap in capturing true cross-modal synergy and misrepresenting how multimodal models actually make decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GridVQA-X框架，专门用于诊断和评估视觉-语言模型的跨模态可解释性，发现现有方法无法区分真实推理与浅层捷径。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型广泛应用，但其可解释性未能与多模态发展同步。现有的多模态可解释方法和评测协议缺乏区分真实跨模态推理与简单匹配（捷径）能力，无法让利益相关方真正信任其决策机制。
AI.method: 提出了GridVQA-X，一个基于合成数据、拥有数学保证解释的诊断框架。在该框架下，作者训练了两类具有相同架构的模型：一类$M_{\text{pure}}$专注于空间关系推理，另一类$M_{\text{spur}}$被结构性地引导只利用模型捷径（比如跨模态词匹配）。通过这种设计，可以严格测试解释方法是否能区分不同推理路径。
AI.result: 实验显示，即使是被广泛使用的多模态可解释性方法，也无法正确区分依赖空间推理模型与依赖跨模态捷径模型，无法真实反映模型的推理路径。
AI.conclusion: 目前主流多模态可解释方法有重大缺陷，无法真正揭示模型推理机制，急需更加精准的可解释性技术以促进模型可信和可用。

title: An Autonomous Subgram SMA-Based Swimmer
summary: We present the Swima, a bioinspired 900-mg swimmer propelled by two 10-mg high-work-density (HWD) actuators driven by shape-memory alloy (SMA) wires. We integrated onboard power and computation by using a custom-built printed circuit board (PCB) and an 11-mAh 3.7-V 507-mg single-cell lithium-ion (Li-Ion) battery, which in conjunction enable autonomous swimming in excess of 18 min. The Swima can swim at speeds of up to 22.4 mm/s (0.56 Bl/s), achieves turning rates of up to 14°/s, and can follow 0-degree heading reference trajectories with root mean square (RMS) values of tracking errors of about 6.5° across multiple tests. This robot is the first subgram microswimmer with onboard power, actuation, and computation developed to date.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种仅重900毫克的仿生微型游泳机器人Swima，首次实现了亚克级机器人在集成自供电、驱动与计算的条件下自主游动，且续航超过18分钟。
AI.motivation: 现有微型水下机器人在体积和重量上受限，难以实现全部组件（动力、驱动、计算）集成于微型平台并长时间自主运行。因此，开发具备综合能力的更小型机器人对仿生学和微型机器人领域具有重要意义。
AI.method: 研究人员采用了两组10毫克高功密度驱动器（HWD）作为推进器，由形状记忆合金（SMA）线驱动，总重量仅900毫克。开发了定制PCB板和重量为507毫克、11mAh的单节锂离子电池，实现了机器人全部功能的板载化，并支持长时间自主运行。
AI.result: Swima机器人能以最高22.4毫米/秒（0.56体长/秒）速度游动，最大转向速率14°/秒。在多次测试中，能以均方根跟踪误差6.5°贴合0度航向，续航时间超18分钟。
AI.conclusion: Swima是首个实现板载电源、驱动与计算的亚克级仿生微型游泳机器人，可为微型机器人自主能力和应用研究带来突破。

title: When Cognitive Graphs Meet LLMs: BDEI Cognitive Pathways for Panic Emotional Arousal Prediction
summary: Predicting individual panic emotional arousal timing before manifestation is essential for proactive emergency intervention. Existing methods incorporate cognitive elements but none explicitly model the emotional arousal process, making them ill-suited for emotional arousal timing prediction. We argue that grounding prediction in appraisal emotion theory is necessary because it explicitly models this process, but three problems must be solved. (1) Appraisal theory posits that emotion arises from simultaneous evaluation across multiple threat dimensions, yet no prior work fuses these inputs into risk perception. (2) Existing cognitive models lack an Emotion node, decoupling threat appraisal from emotional arousal and forcing emotions to be inferred indirectly from behaviors. (3) Given their generalizable cognitive reasoning, current approaches adopt LLMs as the primary decision-maker, yet overlook the fragility and hallucination-proneness of their outputs. To address these issues, we introduce PanicCognitivePath (PCP), a framework that addresses all three. A Psychological Safety Distance (PSD) model, grounded in psychological distance theory, maps four-domain signals into a unified risk metric as the entry condition for subsequent cognitive reasoning. An explicit Emotion node grounded in appraisal emotion theory is introduced into BDI, forming a Belief-Desire-Emotion-Intention (BDEI) pathway. Agents whose risk metric exceeds the PSD threshold enter this pathway, coupling threat appraisal directly to emotional arousal.
