The BDEI pathway governs all state transitions while the LLM is confined to parameter estimation for the Belief-to-Desire transition, confining hallucinations to a single step and preventing error propagation. Experiments on Hurricane Sandy show PCP improves arousal timing accuracy by 10.68% over baselines, reduces peak count error to 7.07%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架PanicCognitivePath（PCP），用于预测个体恐慌情绪激发的时机，通过引入基于评价情绪理论的方法显著提升了预测准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前紧急事件干预需要预判个体情绪激发，但传统方法未能显式建模情绪激发过程，使得对恐慌爆发时机的预测效果有限。现有方法通常基于认知模型，缺少对情绪动态过程的建模，影响了预测的时效性和准确性。作者认为应借鉴评价情绪理论，因为该理论清晰描述了情绪激发过程，但面临多维威胁整合、情绪节点缺失、LLM输出不稳定等三大难题。
AI.method: 作者提出PCP框架，核心创新包括：（1）基于心理距离理论的心理安全距离（PSD）模型，将多维信号融合为统一的风险指标；（2）在传统BDI模型基础上，显式引入“情绪节点”，形成Belief-Desire-Emotion-Intention（BDEI）通路，实现威胁评估与情绪激发的直接耦合；（3）将大模型（LLM）的作用限定为Belief到Desire这一步的参数估算，有效遏制LLM幻觉带来的误差扩散。
AI.result: 在Hurricane Sandy实际数据评测中，PCP框架将恐慌情绪激发时机的预测准确率提升了10.68%，峰值计数误差降低至7.07%，优于传统对照方法。
AI.conclusion: PCP框架通过引入评价情绪理论和创新的风险感知建模，有效提高了恐慌情绪激发时机的预测能力，对突发事件的前置干预和群体应急管理具有重要应用前景。

title: HorusEye: Language as Dynamic Attention for Emergency Visual Analysis
summary: We introduce HorusEye, Language as Dynamic Attention for Emergency Visual Analysis. Our investigation followed five stages. The first one is benchmarking RefCOCO-Degraded, a dataset of 15,244 images (3,811 base images x 4 conditions: Clean, Fog, Smoke and Thermal) with systematic visual degradation. Through four research questions, we evaluate multiple VLMs (Gemini, Qwen2-VL, BLIP-2, LLaVA, Kosmos-2) across visual grounding the second stage, language feedback recovery the third one, health VQA tasks the fourth, and hallucination analysis the final stage. Our key finding is that language feedback effectiveness is model-dependent: Gemini achieves +47.3% improvement in thermal conditions through iterative language feedback, while Qwen2-VL shows -5.1% degradation under the same protocol. We also identify the 'Thermal Paradox' where cropping strategies that improve RGB performance catastrophically fail in thermal imagery. Furthermore, BLIP-2 uniquely hallucinates more under degradation, making it unsuitable for emergency deployment

AI.tldr: 本论文提出HorusEye框架，针对紧急情境下视觉分析，系统评测多种视觉语言模型（VLMs）在不同视觉降质条件下的表现，并分析了模型依赖性及应用局限。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在灾难或紧急场景下受视觉降质影响较大，缺乏有效应对策略。为提升模型在恶劣条件下的应用价值，需要系统评测模型鲁棒性及优化手段。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含清晰、雾、烟、热成像等四种条件的RefCOCO-Degraded数据集，涵盖15,244幅图片。通过五步实验流程，包括视觉定位、语言反馈恢复、健康相关视觉问答、幻觉分析等，系统比较Gemini、Qwen2-VL、BLIP-2、LLaVA、Kosmos-2多种主流VLM性能。
AI.result: 实验发现，语言反馈机制对模型提升具有依赖性：Gemini在热成像条件下通过反复语言反馈，性能提升47.3%；而Qwen2-VL同策略则降低5.1%。任务中还发现“热成像悖论”：RGB下有效的裁剪方法在热成像下反而灾难性失效。此外，BLIP-2在视觉降质场景下出现更多幻觉，显示其在紧急任务中不可取。
AI.conclusion: 论文指出视觉语言模型在特殊场景（如热成像）和不同语言反馈策略下表现差异巨大，应根据应用场景定制模型和处理方案，警惕模型幻觉问题以保障紧急任务安全可靠。

title: Exact, Efficient, and Safe Occlusion-Aware Planning Using AH-Polyhedrons
summary: Safely handling occlusions is a fundamental challenge for autonomous mobile robots operating in dynamic environments. This issue is especially prominent in autonomous valet parking (AVP), where traffic rules are lax, occlusions are frequent and cluttered, and overly conservative behavior can leave vehicles stuck. However, existing methods either lack formal safety guarantees, assume agents follow road structures, or introduce conservatism, leaving occlusion-aware planning for AVP an open challenge. In this paper, we propose APRO (AH-Polyhedron Reachability for Occlusions), an exact and efficient occlusion-aware planning framework based on game-theoretic active perception and AH-polyhedron reachability analysis with AVP as our canonical use case. Our key insight is to reformulate set-based safety conditions in prior work as unions of AH-polyhedrons, enabling exact safety verification through linear programming (LP) without any additional conservatism in set computations or assumptions on road topology. We further show how the resulting safety conditions can be integrated into optimization-based planners or a bisection search scheme for real-time applications. We validate our method in simulation and hardware experiments, including data replay on a real-world parking lot dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that our method consistently achieved a 100% safety rate across all evaluated scenarios while maintaining real-time performance, resulting in safer and more optimal decisions than existing methods with formal safety guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自主代客泊车（AVP）的高效确切感知遮挡的规划框架APRO，能够在不引入保守性的情况下实现形式化安全保证，并通过仿真和真实数据验证了其实时性与安全性。
AI.motivation: 在自主移动机器人，尤其是自主代客泊车中，遮挡物极易导致安全风险。当前方法对遮挡的处理缺乏严格的安全保证、过于依赖道路结构或过于保守，影响了任务效率和灵活性，因此需要新的、既安全又高效的遮挡处理方案。
AI.method: 作者提出基于博弈论主动感知和AH-多面体可达性分析的新规划框架APRO。该方法将安全验证问题重新表述为AH-多面体的并集，并利用线性规划实现无额外保守性的精确安全检验，且能集成进优化规划器或二分搜索方案以支持实时应用。
AI.result: 通过仿真、硬件实验及真实停车场数据回放，APRO在所有场景下均达到了100%的安全率，并保持实时性能，优于当前带形式化安全保证的主流方法。
AI.conclusion: APRO为AVP等动态环境下的遮挡处理提供了一种创新且实用的解决方案，实现了安全性与决策最优性的兼顾，推动了遮挡感知安全规划方法的发展。

title: PACUTE: Phonology-, Affix-, and Character-level Understanding of Tokens for Filipino
summary: Large language models (LLMs) process text as sequences of subword tokens, which can obscure the character-level and morphological structure that underlies word formation. This limitation is most acute for languages with non-concatenative morphology, where standard tokenizers systematically misalign token boundaries with morpheme boundaries. We introduce PACUTE, a diagnostic benchmark of 4,600 tasks designed to evaluate morphological understanding in Filipino, a language characterized by productive infixation, reduplication, and diacritic-driven lexical distinctions that are typically absent from written text. PACUTE includes a hierarchical diagnostic framework of six compositional levels that localizes where morphological understanding breaks down. Evaluating open-weight LLMs and frontier commercial models, we find that open-weight models perform near chance on morpheme decomposition regardless of scale. Frontier models perform much better, often recovering individual affixes under contains-match scoring, but remain far below their character-level ceilings on compositional tasks of morpheme transformations and syllabification. These results identify productive morphological composition, rather than character access alone, as the persistent bottleneck for Filipino word-structure understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PACUTE基准，用以评估LLMs对菲律宾语复杂形态结构的理解，并指出模型在词素层次理解上存在显著瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型采用子词分词器，难以捕捉到词内部形态结构，对处理如菲律宾语这种大量使用缀插和重复的语言更为困难。因此，需要设计专门的基准来诊断LLMs对复杂形态的感知与理解能力。
AI.method: 作者提出了PACUTE基准，包括4600个任务，针对菲律宾语的形态学特性建立了六个层次的分层诊断框架，用以定位大模型在哪一层级的形态理解发生崩溃，并对开源和前沿商用大模型进行了多方面评测。
AI.result: 开源大模型在词素分解等任务上表现接近随机水平，无论模型规模如何；而前沿商用模型较好地在某些任务下识别词缀，但在复杂词素变换和音节划分等层面的合成任务上，仍显著低于其字符级表现能力。
AI.conclusion: 菲律宾语等高生产性形态结构的理解瓶颈主要在于有效的形态组合，而不仅仅是获取字符级信息。当前LLMs对该类语言的词结构理解仍存在明显不足。

title: Style-CCL: Content-Preserving Style Transfer via Curriculum Continual Learning
comment: code and models of QwenStyle are released at https://github.com/witcherofresearch/Qwen-Image-Style-Transfer/ and https://github.com/Tele-AI/TeleStyle/
summary: Content-Preserving Style transfer, given content and style references, remains challenging for Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) due to entangled content and style features. With a reverse triplet synthesis pipeline to build a million-scale training set and a dual-branch Style-Content DiT (SC-DiT) that decouples style and content via separate ROPE embeddings and causal masking, we observe that such a one-stage training paradigm on mixed style categories causes semantic styles to dominate, hindering texture style learning, and harming content preservation. To address these issues, we propose Style-CCL, a Multi-Stage Curriculum Continual Learning framework that trains SC-DiT from semantic (easy) to texture (hard) styles, and from clean to synthetic data, with Random Memory Rehearsal across stages to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Style-CCL achieves state-of-the-art performance in three core metrics: style similarity, content consistency, and aesthetic quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多阶段训练方法用于Diffusion Transformers在内容保持的风格迁移任务，显著提升了模型的风格相似性、内容一致性和美学质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的Diffusion Transformers（DiTs）在风格迁移中，内容与风格特征高度纠缠，导致难以保持内容的一致性并同时迁移高质量风格，尤其是在处理复杂风格如纹理时，更易发生训练难度大和遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出了反向三元组合成管线构建百万级数据，并设计了双分支SC-DiT，通过独立的ROPE嵌入和因果掩码实现内容、风格解耦。随后，提出Style-CCL多阶段课程持续学习框架，先训练语义风格（较易），再训练纹理风格（较难），并采用随机记忆复现机制缓解遗忘问题。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Style-CCL在风格相似性、内容一致性和美学质量三大指标上均取得了当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用持续学习策略从简单到复杂分阶段训练SC-DiT，有效改善了风格迁移中的内容保持和高难度风格（如纹理）学习问题，推动了内容保持风格迁移技术的发展。

title: Design and Fabrication of a Spin Coater with In-Situ Optical Measurement for Soft Thin Films
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. To be published in the conference proceedings for AIM 2026
summary: Spin coating is widely used for fabrication of thin polymer and elastomer films, yet reliable thickness verification of highly compliant materials remains challenging due to deformation from contact-based measurements and the cost and complexity of conventional optical metrology. Accurate thickness control is especially critical in soft elastomer applications such as dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs), where mechanical and functional performance scales strongly with film thickness. This work presents a low-cost, primarily 3D-printed benchtop spin coater with an integrated, minimally deforming optical thickness measurement system for soft-film fabrication workflows. The system is designed to manufacture films between 50 and 300 microns thick with repeatability within 10 microns. Thickness is measured in-situ by tracking displacement of a reflected laser beam via quadrant photodetector, avoiding significant deformation. Optical geometry, sensor linearity constraints, and structural validation via finite element analysis are discussed. Experimental validation using calibrated metal shims demonstrated a thickness resolution of 3.6-3.7 microns and best-case measurement repeatability of 13 microns (95 percent confidence interval). The platform repeatably produced silicone films within 9 microns of target thickness, demonstrating that accessible optical metrology can be integrated into a low-cost spin coating system for practical, thickness-controlled fabrication of compliant thin films without specialized industrial instrumentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低成本、集成光学厚度测量系统的3D打印自制旋涂仪，可实现软薄膜高精度厚度控制，避免传统接触测量易变形和高成本问题。
AI.motivation: 目前高分子和弹性体薄膜广泛采用旋涂法制备，但其厚度验证依赖接触法易导致软材料变形，传统光学测量又昂贵复杂，限制了工程应用对厚度精确控制的需求，尤其是在介电弹性体驱动器等性能强相关场景。
AI.method: 设计并制造了一套以3D打印为主的台式旋涂机，集成了非接触、低变形的激光反射厚度测量系统。通过象限光电探测器追踪激光反射光斑位移，实现对旋涂软膜的原位厚度测量，并采用有限元分析对结构进行优化。
AI.result: 实验验证采用金属垫片标定，测得厚度分辨率为3.6-3.7微米，最佳重复性为13微米（置信度95%）；硅橡胶薄膜的制备结果可稳定控制在目标厚度±9微米以内。
AI.conclusion: 该方案证明，低成本、自制设备也能实现高精度软薄膜制备及原位光学厚度测量，无需昂贵工业仪器，适用于实际工程与实验室软材料制造。

title: Can Agents Read the Room? Benchmarking Visual Social Intelligence in Multimodal Simulation
summary: Social interaction depends on both language and visible social signals, such as facial expressions, posture, gaze, and emotional shifts. Yet existing social-agent benchmarks are largely text-based and rarely test whether multimodal agents can use visual cues to guide interaction. We introduce \textsc{\benchmarkname{}}, a benchmark evaluating visual social intelligence in multimodal social simulation. It contains 240 scenarios, 585 role instances, and 2,340 role-task instances, combining aligned textual-visual evidence, structured role profiles, and four role-level tasks: expression task, characteristic task, interaction regulation task, and interaction outcome task. Evaluating seven recent MLLMs under verbalized-vision and direct-vision reveals a clear gap between local role enactment and interaction management: role-specific expression and conflict handling are near saturation, whereas interaction regulation and visually grounded outcome achievement remain substantially more difficult. The code is released at https://github.com/JunsWan/AgentViSS, and the dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/JunsWan/AgentViSS.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个名为AgentViSS的新型多模态社会智能基准，用于评估多模态社会模拟中视觉社交智力。目前的多模态大模型仍难以在需要视觉分析的交互调节和结果推断等任务上取得理想表现。
AI.motivation: 社交互动依赖于语言和视觉信号（如表情、姿势、目光等），但现有的智能体评测大多是纯文本的，忽略了视觉信息的作用。缺乏能综合测试多模态模型在社交场景下使用视觉线索能力的基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个包含240个场景、585个角色实例和2,340个角色-任务实例的新基准。每个场景提供文本和视觉证据，设有四类任务：表情识别、角色特征、互动调节、互动结果预测。评测了7个MLLM模型在视觉辅助与直接视觉输入两种模式下的表现。
AI.result: 实验显示：在角色专用表达和冲突处理任务上，最新MLLM模型表现接近饱和；但在需要视觉推理的互动调节和结果实现任务上，表现仍有较大提升空间。表明现有模型尚不能很好地利用视觉信息进行复杂互动管理。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大模型在利用视觉社交线索以进行高级互动管理方面仍面临重大挑战，AgentViSS为该领域研究提供了标准测试基准，推动了多模态社交智能的发展。

title: MMLongEmbed: Benchmarking Multimodal Embedding Models in Long-Context Scenarios
summary: Recent advancements have significantly expanded the theoretical context windows of Multimodal Embedding Models (MEMs). However, larger context windows do not necessarily translate into effective comprehension and representation of long-context multimodal inputs, which remains a critical bottleneck for real-world deployment. To address the lack of systematic evaluation in this setting, we introduce MMLongEmbed, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating MEMs in long-context scenarios. MMLongEmbed comprises four retrieval tasks spanning multiple context-length ranges, covering text, document, and video modalities. Through extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art models, we find that current architectures rely heavily on superficial feature matching and struggle to capture deep semantic and structural dependencies. We further observe that performance degradation varies systematically with context length and key information placement. Moreover, models exhibit substantially different robustness to redundant contextual information across modalities. For reproducibility, the benchmark and code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MMLongEmbed，这是首个针对多模态嵌入模型在长上下文场景中进行系统评测的基准数据集，并分析了现有模型在多种模式和长文本条件下的表现及不足。
AI.motivation: 虽然多模态嵌入模型理论上的上下文窗口已大幅扩展，但在实际面对长上下文多模态输入时，模型在理解和表征方面仍有明显瓶颈，且缺乏系统性的评测工具。为解决此难题，研究者开发了新的评测基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了MMLongEmbed基准，包含文本、文档、视频等多模态、跨多种上下文长度范围的四项检索任务，对现有主流MEMs进行了广泛评测，并系统性分析了其在不同上下文长度及关键信息位置下的表现变化。
AI.result: 评测发现，当前的多模态嵌入模型主要依赖表层特征匹配，难以捕捉深层语义和结构依赖；其性能随上下文长度及关键信息位置系统性下降，不同模态面对冗余信息的稳健性差异明显。
AI.conclusion: 现有多模态模型在长上下文理解方面存在瓶颈，未来研究需关注深层关联建模与冗余信息鲁棒性。同时，MMLongEmbed数据集和代码已公开，有助于社区可重复性和后续研究。

title: DragMesh-2: Physically Plausible Dexterous Hand-Object Interaction with Articulated Objects
summary: Dexterous interaction with articulated objects is important for household, assistive, and humanoid manipulation, where multi-finger hands can provide compliant contact patterns beyond parallel-jaw grasping. However, articulated-object manipulation differs from static-object manipulation: the target part cannot be directly actuated, and its motion must emerge through sustained physical hand--handle contact. This makes the transition from object-centric articulated generation to hand-driven dexterous hand--object interaction non-trivial, since geometric trajectory replay or open-loop execution does not model the contact dynamics required to move the articulated part. Moreover, policies trained only for task completion under fixed dynamics can overfit nominal contact loads, especially without tactile or force feedback, and may degrade when the contact load changes. To address these challenges, we present DragMesh-2, a contact-driven framework for dexterous interaction with articulated objects that extends articulated interaction from object-centric generation to hand-driven dexterous hand--object interaction, where articulated motion must arise through physical contact. We further propose PICA, a physically informed contact-aware training mechanism that injects physical signals into policy learning without tactile or force feedback, improving robustness and task success under changing contact loads. Finally, we conduct systematic evaluation across multiple damping conditions and articulated-object categories to study robustness under contact-load variation, and provide a pure-geometry dexterous interaction resource to support future loco-manipulation and humanoid hand--object interaction research. Across seven GAPartNet objects, DragMesh-2 achieves stronger robustness under contact-load variation than the compared methods while maintaining high task success across damping conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DragMesh-2框架及PICA训练机制，有效提升了多指灵巧手对关节物体操控的稳健性，无需力觉反馈，针对变化的接触负载具有较优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有多指灵巧手对关节物体操控主要依赖物体自身轨迹生成或开放式控制方式，难以处理操控过程中物理接触动态变化，易因无触觉/力觉信息而对固定接触条件过拟合，导致实际操作鲁棒性差。
AI.method: 提出DragMesh-2，实现物体中心到手驱动下灵巧手-物体交互转变，通过持久物理接触驱动关节部件运动。同时，提出PICA（物理感知接触感知）训练机制，将物理信号融入策略学习，无需触觉或力觉反馈，提升对接触负载变化的适应性和稳健性。
AI.result: DragMesh-2在GAPartNet七类关节物体的实验评估中，表现出比现有方法更强的接触负载变化下鲁棒性，并在多阻尼条件下保持较高任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: DragMesh-2和PICA为灵巧手与关节物体的交互提供了高鲁棒性无力觉的解决方案，为后续移动操控和人形手-物体交互研究提供了纯几何资源和参考。

title: Beyond Layer Importance in Layer-wise Sparsity: An Inter-Layer Perturbation-Absorption Perspective
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Submitted to EMNLP 2026
summary: The considerable layer-wise redundancy in large language models (LLMs) has established non-uniform sparsity allocation across layers as the standard pruning approach for efficient compression. Existing layer-wise allocation methods that estimate allocation strategy from local signals such as activation outliers or weight spectra mainly derive from local layer importance, whereas the final post-pruning performance is also influenced by the network's subsequent compensatory capacity. In this paper, we directly characterize this property through controlled perturbation experiments. We make the following empirical findings. First, layers exhibit highly heterogeneous responses to pruning-scale perturbations. In most cases, early layers amplify perturbations, while middle and late layers actively absorb them, with relative L2 drift decreasing monotonically across depth and direction realigning toward the unperturbed hidden-state trajectory. Second, absorption is a large-perturbation phenomenon. Under small perturbations the network exhibits amplification across all layers, and the transition to absorption occurs smoothly as perturbation magnitude grows to pruning scale. This enriches the linearized accumulation theory underlying related works. Building on these findings, we define an absorption coefficient per layer and propose absorption-aware correction, an orthogonal augmentation that improves OWL and AlphaPruning by reducing perplexity by 7.13% and boosting zero-shot accuracy by 1.02% across multiple model families at 70% sparsity.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现LLM各层面对剪枝的反应非常异质，提出利用各层吸收扰动的能力优化剪枝分配，显著提升剪枝后性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型剪枝方法主要参考局部信号分配稀疏性，忽视了各层对剪枝扰动的补偿能力，导致分配不够高效。
AI.method: 通过受控扰动实验，实证研究各层对剪枝扰动的响应，提出每层吸收系数并在现有方法（如OWL和AlphaPruning）中引入吸收感知校正。
AI.result: 论文发现中后层能有效吸收剪枝扰动，提出的新方法能在70%剪枝稀疏率下将perplexity降低7.13%，零样本准确率提升1.02%。
AI.conclusion: 合理利用各层吸收扰动的能力进行剪枝分配，可以显著提升大模型的剪枝压缩效果，在通用性和性能方面优于现有分配策略。

title: Is My Vision-Language Data in Your AI? Membership Inference Test (MINT) Demo 2
comment: IEEE Conf. on Computers, Software, and Applications (COMPSAC), 2026
summary: We present the Membership Inference Test (MINT) Demo 2, a framework designed to improve transparency in machine learning training processes. MINT is a technique for experimentally determining whether specific data were used during machine learning model training. We establish the theoretical framework and propose multiple architectures for MINT depending on the amount of information known about the models that are being audited. Experimental results using a popular face recognition model, 4 state-of-the-art LLMs, and multiple, diverse, and large-scale public image and text databases achieve promising accuracy levels in the detection of training data of up to 90%. Building on these results, we introduce a comprehensive web platform1 that expands these capabilities to image and text modalities. The platform integrates a diverse technological stack, including MINT, aMINT, and gMINT, allowing users to audit a wide range of models. This demonstrator aims to promote AI transparency and provides a practical tool to foster compliance with emerging AI regulations.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种名为MINT的方法，用于检测某个数据是否被用于训练机器学习模型，并设计了一个线上演示平台以提升AI透明度。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏体系化工具，以验证特定数据是否用于模型训练，而这对于AI透明度与合规至关重要。
AI.method: 提出理论框架，根据已有的模型信息设计多种MINT架构，并在多种主流模型（包括人脸识别模型和大型语言模型）及大规模开放数据集（图像、文本）上实验。还构建了集成多种MINT技术（如aMINT、gMINT）的综合化Web平台。
AI.result: MINT在多种主流模型及数据集上对训练数据检测准确率最高达90%。平台支持图像和文本数据模型的审计，具备广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: MINT及对应平台显著提升AI系统透明度，为法规合规提供了有效工具，对推动AI行业健康发展具有积极意义。

title: MimicIK: Real-Time Generative Inverse Kinematics from Teleoperation with FK Consistency
summary: Inverse kinematics (IK) remains a critical bottleneck for real-time robot manipulation. Classical numerical solvers achieve high geometric precision but often suffer from discontinuous branch switching and unstable behavior near kinematic singularities during closed-loop deployment. Meanwhile, learned IK approaches frequently struggle to balance spatial accuracy, motion smoothness, and real-time efficiency, particularly when trained on noisy human teleoperation data. We present \textbf{MimicIK}, a real-time generative inverse kinematics framework that learns smooth and robust joint-space motion priors from teleoperation demonstrations through conditional flow matching. Given the current joint configuration and a target end-effector pose, MimicIK predicts continuous delta-joint commands using an efficient two-step iterative refinement process based on a Minimal Iterative Policy (MIP) backbone. To enforce physical consistency, we further introduce an FK consistency loss, a differentiable forward-kinematics regularization that penalizes task-space deviations from the target pose during training. We evaluate MimicIK on a real-world 6-DOF robot dataset containing 8,848 teleoperation demonstrations. MimicIK achieves a mean position error of 4.65 mm, a 10 mm success rate of 92.01\%, and a trajectory spike rate of only 7.99\%. Compared with a UNet diffusion baseline, our method improves both spatial accuracy and motion smoothness while reducing inference latency from 21.66 ms to 6.74 ms. Furthermore, unlike deterministic MLP baselines that catastrophically diverge under out-of-distribution deployment, MimicIK remains stable near singular configurations and enables robust 20 Hz real-time control on deployment hardware.

AI.tldr: MimicIK是一种用于实时机器人逆运动学的新型生成式方法，通过模仿操作演示学习平滑、鲁棒的运动策略，兼顾准确性、平滑性和效率，并在物理一致性和奇异姿态下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有数值解法在机器人逆运动学中精度高，但分支切换不连续且在奇异点附近表现不稳定。学习方法虽具潜力，但难以在空间精度、运动平滑性和实时性之间取得平衡，尤其是面对含噪演示数据。为解决这三大难题，需要新颖的逆运动学方法。
AI.method: 提出MimicIK框架，利用条件流匹配（conditional flow matching）从远程操作演示中学习关节空间运动的先验，核心采用最小迭代策略（Minimal Iterative Policy, MIP）主干，通过两步高效迭代优化预测连续增量关节命令，并引入可微的正向运动学一致性损失（FK consistency loss）增强物理一致性。
AI.result: 在真实6自由度机器人数据集（8,848条演示）上，MimicIK平均位置误差4.65 mm，10 mm内成功率92.01%，轨迹尖峰率仅7.99%。与UNet扩散基线相比，空间精度、平滑性更高，推理延迟从21.66 ms降至6.74 ms。在奇异配置和分布外测试下优于确定性MLP基线，能稳定支持20 Hz实时控制。
AI.conclusion: MimicIK兼顾逆运动学的空间精度、平滑性与实时性，在奇异态和分布外应用下表现优越，是大规模机器人操作实际部署的有前景方案。

title: AmchiBias: Measuring Stereotypical Bias in Goan Identity Groups with a Minimal Pair Dataset in English and Konkani
comment: The 1st Workshop on Stereotypes Across Cultures in Language Technologies
summary: Socio-cultural stereotypical bias is an important consideration in the development and deployment of NLP systems. It is however often considered only at the national level, despite rich subnational socio-cultural structures. We present AmchiBias, the first benchmark for measuring socio-cultural stereotypical bias for the Indian state of Goa with its unique historically multicultural setting. It covers various Goan identity groups and comprises 313 minimal pairs across eight sociodemographic dimensions in both English and Devanagari Konkani. We then evaluate stereotypical bias in five multilingual encoder models on this benchmark. We find near-chance scores in Konkani, reflecting language incompetence for general multilingual models and a lack of Goan cultural competence for Indian language models. Queried in English, models with a stronger Indian language coverage show higher bias for pan-Indian groups than hyperlocal Goan groups. This suggests the English signal reflects pan-Indian pretraining associations rather than genuine Goan cultural knowledge. Our findings highlight a critical gap in low-resource multilingual NLP evaluation for hyperlocal community identities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AmchiBias，这是一个衡量印度果阿邦独特多元文化背景下社会文化刻板偏见的数据集，并评测了主流多语言编码器的表现，结果显示主流模型难以捕捉地方性文化信息。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP系统对社会文化偏见的关注多聚焦于国家层面，忽视了复杂的地方性（次国家级）文化结构，而果阿邦具有特殊的多文化背景，急需相关评测工具。
AI.method: 1. 构建针对果阿邦不同身份群体、涵盖八个社会人口维度、由英语与孔卡尼文对照的313组极小对比语料集AmchiBias。2. 用该基准评测5种主流多语编码器模型对果阿地方偏见的反应。
AI.result: 主流多语模型在孔卡尼语测试上表现接近随机，反映模型语言能力有限；而英语测试中强调印度全局性预训练信号，对果阿本地文化识别能力低，对泛印身份群体的刻板偏见较高。
AI.conclusion: 现有多语NLP模型对果阿等少数语种和超本地文化群体缺乏理解，表明低资源多语NLP在极小群体身份评测方面存在重要空白。

title: Automated 3D Kinematic Monitoring for Circadian Activity and Anomaly Detection in Juvenile Fish
summary: Precision aquaculture faces a "phenotyping bottleneck" in tracking high-resolution behavioral traits, as conventional methods cannot quantify instantaneous three-dimensional (3D) physical exertion. To address this, we present a high-throughput 3D behavioral phenotyping framework integrating deep learning object detection with binocular stereo vision for real-time monitoring of juvenile tilapia in high-density environments. The system automates non-contact body length estimation and reconstructs 3D swimming trajectories from absolute spatial coordinates. By eliminating 2D perspective distortions, this approach precisely quantifies 3D velocity and acceleration, marking the first estimation of true physical swimming speeds in free-roaming juveniles. Results show the framework successfully establishes circadian locomotor baselines, serving as an early warning system for physiological stress and providing an objective metric for fish vitality.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合深度学习与双目立体视觉的高通量三维行为表型分析框架，实现了鱼类行为的高分辨率跟踪和分析。
AI.motivation: 水产养殖领域在高分辨率行为表型追踪方面面临“表型瓶颈”，传统方法难以定量描述鱼类瞬时三维运动。
AI.method: 作者结合深度学习目标检测与双目立体视觉，开发了系统用于密集环境下非接触式体长估算和三维泳动轨迹重建，消除了二维视角失真，实现了实时数据采集和分析。
AI.result: 系统可自动地高精度测量鱼类三维速度和加速度，首次获得自由游动幼鱼真实的物理游速，并建立了昼夜行为基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为早期压力预警和鱼类活力客观衡量提供了有效方法，有助于推动精准水产养殖的发展。

title: Task-Aware Environment Augmentation for Reliable Navigation via Shielded Conditional Diffusion
summary:
Reliable trajectory planning under partial observability depends not only on computing a feasible geometric path, but also on whether the robot receives informative observations while executing that trajectory. Existing approaches usually keep the environment fixed and adapt the robot through belief-space planning, active localization, or added sensing, often incurring costly uncertainty propagation and brittle behavior in observation-poor regions. We flip this perspective and address the largely open problem of \emph{task-aware environment augmentation}: given a mapped environment, a planned task trajectory, and a small budget of visual fiducial markers, where should the environment be augmented so that the planned trajectory can be executed reliably under uncertainty? Our key observation is that useful marker layouts are defined by the localization support they provide along the task trajectory: a small number of well-timed observations can be sufficient to prevent uncertainty from accumulating in regions where state-estimation error would otherwise compromise control. Building on this observation, we present \tbp{SCoDA}, $\textbf{S}$hielded $\textbf{Co}$nditional $\textbf{D}$iffusion for Environment $\textbf{A}$ugmentation. \tbp{SCoDA} learns a conditional distribution over high-performing fiducial layouts from data, using the environment, planned trajectory, disturbance context, and desired execution profile as conditioning. Its shielded sampler reasons over where along the planned execution pose corrections should occur, and steers this distribution toward task-relevant, finite-budget augmentations. Across simulated benchmarks and hardware deployments, we show that \tbp{SCoDA} improves trajectory execution reliability and completion time over strong baselines.
  Code, models and dataset available at: \hyperlink{scoda-diffusion.github.io}{https://scoda-diffusion.github.io/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在部分可观测环境下，通过放置有限数量视觉定位标记来增强环境，从而提高机器人沿规划轨迹可靠执行任务的能力。提出的SCoDA方法通过学习条件分布，优化标记布置，实验证明其在轨迹执行可靠性和任务完成时间上优于主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多通过信念空间规划或主动定位等手段适应固定环境，但在观测稀缺区域常常代价高且不稳定。本文关注于如何在给定有限标记预算下，有针对性地增强环境以保障轨迹任务在不确定性下的可靠执行，这是当前较少研究的问题。
AI.method: 创新性地提出了SCoDA方法，通过数据驱动学习在环境、轨迹、干扰等条件下高效标记布置的条件分布。该方法的核心在于其“shielded sampler”模块，可推断应在轨迹哪些关键位置修正机器人的定位，从而指导有限标记的最优布置。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实硬件实验中，SCoDA布置的标记提升了机器人轨迹执行的鲁棒性和任务完成速度，且优于已有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 面向任务的环境增强（如视觉标准标记布置）是提升部分可观测环境下机器人执行质量的有效策略。SCoDA方法为受制于少量标记预算的实际应用，提供了高效、可靠的增强建议，验证了其优越性和实用性。

title: Spokes: Optimizing for Diverse Pretraining Data Selection
summary: Diversity plays a critical role in data selection, improving performance under fixed data budgets by reducing redundancy and repetition. However, optimizing for diversity is inherently challenging, as it is a set-level property that depends on interactions between data points rather than individual examples. As a result, existing approaches typically rely on proxies or approximations, which often fail to ensure sufficiently diverse subsets. In this work, we directly optimize diversity by introducing a probabilistic diversification framework based on the G-Vendi score, optimized via exponentiated gradient descent. Our method produces subsets that are substantially more diverse than those obtained via random sampling, achieving a +489 increase in G-Vendi score on a 500k-sample subset. We evaluate our approach on FineWeb and DCLM, where it consistently outperforms existing methods. Notably, SPOKES (diversity-only) improves average downstream performance by +0.4 and +0.5 points over random sampling on DCLM and FineWeb, respectively. More importantly, jointly optimizing for both quality and diversity yields the strongest results: SPOKES achieves gains of +1.5 and +1.4 points on DCLM and FineWeb, outperforming all baselines, including semantic deduplication and quality filtering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接优化数据多样性的新方法，通过概率化多样性框架提升子集的多样性，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的数据选择方法难以从集合层面直接优化多样性，导致子集重复和冗余，影响固定预算下的数据应用表现。
AI.method: 提出基于G-Vendi分数的概率化多样性优化框架，并采用指数梯度下降算法直接优化数据子集的多样性。方法与随机采样及主流基线进行比较，在大规模数据集上测试效果。
AI.result: 在500k数据子集上，G-Vendi分数提升+489。仅优化多样性即可在DCLM和FineWeb上提升下游表现0.4和0.5分。联合优化质量和多样性时，分别提升1.5和1.4分，超越所有主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SPOKES方法通过直接多样性优化带来更好的数据子集选择，无论单独优化多样性还是联合优化质量与多样性，都显著超越现有方案。

title: X-Tokenizer: A Multimodal Action Tokenizer for Vision-Language-Action Pretraining
summary: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models must bridge pretrained vision-language reasoning and precise continuous robot control. Existing action tokenizers discretize actions primarily for reconstruction, producing codes that preserve motion geometry but provide only weak semantic supervision to the backbone. We therefore formulate action tokenization not as mere compression, but as semantic interface learning between multimodal reasoning and executable control. To this end, we introduce X-Tokenizer, a lightweight encoder-Semantic Residual Quantization (SRQ)-decoder architecture that provides a shared action interface across diverse robotic arm embodiments. Its key component, SRQ, imposes an asymmetric structure on residual vector quantization: the first level is trained with Masked Action Modeling (MAM) to form a discrete action language that captures coarse motion intent, while deeper levels remain reconstruction-oriented residuals that preserve fine-grained details. To further align action tokens with multimodal semantics, X-Tokenizer is pretrained with contrastive alignment to the representation space of a pretrained foundation model and with next-frame vision-language feature prediction. Pretrained on 2.4M trajectories (2.0B action frames), a single frozen X-Tokenizer plugs into a mixed discrete-continuous VLA as a representation-shaping supervision signal. X-Tokenizer achieves top real-world aggregate and strong RoboTwin 2.0 simulation results. Outperforming FAST in multimodal grounding (+13.5%) and long-horizon tasks (+8.25), it shows that action tokenizers serve as semantic interfaces for VLA pretraining beyond mere action compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新视角下的动作tokenizer——X-Tokenizer，将动作tokenization视为多模态推理与精确控制之间的语义接口学习，而不仅仅是压缩重建。该方法显著提升了机器人在现实及仿真场景中的表现，尤其在多模态语义对齐和长任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统动作tokenizer主要以重建和压缩为目标，导致token保留了运动几何而忽略语义，对多模态VLA模型的骨干监督作用有限。因此，亟需一种能够作为语义接口、有效对齐多模态推理与可执行控制的动作tokenizer。
AI.method: 提出X-Tokenizer：一种轻量的编码器-SRQ-解码器架构。关键组件SRQ在残差量化中引入非对称结构——首层用“动作掩码建模”训练，获得表达运动意图的离散动作语言，后续层则保留重建精度的残差信息。为加强动作token与多模态语义对齐，预训练时引入对比学习以及下帧视觉/语言特征预测。X-Tokenizer预训练于大规模机器人动作轨迹数据，作为冻结模块用于VLA混合模型。
AI.result: 在2.4百万条机器人轨迹预训练后，X-Tokenizer能无缝集成到混合VLA模型，并在现实世界聚合任务和RoboTwin 2.0仿真中表现突出。在多模态语义对齐及长程任务上分别比FAST方法提升13.5%和8.25%。
AI.conclusion: X-Tokenizer不仅实现了动作压缩，更验证了其作为多模态VLA建模的有效语义接口。为VLA模型预训练提供了更强的表示塑造信号，推动了视觉-语言-动作融合技术的发展。

title: Seam-to-Graph Reconstruction for Garment Configuration Alignment
summary: Seams encode rich structural information about garments but are frequently partially observable in robotic manipulation scenarios. To robustly leverage seam information, we propose a Seam-to-Graph network based on graph neural networks and attention mechanisms. This network maps unstructured seam observations to a topology-encoded structural skeleton graph for real-time garment state estimation. Using this skeleton-graph-based state estimation, we design a deformation-aware, hierarchical visual servoing controller for garment configuration alignment. We implement this controller on a bimanual robot system to load a garment onto a screen printing platen and to align it to the desired configuration precisely. Real-robot experiments demonstrate that the robot using the proposed method not only achieves human-level alignment accuracy with reduced variance in alignment error but is also robust to different garments. These results demonstrate that the use of seam information is effective for garment manipulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于缝线信息的图神经网络方法，实现了衣物状态的高精度估计和操作，对缝纫服装在机器人系统中的高精度对齐有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 衣物的缝线包含了丰富的结构信息，在机器人操作衣物时，若能利用这些缝线数据，有助于提升操作的准确性。然而，在实际操作过程中缝线往往只可见部分，难以直接利用，现有方法难以有效采集和用好这些信息。
AI.method: 作者提出了Seam-to-Graph网络，结合了图神经网络与注意力机制，将观测到的缝线数据映射为体现拓扑结构的骨架图。基于该图，实现对衣物当前状态的估计，并进一步设计了分层可视伺服控制器，用于衣物高精度的配置对齐。该控制器最终应用于双臂机器人，进行衣物装载与对齐。
AI.result: 真实机器人实验显示，所提方法使机器人达到了接近人类水平的对齐准确度，并且对齐误差的方差较小，在不同类型衣物上都表现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果证明了缝线信息在机器人衣物操作任务中的有效性，有助于提升其准确度和泛化能力。

title: Evaluating and Preserving Lexical Stress in English-to-Chinese Speech-to-Speech Translation
summary: Speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) systems have achieved impressive progress in semantic accuracy and speech naturalness. However, the cross-lingual transfer of lexical stress, a vital cue for emphasis and speaker intent, remains heavily underexplored, compounded by a lack of reliable automatic evaluation metrics for tonal languages like Chinese. We investigate English-to-Chinese S2ST stress transfer by constructing a stress-annotated Chinese dataset and an XLS-R-based Mandarin stress detector. Integrating this with the English EmphAssess system, we propose a novel objective metric for cross-lingual stress evaluation. Furthermore, we fine-tune CosyVoice3 to build a stress-aware S2ST system. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed S2ST architecture significantly outperforms existing systems in stress translation capability while maintaining competitive translation quality. Furthermore, our evaluation metric exhibits a strong correlation with human subjective judgments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的英汉语音到语音翻译（S2ST）系统，重点提升了跨语言重音（lexical stress）转移能力，并提出了适用于汉语的客观评估指标，实验显示该系统重音转译效果领先且翻译质量优秀。
AI.motivation: 现有S2ST系统主要关注语义和流畅度，但对表达强调和讲话意图关键的重音转移关注不足，尤其是对如汉语这样的声调语言缺乏可靠的自动评测方法。
AI.method: 1. 构建包含重音标注的中文语料；2. 基于XLS-R开发中文重音检测器；3. 与英文EmphAssess系统结合，提出跨语种重音评估新指标；4. 对CosyVoice3模型进行重音感知微调，发展新型S2ST系统。
AI.result: 新S2ST系统在重音转译能力上显著优于现有模型，且翻译质量与主流系统保持相当。同时，开发的重音客观评估指标与人工主观评分高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的重音感知S2ST系统显著提升了英汉跨语种重音转移，推动了S2ST系统自然性表达能力发展，并为相关研究提供了新的评估手段。

title: Beyond Self-Attention: Sub-Quadratic Vision Transformers for Fast Image Captioning
summary: Image captioning is a challenging and significant task that aims to generate coherent and semantically meaningful textual descriptions for given images. To accomplish this task, it requires a deep understanding of visual content along with the ability to express that understanding in natural language. Despite remarkable progress with transformer-based architectures, existing approaches often suffer from limitations, such as a lack of rich local feature representations and the high computational cost of quadratic self-attention. The proposed model focuses on improving computational efficiency by restructuring the vision transformer architecture. In designing this approach, the standard self-attention mechanism in Vision Transformers is replaced with a probabilistic transformer approach based on a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM), a soft-clustering technique. Instead of computing pairwise attention among all image patches, the model groups similar patches into a fixed number of clusters using an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm. This clustering-based mechanism reduces the computational complexity from quadratic O(n^2) to linear O(nK), where K << n. The autoregressive GPT-based decoder is used for caption generation. The model is evaluated on the Flickr 30K dataset, demonstrating competitive and significant improvement over existing works.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GMM聚类的高效视觉Transformer模型，用以提升图像描述生成任务的效率和表现。
AI.motivation: 当前的图像描述模型多基于Transformer架构，但存在局部特征表示不足与自注意力计算成本过高的问题。作者旨在解决这些瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者将Vision Transformer中的标准自注意力机制，替换为基于高斯混合模型(GMM)的概率性Transformer。利用EM算法将图像patch聚成固定数量的簇，只需计算簇间注意力，将复杂度从O(n^2)降至O(nK)。文本生成采用自回归GPT解码器。
AI.result: 在Flickr 30K数据集上，该模型取得了有竞争力并且优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合GMM聚类方法，显著降低了计算成本，同时仍能有效提取局部特征，提升了图像描述任务的表现。

title: Rethinking Implicit Spatial Representation in Visuomotor Policy Learning
summary: Generative model-based imitation learning has become a widely adopted paradigm for robotic manipulation, where policy performance depends critically on the conditioned visual representations. Although spatial softmax-based representations have been adopted in prior visuomotor policies, their effectiveness and underlying mechanisms remain insufficiently understood. This work rethinks the use of spatial softmax pooling: do such implicit spatial representations provide effective and stable visual features for robotic manipulation? Through systematic studies of different pooling methods in visual encoders, we find that this pooling operation produces compact and stable spatial representations, which outperform feature-value representations, despite using substantially fewer dimensions. Complementary saliency analysis further suggests that these spatial representations guide the encoder to focus more consistently on task-relevant regions. However, this advantage is limited by a representation bottleneck in current visual encoders: repeated downsampling operations weaken fine-grained spatial information before the action-generation module can use it, especially under low-resolution observations. Motivated by these findings, we propose PRISM, a visual encoder that preserves multiscale implicit spatial information through top-down cross-attention fusion. Experiments across multiple tasks and policy backbones show consistent improvements. In particular, on the low-resolution, high-precision ToolHang task, PRISM shows clear gains, improving the average success rate from 5.0% to 13.4% while increasing parameters by only 15.4%. These results support the use of multiscale implicit spatial representations as an effective and efficient design principle for robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生成模型模仿学习中空间softmax池化在机器人操作中的作用，并提出了一种改进视觉编码器PRISM，有效提升了任务表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管空间softmax在视觉运动策略中被广泛采用，但其有效性及机制尚不清楚，尤其在代表任务相关空间信息方面存在争议。作者希望明确现有池化方式的优缺点，并优化视觉特征提取。
AI.method: 系统比较不同的池化方法对生成模型模仿学习的政策表现的影响，结合显著性分析揭示特征关注对象。基于发现，提出了PRISM编码器，利用top-down跨尺度注意力融合以保留多尺度空间信息，并在多任务、多策略网络上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 空间softmax类表示能在更低维下获得比传统特征值型表示更紧凑和稳定的特征，提升策略效果。PRISM编码器进一步突破下采样造成的信息瓶颈，在低分辨率、高精度任务ToolHang上将成功率从5.0%提升至13.4%，参数量仅增长15.4%。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度隐式空间特征是视觉-操作任务中高效且有效的设计原则。PRISM的实验结果表明改善视觉编码器是值得推荐的发展方向。

title: Adapting Reinforcement Learning with Chain-of-Thought Supervision for Explainable Detection of Hateful and Propagandistic Memes
summary: Hateful and propagandistic memes exploit the interplay between images and text to convey harmful intent that neither modality reveals alone. Although thinking-based multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced vision-language understanding, their application to meme content moderation remains underexplored. We propose a reinforcement learning-based post-training method that improves classification performance and reference-based explanation quality in thinking-based MLLMs via task-specific rewards and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Concretely, we (i) conduct a systematic empirical study of off-the-shelf MLLMs for hateful and propagandistic meme understanding across English and Arabic benchmarks, (ii) extend existing meme datasets with weakly supervised chain-of-thought (CoT) rationales via distillation and multi-LLM fine-grained propaganda annotations, (iii) introduce a GRPO-based objective with thinking-length regularization that jointly optimizes classification accuracy and explanation quality, and (iv) investigate self-supervised GRPO on unlabeled memes using consensus-based pseudo-labels. Experiments on the Hateful Memes and ArMeme benchmarks show that our approach improves over previously reported results on FHM accuracy (up to +2.1%, from 79.9% to 82.0%) and on ArMeme macro-F1 (up to +7.6 points, from 0.536 to 0.612 with explanations; +6.1 compared to the original ArMeme benchmark), while also generating natural-language explanations. On ArMeme, sequence-classification baselines remain stronger in terms of raw accuracy, whereas our approach provides more balanced per-class performance along with explanations. We publicly release our code, data extensions, and evaluation resources.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于强化学习的后训练方法，提高了多模态大语言模型在识别仇恨和宣传性质迷因时的分类性能与解释质量。实验证明新方法在多个英文和阿拉伯语数据库上取得了领先结果。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态迷因内容（图像+文本）传播带来安全与治理挑战，现有的多模态大模型虽强，但用于迷因内容审核的研究还不充分，特别是高质量解释与更准确分类的需求。
AI.method: (1) 系统测试现有多模态大模型在英/阿语迷因数据集上的表现；(2) 采用弱监督、知识蒸馏、多个大模型细粒度标注，扩展链式推理标注数据；(3) 引入基于Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)和思考长度正则化的目标函数，联合优化分类和解释；(4) 针对无标注数据，采用伪标签做自监督GRPO学习。
AI.result: 在Hateful Memes和ArMeme等数据集上的实验显示：方法在FHM准确率提升2.1%（79.9%→82.0%），ArMeme macro-F1提升7.6分（0.536→0.612），还可生成自然语言解释。在ArMeme任务中，本方法平衡各类表现，生成解释，但在原始准确率上部分基线模型略优。
AI.conclusion: 结合强化学习和多模态思考机制，可显著提升迷因内容审核的多维表现，尤其平衡准确率与可解释性。代码、数据与评测资源已开源，促进未来相关研究。

title: Sub-Semantic Image Segmentation
summary: Images can be segmented based on visual cues (i.e., texture segmentation) or into objects (i.e., semantic segmentation). We propose a new category of sub-semantic image segmentation that blurs the line between the two. In sub-semantic image segmentation, language is not used to name whole objects. Instead, it is used to partition an image into stable appearance patterns that can be described by language. To do that, we couple a general-purpose vision-language model to SAM 3, a promptable segmentation backbone whose native text pathway can ground rich descriptions into masks. Simple coupling fails for a number of reasons that we identify in the paper, and we overcome them by introducing DETECTURE that resolves three concrete failure modes -- language leakage between texture regions, prompt competition inside the segmentation backbone, and semantic distortion at the language-to-mask interface. Since there is no dataset of sub-semantic image segmentation, we introduce one, termed TextureADE. The new dataset is derived from the ADE20K dataset using a system we designed. We compare DETECTURE to a number of baselines and find that it achieves the strongest performance on several datasets using different metrics. Code is available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab/TextureDetecture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了子语义图像分割（sub-semantic image segmentation）的新任务，介于传统的纹理分割和语义分割之间，并为此提出了新的方法DETECTURE及相关数据集TextureADE。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像分割主要集中在纹理或语义层面，缺乏对两者之间、更细粒度层面的研究。作者希望通过结合视觉和语言信息，对图像中的稳定外观模式进行分割和描述，弥补这方面的研究空白。
AI.method: 作者将通用的视觉-语言模型与可提示的分割骨干网络SAM结合，但由于直接结合存在多种失败模式，为此作者提出DETECTURE，专门解决：1）纹理区域之间的语言泄露、2）分割骨干内部的提示竞争、3）语言到掩码接口的语义扭曲。此外，作者基于ADE20K数据集构建了新的TextureADE子语义分割数据集。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和不同评测指标下，DETECTURE相较于多种基线方法都取得了更优的表现。文中开放了相关代码，便于复现和进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了子语义图像分割新任务和数据集，并针对性提出了解决方案DETECTURE，显著提升了基于视觉-语言对的分割效果，对细粒度分割任务具有促进作用。

title: Co-Creating Buildable and Open Social Robot Study Companions with University Students
comment: Accepted for 18th International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR + ART 2026), London, UK | 1-4 July 2026
summary: Open-source social robots offer accessibility, repairability, and student empowerment, yet the build itself often presents a barrier. Existing platforms either ship pre-assembled, foreclosing hands-on learning, or expose students to unfamiliar fasteners, opaque wiring, and inaccessible service points that erode engagement. Whether targeted mechanical redesign can lower this barrier whilst maintaining structural integrity remains untested. Here we show that Design for Assembly (DfA) and Design for Disassembly (DfD) interventions reshape how a build feels before they shorten how long it takes. Working with university students in Guyana and Estonia, we applied the Double Diamond framework to co-create the Robot Study Companion (RSC) v4.1: mapping pain points, then redesigning its chassis around twist-lock fasteners, snap-fit joints, and tool-free service latches. Across two studies with developers and first-time builders, system usability climbed from Poor to Excellent (SUS 59.4 to 89.4), perceived workload trended downward (NASA-TLX 4.29 to 4.00), and mean assembly time trended downward (21.4 to 13.7 minutes, with juniors' learning effect), whilst orientation cues and navigation continuity for first-time builders emerged as the next documentation frontier. Perceived workload, not completion time, appears to govern whether students take up open hardware.

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了针对开源社交机器人进行机械结构再设计，以降低学生组装难度并提升用户体验。通过有效地优化装配和拆卸结构，可以提升机器人的可用性和学生参与度。
AI.motivation: 现有开源社交机器人虽然有利于学习和维护，但实际组装过程复杂，导致许多学生望而却步，造成学习兴趣和主动性降低。如何通过机械结构设计有效降低组装门槛，未有充分实证。
AI.method: 作者遵循Double Diamond设计流程，联合圭亚那及爱沙尼亚的大学生参与协作，识别组装痛点，并采用扭转锁紧件、卡扣连接和免工具维护等设计改造机器人的主体结构。通过两轮用户实验，涉及开发者及首次组装者，评估优化效果。
AI.result: 系统可用性得分从59.4提升到89.4（SUS量表，'差'到'优秀'）；工作负载感知（NASA-TLX）略有下降（4.29降至4.00）；平均组装时间减少（从21.4降至13.7分钟），尤其初学者进步明显。同时发现文档中的方向指示和流程连贯性成为后续改进重点。
AI.conclusion: 优化结构设计能显著提升开源社交机器人组装体验。对于学生，主观工作负载比实际组装用时更影响其参与意愿，提示后续设计需聚焦降低主观负担。

title: Prior over Evidence: Stereotype-Driven Diagnosis in LLM-Based L2 Pronunciation Feedback
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed for written pronunciation feedback in second-language (L2) English learning, under the assumption that their diagnoses are grounded in the supplied speech evidence rather than in priors from pretraining. This assumption is tested on 1,800 L2-Arctic utterances spanning six L1 backgrounds, three audio-capable LLMs, four pronunciation dimensions, and five evidence conditions ranging from a text-only baseline to numeric acoustic features and raw audio. Each (utterance x model x condition x dimension) cell is scored on three metrics: Rating Accuracy (RA) against gold labels, Evidence Coherence (EC) assessing internal consistency without ground truth, and Grounded Correctness (GC) evaluated against gold evidence. Results show three findings across models. First, rating accuracy and grounded reasoning decouple: 39.6% of judged cells contain internally coherent reasoning that supports a wrong rating, against only 15.8% where the reasoning supports a correct rating. Second, phoneme-level feedback converges to a fixed inventory of L2-English difficulty phones that recurs across all six L1 backgrounds and all evidence conditions. Third, acoustic evidence improves the rating only when the supplied feature directly probes the target dimension: textualised F0 range raises pitch-variation grounding from (0.18-0.19) to (0.45-0.62) across all three models, while stress and phoneme correctness, which require target-to-realisation alignment, remain ungrounded. The same audio waveform without textualised F0 values does not reproduce this improvement. These findings indicate that current general-purpose LLMs are more reliable as verbalisers of externally computed pronunciation evidence than as standalone diagnostic engines.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了大语言模型(LLMs)在二语英语发音反馈中的表现，发现其诊断能力高度依赖于外部证据，并不是完全基于输入语音自发做出准确判断。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在英语学习发音反馈领域的应用增多，研究者关注它们的诊断能力是否真正基于语音输入而非预训练偏见，挑战了其作为自主诊断工具的假设。
AI.method: 对1800个L2-Arctic语音样本（涵盖6种母语）进行测试，采用3种可处理音频的LLM模型、4种发音维度、5种证据类型（从纯文本到原始音频），并用评级准确性、证据一致性和基于证据的正确性3个指标评估模型表现。
AI.result: 1) 指出模型内部推理的自洽性和准确率并不总一致。2) 指出音素级反馈总趋向于固定的L2英语难点音位，无论母语背景和证据类型。3) 只有当提供的特征直观反映目标维度时，声学证据才真正提升结果（如F0特征提升音高维度），其他则无明显改进。
AI.conclusion: 通用大语言模型作为发音外部证据的解释器更可靠，但作为独立诊断工具的可信度有限。

title: Where Does Texture Evidence Live in SAM? Features, Proposal Masks, and Texture Segmentation
comment: 26 pages, 13 figures, 20 tables. Code available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab/ArchiTexture
summary: Texture segmentation stresses foundation segmentation because meaningful regions are defined by material or repeated appearance rather than object identity. Segment Anything Models (SAMs) often fail by default on such texture-defined partitions, but this failure is ambiguous: the texture evidence may be absent, missing from the proposal bank, or present but selected or assembled incorrectly by an object-centric readout. We ask what texture-relevant evidence is already preserved in frozen SAM before adaptation. We study two frozen evidence spaces: multiscale features, probed with a minimal clustering readout, and the automatic proposal bank, treated as evidence for a supervised consolidation readout. SAM is frozen throughout; we do not fine-tune the backbone or retrain the proposal generator. Across RWTD, STLD, an ADE20K-selected refined-crop complement, and a ControlNet-stitched PTD bridge archive, frozen SAM is not a texture segmenter by default, but its failures are not simple texture blindness. Coarse frozen features preserve texture organization, and proposal banks often contain texture-aligned masks or fragments. Natural scenes more often require assembly and commitment over fragments, while cleaner synthetic cases more often reduce to selecting an already coherent proposal. Default mask failure should therefore be decomposed into representation evidence, proposal-bank support, readout mismatch, and commitment failure.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了现有流行的Segment Anything Model（SAM）在处理基于纹理分割（非对象分割）任务时的局限性及其深层原因，发现其失败并非仅因纹理敏感度差。作者通过冻结SAM模型，对其多尺度特征和proposal bank进行分析，以揭示其对纹理证据的保留和利用情况。
AI.motivation: 传统分割模型侧重于对象分割，而实际应用中常有基于纹理或材料的分割需求，如卫星遥感、医学影像等。当前SAM模型在此类任务中经常失效，但具体失效原因（如纹理信息缺失、proposal不准确、读取方式不当等）尚不明确，值得深入剖析。
AI.method: 作者冻结SAM模型，不做任何微调，通过两种方式检测纹理信息的保留与利用：（1）利用最小聚类读取器分析模型多尺度特征；（2）将proposal bank中提取的mask做有监督整合以测试其可用性。执行针对多个数据集的实验，包括真实与合成场景。
AI.result: 实验发现，SAM默认并不能实现良好的纹理分割，但失效原因并不仅限于“纹理盲”，而是多层次的：其特征编码层面保留了一定的纹理组织能力，proposal bank中也常包含与纹理对齐的mask或片段；区别在于自然场景常需片段整合与承诺，而合成场景常可直接选中完整proposal。
AI.conclusion: 论文认为，基于SAM的纹理分割失败应细分为特征表征、proposal bank支持、读取方式不匹配及承诺缺失等环节，每一环节都有改进空间。SAM模型中已有的纹理证据为后续纹理分割与模型适配提供了基础与启发。

title: Driving, Fast or Slow? Neuro-Symbolic Guidance for Motion Prediction in Multi-Modal Ground Mobility
summary: Accurate and interpretable motion prediction for heterogeneous traffic spaces, including pedestrians, bicycles, cars, and trucks, is essential for safe autonomous navigation. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art approaches remain predominantly black-box, lacking explicit encoding of the regulatory and behavioral constraints of real-world mobility. We propose Trajectory Compliance-Shaping (TraCS), a neuro-symbolic framework that augments existing black-box motion prediction backbones with interpretable and probabilistic first-order logic. To do so, TraCS employs an agentic code-generation pipeline to bridge the gap between natural-language descriptions of traffic regulations and probabilistic motion prediction. Furthermore, TraCS employs a reactive data-streaming inference engine that maintains and efficiently updates compliance landscapes as scenes evolve. To prevent TraCS from overconfidently steering the backbone's predictions in the wrong direction, we propose a neural confidence rating learned as a context-aware attenuation of the compliance signal. We demonstrate on the Argoverse 2 benchmark how TraCS consistently improves state-of-the-art prediction backbones, showing that probabilistic and symbolic compliance reasoning is a broadly applicable and computationally efficient complement to purely neural motion predictors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TraCS，一个结合神经网络和符号逻辑的轨迹合规模型，提升自动驾驶混合交通场景中多类交通参与者的运动预测精度和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前的运动预测方法大多采用黑盒神经网络，缺乏对交通法规和行为约束的显式建模，导致预测结果虽准确但难以解释，影响自动驾驶安全和合规。
AI.method: TraCS是一种神经-符号混合方法，在已有神经网络基础上引入可解释、概率化的一阶逻辑规则；通过将交通法规的自然语言描述转化为机器可用的逻辑表达，并利用数据流推理引擎动态更新合规状态，同时通过学习到的神经信号抑制机制，防止规则过度主导预测。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2基准测试集上，TraCS能持续提升各类最先进运动预测模型的表现，验证了该方法可以高效且有效地补充传统神经预测模型。
AI.conclusion: 神经-符号合规模型能够在保障运动预测精度的基础上，引入可解释性的合规推理，对提升自动驾驶系统的安全性与合规性具有重要意义。

title: Replay What Matters: Off-Policy Replay for Efficient LLM Reinforcement Unlearning
summary: LLM unlearning has emerged as a cost-effective alternative to full retraining for removing hazardous knowledge from pretrained models while preserving general utility. Recent RL-based methods such as RULE reformulate unlearning as learning a refusal behavior, but their on-policy optimization repeatedly samples from the same forget and retain/boundary prompts throughout training. We identify a critical inefficiency in this process: easy cases quickly converge and provide little useful gradient signal, while hard cases near the forget/retain boundary continue to produce low-reward rollouts that are discarded after a single use. To address this issue, we propose ReRULE, an off-policy replay enhancement for reinforcement unlearning. ReRULE stores low-reward hard-case rollout groups in a replay buffer during early GRPO training and reuses them in later stages through importance-sampled off-policy updates, redirecting computation toward boundary cases that still require learning. Theoretically, we show that ReRULE yields a tighter hard-case convergence bound than pure on-policy RULE. Empirically, ReRULE improves MUSE-Books Retain Quality from 46.3 to 56.2 while adding only 5--11% training time across benchmarks. Its limited improvement on the simpler TOFU setting further supports the intended conditional behavior: replay is most beneficial when the hard/easy disparity is pronounced.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ReRULE方法，通过离策略回放缓解RL-based大模型遗忘中的训练效率瓶颈，显著提升遗忘质量而只需少量额外训练时间。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习（RL）方法（如RULE）在大模型遗忘中的优化中存在效率低下的问题，特别是对于需要遗忘的难例，训练过程中产生的低奖励样本没有被充分利用，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: ReRULE提出在RL训练初期将低奖励的难例rollout存入replay buffer，后期通过重要性采样进行离策略回放更新，从而提升对遗忘/保留边界难例的训练效率。并从理论上证明该方法在难例收敛性上优于纯粹的on-policy方法RULE。
AI.result: 在MUSE-Books基准上，ReRULE将Retain Quality由46.3提升至56.2，同时训练时间仅增加5-11%。在TOFU等简单任务中提升有限，验证了该方法主要受益于难易分界明显的场景。
AI.conclusion: ReRULE能够高效提升RL型大模型遗忘过程中对难例的学习效果，在复杂、难度分化大的任务中表现突出。

title: Divide-and-Denoise: A Game-Theoretic Method for Fairly Composing Diffusion Models
summary: The abundance of pre-trained diffusion models provides an opportunity for composition. Combining several models, however, runs the risk of one model dominating or models disagreeing with each other. Here, we propose Divide-and-Denoise, a method for coordinating multiple pre-trained diffusion models during sampling. Much like managing a specialized workforce, our method creates a fair but efficient division of labor across models. Central to our method is the notion of an allocation which defines the responsibility of each model to every region of the noisy sample. At every timestep, we then denoise by (i) updating the allocation by solving a fair division game, where we divide the sample into regions that maximize total utility under fairness constraints, and (ii) aligning the models with this allocation, where we guide each model to denoise within its assigned region. This leads to a new composite denoising process that evolves in tandem with a division process. We evaluate Divide-and-Denoise on conditional image generation. Across several quality metrics, including the GenEval benchmark, our method outperforms baselines and resolves common failures including missing objects and mismatched attributes. Experiments show that Divide-and-Denoise utilizes each model's expertise without neglecting any other model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Divide-and-Denoise方法，通过分配多个预训练扩散模型在采样过程中的工作区域，实现模型的高效协同，用于提升条件图像生成的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大量预训练扩散模型为模型组合带来机会，但组合过程中常出现模型间权重失衡、互相冲突等问题，亟需一种协调多模型高效合作的方法。
AI.method: Divide-and-Denoise方法核心在于为每个模型分配具体的去噪区域。每一步采样过程中，该方法通过解决公平分配博弈问题，把采样空间合理划分给不同模型，并指导各模型在其分配到的区域内实施去噪。分配和去噪过程相辅相成，动态演化。
AI.result: 在条件图像生成任务中，该方法在包括GenEval基准在内的多个质量指标上均优于现有方法，并有效解决了常见的目标遗失、属性不匹配等问题。实验结果显示，Divide-and-Denoise能够充分发挥每个模型的特长而不忽略其他模型。
AI.conclusion: Divide-and-Denoise为多模型扩散式采样提供了协作与公平的新机制，提升了图像生成质量，对后续多模型协同生成研究具有重要意义。

title: OSDAG: Online Scheduling for Efficient Multi-Robot Collaboration
summary: Coordinating heterogeneous multi-robot systems (MRS) for complex, long-horizon tasks requires both flexible high-level reasoning and efficient low-level scheduling. Existing LLM-based approaches address the reasoning side but introduce two critical bottlenecks: (1) repeated LLM inference during execution, which inflates latency with agent count, and (2) offline, pre-committed scheduling, which forces robots to idle while waiting for sequentially ordered predecessors even when independent work is available. This paper presents OSDAG, a novel framework that integrates LLM-based task reasoning with Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) representation and constraint-aware online scheduling. The LLM is invoked once to decompose a natural-language instruction into a dependency-annotated task graph, and a lightweight online scheduler then allocates ready tasks to idle agents in real time. The DAG representation encodes both precedence and resource constraints, ensuring correctness while exposing all available parallelism. Experiments across five benchmark scenarios demonstrate that OSDAG achieves 5-15x faster reasoning time compared to dialogue-based methods, reduces makespan by up to 38% over sequential baselines, and maintains competitive success rates. Both simulation and real-world experiments on dual-arm manipulation tasks validate the effectiveness and practicality of the proposed approach for efficient multi-robot coordination. The website and resources are available at http://thanhnguyencanh.github.io/LLM_DAG4MultiRobot

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合LLM推理和有向无环图(DAG)建模的新方法（OSDAG），可高效协调多机器人系统执行复杂任务，相比现有方法在推理速度和任务完成效率上大幅提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的方法在多机器人系统协调任务过程中存在两个瓶颈：一是执行时多次调用LLM，导致随着机器人数量增加系统延迟显著上升；二是离线固化调度方案，使机器人在先后顺序受限下等待，即使有可并行任务也无法充分利用资源。
AI.method: OSDAG框架将LLM仅调用一次，用于从自然语言指令生成带有依赖关系的任务图（DAG）；随后通过轻量级的在线调度器，在资源、前置等约束下将可立即执行的任务动态分配给空闲机器人，实现全流程实时并行与调度优化。
AI.result: 在五个基准场景下，OSDAG推理速度比对话式LLM方法快5-15倍，整体任务完成时间较顺序基线最多减少38%，并且保持了接近的任务成功率。此外，在双臂操作的仿真与真实机器人实验中验证了其实用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: OSDAG通过结合LLM推理与DAG建模和在线调度，显著提升了多机器人系统执行复杂任务时的效率与灵活性，具有良好的实用价值，适用于需要高效动态资源分配的多机器人协作领域。

title: Privacy-Preserving Text Sanitization for Distributed Agents Collaboration via Disentangled Representations
summary: When distributed agents exchange text across organizational boundaries, privacy leakage arises not only from explicit identifiers but also from distributional signatures such as formatting conventions, vocabulary choices, and syntactic patterns. We propose DiSan(Disentangled Sanitization), a privacy-preserving sanitization framework and a built-in component of Intern-Shannon for multi-agent collaboration. DiSan uses a two-stream encoder to factorize text into a source-invariant role subspace that preserves task semantics and a source-identifying style subspace that remains local. Federated proto-type alignment and adversarial regularization enable joint training without centralizing raw text. Experiments show that identifier-level masking is insufficient: masking 19.2% of tokens reduces TF-IDF stylometric attribution by only 18.6%. By contrast, DiSan reduces answer-level PII exposure by 20 times while maintaining 83% answer faithfulness on a distributed multi-agent RAG benchmark, and lowers Enron stylometric attribution by 73.2% under TF-IDF and 70.6% under a neural probe.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式文本隐私保护框架DiSan，能有效降低组织间协作时的风格指纹与隐私信息泄露，同时保持任务语义和回答准确性。
AI.motivation: 分布式多智能体协作中，文本交流不仅有直接身份泄露风险，还存在通过文本风格、格式、词汇等间接识别的隐忧，传统的掩码方法难以有效防护。
AI.method: 提出了DiSan框架，采用双流编码器，将文本分解为角色相关的任务语义子空间（跨域共享）和风格信息子空间（只本地保留），结合联邦原型对齐与对抗正则化实现无中心化的联合训练。
AI.result: 实验证明简单掩码对风格归因保护有限（19.2%掩码仅降低18.6%的归因）；而DiSan能使PII暴露降至1/20，在分布式RAG数据集上仍保有83%答案保真度，在Enron数据上风格归因显著降低（TF-IDF下降73.2%，神经归因下降70.6%）。
AI.conclusion: DiSan有效在多智能体分布式文本交流中，兼顾隐私保护与任务完成，优于传统掩码，具备实际部署价值。

title: Spatial Priors via Space Filling Curves for Small and Limited Data Vision Transformers
summary: Though Vision Transformers (ViTs) have become the dominant backbone in many computer vision tasks, due to permutation equivariance, their attention mechanism lacks explicit spatial inductive biases. This become particularly important in two settings: when model capacity is small or training data is limited. Inspired by the attention masking strategies in Linear Transformers and the scanning patterns of Vision SSMs, we introduce VIOLIN, a lightweight masked attention mechanism that encodes spatial structure within attention via Space Filling Curves (SFCs) with less than 0.0015% extra parameters and negligible computational overhead. VIOLIN scans the image using multiple SFCs to construct curve-specific decay masks, which are then combined and multiplied with the attention matrix. Across a wide range of evaluations, VIOLIN consistently improves performance. In limited data regimes such as fine-tuning on VTAB-1K, it boosts accuracy across all task groups and by up to 8.7% on the tasks where spatial information is essential. It can be combined with parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA to further increase the performance. Beyond fine-tuning, VIOLIN improves various small scale ViT architectures (e.g., DeiT, DINO) during pretraining on ImageNet-1K. Additionally, on pixel-level CIFAR-100 training, a task that is highly dependent on location information, VIOLIN increases accuracy by up to 7.2%. Overall, VIOLIN provides a computationally efficient yet effective way to inject spatial inductive bias into ViTs, especially benefiting small models and limited data settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种称为VIOLIN的轻量级空间结构注意力机制，通过空间填充曲线（SFCs）为ViT注入空间归纳偏置，几乎不增加参数量和计算量，并在多项任务和小模型、少数据场景中大幅提升性能。
AI.motivation: ViT因缺乏空间归纳偏置，在模型小或数据少的场景下表现受限。为此，需要找一个高效办法，在保持ViT高效的同时显式编码空间信息。
AI.method: 受线性Transformer和Vision SSMs的启发，VIOLIN通过多条空间填充曲线（SFCs）扫描图像，为每条曲线生成专属的衰减掩码，并与原有的注意力矩阵结合，实现对空间结构的编码。该方法仅增加极少参数(<0.0015%)，计算开销也很小。
AI.result: VIOLIN在多种评测中一致提升表现。特别是在小数据（如VTAB-1K微调）或空间信息关键任务上，最高提升8.7%。与LoRA等高效微调方法结合效果更佳。此外，对小尺度ViT模型（如DeiT、DINO）在ImageNet-1K预训练中也有帮助。针对依赖位置信息的任务（CIFAR-100像素级训练），提升高达7.2%。
AI.conclusion: VIOLIN能高效、有效地为ViT注入空间归纳偏置，尤其适用于小模型和有限数据情形，极大提升了表现且几乎不影响计算成本。

title: Acting While Understanding: Asynchronous Semantic-Action Decoupling for Real-Time Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong task understanding and generalization in robotic manipulation, yet the high computational cost of full-model inference limits their deployment in low-latency, high-frequency closed-loop control. We propose an asynchronous semantic-action decoupling framework that separates semantic understanding from action generation along the internal semantic-action interface of existing VLAs, without redesigning the vision-language backbone or introducing an external planner. A low-frequency understanding module asynchronously updates reusable semantic conditions, while a high-frequency action module continuously outputs control actions without repeatedly invoking the full model. To mitigate the temporal mismatch between stale semantics and the current execution state, we further introduce historical action conditioning and time-misalignment training, which provide short-horizon execution context and improve feedback control robustness under stale semantic conditions. Experiments on LIBERO with $π_{0.5}$ and UniVLA, together with real-robot deployment using UniVLA, show that the proposed framework achieves up to 35.6 Hz server-side action-module inference throughput and offers a low-intrusion path to high-frequency closed-loop control without running full VLA inference at control rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种异步语义-动作解耦框架，将视觉-语言-动作模型中的语义理解与动作生成分离，实现无需完整模型高频推理即可实现高频闭环控制，兼顾任务泛化能力和低时延控制需求。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型虽然在机器人操作任务上表现优异，但其高昂的计算开销阻碍了模型在低时延高频闭环控制场景下的实际部署。亟需一种降低推理延迟的方法，以便在不牺牲理解与泛化能力的前提下实现高实时性控制。
AI.method: 提出了异步语义-动作解耦框架：将VLA的语义理解与动作生成在内部接口处分离。低频理解模块异步更新语义条件，并与高频动作模块（无需每次调用完整模型）结合生成动作。同时通过历史动作调节和时间对齐训练，缓解语义滞后带来的负面影响，提高控制鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在LIBERO数据集和实际机器人（UniVLA）部署实验中，该框架服务器端动作模块推理吞吐率可达35.6Hz，在无需以控制频率运行完整VLA推理下，显著提升控制速率和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为VLA在高频闭环机器人控制中的落地提供了一种低侵入性解决方案，有效平衡了理解能力与实时控制需求。

title: Beyond Monolingual Deep Research: Evaluating Agents and Retrievers with Cross-Lingual BrowseComp-Plus
summary: Deep research agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to search for evidence, reason over retrieved sources, and produce grounded answers. Existing browsing benchmarks, however, largely assume that the user's query and the supporting evidence are written in the same language, leaving open whether agentic search systems can operate when relevant evidence appears in another language. We introduce XBCP (Cross-lingual BrowseComp-Plus), a controlled benchmark that preserves the English question-and-answer space of BrowseComp-Plus but varies the languages of the supporting documents. XBCP instantiates two complementary settings: in the cross-lingual setting, each query is paired with evidence in a single assigned language. In the multilingual setting, the full evidence corpus is distributed equally and randomly across 12 languages spanning high-resource and low-resource regimes. We evaluate four deep research agents using sparse and dense multilingual retrievers, measuring answer accuracy, evidence recall, search behavior, calibration, citation fidelity, and oracle retrieval. Results reveal substantial degradation when evidence is translated. Even strong, dense retrievers lose evidence recall, and agents become less calibrated and cite evidence less reliably. Notably, accuracy remains lower even when all gold evidence is supplied directly. These findings suggest that cross-lingual deep research exposes both retrieval failures and an independent, agent-side difficulty in integrating language-mismatched evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了XBCP，一个用于评估深度研究智能体跨语言浏览能力的新基准，发现在证据跨语言时，即使最强的检索模型和智能体表现都明显下降。
AI.motivation: 现有的浏览基准都假设查询和证据语言一致，但现实场景经常存在证据和查询语言不一致的情况，缺乏对智能体跨语言搜索能力的系统性评估。
AI.method: 作者设计了XBCP基准，将英文问答任务与多语言支持文档结合，设置跨语言与多语言两种实验场景，涵盖12种高低资源语言，并用稀疏和密集多语言检索器测试四种深度研究智能体在答案准确率、证据召回等多维度表现。
AI.result: 结果显示，一旦支持证据被翻译为非查询语言，各智能体证据召回、答案准确率和引用可靠性等均大幅下降，且即使人工提供全部金证据，模型准确率依然不理想。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言证据检索极大挑战了当前深度研究智能体，不仅揭示了检索端的短板，也暴露了融合多语言证据信息时智能体理解能力的独立瓶颈。

title: Disentangling Hallucinations: Orthogonal Semantic Projection for Robust Interpretability
comment: 41 pages in total. 5 figures, and 2 tables in the main paper; 10 figures and 17 tables in the appendix
summary: As Vision-Language Models are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, the trustworthiness of their explanations becomes crucial. Explainable AI (XAI) methods for Vision-Language Models often suffer from semantic hallucination, where attribution maps highlight prominent image regions even when prompted with incorrect text descriptions (e.g., highlighting a dog when prompted ``cat''). Although this problem is widespread, a formal mathematical analysis of XAI methods and CLIP embeddings is largely missing in the literature. We demonstrate that this phenomenon is not specific to a single architecture but is a fundamental consequence of Linear Semantic Leakage in high-dimensional embedding spaces. We propose a unified theoretical framework, Linear Semantic Attribution (LSA), which generalizes across discriminative methods. We introduce OSP, a geometric intervention that utilizes the residual property of OMP to disentangle unique semantic signals from shared concepts. We prove theoretically and demonstrate empirically that OSP minimizes hallucination by orthogonalizing the query vector against distractor concepts, rendering the attribution model blind to shared features while preserving fidelity for correct prompts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/emirhanbilgic/Orthogonal-Semantic-Projection

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的理论框架和方法，用于解决视觉-语言模型中解释误导（语义幻觉）的问题，显著提升了解释的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉-语言模型在安全关键领域的应用增多，模型解释的可可信性变得非常重要。目前常见解释方法容易出现语义幻觉。例如，模型在被错误文本提示时，归因热图仍突出显示不相关的图像区域，但这一现象缺乏理论分析。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个理论框架叫Linear Semantic Attribution（LSA），统一解释多种判别式解释方法，并证明语义幻觉源自高维嵌入空间中的线性语义泄露。此外，提出了Orthogonal Semantic Projection（OSP），基于几何干预和正交匹配追踪的残差特性，将关注点从共享特征移除，聚焦于唯一的语义信号。
AI.result: 理论和实证结果表明，OSP方法能够通过将查询向量与干扰概念正交化，有效减少语义幻觉，使得归因解释模型对共享特征“失明”，但针对正确的提示仍能保持高保真度。
AI.conclusion: 本文不仅首次从理论上揭示了语义幻觉的根本原因，还提供了能显著减少此问题的新方法，对于提升视觉-语言模型解释的可靠性具有重要意义。

title: Covariance-Regulated Recursive Koopman Learning for Nonlinear Systems with Uncertain Time-Varying Dynamics
summary: Offline models for autonomous robots often fail under time-varying dynamics outside their training distribution. Koopman operator theory offers a linear representation of nonlinear dynamics via lifting, but its transition to real-time recursive estimation may suffer numerical vulnerabilities: covariance windup under low excitation when using exponential forgetting, and vanishing gain without forgetting. This paper introduces a Covariance-Regulated Recursive Koopman Learning (CR-RKL) framework with two complementary strategies--error dead-zone gating and constant-trace normalization--each independently capable of preventing covariance explosion and parameter freezing, with the latter additionally preserving the geometric structure of uncertainty. Validated on a non-holonomic differential-drive robot with wheel slip and Stribeck friction and on a 26-gram butterfly-inspired flapping-wing micro aerial vehicle, CR-RKL achieves numerically stable and accurate online modeling, and when embedded in model predictive control, it maintains reliable tracking performance under uncertain, time-varying dynamics.

AI.tldr: 针对离线模型在无法适应变化动态环境的问题，提出了一种新的实时在线建模方法CR-RKL，有效提升了自主机器人在未知动态下的建模和控制性能。
AI.motivation: 离线模型往往无法应对训练分布外、时变动态的挑战。Koopman算子理论虽可将非线性系统线性化，有望用于在线建模，但现有递归算法在“遗忘”与“激励”不充分时存在协方差暴涨或参数冻结等数值不稳定性。亟需一种数值稳定且有效的在线学习方法。
AI.method: 推出CR-RKL框架，包含两大创新：一是误差死区门控（error dead-zone gating），二是常迹归一化（constant-trace normalization）。两者分别或联合可单独防止协方差膨胀和参数冻结，其中常迹归一化还可保持不确定性几何结构。将该方法应用于滑移及摩擦复杂环境下的差速轮式机器人及扑翼微型飞行器。
AI.result: CR-RKL在两种具备复杂、时变动态（如轮滑、Stribeck摩擦）的机器人上进行了实验验证，无论是数值稳定性还是在线建模精度均有显著提升，嵌入预测控制后在不确定性环境下实现了稳定精准跟踪。
AI.conclusion: CR-RKL方法有效解决了递归Koopman学习在复杂动态系统下的数值脆弱性，实现了高效、鲁棒的在线动态建模，并显著提升了自主系统在未知环境下的运动控制和跟踪表现。

title: Rethinking the Role of Efficient Attention in Hybrid Architectures
summary: Modern language models increasingly adopt hybrid architectures that combine full attention with efficient attention modules, such as sliding-window attention (SWA) and recurrent sequence mixers. However, how these efficient modules shape model capabilities remains poorly understood. To address this gap, we conduct a systematic analysis across hybrid architectures from three perspectives: scaling behavior, mechanism analysis, and architecture design. First, from a scaling perspective, we find that efficient-attention design primarily affects how fast long-context capability emerges, while different hybrids eventually converge to comparable long-context performance under sufficient training. Second, mechanistically, we show that long-range retrieval is mainly carried by full attention, whereas efficient attention shapes its optimization trajectory. This explains a counter-intuitive phenomenon we call Large-Window Laziness: larger SWA windows can delay the formation of retrieval heads in full-attention layers. Third, guided by this mechanism, we show that applying NoPE to only the full-attention layers of a small-window SWA hybrid substantially improves long-context performance with negligible impact on short-context performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统地分析了现代“大语言模型”中混合注意力架构（全注意力+高效注意力模块）的性能及机制，发现高效注意力主要影响上下文能力的涌现速度而非最终性能，并提出机制解释和优化建议。
AI.motivation: 虽然混合注意力架构被广泛采用，但高效注意力模块如何影响模型能力尚不清楚。因此，作者希望揭示其影响机制和性能表现，指导更优模型设计。
AI.method: 从三个方面系统分析混合注意力架构：1）缩放行为对比，分析不同架构下的长上下文能力发展趋势；2）机制层面，追踪信息检索形成过程及不同模块作用；3）基于机制，尝试架构优化（例如仅对全注意力层应用NoPE），验证对性能的影响。
AI.result: 1）高效注意力主要影响长上下文能力的涌现速度，但充足训练后不同混合架构最终长上下文性能相当；2）全注意力层负责远程检索，高效注意力影响其优化路径，发现“大窗口惰性”现象；3）仅对全注意力层用NoPE能大幅改善长上下文性能，几乎不影响短上下文表现。
AI.conclusion: 高效注意力模块更多影响模型训练过程中的能力形成速度，而不是最终能力表现。理解其内部机制有助于更好地设计和优化混合架构，提升实际应用中的上下文处理能力。

title: Temporally Consistent and Controllable Video Generation of 2D Cine CMR via Latent Space Motion Modeling
summary: Cine cardiac magnetic resonance is the gold standard for assessing cardiac function, but the scarcity of public datasets limits the development of advanced data-driven models. To address this limitation, we propose a generative method for synthesizing temporally coherent and anatomically consistent cardiac sequences. Our text-to-video framework decouples cardiac spatial structure from temporal motion. First, a fine-tuned diffusion model synthesizes an initial frame from a clinical text prompt, controlling anatomical features. Then, a latent flow model conditioned on a cardiac phase embedding generates the complete cardiac motion, ensuring spatial consistency and temporal control. Our model generates anatomically and pathologically diverse sequences with high temporal coherence and strong fidelity to input prompts, achieving a FID of 31.68 for image realism and a CLIP score of 31.04 for text-image alignment. These experimental results highlight its potential to produce high-fidelity, on-demand medical data, offering a scalable solution to data scarcity.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种文本驱动的生成方法，可以合成时间连贯且解剖结构一致的心脏动态图像序列。该方法有效缓解公开医学数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 心脏磁共振(cMRI)作为评估心脏功能的金标准，但由于公开数据集稀少，限制了数据驱动方法的发展。因而亟需一种能够生成高质量心脏影像序列的数据生成方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种文本到视频的生成框架：首先用微调的扩散模型根据输入的临床文本提示合成初始帧，控制解剖特征；然后结合心脏周期嵌入，通过潜在流模型生成完整心脏运动序列，实现空间一致性和时间可控性。
AI.result: 生成的心脏序列具备解剖和病理多样性，时间连贯性好，对输入提示还原度高。实验结果显示其在图像真实性上FID为31.68，文本-图像一致性CLIP分数为31.04，均表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够按需生成高保真、多样化的医学数据，解决了公开心脏磁共振数据稀缺问题，为后续医学影像分析模型的开发提供了可扩展的数据解决方案。

title: SimWeaver: Zero-Shot RGB Sim-to-Real for Deformable Manipulation
summary: RGB sim-to-real for deformable manipulation has remained largely unsolved without real-world fine-tuning. We present SimWeaver, which trains zero-shot RGB VLA policies on 200 simulated demonstrations per task, reaching above 80% per-task and 91% average real-world success across 5 diverse deformable tasks including plastic-bag manipulation, without teleoperation or per-task calibration. SimWeaver combines a reliable measurement-backed simulator (SimWeaver-Sim) with an extensible asset framework supporting single-image generation(SimWeaver-Asset), a deterministic topology-aware trajectory synthesizer (SimWeaver-Syn), and a sim-to-real protocol with ISP-aware photometric augmentation (SimWeaver-Real). On silk grasping, the sim-trained policy reaches 100% under visual distribution shifts where real-data baselines drop to 9-70%, at two orders of magnitude lower per-trajectory cost. We will release SimWeaver and a representative asset subset. Project page: https://simweaver.github.io/

AI.tldr: SimWeaver是一种面向变形物体操纵的RGB视觉策略sim-to-real方法，无需真实世界微调即可实现高效效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于RGB的sim-to-real方法在处理变形物体操纵时，通常需要在真实世界进行微调，缺乏高效零样本迁移的通用方案。
AI.method: SimWeaver由高可靠性的仿真平台（SimWeaver-Sim）、支持单图像生成的资产框架（SimWeaver-Asset）、具备拓扑感知的确定性轨迹合成器（SimWeaver-Syn）和面向ISP的光度增强协议（SimWeaver-Real）组成，只需200条仿真演示即可训练策略。
AI.result: 在5种不同类型的变形任务（包括塑料袋操作）中，SimWeaver无需遥操作或任务校准，每个任务成功率超过80%，平均成功率达91%；在silk抓取任务下，策略在视觉分布变化下依然100%成功，远超真实数据基线的9-70%，且单条轨迹成本低两个量级。
AI.conclusion: SimWeaver展示了无需真实世界微调即可大幅提升仿真到现实的RGB变形物体操纵能力，并将开放部分代码和资产供社区使用。

title: Not All Skills Help: Measuring and Repairing Agent Knowledge
summary: LLM agents can improve without weight updates by accumulating natural-language skills from experience, but current systems entrust every decision about which skills to keep and how to apply them to LLM judgment alone. We argue that this conflates two distinct roles: generating a skill from experience is a creative act that judgment handles well, while deciding whether that skill actually helps requires empirical evidence across many tasks. Measuring per-skill causal contributions via randomized masking, we find that skill libraries exhibit pervasive causal heterogeneity: individual skills routinely help on some task types while hurting on others, yet their opposing effects cancel in aggregate, making them invisible to global curation methods. We propose ASSAY, a framework that separates generation from curation: it computes a per-skill causal attribution on a small development set, restructures the library offline, and suppresses skills with negative predicted effect for each test task. Across seven base models spanning four providers and two benchmarks (AppWorld and tau-bench), ASSAY consistently improves over prior skill-curation approaches. On AppWorld's hardest split, DeepSeek-V3 achieves 69.3% task-goal completion (47.4% relative improvement), a new state of the art among all published methods including weight-tuned approaches. On tau-bench retail, GPT-4.1 improves by 8.7% relative, advancing past o4-mini, o1, and GPT-4.5 on the public leaderboard without any weight modification. Ablation traces the dominant gain to per-task masking, confirming that the bottleneck is matching skills to tasks at inference time, not removing bad skills globally. Code is available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/assay.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的技能库筛选方法 ASSAY，能够更有效地提升大语言模型（LLM）代理的任务表现，无需微调权重。
AI.motivation: 当前 LLM 代理在利用经验积累自然语言技能时，将技能生成与保存全交由 LLM 自身判断，但这种方法无法有效辨别各技能在不同任务中的实际贡献。
AI.method: 作者通过测量每个技能的因果贡献（通过随机遮蔽的实验设计），发现技能在不同任务中常表现出异质性。ASSAY 框架将技能生成与筛选分离，对每个技能在开发集上计算因果归因，并在推理时根据实际任务屏蔽负向技能，以提升表现。
AI.result: 在七个模型、两个数据集（AppWorld, tau-bench）上的实验证明：ASSAY 比现有技能库筛选方法均有提升。例如在 AppWorld 的 hardest split 上，DeepSeek-V3 达到69.3%的目标完成率，为当前最佳记录；在 tau-bench 的零售任务，GPT-4.1 提升8.7%。
AI.conclusion: ASSAY 框架有效提升 LLM 代理技能库利用效率，核心优势在于任务时精准匹配技能，而不是全局移除无效技能。该框架无需修改模型权重，具有广泛适用性和推广价值。

title: GeoRoPE: Ground-Aware Rotary Adaptation for Remote Sensing Foundation Models
summary: Remote-sensing foundation models (RSFMs) benefit from pretraining on imagery from multiple sensors and ground sampling distances (GSDs), but such exposure alone does not resolve scale mismatch during downstream adaptation. A fixed token-grid offset can correspond to different ground distances across sensors, making grid-based positional priors physically inconsistent. Meanwhile, heterogeneous spatial granularity means that compact urban regions and homogeneous landscapes may require different positional sensitivities even under the same GSD. Therefore, we propose {GeoRoPE}, a ground-aware, RoPE-compatible, and parameter-efficient spatial adaptation method for RSFMs. GeoRoPE recalibrates token-level positional interactions from two complementary aspects.
