First, \textit{Geo-Coordinate Calibration (GCC)} rescales raw token-grid offsets according to the ground distance represented by one token-grid step, producing geo-calibrated relative coordinates across GSDs. Second, \textit{Geo-Frequency Calibration (GFC)} adjusts the native RoPE frequency with a relation-specific factor, enabling position sensitive adaptation to scene-dependent spatial granularity. GeoRoPE is injected into pretrained RSFMs through a lightweight adapter, preserving the frozen spatial prior while adding geo-aware positional corrections. Experiments across multiple RSFMs, sensors, resolutions, and downstream tasks demonstrate that GeoRoPE improves cross-resolution robustness and scale-sensitive representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GeoRoPE的空间自适应方法，用于提升遥感领域基础模型在多传感器、多分辨率下的位置一致性与跨尺度泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 遥感基础模型由于训练时暴露于多种传感器和不同空间分辨率的数据，存在下游任务适应时的尺度不匹配问题。原有的格点式位置先验在不同传感器下无法物理一致，导致对空间特征的捕捉和泛化出现问题。
AI.method: 提出GeoRoPE方法，包括两个主要组件：1）Geo-Coordinate Calibration (GCC)：根据每步网格间隔实际地面距离对位置偏移重新缩放，实现跨分辨率的地理坐标校准。2）Geo-Frequency Calibration (GFC)：对RoPE内部的频率进行关系感知调整，使模型能够根据场景空间粒度变化自适应。该方法通过轻量级adapter插入预训练基础模型，无需重新训练主干参数。
AI.result: 在多种遥感基础模型、不同传感器、分辨率和下游任务上实验证明，GeoRoPE有效提升了模型的跨分辨率鲁棒性和对尺度敏感的表征学习能力。
AI.conclusion: GeoRoPE作为一种高效可移植的位置校正方案，克服了遥感领域多分辨、多尺度数据带来的位置一致性难题，实现了更强的跨场景泛化能力。

title: A Hybrid Model-Based and Model-Free Framework for Active Multi-View Viewpoint Optimization in Sonar Target Recognition
summary: This paper presents a hybrid model-based and model-free framework for active multi-view target recognition using forward-looking sonar. A convolutional neural network (CNN) provides data-driven observation likelihoods, while Radon-based orientation estimation enables viewpoint-aware sensing without requiring angle annotations. During training, an information-gain-based reward guides a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent to learn a belief-aware viewpoint selection policy offline. At deployment, the learned policy performs real-time viewpoint selection using only CNN-based belief updates, eliminating the need for computationally expensive online POMDP tree search. Experiments on a marine-debris forward-looking sonar dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves competitive recognition accuracy while reducing sensing steps and motion cost compared to model-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合模型驱动与数据驱动的主动多视角声呐目标识别方法，通过CNN与Radon变换实现高效识别，并用PPO强化学习优化视角选择策略，能减少感知步骤与运动成本。
AI.motivation: 现有前视声呐目标识别方法在主动多视角观察时，常需昂贵的在线POMDP树搜索或视角标签，计算消耗大，且难以适应实时性和节能需求。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：1）利用CNN计算数据驱动的观测似然，实现高效状态更新；2）基于Radon变换实现无需人工注释的目标朝向估计；3）采用信息增益为奖励，基于PPO训练强化学习代理，学习视角优化策略，离线学习，在实际部署时无需在线搜索。
AI.result: 在海洋垃圾声呐数据集上实验表明，该方法在准确率上接近甚至优于传统模型方法，同时有效减少了感知步骤和移动成本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法兼顾了识别精度与实时效率，提高了声呐多视角主动识别的实用性，为海洋环境目标识别领域提供了新思路。

title: CHILLGuard: Towards Fine-Grained Chinese LLM Safety Guardrail with Scalable Data Construction and Model-aware Preference Alignment
summary: Malicious content generated from large language models (LLMs) could pose severe safety risks and ethical concerns. While existing LLM safety guardrails excel in English or multilingual settings, they lack adaptation to Chinese-specific regulatory policies, cultural context and linguistic nuances, failing to support fine-grained risk classification for diverse deployment needs. In this paper, we introduce a 5-macro, 31-micro category fine-grained risk taxonomy for Chinese scenarios, and build CHILLGuard: a dedicated Chinese LLM content safety guardrail. To address the critical scarcity of high-quality annotated Chinese safety data, we propose a scalable multi-stage data construction pipeline: we expand multi-source corpus via retrieval-augmented generation, generate implicit harmful samples through prompt engineering rewriting, and refine high-quality data via multi-model voting-based label calibration. Based on this, we build CHILLGuardTrain, a large-scale training set with 405,007 samples, and CHILLGuardTest, a rigorously curated annotated test set with 51,745 samples. We then train CHILLGuard on CHILLGuardTrain under a generator-classifier collaborative framework via Model-aware Direct Preference Optimization. Extensive experiments under multiple settings demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of CHILLGuard, e.g., a 15.92% improvement of F1 score over Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict on our benchmark. We will release our resources at https://github.com/cswbyu/CHILLGuard.

AI.tldr: 本文针对中文大模型生成有害内容的安全风险，提出了CHILLGuard安全防护机制，并构建了细粒度风险分类体系和高质量中文数据集，实现了业界领先的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型的安全防护体系主要适用于英文或多语种场景，无法很好地适应中文特定的法规、文化与语言特性，难以满足多样化部署需求下的细致风险识别。
AI.method: 提出了包含5个宏类、31个微类的细粒度中文风险分类体系，并设计了多阶段大规模中文安全数据构建流程，包括基于检索增强生成的多源语料扩充、通过提示工程生成隐性有害样本、融合多模型投票进行高质量标注校准。以此构建了CHILLGuardTrain训练集和CHILLGuardTest测试集，并在生成器-分类器协同框架下通过Model-aware Direct Preference Optimization对CHILLGuard进行训练。
AI.result: 在多种实验设置下，CHILLGuard在检测中文有害内容任务上取得最先进的性能表现。例如在自建基准集上，F1分数较Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict提升了15.92%。
AI.conclusion: CHILLGuard实现了面向中文场景的细粒度内容安全防护，显著提升了中文有害内容检测能力，相关资源将公开，为后续研究和实际应用提供了基础支撑。

title: Scribby: A Multi-Level LLM Framework for Semantic Video Analysis
summary:
As video content continues to expand across educational platforms, recorded lectures, and live-streamed entertainment, the need for efficient and structured analysis of long-form footage has increased \cite{1}. Although many existing AI programs provide high-level video summaries based on AI-generated transcripts \cite{2,3,4,5}, these approaches are often limited to coarse overviews and lack detailed analysis of a video's structure, thematic progression, and semantic relationships, all of which are required for comprehensive video analysis.
  This paper proposes an LLM-based video summarization framework that balances macro-level comprehension with micro-level semantic analysis \cite{6,12,13}. The first stage of the process indexes the video at a micro level by (1) analyzing the full transcript, (2) analyzing individual transcript sentences, and (3) grouping these sentences by semantic similarity using an LLM as a judge \cite{6,13}. Contextual continuity is retained during sentence-level processing by incorporating both the global transcript analysis and adjacent sentence information into each evaluation prompt.
  This framework establishes a foundation for video analysis tools that visualize semantic chunking and semantic matching through relevance-based heatmaps. Limitations and future expansions of the framework are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的大型视频内容细致分析与摘要框架，能够兼顾全局与细节，提升长视频讲座等内容的结构化分析能力。
AI.motivation: 随着视频内容的激增，尤其是在教育、讲座和娱乐直播领域，需要对长时视频进行高效、结构化的分析和理解。但现有AI生成的摘要仅能提供粗略概览，缺乏对视频结构、主题推进和语义关系的深层次剖析，难以满足复杂应用的需求。
AI.method: 提出一种分两步走的LLM视频摘要框架：首先微观层面分析视频整段转录文本，再细致到每一句，之后根据语义相似度将句子分组。分组时，LLM不仅参考该句，还结合全局内容与相邻句，强化语境连贯性。通过LLM进行“语义裁判”，保障分组准确性。
AI.result: 该框架能实现语义片段（chunking）和内容匹配的可视化分析，例如基于关联度的热度图。系统能够更细致地展现视频的结构和主题演化过程，优于现有通用型AI摘要。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为复杂长视频的结构化分析奠定了基础，有助于未来开发更智能的视频分析和辅助工具。文中亦讨论了当前方法的限制并指出后续可扩展的方向。

title: A Corridor-Scale CARLA-VISSIM Co-Simulation Framework for Multi-Intersection Urban Traffic
summary: This paper presents an implemented CARLA-VISSIM co-simulation framework for an urban corridor comprising approximately fifteen connected intersections centered on Martin Luther King Jr. Boulevard in Chattanooga, Tennessee. The system integrates CARLA 0.10.0 Unreal Engine 5 with PTV VISSIM 2026 through a bidirectional, step-synchronized interface that couples VISSIM's microscopic vehicle, pedestrian, and signal-controller logic with CARLA's high-fidelity 3D rendering. A LiDAR-derived elevation model and RoadRunner-based High Definition (HD) map provide terrain-accurate road geometry deployed consistently across both simulators. The framework incorporates explicit actor ownership, mirrored lifecycle management, coordinate reconciliation, and a latest-state-per-actor update policy, enabling stable interaction between VISSIM-controlled traffic and a CARLA-controlled ego vehicle. A corridor-scale case study demonstrates consistent traffic-signal mirroring, synchronized vehicle-pedestrian interactions, and stable mixed-authority operation under peak loads of approximately 100 vehicles and 100 pedestrians. The deployment captures the interaction of the five signalized intersections along MLK Street and their connecting upstream and downstream intersections, revealing synchronization challenges unique to multi-intersection corridors. Results indicate that this MLK-centered corridor provides an effective testbed for verifying cross-simulator consistency and that the proposed architecture supports reliable, perception-ready co-simulation for corridor-level traffic studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实现了一个将CARLA和VISSIM结合的城市道路走廊级联仿真框架，用于查塔努加市MLK大道约15个互联交叉口区域的大规模交通仿真，实现了多交叉路口真实场景、信号和多参与者的高保真联动仿真。
AI.motivation: 现有交通仿真平台在不同粒度的交通与感知任务间存在协同障碍，特别是在多交叉口场景下，不同仿真器之间的数据一致性和同步交互尤为困难。为此，作者设计跨平台协同体系以实现高保真、现实条件下的交通仿真和自动驾驶感知测试需求。
AI.method: 框架将CARLA 0.10.0与PTV VISSIM 2026通过双向、步进同步接口联通，实现VISSIM的微观交通（车辆、行人、交通灯）逻辑与CARLA高精3D渲染的协调。采用LiDAR高程模型与RoadRunner HD地图保证两仿真平台一致路网。通过精确的actor归属、生命周期管理、坐标对齐和最新状态同步，实现了多参与体混合主控下的联动。
AI.result: 通过MLK大道走廊实例，系统演示了信号一致性、车行人互动同步和混合控制稳定性；高峰时支持约100辆车和100名行人。完整覆盖了5个信号交叉口和上下游，揭示了多交叉口走廊仿真独有的同步挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该MLK走廊级仿真环境能有效作为跨仿真器一致性检验和基于感知的混合交通仿真测试平台，所提出的体系结构能够在真实负载下支持稳定、可靠的走廊级联仿真研究。

title: T-Mem: Memory That Anticipates, Not Archives
summary: Long-term memory is essential for conversational agents to remain coherent across extended dialogues, follow through on commitments made many sessions earlier, and adapt their behaviour to each user. Current LLM-backed long-term conversational memory, however, is reachability-bounded by the similarity between a query and stored content, both lexical and dense-vector. The approach is effective when query and memory share surface features such as wording or named entities (we call this descriptive). But it misses another, equally valuable class of cases, where query and memory do not share surface features and are tied only by a latent semantic arc (associative). On this regime prevailing long-term memory systems collectively fail. Covering this other half is what allows an assistant, for the first time, to actively draw on past dialogue as a semantic asset. On the memory side, this is the engineering counterpart of what cognitive science calls episodic future thinking: rehearsing past experience for the future contexts under which it will need to be found. We call these write-time rehearsals triggers. We propose T-Mem, the first long-term conversational memory architecture that covers both descriptive and associative recall. At each of two evidence granularities, single facts and full exchanges, T-Mem instantiates one descriptive trigger family and one associative trigger family, so that every memory remains reachable from both surface-similar and relevance-bound queries. As empirical validation, T-Mem reaches state-of-the-art on both LoCoMo and LoCoMo-Plus.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的对话系统长时记忆架构“T-Mem”，能同时支持基于表面特征（描述性）和潜在语义（联想性）的记忆召回，有效提升对话连贯性和个性化。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大模型的对话智能体长时记忆，检索能力主要受限于查询与存储内容的表层相似性（如词语或实体重合），无法覆盖那些仅有语义联系但表层完全不同的记忆内容，影响对话连贯性及智能体个性化适应能力。
AI.method: 提出T-Mem架构，将记忆写入时引入“rehearsal triggers”，在单条事实和完整对话两种粒度下，分别针对表面相似（描述性）和语义相关（联想性）设置多组触发机制，保证用户查询可从两种路径命中相关记忆。
AI.result: 实验证明，T-Mem在LoCoMo及LoCoMo-Plus两个长时记忆评测任务上均取得了最新最优表现。
AI.conclusion: T-Mem首次实现在对话系统中同时兼顾描述性和联想性记忆召回，极大提升长时记忆的可达性，为智能体主动利用过往对话内容奠定基础，推动其向更类人的记忆使用能力发展。

title: Avoiding Exponential Blow-Up in Distributive Lattice Submodular Minimization
summary: Submodular function minimization has gained a lot of interest in recent years. They are highly applicable in the area of Computer Vision and Machine Learning. Often such applications require to work with submodular functions defined on distributive lattice. Current best way of dealing with it is using a transformation which extrapolates the submodular function for the respective boolean lattice. It makes optimization system too inefficient due to enlargement of the working space. Quantitatively, the expanded space has additional exponential (in set size) number of elements. We propose a generic framework for dealing with distributive lattice which only works within distributive lattice. Our framework allows one to use already established submodular function minimization algorithms for boolean lattice. In our experiment, we show the huge improvement in terms of running time over tranditional methods for handling distributive lattice.

AI.tldr: 本文针对在分布格（distributive lattice）上的子模函数最小化问题，提出了一种不需扩展空间的新方法，显著提升了优化效率。
AI.motivation: 传统处理子模函数最小化的方法，需要将问题转换并扩展到布尔格（boolean lattice），导致运算空间指数级膨胀，效率极低。分布格相关的子模函数在计算机视觉与机器学习应用中很常见，亟需新的高效方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个通用的理论框架，直接在分布格内处理子模函数，无需扩展到布尔格，并能够利用现有针对布尔格的子模函数最小化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在处理分布格的子模函数最小化任务上，运行时间远优于传统扩展到布尔格的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了分布格子模函数最小化的运算效率，为相关领域的优化问题带来了实用价值。

title: A Bilateral Teleoperation Framework for Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Dexterous teleoperation requires precise arm-hand coordination, low-latency feedback, and robust interaction in real-world contact-rich environments. This paper presents a modular bilateral teleoperation framework that integrates operator-side input interfaces with a robot-side dexterous hand and compliant robotic arm in a unified control architecture. The system supports position-based hand retargeting, differential arm control, multi-scale haptic feedback, and shared control for stable manipulation. We validate the framework through a real-world dexterous manipulation task, highlighting coordinated arm-hand control and contact-aware interaction. Beyond feasibility, we identify key design insights related to cross-embodiment mismatch, haptic feedback granularity, and shared control. The proposed platform provides a practical teleoperation system and a foundation for collecting high-quality demonstrations for future learning-from-demonstration research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个模块化的双边远程操作框架，整合了操作端和机器人端的灵巧操作，实现了高效的手-臂协调和丰富的触觉反馈，在现实环境下展现出稳定的操作能力。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中的远程操作挑战包括手-臂协调精度高、反馈低延迟和与接触丰富环境的稳健交互，现有系统在灵巧性、反馈与控制架构方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出一种模块化的双边远程控制架构，将操作端输入接口与机器人端的灵巧机械手与柔顺机械臂统一在一个控制系统中。特点包括基于位置的手部映射、差分臂控、多尺度触觉反馈与共享控制机制，从而提升操控的稳定性和协调性。
AI.result: 通过现实的灵巧操控任务验证了该框架，有效展示了手-臂协调和对接触的感知能力，并总结出跨身体映射不匹配、触觉反馈粒度和共享控制等重要设计见解。
AI.conclusion: 所提平台不仅为远程操作提供了实用系统，也为今后基于示范学习的数据收集奠定了基础。

title: Few-Shot Biomedical Relation Extraction with Large Language Models: A Viable Alternative to Supervised Learning?
summary: Biomedical relation extraction (BioRE) is a key step in transforming biomedical literature into structured knowledge. However, most existing approaches rely on supervised models trained on costly annotated datasets, limiting their scalability and adaptability across relation types and domains. We investigate few-shot BioRE using prompt-based learning with large language models (LLMs) and compare two task formulations: pairwise classification, which predicts relations for individual entity pairs, and joint generation, which extracts multiple relations in a single model call. Experiments on the BioREDirect dataset reveal a clear precision-recall trade-off. Pairwise classification achieves higher recall, whereas joint generation is more precise and computationally efficient. The best-performing model achieves a micro-F1 score of 0.44, substantially outperforming previous few-shot results (0.34) while remaining below the supervised baseline (0.56). Much of this gap is attributable to a single ambiguously defined relation type. When evaluated using macro-F1, which better captures performance across relation types in an imbalanced setting, prompt-based approaches outperform the supervised baseline (0.45 vs. 0.38), particularly on rare relation types. These findings highlight the potential of LLMs for BioRE in low-resource settings and underscore the importance of well-defined relation schemas.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了用大语言模型（LLMs）和prompt-based learning进行生物医学关系提取（BioRE）的few-shot学习，比较了两种任务形式，并在BioREDirect数据集上进行了实证分析。
AI.motivation: 目前生物医学关系抽取依赖于高成本标注数据集的监督学习，难以扩展和适应新关系类型和领域。作者旨在探索few-shot学习和prompt-based LLMs能否提升低资源场景下的BioRE能力。
AI.method: 采用两种任务形式：（1）pairwise classification（单对实体关系分类）；（2）joint generation（模型一次提取多个关系）。基于prompt的大语言模型进行few-shot学习，并在BioREDirect数据集上评估方法效果。
AI.result: pairwise分类召回率更高，joint生成精度更高且计算效率更优。最佳模型micro-F1为0.44，超过此前few-shot结果（0.34），但不及有监督方法（0.56），gap多由一个模糊关系类型引起。在macro-F1上，prompt方法（0.45）优于有监督方法（0.38），对稀有关系类型表现更好。
AI.conclusion: LLMs和prompt-based方法在标注稀缺场景下对BioRE很有潜力，尤其是对于稀有关系类型。强调明确定义关系类型对提升模型表现的重要性。

title: Momentum-Guided Semantic Forecasting (MoFore) for Self-Supervised Video Representation Learning
summary:
Self-supervised video representation learning has recently advanced through contrastive learning, masked reconstruction, and predictive representation learning. Reconstruction-based approaches such as MAE and VideoMAE learn representations by recovering masked visual content \cite{he2022mae,tong2022videomae}, while contrastive methods such as CLIP learn semantically meaningful embedding spaces through representation alignment \cite{radford2021clip}.
  In this work, we introduce a Momentum-Guided Semantic Forecasting framework (MoFore) for self-supervised video representation learning. Instead of optimizing for pixel-level reconstruction or task-specific semantic alignment, the proposed method learns temporally predictive video representations by forecasting future latent embeddings from temporally distant context clips. To improve robustness across temporal scales, we further introduce randomized temporal-gap forecasting during training. The framework combines predictive latent forecasting with contrastive regularization to encourage temporal consistency while preventing representation collapse.
  Experiments on the UCF101 dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework learns temporally consistent and semantically meaningful video representations without using action labels during training. Quantitative analysis shows strong temporal stability and emergent category-level structure in the learned embedding space, while qualitative retrieval experiments reveal motion-aware organization across related activities. Overall, the results suggest that long-range latent forecasting provides an effective and computationally efficient approach for self-supervised video representation learning without relying on reconstruction-based objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MoFore的自监督视频表征框架，通过预测未来的潜在特征来实现视频表征学习，不依赖像素级重建或任务特定对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频学习方法大多依赖重建像素信息或语义对齐，存在效率或泛化性不足问题，因此需要新的方法更好捕捉时序语义且高效。
AI.method: MoFore框架通过使用Momentum-Guided方法，预测长距时间片段的潜在嵌入向量。此外，引入随机化的时间间隔预测以及对比正则，强化时间一致性并防止表征坍塌。
AI.result: 在UCF101数据集上的实验显示，该方法在无监督下能得到时间连贯且语义显著的视频表征。定量分析表明表征具备较强时间稳定性和类别结构，定性检索实验展示了对动作的运动感知能力。
AI.conclusion: 长距潜在特征预测为视频自监督学习提供了高效且有效的新路线，有望替代传统重建为主的目标函数。

title: Learning Context-Aware Neural ODE Dynamics for Adaptive Robotic Control
summary: Robotic systems deployed in uncertain and dynamically changing environments often face variations in contact conditions, aerodynamic effects, and external disturbances that challenge reliable control. To remain effective under model-based control, these systems require dynamics models that can adapt to such changes, especially when direct access to complete environmental information is limited. To enable adaptability and facilitate integration with model predictive control, we propose a context-aware dynamics model based on neural ordinary differential equations, which infers environmental factors from state-action histories using a two-phase training procedure. We validate the approach across diverse robotic platforms, including a quadrotor in simulation, as well as a Sphero BOLT robot and a Fanuc manipulator in real-world experiments. The results demonstrate that our method effectively adapts to temporally and spatially varying environmental changes across different tasks. Videos are available at https://youtu.be/PY0sNyF2rqE , and the source code is available at https://github.com/syyu410-yu/context-aware-neural-ode-control.git .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经常微分方程（neural ODE）的环境感知动力学模型，用于机器人在复杂和动态环境下的控制自适应。
AI.motivation: 机器人在现实环境中常常面临不可预知的接触状态、空气动力变化和外部干扰，导致传统基于模型的控制方法难以保证性能，因此亟需能够感知和适应环境变化的动力学建模方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种结合神经常微分方程和上下文推理的动力学模型。该方法通过分析机器人状态-动作历史，推断环境因素，并采用两阶段训练流程训练模型，以便与模型预测控制框架集成。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境下（包括四旋翼、地面机器人和机械臂）进行验证，结果显示该方法能够根据时空变化的环境条件自适应地调整动力学模型，提升控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 此方法可广泛应用于多种机器人平台，有效增强机器人在动态不确定环境下的可靠控制能力。

title: Encode Errors: Representational Retrieval of In-Context Demonstrations for Multilingual Grammatical Error Correction
summary: Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) involves detecting and correcting the wrong usage of grammar. While large language models (LLMs) with in-context learning (ICL) capabilities have shown significant progress on various natural language processing (NLP) tasks, their few-shot performance on GEC remains suboptimal. This is mainly due to the challenge of retrieving suitable in-context demonstrations that capture error patterns instead of semantic similarity. In this paper, we demonstrate that LLMs can inherently capture information related to grammatical errors through their internal states. From these states, we extract the Grammatical Error Representation (GER), an informative and semantically neutral encoding of grammatical errors. Our novel GER-based retrieval method significantly boosts performance in ICL settings on multilingual GEC datasets, improving the precision of correction. For high-resource languages, our results on 8B-sized open-source models match those of closed-source models such as Deepseek2.5 and GPT-4o-mini. For low-resource languages, our $F_{0.5}$ scores surpass the baseline by up to a factor of 1.20. This method provides a more precise and resource-efficient solution for multilingual GEC, offering a promising direction for interpretable GEC research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大型语言模型（LLM）内部状态提取语法错误表示（GER）的方法，提升了多语言语法纠错（GEC）任务中模型在少样本学习场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在GEC任务上表现一般，尤其在少样本学习时难以检索到有效的上下文示例，主要因为现有检索方法依赖语义相似性，而未能关注语法错误模式。
AI.method: 作者提出提取LLM内部状态中的语法错误表示（GER），用于开发一种新的基于GER的检索方法，从而在多语言GEC数据集上，通过选择捕捉语法错误而非语义的示例，提高ICL中的纠错精度。
AI.result: 在高资源语言上，8B开源模型的表现可媲美闭源大模型如Deepseek2.5和GPT-4o-mini；在低资源语言上，$F_{0.5}$ 分数比基线高出最多1.2倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多语言GEC提供了更精准、资源高效的解决方案，并为具可解释性的GEC研究方向带来新的希望。

title: XMedFusion: A Knowledge-Guided Multimodal Perception and Reasoning Framework for Autonomous Medical Systems
comment: Accepted at the 2026 International Conference on Robotics and Automation in Industry (ICRAI)
summary: Autonomous medical and robotic systems increasingly rely on intelligent perception and reasoning capabilities to interpret visual data and support clinical decision making. Radiology report generation represents a critical component of such automated diagnostic workflows, yet existing end-to-end multimodal models often suffer from weak visual grounding, resulting in unreliable interpretations and omission of subtle clinical findings. This paper presents XMedFusion, a modular AI framework designed as an intelligent perception and reasoning module for autonomous medical systems. The proposed framework decomposes visual information into coordinated functional components that emulate expert-driven analysis, including a visual perception agent that extracts image-grounded evidence, a knowledge graph construction agent that structures clinically relevant findings, and a retrieval-guided drafting process that ensures a consistent reporting structure. A synthesis agent iteratively integrates visual and structured evidence through reasoning-driven verification to produce reliable and interpretable diagnostic outputs. Experimental evaluation on a public chest radiograph dataset demonstrates significant improvements over baseline vision-language models, achieving gains from 0.0493 to 0.3359 in BLEU-1, 0.0863 to 0.2440 in ROUGE-L, and 0.0829 to 0.1708 in METEOR, along with substantial improvements in semantic evaluation metrics such as Consistency (2.38 to 7.80) and Accuracy (2.34 to 6.93). The results highlight the effectiveness of structured multi-agent perception and reasoning for enhancing robustness, transparency, and automation in intelligent medical imaging systems, enabling integration into autonomous healthcare and robotic diagnostic workflows.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了XMedFusion，一个用于自动医学系统的模块化人工智能框架，通过分解视觉信息和多智能体协作，实现了更可靠的影像报告生成，并大幅提升了生成质量和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 在自动化医疗和机器人系统中，医学影像报告的自动生成是关键环节，但现有端到端多模态模型视觉定位不足，容易遗漏微妙临床发现，导致结果不可靠。因此，研究者希望通过更结构化、可解释的方法提升自动报告的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: XMedFusion框架将报告生成过程拆分为多个专家驱动的功能模块，包括视觉感知代理（提取影像证据）、知识图谱构建代理（结构化临床发现）、检索引导的草稿生成和融合视觉与结构化证据的推理验证。该多智能体系统模拟专家分析过程，确保了诊断输出的可靠性和解释性。
AI.result: 在公开的胸部X光数据集上，XMedFusion各项自动评测指标显著优于基线视觉-语言模型。例如，BLEU-1提升为0.0493到0.3359、ROUGE-L为0.0863到0.2440、METEOR为0.0829到0.1708，语义一致性和准确性指标分别提升至7.80和6.93，均远超基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、多智能体的感知与推理框架能有效提升医学影像报告自动生成的鲁棒性、透明性和自动化水平，为实现自动化医疗和机器人诊断系统提供了技术基础。

title: FARM: Find Anything using Relational Spatial Memory
summary: Robots operating in homes, warehouses, and other object-rich environments need memory systems that can find specific object instances on demand. Object-level memory alone is often insufficient: scenes contain many plausibly matching objects, and users refer to the target through relations to landmarks and surrounding objects (e.g. ``the tall lamp below the dartboard and to the left of the poster''), demanding a relational spatial memory that supports retrieval through semantic, appearance, and spatial predicates over objects. To achieve this, we present FARM (Find Anything using Relational Spatial Memory), which builds, in real time at 5-10 Hz, a compact, open-vocabulary, object-level memory with geometry, visual-language descriptors, and viewpoint evidence. At query time, FARM uses VLMs to parse the query and score visual evidence, while grounding spatial constraints explicitly through object symbols and relational predicates. This structured use of VLMs enables more accurate and robust retrieval than end-to-end reasoning over frame histories or scene-graph context. In experiments on 44k language queries spanning 67 indoor and outdoor scenes, ranging from 15 to 15,000 m^2, FARM improves Recall@5 and Recall@10 over prior methods by 164% and 224%, and a final VLM reranking stage improves Accuracy@1 by 35%, while running in real time. We further demonstrate closed-loop deployment on a quadrupedal robot using onboard sensors and compute.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FARM系统，实现了机器人在丰富物体环境下，通过关系和空间描述高效查找指定目标。FARM利用VLM解析查询，结合结构化对象记忆和空间关系，有效提升查找准确率，并能实时运行在机器人上。
AI.motivation: 在家庭、仓库等复杂环境中，单纯基于对象级记忆难以准确找到特定物体，因为用户常通过与其他物体的空间和语义关系来描述目标（如“飞镖盘下方、高灯左侧的海报”），因此需要支持复杂关系和空间定位的记忆机制。
AI.method: 提出FARM（Find Anything using Relational Spatial Memory）系统，实时（5-10Hz）构建包含对象几何、视觉-语言描述和视角证据的紧凑开放词表对象记忆。查询时，利用视觉-语言模型（VLM）解析和评估视觉证据，通过对象符号和关系谓词显式实现空间约束，提升检索能力。
AI.result: 在包含44,000条查询、覆盖67个室内外场景的实验中，FARM的Recall@5和Recall@10分别比以往方法提升了164%和224%，最终通过VLM重排序，Accuracy@1提升35%，同时实现了实时性能。论文还展示了在四足机器人上的端到端部署。
AI.conclusion: FARM系统结合视觉-语言模型与结构化关系记忆，显著提升了机器人对复杂空间语义查询的响应能力，为实际机器人环境目标检索提供了通用、高效且可实时运行的解决方案。

title: Let LLMs Judge Each Other: Multi-Agent Peer-Reviewed Reasoning for Medical Question Answering
comment: Accepted by the Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association
summary:
Objective: To enhance the accuracy, interpretability, and robustness of large language models (LLMs) in medical question answering (MedQA).
  Method: We designed a multi-agent peer-reviewed reasoning method in which multiple LLM agents independently generate chain-of-thought reasoning with candidate answers, then act as peer reviewers to evaluate each other's reasoning for factual correctness and logical soundness. The highest-rated reasoning chain is selected to produce the final answer. Experiments were conducted with five state-of-the-art LLMs (Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Phi-4, DeepSeek-LLM-7B, GPT-oss-20B) on three benchmark datasets: HeadQA, MedQA-USMLE, and PubMedQA. Performance was compared against single-model chain-of-thought reasoning and chain-of-thought-based majority voting.
  Results: Peer-reviewed reasoning consistently outperformed both baselines. The best model combination achieved an average accuracy of 0.820 across datasets, exceeding the strongest single model (0.777) and majority voting ensembles (up to 0.789). The method also scaled effectively with more participating models, while peer assessments reliably distinguished high- from low-quality reasoning chains.
  Conclusion: The proposed multi-agent peer-reviewed reasoning method enables LLMs to act as both solvers and evaluators, yielding superior performance in MedQA. By emphasizing reasoning quality rather than answer agreement alone, this approach improves accuracy, interpretability, and robustness, offering a promising direction for trustworthy biomedical AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体同行评议推理方法，提升了大型语言模型（LLMs）在医学问答（MedQA）中的准确性、可解释性和稳健性。该方法在多个数据集上取得了优于传统方法的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LLMs在医学问答中仍面临准确性与解释性不足的问题，现有集成方法（如多数投票）未能充分利用推理过程的信息。因此，亟需提升LLM在医学场景下的可靠性和可信度。
AI.method: 设计了多智能体同行评议推理方法：多个LLM分别独立生成推理链及候选答案，然后互相评议推理的事实正确性及逻辑性，最终选取评分最高的推理链做为答案。在3个MedQA基准数据集上，分别以5种主流LLM为对象，比较了该方法与单模型推理及多数投票方法的效果。
AI.result: 同行评议推理方法在所有数据集和模型组合中表现最好。最佳模型组合平均准确率为0.820，明显高于最强单模型（0.777）和多数投票（最高0.789），且随着更多模型参与，效果进一步提升。同时，同行评议能有效区分高、低质量推理链。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体同行评议推理不仅提升了医学问答场景下LLMs的准确性、可解释性和稳健性，还为构建更可信赖的生物医学AI系统提供了新方向。强调推理质量而非简单答案一致性是该方法的关键优势。

title: An Empirical Analysis of Optimization Dynamics and Sparsity Boundaries in Large-Scale Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
summary: Pedestrian Attribute Recognition (PAR) is critical for video surveillance, enabling forensic search and re-identification systems. Extreme class imbalance remains a fundamental obstacle when merging PETA and PA-100K into a 109,000-image composite corpus, where minority attributes have positive sample fractions below 1%. This causes standard BCE optimization to suppress rare traits, a phenomenon we term the majority negative class cheating trap. We present a systematic ablation of Multi-Label Focal Loss hyperparameters (alpha and gamma) on a ResNet-18 backbone. A calibrated configuration (alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0) achieves a Macro F1-score of 62.32%, matching BCE baseline while preserving superior hard-example mining and convergence dynamics. Our approach uses pure loss-function engineering with zero computational overhead for edge deployment. We identify the Sparsity Wall, a hard boundary where positive sample fractions below 0.1% make global loss reweighting ineffective, requiring instance-level intervention.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对行人属性识别中的极端类别不均衡问题，提出通过优化多标签Focal Loss超参数，在不额外增加计算开销的情况下改善识别罕见属性的表现。
AI.motivation: 在将PETA和PA-100K两个数据集合并时，极低的少数类正样本比例（低于1%）导致标准BCE损失优化难以识别罕见属性，影响系统的整体性能和实用性。
AI.method: 论文在ResNet-18骨干网络上，系统性地对Multi-Label Focal Loss的超参数(alpha和gamma)进行消融实验，探索其对类别极度不均衡情况下的效果。
AI.result: 优化后的Focal Loss（alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0）在综合数据集上Macro F1分数达到62.32%，与BCE基线持平，并且在难例挖掘和收敛速度上具有更佳表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过纯损失函数工程，无需增加模型推理开销，即可有效提升罕见行人属性的识别表现。但发现当正样本比例低于0.1%时，仅靠全局损失重加权效果有限，需要更细粒度的实例级方法介入。

title: FD-SLAM: Fast Dense Radar-Inertial SLAM with Frequency-Domain Loop Closure and Pose Graph Optimization
summary: Radar SLAM is attractive for autonomous ground vehicles operating in visually degraded environments, however, scanning radars are noisy, have low scanning rates, and their measurements are challenging to match reliably over long trajectories. This paper presents FD-SLAM, a fast dense radar-inertial SLAM system that extends dense radar-inertial odometry with frequency-domain loop closure and pose graph optimization. The proposed method preserves an image-like structure of scanning radar measurements by using a compact frequency-domain polar descriptor for loop-candidate retrieval and a multi-stage verification pipeline based on temporal filtering, phase-correlation screening, scan-alignment similarity, and geometric consistency checks. Verified loop closures are added as non-sequential constraints in an SE(2) pose graph together with radar-inertial odometry factors. FD-SLAM is evaluated on a publicly available dataset using standard KITTI evaluation metrics. The results show that FD-SLAM improves FD-RIO baseline, achieves competitive performance against current state-of-the-art radar SLAM methods, and provides favorable rotational accuracy across multiple evaluated driving trajectories. Runtime analysis further indicates that the radar-inertial front-end operates above the radar sampling rate on a CPU-only setup, while loop closure detection and graph optimization remain suitable for parallel background execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FD-SLAM，一种结合雷达与惯性数据的快速高密度SLAM系统，能在视觉受限环境下提升鲁棒性和精度。
AI.motivation: 扫描雷达在视觉受限环境下对自主车辆应用潜力大，但其噪声较大、扫描频率低且数据关联难度高，阻碍了其在长期轨迹中的应用。现有方法在精度与效率间存在权衡，亟需提升。
AI.method: FD-SLAM方法保持了雷达测量的类似图像结构，采用紧凑的频域极坐标描述符进行闭环候选检索，并结合时序滤波、相位相关筛选、扫描对齐相似性和几何一致性检查进行多阶段验证。通过在SE(2)位姿图中引入闭环约束与雷达-惯性里程计算子，联合优化实现高精度建图。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和标准KITTI指标上评估，FD-SLAM优于FD-RIO基线，与现有最先进雷达SLAM方法表现相当，并在多条驾驶轨迹中有更好的旋转精度。前端单纯用CPU已达雷达采样速率，闭环与图优化适合后台并行。
AI.conclusion: FD-SLAM有效提高了雷达惯性SLAM的精度和效率，适合视觉退化环境下的无人车应用，在噪声强烈、长路径条件下尤为突出。

title: Pepti-Agent: An AI Agent for Peptide Design and Optimization
summary: Therapeutic peptides occupy a valuable design space between small molecules and biologics, but their development requires satisfying several competing constraints at once: solubility, hemolytic activity, and nonspecific surface fouling are governed by overlapping sequence features, so improving one property often degrades another. Computational design addresses this by pairing generative models with sequence-based property predictors, iteratively proposing and refining candidates. However, these components are typically wired together as monolithic scripts that are difficult to inspect, extend, or reuse, and they often refine sequences by natural-language reasoning rather than by tracking the evolving multi-property state of each candidate. We present Pepti-Agent, a closed-loop, peptide-specific framework that exposes generation, property prediction, and single-residue mutation as independently inspectable Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. A large language model controller invokes these tools and consults live predictor output between calls, so refinement is guided by each sequence's current property profile rather than by language reasoning alone. Task-specific PeptideGPT models generate candidates, ProtBERT-based classifiers score solubility, hemolysis, and non-fouling, and two interchangeable mutation operators propose sequence edits. By recording a per-step trace of controller decisions, predictor outputs, and accepted mutations, Pepti-Agent offers a reproducible substrate for benchmarking multi-objective design strategies and for prioritizing candidates for experimental validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Pepti-Agent框架，通过将多项蛋白或肽药物性质预测与生成过程模块化并用大语言模型进行智能调控，实现了多目标约束下的肽分子设计流程自动化与优化。
AI.motivation: 治疗性肽分子开发时需要同时优化溶解性、溶血性与抗表面污染等多个性质，不同性质的表征特性重叠，优化某项常导致其他性能下降。现有计算设计流程难以对多目标状态追踪与复用，影响了流程透明性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 设计了Pepti-Agent，采用模型上下文协议（MCP）将序列生成、性质预测和单位点突变分别作为独立可调模块，通过大语言模型控制器以交互闭环方式调度工具，每步参考性质预测结果迭代优化；候选分子的生成由Task-specific PeptideGPT完成，性质预测用ProtBERT模型，突变操作可灵活替换；并详尽记录整个流程决策与变化路径。
AI.result: Pepti-Agent能够以可追溯、自动化方式，在多目标平衡需求下生成并筛选肽分子序列，为多属性设计策略的基准测试和候选分子的实验优选提供了新途径。
AI.conclusion: Pepti-Agent框架提高了肽类药物多目标自动设计流程的可控性、可复用性和透明度，促进了多目标大分子设计方法的研究与落地。

title: ScoutVLA: UAV-Centric Active Perception via a Dual-Expert VLA Model for Open-World Embodied Question Answering
summary: Aerial Embodied Question Answering (EQA) requires Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to actively perceive the environment and answer natural language questions. Existing outdoor EQA systems usually stop once the target enters the UAV's field of view, leaving the fine-grained viewpoint adjustment needed for evidence-seeking questions largely unresolved. To address this issue, we introduce FG-EQA, a fine-grained active perception EQA benchmark with more than 40K simulated trajectories and 1K real-world trajectories. Drawing inspiration from the ``waggle dance'' of scout bees, which iteratively adjust their flight paths to verify target information, we propose ScoutVLA, an evidence-driven Vision-Language-Action model for outdoor EQA. To emulate this active exploration behavior, ScoutVLA features a decoupled dual-expert architecture: a vision-language expert infers the semantic intent to identify missing evidence, while an independent action expert employs high-DoF flow matching to generate continuous viewpoint-refinement trajectories. To balance the competing demands of continuous control and semantic reasoning, we devise a decoupled training strategy with a knowledge insulation mechanism that prevents the action gradients from erasing the model's multimodal reasoning ability. Extensive simulated experiments and a qualitative real-world field study both verify the superiority of ScoutVLA over the state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrating a 10.48$\boldsymbol{\times}$ higher average strict success rate and a 7.72$\boldsymbol{\times}$ higher average QA correctness.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了FG-EQA基准和ScoutVLA模型，有效提升无人机在细粒度主动感知和问答任务中的表现。新方法大幅超过现有技术，提升问答准确率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前室外无人机EQA任务在目标进入视野后通常即停止，忽略了需要持续调整视角以获取证据的问题，对于细粒度证据需要，现有方法无力应对。为补齐这一空白，作者提出新的基准和方法。
AI.method: 1. 提出FG-EQA基准，包含4万多条模拟轨迹和1000条真实轨迹，针对证据索取型问题。2. 受蜜蜂"摇摆舞"启发，设计ScoutVLA模型，采用解耦的双专家结构：视觉-语言专家负责识别缺失证据，动作专家通过高自由度流匹配生成连贯细腻的视点调整轨迹。3. 提出解耦训练与知识隔离机制，防止动作学习影响多模态推理能力。
AI.result: 在大量模拟实验和真实环境定性评估中，ScoutVLA在严格成功率上比SOTA高10.48倍，问答准确率高7.72倍，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度主动感知和任务分解对提升EQA任务至关重要，FG-EQA和ScoutVLA方法为室外无人机细粒度问答任务提供了有效解决方案，为进一步研究方向奠定基础。

title: Understanding and Modeling Perceived Cognitive and Physical Strain Dynamics for Planning-Oriented Human-Robot Collaboration in Prefabricated Construction
summary: Human-robot collaboration (HRC) in prefabricated construction requires planning approaches that consider not only productivity but also time-dependent worker states during repeated work and rest. Existing planning models often rely on simplified assumptions about fatigue, workload, or recovery, with limited domain-specific empirical evidence on how perceived strain evolves. This study develops an empirically grounded, planning-oriented approach to characterize perceived strain accumulation and recovery in prefabricated construction HRC. A controlled repeated work-rest experiment assessed perceived cognitive and physical strain using the Rating Scale for Mental Effort and Borg's Rating of Perceived Exertion. Linear and exponential functional forms were evaluated, followed by mixed-effects modeling to examine collaborative conditions, session effects, and inter-individual variability. Results indicate that cognitive strain accumulation is best represented by a linear mixed-effects model, whereas rest-phase recovery follows nonlinear decay. The resulting planning-oriented models may inform future human-state-aware task allocation and scheduling research.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对装配式建筑中人机协作的工作-休息调度，提出了基于实证数据的劳累积累与恢复建模方法，有助于制定更科学的人机任务分配计划。
AI.motivation: 现有的规划模型在考虑人机协作时，普遍对工人疲劳或恢复过程做了简化假设，缺乏实际工作环境下工人主观疲劳演变的实证基础。
AI.method: 通过受控的重复工作-休息实验，采用心理努力等级量表和Borg体力消耗感知量表，采集认知与体力主观负担数据。分别考察线性与指数函数建模，并运用混合效应模型分析不同协作条件、实验阶段及个体间差异。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，认知疲劳累积过程适合用线性混合效应模型描述，而休息恢复阶段则呈非线性衰减。此外模型能反映协作条件与个体差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于实证的累积-恢复模型能够为未来考虑工人状态的任务分配与调度研究提供理论支持，提升人机协作整体效率与科学性。

title: Transfer Learning for FHIR Questionnaire Terminology Binding
summary: Electronic prior authorization workflows require FHIR Questionnaire items to carry LOINC codes, yet most items in the HL7 Da Vinci CDS-Library lack these bindings. We treat this as a retrieval problem: given a Questionnaire item's text, find the correct LOINC code in a pool of 97,314 active codes. We compare six methods (TF-IDF, frozen MiniLM, BioBERT, BioLORD, contrastively fine-tuned MiniLM, and a TF-IDF+GPT reranker) on a 54-item evaluation set spanning three query styles (natural question, medium, and terse). No single method wins on every metric. BioLORD, a frozen encoder pre-trained on biomedical ontology definitions, has the best top-rank accuracy (R@1 = 0.185, MRR = 0.246) despite seeing no task-specific data, while a contrastive fine-tune on raw LHC-Forms pairs takes R@5 (0.389) and R@10 (0.426). A distribution-shift ablation shows why the fine-tune in our main table is not the strongest one: adding GPT-generated paraphrases to the raw pairs drops R@5 from 0.389 to 0.296, so the augmented union underperforms raw-only training on every metric except R@1. Performance peaks at 5k training pairs. Error analysis on BioLORD's R@1 failures shows that wrong-specificity and ambiguous-text cases together account for 59% of errors.

AI.tldr: 该文旨在解决FHIR电子授权工作流中问卷项缺乏LOINC代码绑定的问题，通过信息检索方法将问卷文本与LOINC代码自动匹配，并比较了多种主流模型的效果。
AI.motivation: FHIR电子授权需要问卷项附带LOINC编码，但现在的CDS库大部分项没有绑定，造成实际应用障碍。自动化检索和匹配LOINC代码成为亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 将问卷项文本与97314个LOINC代码进行匹配，将这一问题建模为检索问题；采用TF-IDF、MiniLM、BioBERT、BioLORD、对比学习微调MiniLM和TF-IDF+GPT重排序六种方法，在54个多风格问句集合上评估；还进行了分布漂移消融实验和错误分析。
AI.result: BioLORD模型在R@1与MRR指标上表现最佳（R@1=0.185，MRR=0.246）；对比学习微调MiniLM在R@5和R@10上更优；数据增强反而使R@5下降；训练对性能提升有上限（5千对左右）；BioLORD失败主要因特异性错误和文本歧义。
AI.conclusion: LOINC编码自动匹配可通过新一代生物医学语义模型获得较高精度；数据微调和增强方案需谨慎选择；文本表达和编码粒度对检索结果影响较大。

title: Double-Helix Vision (DH-V2): A Geometry-Based Visual Sampler for Bandwidth-Constrained Perception
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Code and benchmarks: https://github.com/JackJ-C/double-helix-vision-tool
summary: We present Double-Helix Vision (DH), a geometry-based visual sampler that compresses 2D images into compact 1D signals using paired golden-ratio-inspired spiral trajectories. Rather than processing every pixel uniformly, DH employs two phase-shifted helices (Alpha and Beta, offset by 180 degrees) to sample the image with biologically-inspired foveation: high density at the center, sparse coverage at the periphery. At 4K resolution, DH achieves a 1,433x compression ratio (99.93% reduction) while preserving the geometric structure of the scene. The full perception pipeline -- including spatial mapping, temporal collision detection, and intra-frame structural disparity estimation -- runs in 0.52 ms at 1080p on CPU-only hardware, with no neural network dependencies. On CIFAR-10 at extreme sampling budgets (K=128 points per helix), DH achieves a +6.03% accuracy gain over uniform random sampling. A JSON-serializable Robotics API is provided, delivering sub-millisecond spatial perception reports in 2.7 KB packets. Code and benchmarks are available under the MIT License.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何的双螺旋视觉采样器（DH），能够将2D图像高效压缩为紧凑的1D信号，实现极高比例的信息压缩，同时保持场景结构信息，且具备高效运行和高精度表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的图像处理通常对所有像素一视同仁，效率低且资源消耗大。生物视觉系统则选用‘中心高密，边缘稀疏’的策略，启发了如何利用非均匀采样实现高效图像压缩和感知。
AI.method: DH算法基于黄金比例的双螺旋轨迹，在图像上以高中心密度、边缘稀疏的方式进行采样，通过两个相位相反（180度错开）的螺旋实现采样互补。管线包括空间映射、时序碰撞检测和帧内结构差异估计，完全无需神经网络，且仅依赖CPU运行。
AI.result: 在4K分辨率下，DH实现了1433倍（99.93%）的压缩比，且仍能保留场景结构。在极端采样预算（CIFAR-10数据集，每螺旋128点）下，DH比随机均匀采样准确率高6.03%。空间感知流程可在CPU上0.52毫秒（1080p）内完成。相关接口API和基准代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DH方法在不依赖深度学习的前提下，极大提高了图像采样和压缩效率，且保留关键信息，运行高效，非常适合低资源和实时机器人感知等场景。

title: Reinforcement Learning-Guided Retrieval with Soft Fusion for Robust Multimodal Imitation Learning under Missing Modalities
summary: Robotic systems perceive the world through multiple input modalities -- including visual camera streams and natural language instructions -- and must select appropriate actions based on these signals. However, assuming the permanent availability of all input devices is unrealistic, as sensors may fail, become occluded, or drop out entirely during deployment. Robust handling of such missing-modality scenarios is therefore essential for real-world robot operation. This paper introduces RL4IL, a reinforcement learning guided method for imitation learning that selects the most suitable action for a given observation by identifying the most relevant expert demonstrations from a training library. A reinforcement learning policy, trained via Proximal Policy Optimisation over Breadth-First Search candidate sets, ranks candidate demonstrations and a soft cross-attention fusion head aggregates their action signals to produce the final prediction. When a modality is missing at inference time, a dedicated per-modality RL retrieval policy identifies donor demonstrations from the training library, and a soft imputation head reconstructs the missing embedding via cross-attention over the top-ranked donors -- without requiring any retraining of the system. Experiments on three LIBERO benchmark suites demonstrate that RL4IL substantially outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods under sensor dropout conditions, while requiring no policy network training. The code can be found at https://github.com/h-ismkhan/Reinforcement-Learning-via-kNN-for-Robotic-Learning-with-Missing-Camera

AI.tldr: 论文提出了RL4IL方法，通过强化学习引导的模仿学习，使机器人系统在传感器数据缺失时依然能够选择合适动作。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中机器人感知离不开多模态输入（如摄像头与语言指令），但设备可能故障或缺失，因此需设计能应对模态缺失的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 设计RL4IL方法，利用基于PPO训练的强化学习策略与软交叉注意力机制，从训练集专家演示中筛选最相关的动作信号。当某一模态缺失时，通过特定的RL策略检索候选演示，用交叉注意力过滤重构缺失特征，无需重新训练网络。
AI.result: 在三个LIBERO基准套件上实验证明，RL4IL在传感器掉线场景下大幅超越现有模仿学习方法，且不需再训练网络。
AI.conclusion: RL4IL可提升机器人在多模态感知传感器失效时的行为鲁棒性，对实际应用非常有价值。

title: ESBMC-PLC: Formal Verification of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking
summary: PLCs execute safety-critical programs across industrial sectors. The dominant PLC notation, ladder diagram (LD) per IEC 61131-3, remains absent from formal verification: SMT-based model checkers cannot process LD's rung-and-coil graphics. This paper presents ESBMC-PLC, the first open-source formal verifier with native LD support (PLCopen XML format), implemented as a new ESBMC frontend. ESBMC-PLC translates LD rungs to GOTO IR, models the PLC scan cycle as a while(true) loop with nondeterministic inputs, and checks safety properties via SMT-based bounded model checking or k-induction. A five-property YAML language (mutual_exclusion, invariant, absence, response, reachability) avoids temporal logic. A survey of 22 studies (2020-2026) identifies four research gaps; ESBMC-PLC closes two of them. Evaluation on 13 benchmarks (6 domains, 3 sources - including deployed CONTROLLINO PLCs and MathWorks Simulink PLC Coder) shows correct classification across 61 properties: all 9 author-constructed programs (Categories A/B) as expected, all 4 vendor programs (Category C) correctly unlabeled, with 8 bugs found (actionable counterexamples), 7 unbounded k-induction proofs, all runs under 60ms on Apple Silicon. Feature comparison with PLCverif shows that ESBMC-PLC is the only open-source tool that combines native LD, k-induction, and SMT bit-vector semantics.

AI.tldr: ESBMC-PLC 是第一个原生支持梯形图（LD）且开源的形式化验证器，解决了 PLC 安全性验证中的主要难题。
AI.motivation: 梯形图（LD）作为 PLC 的主流编程语言，在实际工业中广泛应用，但目前基于 SMT 的模型检测工具无法直接处理 LD 的图形化表示，导致其形式化验证能力严重不足。
AI.method: 作者提出并实现了 ESBMC-PLC，通过将 PLCopen XML 格式的 LD 图转换为 GOTO IR，并以 while(true) 循环建模 PLC 扫描周期。支持通过 SMT-Based 有界模型检测和 k-induction 两种自动化验证方式检查安全属性。属性描述采用五条 YAML 语句，避免使用时序逻辑，同时支持输入不确定性模拟。
AI.result: 在 13 个基准测试（涉及 6 个工业领域、包括实际部署的 CONTROLLINO PLC 和 Simulink PLC Coder 源码）上，ESBMC-PLC 能正确分类、8 个 bug 可重现、7 个安全性属性获得无界证明，所有测试均在 60ms 内完成。同时，相比于 PLCverif 工具，ESBMC-PLC 是唯一同时支持原生 LD、k-induction 和 SMT 位向量语义的开源工具。
AI.conclusion: ESBMC-PLC 弥补了当前 PLC 形式化验证工具对梯形图原生支持和验证能力的不足，是首个满足工业实际应用需求的工具，对于提升 PLC 程序的安全性验证具有重要意义。

title: JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
summary: Many moments in the real world do not wait for a user to ask. A fire starts on a security monitor, an expression flickers across a video call, or a product a viewer wants flashes by in a livestream. Yet today's large models remain mostly turn-based by design: they answer only when addressed, and even video-call apps that appear interactive still operate as question-answer systems, reacting only when polled or prompted. We argue for a different paradigm: a model that is present in the world like a person. It continuously watches what is happening now, decides on its own whether to speak or stay silent, interacts in real time, and delegates to a background model when the problem is hard. To advance interaction models and their adoption across domains, we make two fully open-sourced contributions. First, we release JoyAI-VL-Interaction, an 8B-scale, vision-first VL-interaction model. The model makes the response decision internally, choosing each second to stay silent, respond, or delegate to a background model, and it excels at vision-triggered responsiveness and time awareness. We pair it with a transferable training recipe, from which capabilities we never trained for emerge, such as guiding a shopper through changing app screens or improvising a lecture from a slide deck. Second, we release a complete, deployable system built around that model. The system streams any ongoing video into the model, making it genuinely present in the world. All other components are pluggable, including ASR/TTS modules, memory, visualization UI, and a background brain that can connect to any API or agent. Across six real-world scenarios, human raters prefer JoyAI-VL-Interaction over the in-app video-call assistants of Doubao and Gemini by a wide margin. To our knowledge, this is the first open, vision-driven interaction model released together with its training recipe, data, and complete deployable system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时、主动互动的视觉大模型JoyAI-VL-Interaction，突破了现有模型只能被动响应的局限，实现了基于当前视觉信息自主决策响应、持续交互，并开源了训练方法和完整系统。
AI.motivation: 传统大模型多为被动交互，只有在用户提问或操作时才做出反应，而现实世界许多关键时刻是即时且不可预知的，需要模型具备持续关注和主动决策能力。作者认为模拟人类实时在场、能自主决定何时响应或保持沉默的模型将极大拓展交互场景的实际应用。
AI.method: 1. 提出8B规模的视觉优先VL-interaction模型（JoyAI-VL-Interaction），具备每秒自主选择响应、沉默或委托复杂处理给后台模型的能力。2. 配套开源通用训练方法，实现模型对视频流主动感知和响应。3. 发布可直接部署的完整系统，支持模块化（如语音识别/合成、记忆、可视化界面、后台代理等）并适配多类API或智能体。
AI.result: 实验证明在六大真实场景下，人工评测JoyAI-VL-Interaction比市面主流视频通话助手如Doubao和Gemini有明显优势，用户更倾向选择其作为智能助手。部分未训练的能力（如跨屏指导、即兴讲座）也在实际应用中涌现。
AI.conclusion: JoyAI-VL-Interaction开创了时刻在场、主动交互的视觉模型新范式，并以完整开放的形式为多领域互动应用奠定了基础，将推动AI在更广泛实时场景中的落地与创新。

title: Transferring Contact, Not Just Motion: Compliant Grasping Across Dexterous Hands
summary: Dexterous grasping depends on contact regulation, not motion alone. Stable manipulation requires fingers to maintain appropriate object loading as contacts slip, deform, or become visually occluded. Existing cross-embodiment dexterous policies unify motion through retargeted hand poses or latent actions, but force feedback remains tied to each hand's sensing and actuation, limiting transfer. This work introduces a cross-embodiment force-position interface for contact-aware manipulation across heterogeneous dexterous hands. Motion intent is represented in a shared hand-pose latent, while each hand's effort signal is calibrated through system identification into physical joint torque in N.m. These torques are mapped to fingertip forces and compact per-finger load descriptors, giving the policy comparable observations of where the hand should move and how the object is loaded. Using this interface, a flow-matching visuomotor policy is trained on vision, proprioception, and calibrated contact, with structured visual masking that encourages reliance on force under grasp-relevant occlusion. The same calibrated signal drives a hybrid force-position controller for demonstration collection and execution, keeping force targets consistent across training and deployment. Experiments across structurally different hands show that calibrated contact feedback enables transferable compliant grasping, with learned primitives reusable in long-horizon manipulation pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个能够跨不同灵巧手实现可迁移抓取的新力-位界面，并证明了基于校准的力反馈能显著提升异构手之间的抓取一致性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有灵巧手抓取和操作策略大多专注于位姿的关联，而忽略了力反馈的可迁移性。由于不同灵巧手的传感器和执行机构差异较大，这导致用一个手训练好的策略难以直接迁移到另一模型。作者期望通过引入新的力反馈接口，提升不同手型之间的策略迁移能力，从而促进灵巧抓取技术的通用化和实际应用。
AI.method: 作者提出跨异构灵巧手的力-位接口，采用共享的手姿潜变量描述运动意图，将每个手的物理关节力矩（N.m）作为努力信号，通过系统辨识映射到指尖力和紧凑的每指负载描述。这样，策略网络可观测到一致的位置信息与对象受力状态。利用该接口，研究者训练了一种flow-matching视觉-运动-力反馈策略，同时结合结构化视觉遮挡增强其力感知能力，并在示教和实操阶段用同一校准信号，确保训练与部署一致。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法能在结构差异明显的灵巧手之间实现高效抓取迁移，策略下学到的操作基础单元(primitive)还能复用于更长远的操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于校准力-位交互反馈的策略为跨平台灵巧手抓取带来了新的通用方法，大幅提升了力控抓取的可迁移性和鲁棒性，为长时序灵巧操作任务提供了坚实基础。

title: Evaluative Judgement in Teaching AI-based Translation: A Class-room Case Study of AI-Mediated Translation and Post-Editing
comment: Workshop on Teaching AI-based Translation and Technologies (TAITT 2026) - EAMT 2026
summary: Drawing on 23 anonymized student pro-jects from a fourth-year Machine Transla-tion and Post-editing course in a BA-level translation programme, this paper exam-ines how structured comparison of gen-eral-purpose LLMs and online MT sys-tems can elicit evaluative judgement in AI-mediated translation. Students translat-ed short specialised English Wikipedia texts into Catalan or Spanish, generated four system outputs, evaluated them using automatic metrics and human adequa-cy/fluency assessment, selected one output for post-editing, and justified their deci-sion in written reports. Descriptive counts are reported for all 23 projects, while qualitative interpretation is based on the 22 cases accompanied by written reports. Results show that students did not treat automatic metrics as final authority: final post-editing selections often diverged from metric rankings and were justified through adequacy, fluency, terminology, naturalness, and expected post-editing ef-fort. The study therefore does not bench-mark systems under controlled conditions; it analyses how students justified system choice within an authentic classroom as-signment.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了23个本科机器翻译与后编辑课程的学生项目，探讨在AI辅助翻译中，结构化比较通用LLM与在线MT系统如何激发学生的评价性判断。结果显示，学生不仅依赖自动评测，更重视人类评估标准。
AI.motivation: 近年来，AI辅助翻译和大语言模型(LLM)快速发展，但在实际翻译教学中，如何引导学生形成批判性评价能力成为关注焦点。本研究旨在探索学生如何比较及选择翻译系统，并形成理性判断。
AI.method: 研究分析了23个学生翻译项目，学生将专业英文维基百科短文译为加泰罗尼亚语或西班牙语，分别用多种系统生成译文，通过自动指标及人工充分性、流利度打分后挑选最佳结果后编辑，并撰写选择理由。研究对23个项目结果进行计量统计，对22份报告进行质性分析。
AI.result: 结果发现，学生并未把自动评测指标视为最终依据，最后选择做后编辑的译文往往与自动评分排名不符。他们选择系统时，更多基于充分性、流利度、术语、自然度及后期编辑预期难度等主观标准进行理由阐述。
AI.conclusion: 该研究未在严格受控环境下对系统本身作基准测试，而是聚焦分析学生在真实课堂下如何为译文系统选择辩护，从而展现了结构化比较和分析在AI翻译教学中的教育意义。

title: FactCheck: Feasibility-aware Long-term Action Anticipation with Multi-agent Collaboration
summary: Long-term action anticipation (LTA) aims to predict an ordered sequence of future verb-noun actions from a partially observed video. While this task serves as the foundation for embodied intelligence, anticipating physically feasible long-term actions remains a critical challenge. Existing methods, which operate in an open-loop manner, often hallucinate non-existent objects, violate object affordances, or disregard object states, as they lack explicit mechanisms to verify action feasibility against the physical environment. To address this, we propose FactCheck, a novel multi-agent collaboration framework that improves feasibility through a closed-loop "Observe-Plan-Verify" mechanism. FactCheck decomposes the complex LTA task into specialized roles: an Observer that recognizes historical actions from video observations and constructs a dual-form structured memory, comprising a History Action Abstract that captures high-level human intentions and environmental status, and a History Action Graph that encodes object states and temporal dependencies; a Planner that generates draft future actions conditioned on both low-level historical actions and high-level History Action Abstract; and a Verifier that rigorously validates the draft against the History Action Graph and refines infeasible actions. Extensive experiments on the EPIC-Kitchens-55 and EGTEA Gaze+ benchmarks demonstrate that FactCheck consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Our work establishes a new paradigm for feasibility-aware long-term action anticipation, effectively closing the loop of action recognition, action prediction and action verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的面向长期动作预测的多智能体合作框架FactCheck，通过引入闭环“观察-计划-验证”机制提升预测动作的物理可行性，显著优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有长期动作预测方法难以保证预测动作的物理可行性，容易出现“幻想”不存在物体、忽略物体状况或违反物品可用性等问题，因为缺乏对动作可行性的显式验证机制。
AI.method: 作者提出了FactCheck框架，把LTA任务分为观察、规划和验证三个角色：Observer负责从视频中识别历史动作并建立双重结构记忆（高层历史意图抽象和低层动作-物体状态图）；Planner根据历史信息生成初步未来动作序列；Verifier依据动作-物体状态图对规划动作的可行性进行验证和修正，实现闭环预测。
AI.result: 实验在EPIC-Kitchens-55和EGTEA Gaze+两个基准数据集上进行，FactCheck在预测准确率等指标上均超过了当下的主流方法。
AI.conclusion: FactCheck通过引入动作可行性验证机制，有效提升了长期动作预测的物理合理性与准确性，为面向现实世界的具身智能打下基础，开启了可行性感知的LTA新范式。

title: Robots as Tokens: Unified Diffusion Transformer for Coordinated Multi-Robot Trajectory Generation
summary: The success of generative models in language and visual generation has inspired extensive applications to generative robot planning. However, most existing works either focus on single-robot planning, or generate multi-robot trajectories in a sequential manner with iterative post-processing to resolve inter-robot conflicts. In this work, we investigate whether coordinated multi-robot trajectories, as a special spatiotemporal distribution, can be learned and generated with a generative model in a feed-forward manner. We propose Robots as Tokens (Roken), a unified diffusion transformer that directly generates multi-robot trajectories that satisfy both (individual) safety and (global) connectivity constraints. The core design of Roken is to represent each robot as a discrete token, allowing them to naturally interact with each other through self-attention, and cross-attend to map tokens for environment layouts. We further introduce several auxiliary tasks based on Bayes' theorem to provide multi-scale spatial-temporal supervision for efficient learning of the conditional distribution. In training, Roken absorbs diverse expert trajectories from different team sizes. During inference, Roken behaves as a versatile multi-robot planner that can handle single-robot planning, coordinated multi-robot trajectory generation, and conditional trajectory generation by fixing some robot tokens as conditions. Experiments in diverse cluttered environments show that Roken can generate coordinated multi-robot trajectories to perform connectivity-constrained goal navigation tasks with high success rates, outperforming the baseline method used to generate the training dataset. Roken also demonstrates good scalability after training with mixed team sizes, and shows generalization to unseen or partially observed environments, verifying its potential to learn from diverse data and perform versatile tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了Roken模型，一种基于扩散变换器的多机器人轨迹生成方法，实现了在满足安全性和连接性约束下的多机器人协同规划，实验优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 目前多机器人生成规划方法大多局限于单机器人或依赖于序列生成与后处理，难以高效实现多机器人之间的自然协调与约束满足。作者希望通过生成式模型端到端高效地生成多机器人协同轨迹。
AI.method: 提出Roken模型，将每个机器人抽象为一个离散token，通过自注意和交互注意机制实现机器人间和与环境的交互。结合基于贝叶斯定理的多尺度时空辅助任务提升条件分布学习效率。训练时利用不同团队规模的专家轨迹，推理阶段可支持单、多机器人、条件轨迹等多任务。
AI.result: 在复杂环境下，Roken生成的多机器人轨迹在连通约束任务中成功率高，效果超越训练数据的基线方法。同时表现出良好的可扩展性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Roken展现了通过通用生成方法学习多机器人协同规划的潜力，能够适应多种团队规模与环境，实现高效、灵活的多机器人轨迹生成。

title: AthDGC: An Open Diachronic Greek Treebank with Indo-European Parallels
comment: 16 pages. Data paper for the v0.4 release of AthDGC. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20439182. Companion site: https://athdgc.github.io
summary: AthDGC ("Athens-PROIEL") is an open, end-to-end workflow and dataset. It is, to the best of our knowledge, the first openly licensed dependency-parsed treebank of Greek that spans eight diachronic periods, namely Archaic, Classical, Koine, Late Antique, Byzantine, Late Byzantine, Early Modern, and Modern Greek, under a single PROIEL XML 2.0 schema, with verse-level cross-alignment of the New Testament to Latin (Vulgate), Gothic (Wulfila), Old Church Slavonic (Marianus), and Classical Armenian. AthDGC builds on the PROIEL Treebank Family (Haug and Johndal 2008; Eckhoff et al. 2018), which established the schema and the Koine-Greek reference set for the project. Annotation uses the Stanford Stanza PROIEL-trained workflow; sentence-level alignment uses LaBSE, a multilingual sentence-embedding model; word-level alignment uses multilingual-BERT attention through the AwesomeAlign procedure. The v0.4 release provides curated samples and the open-source toolkit; the full annotated corpus partitions remain under v0.5 audit on the Greek national HPC. Quantitative scale, per-witness verse counts, and per-period annotated-row counts are reported in the v0.5 release notes, after the audit pass completes. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20439182.

AI.tldr: AthDGC 是首个涵盖希腊语八个历时阶段的开源依存句法树库，采用统一的标注规范，并实现多语种对齐与开放工具链。
AI.motivation: 现有的希腊语树库覆盖时间段有限，标注规范不统一，且对其他语言的对齐也不完善。研究者希望建立一个横跨古今八个时期的标准化、开源希腊语句法树库，推动语言演变和多语种比较研究。
AI.method: 基于PROIEL树库家族建立，采用Stanford Stanza PROIEL训练流程进行句法标注，利用LaBSE模型进行句级对齐，借助多语BERT和AwesomeAlign进行词级对齐。全部数据采用PROIEL XML 2.0 统一格式，且对新约文本与多种古语言实现逐行（诗节级）比对。
AI.result: v0.4版本已提供部分精标样本集及开源工具包，全部树库数据正在希腊国家高性能计算中心v0.5版本审校。完成后将公开详细数据统计和全量对齐信息。
AI.conclusion: AthDGC为希腊语跨时段研究和多语种比较提供了重要资源和工具，统一并扩展了现有标注体系，其开放性和可扩展性将促进相关领域深入发展。

title: YTClickbait21K: Human-Annotated Multimodal Dataset for YouTube Clickbait Detection Across Diverse Channels and Content Categories
summary: Clickbait content on video-sharing platforms poses a significant challenge to information reliability, yet progress in automated detection has been constrained by the lack of large-scale, high-quality multimodal datasets. We present YTClickbait21K, a human-annotated YouTube clickbait dataset comprising 21,238 videos collected from 40 channels across 29 countries, covering diverse content categories such as news, entertainment, education, and gaming. Each sample includes structured metadata (title, description, engagement statistics) along with associated thumbnail images, enabling comprehensive multimodal analysis. To ensure annotation quality, every video was independently labeled by three annotators using a standardized decision framework that incorporates textual, visual, and cross-modal consistency cues, with final labels determined through majority voting. The dataset exhibits substantial inter-annotator agreement (k=0.65), confirming reliable labeling despite the inherent subjectivity of clickbait detection. By combining scale, annotation rigor, and multimodal richness, this dataset provides a robust benchmark for developing and evaluating machine learning models, facilitating research in cross-modal semantic understanding, and advancing automated content moderation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了YTClickbait21K，这是一个大规模、高质量、人工标注的YouTube点击诱饵（clickbait）数据集，包含2万多条多模态视频，有助于推动自动检测研究。
AI.motivation: 视频平台中的点击诱饵内容影响信息可信度，但现有自动检测方法受限于缺乏高质量多模态数据集。
AI.method: 作者从29个国家40个频道采集了21,238个多类别YouTube视频，提供结构化元数据和缩略图。每条样本由三位标注员依据统一的框架独立评定，通过多数表决确定最终标签，并统计标注一致性（k=0.65）。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含文本、视觉模态，可支持全面分析的大型数据集，数据标注质量较高（k=0.65）。
AI.conclusion: YTClickbait21K数据集为多模态点击诱饵检测提供了坚实的基准，有助于机器学习模型开发、跨模态语义理解、自动内容审核等研究领域的发展。

title: SAPS: Shared Autonomy for Policy Steering by Blending Teleoperation with a Pretrained VLA
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated impressive generalist capabilities in robot manipulation, yet these policies can be brittle under out-of-distribution spatial and semantic perturbations. While human teleoperation offers reliable recovery, it can demand high cognitive load and precise manual control, and existing policy steering methods often require auxiliary models or sampler modifications. In this work, we introduce Shared Autonomy for Policy Steering (SAPS), a framework that blends real-time human teleoperation commands with pretrained policy actions at the action level. SAPS requires no policy retraining, auxiliary dynamics models, or architectural modifications. We propose and evaluate three arbitration strategies to balance human and VLA policy control, including a dynamic Cosine-similarity arbitration strategy that computes the geometric agreement between human and policy actions. Across evaluations in simulation (LIBERO, LIBERO-PRO, CALVIN) and on real-world robot hardware, SAPS improves task success rates over autonomous execution by up to 82% in both simulation and the real world. Furthermore, our approach drastically reduces human intervention compared to pure teleoperation, while simultaneously achieving faster task completion times than both autonomous execution and pure teleoperation. These results demonstrate that action-level shared autonomy is a practical, model-agnostic approach for reliably deploying generalist robot policies in real-world contexts involving a human operator,with promising applications in assistive teleoperation and scalable data collection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个名为SAPS的框架，用于在机器人任务中将人类远程遥操作与预训练VLA（视觉-语言-动作）模型的动作级决策融合，实现更可靠的机器人操控，测试表明显著提升任务成功率且降低人类干预负担。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型具有泛化能力，但在遇到空间和语义分布外扰动时表现不稳定。纯人类遥操作负担大，现有策略融合方法往往需辅助模型或架构修改，缺乏简便实用的通用融合手段。
AI.method: 提出SAPS框架，将人类遥控指令和VLA模型预测的动作以动作级进行实时融合，无需重新训练或修改原有策略架构。设计了三种仲裁策略，重点提出了基于余弦相似度的动态分配方案，实现人机动作意图的几何一致性动态融合。
AI.result: 在多个虚拟环境（LIBERO、LIBERO-PRO、CALVIN）及真实机器人上测试，SAPS能将任务成功率提升高达82%，且远超纯自动和纯人工遥操作。人机融合控制可显著减少人类干预频率，同时完成任务速度优于纯自动和纯遥操作。
AI.conclusion: 动作级人机共享自治是一种实用、模型无关的方法，可稳定可靠地在涉及人机协作的真实环境中部署泛化机器人策略，具有辅助遥操作和可扩展数据收集的应用前景。

title: SHARD: Safe and Helpful Alignment via Self-Reframing Distillation
summary: Large language models often struggle with sensitive prompts. They may refuse outright, provide generic safety boilerplate, or fail to address the user's legitimate informational needs that can be answered safely. We introduce SHARD, a self-reframing distillation method to improve safe-helpfulness. It first rewrites sensitive prompts to surface benign intent using philosophical guidelines, then reframes its original responses into safe, more helpful ones, and finally fine-tunes the model on its self-reframed responses. Across DNA and the English subset of LINGUASAFE, SHARD improves helpfulness for most model families while preserving safety. It also remains competitive with distillation from a larger teacher model, suggesting that models can internalize safe and helpful behavior elicited from their own. Warning: This paper contains content that may be offensive or harmful.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SHARD方法，通过自我重构提升大语言模型在敏感话题下的安全性和有用性，能更好地满足用户需求。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型面对敏感问题时，往往直接拒答、输出模板化安全语句，难以平衡安全合规与真实帮助用户。本文试图解决这一困境，使模型既安全又有实际帮助。
AI.method: SHARD是一种自我重构蒸馏方法，具体流程为：1）使用哲学指导原则将敏感问题重写，突出正当意图；2）重构模型原有回答，使其既安全又更有帮助；3）将这些重构后的回答用作微调数据，进一步优化模型。
AI.result: 在DNA和LINGUASAFE（英语子集）两个数据集上，SHARD方法在保证安全性的同时，提高了不同模型家族的有用性，与使用大型教师模型的蒸馏效果相当。
AI.conclusion: SHARD能让大模型自我学习安全且有帮助的回答方式，无需依赖更大教师模型，提升了在敏感场景下的实际表现。

title: Variational Deep Unfolding with Mamba-Based Nonlocal Modeling for Underwater Image Enhancement
summary: Underwater imaging plays a crucial role in ocean engineering, although captured data often suffer from poor visibility and color distortion. To address these challenges, we propose a model-based deep unfolding network for underwater image enhancement that integrates variational modeling into a learnable architecture. The framework is guided by a variational formulation based on a dehazing decomposition, incorporating a multiplicative residual component to absorb remaining artifacts and a nonlocal gradient-type constraint to preserve structural details and enhance edge sharpness. We provide a theoretical analysis establishing the existence of solution for the associated minimization problem. The proposed unfolding method incorporates Mamba layers to efficiently capture self-similarities in the scene. In addition, we introduce a proximal trajectory loss that enforces consistency between the unfolding stages and the iterations of an ideal restoration regularizer. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed unfolding approach achieves improved visual quality and competitive quantitative performance compared with recent state-of-the-art methods. The source code will be available at https://github.com/MIA-UIB/Variational-Unfolding-Mamba-Underwater-Enhancement .

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合变分建模和深度展开网络的水下图像增强方法，引入了Mamba层和创新损失函数，实验结果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 水下图像由于能见度低和色彩失真，影响了海洋工程等领域的数据利用，需要高效的图像增强算法。
AI.method: 采用变分建模的去雾分解框架，结合深度展开网络，实现端到端可学习。引入乘性残差吸收伪影、非局部梯度约束保护结构细节和边缘，通过Mamba层高效建模自相似性，并提出了沿展开阶段与理想恢复正则的近端轨迹损失。
AI.result: 理论上证明了最小化问题解的存在性。实验表明，该方法在视觉质量和量化性能上均优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型能有效提升水下图像的视觉质量和结构保真度，具有应用推广价值。

title: Perfect Demo Makes Poor Teacher: Learning Robust Alignment from Critical Motion Segments
summary: Expert demonstrations are widely assumed to be the gold standard for robot imitation learning. Yet for fine-grained manipulation such as insertion, stacking, and alignment, we uncover a counterintuitive failure mode: fluent demonstrations can be poor teachers. A skilled teleoperator compresses the decisive moments of alignment and recovery into a brief temporal window, leaving the policy flooded with redundant free-space motion and starved of supervision exactly where precision determines success. We address this bottleneck at two levels. At the data level, slowing down near alignment and resampling critical segments both help, yet the gain comes mainly from broadening the coverage of recovery states the policy must learn, not from reweighting frames it already has. Such data-side fixes, however, leave the policy's per-frame view untouched: a single image still maps directly to an action, and the local motion that governs correction stays implicit. We therefore turn to the representation level and introduce STAIR (\textbf{S}patio-\textbf{T}emporal feature \textbf{A}s an \textbf{I}nterface for \textbf{R}obot learning), a compact dynamic feature that bridges the vision-language model and the action expert, distilling the short-horizon motion already recorded in each trajectory into dense, motion-aware supervision. Trained on fluent data alone, STAIR recovers most of the deliberate-demonstration gain ($50.0$ to $62.2\%$ overall, approaching the $64.4\%$ of deliberate demonstrations). These results call for a more pedagogical view of robot data, optimized for machine learnability rather than human efficiency alone.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，专家的流畅操作演示在机器人模仿学习中并不总是理想的，因为关键时刻的信息被压缩，让模型难以习得精细操作。通过数据处理和新特征提取方法提升学习效果。
AI.motivation: 常规认为专家演示对机器人模仿学习最有指导意义，但在需要高精度操作（如插入、堆叠和对准）时，专家的高效流畅可能导致示范数据缺失关键的校正信息。这促使作者探讨如何让数据和特征更适合机器学习。
AI.method: 方法分为两层：1）数据层面，通过减慢关键时段和重新采样关键片段，尤其着重扩大模型见到的恢复状态范围；2）表示层面，提出STAIR特征，将短时动态动作信息通过紧凑特征提取用于监督，连接视觉语言模型和动作专家。
AI.result: 在只用流畅示范训练的情况下，引入STAIR特征后模型性能从50.0%提升到62.2%，接近于使用刻意、慢速演示的数据（64.4%）。
AI.conclusion: 机器人模仿数据的收集应更注重对机器可学习性的优化，而不仅是追求人类操作的效率。STAIR特征和数据处理方法有效提升了机器人精细操作学习的表现。

title: Emergent retokenization symmetry in large language models: phenomenology and applications
summary: Tokenization introduces representational redundancy: under a fixed token vocabulary, every byte string admits many valid token encodings, or segmentations, that decode to the same surface string. However, given a prompt, most language model tokenizers break this representational symmetry by returning a canonical segmentation. Training only on canonical segmentations should influence inference behavior, and there is little reason to expect models to respect segmentation symmetry on downstream tasks. We find that this symmetry partially emerges during training. Here, we probe this emergent symmetry through experiments testing token compositional understanding, representation diversity, and task focused benchmark performance. We primarily use \textbf{retokenization} -- replacing a prompt's canonical tokenization with an alternative segmentation while preserving its bytes exactly. Relative to other prompt perturbations, retokenization is unusually clean because it isolates segmentation effects without changing syntax, semantics or surface form. We use retokenization to study sensitivity and robustness to semantically identical input representations across pretraining and post-training. Moreover, this partial retokenization symmetry suggests a distinct inference-time sampling axis. While temperature sampling generates diverse outputs from the model using its next-token probability distribution, retokenization generates diversity from the model's internal computations through semantically equivalent input representations. We find that while this retokenization sampling strategy can hurt performance on easy problems, it can also recover solutions that conventional sampling does not find. Overall, our work presents retokenization as a simple yet powerful probe of large language models, shedding light on compositional understanding and prompt sensitivity, and offering a novel sampling strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“重新分词”（retokenization）作为分析大模型的重要工具，并发现分词冗余和分割方式的多样性会影响模型性能与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的语言模型分词器在处理输入时，仅采用“标准分词方案”，而每个字符串实际有许多等价分词方式。传统训练只用标准分词，这可能导致模型对等价分词表现不一致，对下游任务有潜在影响。作者希望探究模型是否能自发学到对不同分词的对称性理解，以及分词方式对下游表现的影响。
AI.method: 作者提出用“重新分词”手段：仅改变输入的token切分方式，不改动字节内容和表面字符串，从而控制变量只研究分词的影响。通过此方法，分别分析了模型在组成理解、表征多样性和基准任务表现方面的变化，并与传统采样方法进行比较。
AI.result: 实验发现：1）模型训练过程中，部分“分词对称性”会自然显现；2）使用retokenization的输入能有效检测模型对组成结构的敏感性和鲁棒性；3）在推理时，重新分词作为采样手段能获得传统方式无法获得的答案，尽管在简单任务上表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 重新分词是分析和提升大模型表现的有效工具，能帮助理解模型的组成能力和输入敏感性，并为采样探索提供新思路。

title: Last But Not Least: Boundary Attention CalibratiON for Multimodal KV Cache Compression
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong vision-language reasoning, but long visual contexts enlarge the KV cache and increase decoding latency. Existing compression methods rely on observation window attention for stable token-importance estimation, yet this aggregation can dilute sparse visual evidence and discard answer-critical tokens under aggressive compression. Therefore, we identify last-query attention as a complementary source for recovering such evidence, but its answer-irrelevant signals can mislead retention. We propose BACON, a plug-and-play method that calibrates observation window attention with last-query evidence and suppresses isolated noise via intra-layer coherence and inter-layer persistence. Across diverse benchmarks, models, budgets, and compression methods, BACON improves multimodal KV compression by 7.5% on average under the most aggressive budget, with gains up to 30.9%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）视觉缓存压缩方法BACON，在保证推理能力的同时大幅降低延迟和内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型因视觉KV缓存过大导致推理速度变慢。现有压缩策略在保留关键信息时受限，易丢失重要视觉证据，限制了进一步的压缩潜力。
AI.method: BACON方法结合了观察窗口注意力和最后查询注意力，确保在压缩过程中能够恢复重要视觉证据。同时，通过层内一致性与层间持续性机制抑制无关噪声，提升答案相关证据的保留率。该方法为即插即用型，可集成至现有模型与多种压缩策略中。
AI.result: 在多个基准、不同模型、不同压缩预算与方法下，BACON可在最激进压缩条件下平均提升7.5%的KV压缩效果，局部提升可达30.9%。
AI.conclusion: BACON方法在不损失推理能力的前提下，有效提升了多模态KV缓存压缩能力，显著降低了存储与计算资源需求，对多模态大模型的实际应用具有广泛意义。

title: Pixels to Proofs: Probabilistically-Safe Latent World Model Control via Parallel Conformal Robust MPC
summary: We present SLS^2, a framework for safe feedback motion planning from pixels using robust model predictive control (MPC) in learned latent world models. Our approach trains an action-conditioned joint-embedding world model with compact Markovian latent states, enabling efficient gradient-based trajectory optimization through learned latent dynamics. To enforce safety for the true system despite imperfect latent predictions, we inform a GPU-accelerated system level synthesis (SLS) robust MPC scheme with conformal prediction to obtain calibrated latent error bounds and robust latent-space constraint sets. We further learn and conformalize a latent constraint checker, allowing the SLS planner to impose probabilistic safety constraints during closed-loop execution. We evaluate our method on vision-based control tasks, where it improves both goal-reaching performance and safety over latent world-model and safe-planning baselines.

AI.tldr: SLS^2提出了一种结合学习潜在世界模型和鲁棒MPC的安全反馈运动规划方法，利用SLS和符合性预测提升基于像素的控制任务的安全性和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于像素的运动规划方法难以保障真实系统的安全且鲁棒性有限，尤其是在世界模型存在预测误差时。如何在不完美的潜在世界模型下，依然对系统安全性进行有效约束，是亟待解决的问题。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）训练出压缩的马尔可夫潜在状态的动作条件世界模型，实现高效的基于梯度的轨迹优化；2）结合GPU加速的系统级合成（SLS）鲁棒MPC，引入符合性预测获取已校准的潜在误差边界和鲁棒的约束集合；3）学习并符合化一个潜在的约束检查器，以便规划器在闭环执行时施加概率性安全约束。
AI.result: 在基于视觉的控制任务上，SLS^2方法在目标到达性能和安全性上均优于现有的潜在世界模型和安全规划基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SLS^2框架能够在潜在世界模型不完美预测的情况下，通过鲁棒和概率化的安全约束显著提升基于像素的运动控制性能与系统安全性，对实际机器人等领域具有较大应用价值。

title: EIBench: A Simulator-Based Benchmark and Turn-Credit RL for Emotion Management
summary: Emotional intelligence (EI) in Large Language Models (LLMs) is often evaluated through static understanding tasks or single-response dialogue generation. However, emotion management is interactive: a good model should not only recognize a user's emotion, but also improve the user's emotional and relational state over several turns. We introduce EIBench, a simulator-based benchmark for interactive emotion management. EIBench contains 2,222 scenarios, with 2,009 for training and 213 for held-out testing. The scenarios are organized by a 2x2 taxonomy covering Support, Defense, Repair, and Charm, which together capture different forms of support, boundary maintenance, trust repair, and rapport building. In each scenario, an LLM simulator plays the user, updates an emotion-relation state after each turn, and maps the final state to an anchor-based score. This design makes EIBench both an evaluation benchmark and a training environment: the final state gives the outcome reward, while the per-turn state updates provide dense feedback for RL. We evaluate 15 open- and closed-source LLMs. Current models perform well on support and rapport-building scenes, but struggle with boundary maintenance under user pressure. To improve the EI ability of LLMs, we propose Centered Turn-Credit GRPO (CTC-GRPO), a GRPO extension that reuses the simulator's per-turn state updates as dense turn-level feedback while preserving the final outcome reward. CTC-GRPO improves Qwen3-8B from -22.4 to +22.4 on EIBench and also improves on out-of-distribution evaluations including SAGE (+12.4) and EQBench3 (+20.9%). Our results show that simulator-tracked user states can support both evaluation and training for multi-turn emotion management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EIBench基准，用于评估和训练大模型在多轮互动中的情绪管理能力，并提出了一种新的强化学习方法CTC-GRPO显著提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 目前LLM的情绪智能（EI）多通过静态或单次对话任务评估，不能反映情绪管理的互动本质。需要新的基准和方法来系统性测试和提升LLM在多轮对话中的情绪管理能力。
AI.method: 作者开发了EIBench，一个基于模拟器的评测与训练平台，模拟真实互动情境，分为支持、界限维护、信任修复和亲和力建立四类。对LLM输出的每一轮与最终结果分别进行反馈和评分，并提出了CTC-GRPO强化学习算法，充分利用每轮反馈进行参数优化。
AI.result: 对15个开源和闭源大模型的测试显示，目前LLM在支持和亲和力建立场景表现较好，但在界限维护场景表现较弱。采用CTC-GRPO的Qwen3-8B模型在EIBench及其他情绪智能评测中表现有大幅提升，分数显著高于未优化前。
AI.conclusion: 模拟器跟踪用户状态不仅有助于评估，还能为情绪管理能力训练提供有效手段。基于EIBench和CTC-GRPO的新方法能切实提高LLM在多轮互动中的情绪智能。

title: The Vision Encoder as a Privacy Boundary: Visual-Token Side Channels in Encoder-Free Vision-Language Models
summary: A vision encoder compresses image pixels into semantic embeddings, implicitly acting as a privacy boundary by preserving semantic content while attenuating pixel-local detail required for exact text recovery. Encoder-free vision-language models (VLMs) remove this boundary by routing image patches directly into the language-model token stream, thereby exposing an architectural privacy attack surface: intermediate visual tokens become a pre-output side channel. Under a token-access adversary, decoders invert visual-token streams from two encoder-free VLMs, Gemma4 and Fuyu, recovering recognizable image structure and readable held-out access codes, whereas matched encoder-based controls localize target regions but recover no exact strings. Within-model ablations show that the operative factor is spatial sampling fidelity of the visual-token grid, especially character-direction sampling density, rather than token or value count. The leakage is not limited to exported tokens: Gemma4 layer-0 key-value cache tensors are directly invertible, placing the side channel within KV caches commonly persisted by production serving stacks for decoding efficiency. The attack survives clutter, realistic document degradation, and zero-shot transfer to public document images, and it resists value-level defenses such as additive noise and quantization. Effective mitigation must therefore reduce spatial sampling, making removal of the vision encoder a first-class privacy decision in VLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无编码器视觉-语言模型在隐私保护方面的风险，发现直接暴露视觉标记流会导致图像内容可被还原。
AI.motivation: 许多视觉编码器用于保护图像隐私，只保留语义内容而丢弃像素级细节。但新兴的无编码器视觉-语言模型为提升性能，直接将图像补丁输入语言模型，可能增加隐私泄露风险。
