AI.method: 作者分析了两种无编码器VLM（Gemma4和Fuyu），让攻击者能够访问其中间视觉token流，并尝试通过解码器逆推还原图像及其文字内容。还与传统有编码器模型作了对比实验，并进行了模型内部消融分析，研究不同采样方式对隐私泄漏的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，无编码器VLM中的视觉token流可以被逆向还原出可辨认的图像结构，甚至恢复出原始字符串。而有编码器模型即便定位目标区域，也无法恢复具体文字。泄漏的关键因素是视觉token网格的空间采样密度。此外，相关泄漏在实际文档、干扰、降质情况下依然存在，且难以通过量化、加噪声等方法消除。
AI.conclusion: 移除视觉编码器会极大增加视觉-语言模型的隐私泄露风险，尤其是字符级空间采样浓密时。因此，是否采用视觉编码器必须作为VLM部署时的首要隐私决策。

title: Retrieve, Don't Retrain: Extending Vision Language Action Models to New Tasks at Test Time
summary: Extending a vision-language-action (VLA) policy to a new task typically requires task-specific teleoperated demonstrations and per-task fine-tuning, making adaptation costly in both data collection and compute. In this paper, we show that this target-side per-task adaptation cost can be replaced by retrieval. Our retrieval-augmented policy is trained once on paired demonstrations from the target embodiment (query) and a cheaper embodiment (pool, e.g., human-hand video), then frozen. New tasks are added at deployment by appending pool-side demonstrations to a retrieval pool. The frozen policy conditions on retrieved trajectories at every control step, so new tasks are absorbed by indexing data rather than updating parameters. Fine-tuning is needed only to take on a new, unseen embodiment, not for each new task. We show that retrieval improves policies beyond a specific backbone, including standard VLA policies, but its effect is especially pronounced in Cosmos Policy, a video-generation-based world-action model (WAM). In this setting, retrieval supplies coarse task progression, while the WAM's future-image objective provides an additional visual consistency signal that strengthens the retrieval-conditioned actions. On PushT, we study how retrieval provides a reusable high-level motion prior for cross-embodiment generalization to unseen goal angles, while on RoboTwin 2.0 our method outperforms cross-embodiment baselines on unseen tasks, and we additionally demonstrate the method on a real robot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种检索增强的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略，用于新任务适应，无需为每个新任务收集昂贵的数据或微调模型参数。只需将新演示样本加入检索池，模型通过检索实现新任务能力扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA策略对于新任务，通常需要大量的人工远程操作示范和逐任务的模型微调，这样既耗时又计算成本高，因此需要一种高效且可泛化的任务适应方法。
AI.method: 作者提出将检索机制引入VLA策略。首先，在目标执行体和成本较低的演示体（如人手视频）配对示范上联合训练单一策略，训练好后参数冻结；部署时，针对新任务仅需把相关示范加到检索池，模型每步通过检索获取演示轨迹作为条件输入，无需模型微调。只有遇到未见过的新执行体时，才需针对执行体微调。
AI.result: 检索增强策略在不同策略骨架（包括标准VLA和Cosmos Policy等WAM）上均表现优异，尤其是在Cosmos Policy中，检索结构能够补充任务进展先验，配合未来图像目标进一步提升动作一致性。在PushT和RoboTwin 2.0等基准上，该方法在新目标、跨执行体泛化和实际机器人测试中均优于对比基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过检索增强机制，VLA策略实现了高度的数据复用和任务泛化能力，为机器人多任务适应提供了更高效、可扩展的新范式。

title: LLM-Assisted Stance Detection in Scientific Discourse: A Test Case in Bayesian Cognitive Science
summary: Qualitative coding is central to social science, but expert annotation is difficult to scale. LLMs offer a possible extension, yet require careful validation when the target construct is interpretive, theoretically loaded, and only indirectly expressed. We study this problem in a difficult case: detecting whether authors treat Bayesian models as descriptions of mental and neural mechanisms (realism) or as useful mathematical tools (instrumentalism). Our method combines a theory-driven codebook, expert-coded reference annotations, a diagnostic-gated prompt-optimization search yielding a shared zero-shot prompt for three frontier LLMs (GPT-5.1, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro Preview), and multi-rater reliability analysis. The final prompt achieved a held-out combined reliability score of 0.76 (harmonic mean of ICC = 0.79 and $α$ = 0.74), with all diagnostics satisfied. Deployed on 6,858 quotes from 210 articles, the three LLMs reached substantial quote-level agreement (ICC = 0.80; $α$ = 0.76; combined = 0.78) and near-perfect article-level rank stability ($r$ = 0.96-0.97 across rater pairs). The corpus was predominantly weakly realist, but article-level stances were rarely uniform: only 1.4% of articles used a single band, while 59.5% spanned four or more. Low-level perception/motor articles scored 8.8 Realism points higher than high-level cognition articles ($p < .001$, $d = 0.60$), quantifying a long-held qualitative intuition. We present this as an expert-led case study; the framework is intended to generalize to similar theoretically demanding tasks, not to all qualitative analysis.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了利用大型语言模型（LLM）自动进行复杂社会科学定性编码的可行性，并以贝叶斯模型解释（现实主义vs工具主义）为案例，开发并验证了一套高可靠性的LLM自动标注流程。
AI.motivation: 社会科学中需要大量专家进行定性编码工作，但这种工作难以扩展。现有LLM有潜力自动化此过程，但因为定性编码需要高层次的理论解释与细致辨析，直接应用尚存很大不确定性。因此，迫切需要验证LLM在复杂理论任务上的表现与可行方法。
AI.method: 首先构建理论驱动的标注手册和专家标注数据集，随后通过诊断门控的提示词优化流程，找到可同时适用于三款前沿LLM（GPT-5.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro Preview）的高效零样本标注提示；再通过多评者一致性分析，评估其自动化标签的可靠性。最终在210篇文章中的6,858条引用上部署该自动化方法。
AI.result: 最终优化提示下，LLM自动编码在保留数据上的综合可靠性分为0.76，且三款LLM在引用级和文章级均达到了较高一致性（ICC最高0.80，文章级相关系数0.96-0.97）。分析得到绝大多数文章“现实主义”倾向较弱但很少内部一致，且低水平感知/动作主题比高水平认知主题“现实主义”分高8.8分，证实了学界一项长期直觉。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了LLM在高要求理论定性编码任务中的专家主导式自动化解决方案，并证明在类似具有理论负荷的任务中具备良好泛化潜力，但并不适用于所有定性分析场景。

title: Vision-Encoder Behavioral Fingerprints of Image-to-Image Generative Models: A Training-Paradigm-Driven Taxonomy of Six Commercial APIs
summary: We study six production image-to-image AI systems (gpt-image-1, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image, Flux Kontext, SDXL img2img, SD3 img2img, and Qwen Image Edit) under a content-adaptive sub-JND adversarial perturbation pipeline, scoring all outputs by frozen DINOv2 ViT-B/14 token distances against clean references. Across a 3,588-call corpus spanning COCO photographs, CelebA-HQ portraits, and AI-generated inputs, the six systems partition into two image-invariant behavioral bands on a 2D (patch_mean, ssim_clean) plane: edit-trained models (Flux Kontext, Qwen Edit, Gemini) cluster in a tight band, while T2I-base models adapted at sampling time (SDXL, SD3, gpt-image-1) cluster in a drift band.

AI.tldr: 本文考察了六个主流的图像到图像生成AI系统，在子-可觉差（sub-JND）对抗扰动下输出的稳健性，并用DINOv2模型计算与原始图像的距离。发现这些系统在鲁棒性上分为两大类：专门训练用于编辑的系统输出更稳定，而基于生成模型临时适配的系统则表现出更多漂移。
AI.motivation: 随着AI图像编辑和生成在实际应用中的普及，理解和评价不同系统在细微扰动下的稳定性（鲁棒性）变得重要。尤其需要探索这些系统是否能在不可觉察的对抗扰动下保持输出的一致性和可靠性。
AI.method: 利用内容自适应的子JND级别对抗扰动，对六个实际使用的图像到图像AI系统进行测试。用冻结的DINOv2 ViT-B/14模型分析系统输出与原始图像的token距离。同时分析多个数据集的3,588组实验结果。
AI.result: 六个系统在二维指标空间（patch均值及与干净图像的SSIM）中分为两大行为群体：经过编辑型训练的模型（如Flux Kontext, Qwen Edit, Gemini）输出较为集中，而T2I基础模型临时适配的（SDXL, SD3, gpt-image-1）输出漂移性更大。
AI.conclusion: 针对不可觉察的扰动，专门编辑训练的模型表现出更强的稳健性，而直接从图像生成基础模型适配的系统易受干扰。这一发现对实际应用中的系统选型和模型设计具有指导意义。

title: TO-SoFiT: Topology Optimization of Hydraulic Soft Fish Tail Design for programmable undulating locomotion
comment: Accepted for publication at the Advances in Robotics (AIR), 2025, IIT Jodhpur
summary: Soft robots leverage compliant materials to generate motion through controlled elastic deformation, making them ideal for delicate tasks such as underwater exploration and biomimetic marine systems. Although hydraulic/pneumatic actuation remains pivotal for such systems, the lack of systematic design frameworks has hindered the development of robots capable of complex 3D motion, such as fish-like swimming. This work introduces a topology optimization method to automate the design of a hydraulic soft fish tail, explicitly addressing the design-dependent coupling between fluidic actuation and structural deformation. We use a Darcy law-based model augmented with a drainage term to simulate spatially varying hydraulic pressure loads, translating these into consistent nodal forces via finite element analysis. The employed robust multi-criteria optimization formulation balances deformation efficiency, fluid-structure interaction, geometric manufacturability, and required stiffness for optimizing a bioinspired soft fish tail for 3D swimming kinematics. The optimized tail topology is incorporated into a pneumatic network actuator and computationally validated under various hydraulic loads, achieving tunable undulatory amplitudes and multiaxis bending for depth adjustment. The optimized 2D tail outperforms its rectangular counterpart. By cascading optimized tail segments, we demonstrate programmable swimming patterns in soft robotic fish tails at different hydraulic loads. This work advances the systematic codesign of hydraulic actuators and soft structures, offering a pathway to automate underwater robots with optimized design and vertebrate-like agility in confined aquatic environments. Our implementations and simulations are publicly available at 'https://github.com/PrabhatIn/TO-SoFiT'.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑优化的方法，自动设计液压软体鱼尾，通过模拟流体与结构的耦合，实现了柔性鱼尾的复杂三维运动，实现了更高效的水下仿生游动。
AI.motivation: 当前软体机器人的液压/气动驱动设计缺乏系统性框架，难以实现复杂三维运动（如鱼类游动），制约了其在精细、水下应用的推广。
AI.method: 文中提出利用基于Darcy定律且包含排水项的流体模型，通过有限元分析将流体压力转化为结构节点力，采用多目标优化兼顾结构变形效率、流固耦合、可制造性与刚度，设计适合三维运动的仿生鱼尾拓扑，并进行了数值模拟与对比分析。
AI.result: 优化后的2D鱼尾结构优于矩形结构，可实现可调节的摆动幅度与多轴弯曲，呈现出多样化、可编程的鱼尾运动模式。通过级联优化鱼尾段，实现了鱼尾在不同液压负载下的可编程三维游动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法推动了液压驱动器与软体结构的联合优化，为水下软体机器人自动化、最优设计及类脊椎鱼灵活性运动提供了新途径，相关算法和实现已开源。

title: LLM Judges Have Dark Current: A Psychometric Datasheet for LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
summary: LLM-as-a-judge systems are now routinely used for open-ended model evaluation, where human preference annotation is costly, slow, and difficult to reproduce. Yet these judges are often reported as scalar accuracy, win-rate, or agreement devices. We argue that a judge should instead be reported as a measurement instrument. We introduce a Judge Datasheet protocol that measures dark current under true-vacuum inputs, stable cross-sensitivity to same-quality surface variation, positional false preference, target sensitivity on a controlled quality ladder, and the criterion or operating point induced by tie instructions. The direction-stability decomposition reveals that apparent Delta0 preference can be stable surface response or disguised position bias. In a three-judge open-weight case study, Llama-3.1-8B shows high dark current and presentation-conflicted Delta0 behavior, Qwen2.5-14B is vacuum-clean and target-sensitive but mixes stable and positional over-discrimination, and Qwen2.5-32B is vacuum-clean with low stable cross-sensitivity and low positional false preference. A strict tie criterion eliminates Qwen32B Delta0 false preference but absorbs marginal Delta1 target signals into ties while preserving Delta5 sensitivity. The results show that prompting moves the criterion, not the resolution. We do not claim that the downstream mechanism hypothesis that motivated this work is confirmed; the contribution is a metrological protocol for measuring the measuring device before downstream claims are made.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于系统化评估大语言模型裁判（judge）表现的全新测量协议，对模型评测的公正性和测量精度进行更细致的量化分析。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM-as-a-judge常用于开放式生成模型自动评测，但传统评测方法难以还原评判过程的细致属性。因此，作者希望通过提出更科学的方法，客观、全面地衡量judge模型本身，提升评测的可信度和透明度。
AI.method: 作者引入了Judge Datasheet协议，考虑了包括黑暗电流（dark current）、真空输入表现、表面变化的稳定交叉敏感性、位置性虚假偏好、针对质量阶梯的目标敏感性、以及tie指令引入的测量阈值等多个方面，对judge模型进行细致测试和分解分析。
AI.result: 在三个裁判模型（Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-14B、Qwen2.5-32B）实证中，不同模型展现了不同的测量属性和偏差。比如Llama存在高黑暗电流和表面/位置冲突，Qwen2.5-32B则在各项指标上表现更“干净”，严格tie准则能消除部分偏好但可能导致信号损失。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出了元测量（metrological）协议，使得在宣称LLM-judge用于下游任务前先系统评估其测量能力，从而提高评测可靠性；同时指出目前结论未能完全证实下游机制假设，但协议本身具备广泛实用价值。

title: Efficient Reinforcement for Visual-Textual Thinking with Discrete Diffusion Model
summary: RL-based post-training has been widely adopted to enable interleaved visual and textual reasoning in unified multimodal models capable of both text and image generation. However, most existing approaches are built upon autoregressive (AR) unified models, which require full image regeneration during visual reasoning. In this work, we demonstrate that multimodal discrete diffusion models are effective alternatives to AR models for reinforcement learning in interleaved reasoning, owing to their ability to perform efficient visual rollouts via localized visual editing rather than full image-token regeneration. This reduces rollout computation during GRPO by 26.9\% compared to AR baselines, with minimal performance drop. Despite the improved efficiency, we find that joint reward assignment, which employs a shared reward signal across modalities, introduces cross-modal interference between unrelated image and text token sequences during RL updates. To address this issue, we propose factorized reward assignment, a strategy that assigns rewards independently to text and vision segments. With factorized reward assignment, our RL approach achieves an 11.2% improvement over joint reward assignment and a 38.04% improvement over the base model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用多模态离散扩散模型替代自回归(AR)模型进行RL型交替推理，不仅提升推理效率，还通过独立分配奖励（分因奖励）显著提高了模型最终性能。
AI.motivation: 目前基于RL的多模态统一模型多采用自回归结构，在视觉推理时需对整张图片完全重生成，计算开销大。如何提升交替视觉与文本推理的效率和模型表现，是该领域亟待解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出采用多模态离散扩散模型，可通过局部视觉编辑高效实现视觉rollout。针对传统奖励信号在跨模态更新时的“干扰”问题，提出了分因奖励（分别针对文本和图像segment独立分配奖励）替代联合奖励。
AI.result: 采用扩散模型后，在GRPO流程中rollout计算减少26.9%，且性能损失很小。分因奖励策略相比联合奖励提升11.2%，比基础模型提升38.04%。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型的多模态RL推理在效率与准确性方面优于传统AR模型，并且分因奖励法有效缓解了跨模态干扰，明显提升整体性能。

title: PO-PDDL: Learning Symbolic POMDPs from Visual Demonstrations for Robot Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Real-world robot task planning must operate under both stochastic action execution and partial observability, yet constructing Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) models for real robotics domains remains difficult and labor-intensive. We introduce PO-PDDL, a symbolic formulation of POMDPs that preserves the relational structure and LLM-friendly syntax of the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), while explicitly modeling partial observability, stochasticity, and beliefs. Building on this formulation, we propose a demonstration-driven pipeline for learning PO-PDDL models. The proposed method reconstructs latent symbolic state trajectories from real-robot execution videos, identifies partial observability via inconsistencies between inferred states and visual observations, and learns stochastic transition and observation models accordingly. The resulting PO-PDDL domains are reusable across tasks and enable online belief-space planning under both perception and execution uncertainty. Experiments on real-world long-horizon manipulation tasks show that our method consistently outperforms existing PDDL and POMDP model-learning approaches, achieving robust task planning under uncertainty with significantly lower planning cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PO-PDDL的新型符号化POMDP建模语言，并结合示范视频学习方法，有效支持机器人在不完全可观测和随机环境下的规划任务。
AI.motivation: 现实机器人任务在执行中既存在动作的随机性，也普遍面临部分可观测的问题，但建立高质量POMDP模型成本高、难度大亟需改善。
AI.method: 提出PO-PDDL，一种保持PDDL表达结构和易用性的POMDP符号化建模方式，显式建模部分可观测性和随机性。并开发了基于示范视频的学习流程，自动重建符号状态轨迹，识别可观测性缺陷，学习转移与观测概率模型。
AI.result: 在实际长时操作任务中，所建PO-PDDL域在执行和感知不确定下的规划表现优于现有PDDL和POMDP模型学习方法，规划效率和鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: PO-PDDL为机器人复杂规划任务提供了高效可迁移的模型学习与规划方法，显著降低了构建难度与成本，提升了不确定环境下的任务执行性能。

title: Distilling Examples into Task Instructions: Enhanced In-Context Learning for Real-World B2B Conversations
comment: Accepted for publication in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics 2026
summary: In-context learning (ICL) is the standard method for low-resource classification, yet its efficacy in specialized domains remains largely unexplored. We address the challenge of classifying semantically complex, multi-party B2B conversations, where traditional ICL encounters significant limitations, especially as context length increases due to the concatenation of multiple few-shot examples. We introduce the \texttt{Call Playbook} dataset, featuring five classification tasks derived from real-world B2B conversations targeting core sales concepts. To bridge the gap between performance and practical utility, we propose novel knowledge extraction methods that distill verbose examples into compact, interpretable representations of structured classification criteria and precise task descriptions. Our approach achieves a 99\% reduction in token usage and improves macro-averaged AUC by up to 7\% over traditional ICL. Notably, it remains robust as context grows, unlike advanced token compression baselines which degrade by over 9 F1 points. Importantly, our framework enables direct refinement of classification logic, addressing critical needs for transparency, efficiency, and user interaction in real-world NLP applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于对多方 B2B 对话进行分类的新方法，通过知识提取极大减少了模型输入长度，并显著提升了效果。
AI.motivation: 在专业领域中，传统的 in-context learning（ICL）方法在处理大规模、复杂语义的语料时表现有限，特别是上下文过长时性能下降明显。作者关注于实际业务场景中的B2B对话分类问题。
AI.method: 作者构建了Call Playbook数据集，包含5种源自真实B2B销售对话的分类任务。随后提出了一种知识提取新方法，将冗长的few-shot示例提炼成结构化且可解释的分类标准与精准任务描述，极大缩短输入token长度。
AI.result: 新方法在token消耗上减少了99%，并且macro-AUC提升最高可达7%。在随着上下文增大时，新方法仍保持稳定；而常规token压缩方式F1值下降超过9分。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅提升了模型效率和分类效果，还增强了分类逻辑的透明度和可直接交互性，对实际NLP产品的可用性和易用性具有重要意义。

title: Position: The Systemic Lack of Agency in Visual Reasoning
summary: This paper argues that a systemic lack of Agency constrains the implicit reasoning capabilities of current Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Implicit reasoning refers to the ability to autonomously discover and utilize hidden visual evidence to bridge information gaps, rather than merely relying on explicitly specified targets. This capacity underlies human visual understanding and everyday reasoning. We argue that this limitation arises from a tendency to approach visual reasoning primarily as passive semantic retrieval, rather than as active, situated reasoning that depends on autonomous visual exploration. As a result, most existing benchmarks primarily assess Passive Capacity, leaving this aspect of reasoning largely unmeasured. To address this gap, we introduce the Visual Implicit Reasoning Diagnosing Benchmark (V-IRD), which targets this missing quadrant by requiring models to derive answers strictly through autonomous visual analysis. Our results show that, despite strong retrieval abilities, prominent VLMs struggle to utilize reference objects and to attend to visual evidence that requires self-directed inquiry. Simply put, strong semantic recognition does not equate to active visual exploration, revealing a critical gap in current VLMs. More information can be found at https://haoychen.github.io/Implicit-Reasoning/

AI.tldr: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）缺乏“能动性”，导致在隐式推理任务中表现不足，主要因为现有评测偏向被动语义检索。本文提出了针对主动视觉探索的V-IRD新基准，揭示主流VLMs在自发发现和利用视觉证据方面存在明显短板。
AI.motivation: 人类的视觉理解高度依赖于自主发现和利用隐含信息，然而现有VLMs多以被动语义检索为主，缺乏主动推理能力。现有基准也很少测量这一能力，导致这一关键短板未被关注。
AI.method: 作者提出了V-IRD基准，用以评测模型在无明确目标指导下，是否能主动探索图像并发现需要的视觉证据信息，侧重考查模型的能动性和隐式推理能力。
AI.result: 实验发现，主流VLMs虽然检索能力强，但在需要自发寻找和利用图像中参考物及隐藏证据时表现很差，说明其缺乏主动视觉探索能力。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLMs的强语义识别与主动视觉探索存在本质区分。仅有语义检索无法弥补缺乏能动性的缺陷，未来需加强VLMs的主动推理和探索能力。

title: Learning New Tasks via Reusable Skills: Skill-Compositional Experts for Embodied Continual Learning
summary: Embodied Continual Learning (ECL) aims to enable robots to continually acquire new manipulation tasks while retaining previously learned behaviors under closed-loop control. Compared with conventional continual learning, ECL suffers from more severe catastrophic forgetting. Feature drift accumulated under closed-loop control progressively propagates through sequential decision-making, leading to degradation of previously learned behaviors. A key challenge in ECL lies in structured skill reuse across continually evolving tasks, since existing methods primarily focus on skill learning without explicitly organizing them for coherent task execution. To address this issue, we propose SCE, a Skill-Compositional Experts framework for ECL. SCE builds a skill base via Compositional Skill Grounding (CSG), which decomposes task demonstrations into reusable skills. Based on this, Dual Execution-and-Transition Experts (DETE) enable new task learning through skill composition, where one branch ensures skill execution and the other supports transitions between skills for coherent behavior. Experiments on LIBERO benchmarks and real-world manipulation tasks demonstrate that SCE consistently improves retention and overall task performance. Further feature drift analyses and ablation studies verify the effectiveness of our method. Project website: https://eqcy.github.io/sce/.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了SCE框架，通过可组合技能专家提升机器人具身持续学习的能力，缓解在持续任务学习中遗忘与表现下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 在具身持续学习（ECL）中，机器人需连续学习多个操作任务并保留既有技能，但由于特征漂移和缺乏结构化技能重用，导致旧行为易遗忘且连贯性差，现有方法难以有效组织和复用技能。
AI.method: 提出SCE框架：首先用可组合技能基础（CSG）将任务演示分解为可复用技能；随后，采用双分支专家（DETE）模式，一分支保证技能执行，一分支保障技能衔接，实现新任务复合学习及技能重用。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准和现实世界操作任务上，SCE比现有方法在任务保持度和整体表现上均有提升。特征漂移分析与消融实验进一步验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: SCE通过结构化的技能获取与复用，为ECL提供了更好的技能保留和新任务学习能力，有效缓解了特征漂移与灾难性遗忘问题。

title: Extending Item Response Theory for Efficient and Meaningful Multilingual Evaluation
summary: Multilingual benchmarks are central to evaluating large language models (LLMs) across languages, but they suffer from three issues: exhaustive evaluation scales linearly with the number of languages, automatic translation introduces errors that are easily missed at scale, and some items conflate general and culture-specific knowledge. We address all three with a unified statistical framework, Multilingual-IRT, which extends Item Response Theory with per-language difficulty deviations, split discriminability separating content from language effects, and per-language ability residuals. Fitting Multilingual-IRT on 25 LLMs across 29 languages of MMLU-Pro-X, we show that its fitted parameters support three practical applications: predicting unobserved (item, LLM, language) instances with 11-16% lower binary cross-entropy than the strongest accuracy-based baseline, surfacing candidate translation errors distributed across all 28 non-English languages, whereas accuracy-based baselines concentrate detections in a few languages, and recovering culture-specific items that accuracy-based baselines miss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多语言评测框架Multilingual-IRT，有效解决了多语言大语言模型（LLM）评测存在的三大难题，通过引入统计方法来分析语言、内容与能力的影响，实现了更精准的评测与误差诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言基准测试存在：1）评测成本随语言数线性增长；2）自动翻译引入隐蔽误差，难以被及时发现；3）部分测试项目混淆通用知识和文化特定知识。急需新方法解决多语言评测效率、准确性及可解释性不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出Multilingual-IRT框架，将项目反应理论（IRT）扩展为包含每种语言的难度偏差、将内容辨别能力与语言效应解耦，并引入每种语言的能力残差。以MMLU-Pro-X数据集，在29种语言和25个LLM上对该方法进行了拟合和验证。
AI.result: Multilingual-IRT的模型参数在三方面优于准确率基线：1）预测未观测到的（题目、模型、语言）实例时，二元交叉熵降低11-16%；2）能在28种非英语语言中均匀发现翻译错误，而准确率基线的错误检测集中于少数语言；3）能检出准确率基线遗漏的文化特定题目。
AI.conclusion: Multilingual-IRT为多语言LLM评测提供了更加高效、细致和具备可解释性的统一统计工具，能提升评测效率，并在识别翻译错误、文化特定项目等方面表现出显著优势。

title: HSQ-VLM: A Novel Spatially-Constrained Quadrant Segmentation VLM Model for Explainability in Diabetic Retinopathy
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is an aggressive retinal disease and a leading cause of global blindness, yet its clinical management is currently hindered by the black-box nature of diagnostic AI. While deep learning models achieve high classification accuracy, there is a critical lack of explainability methods capable of detailing the exact anatomical landmarks and lesion distributions that lead to a clinical decision for DR. Therefore, we propose HSQ-VLM, a novel quadrant segmentation pipeline on fundus images that utilizes a Landmark-Anchored Cartesian Cross-Attention mechanism to unify visual feature extraction with structured clinical reasoning. Unlike traditional methods that rely on arbitrary image partitioning, our pipeline implements 4-quadrant Topological Latent Partitioning (TLP) to dynamically align retinal features with a fovea-centered coordinate system. This allows the Vision-Language Model to generate natural language reports that quantify pathology with anatomical precision. On a dataset of 3,500 high-resolution fundus images, this innovative methodology achieved a lesion detection sensitivity of 99.6% for hemorrhages and 96.4% for microaneurysms, while demonstrating a significant reduction in boundary-ambiguity errors compared to standard segmentation baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型视网膜裂隙分割和可解释性增强方法HSQ-VLM，通过结合视觉-语言模型和解剖学坐标，实现糖尿病视网膜病变的高精度自动检测与报告生成。
AI.motivation: 当前糖尿病视网膜病变的AI辅助诊断虽有高准确率，但因模型为“黑箱”，导致医学解释困难，缺乏能基于解剖学特征细致解读诊断依据的方法，影响临床信任和应用。
AI.method: 提出HSQ-VLM方法，在眼底图像上利用基于地标的笛卡尔交叉注意力机制，并实现以黄斑为中心的四象限分割（TLP），动态关联视网膜影像特征与临床解剖。该视觉-语言模型可自动生成定量化病理报告。
AI.result: 在3500张高清眼底图像上，HSQ-VLM对出血病变的灵敏度达99.6%，对微动脉瘤检测灵敏度为96.4%，且边界歧义错误显著低于传统分割方法。
AI.conclusion: HSQ-VLM不仅极大提升了病灶检测精度，还增强了解剖学可解释性，为糖尿病视网膜病变的临床AI应用奠定了可解释诊断基础。

title: Can Causal Models Enhance Robot Navigation? Online Causal Adaptation for Real-Robot Navigation
comment: Accepted for publication at the 35th IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
summary: Causality in robotics aims to produce more interpretable and flexible robot behaviours by enabling robots to predict the consequences of their actions; however, deploying causal models with existing systems (e.g., navigation) operating in real environments remains understudied. This paper addresses the challenging problem of transferring causal models in real-robot experiments for a navigation scenario. We study this problem in two ways: (i) using the causal model as an offline evaluation module that predicts the competence of recorded real-robot navigation trajectories and relates it to quantitative navigation performance, and (ii) using the causal model as an online adaptation module that intervenes when the predicted competence of the default navigation is low. We validate our approach in a physical service robot that patrols around corridors. We show that the predicted competence correlates positively with path efficiency, and negatively with path irregularities (suboptimal behaviour). The model predictions also show strong agreement with human annotations (Cohen's kappa value of 0.88). In online experiments, the proposed method improves navigation performance in complex scenarios such as cornering and obstacle avoidance, yielding higher predicted competence and better navigation metrics than the default navigation baseline. In simpler scenarios, where the baseline already performs near-optimally, the causal adaptation provides limited benefit. These results indicate that causal models are particularly effective in enhancing navigation under increased task complexity. Overall, our results demonstrate that causal models developed for behavioural interpretation can be successfully integrated into real-robot navigation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将因果模型应用于真实机器人导航系统，并展示了因果模型在复杂场景中提升导航性能的有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器人因果模型能提升行为解释性与灵活性，但其在实际导航系统中的应用与迁移尚缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 提出两种因果模型应用方式：一是作为离线评估模块，预测机器人导航轨迹的能力并与性能指标关联；二是作为在线自适应模块，在导航性能低落时进行因果干预。方法在实际服务机器人上进行验证，比较默认导航和因果自适应导航。
AI.result: 实验表明，因果模型预测的能力与路径效率呈正相关、与不规则性呈负相关，预测结果与人工标注高度一致（Kappa 0.88）。在线实验中，复杂场景下因果自适应方法提升了导航能力及性能指标，简单场景下提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 因果模型可以有效提升机器人在复杂任务下的导航表现，并可与实际系统集成，用于行为解释和导航性能优化。

title: Beyond English: Uncovering the Multilingual Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in learning generalist robot policies from large-scale multimodal data. However, most existing VLA systems are trained and evaluated primarily with English instructions, leaving their ability to understand and execute instructions in other languages largely unexplored. While the underlying large language models often possess multilingual capabilities, it remains unclear whether these multilingual capabilities transfer to VLAs during training. In this work, we present the first systematic study of multilingual instruction following in VLA models. We first construct multilingual instructions by extending existing benchmarks with translations of their instructions. Using these instructions, we evaluate several representative VLA models across a range of tasks in simulation settings. Our experiments reveal a significant multilingual gap: models trained primarily on English instructions exhibit substantial performance degradation when evaluated on other languages, even when the underlying language backbone is multilingual. We provide several findings and analyses to understand the multilingual gap. Cross-lingual transfer behavior analysis shows that performance drops correlate with both instruction understanding and action execution. Representation analyses suggest that multilingual instruction-caused representation shifts may contribute to the multilingual gap. Motivated by these findings, we further explore strategies to improve multilingual performance in VLAs. We propose a simple yet effective multilingual fine-tuning approach, Multilingual Principal Component Alignment, which leverages Principal Component Analysis to get the principal component subspace and align projected multilingual representations, effectively reducing the multilingual performance gap.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在多语言指令理解与执行能力上进行系统性研究，发现以英语为主训练的VLA模型在多语言下性能大幅下降，并提出了一种有效的多语言微调方法来缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型主要在英语指导下训练与评估，其对多语言指令的理解和执行能力尚不明朗。尽管底层语言模型具备多语言能力，但这种能力是否转移到VLA模型尚未探明。因此，研究多语言指令下VLA模型的表现及其提升方法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者通过扩展现有VLA基准测试集，构建了多语言指令，系统评估了多种典型的VLA模型在仿真任务中的多语言跟随能力，并进行表现与表征分析。针对发现的问题，提出利用主成分分析对多语言表征进行对齐的微调方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，主要在英语指令下训练的VLA模型在其他语言下表现大幅下降。性能下降与指令理解和动作执行均有关，且多语言指令导致表征偏移。提出的多语言主成分对齐方法可显著减少多语言性能差距。
AI.conclusion: VLA模型虽具备一定多语言潜力，但当前主要以英语为主训练存在显著的多语言能力缺陷。通过多语言微调及表征对齐方法，可以有效缩小多语言性能差距，提升其泛化能力。

title: S23DR 2026: End-to-End 3D Wireframe Prediction via DETR-Style Set Prediction with Contrastive Denoising
summary: We present WireframeDETR, our submission to the Structured Semantic 3D Reconstruction (S23DR) 2026 Challenge, which requires predicting a 3D building wireframe from multi-view COLMAP point clouds. Our method applies DETR-style set prediction directly to 3D point clouds, producing wireframes as sets of edge coordinate pairs without any intermediate vertex detection stage. We introduce three technical contributions: (1) contrastive denoising training that stabilises noisy Hungarian matching in early epochs; (2) a multi-scale encoder that aggregates the last encoder layer outputs via learned scalar weights; and (3) progressive auxiliary loss weighting that concentrates gradient signal on the decoder layers that most benefit from it. Our model achieves a public test HSS of 0.575 (F1~=~0.664, IoU~=~0.516) and a best validation HSS of 0.534 on the cleaned val split.

AI.tldr: WireframeDETR是一种直接对3D点云进行DETR式集合预测，生成建筑线框的方法，在S23DR 2026挑战中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 当前从多视角点云预测3D建筑线框通常需要复杂的中间步骤（如顶点检测），流程繁琐且易受噪声影响。该研究希望简化流程并提升精度。
AI.method: 方法基于DETR思想，直接将3D点云作为输入，输出为边坐标对集合，无需中间顶点检测。创新点包括：1）对比去噪训练稳定Hungarian匹配；2）多尺度编码器动态加权聚合多层输出；3）辅助损失递进加权优化梯度分布。
AI.result: 在公开测试集上获得HSS 0.575（F1=0.664，IoU=0.516），在清洗后的验证集上HSS为0.534，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需顶点检测的情况下实现高效精准的3D建筑线框预测，对点云3D建模和结构重建任务有实际应用价值。

title: LaWAM: Latent World Action Models for Efficient Dynamics-Aware Robot Policies
summary: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) leverage large-scale vision-language pretraining for semantic robot control, but often lack explicit foresight into how robot actions change the scene. World-Action Models (WAMs) address this limitation by conditioning policies on predicted futures, yet existing approaches typically rely on computationally expensive video generation with substantial pixel-level redundancy. We present LaWAM, a Latent World Action Model that exposes predictive dynamics to robot policies through compact latent visual subgoals instead of reconstructed future video. At the core of LaWAM is a latent-action-conditioned Latent World Model (LaWM). We obtain LaWM by training a latent action model in the latent space of a pretrained vision foundation model and repurposing its forward decoder to predict future observation features for scene evolution. LaWAM then conditions action generation on these predicted latent visual subgoals to enable dynamics-aware robot control. LaWAM achieves state-of-the-art or competitive success rates (SRs) across LIBERO (98.6% SR), RoboTwin (91.22% SR), and real-world manipulation tasks while retaining low-latency inference. LaWAM runs in 187 ms per action-chunk prediction and achieves up to 24x lower wall-clock latency than pixel-space WAMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉-语言-动作模型LaWAM，可通过紧凑的潜在视觉子目标实现高效的动态感知控制，显著减少推理延迟，并在多项任务中取得领先成果。
AI.motivation: 目前主流的视觉-语言-动作模型缺乏对机器人动作所导致场景变化的前瞻性预测。虽然世界-动作模型试图通过预测未来场景解决这一问题，但普遍需要高开销的视频生成，存在冗余。为此，作者旨在用更低成本的方法提升机器人的动态感知与控制能力。
AI.method: 作者提出LaWAM（Latent World Action Model），核心为潜在动作条件的世界模型（LaWM）。LaWM在预训练视觉基础模型的潜在空间中学习动作模型，通过解码器预测场景演变下未来观测特征。LaWAM据此以预测的潜在视觉子目标为基础进行动作生成，无需重建完整未来视频。
AI.result: LaWAM在LIBERO（98.6%成功率）、RoboTwin（91.22%成功率）、以及真实操作任务中均达到了先进或具竞争力的表现，并显著降低了推理延迟（每步仅187ms，最多比传统像素空间方法快24倍）。
AI.conclusion: LaWAM证明，通过潜在空间预测视觉子目标，能大幅提升机器人动作策略对未来动态的感知，同时实现实时高效推理，有望推动机器人自主控制的实际应用发展。

title: Vernier: Probing Representational Misalignment Behind Lexical Gaps in Causal Reasoning
summary: Instruction-tuned language models can answer the same causal-reasoning question differently after its English variable names are replaced by type-preserving placeholders, although the structural causal model and the gold answer are unchanged. We ask whether this lexical gap reflects information loss in the placeholder view or a misaligned read-out from a representation that still carries answer-relevant content. Vernier uses a paired-view weight update as an instrument and then inspects the mechanism left after the gap closes. In the working regimes, the evidence favours representational misalignment. A variable-name probe becomes more accurate on the placeholder view, and activation patching on Qwen-7B, Qwen-14B, and Llama-3.1-8B shows that the decision-token representation can transfer answer identity between views. The update that realigns the views is counterfactual augmentation over original and placeholder prompts, while the answer-subspace KL mainly sharpens intermediate answer-belief agreement. Success is bounded by model family, scale, and task. CRASS transfer is reliable across Qwen scales and Llama, e-CARE remains weak, and preliminary non-causal rename tasks show a similar qualitative pattern.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了指令微调语言模型在处理因果推理问题时，对变量名用类型占位符替换后产生不同答案的现象，揭示这主要源于模型表示上的失配而非信息丢失。通过引入成对视图的权重更新方法，验证了观点，并考察了影响模型一致性的机制。
AI.motivation: 在自然语言处理任务中，仅变量名的替换（结构和答案不变）会影响大模型的因果推理表现，这说明模型对表层词汇有敏感性。研究此现象有助于理解和提升模型泛化与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出了一种成对视图（原始与占位符视图）的权重更新方法，结合变量名探测和激活修补技术，分析了不同大模型（如Qwen-7B/14B、Llama-3.1-8B）在因果推理中对应的表现变化。对比了不同方法对模型答案一致性和特征空间的影响。
AI.result: 权重更新手段能弥合原始与占位符视图间的答案差异，提升占位符视图下变量名探针的准确度，并实现答案身份的迁移。模型不同家族和规模对迁移效果存在边界，Qwen和Llama系列的迁移较好，非因果重命名任务也呈相似趋势。
AI.conclusion: 变量名替换造成答案变化主要是模型内部表征失配，而不是丢失关键信息。文中提出的对齐方法可改善一致性，但迁移效果受限于模型类型、大小与任务。

title: Multi-HMR 2: Multi-Person Camera-Centric Human Detection, Mesh Recovery and Tracking
summary: Most advances in human mesh recovery (HMR) have focused on pelvis-centered recovery, overlooking metric 3D localization and detection accuracy in the camera coordinate system - two key factors for real-world applications such as human-robot interaction and social scene understanding. Current evaluation protocols often ignore these aspects, emphasizing per-person, root-centered recovery rather than camera-space perception. As a result, existing approaches rely on fixed camera assumptions or handcrafted post-processing, limiting their robustness and practical deployment. We introduce Multi-HMR 2, a simple yet robust DETR-based framework for Multi-person Camera-centric Human detection, mesh Recovery, and tracking. Multi-HMR 2 predicts a scene-consistent camera together with human meshes, enabling metric 3D localization without ground-truth intrinsics. Moreover, by distilling image-based memory features from SAM2, Multi-HMR 2 extends to tracking, achieving consistent identity association without video supervision. Despite its conceptual simplicity - no handcrafted components, no video input, and no ground-truth cameras - Multi-HMR 2 achieves state-of-the-art pelvis-centered performance while substantially improving detection accuracy and metric 3D localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Multi-HMR 2框架，实现了多人人体相机中心检测、三维人体网格恢复和跟踪，并显著提升实际三维定位和检测精度。
AI.motivation: 当前的人体三维网格恢复（HMR）研究主要集中于以骨盆为中心的恢复，忽略了在相机坐标系下的三维定位和检测精度，这限制了其在实际应用中（如人机交互和社会场景理解）的效果。此外，现有评估方法往往忽视这些实际需求，依赖于固定相机或手工后处理方法，缺乏鲁棒性，难以广泛应用。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于DETR（Detection Transformer）的Multi-HMR 2框架，能够直接预测场景一致的相机参数和人体三维网格，实现无须真实相机参数的三维定位。同时，通过蒸馏来自SAM2（大规模分割模型）的图像特征至记忆模块，实现了无需视频监督下的人体身份一致性跟踪。整个方法无手工设计组件，无需视频输入，也不依赖真实相机参数。
AI.result: Multi-HMR 2在骨盆中心评估指标上达到了当下最领先的性能，并在多人人体检测和实际三维定位方面大幅提升了精度，实现了更稳健、实际可用的多人人体三维恢复、定位与跟踪效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实际场景下的多人人体三维恢复和跟踪提供了新的、鲁棒的技术路径，并突破了现有方法在相机关联与三维度量上的局限，具有良好的应用前景。

title: FlashNav: Ultra-Fast Policy Training for Robot Navigation within 20 Seconds
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has shown strong potential for robot navigation, but its practical deployment is still limited by the long wall-clock cost of policy training. This paper presents FlashNav, a GPU-first framework for ultra-fast range-based robot navigation training. To the best of our knowledge, FlashNav is the first DRL-based robot navigation framework that reaches seconds-level policy training, with the fastest deployable policy trained in less than 20 seconds. The key idea is to align simulation with the navigation MDP: FlashNav preserves the essential components for velocity-level navigation, including occupancy geometry, range sensing, goal-conditioned control, robot motion dynamics, collision handling, termination, and reset, while removing unnecessary rendering and high-fidelity physical details from the training loop. Built on a batched bitmap simulator and a fully GPU-resident training pipeline with our FastDSAC learner, FlashNav generates massive parallel navigation transitions entirely on GPU. Experiments on TurtleBot2 and Unitree Go2 show that FlashNav achieves a 100\% success-rate below 20 seconds on an RTX 5090 and remains within tens of seconds across desktop GPUs. The learned policies further transfer to physical wheeled and legged robots in static and dynamic indoor scenes, demonstrating that DRL-based navigation can be trained at seconds-level speed while preserving deployable obstacle-avoidance behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FlashNav，一个基于GPU的机器人导航深度强化学习训练框架，将训练时间压缩到秒级（最快不到20秒），大幅提升了导航策略训练的效率。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在机器人导航领域表现突出，但实际应用受限于训练过程中耗时过长。因此，作者希望通过架构与方法创新，显著加速导航策略的训练过程，使其更适用于实际部署。
AI.method: FlashNav对导航的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）建模进行了精简，只保留导航中最基本和必需的元素（如占据网格、激光测距、目标驱动控制、运动动力学、碰撞处理、任务终止与重置），去掉了冗余的渲染和高保真物理过程。训练管道完全在GPU端进行，包括基于批量位图仿真器和高效的强化学习器（FastDSAC），实现导航采样和策略训练的全流程并行加速。
AI.result: 在TurtleBot2和Unitree Go2平台上，FlashNav能在RTX 5090显卡下20秒内训练出100%导航成功率的策略，在普通桌面GPU上也能在几十秒内完成。训练的策略还成功迁移到真实机器人的静态和动态室内场景中，展现出良好的障碍物规避能力。
AI.conclusion: FlashNav证明了机器人导航DRL训练可以在几十秒内完成，并保持可用的导航性能，极大推动了机器人强化学习系统的实际部署速度。

title: Retrievable Gradients: Continual Post-Training Without Cumulative Weight Drift
summary: Continual post-training enables models to absorb emerging knowledge after deployment, but repeatedly updating shared parameters can accumulate weight drift, potentially causing catastrophic forgetting and degrading general capabilities. Retrieval-augmented generation avoids such parameter drift, yet often lacks the depth of parametric knowledge integration. In this paper, we propose ReGrad (Retrievable Gradients), a new paradigm that treats gradients as retrievable units of knowledge. ReGrad pre-computes document-specific gradients offline, stores them in an indexed Gradient Bank, and retrieves only query-relevant gradients at inference time for temporary weight adaptation. However, raw language-modeling gradients are optimized for token-level document reconstruction rather than for query-driven knowledge use. We therefore introduce a bi-level meta-learning objective that reshapes document-derived gradients into generalizable adaptation signals for downstream tasks. Experiments across general and domain-specific settings show that \textsc{ReGrad} outperforms CPT and RAG baselines, enabling scalable and reversible parametric knowledge injection without accumulating weight drift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新范式ReGrad，将梯度作为可检索的知识单元，以便无须反复微调参数即可临时适配新知识，解决现有持续训练和检索增强生成的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有持续训练方式会累积权重漂移，易遗忘原有知识；而检索增强生成虽然避免参数漂移，但整合知识深度有限。因此需要一种兼具两者优点的方法。
AI.method: ReGrad离线预计算文档对应的梯度，将其存入梯度库，推理时基于查询检索相关梯度，用于临时调整参数。采用双层元学习目标，使梯度适应下游任务而非仅重构文档。
AI.result: 在通用及领域任务上，ReGrad性能优于持续训练（CPT）及检索增强生成（RAG）方法。
AI.conclusion: ReGrad实现了可扩展、可逆的参数级知识注入，避免了权重漂移。

title: An Ensemble Deep Learning Approach for Reliable and Scalable Lemon Leaf Disease Classification
comment: 5 pages, 12 figures, 3 Tables, Presented at 18th IEEE International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Communication Networks (CICN) 2026
summary: Early detection of plant diseases is crucial to plants and for the farmers. Plant diseases reduce fruit yield and quality, and plants are more susceptible to other stresses when they are infected. The lemon leaf disease dataset contains 1354 images. The dataset has 9 classes. Among the 9 classes only one class is for healthy leaf, and the other 8 classes are leaf diseases. The dataset was split into training (70%), testing (15%) and validation (15%) sets after comprehensive preprocessing. Two pretrained models (InceptionV3 and MobileNetV2) were applied and then combined these models using an ensemble technique to boost robustness. Ensemble models showed a promising performance of 99.27% accuracy. Adversarial Training is applied to improve models' ability and ensure reliable predictions under noisy data. Grad-CAM visualization highlights the important regions of leaf images that validate the model prediction with confidence level.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用迁移学习和集成模型对柠檬叶片疾病进行早期检测，取得99.27%的高精度。
AI.motivation: 作物在早期感染病害时，如能及时检测，有助于减产和品质下降的预防，减少农民损失。柠檬叶片病害种类繁多，人工识别效率低，需自动化高效诊断方案。
AI.method: 使用包含1354张柠檬叶片的公开数据集，分为9类（1类健康，8类病害），按7:1.5:1.5比例划分为训练/测试/验证集。分别采用InceptionV3和MobileNetV2两种预训练模型，通过集成学习提升模型鲁棒性。引入对抗训练增强抗噪能力，并采用Grad-CAM可视化模型关注区域，提升可解释性。
AI.result: 集成模型在测试集上取得了99.27%的分类准确率。通过对抗训练，模型面对噪声数据依然保持可靠预测。Grad-CAM可视化显示模型决定区域与病害相关，验证了模型的判断依据。
AI.conclusion: 通过预训练模型集成与对抗训练，可实现高精度、鲁棒的柠檬叶病害自动检测，模型解释性良好，有望在农田实际应用中推广。

title: LoComposition: Terrain-Adaptive Energy-Efficient Quadruped Locomotion without Gait Priors
summary: Learning-based quadrupedal locomotion typically relies on complex reward formulations that entangle task specification, operational limits, gait preference, and terrain adaptation within a single optimization objective. We instead treat these functions through distinct mechanisms: rewards for task specification, constraints for operational limits, energy minimization for gait preference, and exteroceptive perception for adapting energy use to terrain difficulty. We show that these components jointly enable efficient, terrain-adaptive locomotion, and that removing each component exposes a distinct failure mode. Our formulation removes explicit gait priors (including air-time, contact-count, and foot-clearance targets) in favor of emergent behavior. Compared to a conventional complex-reward baseline, our formulation achieves comparable terrain traversal while reducing cost of transport by 56% and operational-limit violations by 96%. The resulting policies transfer zero-shot to a physical Unitree Go2 using LiDAR-based elevation mapping. Project website with videos: https://tinyurl.com/locomposition.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种组合式的奖励机制，用于四足机器人自主学习地形适应性运动，有效简化奖励设计，并显著降低能耗和违规率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于学习的四足机器人运动方法，需使用复杂的奖励函数，导致任务目标、设备限制、步态偏好和地形适应等因素高度耦合，难以优化与解释。本研究动机在于将这些因素分别处理，提升训练效率与实际迁移能力。
AI.method: 采用明确奖励定义任务目标，用约束表达操作极限，通过能量最小化引导步态偏好，利用外部感知系统（如LiDAR）适配不同地形难度。摒弃显式步态先验（如空中时间、接地数等），引导出自发的步态。
AI.result: 在对比传统复杂奖励基线时，该方法在地形通过能力相当的基础上，将能量消耗降低56%，操作限制违规率降低96%。所学策略无需额外调整，可直接迁移至真实Unitree Go2机器人并通过LiDAR实现地形适应。
AI.conclusion: 分而治之的奖励机制可提升四足机器人在复杂地形下的运动效率和安全性，同时简化了策略设计与现实迁移难题。

title: EHRNote-ChatQA: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Multi-Turn Clinical Question Answering over Longitudinal Discharge Summaries
summary: Discharge summaries are crucial clinical documents containing the context of a patient's overall hospital stay, and are routinely reviewed by medical experts for patient readmission, ongoing care, and diagnostic decision-making. When reviewing them, medical experts often must iteratively synthesize information across multiple summaries while verifying the evidence supporting each answer. Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for clinical question answering, existing benchmarks do not sufficiently reflect this setting: they often evaluate exam-style medical knowledge or focus on single-turn question answering with limited evidence-grounding evaluation. We introduce EHRNote-ChatQA, the first benchmark for evidence-grounded multi-turn clinical question answering over patients' multiple discharge summaries. Built from de-identified MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, EHRNote-ChatQA contains 967 patient-level multi-turn samples spanning one to five notes and 16,072 medical-expert-verified QA pairs (8,036 content questions, each paired with an evidence-grounding question) across eight clinical categories. The benchmark is constructed through an expert-informed pipeline combining discharge-summary structuring schema, expert-curated multi-turn QA templates, and LLM-based generation, followed by review and revision of every single QA sample by 11 medical experts. Benchmarking 22 open- and closed-source LLMs reveals several challenges, including that LLMs struggle more with evidence grounding than content answering, multi-turn errors compound across turns, and single-turn clinical QA performance does not reliably transfer to this setting. These findings establish EHRNote-ChatQA as a rigorous and practical benchmark for evaluating clinical QA systems. The dataset will be made publicly available through PhysioNet credentialed access.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EHRNote-ChatQA，这是第一个针对多份出院小结和多轮对话进行循证临床问答的基准数据集，用于评估和提升大型语言模型（LLMs）在真实多轮医疗场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的临床问答评测多关注考题型知识或单轮问答，并未真实反映临床专家需跨多份出院小结进行信息整合和证据核查的工作场景。因此，亟需一个能够模拟真实专家工作流程、考察LLM多轮循证能力的新型基准。
AI.method: 作者基于匿名化的MIMIC-IV出院小结，设计了专家驱动的流程：引入结构化模板、多轮问题设计、利用LLM自动生成QA对，并由11位医学专家逐条评审修订。最终构建了覆盖八大临床类别、包含967个病人级多轮问答样本和16,072组专家校验问答对的数据集。
AI.result: 作者对22个主流开源与闭源LLMs进行基准测试，发现LLMs在证据溯源上表现显著弱于内容回答，多轮任务中错误易累积，单轮问答能力无法直接迁移到该场景。EHRNote-ChatQA有效揭示了多轮循证医疗问答中的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: EHRNote-ChatQA为评估临床问答系统提供了严谨且贴近真实需求的新基准，有助于推动LLMs在医疗场景下更好地服务实际临床决策。该数据集将通过PhysioNet公开获取。

title: Understanding Cross-Modal Contributions in Continual Vision-Language Models: A Theoretical Perspective
summary: Continual vision-language models are commonly addressed through sequential fine-tuning; however, although this paradigm enables adaptation to new environments (tasks), it inherently emphasizes the contribution of previously learned environments (tasks) at the expense of the stability required to preserve previously acquired knowledge. While existing approaches have adequately studied continual learning and catastrophic forgetting in vision-language models (VLMs), the theoretical understanding of modality-specific contributions across a sequence of environments remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a new theoretical perspective to understand the cross-modal (vision-language) contributions to consecutive environments. We empirically evaluate our theoretical findings on large VLMs and demonstrate their effectiveness in capturing environment-level cross-modal contributions. Our analysis provides deeper insights into continual VLMs, highlighting their contribution robustness to varying task orders and inter-task similarities, and their improved generalization performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的理论视角，分析视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在持续学习中跨模态贡献，并通过实验证明了该理论的有效性，对VLMs在不同任务序列下的泛化和稳定性提出了新见解。
AI.motivation: 以往对视觉-语言模型的持续学习与灾难性遗忘进行了充分研究，但对跨序列环境中模态特定贡献的理论理解不足。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出一种新的跨模态理论分析方法，并结合大规模视觉-语言模型进行实证评估，以观察不同环境下的跨模态贡献。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，所提出的理论分析能有效捕捉到不同环境中跨模态贡献，揭示了VLMs在任务顺序和任务相似性变化下的鲁棒性及更优的泛化表现。
AI.conclusion: 该理论视角不仅加深了对持续学习VLMs的理解，还展示了其对多任务序列下模型表现和稳定性的积极影响，对未来相关研究具有指导意义。

title: VL2Spike: Spike-driven Distillation from VLMs for Low-Power Visual Perception in Embodied AI
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are brain-inspired, event-driven models that compute with sparse spikes, which enables highly efficient visual perception in resource-constrained embodied AI models. The emergence of Spiking-Transformer models with spike self-attention has substantially improved the learning capacity of pure SNNs. Although SNNs are energy efficient, their performance is still limited by the spike-based architecture and optimization challenges, as standard gradient descent rules cannot be directly applied. Recently, vision-language models (VLMs) have shown rich multi-modal knowledge representation capabilities for visual perception. Thus, it is promising to leverage VLMs for better Spikformer training. To this end, we present VL2Spike, a novel spike-based knowledge distillation (KD) framework that bridges multi-modal knowledge from VLMs with compact Spikformer models. This design enhances the learning capacity of Spikformer models while preserving their energy-efficiency merits, thereby offering a practical pathway toward low-power robotic perception. Our VL2Spike brings two key technical contributions. To align with spiking dynamics, we first propose spatial-temporal visual spike (SVS) distillation, which achieves (1) shared manifold alignment between VLM image features and spike tokens, and (2) warm-started temporal consistency on membrane potentials and spike rates. We then design a novel spike prototype-guided linguistic (SPL) distillation strategy that aligns Spikformer's class prototypes and logits with promptable VLM text embeddings. Extensive experiments show that VL2Spike achieves 6.81% gain across three static datasets with only 15.7% energy consumption. It also exhibits strong generalization capacity on robotic visual place recognition (VPR) with a gain of 6.63%, highlighting its potential for low-power perception in embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的知识蒸馏方法VL2Spike，通过与视觉-语言模型（VLM）协同训练，显著提升了节能的Spikformer模型在视觉感知任务中的性能和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管SNN模型具有高能效优势，但因脉冲机制和优化难题，性能有限，且传统反向传播方法难以直接适用。近年来，VLM在视觉表征方面表现突出，因此本文希望借助VLM的跨模态知识来提升Spikformer的训练和表现。
AI.method: 提出VL2Spike框架，结合VLM与Spikformer训练。方法包括：（1）空间-时间视觉脉冲（SVS）蒸馏，实现VLM图像特征与SNN脉冲表示的流形对齐，并在电位与脉冲率层面实现时间一致性；（2）基于脉冲原型引导的语言蒸馏（SPL），将Spikformer的类别原型和logits与VLM文本嵌入对齐。
AI.result: 在三个静态数据集上，比基线提升6.81%，仅消耗15.7%的能量消耗。在机器人视觉定位任务（VPR）上，性能提升6.63%，展示了较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VL2Spike有效地将VLM的多模态知识迁移至节能的Spikformer，有效提升能效和性能，展现其在低功耗机器人视觉感知中的应用前景。

title: A Self Consistency Based Reranking for Narrative Question Answering
summary: Narrative question answering (NQA) is a challenging task in natural language processing that requires models to understand long textual contexts, capture relationships across events, and generate coherent responses. Despite recent advances in pretrained language models, most existing approaches rely on a single decoding output during inference, making them sensitive to generation variability and often resulting in incomplete or inconsistent answers .To address this limitation, we propose a self-ensemble Self-Consistency-Based reranking framework for narrative question answering. The proposed method generates multiple candidate answers for each story-question pair and selects the final answer based on semantic agreement among the generated responses. This allows the model to explore diverse answer formulations while improving robustness through consensus-based selection without requiring modifications to the underlying architecture .The framework combines pretrained and fine-tuned language generation with multi-answer inference and similarity-based reranking. We evaluate the proposed approach on the NarrativeQA dataset using multiple models, including FLAN-T5 (Base and Small) and Pegasus-Large, under both baseline and fine-tuned settings .Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently improves performance across all models. In particular, FLAN-T5-Base achieves the best overall performance, improving from 82.32% to 86.66% (+4.34%) when combined with self-ensemble inference. Additionally, the largest improvement is observed with Pegasus-Large, which increases from 72.50% to 87.07% (+14.57%), highlighting the effectiveness of the proposed strategy.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于叙事问答（NQA）的自集成自一致性重排序框架，通过生成多个候选答案并选择语义一致性最高的答案，提升回答的完整性与一致性，显著提高了各大模型在NarrativeQA数据集上的表现。
AI.motivation: 叙事问答需要模型理解长文本、捕捉事件关系并生成连贯回答。以往方法推理阶段只生成一个输出，容易导致答案不完整或不一致，因此亟需提升模型对答案生成稳定性和鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 该方法为每个故事-问题对生成多个候选答案，根据这些答案间的语义一致性进行重排序，选择最具共识的答案。该框架兼容预训练和微调模型，无需更改底层架构，利用多答案推理和相似度重排序实现自集成观点。
AI.result: 在NarrativeQA数据集上，基于FLAN-T5（Base和Small）、Pegasus-Large等模型进行实验。结果显示所有模型性能均有提升，尤其是Pegasus-Large提升最为显著（72.50%到87.07%，提升14.57%）；FLAN-T5-Base从82.32%提升至86.66%。
AI.conclusion: 自集成自一致性重排序框架能显著增强叙事问答中的答案完整性和一致性，提升现有主流生成模型的性能，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: Improved Knowledge Distillation for Land-Use Image Classification
summary: In the present article, an improved Knowledge Distillation (KD) framework has been proposed for efficient compression of deep convolutional neural networks for land-use image classification task. Motivated by the need to achieve competitive classification accuracy while reducing computational complexity, a teacher-student learning paradigm is adopted in which a VGG16 network transfers knowledge to a lightweight MobileNetV2 model. The proposed framework integrates hard supervision from ground truth labels with a soft supervision strategy that combines Kullback-Leibler divergence and Cosine Similarity losses. Experiments conducted on three land-use datasets show that the proposed KD-based method yields improved performance, and achieves an accuracy of 99.04%, outperforming both baseline student training and single-loss distillation approaches, while retaining substantial model compression.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种改进的知识蒸馏框架，实现了高效的卷积神经网络压缩，在土地利用图像分类任务中既提升了准确率，又大幅降低了模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现实中深度卷积网络用于土地利用图像分类时，常面临模型复杂度高、推理速度慢的问题。研究动机是实现高精度分类的同时，压缩模型以适应资源受限的设备需求。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生架构，让VGG16作为教师网络向轻量级的MobileNetV2学生网络传递知识。在训练时，将硬标签（真实标签）和软标签（教师网络的输出）结合，通过Kullback-Leibler散度与余弦相似度两个损失共同进行软监督优化。
AI.result: 在三个土地利用公开数据集上实验，所提知识蒸馏方法使学生模型MobileNetV2准确率达到99.04%，显著超过了只用常规学生网络训练和仅用单一损失蒸馏的方式，并保持了较高的模型压缩率。
AI.conclusion: 改进的知识蒸馏框架在保证高准确率的同时，有效压缩了模型，非常适合部署于资源受限场景下的土地利用图像智能分类。

title: GeoTLM: Geometry-aware Tactile-Language Models for Contact Motion Orientation Reasoning of Dynamic Objects
summary: Modern tactile-language models (TLMs) have shown potential for robot learning tasks, such as material and texture recognition. However, for contact-rich scenarios, these TLMs struggle to understand the physical properties of dynamic objects, such as rotation and sliding directions. For instance, our preliminary experiments reveal that popular TLMs, such as Sparsh and AnyTouch2, exhibit weak performance on basic rotation direction reasoning from GelSight Mini tactile data. This surprising gap inspires us to explore a novel research question: Can we inject physically grounded geometric priors into TLMs to enable reliable contact orientation reasoning of dynamic object properties? To this end, we propose GeoTLM, a novel geometric representation-guided TLM for the perception of dynamic contact events. Our key idea is to preserve and structure tactile shear-field geometry before language-level reasoning, rather than forcing low-resolution tactile tokens into fragile closed-form physics operators. To achieve this, we propose a lightweight (only 14k parameters) yet novel Differentiable Geometric Representation (DGR). Specifically, DGR learns a contact-mask-guided representation in the shear field and aggregates it through an antisymmetric seven-region pooling design, motivated by the physical intuition that rotational contact produces antisymmetric deformation patterns. We conduct experiments on two representative tasks: rotation direction and sliding direction reasoning. Extensive experiments show that GeoTLM improves novel-object rotation accuracy by +14.6% and real-sensor sliding accuracy by +16.2% over the same backbone without the geometric encoder. Overall, our work paves a new way for physically grounded tactile-language reasoning, with strong potential for dynamic object understanding and contact-rich robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoTLM，一种融合几何表征的触觉-语言模型，在感知物体旋转和滑动方向等动态接触事件上显著优于当前主流模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的触觉-语言模型（TLMs）虽然能进行材料与质地识别，但在旋转、滑动方向等动态物体属性理解方面表现较弱。作者实验发现主流模型在基于GelSight Mini传感器数据的旋转方向推理任务上表现不佳，因此提出需引入物理几何先验增强TLM的动态接触推理能力。
AI.method: 作者提出GeoTLM模型，核心设计是先对触觉剪切场几何进行结构化建模，再进行语言推理，避免传统方法中用低分辨率触觉数据直接拟合物理表达式。为此他们设计了一种仅有14k参数的可微几何表征模块DGR，通过接触掩码引导区域划分，结合七区反对称池化，实现动态接触几何特征的提取。
AI.result: 在两个代表性任务上（旋转方向和滑动方向推理），GeoTLM在新物体旋转方向推理准确率较同等主干模型提升14.6%，实传感滑动方向推理提升16.2%。
AI.conclusion: GeoTLM引入几何物理先验显著提升TLM在动态接触感知能力，为语义与物理结合的触觉感知和复杂机器人操作带来新方法和前景。

title: ttda704 at SemEval-2026 Task 6: Structured Chain-of-Thought Prompting for Political Evasion Detection
summary: This paper describes our system for SemEval-2026 Task 6, which addresses the classification of political evasion strategies in English question-answer pairs extracted from U.S. presidential interviews. We systematically compare two distinct paradigms: (1) Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Qwen3 models (4B-32B) using QLoRA, enhanced with tiered upsampling and weighted cross-entropy loss to address severe class imbalance, and (2) structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting of reasoning-capable API models, namely DeepSeek-V3.2 and Grok-4-Fast. Our evaluation demonstrates that structured CoT prompting of reasoning-enabled models substantially outperforms our baseline parameter-efficient fine-tuning implementation in absolute Macro F1. Our best system, Grok-4-Fast with extended reasoning and few-shot hierarchical CoT prompting, achieves a Macro F1 of 0.5147 on Subtask 2 (9-class evasion) and 0.7979 on Subtask 1 (3-class clarity), ranking 8th out of 33 teams on Subtask 2 and 13th out of 41 teams on Subtask 1 on the official leaderboard. Furthermore, our ablation studies reveal key insights into effective prompt design for evasion detection: presenting labels within a hierarchical taxonomy helps structure model reasoning, while few-shot exemplars provide task calibration. However, the strongest prompt variants are not statistically distinguishable in Macro F1, and explicitly enabling extended reasoning modes yields substantial performance gains by facilitating the multi-step pragmatic analysis required to detect evasive intent.

AI.tldr: 本文针对美国总统访谈问答对中政治回避策略的分类任务，系统比较了高效微调与结构化思维链提示在模型上的表现。通过实验发现结构化CoT提示显著优于高效微调，最佳模型宏F1分别达到了0.5147和0.7979，并分享了有效提示设计的经验。
AI.motivation: 面对访谈中复杂多样的政治回避策略，需要提升分类模型对复杂推理和语用分析能力，以实现更准确的回避检测。当前主流方法在类别不平衡和模型推理能力方面存在不足，因此本文探索高效微调与大模型推理能力的不同范式。
AI.method: 提出并比较了两大技术路线：(1) 对Qwen3系列模型采用QLoRA进行参数高效微调，并通过分级重采样与加权损失缓解类别不平衡，(2) 基于DeepSeek-V3.2和Grok-4-Fast进行结构化多步思维链(CoT)提示，设计层次化的标签体系和少样本提示，以增强模型推理能力。
AI.result: 结构化CoT提示的推理型大模型在宏F1上显著优于高效微调方案，最佳模型Grok-4-Fast在9分类和3分类任务上分别取得0.5147和0.7979分，并位列官方排行榜前列。消融实验表明，层次化标签体系和少样本提示能有效提升推理与分类效果，延长推理链进一步带来显著收益。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计结构化、多步推理提示能够充分发挥大模型在复杂语用分析中的优势，对提升政治回避策略的自动检测效果具有重要意义，而更强的推理模式是性能提升的关键。

title: Deep Learning in Seismic Interpretation: Federated Advances in Salt Dome Segmentation
summary: Salt-dome delineation is a critical, high-impact task in subsurface geological interpretation, driving decisions in hydrocarbon exploration, reservoir modeling, and drilling safety. While convolutional encoder-decoder architectures have delivered significant improvements in automated salt segmentation, their widespread application is severely limited by data sovereignty concerns, dataset bias, and the scarcity of labeled seismic volumes. This paper introduces FedSaltNet, a Federated Learning (FL) framework explicitly engineered for robust, generalizable, and privacy preserving salt-dome segmentation. We couple a lightweight Small U-Net backbone, chosen for its efficiency and regularization properties with a novel Foreground-Weighted (FG-WEIGHTED) aggregation strategy designed to tackle domain-specific class imbalance. Through an extensive comparative study emulating non-IID conditions across four diverse seismic datasets (TGS, SEAM, F3, GBS), we demonstrate two critical findings: The FG-WEIGHTED algorithm effectively mitigates data heterogeneity, yielding a 4.0% relative improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) over the best conventional FL method. The simple U-Net architecture proved essential, outperforming the higher capacity ResNet-18 U-Net variant by 166% in average IoU, underscoring the necessity of architectural simplicity in data-constrained federated environments. FedSaltNet provides a validated, high-performance solution that establishes the viability of federated deep learning for collaborative, next-generation subsurface interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新的联邦学习（FedSaltNet）框架，实现了高效、隐私保护的盐丘分割，解决了数据主权与数据稀缺等实际难题。
AI.motivation: 自动盐丘分割对于油气勘探和井控等地下地质解释非常重要，但现有方法受限于数据隐私、不同数据集偏差和标注数据匮乏，急需通用且隐私友好的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出了基于轻量U-Net骨干网络的联邦学习框架FedSaltNet，采用独特的Foreground-Weighted(FG-WEIGHTED)聚合策略，有效应对类不平衡和非独立同分布的数据问题；在四个不同地震数据集上进行对比实验，模拟真实的数据异构环境。
AI.result: FG-WEIGHTED聚合方法，使IoU指标比最优的传统联邦学习方法提升了4.0%；小型U-Net结构比ResNet-18 U-Net提升了166%的平均IoU，表明在数据稀缺场景下简单架构的优势。
AI.conclusion: FedSaltNet验证了联邦深度学习在协同和隐私保护下用于地下盐丘分割的有效性和实用价值，推动下一代地球物理智能解释的发展。

title: Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm
summary: Accurate prediction of electrical power consumption is essential for energy-aware motion planning, battery management, and thermal monitoring in battery-powered humanoid robots. This letter presents a physics-based, linear-in-parameters model for the electrical power consumption of the seven-degree-of-freedom left arm of the Unitree~G1 humanoid robot. The proposed formulation combines actuator loss terms with a baseline-torque correction that captures changes in gravity-compensation load and enables accurate prediction of negative net power trajectories. Pairwise interaction terms are introduced to model power coupling during simultaneous multi-joint motion. Model parameters are identified from experimental data collected on a physical Unitree~G1 using onboard power measurements as the regression target. Across 897 trajectories covering single-joint and coordinated arm motions at multiple speed levels, the identified model achieves $R^2 = 0.933$ with an RMSE of 1.07 (W). Validation on 46 trajectories executed at previously unseen speeds yields $R^2 = 0.965$, demonstrating strong generalisation beyond the identification dataset. Analysis of the identified parameters reveals distinct power-consumption characteristics across the arm, with viscous friction dominating most joints (shoulder pitch and all three wrist joints), copper losses dominating shoulder yaw and the elbow, and shoulder roll uniquely dominated by Coulomb friction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Unitree G1仿人机器人左臂的物理驱动型线性参数电力消耗预测模型，并验证其在多种运动情况下具有高度准确性和良好泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 在仿人机器人中，精确预测电力消耗对于节能运动规划、电池与热管理具有重要意义。现有模型在物理可解释性和多关节协调预测方面存在不足，因此有必要提出新模型以提升实际应用价值。
AI.method: 采用物理基础、线性参数化方法建模，结合执行器损耗和基线扭矩修正项以量化重力补偿负载变化，并能准确预测净负功率轨迹。引入关节间相互作用项以描述多关节协同运动下的功率耦合。所有模型参数通过实物机器人实验测量电功耗数据回归获取。
AI.result: 模型在897组不同速度的单关节及多关节协同轨迹上，拟合优度R^2=0.933，均方根误差1.07W；在46组未见过的速度轨迹验证时，R^2=0.965，显示出良好的泛化能力。参数分析揭示臂部各关节电力消耗特性差异。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型能够准确高效地预测七自由度机械臂电力消耗，并揭示不同关节的能量消耗机制，为机器人能耗优化控制与管理提供了理论与实验基础。

title: DYNA : Dynamic Episodic Memory Networks for Augmenting Large Language Models with Temporal Knowledge Graphs in Continuous Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to incorporate new knowledge without forgetting or costly retraining. We propose DYNA, a lightweight framework that augments a frozen LLM with a temporal knowledge graph where events are nodes and temporal relations are directed, timestamped edges. The graph serves as an external, updatable memory. At query time, DYNA retrieves relevant nodes via random walks and centrality measures, then augments the LLM's response. Evaluated on three temporal recall tasks, DYNA reduces catastrophic forgetting by ~7% compared to fine-tuning and improves temporal ordering by ~5% over standard RAG. Higher graph clustering coefficients correlate with better retrieval, showing that graph structure matters. Contributions: (1) episodic memory as temporal KG, (2) retraining-free LLM augmentation, (3) graph properties as predictors of retrieval performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出DYNA框架，通过将时间知识图谱作为外部可更新记忆，增强LLM获取和使用新知识能力，避免灾难性遗忘，并取得了比微调和常规RAG更优的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型（LLM）难以在不遗忘旧知识或高成本再训练的情况下，融入新知识。这极大地限制了其在动态知识环境中的应用。
AI.method: 提出DYNA框架，将事件作为节点、时间关系为带时间戳的有向边构建时间知识图谱，用作LLM的外部记忆。在查询时，通过随机游走和中心性度量检索相关节点，增强LLM推理过程，无需重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在三个时间性回忆任务上，DYNA比LLM微调减少灾难性遗忘约7%，比标准RAG提升时间顺序推理约5%。实验还发现图结构（如聚类系数）和检索性能有正相关关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过将时间知识图谱作为外部可更新记忆，无需LLM重新训练即可动态增强模型知识，避免遗忘，且检索性能与图结构密切相关。这为LLM的长期动态知识管理提供了新路径。

title: Mask Proposal Voting Based on Geodesic Framework for Robust Image Segmentation
summary: Despite great advances, finding accurate segmentation remains a challenging task, especially in scenarios with cluttered backgrounds, complex intensity variations and topology appearance. Minimal path models have exhibited their strong ability in addressing image segmentation tasks. However, the performance of minimal paths-based segmentation approaches is heavily influenced by model initialization, hence limiting their application scope in practice. In this work, we propose a novel mask proposal voting framework that overcomes the major drawback of classical approaches, allowing robust segmentation even in complicated scenarios. Firstly, we introduce an efficient method for constructing adaptive domain cuts as a constraint for initializing the region-based min-cut evolution, by which diverse and reliable mask proposal candidates can be generated, substantially increasing the possibility of accurately covering the objective region by these proposals. Secondly, we propose a new mask voting scheme to build a voting score map encoding the final segmentation information. In contrast to classical path voting methods, our model allows incorporating priors to assign different importance to each individual mask. As a consequence, the proposed segmentation model is capable of accurately delineating object boundaries under complex scenarios, and is insensitive to initialization. Experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art minimal path-based approaches in both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个掩码提议投票框架，通过自适应初始化和掩码投票，有效提升了复杂场景下的分割精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有最短路径模型在图像分割中的表现受限于对初始条件的敏感性，特别是在背景杂乱、强度变化大和拓扑复杂的场景下，分割结果常常不理想。
AI.method: 本文提出：1）基于自适应剪切域的掩码初始化方法，可以生成多样且可靠的掩码建议，增强了准确分割目标区域的概率；2）一种新的掩码投票机制，通过引入先验知识为不同掩码分配不同权重，生成最终的分割分数图。
AI.result: 该方法在各种复杂场景下均能生成准确的目标边界分割结果，并对初始化不敏感。实验结果表明，本文方法在准确率和鲁棒性方面，均超越了现有最优的最短路径分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的掩码建议投票框架显著提升了基于最短路径的分割方法在复杂场景下的表现，对初始分割条件的敏感性大幅降低，具有更广泛的实际应用潜力。

title: Energy-Efficient Arm Reaching for a Humanoid Robot via Deep Reinforcement Learning with Identified Power Models
summary: Humanoid robots performing in-field manipulation tasks, such as robotic apple harvesting, face severe energy constraints that directly limit the number of reaching motions that can be executed per battery charge. This paper presents an end-to-end, energy-aware reinforcement learning framework for the 7-degree-of-freedom left arm of the Unitree~G1 humanoid robot, combining a physics-based, experimentally identified electrical power model with a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) policy trained in a Pinocchio-based rigid-body dynamics simulator. The RL policy operates on an incremental joint-position action space and is trained with a Hybrid Constellation Reward that combines a four-point end-effector constellation distance with a torque-norm energy proxy; after % $5\times10^6$ training it reaches a $69.9\%$ success rate over $1\,000$ random targets in kinematic simulation, at a mean energy of \SI{98.16}{\joule} on successful episodes. Finally, on the physical Unitree~G1, the policy is validated over three independent 10-target batches, achieving a mean energy of $71.5 \pm 48.3$\,J, an end-effector position error of $2.64 \pm 1.04$\,cm, and an orientation error of $6.92 \pm 1.33^\circ$ -- within the \SI{4}{\centi\metre}/$8.6^\circ$ training tolerance. These results constitute a first step toward energy-aware reinforcement-learning-based arm reaching for humanoid robots.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一套面向能耗的强化学习框架，用于提升仿人机器人在实际任务（如摘苹果）时的机械臂运动效率，并在模拟和真实机器人上取得了初步成果。
AI.motivation: 仿人机器人在野外执行操作任务时，受到电池能量限制，影响了机械臂运动次数。提升运动能效可以延长作业时间和任务完成度。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个端到端的强化学习系统，将物理驱动的能耗模型与基于Pinocchio动力学模拟器训练的Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）策略相结合。策略作用于关节增量空间，并设置了兼顾目标精度和能耗的奖励函数。
AI.result: 在动力学仿真中，经过500万次训练，机械臂在随机目标上的成功率为69.9%，平均消耗98.16焦耳能量。实物机器人上，平均能耗为71.5±48.3焦耳，末端执行器位置误差2.64±1.04厘米，姿态误差6.92±1.33度，均在训练容差范围内。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次论证了基于能耗感知的强化学习方法能有效提升仿人机器人机械臂的运动效率和任务完成率，为后续进一步节能与智能化工作奠定了基础。

title: ttda704 at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Modeling Narrative Structures via Pseudonymization and Multi-View Sentence Alignment
summary: We present our approach to SemEval 2026 Task 4: Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Our solution uses contrastive learning with fine-tuned sentence transformers to capture narrative similarity across abstract themes, course of action, and outcomes. We develop two pipelines: (Track A) a single-view method that encodes full narratives with smart layer freezing to reduce overfitting, and (Track B) a multi-view method that models theme, plot, and outcome with view-specific projection heads and self-supervised alignment. Both pipelines build on sentence-transformers models and are trained with contrastive loss on synthetic data. The code is available at the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/dinhthienan33/SemEval2026-Task4-ttda704.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了两种基于对比学习及句子编码器的叙事相似性建模方法，分别用于整体和多视角的叙事表示。
AI.motivation: 叙事相似性任务需要模型能够理解和比较抽象主题、行动路径及结果等复杂结构。现有方法难以充分捕捉这些层次，因此需更强的叙事表示和相似度建模方法。
AI.method: 提出两大方法：1) 单视角方法（Track A），用整体叙事编码，并通过冻结部分层以减少过拟合；2) 多视角方法（Track B），分别建模主题、情节、结果，通过特定投影头和自监督多视角对齐。两法均基于微调的sentence-transformers，使用对比损失函数，训练于合成数据集。
AI.result: 试验表明，提出的方法能有效捕捉并衡量叙事间的相似性，验证了单视角和多视角方法在任务中的有效性和互补性。
AI.conclusion: 基于对比学习和多视角建模的句子编码器是叙事相似性任务的有效方案，适合应对抽象和复杂结构的故事比对场景。

title: FlexPooling with Simple Auxiliary Classifiers in Deep Networks
summary: In computer vision, the basic pipeline of most convolutional neural networks consists of multiple feature extraction layers, where the input signal is downsampled to a lower resolution in each subsequent layer. This downsampling process is commonly referred to as pooling, which is an essential operation in CNNs. Pooling improves robustness against transformations, reduces the number of trainable parameters, increases the receptive field, and lowers computation time. Since pooling is a lossy process but remains important for extracting high-level information from low-level representations, it is important to preserve the most prominent information from previous activations to improve network discriminability. Standard pooling is usually performed using dense pooling methods, such as max pooling or average pooling, or through strided convolutional kernels. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective adaptive pooling method, called FlexPooling, which generalizes average pooling by learning a weighted average over activations jointly with the rest of the network. We further show that attaching Simple Auxiliary Classifiers (SAC) to the CNN improves performance and demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with standard pooling methods. Experiments on multiple popular image classification datasets show that FlexPooling consistently outperforms baseline networks, achieving approximately 1 to 3 percent improvement in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自适应池化方法FlexPooling，结合辅助分类器，可提升CNN图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统池化方法如最大池化、平均池化是CNN中的基础操作，但存在丢失较多信息的问题，影响网络判别能力。该工作旨在保留更显著特征，以提升分类准确率。
AI.method: 提出FlexPooling，通过学习式加权平均自适应聚合激活，同时引入简单辅助分类器（SAC），联合优化提升效果。
AI.result: 在多个主流图像分类数据集上，FlexPooling搭配SAC能带来约1-3%的准确率提升，优于标准池化方式。
AI.conclusion: FlexPooling是一种简单有效的池化改进方法，可提升CNN性能，且易于集成到现有网络结构中。

title: ControlMap: Controllable High-Definition Map Generation for Traffic Scenario Simulation
summary:
Simulation is central to validating autonomous driving systems, yet current pipelines are limited by insufficient scenario diversity due to costly High Definition (HD) map creation. Scaling HD maps requires expensive data collection and manual processing. Moreover, existing generative models lack the fine-grained control necessary to target specific road topologies during generation.
  This paper presents a data-driven pipeline for controllable HD map generation using latent diffusion and ControlNet for spatial conditioning. To our knowledge, we are the first to inject spatial guidance signals into a diffusion model for HD map synthesis. Furthermore, our model supports adjustable conditioning strength through classifier-free guidance and city-level style transfer via city label conditioning. To complement existing metrics, we introduce two novel metrics to evaluate adherence to the control signal and similarity to ground-truth maps. Experiments demonstrate that our model generates realistic HD maps that faithfully follow input road topologies while accurately preserving city-specific details.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型和ControlNet的可控高精地图（HD map）生成方法，有效提升了自动驾驶仿真的场景多样性与地图生成的灵活性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统的仿真验证严重依赖仿真场景，但由于高精地图的制作成本高昂，目前场景多样性受限，缺乏足够丰富且灵活生成方式。如何高效、低成本地生成多样化且可控的高精地图，成为亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 本方法采用数据驱动的潜在扩散模型，并融合ControlNet实现对空间结构的精细可控。模型支持通过classifier-free guidance调整条件控制强度，并通过城市标签实现风格迁移。同时引入了两个用于评估地图生成质量的新指标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提模型能生成符合输入道路拓扑结构的、高度真实且富有城市风格细节的高精地图，在保真性和空间可控性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据驱动、可控高精地图生成管线为自动驾驶仿真的多样化和高效性提供了新方法，显著提升自动驾驶地图生成的自动化水平和现实适应度。

title: On Defining Erasure Harms for NLP
summary: The deployment of NLP systems has raised concerns about harms they might produce, including representational harms. Recent literature has begun to conceptualize and measure one such harm, the harm of erasure. Nevertheless, the field lacks a clear and cohesive conceptual foundation for identifying and measuring erasure. Existing conceptualizations of erasure are often broad -- making it difficult to identify what is needed to establish and measure erasure -- or else specific to particular settings -- facilitating measurement for those settings but potentially challenging to adapt to other settings. To address this gap, we develop and propose a structured definition of erasure that clarifies what components are necessary for establishing whether erasure has occurred, which practitioners need to explicitly articulate and operationalize in order to measure erasure.

AI.tldr: 论文关注NLP系统中的“消除伤害”(erasure harm)，提出了一个结构化定义以更好地识别和测量这种现象。
AI.motivation: 近年来，NLP系统在实际部署中引发了代表性损害等伦理问题。其中，“消除伤害”是一种新近被讨论的危害，但相关概念和测量标准尚不明确，亟需理论基础和通用定义。
AI.method: 作者回顾现有文献中对“消除伤害”的定义，发现相关表述要么过于宽泛，要么过于特定难以推广。为此，作者提出了一个结构化、细致的定义模型，明确哪些成分是判定“消除”是否发生的必要条件，并提出需将该定义具体操作化，以便实践中测量。
AI.result: 提出了结构化定义和指导框架，为实践中识别和衡量“消除伤害”提供了理论与方法支持，更易于跨场景应用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为“消除伤害”的界定和测量提供了关键理论基础和可操作性方案，有望推动NLP伦理伤害测量标准化。

title: Learning Sparse Latent Predictive Foundation Model for Multimodal Neuroimaging
summary: Brain MRIs are routinely acquired as multiple complementary sequences with unique contrast weighting, including T1-weighed imaging (T1w) anatomic and fluid-sensitive T2-weighted (T2w) contrasts. However, methods for learning unified representations across the multitude of MRI contrast mechanisms at health-system scale are lacking. In this study, we introduce Neuro-JEPA, a sparse multimodal neuroimaging foundation model that combines a latent predictive objective with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture to encode brain MRI across core T1w, T2w, and fluid-suppressed FLAIR imaging (FLAIR). We further provide a systematic methodological study of architectural, masking, objective, and sparsity design choices beneficial for robust neuroimaging multimodal representation learning. Neuro-JEPA was pretrained on 1,551,862 scans from 428,647 studies after modality-specific preprocessing with data curation across three core structural brain MRI sequences. We evaluated the learned representations across clinical and research settings, including 25 tasks from three health systems: NYU Langone, NYU Long Island, and Massachusetts General Hospital, and 22 tasks from 12 public datasets, covering unimodal, multimodal and cross-domain evaluation configurations. Across these benchmarks, existing neuroimaging foundation models showed inconsistent gains over a simple convolutional neural network (CNN) baseline, whereas Neuro-JEPA achieved stronger and more consistent performance across all evaluated settings. These results establish a scalable methodological framework for multimodal neuroimaging representation learning and highlight the need for foundation model evaluation protocols that include simple baselines, clinically heterogeneous cohorts and controlled multimodal comparisons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多模态神经影像基础模型Neuro-JEPA，该模型能同时学习和统一不同MRI序列的表征，相较于传统模型，在多项任务和不同数据集上都有更稳定、优秀的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的脑部MRI往往包含多种序列（如T1w、T2w、FLAIR），但缺乏有效的方法在大规模健康系统层面统一学习这些多序列的表征，对推动神经影像智能化分析具有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者提出Neuro-JEPA模型，将稀疏Mixture-of-Experts架构与潜在预测目标结合，用于不同MRI序列（T1w、T2w、FLAIR）的统一编码，并对架构、掩码策略、目标和稀疏性设计进行了系统方法学研究。模型在155万余份扫描的海量数据上预训练，并在多个医学机构和公开数据集的多任务场景下得到评估。
AI.result: 实验显示，主流基础模型在多任务基准测试中效果并不总优于简单CNN，但Neuro-JEPA在所有评估场景下均展现出更好、更稳定的性能。
AI.conclusion: Neuro-JEPA为多模态神经影像表征学习提供了可扩展、有效的方法论框架，强调在模型评估时需包含简单基线、临床异质群体和受控多模态对比。

title: Friction Characterization of a Cable-Driven Differential Actuation System for Lower-Limb Exoskeletons
comment: Accepted for presentation IEEE RAS/EMBS 11th International Conference on Biomedical Robotics and Biomechatronics
summary: Lower-limb exoskeletons require actuation systems that can provide accurate joint torque control while preserving low mass and encumbrance. Conventional architectures often rely on independently actuated joints and joint-level torque sensors, increasing system complexity and weight. This paper presents a novel differential actuation architecture for hip-knee flexion/extension, enabling cooperative torque sharing between two motors via a linear differential mapping between motor and joint. To compensate for transmission losses, a model-based friction estimation strategy is developed and experimentally implemented, allowing accurate joint torque estimation without the need for torque sensors. The proposed solution is validated on a physical prototype, demonstrating the feasibility of sensorless torque estimation in a differentially actuated hip-knee module of a lower-limb exoskeleton.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型差动驱动架构，用于下肢外骨骼髋膝关节，实现无传感器扭矩估算，降低系统复杂度和重量。
AI.motivation: 传统下肢外骨骼依赖于独立驅動關節和关节扭矩传感器，导致系统复杂且质量大，影响穿戴体验和实际应用。
AI.method: 提出了髋-膝屈伸联合的双电机差动驱动架构，通过线性差动映射实现电机协同输出关节扭矩，结合基于模型的摩擦估算补偿传动损失，无需使用关节扭矩传感器即可估算输出扭矩。
AI.result: 通过物理原型实验，验证了在差动驱动髋-膝模块中，采用本方法能够准确估算关节扭矩，且不需要额外传感器。
AI.conclusion: 新型差动驱动架构和无传感器扭矩估算策略可有效降低下肢外骨骼的重量和复杂度，具备良好的应用前景。

title: The Truth Stays in the Family: Enhancing Contextual Grounding via Inherited Truthful Heads in Model Lineages
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have produced many specialized multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) that share common foundational LLMs, forming distinct model lineages. It remains unclear whether a fundamental behavioral link exists between the foundational LLMs and downstream variants. We investigate this question by quantifying head-level context-truthfulness scores. Across diverse LLM and MLLM lineages, including Vicuna-, Qwen2.5-, LLaMA2-, and Mistral-based models, we find that Truth Scores are strongly preserved within model families, even after instruction tuning or multimodal adaptation. We further show that this inheritance is consistent with attention-head weight preservation, and that context-truthful heads attend to query-relevant evidence. Building on this finding, we propose TruthProbe, a soft-gating strategy that amplifies context-truthful heads while preserving other head contributions. TruthProbe improves contextual truthfulness on HaluEval and reduces multimodal hallucination on POPE and CHAIR, with base-LLM Truth Scores transferring effectively to their fine-tuned LLM and MLLM descendants.
