Code is available at https://github.com/miso-choi/TruthProbe.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）及其多模态变体（MLLMs）之间的行为关联，发现上下游模型在“上下文真实性”上表现一致，并提出TruthProbe方法以提升模型真实性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM的发展，许多下游多模态模型都基于同一基础模型改进，但不清楚基础模型的行为特征是否会传承到下游模型。作者希望理解模型家族中真实行为的保留性，以及能否利用这一点改进模型性能。
AI.method: 作者采用head-level的context-truthfulness分数来量化模型的真实性，分析了不同模型家族（包括Vicuna、Qwen2.5、LLaMA2、Mistral等）的表现，并提出TruthProbe策略利用软门控机制增强真实性高的注意力头，同时保留其它注意力头的贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明，无论是基础模型还是经过指令微调/多模态适配的下游模型，其真实性分数在模型家族内部有很强的保留性。TruthProbe显著提升了模型在HaluEval上的真实性，并减少了POPE和CHAIR上的多模态幻觉现象。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型的真实性能力会传递至其下游变体。TruthProbe可以有效提升不同模型家族的真实性水平，具有较强的泛化和实际使用价值。

title: MVEB: Massive Video Embedding Benchmark
summary: We introduce the Massive Video Embedding Benchmark (MVEB), a 23-task benchmark for video embeddings spanning classification, zero-shot classification, clustering, pair classification, retrieval, and video-centric question answering. We evaluate 33 models and find that no single model dominates: MLLM-based embeddings lead on classification, clustering, pair classification, and QA; multimodal binding leads on retrieval and zero-shot classification; generative MLLMs without contrastive adaptation collapse on cross-modal tasks. Paired video-only vs. audio+video evaluations show that audio's contribution depends on dataset annotation provenance: audio helps when labels were produced from both modalities and hurts when they were produced from visuals alone, a six-point gap consistent across model families. MVEB is derived from MVEB+, a 184-task pool, and is designed to maintain task diversity while reducing evaluation cost. It integrates into the MTEB ecosystem for unified evaluation across text, image, audio, and video. We release MVEB and all 184 tasks along with code and a leaderboard at https://github.com/embeddings-benchmark/mteb.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个包含23个任务的视频嵌入基准MVEB，并评估了33个主流模型，总结了模型在不同任务下的表现差异。MVEB整合进MTEB生态系统，统一跨多模态评测，并开放数据和代码。
AI.motivation: 随着大规模多模态模型的发展，缺乏统一且多样化的视频嵌入评测平台，难以全面、公平地比较不同模型的实际能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了含23个代表性任务的MVEB，包括分类、零样本分类、聚类、配对分类、检索和视频QA，并系统性评测33个模型，分析了视觉与音频在不同注释来源数据中的表现。MVEB为MTEB子集，并确保任务多样且降低评测成本。
AI.result: MLLM嵌入在分类、聚类、配对分类和QA任务领先；多模态绑定在检索和零样本分类中表现更好；生成式MLLM在未做对比学习适配的跨模态任务上表现非常差。通过视频与音视频对比，发现音频的助益取决于标注来源：标签融合视听时音频有助，否则有害，且该差异在各模型家族中一致存在。
AI.conclusion: MVEB作为全面的视频嵌入评测基准，能有效兼顾任务多样性和评测效率。其开放性和MTEB整合有助于推动跨模态嵌入模型的研究和公平比较。

title: $λ$-Reachability: Geometric-Horizon Safety Bellman Equations for Humanoid Safety
summary: We introduce $λ$-Reachability, a scalable approach to Hamilton--Jacobi safety analysis for high-dimensional robotic systems. Unlike prior discounted formulations that rely on fixed one-step Bellman updates, $λ$-Reachability employs a stochastic multi-step estimator of the safety value, using a geometrically distributed rollout horizon together with a randomly absorbed terminal. Conceptually analogous to TD($λ$), $λ$-Reachability interpolates between local self-consistency updates and long-horizon max-over-trajectory safety targets via an interpretable horizon-control parameter. Unlike TD($λ$), where the terminal value is always incorporated in learning targets, the terminal safety value in $λ$-Reachability is only used at a probability controlled by parameter $δ$. We formally show that for $δ<1$, the update induces a contraction mapping that allows temporal-difference learning; as $λ\to 1$, the estimator recovers the undiscounted reachability objective. We apply $λ$-Reachability to high-dimensional safety learning problems with both simulated and real humanoid robots under balance and collision avoidance constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that $λ$-Reachability significantly improves both safe-set boundary classification and safety margin estimation compared to single-step temporal-difference baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为λ-Reachability的新方法，能够高效扩展地进行高维机器人系统的Hamilton–Jacobi安全分析，通过多步随机估计实现更优的安全值学习，在安全分类与安全裕度估计上优于传统单步方法。
AI.motivation: 高维机器人在现实任务中需要保证安全性，但现有Hamilton–Jacobi分析方法要么过于保守，要么无法处理维度灾难，因此亟需更高效且可扩展的安全分析工具。
AI.method: λ-Reachability提出采用几何分布长度的rollout和随机终止状态计算多步安全值估计。其方式在原理上类似于TD(λ)，并通过可调参数在本地一致性和长时域目标之间平衡，并区别于TD(λ)的是终端安全值并非每步都加权而是以δ概率选用。理论上证明了对于δ<1，更新是收缩映射，可以使用时序差分学习；当λ趋于1时能近似无折扣的可达性目标。
AI.result: 在高维机器人的平衡与避障等安全控制任务上进行了仿真和实机实验，结果显示λ-Reachability方法在安全边界判别及安全裕度估计上，明显优于传统单步TD基线方法。
AI.conclusion: λ-Reachability为高维机器人提供了一种高效、可调且理论有保障的安全分析新工具，在实际安全学习任务中表现出比现有方法更强的能力。

title: When Correct Edges Cannot Be Verified: A Provenance Gap in Incomplete KGQA and a Provenance-Favoring Completion Policy
summary: Incomplete Knowledge Graph Question Answering (IKGQA) requires completing missing edges to continue reasoning. A growing line of work verifies completed edges against retrieved text, treating textual support as a proxy for edge quality. We ask a question that, to our knowledge, has not been systematically tested: does textual verifiability actually track correctness? Exploiting the gold deleted triples provided by the standard random-deletion protocol, we measure both. The finding is counterintuitive: among gold-correct completed edges, 76-96% have no supporting passage even under exhaustive retrieval, robustly across deletion rates (20%/40%), datasets (CWQ/WebQSP), and relation types (structural, commonsense, long-tail). Most Freebase-style facts simply do not occur as head-tail co-mentions in text. Textual faithfulness therefore measures provenance, not correctness -- separated by a paradigm-level gap no in-corpus retrieval closes. This reframes edge completion. Since most completed edges -- correct or not -- are causally redundant for the answer (95-97% of correct answers do not depend on any unsupported edge), the central question shifts from "is the edge correct?" to "admit or abstain under provenance uncertainty?" Within this framing we present TGComplete, a provenance-favoring admission policy that retrieves evidence at a reasoning breakpoint, verifies a candidate through a lightweight loop, and abstains when support is absent. Against the generate-to-complete baseline GoG, it attains higher edge precision against gold (15-21% vs 3-14%), with no statistically detectable EM loss and 3.1-7.4 times higher strict faithfulness of admitted edges -- at the cost of lower recall. We position TGComplete not as uniformly better, but as a principled point on a precision/provenance-recall trade-off, appropriate when auditability matters.

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考了在不完整知识图谱问答（IKGQA）中，利用文本证据验证补全边的有效性，并提出TGComplete方法，更强调来源可靠性而非仅追求边的正确性。实验发现绝大多数正确补全边实际上没有可检索到的文本支持，提出以可审计性为导向的补全策略。
AI.motivation: 现有IKGQA研究多用文本支持来衡量知识边的质量，但作者提出疑问——文本证据的可验证性是否真的与边的正确性一致？同时，提出现实中知识三元组（如Freebase的事实）很少被直接以头尾共现的方式表达在文本中，动机在于重新审视评估和设计补全机制的核心假设。
AI.method: 通过标准的随机删除协议，利用已知的金标准三元组，统计正确补全边在文本中有无可检索到的支持，并分别在不同数据集/删除率/关系类别下进行详尽实验。随后提出新方法TGComplete：在推理中断点处检索证据，若无支持则选择放弃，强调来源可靠性和可审计属性。
AI.result: 实验显示：76%-96%的金标准正确补全边在文本中找不到任何支持性片段，现有基线方法GoG大多依赖无支撑边，但95-97%正确答案并不依赖这些无支撑边。TGComplete显著提升了已录用边的精度（15-21% vs 3-14%），极大提高严格意义上的来源可靠性，但召回略有降低。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为，IKGQA中的文本可验证性体现的是“来源”而不是“正确性”，需区分两者。文章建议将侧重点转为在有不确定证据来源时选择性“承认或放弃”，而非一味追求高覆盖率。TGComplete适合对溯源与可审计有更高要求的场景，是在准确性/来源可追溯与召回之间的平衡选择。

title: Multi-Modal Attention for Automated Disaster Damage Assessment Using Remote Sensing Imagery and Deep Learning
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in ISPRS Congress 2026 and the 47th Canadian Symposium on Remote Sensing (CSRS 2026) Annals
summary: Timely and accurate disaster damage assessment is crucial for effective emergency response, resource allocation, and recovery. Traditional methods, which often rely on manual inspections or sparse data, are typically slow and error-prone. This paper introduces a novel framework leveraging remote sensing imagery and deep learning to automate building damage classification. Using pre- and post-disaster satellite imagery, our model categorizes buildings into four damage levels: no damage, minor damage, major damage, and destroyed. The core innovation is a multi-modal attention mechanism that fuses bi-temporal features to explicitly detect and assess structural changes. We employ a lightweight ConvNeXT-Tiny backbone to ensure efficient processing without compromising performance. Key contributions include: (1) a cross-attention module for multi-modal data fusion, (2) an optimized preprocessing pipeline for large-scale datasets, and (3) robust data augmentation techniques. Experiments on a large-scale disaster dataset demonstrate an overall classification accuracy of 94.90%. The model effectively discriminates between damage categories and remains resilient to incomplete data. This system significantly improves assessment speed and accuracy, aiding emergency responders in prioritizing interventions. This work advances automated disaster damage detection by integrating multi-temporal imagery with deep learning, offering a scalable solution for real-time response.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合遥感影像和深度学习的新框架，实现了建筑灾害损毁的自动化分类，显著提升了评估速度和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统的灾害损毁评估依赖人工巡查或数据稀疏，耗时且易出错，难以满足紧急响应需求。
AI.method: 利用灾前和灾后卫星影像，结合轻量级ConvNeXT-Tiny骨干网络，设计多模态注意力机制融合双时相特征。提出交叉注意力模块、多模态数据融合、优化数据预处理与数据增强。
AI.result: 在大规模灾害数据集上，整体损毁分类准确率达到94.90%，有效区分四级受损情况，对不完整数据表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统极大提升了评估速度和准确性，有助于应急响应，推动自动化灾害损毁检测向实时、规模化方向发展。

title: Leveraging Deep Learning for Object and Position Recognition of Load Carriers for Autonomous Logistics Vehicles
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, IFAC World Congress2026, \c{opyright} 2026 the authors. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
summary:
This work explores the use of artificial intelligence in mobile robotics to achieve autonomous detection and pose estimation of load carriers for automated pickup. A deep neural network is designed to recognize predefined landmarks on the carrier from RGBD data; these landmarks are then used to compute the carrier's pose. The network operates directly on RGBD images to estimate landmark positions, which form the basis for determining the carrier's location. The approach is validated in extensive experiments and comprises both software and hardware implementations.
  A deep learning-based framework is presented to detect load carriers and estimate their pose for use with autonomous logistics vehicles. Our method uses a convolutional neural network to identify characteristic reference points on the carrier from RGBD input and computes its pose by combining these inferred landmarks with prior geometric knowledge. Experiments show that the resulting accuracy is sufficient for reliable load carrier detection in industrial environments, confirming the suitability of the method for autonomous intralogistics applications.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种结合人工智能与深度学习的移动机器人方法，实现了载重器的自主检测与位姿估计，适用于自动化物流搬运场景。
AI.motivation: 工业自动化和智能物流系统需要机器人能够精准识别和定位载重器，实现无人化搬运作业，提高效率和自动化水平。
AI.method: 设计基于卷积神经网络的深度学习模型，输入为RGBD图像，识别载重器上的特定地标点，通过这些地标点结合先验几何知识推算出载重器的三维位姿。方法包含软硬件结合实现，适用于实际物流车辆和环境。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该方法能在工业环境下提供足够的检测与定位精度，满足自动化物流搬运的需要。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的载重器识别与位姿估计算法，适用于工业自动化物流应用，提高了自动化车辆的作业自主性和可靠性。

title: SciOrch: Learning to Orchestrate Expert LLMs for Solving Frontier Multimodal Scientific Reasoning Tasks
summary: Frontier scientific reasoning remains a major challenge for large language models (LLMs), where even the strongest commercial systems fall short of expert-level performance. A closer look at model behavior reveals substantial complementarity that single-model evaluation hides: different frontier models excel on different question types, and no single model captures the full picture. We present SciOrch, a framework that trains a lightweight 8B model to orchestrate frontier LLMs for scientific reasoning. The orchestrator decomposes each question, delegates sub-problems to selected commercial models through API calls, and synthesizes a final answer. Training such an orchestrator is fundamentally harder than conventional agentic RL: each action triggers an API call that is expensive in both dollar cost and latency, making standard online rollouts infeasible. We address this with MCTS-based approach, producing diverse orchestration trajectories, extracting per-node single-turn samples, and optimizing the orchestrator with GRPO-style training. On a 240-question test set spanning SGI-Reasoning and Scientists' First Exam, SciOrch reaches 56.66% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest single commercial model by 3.74% and the strongest multi-agent baseline by 3.33%. It also attains the best accuracy on both SGI and SFE with less than half the API cost of typical multi-agent methods.

AI.tldr: SciOrch提出了一种高效的编排系统，通过将科学推理任务拆解并分配给不同前沿LLM，显著提升整体表现，超越了单模型和多代理基线，且API成本减半。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在科学推理尤其是前沿问题上仍难以达到专家水平，不同模型各有所长，单一模型难以全面应对。迫切需要一种能够协调多模型优势的方法。
AI.method: 提出SciOrch框架，用轻量级8B模型作为编排器，将复杂科学问题拆解为子问题，选择合适的商用LLM处理，并融合结果。训练编排器采用基于MCTS的方法，结合GRPO式训练，解决了API调用成本高、延迟大的现实问题。
AI.result: 在SGI-Reasoning和Scientists' First Exam的240道测试题上，SciOrch平均准确率为56.66%，比最强单一模型提升3.74%，比最佳多代理基线高3.33%。同时API费用不到多代理方法的一半。
AI.conclusion: 通过模型协同与高效训练策略，SciOrch在科学推理任务上显著超越单一及多代理系统，为经济高效地提升LLM推理能力提供了新思路。

title: ReGenHuman: Re-Generating Human Appearances for Realistic Full-Body Video Anonymization
summary: Anonymizing human-centric video data is an understudied problem. Prior anonymization techniques either blur or redact pixels at the cost of realism and downstream utility, or generate frame-by-frame at the cost of temporal coherence. We introduce ReGenHuman, the first full-body video anonymization pipeline that is simultaneously realistic, temporally consistent, and anonymous by construction. Contrary to past approaches which redact or edit the inputs directly, we propose a regenerate, don't edit paradigm. Our approach composites 2D pose, segmentation, and monocular depth into two complementary conditioning streams - StructAll and StructHuman, which are used to fine-tune a video-to-video diffusion backbone on in-the-wild human videos, synthesizing the human regions entirely from identity-free structural cues. We evaluate our model on privacy, quality, and utility, and show that our ReGenHuman achieves the best tradeoff across all three axes against current baselines. We further show that our anonymized videos remain effective for downstream tasks, including video question answering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ReGenHuman，这是一个用于人物视频匿名化的系统，能同时保证视频的真实性、时序一致性和匿名性，在多个方面优于既有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频匿名化方法要么影响视频真实性和后续应用价值（如模糊、遮挡），要么逐帧生成导致时序不连贯，缺乏兼顾三者的方案。
AI.method: ReGenHuman采用“再生成替代直接编辑”的新范式，融合2D姿态、分割、单目深度信息形成两路结构条件（StructAll和StructHuman），以此在video-to-video扩散模型上微调，生成完全不含原身份特征的人物区域。
AI.result: 在隐私保护、视频质量和后续任务应用三方面，ReGenHuman较现有基线均有更好平衡，尤其在下游如视频问答等任务中也保持较好效果。
AI.conclusion: ReGenHuman为视频匿名化提供了一种有效、实用的解决方案，兼顾隐私、真实感和后续分析任务的需求，提升了现有人物视频数据保护的水平。

title: A Smart-Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO State Estimation
comment: This work has been accepted for presentation/publication at the 2026 IEEE Canadian Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering (CCECE). The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Reliable state estimation in robotics and control re quires balancing estimation accuracy against computational cost. While filtering-based methods such as the Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) provide efficient real-time updates, and optimisation based formulations using factor graphs improve global consistency, the role of optimisation scheduling is often treated implicitly rather than examined as an explicit design variable. This paper presents an experimental study that explicitly isolates optimisation scheduling using a Smart Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO framework as a controlled testbed. By combining EKF-based state propagation with periodically invoked batch optimisation and holding solver structure and effort fixed, the main contribution of this work is the experimental characterisation of optimisation scheduling as an independent design variable governing the trade-off between intermediate estimation accuracy and computational cost. Simulation results in a planar SLAM environment show that scheduling strongly influences pre optimisation drift, transient error behaviour, and runtime. In particular, the results identify operating regimes in which most of the benefit of global optimisation can be retained at a fraction of the computational cost, highlighting optimisation scheduling as an under-explored yet critical consideration in hybrid state estimation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究，明确了优化调度对机器人和控制系统状态估计的影响，提出调度设计可独立权衡估计精度和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有状态估计算法在估计精度与计算效率之间存在权衡。虽然EKF能实时高效更新，基于图优化的全局一致性较好，但优化调度通常被隐含处理，缺乏系统研究。为此，需将优化调度作为独立设计变量进行分析。
AI.method: 提出并采用了Smart Scheduled Hybrid（SSH）EKF-FGO框架，将EKF状态传播和周期性批量优化相结合，并固定求解器结构与优化计算量，通过模拟平面SLAM任务，系统考察不同优化调度策略对性能的影响。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，优化调度强烈影响预优化漂移、瞬时误差表现和运行时间。实验明确指出，在合适的调度下可用较低计算成本获得几乎全部全局优化的效果。
AI.conclusion: 优化调度是混合状态估计系统中一个关键但被低估的设计要素，合理调度可大幅提升效率与精度的折中表现。

title: Free Energy Heuristics: Fast-And-Frugal Cognition as Active Inference Under Uncertain Precision
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) improves large language models' performance in math and symbolic reasoning. But on planning, contested ethics, and tasks where the model cannot check itself, more reasoning makes things worse. Both effects are documented; what has been missing is a principled account of which property decides the outcome. We argue it is meta-uncertainty: how unsure the model is about the reliability of its own evidence. When that uncertainty is high, extra reasoning stops adding signal and starts manufacturing false confidence. We prove that the policy minimizing expected free energy under uncertain precision stops integrating cues after a finite number of high-validity ones when the precision prior is heavy-tailed (Theorem 2.6.1), and under a Descending Dominance condition, is sample-wise identical to take-the-best (Theorem 2.7.4). Fast-and-frugal heuristics and active inference are, then, two descriptions of the same computation. The prediction is that on high-meta-uncertainty items, longer CoT should degrade accuracy. We score the regime per item (simulate-and-recover rho > 0.96), build FEH-79, a benchmark of Knightian frames with matched controls, and run a pre-registered study across seven models (five open-weight 3B-32B, two frontier), five CoT lengths, and 7,875 responses. The gate, fixed before any data, required a negative interaction with posterior probability above 0.95 and an accuracy drop of more than 6 points. It held. The high-regime drop is 17.3 points (95% CI [7.7, 25.5]); matched items with definite answers show no cost. The effect is regime-dependent: decisive in capable mid-to-large models, directional in the two frontier systems, absent-to-reversed in the weakest. The framework answers when CoT helps and unifies the Bayesian and fast-and-frugal traditions: less-is-more effects are evidence about the meta-uncertainty regime, not against Bayesian cognition.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了在某些任务中（如规划、伦理决策等）思维链（Chain-of-thought, CoT）方法反而会降低大模型准确率，提出“元不确定性”是决定CoT效果的关键属性，并通过理论和实验证实。
AI.motivation: 虽然CoT方法在数学和符号推理领域提升了大模型效果，但在需要自我校验或面对高不确定性证据的任务上，CoT反而会导致更差的结果。此前缺乏对这种现象背后原理的系统解释，论文试图弥补此空白。
AI.method: 作者用贝叶斯理论推导和启发式决策分析，证明当模型对自身证据可靠性（即元不确定性）较高时，额外推理反而制造虚假自信。创新性地提出模拟—恢复实验方法，建立FEH-79基准，并对多套模型、多种任务和推理步骤长度进行了广泛、预注册的实证测试。
AI.result: 实证表明：在高元不确定性任务上，增加CoT长度会大幅降低模型准确率（下降17.3个百分点），而在有确定答案的任务上则无影响；该效应在中大型模型最显著。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出了元不确定性作为CoT有效性的判别准则，统一了贝叶斯认知和启发式理论，表明“多即是少”效应其实反映的是高元不确定性而非反对贝叶斯模型。

title: NEXUS: Neural Energy Fields for Physically Consistent Contact-Rich 3D Object Dynamics
summary: Physics-grounded video generation requires controllable 3D object dynamics that remain physically consistent under contact, deformation, and external forcing. Existing trajectory-based methods often model isolated physical effects, making it difficult to compose conservative and non-conservative dynamics in contact-rich 3D scenes. We present NEXUS, a neural energy-field framework for contact-rich 3D object dynamics. NEXUS represents each object as a structural graph and constructs dynamic object-object and object-environment contact graphs. Inspired by Hamiltonian Neural Networks, NEXUS formulates motion through scalar energy and dissipation terms rather than directly predicting states or accelerations. Conservative effects, including gravity and elastic deformation, are composed as additive energy terms, while non-conservative effects such as damping and impact-induced energy loss are modeled with learned Rayleigh-style dissipation. Forces are derived by differentiating the energy and dissipation functions and rolled out with a multi-substep semi-implicit integrator. Across controlled trajectory benchmarks, NEXUS improves long-horizon accuracy over representative learned and physics-structured dynamics baselines under varying mechanical properties and physical-effect compositions. We further show that NEXUS trajectories provide effective guidance for contact-rich video generation, improving physical plausibility while maintaining competitive visual quality.

AI.tldr: NEXUS提出了一种基于能量场的神经网络框架，用于处理3D场景中复杂的物体动态模拟，特别是在存在接触、形变和外力的情况下，实现了对能量守恒与非守恒动力学的统一建模，并在视频生成和动力学基准任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的轨迹预测方法通常只能模拟物理中的单一效果，难以同时处理例如能量守恒（如重力、弹性形变）和非守恒力（如阻尼、碰撞损耗）的复杂3D接触场景。为此，亟需一个能统一建模多种物理效应，并具备物理一致性的视频生成方法。
AI.method: NEXUS 将每个物体建模为结构图，同时建立物体间及与环境的动态接触图。借鉴Hamiltonian Neural Networks，通过能量（守恒项）和耗散（非守恒项）标量函数建模物体动力学，而不是直接预测状态或加速度。通过对能量和耗散函数求导得到力，并采用多子步半隐式积分器进行动态展开。
AI.result: 在受控轨迹基准测试中，NEXUS在不同机械属性与复杂物理效应组合条件下，相较于主流学习型和物理结构化动力学方法，实现了更高的长时预测精度。同时，NEXUS生成的轨迹为基于物理的视频生成任务提供了有效指引，提高了视频的物理合理性和视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: NEXUS通过统一受力建模和高效物理模拟，实现了对接触丰富的3D动力学场景的高准确度、强物理一致性的建模，为物理导向的视频生成开拓了新思路。

title: A Deployment Case Study in Robotic Apparel Automation: Digital Twin Integration, Interoperability, and Workforce Enablement
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop Paper
summary: Despite steady advances in flexible automation in sectors such as electronics and automotive manufacturing, apparel automation remains challenging because fabrics are deformable and difficult to manipulate with robots. This paper presents a deployment-oriented case study of a robotic sewing system for denim manufacturing, emphasizing the system-level integration required for practical adoption. At the engineering level, a digital thread module parses DXF production drawings into process parameters and executable robot trajectories, reducing manual programming effort and enabling rapid re-targeting across sewing operations. In parallel, a digital twin of the workcell is used during pre-deployment to validate reach and clearance, refine layout and sequencing, evaluate operator access, and assess cycle-time compatibility with upstream and downstream tasks, thereby reducing commissioning risk. At deployment, the system integrates a collaborative robot with conventional sewing equipment, welding, suction fixtures, and machine-level controllers through an interoperability layer. Runtime monitoring and verification, including seam monitoring, collision checking, and trajectory-level validation, improve robustness under environmental variability, while operator-facing training and guidance tools support setup, troubleshooting, and technology adoption. Two staged factory deployments on denim shorts, covering 2D pocket operations and 3D garment-shaping seams, show that digital-twin-based validation, digital-thread-driven task generation, interoperability, runtime verification, and operator training are important for scaling robotic apparel automation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种面向实际部署的牛仔布机器人缝纫系统，通过数字化工艺、数字孪生验证、互操作集成和操作员支持，成功实现了在工厂中的部分流程自动化，从而推动了服装行业自动化的规模化应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管电子和汽车等行业的自动化实现顺利，但由于布料易变形、难以用机器人精确操控，服装制造的自动化仍充满挑战。作者希望通过系统集成和数字化手段，突破服装自动化的难题。
AI.method: 1) 工程层面：开发了数字化工艺流程，将DXF生产图纸自动解析为机器人可执行轨迹，节省编程、人力。2) 利用数字孪生模拟工位，优化布局、动作和产线衔接。3) 部署时集成协作机器人、缝纫、焊接及吸附装置，并通过统一互操作接口控制。4) 实时监控、碰撞校验与操作员培训等。5) 在工厂对2D口袋缝制和3D成型两大应用场景进行测试。
AI.result: 在两个牛仔短裤工厂应用中，系统可自动完成部分2D口袋缝制和3D衣片成型，证明数字孪生、自动任务生成和集成控制能显著提高柔性与效率，降低调试及人力成本。
AI.conclusion: 想要将机器人自动化大规模引入服装制造业，需高度重视数字孪生验证、自动化工艺生成、设备互操作、实时监控和操作员赋能，这些措施显著提升了部署成功率和实际生产可行性。

title: Koshur Diacritizer: A Byte-Level Sequence-to-Sequence Model for Kashmiri Diacritic Restoration
summary: Kashmiri, an Indo-Aryan language written in a modified Perso-Arabic script, frequently omits diacritic marks in digital text, creating ambiguity and challenging downstream NLP applications. We present Koshur Diacritizer, a ByT5-small byte-level sequence-to-sequence model for restoring diacritics in Kashmiri text. To support this task, we release a publicly available dataset of 23.7k aligned undiacritized diacritized Kashmiri sentence pairs. The proposed framework combines script-aware normalization, alignment validation, and skeleton-preserving inference to ensure reliable restoration while maintaining the original base-letter sequence. Experimental results on a held-out test set achieve a DERm of 0.2012 and a WER of 0.2159. Additionally, evaluation by a native Kashmiri linguistic expert yields a mean accuracy of 77.5%. The dataset, model, and source code are publicly released to provide a reproducible baseline for Kashmiri diacritic restoration and future low-resource language research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ByT5-small的序列到序列模型（Koshur Diacritizer）用于恢复喀什米尔文电子文本中的省略附标（发音符号），并发布了配套公开数据集、源代码和模型。
AI.motivation: 喀什米尔语在电子文本中常常省略附标，造成歧义，影响自然语言处理（NLP）任务的效果，缺乏相关公开资源和研究。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含2.37万对未加附标与加附标句子的对齐数据集，采用ByT5-small字节级序列到序列模型，结合脚本感知归一化、对齐验证和骨架保持推理等技术确保附标恢复的准确性和基础字母完整。
AI.result: 在保留测试集上模型得到DERm为0.2012，WER为0.2159，经母语语言学专家评估平均准确率为77.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够较好地自动恢复喀什米尔语附标，公开的数据、模型和代码为附标恢复及低资源语言研究提供了可复现的基线。

title: Towards Global AI-Driven Cervical Cancer Screening
summary: The global elimination of cervical cancer is a key public health goal set by the World Health Organization (WHO), with screening programs reducing mortality by up to 80%. However, access to experts and biopsy services is limited in low- to middle-income countries (LMICs). Deep learning (DL)-based algorithms offer promising support for screening, but most existing approaches have been developed and validated on private datasets from single countries. We present the first DL-based approach to cervical cancer screening validated on data from multiple countries. Technically, we phrase the problem of detecting and classifying lesions in colposcopy images as a multi-task learning problem, in which we simultaneously perform image-level classification and lesion segmentation. Our model was trained on a private data set of acid stain colposcopy images with manually generated lesion segmentation masks and corresponding histopathological results, employing extensive data augmentation to address image variability. In an in-distribution validation with pathology results serving as ground truth, our algorithm outperformed medical experts (Balanced Accuracy: 0.68 vs 0.64) in CIN1- (Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia grade 1 or lower) versus CIN2+ (grade 2 or higher) classification. External validation on four colposcopy data sets from four countries featuring radical differences in prevalence and patient characteristics yielded superior performance of our method compared to baseline methods. Performance variability across countries was high with AUC values ranging from 0.54 - 0.80. Overall, algorithm performance varied with age, transformation zone (cervical area most prone to lesion development), presence of comorbidities and pathognomonic signs, with comorbidities having by far the largest negative effect. Future work should focus on improving model robustness and generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的宫颈癌筛查算法，并首次在多国数据集上进行了验证，显示出其优于医学专家以及基准方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 世界卫生组织提出消除宫颈癌的全球目标，但很多低中收入国家缺乏专家和活检资源，目前深度学习方法多基于单一国家私有数据开发，缺乏多国验证，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 将宫颈镜图像中病变的检测和分类建模为多任务学习，同时进行图像级分类和病变分割。模型在含有手工分割掩码和病理金标准的私有酸染宫颈镜图像数据集上训练，通过大量数据增强提高泛化能力，并在四个国家的公开数据集上进行了外部验证。
AI.result: 在以病理为金标准的验证中，算法在CIN1-与CIN2+分类上优于医学专家（平衡准确率：0.68 vs 0.64），在四个国家的外部数据集上也优于基线方法。不同国家间的AUC差异较大（0.54-0.80），且模型表现受年龄、转化区、共病等影响，尤其是共病影响最大。
AI.conclusion: 该深度学习方法在多国数据验证中表现优异，但存在因患者特征和资料异质性导致的性能差异，未来需进一步提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Scaling Short-Term Memory of Visuomotor Policies for Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: Many robotic tasks require short-term memory, whether it's retrieving an object that's no longer visible or turning off an appliance after a set period. Yet, most visuomotor policies trained via imitation learning rely only on immediate sensory input without using past experiences to guide decisions. We present PRISM, a transformer-based architecture for visuomotor policies to effectively use short-term memory via two key components: (i) gated attention, which filters retrieved information to suppress irrelevant details, improving performance by reducing the spurious correlations between the history and current action prediction, (ii) a hierarchical architecture that first compresses local information into compact tokens and then integrates them to capture temporally extended dependencies, improving its compute and memory footprint. Together, these mechanisms enable us to scale short-term memory in visuomotor policies for up to two minutes. To systematically evaluate memory in visuomotor control, we introduce ReMemBench -- a benchmark of eight diverse household manipulation tasks spanning four categories of short-term memory -- designed to foster general memory mechanisms rather than siloed, task-specific solutions. PRISM consistently outperforms prior works, including recurrent architectures, transformers, and their variants -- achieving an absolute improvement of 5%--12% over the strongest baseline. On the RoboCasa and LIBERO benchmarks, it achieves absolute improvements of 11%--15% over its no-memory variant and fine-tuned Vision-Language-Action baselines such as GR00T-N1-3B and OpenVLA, despite not leveraging any large-scale pretraining. Together, PRISM and ReMemBench establish a foundation for developing and evaluating short-term memory-augmented visuomotor policies that scale to long-horizon tasks. Additional materials are available at https://shahrutav.github.io/short-term-memory

AI.tldr: 提出了PRISM，一种基于transformer的视觉运动政策架构，实现高效短期记忆利用，并引入了ReMemBench基准，实验性能明显优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人视觉运动任务常需短期记忆，但大多数模仿学习方法仅依赖当前感知输入，缺乏对历史信息的有效利用，导致任务表现受限。
AI.method: 1）采用gated attention过滤无关历史信息，减少无效关联；2）利用分层结构，先将局部信息压缩为紧凑token，再整合捕捉长时间依赖，提升算力与内存效率。实验引入ReMemBench基准，系统评估短期记忆能力。
AI.result: PRISM在8项代表性家庭操作任务中全面超过现有循环结构、transformer及其变体，较最强基线绝对提升5%-12%。在RoboCasa和LIBERO数据集上较无记忆和主流视觉语言动作基线提升11%-15%，无需大规模预训练。
AI.conclusion: PRISM结合分层结构与gated attention，为短期记忆增强的视觉运动策略奠定了基础，并通过ReMemBench推动该领域系统性进步。

title: Neuron Level Analysis of Large Language Model in Legal Domain Reasoning
summary: We presented a neuron-level analysis of legal-domain reasoning in LLMs, comparing it with other applied domain tasks across seven open-weight models. Using neuron attribution scores to rank and suppress influential neurons, we confirmed that suppressing the identified neurons collapses accuracy on the target task, whereas suppressing the same number of random neurons does not. We further found a small subset of neurons influential across all seven tasks; once these are removed, suppressing the remaining neurons degrades only the task they were identified from, revealing genuinely task-specific neurons in every model studied. Within the legal domain, the three benchmarks exhibit relatively high neuron overlap and tend to be affected jointly, suggesting of legal components neurons that span jurisdictions. The distribution of identified neurons in our experiments suggests that the hypothesis that influential neurons are concentrated in middle MLP layers may depend on the input format and content, rather than being a universal phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了LLMs在法律领域推理任务中的神经元表现，并与其它领域任务进行了比较，发现法律任务存在跨任务影响力神经元和特定任务神经元。
AI.motivation: 理解和解析大模型在不同领域任务中，尤其是法律推理这一复杂专业领域下，哪些神经元起到关键作用，有助于模型解释性与迁移能力的研究。
AI.method: 通过对七个开源大模型进行神经元归因分数计算，筛选、排名并抑制高影响力神经元，比较任务表现变化。分析影响力神经元在不同任务和模型中的分布与重叠情况。
AI.result: 抑制高归因得分神经元会导致法律推理等任务准确率骤降，而随机抑制同数量神经元无类似影响。此外，发现所有任务共有一小部分影响力神经元，而剩余则为任务专属神经元。法律多个基准任务间神经元重叠度高。
AI.conclusion: 法律推理有跨任务公共神经元与专业神经元，任务相关神经元在不同层的分布受输入格式影响，不一定集中于中层MLP。法律领域任务还涉及跨司法区神经元，揭示LLM神经元结构复杂需求。

title: Gaussian Spatial Priors for Anatomy-Aware Object Detection in Surgical Videos
summary: Detecting anatomical structures in surgical video is essential for intraoperative safety frameworks such as the Critical View of Myopectineal Orifice (CVMPO) in inguinal hernia repair. While prominent structures like the Cooper's Ligament and Triangle of Doom are reliably detected by standard methods, smaller structures such as the epigastric vessels remain challenging due to their visual ambiguity and intermittent visibility. We observe that the spatial relationship between structures is anatomically constrained, and propose a Gaussian Spatial Prior (GSP) module that encodes this relationship as a compact, parametric bias injected into the self-attention of a DAB-DETR decoder. The prior is computed offline from training annotations as a small set of frozen Gaussian parameters and recomputed at each decoder layer using the iteratively refined reference points. On a dataset of inguinal hernia repair videos with 5-fold cross-validation, GSP improves dependent class detection by $+33.5\%$ ($\text{AP}_{50}$) over DAB-DETR and $+53.9\%$ over YOLOv26, while also improving anchor detection by $+6.0\%$. These gains are statistically significant across all folds ($p=0.012$, paired $t-$test).

AI.tldr: 本文针对腹股沟疝修复手术视频中解剖结构的检测提出改进方法，对难以识别的小型结构（如腹壁下血管）检测表现显著提升。
AI.motivation: 在手术中，精确检测所有关键解剖结构对于患者安全至关重要。虽然主流方法能识别像Cooper韧带和‘厄运三角’等显著结构，但对较小、边界模糊且时隐时现的结构（例如腹壁下血管）往往难以检测。因此，提升这些结构的检测准确率存在重要需求。
AI.method: 作者观察到结构之间的空间关系受解剖学约束，于是提出了高斯空间先验（GSP）模块，将这种空间关系以紧凑的参数化先验形式融入DAB-DETR解码器的自注意力机制。该先验通过训练标注离线获取，并在每一层解码器中动态重计算，结合逐步优化的参考点以增强小结构的识别能力。
AI.result: 在腹股沟疝修复手术视频数据集和5折交叉验证中，GSP模块对依赖类检测的AP50指标相较原始DAB-DETR提升了33.5%，相较YOLOv26提升53.9%；对锚点检测提升了6.0%。所有提升均具统计学意义（p=0.012）。
AI.conclusion: 高斯空间先验作为解剖结构间空间关系的有效建模方式，能够显著增强手术场景下小型、难以检测结构的识别率，为术中安全监控提供技术保障。

title: ATHENA: Accelerated Multi-Task Heterogeneous Influence Functions for Robot Data Curation
summary: In robot imitation learning, influence functions provide a principled approach to quantify each demonstration's effect on robot task outcomes, yet scaling them to billion-parameter Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models is limited by computational and multitask bottlenecks. To this end, we propose ATHENA, an influence function framework tailored for multitask VLA data curation at a billion-parameter scale. Concretely, it leverages the Kronecker structure of linear-layer gradients to reduce projection cost, and approximates dense Hessian inversion with a rank-r Random Truncated Approximation, achieving about a 313.4x speedup in influence computation. Furthermore, ATHENA formulates global and local interactive influence to balance data curation across 50 jointly trained tasks. Extensive evaluations on RoboTwin 2.0 and real-robot deployment, covering 9.34 and 6.90 hours of demonstrations, respectively, show that ATHENA matches or exceeds full-data joint fine-tuning using only 50% of demonstrations in simulation and 66.7% of data across six real-robot tasks. Overall, ATHENA demonstrates its effectiveness for data curation in billion-parameter multitask VLA fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ATHENA框架，有效将影响函数用于大规模多任务视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的数据筛选，大幅提升了计算效率，并在多个任务和真实机器人验证其优越性。
AI.motivation: 传统影响函数在机器人模仿学习中虽理论完备，但在百亿参数级VLA模型中，面临计算速度慢和多任务处理能力有限的问题。为解决这一瓶颈，亟需能在大规模和多任务场景下高效运用影响函数的方法，以提升数据筛选和模型训练效率。
AI.method: ATHENA提出利用线性层梯度的Kronecker结构降低投影计算代价，并用Rank-r随机截断近似法高效地逼近Hessian矩阵逆，从而显著加速影响函数计算。同时，ATHENA设计了全球与局部的交互式影响衡量指标，实现50项任务的数据筛选平衡。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0仿真环境和实际机器人部署中，ATHENA仅用50%-66.7%的训练演示数据，便能达到或超越基于全部数据联合微调的效果，影响计算速度提升约313倍。
AI.conclusion: ATHENA框架证明了在超大规模多任务VLA模型微调中进行高效数据筛选的有效性和优越性，为机器人物理智能模型的高效训练提供了新思路。

title: BALTO: Balanced Token-Level Policy Optimization for Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Hallucinations remain a major obstacle to deploying large language models (LLMs) in knowledge-intensive settings, where generated responses must be faithfully grounded in provided evidence. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising direction for hallucination mitigation, but response-level faithfulness rewards suffer from a granularity mismatch: localized hallucinations can cause supported content to receive spurious penalties. Although recent work introduces fine-grained feedback such as claim-level verification and token-level rewards, unbalanced credit assignment can still induce length, verbosity, or optimization-noise biases. We propose BALTO, a Balanced Token-level Policy Optimization framework for hallucination mitigation. BALTO extracts checkable factual claims, verifies them against the reference context, and projects claim-level judgments to token-level labels. A balanced token-level credit assignment mechanism is introduced into the framework. This design redistributes probability mass from unsupported content toward faithful content, rather than suppressing the entire response. We systematically analyze the limitations of response-level rewards from a theoretical standpoint, and prove BALTO's advantages in training stability and optimization efficiency for hallucination mitigation. Experiments on ConFiQA, RAGTruth, and FinLLM-Eval show that BALTO achieves the highest faithfulness across all six model--benchmark settings and consistently outperforms existing post-training baselines in Q-Score, demonstrating a stronger faithfulness--informativeness trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BALTO框架，通过更平衡的token级别优化减少大模型幻觉，在知识密集型任务中效果优异。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在知识密集型应用中容易出现“幻觉”，导致生成内容与事实不符，尤其是在答案需要基于具体证据时，这成为实际部署的主要障碍。当前采用的RL方法粒度过大，容易因局部幻觉错误而整体惩罚，影响模型表现。
AI.method: 作者提出BALTO框架，引入细粒度的token级信用分配机制。首先，模型提取可验证的事实型claim，并检验其与参考上下文的一致性，然后将claim级别的评判映射到token级别的标签，通过平衡的概率分配，引导模型“将概率质量”从不可靠token转向可靠token，同时理论分析了响应级别奖励的不足。
AI.result: 在ConFiQA、RAGTruth和FinLLM-Eval等数据集和六组模型基准上，BALTO在faithfulness指标（如Q-Score）上全面优于其它后训练方法，同时在忠实性与信息量的权衡上表现优秀。
AI.conclusion: BALTO通过构建平衡的token级优化框架，有效缓解幻觉问题，提高了生成内容与事实的一致性，同时保持了信息量，为知识密集型场景下LLM的部署提供了更可靠的技术路径。

title: Bridging Geographic Bias in Urban Streetscape Inference via Lifelong Learning with Visual-Semantic Pivoting
summary: Visual perception of urban streetscapes underpins evidence-based decisions in landscape planning, public health, and place-making. Yet models trained on a few well-photographed metropolises systematically misjudge underrepresented districts, propagating geographic bias into downstream policy. We address this gap with HVSP-LL, a lifelong learning framework that couples a stratified visual-semantic pivoting module with an equity-aware rehearsal mechanism. The pivoting module organises landscape concepts along a three-tier ontology (macro structure, meso composition, micro element) and aligns image features to learnable semantic anchors at each tier, providing transferable representations that resist distributional drift. The lifelong adaptation component sequentially absorbs new urban regions while constraining inter-region perception gaps through a worst-region sample-reweighting objective and a structurally-aware exemplar buffer. We evaluate HVSP-LL on a panoramic streetscape benchmark assembled from twelve cities across four continents and seven perceptual dimensions. The framework attains 0.834 Spearman correlation on the held-out city sequence, an absolute 6.1 point improvement over the strongest continual baseline, and shrinks the inter-city perception gap to 0.094 -- a 38% reduction relative to the strongest continual baseline (0.151) and a 57% reduction relative to a representative regularisation baseline (0.218). Ablations confirm that each tier of the pivoting hierarchy contributes monotonically, and the equity-aware rehearsal converts mean backward transfer from -0.038 (without retention) to +0.013, eliminating catastrophic forgetting on the held-out sequence. Our results indicate that hierarchical anchoring is a practical pathway toward geographically equitable streetscape inference at city scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向城市街景感知的终身学习框架HVSP-LL，有效减少了地理区域偏见，并提升了不同城市间的感知准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前城市街景视觉感知模型往往仅在照相较多的大都市训练，导致在代表性不足的城区表现不佳，并在实际政策制定中扩散地理偏见。作者希望通过新的方法解决模型在不同地理区域间的泛化能力与感知公平性不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出HVSP-LL终身学习框架，包括分层视觉-语义对齐模块和具备公平性的回放机制。该模块采用三层本体（宏观结构-中观组合-微观元素）对景观概念分级，并在每层通过语义锚点实现特征对齐，获得可迁移表征。终身适应部分，通过最差区域样本重加权目标和结构感知样本缓冲，依次学习新城市街景，同时约束区域间感知差异。
AI.result: 基于跨四大洲十二个城市、七大感知维度的街景全景测试集，HVSP-LL在保留城市序列上的斯皮尔曼相关系数为0.834，比目前最优的持续学习基线提升6.1个百分点，并将城市间感知差距从0.218降低至0.094。分解实验证明每层分层机制均有正贡献，公平回放机制有效避免遗忘，提高历史区域表现。
AI.conclusion: 分层锚定和公平感知机制为城市尺度上地理公平的街景自动感知提供了可行路径，有助于提升城市规划、公共健康等场景下的决策公正性。

title: PolyMerge: Compressing 3D Gaussian Splats with Polytope Coverings for Provably Safe Resource-Constrained Navigation
summary: Obstacle avoidance is essential for safe navigation and motion planning. Recent radiance field reconstruction methods enable object detection and modeling with high fidelity, but remain too memory- and compute-intensive for on-board perception-based path planning. To address these limitations, we propose PolyMerge to convert a large, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) model of a scene into a lightweight representation of convex polytopes whose union provably over-approximates all obstacles in the original 3DGS model. PolyMerge tunes the polytope count to trade off conservativeness and compute cost, and integrates with control barrier functions (CBFs) to plan collision-free paths. We showcase PolyMerge in simulation and hardware experiments on a Crazyflie drone, which uses PolyMerge to compute and follow safe trajectories in real time under severe onboard compute constraints, outperforming baselines in speed while guaranteeing safety. For our code and videos, visit https://athlon76.github.io/PolyMerge-website/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PolyMerge方法，将高保真的3D高斯发射模型(3DGS)转化为凸多面体的轻量级表示，实现了对障碍物的有效近似和路径规划优化。在Crazyflie无人机上的实验表明，PolyMerge在确保安全的前提下大幅减少了计算负载并提升了速度。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D辐射场重建能够高保真建模和检测障碍物，但现有方法对计算和内存资源要求极高，难以应用于资源受限平台的实时路径规划。因此，亟需一种既轻量、又能保证安全避障的表示方法。
AI.method: PolyMerge方法将庞大的3DGS障碍物模型简化为若干凸多面体，保证所有障碍物都被完整包围。该方法可通过调节多面体数量权衡表示的保守性与计算开销，并结合控制屏障函数(CBFs)进行避障路径规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和实际无人机硬件实验中，PolyMerge不仅能在计算资源有限的情况下实现实时避障，还比传统方法具有更高的速度，同时可以严格保证路径安全性。
AI.conclusion: PolyMerge实现了高效、可靠的轻量化障碍物建模与路径规划，兼具速度和安全性，适合部署在计算资源受限的平台上，是现有3D重建方法的重要补充。

title: Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations
comment: 23 pages including appendices. Code, benchmark, and adapters released under MIT at https://github.com/deeplethe/lethe
summary:
Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers. Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfuscation, 0% on cross-lingual); inscribe-time LLM recovers canonicalization (100%) but cannot help intent-aware deletion (0% on prefix-collision and compound-fact); a mutation-time hook recovers intent-aware deletion (78-85%) and brightens nearly all categories simultaneously (91.7-93.2% overall, $0.17 per 385-case run, 2.3s/case mutation latency vs. 64-191ms/case deterministic, recall path unchanged).
  We expose the trade-off via ForgetEval, a 1000-case templated suite plus a 385-case adversarial layer (132 hand-crafted + 253 LLM-drafted oracle-validated) scored by deterministic substring match, paired with a six-method Adapter Protocol with honest N/A scoring that lets heterogeneous memory stores enter in 130 lines. Admission is corroborated by 10-annotator IAA (Fleiss' kappa = 0.958) and a 77-case external-authored subset (four blind contributors) that replicates the canonicalization asymmetry and amplifies the joint-placement lift (+27.8 pt). Production failures are predominantly forgetting failures rather than recall failures, yet existing benchmarks measure only recall. ForgetEval and all adapters are released under MIT.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了大语言模型（LLM）在智能体记忆管道中的不同位置对遗忘机制的影响，并通过ForgetEval基准系统系统化评估了不同配置下的遗忘能力。
AI.motivation: 当前关于智能体记忆的研究大多聚焦于信息召回，缺乏对遗忘（forgetting）机制及其失败模式的系统评测。生产中常见的失效多为遗忘失效，但现有基准仅测召回，亟需更标准的遗忘评测方法。
AI.method: 作者提出ForgetEval，一个包含1000个模板化用例与385个对抗用例的基准套件，并通过13种系统配置与6种适配协议，对三种LLM插入管道的位置方案进行对比（确定性原语、写入时LLM、变更时LLM）。评测以子字符串匹配法和人工标注进行。
AI.result: （1）确定性方案对词汇/时序类别表现好，但在标识符混淆和跨语种标准化任务中失败（准确率0-5%）；（2）写入时LLM完全解决了标准化任务（100%），但对基于意图的删除无效；（3）变更时LLM大幅提升了各项指标（近92%准确率），兼顾多类别，代价适中（2.3秒/例）。人工评测和外部复现均验证了该优势。
AI.conclusion: LLM在记忆管道中用于支持遗忘操作的具体位置极大影响其遗忘能力。ForgetEval补足了只考召回任务的缺陷，为后续学界和工业界完善智能体记忆系统和相关评测工具提供了基准和方法。

title: Texture-Shape Bias Balancing for Robust Synthetic-to-Real Semantic Segmentation in Automotive NIR Imagery
summary: Semantic segmentation is a fundamental component of visual perception in modern automotive systems, enabling pixel-level scene understanding. Near-Infrared imaging (NIR) offers stable detection under difficult illumination conditions, but the development of domain-specific semantic segmentation models remains challenging due to the lack of high-quality annotated data from real-world scenarios. Synthetic datasets offer a scalable alternative, but models trained on synthetic images often suffer performance degradation when transferred to real domains. We present the first systematic study on synthetic to real domain adaptation for semantic segmentation in NIR images in the automotive domain. We propose a generative augmentation framework that transforms synthetic images into realistic NIR-style variants via our introduced target style adaptation (TSA). TSA fine-tunes a latent diffusion model via low-rank adaptation on a small curated set of real NIR images and applies it to synthetic training data using structure-preserving multi-signal conditioning. To reduce texture bias and improve segmentation robustness, we further apply a Voronoi-based style diversification strategy (VSD) that modifies the original textures while preserving scene geometry. Experiments with multiple model architectures on NIR data from vehicle interiors and street scenes show that balancing inductive bias during training leads to noticeably more robust semantic segmentation and effectively reduces the domain gap in our real-world scenarios by up to 63.6% on exterior and 28.4% on interior data. The code is available at GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了近红外（NIR）图像在汽车领域中语义分割的跨域自适应问题，提出了一种生成式增强框架显著缩小了合成数据与真实NIR场景之间的域间差距。
AI.motivation: 近红外影像能在复杂光照下稳定成像，但缺乏高质量标注数据，导致特定领域的语义分割模型发展受限。合成数据可替代但存在显著域差，直接应用于真实世界时性能下降，因此迫切需要高效的合成到真实自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出生成式增强框架（TSA+VSD）：1）用目标风格自适应（TSA）微调潜变量扩散模型，将有限真实NIR图像的风格迁移到大批量合成数据；2）设计Voronoi风格多样化（VSD）策略，在保持场景结构的同时增强纹理多样性，协同减少纹理偏差；3）模型在多种架构和不同NIR场景（车内/街景）上实证验证。
AI.result: 实验结果显示在多种NIR数据集上新方法能显著弥合域差。车外数据域差减少高达63.6%，车内也有28.4%的提升，各种模型架构上均表现出更健壮的语义分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作系统性验证了通过生成式风格迁移和结构保持的多样化增强，有效提升了近红外影像跨域语义分割的鲁棒性和泛化性，为数据稀缺下的视觉感知应用提供了新思路。

title: TopoRetarget: Interaction-Preserving Retargeting for Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Human hand-object demonstrations provide dense reference motions for training dexterous manipulation reinforcement learning (RL) policies through reference tracking. However, to use such demonstrations for RL policy learning, retargeting must preserve hand pose and task-relevant hand-object contact structure. Otherwise, contact and feasibility artifacts can degrade downstream RL policy performance. We introduce TopoRetarget, an interaction-preserving retargeting framework that uses a single set of parameters across diverse retargeting conditions while maintaining task-relevant hand-object interaction and adapting human demonstrations to dexterous robot hands. The method constructs a sparse interaction graph over hand and object keypoints and optimizes distance-weighted Laplacian deformation with directional consistency, kinematic constraints, and penetration handling. Evaluations show that the generated references improve both interaction fidelity and policy learning: TopoRetarget achieves the best contact precision and alignment over all baselines on the ContactPose Dataset, improves Pen-Spin training success by 40.6 percentage points over the existing baseline methods, and enables zero-shot transfer to Wuji Hand hardware on cube reorientation and pen spinning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TopoRetarget方法，提升手-物体演示在智能机器人灵巧操作RL训练中的参考效果，有效保持接触关系，提高政策学习表现。
AI.motivation: 人类手部演示为灵巧手Manipulation RL政策学习提供稠密参考，但直接复现需解决手部姿态与任务相关接触结构的准确保留，否则会影响后续RL训练效果。
AI.method: TopoRetarget通过构建手-物体关键点稀疏交互图，结合距离加权Laplacian变形、方向一致性、运动学约束和穿透处理，优化保留交互结构，使同一参数集能适用于多种演示复现应用。
AI.result: TopoRetarget在ContactPose数据集上取得所有基线接触精度和对齐度最高，Pen-Spin训练成功率较现有基线提升40.6个百分点，并实现零样本迁移到机器人硬件上的多任务复现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能更好保持手-物体交互，实现更高质量的参考演示迁移，显著提升基于演示的RL政策训练效果和实际机器人应用能力。

title: Calibrated Triage, Not Autonomy: Confidence Estimation for Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: A vision-language model can answer a question about a medical image fluently and confidently while barely using the image, leaning instead on language priors. In medicine this is the failure that matters most, because the answer looks trustworthy and is not, and the only protection is a confidence score reliable enough to tell the system when to abstain. We ask a deployment question rather than an accuracy one: how much imaging work a model can safely handle alone, and which confidence signal makes that possible. We evaluate seven confidence estimators across five open-weight LVLMs and three medical visual-question-answering datasets spanning broad clinical imaging, radiology, and pathology, with every probe trained only on natural images and applied without adaptation. Recast as bounded selective prediction (automate a case only when confidence clears a threshold, defer the rest), the comparison is cautionary. The standard metrics are poor guides: discrimination barely separates the methods, and the weak calibration of a cheap self-report is cheaply removed by off-domain temperature scaling without changing deployable yield. What distinguishes a usable estimator is the high-confidence region a clinician acts on: the weakest baselines are confidently wrong on 41 to 45 percent of their errors against 1 to 4 percent for the best probe, and no estimator is reliably best across domains or models. Safe handoff is governed at two levels: base-model competence sets a ceiling, so a well-calibrated score recovers roughly a third of radiology cases at a 20 percent error tolerance but almost none of pathology; the confidence layer then decides how much of that ceiling is reachable. The usable role today is calibrated triage, not autonomy: automate the cases a calibrated score marks safe, route the rest to a clinician. We release all outputs, correctness judgments, and confidence scores, with code.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了多模态视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）在医学视觉问答任务中，仅依赖于自然图像训练时的信心度量以及实际可部署性，揭示主流信心估计方法难以可靠辅助安全自动化处理医学影像案例。
AI.motivation: 医学领域对视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）的信任度至关重要，尤其是在模型回答流畅但实际上忽略影像内容、仅依赖语言偏见时，易产生误导性高的错误。为部署模型至临床场景，需要解决模型信心估算的准确性与安全自动化边界，使系统知晓何时需要人工介入。
AI.method: 作者在五种开放权重的LVLMs和三个涵盖临床医学影像、放射学、病理学的数据集上，评测了七种主流信心估计器。所有LVLM仅在自然图像上训练，并未专门适配医疗领域。所有方法采用选择性预测（仅在信心高于阈值时自动处理，否则交由医生处理），并对各类信心输出进行标准指标对比与安全上限分析。
AI.result: 实验发现，现有信心评估方法在医学VQA场景下区分能力有限，标准指标难有效筛选可用方法，弱基线方案的高置信错误率可达41%-45%，而最佳探针降至1%-4%。模型在放射学问题上，约1/3案例在20%错误容忍下可安全自动处理，但病理领域几乎无自动处理空间。无单一方法能在所有域及模型上优胜，信心输出的可用边界明显受限于基模型本身表现。
AI.conclusion: 目前LVLMs在医学领域的安全可自动化应用受限，可信信心估算只能用于风险可控的任务（如分诊建议），无法完全替代人工。标准指标未必能选出最佳方法，建议将高风险任务交由医生处理，仅自动化置信度足够高的案例。作者已公开代码与数据便于后续研究。

title: Think Less, Act Early: Reinforced Latent Reasoning with Early Exit in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly rely on explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to bridge perception and action. While effective, this paradigm suffers from high computational costs and error propagation in multi-step tasks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Variable Alignment VLA (AVA-VLA), a novel Latent Reasoning VLA framework that models reasoning as a sequence of unobservable latent variables, bypassing the need for explicit text generation. However, latent trajectories are inherently susceptible to noise interference and misalignment with downstream objectives. To address this, we introduce a Reinforcement Learning-based Denoising mechanism that treats latent state generation as a sequential decision process, optimizing reasoning trajectories via task-level rewards. Furthermore, we incorporate an Early-Exit Strategy that adaptively terminates reasoning based on state confidence, enabling a dynamic trade-off between depth and efficiency. Extensive experiments on embodied decision benchmarks demonstrate that AVA-VLA achieves a 6x inference speedup over explicit CoT methods while attaining a 98.3% average success rate on LIBERO, improving both efficiency and long-horizon stability over full-reasoning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可变对齐视觉-语言-行动模型（AVA-VLA），通过隐式推理方式显著提升效率与稳定性，实现大幅加快推理速度的同时，保持高成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉-语言-行动模型常通过显式Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理，虽然效果较好，但存在高计算代价与多步任务中的误差累积问题。
AI.method: 提出AVA-VLA框架，将推理建模为一系列隐变量决策过程，摒弃了对显式文本生成的依赖。为抑制隐变量路径的噪声和目标偏差，引入基于强化学习的去噪机制，并提出早停策略，根据状态置信度自适应终止推理，实现推理深度与效率的平衡。
AI.result: 在实体决策基准测试上，AVA-VLA相比显式CoT方法推理速度提升6倍，并在LIBERO数据集上达到98.3%的平均成功率，显著优于全推理基线的效率与长序列稳定性。
AI.conclusion: AVA-VLA模型在无需显式文本生成的前提下，有效提升视觉-语言-行动任务推理速度及鲁棒性，在保持高准确率的同时大幅降低了计算成本，为VLA推理提供了新范式。

title: Is Your Trajectory Displacement Safe in Long-tail?
summary: Long-tail scenarios remain a major bottleneck for autonomous driving evaluation, even as datasets grow by orders of magnitude. Existing evaluation pipelines are rarely human-aligned, safety-aware, verifiable, and explainable at the same time: closed-loop metrics often saturate among strong planners, while unstructured human ratings can be noisy without a carefully designed protocol. We formulate planning evaluation as additional-threat detection: given a planner trajectory and an expert reference, does the planner's displacement introduce new unsafe driving behavior? We propose FluidTest, an evaluation pipeline with three components: a pairwise WebUI protocol for reliable human annotation; a taxonomy of 32 semantic threats with evidence-grounded decision graphs; and a three-agent verification system with reflection for precision and auditability. Experiments on the WOD-E2E dataset show that FluidTest produces consistent labels among trained annotators and identifies additional threats in 65% of Poutine trajectories and 51% of RAP trajectories. These results show that state-of-the-art planners can still exhibit substantial safety-relevant failures despite high Rater Feedback Scores (RFS) and low Average Displacement Error (ADE). Additional details, guidance, and code are available at https://fluidtest.web.app.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FluidTest评测方案，通过结构化威胁检测方法和三重验证体系，更准确地评估自动驾驶中的安全风险，突破传统评测方法在识别长尾安全威胁上的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶评估方法在遇到极端和长尾情景时，难以全面、安全、可验证地反映规划系统的真实表现。同时，已有的封闭式指标在强规划器间趋于饱和，人工评分也可能因缺乏规范及噪声影响而不可靠。
AI.method: 作者将规划评估新颖地形式化为“附加威胁检测”，即对比智能体轨迹与专家轨迹，判别是否产生了新增安全隐患。提出了FluidTest，包括：1)基于WebUI的成对标注流程以提升人工标注一致性；2)含32种威胁的语义分类体系及决策图，规范判断流程，提高可解释性；3)包含三智能体反思的验证系统，加强结果精准与可追溯。
AI.result: 在WOD-E2E数据集实验表明，FluidTest体系下训练标注员可达到较高一致度。对比顶尖规划器Poutine和RAP，FluidTest能分别在65%和51%的轨迹中检测到附加威胁，反映即便传统指标（RFS高、ADE低）优秀下，依然存在大量安全相关失误。
AI.conclusion: FluidTest提升了自动驾驶规划评估的可靠性、解释性与安全敏感度，为长尾及极端场景下的真实安全风险识别打下基础。

title: Interactor: Agentic RL oriented Iterative Creation for Ad Description Generation in Sponsored Search
summary: This paper focuses on automatically generating informative ad descriptions in sponsored search. Unlike ad titles which are usually optimized to attract user click feedbacks, ad descriptions have a longer text span and possess the potential of incorporating world knowledge to address user search intents while presenting the fine-grained selling points of the ads. We propose Interactor, a multi-turn iterative creation framework optimized with agentic RL for ad description generation. The generation model acts as a policy that interacts with a customized environment consisting of multiple generative reward models. Given initial generations by the policy, the customized GenRMs evaluate multi-dimensional qualities including knowledge capacity and landing page consistency, providing both binary signals and reasoning feedbacks. The policy then iteratively refines the descriptions based on such feedbacks to ensure continuous improvement. Experiments on industrial datasets show that the Interactor framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in generating knowledge-rich and faithful ad descriptions. Since May 2026, it has been deployed online in a leading search ads system, contributing to both ad revenue and user experience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于搜索广告描述自动生成的新型多轮迭代框架——Interactor，并通过 agentic RL 优化，显著提升了广告描述的知识性与一致性。
AI.motivation: 目前广告标题主要侧重于吸引点击，广告描述则有空间承载更多世界知识和细节卖点，提升广告满足用户搜索意图的能力。如何自动生成高质量、知识丰富且与落地页一致的广告描述，是一个亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 作者提出了 Interactor 框架，将生成模型作为策略，与由多个生成型奖励模型（GenRMs）组成的环境进行多轮互动。GenRMs 从知识量、落地页一致性等多维度对描述进行评估并给出反馈，策略据此逐步优化生成结果，核心采用了基于代理的强化学习优化。
AI.result: 在工业级数据集上，Interactor 在生成知识丰富、内容可靠的广告描述方面，明显优于现有最优方法。该方法自 2026 年 5 月已在主流搜索广告系统上线，显著提升广告收益和用户体验。
AI.conclusion: 本文创新性地提出了基于 RL 的多轮广告描述生成框架，实现了自动化、高质量的广告文案生成，对广告系统和用户体验均产生了积极影响。

title: Text-Driven Fusion for Infrared and Visible Images: Achieving Image Scene Adaptation on Hyperbolic Space
summary: Infrared and visible image fusion aims to integrate complementary modalities, while existing Euclidean methods impose rigid distance metrics that distort multi-modal interactions and parent-to-child semantic hierarchies. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a text-driven fusion framework empowered by hyperbolic manifold learning. During training, BLIP-extracted text prompts serve as topological anchors within the hyperbolic space, guiding vision-attribute alignment through hyperbolic embeddings that naturally accommodate varying semantic granularities. By exploiting the exponential volume growth dictated by the Poincaré ball's negative curvature, this approach seamlessly embeds hierarchical trees to encode coarse-to-fine semantics without metric saturation, while the vast peripheral space prevents texture distortion during cross-modal fusion. At inference, the fusion process autonomously adapts to input content using the learned text-attribute priors, completely eliminating the need for textual input. Experimental results show our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on benchmark datasets, with code available at https://github.com/Shaoyun2023/TEDFusion.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于超球面流形学习的文本驱动红外与可见光图像融合方法，有效提升了多模态语义融合的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于欧式距离的图像融合方法在处理多模态之间的复杂语义层级与结构时存在局限，容易造成互补信息的扭曲与损失，因此亟需新的方法能更好地表达与利用多层次语义。
AI.method: 采用BLIP提取的文本提示作为训练阶段的超球面空间拓扑锚点，通过超球面嵌入实现视觉属性与文本语义的对齐。在柯西球空间（Poincaré ball）的负曲率下，能够自然嵌入层次树，编码粗到细不同语义，同时避免欧式距离带来的衡量失真与纹理扭曲。推理阶段利用学到的文字属性先验自适应完成融合，无需额外文本输入。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在融合质量和语义表达能力方面超越了当前主流的先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于超球面与文本先验的融合模型有效突破了欧式框架的局限，为多模态图像融合提供了更优的层次结构表达和信息整合能力，具有很强的实际应用潜力。

title: ART-Glove: Articulated Tactile Glove for Contact-Grounded Dexterous Interaction Capture
summary: We present ART-Glove, an articulated tactile glove designed to capture contact-grounded dexterous demonstrations while preserving human dexterity. ART-Glove makes hand-side contact geometry explicit with 16 rigid functional surfaces covering the fingers, thumb, and palm. Twenty-two anatomically aligned joints connect these surfaces and allow them to follow human hand motion during dexterous manipulation. Encoder-based sensing tracks surface motion, while dense piezoresistive tactile sensing records contact over the same surfaces. The complete system captures synchronized 22-DoF joint measurements and 2048-taxel tactile measurements at 120 Hz. We evaluate ART-Glove across experiments on motion freedom, joint sensing, tactile sensing, and contact-rich interaction capture, demonstrating its ability to preserve human dexterity while recording contact-grounded information that can support downstream dexterous robot learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ART-Glove，这是一种能够捕捉人手灵巧操作并保持手部灵活性的触觉手套，用于为机器人灵巧操作提供高质量数据。
AI.motivation: 当前用于机器人学习的手部数据采集设备往往无法兼顾高精度触觉与动作捕捉，同时限制了人手的自然灵活性，难以获得真实、复杂的操作演示。本文希望通过新的手套设计，弥补灵巧操作演示与高精度数据采集间的矛盾。
AI.method: 提出了ART-Glove，采用16个刚性功能面覆盖手指、拇指和手掌，通过22个人体工学设计的关节连接，实现仿真手部高自由度动作。结合编码器追踪表面运动和高密度压阻式触觉传感，能够同步采集22个关节自由度的动作数据与2048个触点的触觉数据，频率达120Hz。
AI.result: 在手部动作自由度、关节及触觉感应精度、复杂接触捕捉等多项实验中，ART-Glove证明了其不损失人手灵活性的前提下，可高效准确采集人手操作数据。
AI.conclusion: ART-Glove有望为下游灵巧机器人学习提供关键支持，在真实演示与高质量数据采集间取得良好平衡，推动机器人操作能力进步。

title: Contaminated Collaboration: Measuring Gender Bias Transfer in LLM-Assisted Student Writing
summary: Gender bias in LLMs has been studied extensively in model outputs, with biased prompts shown to amplify stereotyped generations. Whether such bias propagates into text produced by humans who use these systems, however, remains underexplored. We investigate whether gender bias in an LLM writing assistant transfers into career plan essays written by students. We first verify that a gender-biased prompt induces gender-differentiated language in LLM-generated essays, while a neutral prompt does not. We then recruited participants (N = 123) in a controlled environment to write career plan essays for paired biographical profiles differing only in gender under three conditions: no AI assistance, neutral LLM assistance, or gender-biased LLM assistance. Students in the biased condition produced essays with a significantly larger agentic gap and more gender-stereotypic occupation suggestions than those in the control and neutral conditions. Our results also reveal that this bias transfer is asymmetric: agency is suppressed in female-target essays while male-target writing remains largely unaffected. Our findings highlight the risk of bias propagation in AI-assisted writing, calling for fairness-aware design in educational AI tools.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了LLM（大型语言模型）在写作辅助中性别偏见对学生写作内容的影响，发现AI偏见可能被用户采纳并体现在最终文本中。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有研究关注LLM输出的性别偏见，但其是否会影响真实用户（如学生）写作并传播到最终文本中，仍缺乏实证分析。本文旨在弥补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 作者采用对照实验，招募123名学生，在‘无AI辅助’、‘中性LLM辅助’和‘有性别偏见LLM辅助’三种条件下，撰写两组仅性别不同的职业规划文书，并分析文本中的性别特征差异。
AI.result: 带有性别偏见的AI辅助会导致学生写作中出现更明显的性别差距，如对男性推荐更具代理性的职业、对女性则体现出更多刻板印象，并且对女性文书中的代理性表达有压制作用，而男性文书变化不大。
AI.conclusion: AI工具中的性别偏见会显著影响用户写作，具有传播性和放大效应，尤其对女性更为不利。研究呼吁在教育场景下设计更加公平、无偏的AI写作辅助工具。

title: Physics-Driven Zero-Shot MRI Reconstruction with Non-local Image Priors
summary: Zero-Shot Self-Supervised Learning (ZS-SSL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for accelerated Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction, eliminating the reliance on fully-sampled external datasets. However, learning solely from a single under-sampled scan suffers from supervision scarcity and optimization instability, often leading to overfitting or artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose a robust physics-driven ZS-SSL framework that synergizes physical consistency with image-domain non-local priors. Our method introduces three core innovations: (1) a Coil Sensitivity Map (CSM)-Guided Dynamic Repository, which stabilizes the training trajectory by filtering physically inconsistent artifacts based on coil sensitivity constraints; (2) a SPIRiT-based regularization, which enforces k-space self-consistency via a learned correlation kernel and stochastic masking; (3) a Non-Local Self-Similarity (NSS) Pixel Bank, which leverages the high-fidelity reference established by the former modules to explicitly mine non-local anatomical similarities, thereby augmenting supervision in the image domain. Extensive experiments on the FastMRI dataset demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly under high acceleration factors, effectively bridging the gap between zero-shot learning and supervised methods. The code is available at https://github.com/Zolento/NS-SSL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对医学磁共振成像（MRI）加速重建的零样本自监督学习（ZS-SSL）新方法，通过结合物理一致性与图像域非局部先验，有效提升重建质量，在高加速因子场景表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI零样本自监督重建方法因仅依赖单一欠采样数据，易导致监督不足、优化不稳定，从而产生过拟合或伪影。为解决这些问题，需要增强物理约束并引入更多先验知识以提升模型泛化能力和重建质量。
AI.method: 方法包括三大创新：(1) 基于线圈敏感性图（CSM）的动态存储模块，利用物理约束过滤不一致伪影，确保训练收敛稳定；(2) 基于SPIRiT的正则项，通过学习相关核与随机掩蔽增强k-space自一致性；(3) 非局部自相似（NSS）像素库，依托前两个模块建立的高保真参考，进一步挖掘图像中解剖结构的非局部相似性，增强像素级监督。
AI.result: 在FastMRI标准数据集上，所提出框架在多种加速倍率下均实现了领先的重建性能，尤其在高加速场景表现突出，显著优于现有零样本及部分有监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的物理驱动零样本自监督MRI重建方法，通过融入多重物理与先验知识，大幅缓解了零监督下的伪影与优化瓶颈，缩小了与有监督方法的性能差距，具有良好的实用前景。

title: SemGeoNav:A Safety-Guided Visual Navigation Approach with Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Planning
comment: The paper has been accepted by ICGNC 2026
summary: Learning-based visual navigation has enhanced semantic goal-reaching capabilities. However, due to their black-box nature, purely end-to-end models often lack explicit geometric constraints, leading to unpredictable and unreliable obstacle avoidance in open environments. Conversely, traditional geometric planners ensure safety but struggle with high-dimensional visual targets. To address these limitations, we propose SemGeoNav, a novel hierarchical visual navigation framework.It tightly integrates the high-level semantic reasoning of end-to-end models with the reliable local planning ability of geometry-based methods, achieving robust image-based navigation while significantly improving obstacle avoidance. Furthermore, we introduce a temporal trajectory smoothing mechanism to ensure continuous and stable robot motion. We evaluated SemGeoNav on a Unitree Go2 quadruped robot in real-world environments. The results demonstrate that SemGeoNav outperforms existing representative methods, including ViNT and NoMaD, achieving higher success rates and shorter navigation times.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将端到端语义推理与几何规划有机结合的导航框架SemGeoNav，在现实环境下显著提升了导航鲁棒性和避障能力。
AI.motivation: 端到端视觉导航虽然具备良好的目标到达能力，但由于缺乏几何约束，避障不稳定，而传统几何规划虽安全却难以有效利用高维视觉信息。因此，急需一种结合二者优点的方法解决上述问题。
AI.method: 作者提出了SemGeoNav层次化导航框架，将基于学习的高层语义推理与几何规划的局部避障能力紧密结合；并引入了时序轨迹平滑机制以提升运动连续性和稳定性。
AI.result: 在现实环境中，通过Unitree Go2四足机器人验证了该方法。实验证明SemGeoNav在成功率和导航时间方面均优于ViNT和NoMaD等现有代表性方法。
AI.conclusion: 将端到端模型与几何规划结合的SemGeoNav，有效提升视觉导航鲁棒性和避障性能，为实际机器人自主导航提供了可行高效的解决方案。

title: Beyond NL2Code: A Structured Survey of Multimodal Code Intelligence
comment: Work completed in January 2026. Updating now
summary: While LLMs have substantially advanced text-to-code synthesis, many real programming tasks specify intent through visual artifacts such as screenshots, charts, documents, vector drawings, videos, and interactive states. These tasks require models to connect visual perception to executable programs, because correctness depends not only on syntax but also on layout, geometry, data semantics, editability, interaction behavior, and domain-specific constraints that apply after execution. This survey examines Multimodal Code Intelligence, covering systems that generate, edit, refine, execute, or reason with code under visually grounded inputs and outputs. We first formulate the field by the role that code plays in each task, distinguishing code as a rendered artifact, an editable symbolic structure, a scientific representation, an intermediate reasoning trace, or an executable policy or tool interface. We then organize benchmarks and methods into four domains: Graphical User Interface, Scientific Visualization, Structured Graphics, and Frontier Tasks and Frameworks. This taxonomy connects mature artifact-generation problems to emerging agentic and unified settings and allows us to compare how different tasks treat evidence of correctness. Looking ahead, we argue that future research may benefit from four verification-centered directions. Multi-signal validation can combine complementary evidence of correctness, multi-state verification can test behavior across execution trajectories, cross-task transfer testing can probe reusable visual-code skills, and verifiable agent traces can reveal whether agent actions are grounded in visual evidence. Together, these directions may move multimodal code generation from single-output imitation toward evidence-grounded executable systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态代码智能领域，聚焦于基于视觉输入（如截图、图表、文档、交互状态等）生成、编辑、推理和执行代码的方法、系统与基准，探讨代码在任务中的多种角色及未来的验证导向研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型大幅提升了文本到代码的自动合成能力，但现实编程任务常需根据视觉素材表达意图，代码的正确性需结合视觉、语法、几何、数据语义及交互等多维判据。因此，需要厘清如何将视觉感知与可执行代码相结合。
AI.method: 作者归纳了多模态代码智能领域的任务，按代码在任务中的角色进行分类，如渲染产物、可编辑结构、科学表征、中间推理轨迹和可执行策略接口，并将方法和基准分为图形用户界面、科学可视化、结构化图形与前沿任务四类。
AI.result: 本综述总结了各项任务在代码正确性证据方面的处理差异，连接了成熟的产物生成问题与新兴智能体式及统一框架，提出了多信号、多状态、跨任务及可验证智能体轨迹等四个以验证为核心的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 综述指出，多模态代码生成未来应从单一输出模仿转向以证据为基础的可执行系统，提出的验证方法有望提高系统可靠性和实用性，促进视觉-代码联合智能进步。

title: Learn Temporal Consistency For Robust Satellite Video Detector
summary: Satellite video object detection (SVOD) for oriented and fine-grained objects plays an important role in satellite applications. Most existing SVOD methods only focus on one or a few coarse-grained categories of moving objects and represent objects with horizontal bounding boxes. They have difficulty extracting complete, accurate, and consistent information about objects in whole satellite videos. In this paper, we propose a satellite video object detection framework based on Temporal Consistency Learning (TCL). TCL adeptly detects oriented and fine-grained objects by leveraging the rich temporal contexts within satellite videos. The framework integrates three key modules: temporal and fine-grained feature aggregation (TFA), structure encoding (SE), and temporal consistency constraint (TCC). TFA and TCC modules facilitate consistent representation learning across frames, while the SE module encodes both appearance and structural information for precise fine-grained recognition. Experimental results on the SAT-MTB benchmark dataset demonstrate TCL's superior performance, achieving a new state-of-the-art oriented and fine-grained detection accuracy of 47.7% mAP--a 4.8% improvement over the baseline. Furthermore, our TCL framework readily accommodates existing image-based detectors, leading to enhanced detection accuracies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于时序一致性学习（TCL）的卫星视频目标检测新方法，可以检测方向性和细粒度目标，并在SAT-MTB数据集上取得了新的SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星视频目标检测方法多聚焦于少数粗粒度目标，且仅用水平框表示，难以完整、准确、连续地捕捉目标信息，而实际应用中需要对复杂多样、具备方向性和细粒度目标进行检测。
AI.method: 该方法设计了TCL框架，包含三个关键模块：时序与细粒度特征聚合（TFA）、结构编码（SE）、时序一致性约束（TCC）。TFA与TCC促进跨帧一致的表征学习，SE模块同时编码外观和结构信息以提升细粒度识别能力。该框架也能嵌入现有基于图像的检测器。
AI.result: 在SAT-MTB基准数据集上，TCL实现了47.7%的mAP，比基线高4.8%。
AI.conclusion: TCL框架在方向性和细粒度卫星视频目标检测取得了新SOTA，且具有通用性，可增强现有检测器的精度，对实际卫星应用具有重要意义。

title: An Augmented Reality Brain-Robot Interface for Generalist Robot Arm Manipulation
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
summary: The integration of augmented reality (AR) and EEG-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) offers a promising path for enabling intuitive control of robots for assistive purposes. However, existing AR brain-robot interface (BRI) systems are often constrained to task-specific structures, limiting their utility in real-world environments. We present an AR BRI designed for generalist robot arm manipulation that combines gaze-based object selection with motor imagery action control. Our system uses eye-tracking for intuitive object targeting and context-aware visual overlays ("Place" and "Use") to guide the user through tasks within a shared autonomy framework. We evaluated the interface through a feasibility study with 18 healthy participants performing three multi-step activities of daily living: drinking, using a drawer, and operating an oven. Our results demonstrate that this interaction paradigm enables effective sequential task execution and high user engagement, achieving a "Good" usability rating (SUS > 70). These findings support the feasibility of the proposed interaction paradigm for complex BCI-driven robotic assistance, and motivate future evaluation with the intended target population. Project website: https://ar-bri-manip.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合增强现实（AR）与基于脑电（EEG）的脑-机器人接口（BRI）新系统，实现更自然直观的机器臂日常辅助操作，并在多步任务中表现良好。
AI.motivation: 传统的AR BRI系统多为任务特定型，难以灵活适应复杂的真实生活环境。作者希望开发一种更通用、用户友好的人机交互方式以提升机器人在复杂日常活动中的辅助能力。
AI.method: 该系统融合眼动追踪实现对象选择，并采用运动想象控制机器人动作。基于增强现实显示上下文感知的可视化叠加（如“放置”“使用”），引导用户在共享自主框架下执行任务。在18名健康受试者中进行了三项日常多步任务的可行性研究。
AI.result: 实验表明，该交互方式支持有效的序列任务执行，高用户参与度及良好可用性（SUS>70分）。
AI.conclusion: 结果证实了该新范式在复杂脑控机器人辅助任务中的可行性与实用性，并为后续在目标患者群体中验证效果奠定基础。

title: FinBalance: A Multi-Document Accounting Reconciliation Benchmark
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures. Code and data: https://github.com/Devansh1105/finbalance
summary: Existing financial-NLP benchmarks mostly evaluate prepared artifacts such as filings, tables, or extracted values. Real accounting begins earlier: source documents must be reconciled into cited journal entries, aggregated into a balance sheet, and checked for contradictions. We introduce FinBalance, a multi-document accounting reconciliation benchmark built from source-document bundles across eight industries, three period types, and five difficulty levels. Human-authored business scenarios, accounting policies, tax/FX treatments, document schemas, distractors, and inconsistency templates are composed by a deterministic generator whose ledger produces journal entries,balance sheets, and 23 inconsistency-code labels. On a 710-record evaluation split, six contemporary LLMs reach at most 46% exact final-balance-sheet accuracy. Four models show a 26-41 pp gap between BS_exact, the model's reported balance sheet, and BS_recon, the balance sheet obtained by replaying its entries through our ledger. Models often recover numerically plausible entries but fail to bind them to supporting documents and aggregate them consistently. Citation-pressure prompting barely changes document-linking errors, while ledger-feedback ablations substantially improve reported balance sheets and expose inconsistency-detection trade-offs. Expert finance reviewers validate the benchmark design and labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向多文档会计核对任务的基准数据集FinBalance，测试当前大模型在真实会计场景下的表现，发现其准确率有限并存在明显短板。
AI.motivation: 现有金融NLP基准多只关注整理好的文件或提取值，但实际会计工作需要从原始凭证出发完成核对与汇总，过程更复杂，需模拟真正的业务环境。
AI.method: 作者构建了FinBalance数据集，涵盖八大行业、三种时段和五种难度，由人工撰写的商业场景和会计政策组成，通过确定性生成器合成凭证、分录与资产负债表，并引入分歧与干扰项。利用23类不一致性标签和710个测试样本，评测了六个大语言模型的核算与推理能力。
AI.result: 六个LLM在准确生成最终资产负债表方面全部低于46%，其中模型自行汇总的资产负债表与用其分录还原的结果间存在26-41个百分点的准确率缺口，大多数模型未能将凭证和分录正确关联并一致汇总。针对文档间引用的提示效果甚微，而引入账本反馈显著提升表单正确性。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM虽然能生成数值合理的分录，却难以实现凭证依据绑定与全流程一致汇总。FinBalance设计合理，标签经财务专家验证，为金融NLP推进真实会计应用提供了关键基准和新挑战。

title: Multi-view feature High-order Fusion for Space Weak Object Detection and Segmentation
summary: Weak objects are common in images and videos of space applications. However, it is hard to learn proper representations from their limited appearance information. Inspired by multi-view learning, we develop simple multi-view attentions, treating their outputs as multi-view features. We also propose a multi-view feature high-order fusion method (MHF) to aggregate more accurate and richer features of weak objects. Our MHF extends the commonly used low-order feature fusion method to higher orders. It enhances the model's capacity to capture relevant and complementary information about weak objects. This is achieved by introducing high-order multi-view features perception and a recursive task-contribution gated selection of multi-view features. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable. It is compatible with various variants of multi-view feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on two newly constructed space science datasets and an open, large-scale satellite video dataset. Our MHF serves as a plug-and-play module and significantly improves various vision transformers and convolution-based detection and segmentation models. We achieve all state-of-the-art accuracies on both tasks across three datasets. Our MHF can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively represents weak objects in terms of multi-view learning. The code will be available at https://github.com/Kingdroper/MHF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多视角特征高阶融合方法（MHF），有效提升了弱小目标的检测与分割性能，并在多个空间相关数据集上刷新了SOTA。
AI.motivation: 在太空应用的图像与视频中，弱小目标因外观信息有限，很难被有效表征和检测。现有方法对弱特征捕捉力不足，因此亟需设计新的方法提取更丰富的多视角特征，提高检测和分割精度。
AI.method: 受多视角学习启发，作者提出了简单多视角注意力机制，并基于此进一步设计了高阶融合方法MHF。MHF通过高阶多视角特征感知以及递归任务贡献门控机制，实现了更准确、信息更丰富的特征聚合。MHF兼容多种多视角特征表征方法，并可作为即插即用模块应用于不同的视觉模型。
AI.result: 在两个新构建的太空科学数据集及一个公开大规模卫星视频数据集上，MHF作为模块集成进多种主流的Vision Transformer和卷积检测/分割模型，均显著提升了性能，并在检测和分割任务上取得了所有数据集的最优准确率。
AI.conclusion: MHF方法有效提升了弱小目标的表征能力，可作为视觉建模的新基础模块。其灵活、通用的特性也适用于多种多视角模型，推动了多视角学习在弱小目标上的应用。

title: V2P-Manip: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Monocular Human Videos
summary: Achieving autonomous robotic dexterous manipulation requires precise, human-like action sequences at scale. As a scalable supplement to costly teleoperation data, extracting trajectories with both visual fidelity and physical plausibility from monocular videos represents a promising frontier in embodied AI. To this end, we introduce V2P-Manip, an efficient framework designed to learn dexterous manipulation policies directly from human demonstration videos. We establish an efficient, integrated pipeline encompassing 3D asset acquisition, trajectory estimation, and dexterous policy learning. To bridge the gap between visual perception and physical constraints, we introduce a two-stage refinement process to enforce spatial alignment and physical consistency. Evaluations on the TACO and OakInk benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms previous methods in pose accuracy, adaptability to unstructured environments, and training efficiency. Ultimately, experimental results confirm an average success rate of over 75% across multiple synthetic manipulation tasks and validate the adaptability of the extracted manipulation priors across diverse dexterous hand embodiments.

AI.tldr: 提出了V2P-Manip框架，实现了从单目人类演示视频中直接学习机器人灵巧操作策略，在多个基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人灵巧操作训练往往依赖昂贵的远程操作数据，难以大规模推广。通过单目视频提取具备视觉真实感和物理可行性的操作轨迹，成为提升机器人自主操作能力的新途径。
AI.method: 提出V2P-Manip框架，整合了3D资产获取、轨迹估计和操作策略学习。设计了二阶段精炼流程，增强轨迹的空间对齐和物理一致性，确保视觉与物理约束相结合。
AI.result: 在TACO和OakInk数据集上，相较于现有方法，V2P-Manip在姿态精度、对无结构环境的适应性和训练效率方面明显优越。实验任务平均成功率超过75%。
AI.conclusion: V2P-Manip能够从视频中高效提取可泛化的灵巧操作先验，有效提升多种手型的操作能力，展现了在真实环境中推广的潜力。

title: SAG: SQL-Retrieval Augmented Generation with Query-Time Dynamic Hyperedges
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers an effective approach for large language models to access external knowledge. However, existing methods rely on dense similarity retrieval and face inherent limitations in handling structured constraints and multi-hop reasoning. Incorporating knowledge graphs partially alleviates these issues, but at the cost of semantic fragmentation, high maintenance overhead, and difficult incremental updates. This paper introduces SAG (SQLRetrieval Augmented Generation), a structured architecture for retrieval and agent systems. Instead of pre-building a global static graph, SAG converts each chunk into one semantically complete event and a set of indexing entities, then uses SQL join queries to dynamically link events that share entities into local hyperedges,constructing, at query time, a dynamically instantiated local index structure. This design avoids the need for global graph rebuilding and ongoing maintenance; the system naturally supports incremental writes, concurrent processing, and continuous scaling through its reliance on standard database infrastructure. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHop, and MuSiQue, three standard multi-hop benchmarks,SAG achieves the best results on 8 out of 9 Recall@K metrics, reaching 80.0% Recall@5 on MuSiQue, the benchmark with the highest multi-hop reasoning demands.SAG has also been deployed at a production scale of hundreds of millions of data items, with online retrieval latency kept within seconds. Project site and code are available at https://github.com/Zleap-AI/SAG-Benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SAG（SQLRetrieval Augmented Generation）架构，利用SQL动态构建局部索引结构，有效解决了RAG在多跳推理和结构化约束上的不足，取得了领先的多跳检索性能，并已大规模上线应用。
