Unlike prior work, AuAu evaluates not only a general closeness towards authoritarianism but also the established sub-concepts Authoritarian Aggression, Authoritarian Submission, and Conventionalism. Evaluating 17 models from China, the EU, Russia, and the USA, we find that all tested models exhibit substantial authoritarian response rates under the psychometric evaluation, though rates drop significantly in increasingly more realistic downstream task. We further find that an authoritarian system prompt easily manipulates 15 out of 17 models to promote increased authoritarianism. Our results underscore the need for continued, systematic auditing of LLM-based AI systems to detect and ultimately mitigate undesired authoritarian tendencies in generated output. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/andreaseinwiller/AuAu

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AuAu基准，用于系统性地评估大语言模型（LLMs）产生威权主义倾向回答的风险。对中、美、欧、俄的17个模型进行实证分析发现，大多数模型在心理测评下表现出一定程度的威权倾向，且易被操纵增强这种倾向。
AI.motivation: 近年来，威权主义在全球范围内抬头，LLM在人们生活中的作用日益显著，因此有必要探索和评估这些模型是否会表现或助长威权主义倾向。
AI.method: 研究者建立了AuAu评测基准，包括三类评测：（1）源自15个已验证心理量表的心理测评题；（2）模拟具体情境下意图行为的情景题；（3）现实用户提示下模型的回答。该评测不仅测试总体威权性，还涉及‘威权攻击性’、‘威权服从性’和‘常规主义’三个子概念，对全球17个主流LLM进行了横向对比测试。
AI.result: 所有受测模型在心理测评项下均有较高比例的威权主义倾向回答，但在更接近实际应用场景时，这种趋势明显下降。此外，15款模型在系统级威权型提示下回答中的威权性大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，多数全球主流大模型存在不同程度的威权主义倾向，且容易被操控。呼吁对基于LLM的AI系统开展持续、系统性的审计与监管，以检测并缓解不良输出倾向。

title: Comparing Human Gaze and Vision-Language Model Attention in Safety-Relevant Environments
comment: 30 pages, 33 figures. Submitted as a preprint. Code and data available upon reasonable request
summary:
Human visual attention plays an important role in how people perceive and respond to environments containing potential risks. This study investigates whether large vision-language models can identify the same regions of a scene that attract human attention in safety-relevant environments. Eye-tracking data were collected from ten participants viewing 33 scene images representing environments with varying levels of potential risk using Pupil Invisible wearable glasses. Gaze coordinates were mapped onto stimulus images to generate population-averaged human gaze heatmaps. In parallel, GPT-4o was prompted through the OpenAI Vision Application Programming Interface (API) to generate spatial predictions of visual attention, which were converted into saliency maps for comparison with human gaze patterns.
  Spatial alignment between human gaze heatmaps and model-generated saliency maps was evaluated using four complementary metrics: Pearson correlation (r = 0.515 +- 0.117), Normalised Scanpath Saliency (NSS = 0.988 +- 0.323), Kullback-Leibler divergence (KL = 1.766 +- 0.844), and Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve using the Judd formulation (AUC-Judd = 0.806 +- 0.076). A cross-model comparison with Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash, and Claude showed that all models exceeded the AUC-Judd chance baseline of 0.5 and achieved positive NSS scores. Gemini Pro demonstrated the strongest spatial localisation according to three of the four metrics, whereas GPT-4o produced the closest distributional match to human attention as measured by KL divergence.
  These findings suggest that large vision-language models can identify regions that broadly correspond to where humans direct visual attention in safety-relevant scenes without requiring eye-tracking training data. The results highlight the potential of vision-language models as a scalable tool for approximating human attentional patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大规模视觉-语言模型是否可以预测人类在安全风险环境中关注的视觉区域，并与真实眼动追踪数据进行了比较，结果显示模型预测具有一定的准确性。
AI.motivation: 人类在存在潜在风险的环境下的视觉关注对安全有重要影响，研究利用视觉-语言模型是否能有效地检测人类视觉关注区域，对于自动化风险识别和人机交互等领域具有实际应用价值。
AI.method: 收集了10名被试在33个不同风险环境场景下的眼动数据，通过可穿戴眼镜生成群体平均凝视热力图。同时，用GPT-4o等大模型通过API预测视觉关注区域，生成显著性图。采用相关系数、NSS、KL散度和AUC-Judd等多种指标评估模型与人类注视的一致性，并与Gemini Pro、Gemini Flash、Claude等模型对比。
AI.result: 所有大模型预测的注视区域与人类热力图均显著高于随机基线，且NSS为正。Gemini Pro在多数指标上空间定位最强，而GPT-4o在分布匹配（KL散度）上更接近人类。
AI.conclusion: 大规模视觉-语言模型无需眼动数据训练即可较好预测人类在安全相关环境下的视觉关注区域，有潜力作为模拟人类视觉关注的可扩展工具。

title: PATCH: Action-Chunk-Conditioned Latent Patch Innovation Monitoring for Robot Manipulation
summary: Learning-based manipulation policies have made substantial progress in real-world robot manipulation, particularly for short-horizon action generation. However, deployment in open workspaces remains fragile under unexpected local scene dynamics, such as moving objects, transient occlusions, or disturbances near the intended motion. Existing runtime monitors often rely on global observation anomalies, policy uncertainty, or frame-level visual changes, and struggle to distinguish task-relevant execution risk from benign visual variation. We introduce PATCH, an action-chunk-conditioned latent patch innovation monitor for deployment-time intervention. Given the active action chunk, PATCH defines a projected execution corridor, predicts latent patch evolution inside it, and accumulates persistent residuals unexplained by the robot's own motion. These residuals form a localized intervention signal that allows PATCH-Router to pause execution, select an available recovery source, and resume the original policy once localized innovation subsides. Experiments on real robot rollout data show that PATCH produces more stable and context-relevant triggers than competing runtime monitors. Real-robot deployment further demonstrates monitor-driven intervention and policy resumption for disturbance-aware manipulation. Project Page: https://yananzhou5555.github.io/PATCH/.

AI.tldr: 提出了PATCH方法用于提升机器人在变化环境下的稳健操作能力，通过检测局部异常实现更有效的在线监控和干预。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于学习的机器人操作策略在短时动作生成上取得进展，但在真实开放环境下容易受场景变化干扰，导致执行不稳定。现有监控方法难以区分有风险的变化和无关的视觉变化，因此需要更细致和相关性更强的监控机制。
AI.method: 提出了PATCH：针对机器人当前动作块，预测运动轨迹内的潜在patch演化，累积无法通过机器人自主动作解释的残差，作为局部干预信号，并通过PATCH-Router实现策略暂停、恢复和切换。
AI.result: 实验证明，PATCH在真实机器人任务中触发更稳定、与上下文相关的干预信号，优于现有运行时监控方法，实现了基于监控驱动的干预与策略恢复。
AI.conclusion: PATCH显著增强了机器人在动态和不确定环境中的自主干预与恢复能力，为长期自主操作提供了更为可靠的保障。

title: XAI-Grounded Explanation Generation for Speech Deepfake Detection with Training-Free Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Speech deepfake detection (SDD) systems require trustworthy explanations for reliable decision-making. Existing explanation ways mainly fall into two categories. Traditional explainable AI (XAI), such as gradient-based attribution, produces low-level attribution signals tightly coupled with model decisions, and harder to be understood by human than natural language explanations. Meanwhile, large language model (LLM)-based explanation generation often produces generic and ungrounded descriptions due to the lack of heuristic evidence and task-specific supervision, stemming from limited grounded explanation datasets for SDD. We therefore propose a training-free explanation framework that integrates XAI evidence with multimodal LLMs to generate grounded and specific explanations. Using the PartialSpoof dataset, we construct a grounded explanation dataset and show that methods with XAI increase inside accuracy by over 45\%, verified through human evaluation and faithfulness checks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合传统可解释AI（XAI）证据与多模态大语言模型（LLM）以生成可追溯、具体语音深度伪造检测解释的新方法，无需训练，方法显著提升了解释准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有语音深度伪造检测系统的可解释性存在两大不足：XAI解释难以被用户直接理解，而LLM直接生成的文本解释缺乏针对性和证据支撑。因此，迫切需要一个既具可追溯性、又贴合任务的解释方法。
AI.method: 提出了一个免训练框架，将XAI产生的低层次归因证据与多模态LLM结合，生成更具解释性且有据可依的自然语言解释。同时，利用PartialSpoof数据集构建了可追溯解释数据集，用于验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 引入XAI证据显著提升了生成解释的内部准确率，提高幅度超过45%，并通过人工评估和信度测试得到了验证。
AI.conclusion: 将XAI证据与LLM结合是提升语音深度伪造检测解释准确性与可追溯性的有效方式，实验结果验证了方法的优越性。

title: Show the Signal, Hide the Noise: Spectral Forcing for Pixel-Space Diffusion
summary: Pixel-space diffusion models are trained on full-bandwidth noisy images, yet the useful signal available to the denoiser is strongly frequency dependent. Under rectified-flow diffusion and natural-image power-law spectra, the per-band data-to-noise contour $k^{*}(t) = (1-t)^{-2/α}$ separates a signal-bearing low-frequency region from a noise-dominated high-frequency region at each time $t$. We show that this implicit coarse-to-fine structure is not merely descriptive: it induces a capacity-allocation problem. A standard pixel-space denoiser must discover the moving bandwidth boundary internally and can spend computation on frequency-time regions where the optimal prediction collapses to deterministic baselines rather than data-distribution modeling. To make this boundary explicit, we introduce Spectral Forcing, a parameter-free, time-conditional 2D-DCT low-pass operator applied to the noisy input before the patch embedder. Its cutoff expands monotonically with the diffusion time and becomes the identity at the data endpoint. Through controlled synthetic experiments, we identify the regime in which the operator is beneficial: coarse patch tokenization and data whose high-frequency content is predominantly noise rather than essential signal. On ImageNet-256 with JiT-700M/32, Spectral Forcing consistently improves both FID and Inception Score across different training epochs, demonstrating robust gains throughout training; at finer tokenization, the spectral forcing is still competitive. We further insert the unchanged operator into SenseNova-U1, a unified text-to-image model, where it improves DPG-Bench and GenEval, showing that the input-side spectral prior transfers beyond class-conditional generation. These results suggest a route to capacity-efficient pixel-space diffusion by showing the signal and hiding the noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spectral Forcing的新方法，通过在扩散模型中对输入噪声图像进行频域低通处理，以提升模型对有用低频信号的利用效率，从而提高生成质量和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统像素空间扩散模型在训练时需应对全频段噪声，但有用信息集中在低频，高频主要为噪声，导致模型在不必要的频段和时间上浪费大量计算资源。因此，需要方法明确区分和聚焦于有用信号频段，提高建模效率。
AI.method: 作者理论分析了扩散模型中不同频率段的信号噪声特性，发现需动态调整建模关注频段。提出Spectral Forcing方法：在扩散过程中根据时间步长动态调整2D-DCT频域低通滤波器，对输入噪声图像做自适应低通处理，使模型仅建模信号丰富的低频成分，高频噪声在早期滤除。该方法无需引入新参数，并能直接应用于不同扩散模型。
AI.result: 在图像合成任务ImageNet-256（基于JiT-700M/32模型）中，Spectral Forcing在多个训练阶段显著提升了FID和Inception Score，尤其对粗粒度patch建模和高频噪声占主导的数据集效果显著。进一步在SenseNova-U1统一文本到图像模型上，Spectral Forcing也显著提升了DPG-Bench和GenEval分数，证明其泛化性。
AI.conclusion: Spectral Forcing为像素空间扩散模型提供了一种高效的频域信号/噪声处理范式，使训练与生成过程能更好地分配模型容量于有信息量的区域，提升了建模效率与效果，并具备良好的泛化能力。

title: VENOM: Versatile Embodied Network for Omni-bodied Motion tracking
summary: Achieving expert-level expressive full-body motion tracking across multiple humanoids solely from demonstration data remains a challenging and relatively an underexplored problem in humanoid robot learning. Cross-embodiment motion tracking policies are mostly trained by decoupling the control problem into upper and lower body control. This work proposes VENOM, a cross-embodiment full-body motion tracking model for humanoids in simulation. VENOM is a GPT-based motion tracker trained on multiple humanoid data that can track the entire body without the requirement to split into upper and lower body control. We curate a multi-humanoid motion tracking dataset called the VENOM dataset that contains states, actions, and rewards and train VENOM and the baselines on this dataset. In this letter, we evaluate VENOM's performance against baselines and show that we can achieve a stable motion tracker across different humanoids more capable than an MLP trained on multiple humanoid data with supervised learning alone, and also show that despite lack of reward feedback, VENOM closely matches the tracking capability of experts that were trained using asymmetric-actor critic reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VENOM的跨体态全身动作追踪模型，并展示其在多种类人机器人上的稳定性和优越性。
AI.motivation: 传统的跨体态动作追踪方法通常需将控制问题拆分为上身和下身，存在协调难题，同时相关领域也较为欠缺研究，因此作者希望解决不分部位即可实现全身高保真动作追踪，提升多类型人形机器人的泛化能力和数据利用效率。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于GPT架构的VENOM动作追踪模型，在为此新构建的跨多种类人的VENOM数据集（包括多机器人状态、动作和奖励）上进行训练，无需将机器人动作拆分控制。同时，将VENOM与多层感知机（MLP）基线和专家型增强学习模型作性能对比。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，VENOM在跨多种类人形机器人上的全身追踪能力优于仅用有监督学习训练的MLP，同时即使没有奖励反馈，VENOM的追踪表现也非常接近采用增强学习的专家模型。
AI.conclusion: VENOM可实现不同种类人形机器人上的稳定且高效的全身动作追踪，在无需分裂控制或奖励信号的情况下，追踪效果逼近专家水平，验证了GPT架构在该问题上的独特潜力。

title: GRACE: Step-Level Benchmark for Faithful Reasoning over Context
summary: Many reasoning tasks require models to reason over input context, from document-grounded question answering to rule-based deduction. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting produces traces that appear transparent, yet individual steps can silently deviate from the source evidence, even when the final answer is correct. Existing methods detect hallucinations at the response level but fail to identify where in the chain a failure occurs or what type it is. We introduce GRACE, the first human-annotated step-level faithfulness benchmark with a data-driven error taxonomy for context-grounded textual reasoning. GRACE covers CoT traces from 10 models across 4 source datasets, with each step annotated for faithfulness, error category, and natural language explanation. A data-driven taxonomy, discovered bottom-up via unsupervised clustering, organizes failures into two tracks: GRACE-Inference (deductive errors) and GRACE-Grounding (factual grounding errors), with four categories each. The evaluation set is human-annotated and challenging by design. Our experiments reveal substantial headroom for current models. In addition, integrating step-level faithfulness signals into reinforcement learning pipelines improves both downstream accuracy and reasoning reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GRACE，这是一个针对链式思维推理（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）模型推理步骤逐步忠实度（faithfulness）的首个人工标注基准，并基于数据驱动方法建立了细致的错误分类体系。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型推理虽然表面透明，但每步可能离题却不易察觉，现有检测仅能发现整体的虚假信息，无法定位具体推理链中偏差出现的位置与类型。因此需要精细化标注和分类来更好分析和提升模型推理可靠性。
AI.method: 作者收集并人工标注了10个模型、4个数据集上的CoT推理轨迹，对每一步的忠实度、错误类型和解释进行逐步标注。并用无监督聚类的方式归纳出两大类推理失败（推理本身错误与事实依托错误），各含四种具体子类。随后将该标注数据集用于评价现有模型并探索在强化学习训练中引入逐步忠实度标注的效果。
AI.result: 实验显示当前主流模型在GRACE上仍有明显提升空间。此外，将逐步忠实度信号引入强化学习流程，可提升推理准确率和整体可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度的步骤级忠实度评测和误差类型归类有助于深入理解大模型推理过程及其不足，为提升大模型事实性和可控性提供了新工具，推进了模型推理可解释性和可靠性研究。

title: SPARK: Spatial Policy-driven Adaptive Reinforcement learning for Knowledge distillation
summary: Low-bit quantization enables deployment of image restoration (IR) networks on resource-constrained devices, but introduces rounding noise that disproportionately degrades high-frequency regions such as edges and fine textures. Existing knowledge distillation (KD) methods apply distillation signals uniformly across all spatial locations, overlooking the varying reconstruction difficulty across image regions. To address this, we propose SPARK (Spatial Policy-driven Adaptive Reinforcement Learning for Knowledge Distillation), a framework that adaptively allocates distillation effort using a lightweight reinforcement learning (RL) policy network. At each training step, a difficulty feature extractor computes four signals, namely Laplacian variance, pixel variance, student reconstruction error, and teacher-student knowledge gap, which are fed into a compact policy CNN that produces a stochastic spatial weight map to modulate the KD loss during quantization-aware training (QAT). SPARK is IR task-agnostic, adds no inference cost, and integrates into any existing QAT pipeline without architectural changes. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that SPARK consistently outperforms PTQ, QAT, and state-of-the-art (SOTA) KD approaches across multiple student architectures, achieving reconstruction quality closest to the full-precision teacher under significant computational constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出了SPARK框架，采用强化学习根据图像不同区域的重建难度自适应调整蒸馏信号分配，提高低比特图像恢复网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 低比特量化有助于在资源受限设备上部署图像恢复网络，但带来高频区域重建质量下降的问题。现有知识蒸馏方法忽略了不同图像区域重建难度的差异，导致蒸馏效率不足。
AI.method: 设计了SPARK框架，用轻量级强化学习策略网络适应性分配蒸馏权重。通过拉普拉斯方差、像素方差、学生重建误差、师生知识差距四种信号，生成空间加权图指导损失函数的蒸馏过程，可无缝集成于现有量化训练流程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和不同结构的学生网络上，SPARK均优于PTQ、QAT和SOTA知识蒸馏方法，在计算资源受限下，重建质量最接近全精度教师网络。
AI.conclusion: SPARK能高效提升低比特网络图像恢复质量，任务无关、无额外推理开销，并易于集成到现有量化训练流程中。

title: Pride and Prejudice: Toward an Information-Theoretic Framework for Mutually Communicative Driver Behavior Modeling
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for the IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS), June 2026
summary: Mixed autonomy driving becomes unsafe and inefficient when autonomous vehicles (AVs) and human-driven vehicles (HVs) misread each other's intentions. We study this problem as implicit mutual communication in lane changes. The proposed framework models how the ego vehicle both expresses its intent and probes the other driver's preference under epistemic uncertainty. It combines a level-k Bayesian persuasion game with virtual features for proactive signaling, information-theoretic rewards for mutual communication, and adaptive weights of communication affordances. We further introduce the Pride-Inquiry (P-I) and Pride-Prejudice (P-P) planes to analyze communication intensity and tendency. The model is calibrated with a Communication-Based Multi-Agent Inverse Reinforcement Learning algorithm (C-MIRL) on the naturalistic NGSIM dataset. Compared with the non-communicative baseline, the proposed model reduces the prediction error of mandatory lane changes by up to 20% while maintaining strong generalization. Driver-In-the-Loop questionnaire scores are positively correlated with the calibrated communication variables, supporting the subjective validity of the model. The learned rewards further show that inquiry and listening affordances contribute more than pride and expression alone, and that inquiry preference varies more strongly across drivers. These results support explicit modeling of mutual communication and epistemic uncertainty in interactive driving.

AI.tldr: 本文关注自动驾驶与人为驾驶混合场景下，由于彼此意图误读导致的不安全及低效率问题，提出了一种建模隐式互相沟通的车道变换决策框架，并在数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶汽车（AV）和人类驾驶汽车（HV）在混合交通中常因互相误会彼此意图，导致驾驶风险和效率降低。理解并建模车辆间隐式互通对于提升安全与性能非常关键。
AI.method: 提出以level-k贝叶斯劝说博弈为核心的沟通建模方法，通过虚拟特征实现主动信号表达，以信息论奖励建模沟通效果，并动态调整沟通度量维度。提出“Pride-Inquiry”和“Pride-Prejudice”二维沟通分析方法，并利用C-MIRL算法在真实交通数据集上对模型参数进行反向强化学习校准。
AI.result: 新模型在强泛化能力下，将强制变道的意图预测误差降低了20%，优于无沟通假设模型。同时，实际驾驶员参与打分与模型沟通变量高度相关，表明模型主观效度良好。学习到的奖励结果也显示倾听和探询对沟通效果贡献更大，并且探询偏好在驾驶员间差异更为明显。
AI.conclusion: 相较于忽略沟通与不确定性的传统方法，明确建模双方沟通以及不确定性，有望显著提升自动驾驶和人为驾驶混合环境下的安全性与效率。

title: Weaving Multi-Source Evidence for Biomedical Reasoning: The BioMedHop Benchmark and BioWeave Framework
summary: Biomedical question answering (QA) increasingly requires reasoning over interacting entities, where supporting evidence is scattered across biomedical knowledge graphs, literature documents, and web-accessible resources. However, existing biomedical QA benchmarks mainly focus on exam-style knowledge, literature comprehension, or short-range multi-hop inference, leaving source-conditioned graph reasoning and evidence topology construction underexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce BioMedHop, a multi-source graph-grounded benchmark for evaluating biomedical reasoning over structured evidence topologies. BioMedHop contains 10,045 instances across KG, document, web, and hybrid evidence settings, covering shared-neighbor matching, intersection reasoning, path-based reasoning, and counting, with option-based, open-ended, and numeric count renderings. To support this benchmark, we further propose BioWeave, a source-aware reasoning framework that retrieves biomedical KG paths, gathers supporting clues from documents and web sources, assembles them into a unified evidence graph, and verifies answers through entity-level evidence support. Comprehensive experiments show that BioWeave achieves the best overall performance among compared methods on BioMedHop, outperforming the strong hybrid baseline ToG-2 by 10.5% in the overall average. Moreover, BioWeave consistently improves different LLM backbones and enables smaller models, such as Qwen3-4B, to achieve reasoning performance comparable to GPT-4-Turbo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BioMedHop基准和BioWeave推理框架，实现了多源证据下的生物医学复杂推理任务，显著提升了问答系统的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前生物医学问答主要集中于试题式知识、文献理解或简单多跳推理，未充分涉及多源证据下的图结构推理和证据拓扑构建。为弥补该领域空白，需要构建适用于结构化多证据推理的评测基准。
AI.method: 作者提出了BioMedHop基准，涵盖知识图谱(KG)、文档、网页及其混合证据，设计了邻居匹配、交集推理、路径推理和计数等任务。并提出BioWeave框架，先检索KG中的路径，再融合文档与网页中的支持线索，组装成统一的证据图，通过实体级证据检验答案。
AI.result: 实验证明，BioWeave在BioMedHop基准上的整体表现优于现有方法，整体平均提升了10.5%，并能让较小模型（如Qwen3-4B）达到与GPT-4-Turbo相近的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: BioMedHop和BioWeave有效推动了多源证据结构化推理研究，为提升生物医学问答的深度推理能力提供了新工具和评测标准。

title: Landmark-free Assessment of Lower-limb Alignment with Implicit Neural Shape Functions from Knee Radiographs
summary: Radiographic assessment of lower-limb alignment (LLA) is important for predicting joint health and surgical outcomes in total knee arthroplasty. Traditional measurement methods are manual and time-consuming, while recent machine learning approaches typically rely on locating a fixed set of anatomical landmarks. This dependence limits flexibility and may require re-annotation when clinical definitions change. To address this, we propose an automated workflow using Implicit Neural Shape Functions (INSF). Rather than relying on explicit landmark coordinates, we encode the anatomy into a compact latent space and regress clinical alignment measurements directly from these latent codes. This architecture allows for rapid extendability to new tasks without altering the backbone representation. We trained our method on an internal dataset of 566 knee radiographs, each annotated with the outline of the femur and tibia. We evaluated it on both an internal test dataset of 50 patients and a separate external set of 402 preoperative cases from the MRKR dataset. Manual clinical measurements are available for these data, and the MRKR measurements will be made publicly accessible. Performance was comparable to state-of-the-art landmark-based methods and manual agreement, while offering a flexible shape representation that can be extended to additional measurement tasks.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于隐式神经形状函数（INSF）的自动下肢对线放射测量方法，通过学习图像的隐式特征，直接回归临床对线指标，减少人工操作且更具拓展性。
AI.motivation: 现有下肢对线测量方法依赖手动标记或基于解剖特征点的机器学习方法，费时并且灵活性不足，临床定义变化时需重新标注，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 方法利用INSF网络，不依赖具体解剖特征点坐标，而是将骨骼轮廓编码到潜在空间，从中直接预测下肢对线的临床指标。模型在566例膝关节X线片上训练，并在内部与外部测试集上进行评估，并与人工测量和现有算法做对比。
AI.result: 结果显示，该方法在测量下肢对线方面与人工和先进基于特征点方法表现相当，同时具备灵活、可扩展的骨形态描述能力。
AI.conclusion: INSF方法不仅自动化程度高，测量一致性良好，还为后续拓展更多骨科测量提供潜力，是下肢对线评估新的有效路径。

title: DataLadder: A Simulation-Enabled Interconversion Toolchain for the Embodied Data Pyramid
summary: Generalist robot policies require trustworthy evaluation and robot-usable training data, but both are difficult to scale with physical robots alone. Real-robot trials and demonstrations remain the most faithful source of deployment signals, yet they are slow, costly, and hard to reproduce. We present DataLadder, a simulation-enabled interconversion toolchain for human-robot aligned model evaluation and data generation, denoted as Robot $\rightleftharpoons$ Simulation $\rightleftharpoons$ Human. On the one hand, the Robot $\rightarrow$ Simulation $\rightarrow$ Human pathway supports human-robot aligned model evaluation by reconstructing real-robot tabletop organization tasks as calibrated digital twins for scalable evaluation, while using human embodied feedback to inspect and refine the naturalness of simulated motions. On the other hand, the Human $\rightarrow$ Simulation $\rightarrow$ Robot pathway supports human-robot aligned data generation: it lifts ego-centric human demonstrations into simulation, checks them under robot physical constraints, and converts them into robot-centered trajectories, annotations, and visual observations. Together, these pathways use the JoySim simulator as both a scalable evaluation layer and a physical consistency filter for robot data generation. We further package the core reconstruction, simulation, rendering, and realism-augmentation modules as cloud services on JD Cloud, turning the system into reusable infrastructure for robot data generation and model evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了DataLadder，一种基于仿真的人-机器人数据转化与评估工具链，实现了机器人、仿真和人之间的数据和模型的互通，提高了泛化型机器人策略的评测与训练数据获取的效率和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有的泛化型机器人策略需要大量可靠的评估与训练数据，现实机器人的试验和演示虽真实却昂贵且难以大规模扩展，亟需一种高效且可信的仿真辅助方案。
AI.method: 设计DataLadder工具链，打通“机器人—仿真—人”和“人—仿真—机器人”两条互通路径，实现（1）实机器人数据数字孪生重建，结合人类反馈优化仿真评估过程；（2）将人类演示提升至仿真、校验物理可行性，再转换为适用于机器人训练的多模态数据。核心模块基于JoySim模拟器实现，并以云服务形式部署。
AI.result: DataLadder支持高保真的虚实转化和大规模、自动化的数据生成及模型评估，显著减小了对物理现实机器人实验的依赖，提高了数据获取效率和评测可复现性。
AI.conclusion: DataLadder为泛化机器人提供了可扩展、可信赖的评估和数据生成基础设施，有助于加速机器人从研发到实际应用的过程。

title: PACT: Privileged Trace Co-Training for Multi-Turn Tool-Use Agents
summary: Multi-turn tool-use agents must reason, call tools, and adapt to observations across several interaction turns. Post-training such agents is challenging, as reinforcement learning often suffers from sparse rewards and weak credit assignment despite matching the prompt-only inference setting, while supervised fine-tuning on expert traces provides dense process supervision but can over-constrain the model to fixed trajectories. To tackle this, we propose PACT, a Privileged trAce Co-Training framework for multi-turn tool-use agents. The key idea is to use expert traces only as training-time optimization signals rather than rollout-time hints. PACT keeps rollout generation prompt-only, then uses expert traces to guide optimization through two complementary signals: a trace-conditioned RL surrogate that evaluates prompt-only rollouts under expert-trace context, and a component-aware SFT loss that supervises reasoning prefixes and tool-calls with annealed strength. To reduce over-reliance on the training-only trace context, PACT further introduces a prompt-only anchoring. We also provide a latent-trace view that connects the two trace-based objectives and explains how expert traces can guide optimization without being used during rollout generation. Experiments on FTRL, BFCL, and ToolHop show that PACT consistently improves over strong SFT- and RL-based baselines, highlighting the value of privileged trace co-training for multi-turn tool-use learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PACT框架，通过结合专家轨迹优势与提示推理，提升多轮工具使用智能体的学习效果，显著优于现有的SFT和RL基线。
AI.motivation: 目前多轮工具使用智能体的后训练面临两难：强化学习虽然符合部署时推理设置，但奖励稀疏且归因困难；而专家轨迹的监督微调带来更密集的训练信号，却容易让模型过拟合固定轨迹，导致泛化能力差。为兼顾两者优点，提升智能体在实际推理场景的表现，作者提出新方法。
AI.method: PACT框架将专家轨迹仅作为训练用的优化信号，不直接参与推理推断。在生成推理过程中，仅基于提示生成，而训练时借助专家轨迹提供两个辅助信号：一是轨迹条件RL代理信号，对提示推理结果给出评价；二是模块级的SFT损失，对推理和工具调用过程分阶段监督，并逐步削弱其约束强度。同时，设计提示锚定机制减缓对训练轨迹依赖，理论层面给出潜在轨迹解释。
AI.result: 在FTRL、BFCL和ToolHop三个多轮工具使用任务上，PACT方法在各项指标上均显著优于SFT（监督微调）和RL（强化学习）等强基线方法，验证了其有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: PACT框架通过训练时引入专家轨迹，而推理时仅依靠提示高效学习多轮工具使用任务，在保持泛化能力的同时提升了推理表现，为相关领域提供了新思路。

title: Focus, Align, and Sustain: Counteracting Gradient Dilution in Incremental Object Detection
summary: Adapting Detection Transformers to Incremental Object Detection (IOD) poses a systemic challenge, as set-based optimization is inherently destabilized by sequential learning. In this work, we identify Gradient Dilution as the root cause of performance degradation, wherein optimization signals required to preserve old knowledge are progressively weakened. This phenomenon manifests as a cascading erosion of preservation gradients in magnitude, direction, and support coverage, driven by three tightly coupled factors: Signal Dispersion, where foreground gradients are overwhelmed by background noise; Assignment Drift, where stochastic query-target matching induces inconsistent gradient trajectories; and Support Attrition, where gradients from retained samples insufficiently cover the old-class feature space, weakening decision boundaries under interference from new classes. To counteract this, we propose FAS, a unified framework that Focuses, Aligns, and Sustains gradient flow throughout incremental learning. Specifically, we introduce prior-injected queries to focus discriminative signals by filtering background interference at the source. We further propose deterministic anchor distillation to align query-target assignments and enforce semantic consistency across stages under unstable matching. Finally, we devise manifold-support replay to sustain distributional support of old classes, counteracting representational erosion induced by continual updates. Extensive experiments show that FAS restores robust optimization dynamics and outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving over 5.0 AP improvement in the challenging 40+10x4 incremental setting.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决检测Transformer在增量目标检测（IOD）中的退化问题，提出FAS框架，通过聚焦、对齐和维持梯度流，有效缓解旧类别遗忘，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统检测Transformer在序列学习下，优化过程中原有知识保留信号逐渐减弱，导致表现严重退化。作者系统性分析了导致退化的根本原因是梯度稀释（Gradient Dilution），并详细阐述了其三大形成机制（信号分散、分配漂移和支持衰减）。
AI.method: 提出了FAS统一框架，包括：（1）先验注入查询，过滤背景噪声，聚焦区分类信号；（2）确定性锚点蒸馏，对齐梯度分配，强化阶段间语义一致性；（3）流形支持回放，维持旧类特征空间覆盖，抵抗表示侵蚀。
AI.result: 在大规模40+10x4增量设置下，FAS相比最新方法提升AP超过5.0，表现更优，实验充分验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: FAS框架全方位缓解了检测Transformer在增量学习下的梯度稀释与知识遗忘问题，为增量目标检测提供了系统且高效的解决方案。

title: DIFF-IPPO: Diffusion-Based Informative Path Planning with Open-Vocabulary Belief Maps
summary: Exploration and object search require robots to perceive their environment, identify regions of interest, and plan trajectories that improve target-detection likelihood or maximize information gain. Many IPP methods, especially in continuous environmental monitoring, rely on Gaussian-process belief models, while object-search settings often produce complex, multimodal belief maps from semantic or open-vocabulary perception. Global trajectory generation directly conditioned on such non-Gaussian belief maps remains comparatively underexplored. Although diffusion-based planners offer strong capabilities for modeling such distributions, their use in informative path planning remains limited. In this work, we propose DIFF-IPPO, a pipeline that integrates an open-vocabulary belief map generator with a diffusion-based planner for global trajectory generation over belief maps. The method generates trajectories that concentrate sensor coverage over high-belief regions, achieving normalized detection scores between 81.49% and 86.55% across different dataset scenarios. We validate the system in a simulated search-and-rescue scenario where the planner searches candidate building regions to locate a burning building. In this setting, a team of five drones using batched belief-map-conditioned trajectory generation achieves first detections in 3.5 minutes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合开放词汇信念图和扩散模型路径规划的智能体搜索方法（DIFF-IPPO），在多个数据集场景下实现了较高的目标检测率，并在模拟救援任务中有优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的目标搜索和环境监测任务中，信念图往往具有非高斯、复杂多峰特性，现有路径规划方法难以直接处理这类信念图，从而影响任务执行效率。
AI.method: 本文提出DIFF-IPPO方法，将开放词汇的信念图生成与基于扩散模型的全局路径规划结合，实现针对非高斯信念图的轨迹生成，从而使传感器集中覆盖高置信度区域。
AI.result: 在不同数据集场景下，该方法实现了81.49%到86.55%之间的归一化检测分数。在模拟搜救任务中，五架无人机协作，在3.5分钟内实现了首次目标发现。
AI.conclusion: DIFF-IPPO可以针对复杂非高斯信念图生成高效的探索轨迹，在搜索和救援等任务中表现优异，为高复杂度环境下的智能体路径规划提供了一种新思路。

title: Creative Collision: Directorial Persona Steering and Competition in Large Language Models
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Human-AI Co-Creativity
summary: Activation steering has emerged as a powerful tool for shaping the behaviour of large language models at inference time, yet most prior work injects a \emph{single} semantic direction into the residual stream. We study the richer setting in which two semantically opposing steering vectors are superimposed -- a regime we call \textbf{Creative Collision}. Concretely, we construct directorial persona vectors for Steven Spielberg (optimistic, redemptive moral valence) and Martin Scorsese (dark, morally ambiguous) via mean-difference activation contrast on curated screenplay-derived corpora, then interpolate between them with a scalar mixing parameter $α\in [0,1]$ and a steering coefficient $λ$. Across five evaluation axes -- moral valence, generation coherence, surface style, directional dominance, and vector geometry -- three principal findings emerge: (i)~Spielberg's representational signature exhibits robust \emph{directional dominance}, suppressing Scorsese's moral influence across almost the entire interpolation range; (ii)~intermediate collision points paradoxically \emph{improve} generation coherence relative to pure single-director steering at high $λ$; and (iii)~both personas localise maximally to layer~28 of a 40-layer decoder-only transformer, revealing a shared \emph{moral-tone substrate}. These results illuminate the geometry of competing semantic directions in transformer residual streams and have direct implications for controllable creative generation and value-aligned narrative synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在大语言模型推理时，将两个语义相对立的激活向量叠加、进行“创造性碰撞”（Creative Collision）的方式，从而探索更丰富的模型行为调控方法。具体以斯皮尔伯格与斯科塞斯的导演风格为例，通过在模型残差流中插入不同权重的语义向量，系统分析其对生成文本的道德倾向、风格等多维影响。
AI.motivation: 现有激活引导方法，通常只注入单一语义方向，难以应对多元、对立或复杂场景需求。本文旨在研究并理解多个、特别是相互对立的激活向量叠加时对模型行为的影响，为实现更精细的模型可控生成和多样文本创作提供基础。
AI.method: 作者以斯皮尔伯格（乐观、道德）和斯科塞斯（阴暗、模糊道德）为例，通过对剧本语料进行激活均值差分，提取导演个性向量。在模型推理时，以混合参数α（介于0到1）及激活强度λ，将二者向量按比例注入模型残差流，并在五个评价维度（道德倾向、连贯性、表面风格、主导方向、向量几何）上进行系统分析。
AI.result: 1）斯皮尔伯格向量在大多数混合权重下展现出强主导性，抑制斯科塞斯风格；2）在高强度下，二者适度混合时，文本生成的连贯性 paradoxically 增强，优于单一风格；3）二者风格主要影响模型第28层，显示出残差流中存在“道德-风格”共性子空间。
AI.conclusion: 通过“创造性碰撞”的方法揭示了语义对立激活向量在残差流中的竞争与协同机制，为加强大语言模型可控性、多样性和价值导向叙事生成提供了理论与实践基础。

title: Trusted Multi-View Deep Learning Classification of Fetal Congenital Heart Disease with Feature-level and Decision-level Fusion
summary: Congenital heart disease (CHD) refers to the abnormal anatomical structure caused by the abnormal development of the heart and great vessels during embryonic development. Traditional diagnostics often fail to achieve high accuracy and efficiency, especially given the complexity of cardiac anatomy. This study presents a specialized multi-view deep learning framework for CHD binary classification using echocardiographic images. A large-scale CHD dataset, including five views, was used to train the model, enabling it to integrate multi-angle image data. The framework utilizes advanced feature extraction and attention mechanisms to improve diagnostic precision and reliability. An uncertainty-based decision-making component is also integrated to handle low-quality images, enhancing diagnostic outcomes. Experimental results show that this method achieves top-tier performance on our dataset and provides a robust tool for early CHD detection, underscoring its potential for clinical use. The dataset and source code will be released upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多视角深度学习的先天性心脏病二分类诊断方法，能高效处理五种超声心动图影像，实现精准诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统先天性心脏病诊断方法对复杂心脏解剖结构的识别准确率和效率不足，急需更智能高效的辅助诊断工具。
AI.method: 构建了结合多视角超声心动图的大规模数据集，设计深度学习框架，集成特征提取、注意力机制和基于不确定性的决策模块，提高模型对低质量影像的诊断能力。
AI.result: 该方法在自有大规模数据集上取得了行业领先的二分类性能，诊断精度和鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多视角深度学习框架为早期先天性心脏病筛查提供了高效、可行的新工具，具有临床应用前景，相关数据集和源码将公开促进研究发展。

title: SoK: Security and Privacy of Foundation-Model-Powered Robots
summary: Foundation models are reshaping robotics by enabling robots to interpret open-ended instructions, reason over multimodal contexts, and operate in complex, open-world environments. However, their integration also introduces security and privacy (S&P) risks that extend beyond the FMs themselves to embodied execution pipelines, supporting ecosystems, and broader governance impacts. Existing literature reviews provide valuable insights but often focus on specific FM types, risk categories, mitigation strategies, or trust boundaries. Consequently, the field lacks a unified structure for analyzing where risks originate, how they propagate across robotic systems, and where mitigations should intervene. To address this gap, we propose a progressive F-E-S-G structural boundary framework for analyzing the S&P of FM-powered robots. The framework comprises four layers: the Foundation model layer (F), Embodied system layer (E), Supporting ecosystem layer (S), and Governance impact layer (G). Building on this structure, we develop a multi-level taxonomy that organizes prior studies along three levels: F-E-S-G trust boundary, security-privacy concerns, and risk-mitigation perspectives. We further annotate each study using fine-grained coding attributes, including target, lifecycle stage, mechanism, system access, and effect. Guided by this framework and taxonomy, we systematize 96 papers. Our analysis uncovers multiple threat patterns, defense mismatches, and evaluation gaps that are difficult to identify from a single-boundary perspective. Based on these findings, we identify open challenges and future directions to provide a research agenda for developing secure, privacy-preserving, and responsibly governed FM-powered robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个F-E-S-G结构边界框架，对由大模型驱动的机器人系统中的安全与隐私（S&P）风险进行系统性分析和归纳。该框架从基础模型、具身系统、支持生态系统和治理影响四个层次系统划分风险来源与传播，构建多层次分类法分析现有文献并指明未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着基础模型（Foundation models, FMs）在机器人领域的广泛应用，其给机器人带来了强大的指令理解、多模态推理及开放环境适应能力。但与此同时，也带来了安全与隐私的新风险，而这些风险不仅仅限于模型本身，更多延伸到执行链条、系统生态及宏观治理等层面。现有综述局限于局部、本身缺乏统一整体框架，难以充分分析风险源头、传递路径及有效防御点。
AI.method: 作者提出了F-E-S-G四层次框架：基础模型层（F）、具身系统层（E）、支持生态层（S）、治理影响层（G），将过去文献按信任边界、安全隐私关注点以及风险-防御视角三维分类，并细粒度标注研究对象、生命周期阶段、机制、系统访问性及影响等维度，对96篇相关文献进行系统化归纳和分析。
AI.result: 通过该统一结构化分析，作者揭示出许多单一边界难以发现的威胁模式、防御不匹配和评估不足问题，并梳理出现有研究的主要缺口。
AI.conclusion: 本文不仅为FM驱动机器人系统的S&P分析提供了清晰结构化工具，也为发展安全、隐私保护及负责任治理的智能机器人指明了具体开放挑战和未来研究路线。

title: Who Should Lead Decoding Now? Tracking Reliable Trajectories for Ensembling Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) have emerged as a distinct paradigm for sequence generation. As MDLMs become diverse in capabilities and knowledge coverage, an important question is how to combine their knowledge. Toward this, we first investigate the unique decoding dynamics of MDLMs. We find that successful generations exhibit stable confidence dynamics over answer-relevant positions, while unreliable trajectories can often be corrected by injecting promising intermediate states from other models. Guided by this observation, we propose $\textbf{TIE}$ ($\textbf{T}$rajectory-based $\textbf{I}$terative $\textbf{E}$nsembling), a knowledge fusion framework in which MDLMs iteratively identify reliable decoding trajectories and relay them across models. TIE tracks confidence dynamics over answer-relevant positions to determine which model currently follows a more reliable trajectory and selectively transfers partially denoised sequences across models. As the model on the more promising trajectory often changes across denoising steps, TIE allows different models to contribute complementary strengths at different stages of generation. Strong performance across diverse reasoning tasks, along with our analyses, suggests that TIE offers a practical approach to the underexplored problem of MDLM ensembling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的知识融合框架TIE（Trajectory-based Iterative Ensembling），能将多个Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs)的能力和知识有效地融合，从而提升序列生成任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着MDLM模型在能力和知识覆盖上的不断丰富，如何有效整合多个MDLM模型的知识，变得非常重要。传统集成方法在MDLMs独特的解码动态下未必适用，因此迫切需要专门针对MDLM的集成框架。
AI.method: 作者首先分析了MDLM的解码动态，发现高置信度的生成轨迹在答案相关位置具有稳定性，而不可靠的生成可以通过引入其他模型的中间状态得到修正。在此基础上，作者提出了TIE框架，即在多个模型之间迭代地检测可靠的生成轨迹，并将部分已去噪的序列在模型间转移，实现优势互补。TIE通过跟踪答案相关位置的置信度动态，选择当前最可靠的模型片段进行迁移。
AI.result: TIE框架在各类推理任务上取得了优异的表现。实验和分析显示，TIE能够让不同模型在生成过程的不同阶段发挥各自特长，从而带来性能提升。
AI.conclusion: TIE为MDLM模型集成这一尚未充分探索的问题提供了实用且有效的思路，通过轨迹级、迭代式的知识融合机制，实现了多模型优势互补。

title: MamBOA: State-Space Architecture for Video Recognition
summary: Fine-grained action recognition demands temporal reasoning that general-purpose architectures address through different cost-accuracy tradeoffs: 3D dense operators couple computation to the input volume, while difference-based methods approximate motion through rigid, hand-crafted subtraction of uncontextualized features - each reflecting a deliberate design choice with corresponding limitations in expressiveness or flexibility. We present MamBOA, a backbone-agnostic temporal framework built upon a novel interleaved scan structure that recasts the selective state-space recurrence (S6) as a native motion synthesizer. By interleaving consecutive feature representations extracted from a pretrained backbone into a single alternating sequence, the proposed scan structurally drives the recurrence to encode both temporal observations of each position within a shared hidden state, separated by only a single decay step - rendering the inter-frame transition an intrinsic component of the state dynamics rather than an externally computed quantity. A cascade of dedicated alignment and decoding operations then distills this joint encoding into an explicit motion representation, which a dual-path pooling mechanism adaptively aggregates by balancing attention-driven selection with uniform temporal coverage. The framework interfaces seamlessly with CNN, Transformer, and Mamba backbone families, adding only ~2.1 GFLOPs per feature pair. On Diving48, MamBOA achieves 85.02% Top-1 accuracy with an image-pretrained backbone and 86.24% with a video-pretrained backbone processing the entire video in a single forward pass - demonstrating that structurally induced state-space dynamics constitute a principled and general foundation for motion modeling.

AI.tldr: MamBOA是一种用于细粒度动作识别的新型骨干无关时序建模框架，通过结构性地增强特征间时序关系，实现更高效、精准的动作识别，兼容多种主流特征提取器。
AI.motivation: 现有时序动作识别方法要么计算量大（如3D卷积），要么对动作变化建模力有限（如简单特征相减），很难在精度与效率间兼得，且对架构有明显依赖。
AI.method: 提出了MamBOA框架，以创新的交错扫描结构将连续时刻特征混合、输入状态空间模型S6中，实现在结构层面上对时间动态信息的编码。再经对齐与解码操作获得显式的运动表示，并用双路径池化机制平衡注意力选择与时序覆盖。该方法可无缝集成CNN、Transformer和Mamba等主流主干网络，并只引入极少计算量。
AI.result: 在Diving48数据集上，MamBOA配合图像预训练骨干取得了85.02%的Top-1准确率，视频预训练骨干则达到了86.24%，并能实现全视频一次前向处理，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构性地引入状态空间动态机制，为动作建模提供了通用且有效的基础，MamBOA具有出色的准确率与通用性，能够推动时序动作识别领域的发展。

title: ATOM-Bench: A Real-World Benchmark for Atomic Skills and Compositional Generalization in Manipulation Policies
summary: Generalist manipulation policies are increasingly presented as foundation models for robotic control, but their real-world generalization remains difficult to diagnose. A policy may succeed on demonstrated tasks while still failing to execute fine-grained atomic skills or recombine learned skills in new task structures. We introduce \textbf{ATOM-Bench}, a real-world benchmark for evaluating both atomic skills and compositional generalization in manipulation policies. ATOM-Bench factorizes tabletop manipulation into motor atoms and instruction atoms, and contains 30 atomic tasks and 24 held-out compositional tasks across paired single-arm and dual-arm robot tracks. We collect 3,000 human demonstrations for atomic fine-tuning and release both the demonstration data and evaluation rollout data to support reproducible real-world evaluation. Policies are fine-tuned on atomic tasks and evaluated on both atomic skill acquisition and held-out compositional tasks. We further introduce Atomic Score (AS) and Compositional Failure Share (CFS) to distinguish failures caused by weak atomic skills from failures caused by limited compositional reuse. Through 2,700 physical rollouts on five representative manipulation policies, we find that current policies can acquire simple instruction-grounding skills, but still struggle with fine-grained motor atoms, counting, and logical filtering. More importantly, strong atomic performance does not reliably transfer to held-out compositional tasks. ATOM-Bench provides a diagnostic testbed for studying whether failures arise from weak motor execution, poor instruction grounding, or limited compositional reuse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ATOM-Bench，这是一套用于评估机器人操控策略原子技能与组合泛化能力的真实世界基准测试。通过对原子任务与组合任务的系统性检验，发现当前主流策略在细粒度动作、计数和逻辑筛选等方面依然存在挑战，且单独任务表现优异未必能迁移到新组合任务中。
AI.motivation: 通用操控策略被视作机器人控制基础模型，但其在现实世界的泛化能力难以准确诊断。现有方法经常只在演示任务下评估，未能检验机器人是否真正掌握并能重组细粒度基本技能，应对新任务结构。因此，亟需一个能区分原子技能掌握与组合泛化能力的标准化基准。
AI.method: 作者提出ATOM-Bench，将台面操控任务细分为马达原子（动作基元）和指令原子，并设置30项原子任务及24项未见过的组合任务，分别适配单臂与双臂机器人。收集了3,000条人类示范用于fine-tune并公开相关数据，便于可重复性研究。提出Atomic Score（AS）和Compositional Failure Share（CFS）两项指标，用于区分失败原因。通过对5种典型策略共2,700次真实 rollout 评测，系统分析原子与组合任务能力。
AI.result: 实验表明现有操控策略能够掌握简单的指令-动作对齐，但在处理细粒度动作、计数及逻辑过滤时存在明显短板。更重要的是，原子技能表现强并不能保证新任务组合上的迁移成功，即原子能力与组合能力之间有显著gap。
AI.conclusion: ATOM-Bench为研究机器人操控泛化能力提供了系统性的诊断工具，有助于厘清策略失败是源于基础动作执行力、指令理解能力还是组合迁移能力的不足，是推动更强通用操控策略发展的重要基础设施。

title: HiMPO: Hindsight-Informed Memory Policy Optimization for Less-Entangled Credit in Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon agents rely on memory mechanisms to compress interaction history, but optimizing memory writing faces a distinct credit assignment challenge: a memory update may be rewarded or penalized due to downstream tool failures, noisy observations, or reasoning errors rather than its own contribution. This causally entangled credit can lead agents to discard useful evidence or preserve irrelevant information. We propose HiMPO, a Hindsight-Informed Memory Policy Optimization framework for assigning less-entangled credit to memory-writing actions in long-horizon agents. HiMPO first estimates the local utility of a memory update by comparing the task-relevant information recoverable from the previous and updated memories under the same pre-write state. It then uses hindsight relevance as a bounded retrospective filter that attenuates memory credit when local utility is not supported by the target outcome. The resulting memory-specific advantage is applied only to memory tokens, while trajectory-level rewards optimize the rest of the agent behavior. Across judge-based open-domain tasks and objective compressive-memory QA, HiMPO improves over strong memory-based and RL-based baselines while preserving compressed-context efficiency. Controlled interventions further show that HiMPO reduces blame leakage from tool-induced errors and improves attribution fidelity of memory updates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HiMPO框架，用于更合理地分配长时序智能体记忆写入的奖励，从而减少因记忆与后续任务结果间的因果纠缠导致的误归因，提高记忆机制的有效性。
AI.motivation: 长时序任务中，智能体依赖记忆机制压缩历史信息，但记忆写入的奖励归因容易受下游工具故障、噪声观测或推理错误影响，导致有效证据被误丢弃或无关信息被保留。因此，需要一种方法来对记忆写入的动作进行更准确的奖励归因。
AI.method: 提出了HiMPO框架，先通过比较写入前后记忆能恢复的任务相关信息，估算记忆更新的局部效用；再结合事后相关性做回顾性滤波，控制局部效用与实际任务目标不符时的奖励幅度。最终，将该特定记忆优势只用于记忆写入token，而轨迹级奖励优化智能体其他行为。
AI.result: 在基于评审的开放域任务和客观压缩记忆QA任务上，HiMPO较强基线（记忆机制和RL机制）有更优表现，并保持了高效的上下文压缩。在受控实验下，HiMPO能减少因工具错误导致的责任归属串扰，提高记忆更新的归因准确性。
AI.conclusion: HiMPO有效缓解了长时序任务智能体记忆写入奖励的因果纠缠问题，提升了记忆机制对有用信息的保留能力和归因的准确性，对于复杂任务的长期推理和信息压缩具有现实价值。

title: Enhancing Precision Agriculture with a Hybrid Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Class Plant Disease Classification and Interpretability
summary: This study proposes an overall deep learning architecture for multi-class classification of plant diseases from high-resolution leaf imagery, with a particular interest in investigating the behavior of ResNet-50 and a hybrid ResNet + Vision Transformer (ViT) design. A specially gathered image database with 15,200 training images and 3,800 validation images spanning 38 classes across multiple crops, including tomato, apple, grape etc. were subjected to preprocessing steps such as resizing, normalization, and data augmentation to enhance model robustness. Multiple architectures, including ResNet-50, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNet-B0, were trained and compared with the hybrid ResNet + ViT model. All models were fine-tuned using the AdamW optimizer and cross-entropy loss, with early stopping applied to prevent overfitting and ensure generalization. Furthermore, interpretability techniques such as Grad-CAM and saliency maps were implemented to indicate disease-relevant regions, while segmentation-based analysis was performed to identify the affected parts of a leaf. For every one of the considered architectures, ResNet-50 led to the highest accuracy of 98.74%, whereas the hybrid ResNet + ViT model achieved a competitive accuracy of 98.58%, showing that the hybrid architectures were effective in capturing both local and overall information. The experimental results showcase the promise of transformer-based models to achieve highly accurate, interpretable, and computationally efficient computer-based multi-class multi-disease classification systems, providing helpful assistance for cultivation management practices as well as for precision farming.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的多类别植物病害识别方法，在高分辨率叶片图像上进行了验证，并对比了ResNet-50、ResNet+Vision Transformer（ViT）等多种模型，在38类作物病害数据集上取得了最高98.74%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 精确且自动化地识别多种作物的多类病害对农业生产和精准农业管理至关重要。传统方法依赖人工检测，费时费力、易出错。因此迫切需要高效、智能、可解释的病害分类系统。
AI.method: 构建包含38类作物病害的高分辨率叶片图像数据集，通过数据增强和图像预处理提升模型泛化能力。训练并比较ResNet-50、MobileNetV2、EfficientNet-B0及ResNet+ViT等多种深度学习模型，并结合AdamW优化器与早停机制优化训练过程。使用Grad-CAM和显著性图等可解释性技术标注关键病变区域，以及基于分割的方法定位叶片受感染部分。
AI.result: ResNet-50模型取得了98.74%的最高准确率，ResNet+ViT混合模型也达到98.58%，显示出两者在多类病害识别中的高效性和准确性。Transformer相关方法具备高度准确性与优良的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习特别是混合Transformer架构可有效提升多作物多病害识别的准确性与可解释性，具有为农业生产和精准农作管理提供自动化、智能化决策支持的广阔前景。

title: Video-Based Optimal Transport for Feedback-Efficient Offline Preference-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents often requires meticulous reward engineering. Preference-based RL (PbRL) offers a promising alternative by learning reward functions from human feedback, but its scalability is hindered by high labeling costs. Inspired by advances in Video Foundation Models (ViFMs), we present Video-based Optimal Transport Preference (VOTP), a semi-supervised framework that learns effective reward functions from only a handful of labels. By leveraging optimal transport to align visual trajectories within the rich representation space of ViFMs, VOTP effectively generates high-fidelity pseudo-labels for large amounts of unlabeled data, substantially reducing human supervision. Extensive experiments across locomotion and manipulation benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of VOTP, which outperforms state-of-the-art offline PbRL methods under limited feedback budgets. We also showcase the robustness of VOTP in the presence of visual distractors and validate its utility on real robotic tasks, where it learns meaningful rewards with minimal human input.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了VOTP（基于视频的最优传输偏好）半监督框架，在极少人工标注的情况下，通过ViFM大模型视觉表征结合最优传输，从大量未标注数据中生成高质量伪标签，有效学习高质量奖励函数，显著减少人工反馈需求，并在多项任务中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习往往依赖复杂的奖励工程，PbRL虽可用人工偏好学习奖励函数，但标签获取代价高、难以扩展。作者希望减少人工标注，提升偏好式奖励学习的可扩展性。
AI.method: 方法核心是提出VOTP框架：借助Video Foundation Models的视觉表征空间，用最优传输方法将视觉轨迹对齐，生成大量高保真伪标签，实现半监督奖励函数学习，减少人工标注依赖。
AI.result: 在多种运动与操作任务基准上，VOTP在有限人工反馈下超越了最先进的离线PbRL方法。同时在干扰条件下也展示了鲁棒性，并在真实机器人任务上验证了其实用性。
AI.conclusion: VOTP能高效利用少量人工反馈，大幅减少奖励函数学习的人力成本，在不同场景和任务中表现优异，为PbRL方法带来现实落地可能性。

title: PaperJury: Due-Process Review for Bounded LaTeX Revision
summary: Pre-submission hardening of human-authored LaTeX computer science papers differs from drafting assistance because it requires adversarial whole-paper review, explicit no-fix outcomes, and bounded artifact-safe revision. Existing writing assistants, critique generators, and judge-centered loops lack durable issue identity across rounds, deterministic routing from critique to adjudication, and manuscript control that can reject invalid concerns or defer author-dependent ones. We present PaperJury, a closed-loop review-verdict-revise-verify system built on a deterministic-versus-semantic split: deterministic orchestration manages decomposition, a frozen claim spine, a durable ledger, routing, stopping, and exact-once patch application, while semantic agents are limited to bounded review, judgment, and repair. PaperJury combines bounded holistic review, contestability-based routing, a due-process trial, and risk-proportional guard chains for anchor-bounded edits, yielding terminal outcomes of invalid-drop, valid-fixable, and author-required. In a two-arm expert-review evaluation on held-out Vision, natural language processing, and machine learning papers against four baselines, we assess issue quality, verdict and routing quality, edit safety, convergence behavior, and cost, supporting the thesis that load-bearing safety and completion logic should reside in deterministic orchestration rather than model discretion. PaperJury is available at https://github.com/u7079256/paperjury.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PaperJury的自动化LaTeX学术论文审稿与修订系统，通过将决定性流程与语义智能体分离，实现了高安全性、高可靠性的审稿-修订闭环。
AI.motivation: 传统的写作助手和自动批改工具无法提供对学术论文层面的对抗性全稿审查，缺少对问题的持续追踪与控制权，容易产生无效或不可控的反馈，无法保障论文修订过程的安全和有效终结。因此，作者希望构建一个支持可审查、争议、确定性修订流程的系统，以提升学术论文预处理的自动化水平和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了PaperJury系统，其核心是将整个流程拆分为决定性（程序）和语义（AI）两部分，决定性部分负责流程编排和责任记录，保证每个批评和修订的唯一性及安全应用；语义部分仅参与有限的批判、判断和修补。系统实现了全稿审查、基于争议的路由、裁决、风险比例的防护链和三种终结判决结果。实验基于视觉、NLP和ML实际论文，与四种基线方法进行对比评估。
AI.result: 在对比实验中，PaperJury在问题识别质量、裁决和路由质量、修订安全性、收敛性以及成本方面表现较为优越，验证了将安全与补全逻辑放入决定性编排的重要性。
AI.conclusion: PaperJury实现了自动化、高安全性的学术论文审查与修订流程，证明了流程决定性编排比单纯依赖AI模型更能保障论文处理的安全性与完整性。

title: Decoupled Motion Representation Learning for Moving Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared small target detection in dynamic scenes remains challenging due to the highly coupled motions among targets, imaging platforms, and dynamic backgrounds. Existing multi-frame methods usually perform implicit temporal modeling, where coherent background dynamics dominate motion correspondence learning, leading to an inherent trade-off between detection and false alarms. In this work, we observe that background motions exhibit strong global coherence, whereas small targets mainly correspond to sparse local motion anomalies. Moreover, many false-alarm responses maintain high consistency with globally coherent motion patterns, indicating that they mainly originate from coherent background dynamics rather than genuine target motions. Based on these observations, we propose a decoupled motion representation learning framework for moving infrared small target detection. Specifically, an explicit motion branch is introduced to model globally coherent motion dynamics using pretrained optical flow priors, together with a structure-preserving self-supervised adaptation strategy for infrared motion correspondence learning. Meanwhile, an implicit motion branch based on deformable feature alignment is designed to capture target-sensitive local motion anomalies under coherent motion guidance. Furthermore, a coherent-motion-guided local anomaly reasoning module is proposed to identify and suppress coherent-motion-induced false responses during localized motion modeling. Extensive experiments on two challenging infrared small target detection benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches, particularly in dynamic scenes with complex motions, while maintaining favorable inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型的运动解耦表示学习框架，有效提升了动态场景下红外微小目标检测的准确性，减少了虚警，在多个基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在动态场景下，目标、成像平台和背景之间的复杂交互运动导致红外微小目标检测难度大，现有方法在检测率和虚警率之间存在权衡，缺乏对局部异常目标运动与全局一致背景运动的有效区分。
AI.method: 提出了一种运动解耦框架，包括显式和隐式两个运动分支：显式分支利用预训练光流建模全局一致运动，并通过自监督适配结构保护红外运动，隐式分支采用可变形特征对齐，挖掘目标敏感的局部运动异常；同时设计了基于一致运动引导的局部异常推理模块，以抑制由背景引发的虚警。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的红外微小目标检测数据集上，所提方法在复杂动态场景中检测精度和抑制虚警率方面均显著优于当前主流方法，同时保持较高的推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提运动解耦表示学习方法在提升动态场景下红外微小目标检测的鲁棒性和准确性方面具备突出优势，为相关实际应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: ExoTraj: A General Lower-limb Exoskeleton Assistance Policy for Complex Environments
summary: Adaptive torque prediction in dynamic exoskeleton scenarios requires expensive motion capture systems, which are infeasible in complex outdoor environments. Trajectory prediction has emerged as one of the effective approaches to address such an issue. However, the core challenges of exoskeleton trajectory prediction are twofold: establishing the mapping from multi-modal features to trajectory information; constructing the mapping from trajectory to torque. For the former, most existing methods perform only single-step prediction and neglect inter-subject trajectory variability, thereby limiting the trajectory optimization space and prediction generalization. To address this, this paper proposes a fast flow matching method that enables accurate trajectory prediction and better generalization for real-time performance, where trajectory generation errors and encoded observations are used to guide the training direction. For the second challenge, due to the high dynamics of the human-robot system and the strong coupling between perception and control, simple control methods struggle to achieve efficient assistance based on the predicted trajectory. This paper utilizes model predictive control and designs a novel optimization objective to optimize torque, ensuring the exoskeleton achieves comfortable and robust assistance. By integrating the above two components, the unified policy, denoted as ExoTraj, is developed to enable adaptive assistance in complex outdoor scenarios without high data acquisition cost. Experimental results show that compared to traditional methods, ExoTraj reduces cross-subject prediction error by 14.0% during the online phase and maintains robustness against external noise. Relative to the zero torque condition, ExoTraj decreases metabolic rate by 11.5-24.4%, heart rate by 1.7-19.5%, and peak muscle activation levels by 10.9-41.3%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需昂贵动捕系统的新方法，通过改进的轨迹预测和力矩优化，实现外骨骼在复杂户外环境下的自适应助力，提高泛化能力和效率。
AI.motivation: 在动态外骨骼场景下，传统的力矩预测依赖昂贵的动捕系统，不适用于户外。如何通过高效的轨迹预测辅助力矩估算，是提升实用性的关键。
AI.method: 提出了一种快速流匹配（flow matching）方法，实现多模态特征到轨迹的高精度预测，并结合模型预测控制（MPC）和新型优化目标提升力矩辅助效果。最终将二者集成为统一策略ExoTraj。
AI.result: ExoTraj在实际测试中，相较于传统方法，跨受试者轨迹预测误差降低14.0%；受外部噪声影响小。在运动辅助方面，ExoTraj使新陈代谢率降低11.5-24.4%、心率下降1.7-19.5%、峰值肌肉激活度减少10.9-41.3%。
AI.conclusion: ExoTraj优化了轨迹预测和力矩输出，实现了无需高成本数据采集的自适应外骨骼助力，提升了复杂环境下的实际应用潜力与助力性能。

title: TMASC: Transmasculine Attitude and Speech Corpus
summary: We introduce the Transmasculine Attitudes and Speech Corpus (TMASC), a multimodal corpus of 196 transmasculine individuals, including questionnaire responses and 66 audio recordings. The questionnaire includes items exploring the vocal health of transmasculine individuals. The audio recordings include cough and throat-clearing samples, a reading passage, and additional session-specific questions. This paper outlines the development of this corpus and the data collection procedures. To illustrate the utility of this corpus, we present three case studies demonstrating how this crowd-sourced multimodal corpus can be used to support transmasculine individuals. These include the integration of perceptual and acoustic data, the identification of group-level characteristics, and the calibration of acoustic measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Transmasculine Attitudes and Speech Corpus (TMASC)的新型多模态语料库，包含196位跨性别男性的问卷及66份录音，并通过三个案例展示了该语料库的应用。
AI.motivation: 跨性别男性群体在声线健康、社会适应等方面的研究和支持工具较为缺乏，需要一个具有代表性的数据集，供学术界和医疗领域分析其独特的声音及相关需求。
AI.method: 作者招募了196名跨性别男性参与者，收集了问卷（包括嗓音健康问题）和66份音频（干咳、清嗓、朗读和问答），详述了数据收集与开发流程。此外，通过三个案例探讨了语料库的数据整合和应用方式。
AI.result: 展示了三个应用案例：1）知觉与声学数据整合；2）群体特征识别；3）声学测量校准，证明了该语料库在科研和社区支持方面的多重实用性。
AI.conclusion: TMASC语料库为跨性别男性的音声健康及相关研究提供了宝贵资源，有助于提升对该群体的理解，并推动个性化、科学化的支持与服务。

title: G2IA: Geometry-Guided Instance-Aware Retrieval and Refinement for Cross-Modal Place Recognition
summary: Cross-modal place recognition (CMPR) enables camera-only robots to localize against pre-built LiDAR maps in autonomous navigation scenarios. This image-to-point-cloud setting is challenged by two coupled ambiguities: the modality gap between perspective RGB appearance and sparse metric geometry, and perceptual aliasing among urban places with similar roads, facades, intersections, and object arrangements. Instead of treating CMPR as a single global descriptor matching problem, we argue that reliable retrieval requires both geometry-aware representation alignment and fine-grained candidate verification. In this paper, we propose G2IA, a geometry-guided instance-aware framework for image-to-point-cloud place recognition. In the retrieval stage, visual geometry priors from VGGT and instance features are integrated to construct place descriptors that are more compatible with LiDAR-derived map representations. In the refinement stage, the retrieved candidates are re-ranked by explicitly verifying whether local instance shapes and their relative spatial layouts are consistent across modalities. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that G2IA consistently improves image-to-point-cloud place recognition under different localization thresholds, and exhibits strong cross-dataset generalization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了G2IA框架，通过结合几何引导与实例感知的方法，提高了跨模态（图像到点云）场所识别的准确性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 跨模态场所识别能够帮助仅配备摄像头的机器人在激光雷达地图上进行定位，但受限于模态差异（视觉外观与稀疏几何）和城市环境中道路、立面等结构的高度相似性，导致识别任务具有很大挑战。
AI.method: 作者将识别问题分为两个阶段：1）检索阶段，融合视觉几何先验（VGGT）与实例特征获得更适用LiDAR地图的场所描述子；2）精化阶段，对候选结果通过比对局部实例的形状和空间布局在不同模态下的一致性进行重新排序。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，G2IA在不同定位精度下均提升了跨模态场所识别的性能，并展现出较强的数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何引导和实例感知的双重机制，G2IA有效缓解了模态差异和感知混淆问题，提升了图像到点云的场所识别表现，是跨模态定位领域的重要进展。

title: SGM-SLAM: Scene Graph Matching for Data-Efficient Distributed SLAM
summary: We introduce a data-efficient distributed Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) framework designed for a team of robots equipped with LiDAR, cameras, and inertial sensors. Our framework uses scene graph matching to identify inter-robot measurement constraints. Unlike prior approaches that rely on feature-level matching, our framework is the first to perform scene graph matching using only object labels and centroids. Our approach constructs a scene graph by using fused RGB-LiDAR point clouds to generate both a semantically segmented point cloud layer, and a layer of discrete bounded objects, to accompany estimated robot trajectories. Scene graph matching is performed collaboratively through exchanging and matching object data with neighboring robots. To maximize communication efficiency, we utilize a multi-step data exchange and optimization process. We demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach using both simulation and real-world datasets collected by legged robots in indoor and outdoor environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的数据分布式SLAM框架，通过场景图匹配实现多机器人协作定位与建图，显著提升了通信与识别效率。
AI.motivation: 现有多机器人SLAM方法通常依赖特征级匹配来构建互联约束，数据量大、对通信和计算资源需求高。因此迫切需要更高效且鲁棒的新方法以提升多机器人协作SLAM的实用性和扩展性。
AI.method: 本方法使用融合了RGB与LiDAR点云的数据，生成语义分割点云层和离散对象层构建场景图，并通过物体标签和质心进行场景图匹配，实现机器人之间的对象信息交换和互联约束。采用多步数据交换和优化流程，提升通信效率。
AI.result: 通过在仿真和实际场景（包括室内外四足机器人采集数据）中的实验，验证了本方法在场景识别和数据通信方面的高效性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分布式SLAM框架在保持高精度的同时，极大降低了通信负担，使多机器人协作建图更加高效、实用。

title: Tyler: Typed Latent Reasoning for Language Models -- When to Think, What to Compute, and How Much to Allocate
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting improves reasoning in large language models (LLMs) by externalizing intermediate computation as discrete text tokens, but this textual interface also introduces redundancy and inference overhead. Latent reasoning offers a promising alternative by carrying part of the computation in continuous representations. However, existing methods typically predefine when latent computation is invoked and how it is allocated during decoding, leaving a key problem unresolved: when to invoke latent computation, what type of computation to perform, and how much budget to allocate. We propose \textbf{Ty}ped \textbf{L}at\textbf{e}nt \textbf{R}easoning (Tyler), a typed and budget-aware framework for latent reasoning during autoregressive decoding. Tyler learns a policy that, at each decoding step, chooses between emitting a text token and switching to a latent computation module specialized for a particular reasoning function. Once invoked, an operator maps the current reasoning state into latent tokens that support global planning, local state updates, or reusable procedural abstraction. Across extensive experiments on three backbone LLMs, Tyler improves accuracy by up to 14.49 points over CoT and by up to 4.30 points over the strongest competing baseline. It further generalizes across diverse reasoning domains and achieves the best final-stage performance with the lowest forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的隐式推理框架Tyler，实现推理类型化和预算管理，在自动回归解码过程中有效提升大模型的推理能力，比传统连锁思维（CoT）和现有最优方法有更高表现。
AI.motivation: 传统的连锁思维（CoT）方法通过将推理过程外化为文本，虽然提升了LLM推理能力，但带来了冗余和推理延迟。已有隐式推理方法虽然尝试用连续表达来减少这些问题，但在什么时候、如何调用隐式计算等关键决策上不够完善。
AI.method: 提出Tyler框架，在每一步解码阶段，动态决策输出文本还是进入特定类型的隐式计算模块。Tyler通过学习得到策略，根据推理需求选择模块，包括全局规划、局部状态更新、过程抽象等，并对隐式推理预算加以管理。
AI.result: 在三种主流大模型上，Tyler的准确率相比传统CoT最高提升14.49个百分点，相比当前最优基线也提升至多4.30个百分点。同时对多种推理场景有良好泛化和最小遗忘的优势。
AI.conclusion: Tyler框架实现了更灵活、高效的隐式推理策略，显著提升了大模型的推理表现，是当前隐式推理领域的领先工作。

title: HemExp: Clinically-Guided Latent Diffusion for Modeling Hematoma Expansion
summary: Hematoma expansion (HE) after spontaneous intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH) is a major determinant of acute triage and treatment decisions in neurosurgical care. However, most existing methods provide either a binary expansion risk or a single follow-up volume, limiting uncertainty-aware decisions. We introduce HemExp, a clinically-guided latent diffusion model that generates patient-specific follow-up non-contrast CT images, along with segmentations of intraparenchymal and intraventricular hemorrhage. Generation is conditioned on baseline imaging, clinical variables, and an explicit expansion indicator, enabling controllable simulation of realistic clinical scenarios. HemExp uses a hemorrhage-aware multi-head variational autoencoder and models progression as the difference between baseline and follow-up latent representations with a conditional diffusion model. The model is trained on paired scans from 450 patients across multiple centers and evaluated on 107 patients from a held-out institution. HemExp produces spatial HE probability maps by generating multiple synthetic follow-up images per patient to estimate distributions of plausible follow-up hematoma volumes. Perturbing clinical inputs such as symptom-onset-to-imaging time or anticoagulant status shifts the predicted follow-up volume distribution. HemExp extends binary predictors and demonstrates robust estimation of clinically relevant outcomes in the imaging space, such as hematoma volume, intraventricular involvement, and mass effects. Overall, our results support controllable latent diffusion as a promising direction for uncertainty-aware modeling of early ICH progression.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种名为HemExp的潜在扩散模型，可以根据患者基线CT、临床变量等，个性化地产生随访CT图像及出血分割，并能生成血肿空间概率图，更好地体现不确定性，有助于辅助ICH进展和治疗决策。
AI.motivation: 现有的血肿扩展预测方法大多只给出二分类风险或一个随访体积数值，难以表达不确定性与临床复杂性，无法灵活模拟多情景，限制了神经外科早期决策。
AI.method: HemExp模型采用基于血肿信息的多头变分自编码器(VAE)，将病程建模为基线与随访潜在表征的差异，通过有条件扩散模型实现可控模拟，并结合了影像、临床变量，以及可控的扩展指示符。模型在450例多中心患者配对CT训练，在1家未见机构的107例测试。
AI.result: HemExp可按具体患者生成多张随访影像，并据此给出血肿体积空间分布概率图。它支持模拟如发病至影像的时间、抗凝状态等变量的扰动，生成对应的预测分布，能稳健估计血肿体积、脑室受累、占位效应等临床风险。
AI.conclusion: HemExp作为不确定性感知的扩散建模工具，能够超越传统二分类风险预测，帮助神经外科医生更全面、个性化、可解释地预测ICH早期进展，为临床决策与模拟提供新方法。

title: LOPAL: Local Performance-Aware Active Learning from Imperfect Demonstrations
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL), 2026
summary: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) enables intuitive robot skill acquisition by allowing robots to learn directly from human task demonstrations. However, current methods often fail to address the fact that due to suboptimal and inconsistent human behavior, the quality of the demonstration can vary within each demonstration. Therefore, we introduce LOPAL (LOcal Performance-aware Active Learning), an active learning approach that leverages this local demonstration quality information. Our approach consists of two synergistic components. First, a local performance-driven LfD method uses a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to encode both the demonstrated trajectories and their associated local quality assessments. This enables the generation of trajectories that outperform the imperfect demonstrations by utilizing complementary local data of high performance. Second, active data acquisition allows to improve beyond the imperfect demonstrations by collecting additional informative samples. In areas missing good data, the user is actively requested to provide corrections through a shared autonomy (SA) mechanism, while the robot autonomously executes the learned behavior. The efficacy of LOPAL was validated in both a simulation and a real-world experiment. The results from a real-world pipe inspection task showed that the proposed approach can achieve up to 27.31 % improvement in task performance while also reducing the effort required to collect the demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的主动学习方法LOPAL，能够根据示范过程中的局部质量改进机器人学习，实验证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有从示范学习（LfD）方法未充分考虑人类示范中局部质量不一致的问题，导致机器人学到的技能存在性能瓶颈，难以超越人类表现。
AI.method: LOPAL由两部分组成：（1）基于高斯混合模型（GMM）的局部性能驱动LfD方法，同时编码轨迹和对应局部质量；（2）主动采集数据，在缺乏高质量示范区域时，通过共享自治机制请求用户修正。
AI.result: 在仿真和实际管道检测任务中进行验证，LOPAL方法可使任务性能提升至比原始示范高27.31%，并减少所需示范数据量。
AI.conclusion: LOPAL不仅能克服示范质量不足问题，还通过主动学习和用户交互显著提升机器人任务表现，具有较强实用价值。

title: Evaluating LLM Personalization via Semantic Constraint Verification
summary: Current evaluation paradigms for Large Language Model (LLM) personalization rely heavily on brittle surface-matching metrics or computationally expensive LLM-as-a-judge protocols, both of which lack interpretability. To address these limitations, we introduce Natural Language Inference Constraint Verification (NLICV), a scalable, semantically invariant framework that maps sentence meanings to truth-condition sets to verify personalization constraints via a Natural Language Inference (NLI) model. Moving beyond binary scoring, NLICV categorizes LLM behaviors into four distinct modes: personalization, generalization, sycophancy, and failure. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NLICV aligns closely with human annotations while drastically reducing the latency and token costs associated with LLM judges (up to 2100 inference speedup). Finally, through an ablation-based procedure, NLICV pinpoints the exact sentences driving the constraint verification, yielding faithful, understandable evidence for its evaluations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的大语言模型（LLM）个性化评估框架NLICV，利用NLI模型验证个性化约束，效率高，解释性强。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM个性化评估方法存在解释性差或计算开销大的问题，需要更高效、可解释的方法。
AI.method: 提出NLICV框架：将句子语义映射为真假条件集合，并用自然语言推断（NLI）模型验证个性化约束。同时，将LLM行为分为个性化、泛化、奉承和失败四类，并结合消融实验定位具体影响评估的句子。
AI.result: NLICV与人工标注结果高度一致，评估速度提升达2100倍，显著减少LLM裁判所需的计算和Token成本。
AI.conclusion: NLICV不仅高效且可解释，还能提供评估证据，显著改善当前LLM个性化评估的局限性。

title: CoMNeT: A MedNeXt-CorrDiff Framework for Volumetric Brain Tumor Segmentation
summary: Accurate brain tumor segmentation from multiparametric magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is critical for treatment planning, response assessment, and quantitative neuro-oncology research. However, automated segmentation remains a difficult task in computer vision because of variation in tumor appearance and MRI protocols across patient scans. Moreover, clinically important regions such as enhancing tumor (ET) and tumor core (TC) are often small relative to the full brain volume, furthering increasing the difficulty of achieving high voxel-level precision. In this paper, we show that combining a modern 3D convolutional segmentation model with corrective diffusion-based refinement and ensembling improves volumetric glioma segmentation on the UTSW-Glioma dataset. We propose CoMNeT, a MedNeXt-CorrDiff framework that uses four MRI modalities as input and predicts ET, TC, and whole tumor (WT) regions for automated brain tumor segmentation. MedNeXt is used as the primary segmentation model with Global Response Normalization for feature learning, while CorrDiff is trained as a postprocessing residual refinement method to correct errors in the probability maps before final thresholding. Using five-fold cross-validation, CoMNeT achieved the highest Dice score for most tumor regions, with ET, TC, WT, and average Dice scores of 0.7543 +/- 0.0261, 0.6806 +/- 0.0166, 0.9049 +/- 0.0128, and 0.7798 +/- 0.0184, respectively. CoMNeT outperformed two selected baseline models: SegResNet (0.7555 +/- 0.0190 average Dice) and standalone MedNeXt (0.7697 +/- 0.0154 average Dice). Our findings support the use of corrective diffusion and fold-level probability ensembling as practical additions to existing state-of-the-art 3D convolutional models for automated glioma segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoMNeT的新方法，通过结合3D卷积分割模型、扩散式修正和集成技术，实现了脑胶质瘤的高精度自动分割。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤自动分割因肿瘤形态与MRI协议差异大、关键区域体积较小而难以精确实现。提高自动分割的精度对临床治疗和影像分析研究意义重大。
AI.method: 提出了CoMNeT框架，采用四种MRI模态输入，利用MedNeXt作为主分割模型并引入全局响应归一化进行特征学习；同时设计了CorrDiff作为后处理方法修正概率图，实现更精细的分割。通过五折交叉验证和结果集成提升模型表现。
AI.result: 在UTSW-Glioma数据集上，CoMNeT在大多数肿瘤区获得最高Dice分数（ET: 0.7543, TC: 0.6806, WT: 0.9049, 平均: 0.7798），明显优于对比的SegResNet与单一MedNeXt。
AI.conclusion: 结合扩散修正和集成的三维卷积框架能显著提升脑胶质瘤自动分割性能，对现有先进模型具有实用价值。

title: Binary Tracking for Spatial QA and Navigation with Open Vision-Language Models
comment: 21 pages, 4 figures, 15 tables. Project page: https://ndb796.github.io/BinaryTracking ; Code and dataset: https://github.com/ndb796/BinaryTracking
summary: This work addresses spatial question answering for service robots traversing long egocentric routes. Given a query such as "where can I find a dry cleaner on the way back home?", the system returns a metric coordinate that downstream navigation components can act on. Prior Spatial Question Answering approaches leverage retrieval-augmented agents built on closed-source models such as GPT-4o for path exploration. However, robots operating in the real world often cannot reliably depend on online closed-source models due to network instability, communication latency, and deployment cost. It creates a need for open-source based Spatial Question Answering approaches that can run onboard the robot, yet prior research in this direction remains limited. This work proposes BinTrack, a simple yet effective, fully open-source spatial-localization agent that leverages the temporal ordering of a robot's trajectory. BinTrack performs a binary search over the trajectory segments between two anchor landmarks identified from a query. It improves overall accuracy by up to 22.8% over other open-source implementations and even matches the reported closed-source model result on the global category of the SpaceLocQA benchmark, the most challenging setting that has so far required strong reasoning agents such as GPT-4o. Furthermore, its optimized inference strategy consistently yields more than a 1.5x inference speedup over previous approaches. Finally, this work releases GangnamLoop, a novel and practical multi-trip outdoor benchmark collected by deploying a real quadruped robot on public streets with the anonymization policy. It revisits the same locations under different outdoor conditions and pairs the robot's low viewpoint with the human owner's. The source codes and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/ndb796/BinaryTracking

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向服务机器人空间问答系统的新方法BinTrack，能够在长距离自我视角路径中，基于文本查询准确定位目标坐标，并优于现有开源方案，接近闭源模型效果。还发布了新的户外多轮回数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有空间问答系统多依赖闭源大模型（如GPT-4o）和联网检索，这在实际机器人应用中受限于网络不稳定、通信延迟和部署成本。因此亟需完全开源且可本地运行的空间问答方案，但相关研究较为稀缺。
AI.method: 提出BinTrack系统，基于机器人运动轨迹的时间顺序，在由文本查询确定的两个锚点之间采用二分搜索定位目标坐标，只需开源工具即可实现空间推理。
AI.result: BinTrack在SpaceLocQA等标杆数据集上，整体准确率较其他开源方法提高最多22.8%，并在最具挑战性的global类别下可与闭源模型（如GPT-4o）媲美；推理速度也提升了1.5倍以上。
AI.conclusion: BinTrack证明了开源方法在机器人空间问答领域的可行性和优越性，为机器人落地部署提供了强有力的支持，并通过发布新数据集促进了研究社区的发展。

title: Surpassing Scale by Efficiency: A Compact 135M Parameter Foundational LLM Natively Adapted for the Bangla Language
summary: While the NLP landscape is dominated by multi-billion parameter architectures, their deployment in low-resource, non-Latin scripts remains computationally prohibitive for edge configurations, mobile systems, and decentralized local hardware. This paper presents bangla-smollm-135m, a highly compact 135-million parameter decoder-only foundational model engineered explicitly for high-efficiency language modeling in the Bangla script. By leveraging a deterministic intersect-and-append token merging strategy between TituLLMs and SmolLM2-135M, the model overcomes subword script fragmentation without destabilizing early pretrained parameter states. In zero-shot multi-task benchmark evaluations (PIQA_bn, OpenBookQA_bn, CommonsenseQA_bn, and Bangla_MMLU), bangla-smollm-135m matches or outperforms models twice its size (Gemma-3-270m) and achieves parity with models in the 1B parameter tier. The model is available at rnnandi/bangla-smollm-135m

AI.tldr: 提出了bangla-smollm-135m，一个仅有1.35亿参数、专为高效处理孟加拉文设计的小型语言模型，其性能媲美或超越更大体量模型。
AI.motivation: 当前主流NLP模型参数量巨大，但在边缘计算、移动设备等低资源环境下难以部署，且对非拉丁文本支持不足。
AI.method: 通过对TituLLMs和SmolLM2-135M采用确定性的交并token融合方法，有效解决了子词碎片化问题，同时保障参数稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个零样本多任务孟加拉文基准测试中，bangla-smollm-135m的表现与比其大两倍的模型持平或更优，达到与10亿级参数模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在效率与性能之间取得了良好平衡，对低资源、非拉丁文本环境具有较强实际应用意义。

title: Conditional Multi-Event Temporal Grounding in Long-Form Video
summary: Multimodal large language models have made rapid progress in video temporal grounding, yet real-world applications routinely require localizing every event that satisfies compositional temporal and spatial conditions. Existing benchmarks fall short: they localize only a single moment per query, count without temporal conditions, or treat grounding and counting as disjoint tasks. We introduce CoMET-Bench for Conditional Multi-Event Temporal Grounding in long-form video, comprising 2789 queries over 600 videos averaging 33.8 minutes across five real-world domains, with each query composed from 4 temporal conditions, 3 spatial conditions, and a dedicated negative-query subset. We further propose a unified evaluation protocol jointly measuring counting, grounding, and negative-query recognition, including a new Rejection-F1 metric that prevents trivial gaming by lazy "always-empty" models. Benchmarking a broad suite of MLLMs, agent-based, and grounding-specialized methods reveals that existing approaches remain far from solving this task. Building on these findings, we propose CoMET-Agent, a training-free agentic framework that reformulates the task as structured search-and-aggregate, improving F1@0.5 by 6.1% over GPT-5 purely through structural reasoning. Failure analysis further surfaces three open directions: fine-grained entity tracking, position-uniform retrieval, and causal event pairing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CoMET-Bench这一新的长视频复合条件多事件时序定位的基准数据集，针对现有方法不足，引入统一评测协议及新指标，推动此领域发展。作者还提出了无需训练的CoMET-Agent方法，显著提升了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时序定位方法和数据集只关注单一事件，或分别处理计数与定位任务，不能满足实际应用中对复杂时序与空间复合条件事件的定位需求，因此需要更具挑战性的基准和全面的评测方法。
AI.method: 1）提出CoMET-Bench数据集，包含600个平均33.8分钟的长视频，共2789个多条件复合查询，涵盖丰富时空组合与负样本。2）设计统一评测协议，同时考察计数、定位、和负样本识别能力，引入Rejection-F1新指标。3）基于结构化推理，提出训练自由智能体框架CoMET-Agent，将任务建模为结构化搜索与聚合。
AI.result: 基于多种主流多模态大模型和专业定位算法的基准测试表明，现有模型在该任务上表现远低于人类水平。所提CoMET-Agent通过结构性推理，不借助训练，将主流大模型GPT-5的F1@0.5提升了6.1%。
AI.conclusion: 本文为视频时空复合条件多事件定位提供了新的基准和严格评测标准，并通过分析给出了未来提升方向，如细粒度实体追踪、均匀位置检索、因果事件配对等。

title: Unified Motion-Action Modeling for Heterogeneous Robot Learning
summary: We present Unified Motion-Action (UMA) Model, an approach that uses 3D object motion trajectories as a shared interface to bridge visuomotor control and dynamics modeling. UMA treats object motion and robot actions as co-evolving variables under a masked generative objective, in which the mask pattern determines both the supervision regime during pretraining and the inference mode at deployment. Using hindsight-relabeled motion contexts and a contrastive objective that disentangles task intent from scene geometry, UMA enables multi-task pretraining across heterogeneous data sources without requiring manually annotated task instructions. At deployment, the same pretrained parameters support motion-conditioned visuomotor control, motion-based dynamics modeling, and task adaptation from few-shot demonstrations. Pretrained on a mixture of robot demonstrations, human videos, and simulated data, UMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines specialized for each inference mode.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一运动-动作（UMA）模型，通过以3D物体运动轨迹作为共享接口，连通视觉运动控制与动力学建模，实现多任务学习和推理，并在多个推理模式下优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉运动控制与动力学建模方法通常分割开来，难以高效利用多源异构数据、执行灵活推理。作者旨在设计一种统一框架，能够共同学习与利用物体运动与机器人动作间的联系，实现更广泛、更高效的任务泛化方法。
AI.method: UMA模型把物体运动和机器人动作视作共同演化的变量，通过掩码生成式目标设计，在预训练时根据掩码变量组合实现不同监督方式；利用回顾式重标定运动上下文及对比学习目标分离任务意图与场景结构，并能在无显式任务标注下跨多数据源预训练。
AI.result: 在由机器人演示、人类视频和模拟数据混合组成的多样预训练数据上，UMA在运动控制、动力学建模及基于少量演示的任务适应等推理场景中，一致超越了各类最先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: UMA不仅实现了多源无注释预训练，还以统一参数支持多种推理任务，具备更强的泛化性和任务适应能力，为跨领域机器人学习提供了有效范例。

title: A Mechanistic Understanding of Pronoun Fidelity in LLMs
summary: Faithful and robust pronoun use is important for fair and coherent generations, yet large language models largely fail when multiple referents use different pronouns.
