To study the interplay of reasoning, repetition, and bias in this task, prior work relies exclusively on behavioural approaches, which may not reflect a model's internal workings. Therefore, we provide a mechanistic, model-internal perspective on pronoun fidelity, testing whether three mechanisms -- group entity binding (G), recency bias (R), and stereotypical bias (S) -- are causally implemented across several SOTA language models. Using Boundless Distributed Alignment Search, we find all three coexist as causal subspaces distributed across network depth. No single mechanism fully explains model behaviour, but a combination of the three consistently accounts for 91-99.5%. An attention head analysis further reveals two competing copying routes; group binding and stereotype share a localized concept-level route that retrieves a bound occupation-pronoun unit, while recency uses a distributed token-level route that repeats surface forms. In sum, pronoun fidelity arises from competition between simultaneously active causal subspaces.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了大语言模型在面对多个有不同代词指代的实体时，对代词使用的忠实性和鲁棒性问题，提出从模型内部机制视角分析影响代词选择的因素。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多采用行为方法评估代词使用，无法揭示模型内部机制。本研究希望解析模型内部的因果机制，理解为何模型会发生代词错用及不同偏差的来源。
AI.method: 作者分析三个机制：群体实体绑定（G）、近因偏差（R）、刻板印象偏差（S），采用Boundless Distributed Alignment Search方法，在多种SOTA语言模型中寻找这些机制对应的因果子空间，并结合注意力头分析其工作路径和分布。
AI.result: 发现三种机制都以因果子空间形式分布于模型深度层，无一机制能单独解释行为，但三者共同作用能解释91-99.5%的模型行为。进一步注意力头分析揭示了两条竞争性复制路径：群体绑定和刻板印象沿局部化的概念级路径，近因则用分布式的词级路径。
AI.conclusion: 代词忠实性源于多种机制的竞争与共存，未来提升模型公平性与一致性应关注这些机制的调和和权衡。

title: PPDM: Pixel Puzzling Diffusion Model for Speed and Memory Efficient Volumetric Medical Image Translation
summary: Diffusion models have demonstrated superior fidelity for medical image-to-image translation, but their extension to high-resolution 3D volumes is severely constrained by prohibitive computational cost and GPU memory requirements. Existing memory-efficient strategies often compromise global volumetric consistency or fine anatomical detail. In this work, we propose the Pixel Puzzling Diffusion Model (PPDM), a simple and effective framework for memory- and speed-efficient 3D medical image translation. PPDM introduces a reversible pixel puzzle-unpuzzle operator that trades spatial resolution for channel dimensionality, substantially reducing activation memory while preserving global context. To further improve efficiency and stability, we adopt a direct bridge diffusion formulation that starts from the conditional input rather than pure noise, enabling the model to focus on task-relevant residuals. In addition, a puzzle-gradient loss is incorporated to enforce spatial coherence and suppress grid-like artifacts introduced by spatial rearrangement. We evaluate PPDM on multiple challenging 3D medical image translation tasks, including low-count PET denoising, joint PET denoising and attenuation correction, and cross-modal MRI translation. Across all tasks, PPDM consistently matches or outperforms full 3D diffusion models while reducing training GPU memory usage by up to an order of magnitude and significantly accelerating inference, and it outperforms existing memory-efficient diffusion approaches based on latent compression or frequency decomposition. These results demonstrate that PPDM provides a practical and scalable solution for high-fidelity 3D diffusion-based medical image translation under limited computational resources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D医学影像转换扩散模型PPDM，既大幅降低内存消耗又保证了图像质量，且速度更快，效果超越已有方法。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率3D医学影像扩散模型因算力和显存要求过高难以实际应用，现有节约内存的方法会牺牲全局一致性或细节质量，因此需要更好的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Pixel Puzzling Diffusion Model（PPDM），通过可逆的"puzzle-unpuzzle"操作将空间分辨率转化为通道维度，从而减少激活内存，又不丢失全局信息。采用直接桥接扩散方式直接利用条件输入，专注于有意义残差，并引入puzzle-gradient损失提升空间连贯性、抑制伪影。
AI.result: 在多个3D医学影像任务（如PET去噪、MRI跨模态转换等）上，PPDM的图像质量与主流3D扩散模型相当或更优，但训练显存消耗最多降低一个数量级，推理速度大幅提升，同时超越现有的压缩或频域分解等节省内存扩散法。
AI.conclusion: PPDM是一种高效、实用且可扩展的3D医学影像扩散模型，能够在有限算力条件下实现高保真图像转换。

title: CrossMaps: Confidence-Aware Open-Vocabulary Semantic Mapping for Rover Navigation
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026: ROSE International Workshop on Robotics Software Engineering, June 01, 2026, Vienna, Austria
summary: Rovers rely on perception to maintain spatial maps that encode both objects and sensor quality (e.g., range reliability, lighting artifacts, data density), guiding data fusion, embedding updates, and navigation under partial observability. To study these coupled perception-navigation processes, we present CrossMaps, a real-time confidence-aware open-vocabulary semantic mapping pipeline that constructs language-queryable maps from RGB-D data. Building on VLMaps-style approaches, CrossMaps integrates multi-scale CLIP embeddings with confidence-aware fusion and a dual-memory architecture consisting of Short-Term Memory (STM) and Long-Term Memory (LTM). The STM aggregates noisy visual observations using geometric, semantic, and temporal confidence cues, while confident and coherent cells are promoted to the LTM as persistent semantic landmarks. Designed for deployment with a Jetson Orin-powered UGV alongside SLAM, CrossMaps runs in real time and produces semantic heatmaps that can be queried with natural language to guide rover navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出了CrossMaps，一种实时、自信度感知、开放词汇的语义地图系统，可通过自然语言查询地图以帮助机器人自主导航。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人在复杂环境下自主导航时，需依赖感知和地图构建来决策。现有方案在对象识别和传感器数据质量表征方面有限，难以应对部分可观测场景及数据噪声，且与语义理解和自然交互结合度不足。
AI.method: 提出CrossMaps系统，通过融合多尺度CLIP嵌入，实现开放词汇下的语义映射，同时引入自信度感知与双记忆体系（短期记忆STM、长期记忆LTM）。STM利用几何、语义及时序置信度融合噪声观测信息，可靠信息则转存入LTM作为持久性语义地标。此外，CrossMaps支持自然语言查询帮助导航决策。
AI.result: CrossMaps已在Jetson Orin驱动的无人地面车辆上与SLAM系统共同部署并且可实时运行，能够生成可被自然语言查询的语义热力图，并提升部分可观场景下的导航表现。
AI.conclusion: CrossMaps不仅提高了机器人在噪声和不完全信息环境下的地图构建和语义表达能力，还为基于自然语言的人机交互导航提供了技术基础。

title: PathRouter: Aligning Rewards with Retrieval Quality in Agentic Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Agentic GraphRAG trains language-model agents to iteratively retrieve and reason over graph-structured evidence, enabling more accurate and context-aware decision-making by efficiently navigating complex information networks. However, outcome-only reinforcement learning suffers from \textit{\textbf{answer-path reward aliasing}}, where correct answers may come from shortcuts rather than useful evidence paths. It also exhibits \textit{\textbf{search-update ambiguity}}, as scalar trajectory-level feedback does not indicate which retrieval actions to adjust. To mitigate these shortcomings, we present PathRouter, a path-aware training framework for agentic GraphRAG. PathRouter jointly evaluates each trajectory along answer correctness and evidence-path overlap, yielding four trajectory categories with differentiated GRPO advantage scaling that suppresses shortcut reinforcement while preserving evidence-seeking behavior. For evidence-poor trajectories, a frozen gold-evidence teacher provides token-level KL guidance on reasoning and search-query tokens, excluding answer tokens to avoid direct response imitation. Experiments on six QA benchmarks across three model sizes show that PathRouter consistently improves answer F1 and evidence-path overlap, achieving average F1 gains of 3.1 on 3B and 4.9 on 7B models compared to a strong baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PathRouter框架，通过联合考量答案正确性和证据路径重叠，提升Agentic GraphRAG模型在复杂信息检索和推理任务中的效果，显著改善了答案准确率和证据路径利用。
AI.motivation: 现有基于结果的强化学习在Agentic GraphRAG中存在奖励混淆（answer-path reward aliasing）和搜索-更新不确定性（search-update ambiguity），导致模型可能通过取巧路径得出答案或难以定位需改进的检索动作，影响检索推理的准确性和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出PathRouter训练框架：对每条推理轨迹按答案正确与证据路径重叠共同评估，将轨迹分为四类，分别调整优势缩放，抑制取巧路径的强化，激励寻找有效证据。对于证据较少的情况，引入“冻结金证据教师”，对推理与检索查询token进行KL指导，但不直接监督答案token，以避免简单模仿输出。
AI.result: 在六个QA基准任务、三种模型规模上，PathRouter在答案F1及证据路径重叠上均优于强基线：3B模型平均提升3.1，7B模型平均提升4.9。
AI.conclusion: PathRouter有效缓解GraphRAG中的奖励混淆和搜索-更新不确定性，显著增强了大模型在复杂图结构信息上的推理能力，可推广到多种检索增强生成应用。

title: SGFormer++: Semantic Graph Transformer for Incremental 3D Scene Graph Generation
summary: In this paper, we propose SGFormer++, a novel Semantic Graph Transformer for 3D scene graph generation (SGG), which aims to parse point cloud scenes into semantic structural graphs, where nodes denote detected object instances and edges encode their pairwise relationships, with the core challenge lying in modeling complex global scene structure. While existing graph convolutional network (GCN)-based methods suffer from over-smoothing and limited receptive fields, SGFormer++ leverages Transformer layers as its backbone to enable global message passing. Specifically, we introduce two key components tailored for 3D SGG: (1) a Graph Embedding Layer++ that efficiently integrates edge-aware global context with linear computational complexity, and (2) a Semantic Injection Layer++ that enriches visual features with linguistic priors from large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs), boosting semantic representation without introducing extra trainable parameters. To further address the practical challenge of incremental SGG (I-SGG), where new relationship categories arrive sequentially, we equip SGFormer++ with a novel Spatial-guided Feature Adapter, which calibrates predicate features using subject-object spatial geometry to counter scale variation, and a Cascaded Binary Prediction Head that mitigates catastrophic forgetting via task-incremental classifier expansion and logit distillation. Extensive experiments on the 3DSSG benchmark demonstrate that SGFormer++ achieves state-of-the-art performance in both standard and incremental settings: it yields a significant 4.49% absolute improvement in Predicate A@1 under the incremental setting. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/Andy20178/SGFormer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的语义图Transformer模型SGFormer++，用于高效生成3D场景图，实现了在标准和增量场景下的最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景图生成方法依赖于GCN，受限于过度平滑和感受野有限，不利于复杂场景结构的全局建模，迫切需要能更高效抓取全局信息的模型。
AI.method: SGFormer++以Transformer作为主干，包含两个核心创新：(1) Graph Embedding Layer++，能以线性复杂度整合具备边信息的全局上下文；(2) Semantic Injection Layer++，无需增加训练参数，将大型语言模型和视觉-语言模型的语义先验注入视觉特征。此外，针对逐步引入新关系类别的增量场景图生成（I-SGG），提出了空间引导特征适配器和级联二元预测头，改善特征刻画和缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在3DSSG基准上，SGFormer++在标准和增量场景下均取得最新最优表现，在增量场景下Predicate A@1提升了4.49%。
AI.conclusion: SGFormer++克服了GCN类方法的局限，通过Transformer架构与多项定制模块，高效刻画3D场景全局结构和增量知识，显著提升3D场景图生成效果和泛化能力。

title: SidewalkBench: Benchmarking Visual Navigation on Urban Sidewalks
summary: Urban sidewalk navigation presents significant challenges due to complex structural layouts, dynamic pedestrian behaviors, and long distances. While recent visual navigation models offer a promising solution, the lack of a unified benchmark hinders quantitative and reproducible evaluation. To bridge this gap, we propose SidewalkBench, a comprehensive benchmark designed for visual navigation on urban sidewalks. Built upon NVIDIA Isaac Sim, SidewalkBench brings GPU-accelerated simulation of diverse, high-fidelity sidewalk environments, including both procedurally generated and real-world scanned scenes. We further populate the scenes with rich, reactive event-based pedestrian behaviors and flexible, efficient animation, enabling standardized model evaluation under realistic real-world settings. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 9 visual navigation models on 330 unit-test scenarios, 800 pedestrian-reactive scenarios, and 105 long-horizon scenarios. Our findings highlight that pedestrian interaction and long-horizon robustness remain critical bottlenecks for existing models, and scaling up sidewalk training with synthetic data emerges as a promising solution.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个专为城市人行道视觉导航设计的新基准SidewalkBench，通过高保真模拟环境和丰富的行人行为，实现了对导航模型的标准化评测，为领域发展提供重要工具。
AI.motivation: 城市人行道视觉导航因结构复杂、行人动态和距离长而面临诸多挑战，目前缺少统一的评测基准，影响了相关研究的可比性与复现性。
AI.method: 作者基于NVIDIA Isaac Sim构建了SidewalkBench，包含多样性和高保真的人行道场景（程序生成与真实扫描的场景），并在场景中模拟了多样且反应灵敏的行人行为，还引入了高效的动画系统。利用该平台，作者对9种视觉导航模型在330个基础测试、800个人行人交互场景和105个长距离场景下进行了系统评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有视觉导航模型在与行人的交互和长距离导航的鲁棒性方面仍存在明显瓶颈。此外，使用合成数据扩大量化训练规模是一条很有潜力的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: SidewalkBench作为开放基准，有助于推动城市人行道视觉导航技术的客观评测和未来进步，特别是在强化模型对复杂行人互动和长距离导航鲁棒性方面的能力。

title: LectūraAgents: A Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Personalized AI-Assisted Learning and Embodied Teaching
summary: Effective personalized AI-assisted learning demands systems that can not only generate accurate learner-specific educational materials, but also dynamically adapt their instruction to diverse learners. However, existing educational agents have primarily focused on lecture content automation and simulations, which often fall short of modelling multimodal and embodied instructional methods tailored for the individual learner. To this end, we propose LectūraAgents - a multi-agent framework that enables personalized learning through end-to-end adaptive embodied teaching. At its core, LectūraAgents mirrors a professor-student relationship, in which a ProfessorAgent leads a collaborative team of specialized subordinate agents through research, planning, review, and embodied delivery of lecture contents that adapt to a learner's needs. The framework offers three main contributions: (1) a hierarchical multi-agent architecture for end-to-end personalized learning; (2) an adaptive embodied teaching mechanism, wherein the ProfessorAgent executes visible and pedagogically motivated teaching actions (e.g., handwrite, highlight, underline, etc.) over contents in a teaching environment; and (3) a Teaching Action-Speech Alignment (TASA) algorithm that employs salience-based heuristics and temporal semantic segmentation to generate coherent teaching action sequences aligned with learner profiles. We evaluate LectūraAgents on diverse courses at high school, undergraduate, and graduate levels using sample-specific rubric-based analysis; with generated lecture materials and teaching actions assessed and validated by expert educators. Experimental results show consistent gains in lecture content quality, embodied teaching quality, assessment, and personalization over existing approaches, positioning LectūraAgents as a pedagogically well-grounded framework for personalized learning at scale.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型多智能体框架LectūraAgents，用于实现端到端个性化和具身教学，提升个性化AI辅助学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的教育智能体主要集中在课程内容自动化和模拟，难以有效实现针对个体学习者的多模态与具身（embodied）教学方法，无法动态适应不同学习者的需求。
AI.method: 设计一个多层级多智能体架构，其中ProfessorAgent带领下属专业化智能体团队对教学内容进行研究、规划、复核和具身演示，并通过Teaching Action-Speech Alignment（TASA）算法调整教动作、语音等与学生需求对齐。该算法利用显著性启发和时序语义分割，实现教学动作的连贯与个性化。
AI.result: 在高中、本科、研究生不同层次课程上实验，用专家评价生成讲稿和教学动作，LectūraAgents在教学内容质量、具身教学质量、评测和个性化各方面较现有方法有一致提升。
AI.conclusion: LectūraAgents为大规模个性化学习提供了一套教育学基础扎实的新型框架，在课堂内容与具身个性化教学等方面兼具创新性与实用性。

title: CausalDrive: Real-time Causal World Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: World models have emerged as a promising paradigm for scaling autonomous driving (AD) data, yet existing video generative models fall short as interactive simulators. Layout-conditioned renderers rely on "oracle" future trajectories of all background agents, rendering them strictly non-reactive. Conversely, pure action-conditioned predictors lack semantic control over complex interactions and suffer from prohibitive diffusion latencies, hindering closed-loop policy learning. To bridge this gap, we present CausalDrive, a controllable, real-time foundation driving world renderer. CausalDrive operates solely on the initial front-view frame, the ego-vehicle's trajectory, and a macroscopic text prompt. By excluding future NPC layouts, we compel the model to intrinsically predict causal interactions, enabling text-driven control over Driving Sociology, allowing users to dynamically orchestrate diverse counterfactual reactions to identical ego-actions. To overcome the efficiency bottleneck and address the covariate shift in autoregressive generation, we propose a novel Context-Forced DMD architecture. This combines continuous flow-matching with a self-correcting distillation objective, achieving interactive speeds of 12 FPS. This breakthrough transforms the passive video generator into a playable neural simulator. We demonstrate its versatility across three downstream applications: (1) generative closed-loop evaluation with significantly mitigated collision artifacts, (2) large-scale Reinforcement Learning (RL) post-training driven by a Video2Reward module, and (3) real-time human-in-the-loop simulation. Extensive experiments validate that policies trained within CausalDrive's reactive scenarios exhibit superior interaction capabilities in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出CausalDrive，一种可控、实时的自动驾驶世界建模渲染器，克服了现有视频生成模型和动作预测模型的局限，实现了可交互的神经仿真器。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶视频生成模型依赖未来场景信息（如“oracle”式未来轨迹），无法处理因果交互，或者缺乏对复杂语义交互的可控性，且训练效率低，不能满足实时闭环学习和评估需求。
AI.method: CausalDrive仅依赖初始前视图、主车轨迹和文本提示，不使用未来背景车辆布局，强迫模型自动预测因果交互，并实现文本驱动的驾驶社会行为控制。提出Context-Forced DMD架构，通过流匹配和自校正蒸馏目标结合，实现12FPS实时交互生成。
AI.result: CausalDrive实现了生成式闭环评估（极大减轻碰撞伪影）、基于Video2Reward的强化学习大规模后训练及实时人机交互仿真等应用。实验显示，用CausalDrive反应式场景训练的策略在真实世界具有更强交互能力。
AI.conclusion: CausalDrive将被动视频生成器转变为可玩神经仿真器，为自动驾驶互动场景的综合评估和强化学习训练提供了高效、可控、实时的工具，并显著提升了策略的现实适应性。

title: When Should a Robot Replan? Regret-Guided Update Scheduling in Time-Varying MDPs
summary: Robots operating in non-stationary environments must continually adapt their policies as the dynamics drift, but onboard energy and compute budgets cap how often a full state estimation and re-planning step can be performed. This raises a question: \emph{when}, along a horizon, should a robot spend its limited budget? We formulate this problem in time-varying Markov decision processes (TVMDPs) with a known bound on the rate of transition drift. We model execution as a \emph{skip-update} scheme in which, at chosen update times, the agent estimates the transition kernel by maximum likelihood and computes a finite-horizon policy, and between updates reuses this policy under a propagated state estimate. We analyze the dynamic regret of this scheme and show how it grows during skip intervals in terms of the properties of the TVMDP and the skip lengths; the resulting bound answers the opening question via an online, regret-guided update rule that allocates the budget adaptively. We evaluate the rule in a simulated Mars-rover navigation task with time-varying slip dynamics and on a Crazyflie quadrotor in indoor obstacle fields. Adaptive allocation outperforms other budgeted baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个机器人在动态环境下有限能耗与计算能力下的自适应策略更新方法，有效提升了任务表现。
AI.motivation: 在动态环境中，机器人系统需要频繁地更新状态估算和策略以适应环境变化，但受限于硬件的能耗与计算预算，难以持续进行全量更新。因此，亟需一种方法合理分配策略更新的时机，以在有限预算下最大化任务表现。
AI.method: 将问题建模为具有已知转移漂移速率上界的时间可变马尔可夫决策过程（TVMDP）。采用“跳跃更新”方案：机器人在选定的时机重新估算转移核并规划有限步策略，而在两次更新之间则根据传播的状态估计复用已有策略。分析了此方案下的动态遗憾，并给出了随跳跃长度增长的理论界，从而推导出一个基于在线遗憾引导的自适应预算分配策略。
AI.result: 在模拟火星车导航（随时间变化的滑移动力学）及室内多障碍物四旋翼实验中，自适应分配策略表现优于其他有限预算的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法能够在动态环境下针对有限预算自适应地分配策略更新时机，理论和实验证明其优越性，适用于实际动态场景中的机器人任务。

title: ACCORD: Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding for Language Agents
summary: User instructions are often underspecified because humans rely on implicit assumptions about the surrounding environment. For large language model (LLM) agents operating in information-rich digital and physical environments, these assumptions cannot be inferred from the instruction alone; they must be recovered from the current state of tools, data, interfaces, and observations. Effective execution therefore requires agents to identify missing context, ground it in observed evidence, and carry it forward into subsequent actions. We show that current agents often fail to do so. They act from assumed rather than observed specifics, overlook information they could have gathered, and fail to incorporate evidence that has already been returned. Building on this insight, we propose ACCORD (Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding), a simple and effective agent framework for adaptive grounding. Before each action, ACCORD actively probes the environment for missing information and integrates relevant context from the agent's trajectory that would otherwise be overlooked. Requiring no additional training or task-success signals, ACCORD improves task-goal completion on AppWorld by up to +20.6 points with GPT-5-mini, from 42.0% to 62.6%, compared to strong baselines. These gains persist with a substantially stronger base model (+10.8 with Claude-4.5-sonnet), an open-weight model (+10.1 with Qwen3.5-27B-FP8), and on the embodied AlfWorld benchmark (+7.4 success rate with GPT-5-mini).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了ACCORD框架，有效提升了大模型智能体在复杂环境中的任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 用户指令经常缺乏上下文细节，而现有大模型代理在信息丰富的环境下难以自动推理、补充缺失的情境信息，导致任务失败。为此，提升模型自适应补全和利用环境信息的能力极为重要。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种简单且有效的智能体框架ACCORD：每次行动前，主动探查环境获取缺失信息，同时整合之前行动过程中获得但可能被忽略的关键信息。这一机制补全了指令和实际环境之间的差距。该方法无需额外训练或任务结果反馈信号。
AI.result: 在AppWorld环境下，配合GPT-5-mini使用，ACCORD将任务完成率由42.0%提升到62.6%，提高了20.6个百分点。在更强的Claude-4.5-sonnet及开源模型Qwen3.5-27B-FP8上，同样有10%左右的提升；在AlfWorld（具身智能体）环境下提升7.4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ACCORD框架显著提升了各类大模型代理在不同环境下的任务完成率，且适用多种模型，具备通用性和实用价值。

title: DYNA-PRUNER: Input-Adaptive Data-Model Co-Pruning for Efficient and Scalable Spatio-Temporal Media Prediction
summary: Spatio-temporal prediction supports radar/satellite nowcasting and city-scale traffic monitoring, but modern models are often too expensive for real-time deployment. This stems from a mismatch between dense computation and strong input-dependent redundancy (e.g., calm seas or clear skies). To enable automated, resource-aware architecture optimization in scalable media analysis, we propose Dyna-Pruner, an end-to-end framework for input-dependent co-pruning of data and model structure. A shared-importance synchronization mechanism generates coupled masks that prune redundant regions and their corresponding computational units (e.g., convolutional filters), yielding per-sample sparse sub-networks at inference time. Experiments on WeatherBench, SEVIR, and TaxiBJ show seamless integration with CNN, RNN, and Transformer backbones, reducing FLOPs by up to $70\%$ and achieving a $2.5\times$ speedup on NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin with negligible accuracy loss ($<1\%$).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dyna-Pruner框架，实现针对输入自适应地同时裁剪数据和模型结构，以大幅减少时空预测任务中的计算量，实现实时部署。
AI.motivation: 现有时空预测模型计算开销大，不适合实时应用，主要由于输入数据存在大量冗余信息，但模型计算未能有效利用。如何在保障精度的前提下，自动化地按输入情况裁剪数据和模型，是实现高效预测的关键。
AI.method: 提出Dyna-Pruner端到端框架，创新性地通过共享重要性同步机制，联合生成掩码，同时裁剪输入数据区域和对应的模型计算单元（如卷积核），从而动态生成稀疏子网络，用于单样本推理。该方法可无缝集成至CNN、RNN和Transformer等主流网络结构中。
AI.result: 在WeatherBench、SEVIR和TaxiBJ数据集上实验，Dyna-Pruner在几乎不降低准确率（小于1%）的前提下，减少了最多70%的FLOPs计算量，在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin硬件上实现2.5倍速度提升。
AI.conclusion: Dyna-Pruner有效实现了面向输入特征的资源感知裁剪，显著提升了时空预测模型的效率和实时性，兼容多种骨干网络结构，具有良好实用性和推广前景。

title: Task-Error Residual Learning for Real-Robot Five-Ball Juggling
comment: Submitted to the 2026 International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR)
summary: For residual learning that refines existing behavior, sample efficiency depends on two things: how much information each rollout returns, and how efficiently the learner uses that information. Reinforcement learning's standard scalar reward carries far less information than the directional task error that defines the task. Random exploration further discards whatever information each rollout returns. Through residual learning with directional task-error supervision and a task error model that drives sample selection, we achieve stable three-, four-, and five-ball juggling on anthropomorphic Barrett WAM arms. Despite planning and controlling through a simple, idealized stack, the system converges from the second attempt. The first attempt drops, after which task error decreases monotonically without further failures. In comparison, five-ball juggling typically takes humans years of practice. We compare residual learners across two ternary axes, the directional information in the learning feedback and the commitment of the analytic prior, spanning Newton-style Jacobian updates, Composite Bayesian Optimization, and stochastic search methods. Both axes prove necessary: neither directional feedback nor an informative prior suffices alone, and the simplest method that combines them, a fixed-Jacobian Newton update, is the most reliable. The learned residual tolerates substantial prior misalignment and degraded joint tracking, affecting mainly convergence speed. The bottleneck for residual learning on real robots is therefore the information content of the supervision signal and how the learner uses it, not the accuracy of the surrounding stack. Video documentation of all experiments is available at https://kai-ploeger.com/residual-juggling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合方向性任务误差信号与任务错误模型驱动样本选择的残差学习方法，实现了机器人三、四、五球杂耍，效率远超人类，并证实方向性反馈和先验承诺的组合关键提升学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有残差学习在复杂技能（如机器人杂耍）时采样效率低，主要由于传统强化学习的奖励信号信息量低且随机探索进一步降低利用率。因此，作者希望通过更富含信息的任务误差信号与高效利用该信号的方法提升效果。
AI.method: 作者采用了方向性任务误差作为监督信号并通过任务错误模型选择采样，同时研究了方向性反馈量（标量到向量）与先验承诺（如固定牛顿雅可比、贝叶斯优化、随机搜索）对学习表现的影响。
AI.result: 在Barrett WAM机械臂上实现了三、四、五球杂耍，其中五球杂耍由第二次尝试即收敛，错误单调下降。最简单的固定雅可比牛顿方法最可靠，具有较强的鲁棒性。相比之下，人类需要多年练习才能完成五球杂耍。
AI.conclusion: 提升残差学习的关键，是监督信号的信息含量和学习器的利用效率，远较外部控制栈精度重要。方向性反馈与信息丰富先验的结合是最有效策略，为高难度技能学习提供实证和理论支持。

title: From Awareness to Adherence: Bridging the Context Gap in Spoken Dialogue Systems via Context-Aware Decoding
summary: Despite the success of end-to-end (E2E) spoken dialogue systems, maintaining strict context adherence in multi-round conversations remains a challenge. While prior works attribute these failures to models forgetting dialogue history, we highlight an equally critical but overlooked bottleneck: a gap between latent context awareness and active adherence. Although models internally recognize relevant past utterances, strong parametric priors often overshadow these signals during decoding. To bridge this gap, we propose an audio-adapted Context-Aware Decoding (CAD) approach. By leveraging internal attention mechanisms to isolate key historical rounds, our approach contrasts output distributions with and without this key context during inference, directly amplifying multimodal contextual signals. Evaluations on the Audio MultiChallenge benchmark demonstrate significant improvements in Semantic Memory and Self Coherence subtasks, successfully enforcing strict, context-faithful adherence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的Context-Aware Decoding（CAD）方法，显著提升了多轮对话中模型对历史上下文的遵循性，特别是在音频多模态对话系统中。
AI.motivation: 尽管E2E语音对话系统表现出色，但在复杂的多轮对话中严格遵循上下文仍有困难，主要由于历史信息在推理阶段被强参数先验掩盖，导致模型未能充分利用已识别的历史重要信息。作者认为需要弥补模型内在的上下文意识与实际输出之间的差距。
AI.method: 提出音频适应的Context-Aware Decoding（CAD）方法，利用内在注意力机制筛选关键历史语轮，在推理时对比有/无关键上下文的输出分布，从而直接增强多模态上下文信号对输出的影响。
AI.result: 在Audio MultiChallenge基准上，CAD在Semantic Memory和Self Coherence两个子任务上取得了显著提升，模型更能严格、忠实地遵循上下文。
AI.conclusion: 音频适应的CAD方法可以有效强化多轮语音对话系统在多模态上下文中的一致性及上下文遵循能力，弥补了仅依靠端到端模型的不足。

title: Facial Affect Analysis for Service-Oriented Systems: Advances, Challenges, and Future Visions
summary: Facial Affect Analysis (FAA) is evolving from a stand-alone recognition task into a reusable perception capability for Service-Oriented Software Ecosystems (SoSE). This paper preserves the FAA methodological core while reframing recent advances through systems-engineering requirements for composable and dependable services. We review representative progress in static and dynamic expression analysis, action-unit and micro-expression modeling, and modern CNN, Transformer, graph, and hybrid architectures, then interpret these advances by their operational fit in edge, cloud, and hybrid service pipelines. The synthesis emphasizes SoSE concerns that determine deployability: service contracts for uncertainty-aware outputs, latency and availability envelopes, lifecycle monitoring and recalibration, governance-aware integration, and interoperability across independently evolving components. Our analysis shows that benchmark gains alone are insufficient for SoSE readiness; robustness under shift, intervention stability, fairness, privacy posture, and runtime guarantees are equally critical. We conclude with a roadmap for treating FAA as an operational service component with explicit interfaces, measurable quality attributes, and accountable lifecycle management.

AI.tldr: 本文将面部情感分析（FAA）从传统识别任务转变为可复用的服务组件，强调在服务导向的软件生态系统（SoSE）对其部署与集成的系统性需求，提出了一条面向实用化的研究与发展路线图。
AI.motivation: 随着服务导向的软件生态系统兴起，将FAA作为可复用能力，需要满足可组合、可靠以及可维护等系统工程需求，突破单纯算法性能的局限，实现实际应用落地。
AI.method: 综述了表情分析、动作单元与微表情建模、CNN/Transformer/图/混合结构等最新方法，并系统性分析了这些技术在边缘、云和混合服务架构中的应用适配，对服务部署中契约、延迟、可用性、监控、集成、互操作性等关键因素进行了总结与对比。
AI.result: 通过系统性分析，指出了当前方法仅提升基准性能不足以满足SoSE需求，同时还需关注模型鲁棒性、可干预性、公平性、隐私保护和运行时保障等。此外，给出了一份FAA服务化、可管控、可衡量质量的路线图。
AI.conclusion: FAA未来发展应以面向服务的组件化为目标，构建具有可显式接口、可度量质量属性和全生命周期可管理的解决方案，仅靠基准数据集成绩已难以满足实际部署需求。

title: ROVE: Unlocking Human Interventions for Humanoid Manipulation via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Human interventions provide crucial corrective signals for post-training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. However, enabling seamless humanoid interventions is a formidable systems challenge due to complex whole-body kinematics and dexterous-hand control. Consequently, the collected intervention trajectories are often suboptimal, and methods that rely on human interventions as expert supervision can absorb hesitant, inefficient, or even erroneous behaviors. To address both the system and algorithmic challenges, we propose ROVE, a reinforcement learning framework for humanoid VLA post-training with imperfect human interventions. First, ROVE introduces a human-in-the-loop pipeline capable of collecting deployment and intervention data for humanoid manipulation. Second, it utilizes Optimistic Value Estimation (OVE) to prioritize high-value behaviors from mixed-quality trajectories. To further robustify value estimation, we incorporate cross-embodiment human experience videos to provide rich supervision for long-tailed failure and recovery modes. The resulting critic yields informative advantage signals, steering the VLA actor to focus on high-value behaviors rather than indiscriminately imitating all actions. On challenging real-world contact-rich and fine-grained humanoid manipulation tasks, ROVE outperforms experience-learning baselines and consistently improves across multiple rollout-intervention iterations.

AI.tldr: ROVE是一种用于人形体视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型后训练的强化学习框架，能够利用带有缺陷的人类干预数据，有效指导机器人聚焦高价值行为，在复杂操控任务中表现优越。
AI.motivation: 人类干预对于后训练的VLA模型至关重要，但由于人形体复杂的运动学和精细手部控制，当前人类干预收集系统存在难度，且数据常常不理想，导致以此为监督信号的算法学习到了低效甚至错误的行为。
AI.method: 1）构建一个环人类干预的数据收集系统，收集实际部署和干预数据；2）提出乐观价值估计（OVE）模型，从混合质量的数据中优先关注价值高的行为；3）引入跨形体人类经验视频，提升对长尾失败和恢复模式的监督，从而增强模型的鲁棒性。最终，采用信息量大的优势信号，指导VLA模型学习并聚焦高价值行为。
AI.result: ROVE在多个现实的、高难度、依赖实时接触与细致操作的机器人任务中，明显优于现有基于经验学习的基线方法，并且在多轮滚动干预过程中表现出持续改进。
AI.conclusion: ROVE有效解决了人形体干预数据收集与利用中的系统及算法挑战，在处理带有噪声和不足的人类干预时，能够显著提升模型的表现和鲁棒性，对复杂机器人操控任务具有现实意义。

title: Lost at the End: Primacy Bias in Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures. Under review at EMNLP 2026
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering (KB-VQA) lets vision-language systems answer questions that exceed their parametric knowledge by conditioning a reader on passages retrieved from a Wikipedia-scale knowledge base. In pure-text long-context LLMs, retrieved-context use follows the U-shaped "lost-in-the-middle" effect of Liu et al. (2024): information at the start and end of context is used, the middle is lost. Whether this transfers to deployed multimodal KB-VQA is open. To close this gap, we design the first controlled probe of reader-side position dependence in multimodal KB-VQA: a gold-position protocol in which only the gold passage's prompt slot varies within question. We run it on three open-source 7B/8B VLM readers and two KB-VQA benchmarks at k up to 20. The shape flips from U to primacy: gold-at-first beats gold-at-last by 16 to 26 points on every reader-by-benchmark cell, an effect we call "Lost at the End". Three targeted ablations narrow the cause: a text-only control shows the multimodal setting amplifies an already-present text-mode primacy 2.2 to 4.5 times, and image-position and distractor-shuffle ablations together pin the locus to prompt slot 0 of the instruction-tuned reader. On a frozen reader, three retrieval-side fixes (MMR, oracle reranking, rank-based reordering) all leave the gap intact (no separable improvement). Our findings indicate that recall@k is the wrong metric for deployed KB-VQA and that closing the gap requires reader-side intervention; we release our protocol as a controlled instrument for evaluating such interventions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模态知识驱动视觉问答系统（KB-VQA）在使用大规模知识库检索上下文时，对不同位置检索信息的利用偏好，发现与文本LLM不同，系统更倾向于利用开头的信息，“尾部遗失”明显。
AI.motivation: 已有文献发现，纯文本大模型在长上下文输入时存在“U型遗失”效应（即首尾信息易被利用，中部信息被忽视），但在实际多模态KB-VQA系统中这一效应是否存在尚无定论。因此，作者希望揭示多模态系统在检索文本不同位置分布对答题表现的影响机制。
AI.method: 作者设计了“gold-position protocol”实验，对比将关键事实（gold passage）放在提示的不同位置，并在3个开源多模态7B/8B参数模型和2个KB-VQA基准下，最多20个检索上下文进行评测。通过文本-图像位置消融和干扰项洗牌等实验，进一步定位出现象的位置机制。
AI.result: 多模态KB-VQA模型中，关键事实若出现在首位，答题表现远超于出现在末位（相差16至26分），形状由“U型”转为“首位优势”。消融实验显示，多模态设置会放大该效应2.2至4.5倍，且主要集中于指令微调后的reader模块的第0位置。三种检索侧改进（如MMR等）均无法弥补这一差距。
AI.conclusion: 首尾信息不均衡效应在多模态KB-VQA中更为严重，且仅靠改进检索排序无法缓解，需从reader端设计新机制。作者公开评测协议，以支持后续相关研究。

title: Sustainable Face Recognition on Low-Power Devices with VQ-VAE Embeddings
summary: Face recognition has become a cornerstone of modern AI applications, yet conventional approaches often rely on computationally intensive models deployed in cloud environments, leading to increased network traffic, high energy consumption, and a heavy carbon footprint. This work introduces a sustainable, edge-deployable face recognition framework based on Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoders (VQ-VAE), which generates compact and semantically rich latent representations of facial images. By leveraging the compression capacity and reconstruction quality of VQ-VAE embeddings on the edge and combining them with the power of pre-trained face embeddings in a knowledge distillation setup, our system achieves comparable accuracy to state-of-the-art face embedding models while significantly reducing memory and computation requirements on the edge, making it suitable for low-power edge devices. The integration of VQ-VAE compression minimizes network overhead while keeping the matching accuracy high by retaining only the most informative facial features in the latent space. As a result, the reconstructed images preserve the key identity characteristics, improving the robustness and overall performance of the face embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于VQ-VAE的可持续性边缘端人脸识别框架，既减少了计算和内存需求，也保持了与现有先进方法相当的识别精度。
AI.motivation: 传统人脸识别方法通常依赖云端高计算量模型，导致网络流量大、能耗高、碳足迹重，不适合低功耗边缘设备。
AI.method: 采用Vector-Quantized变分自编码器（VQ-VAE）在边缘侧生成紧凑且有语义的脸部图像潜在表示，并融合预训练人脸嵌入，通过知识蒸馏优化表征，使模型在保证精度的同时，大幅减少存储和计算需求。
AI.result: 新框架在人脸识别精度上与现有顶尖模型相当，但显著降低了内存和计算消耗，并减少了网络传输数据量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低功耗设备上的人脸识别提供了可持续解决方案，兼顾高性能与资源节省，有利于降低碳排放并拓展边缘AI应用。

title: R2RDreamer: 3D-aware Data Augmentation for Spatially-generalized 2D Manipulation Policies
summary: Spatial generalization is critical for imitation-learned manipulation policies, but achieving it typically requires scaling demonstrations across diverse object poses, robot configurations, and camera viewpoints. Data augmentation from a few source demonstrations offers a practical alternative to costly real-world collection. Simulation-based augmentation can create controllable variation, but requires complex environment and object setup and may introduce a sim-to-real gap. Recent real-to-real methods avoid these issues by jointly editing 3D observations and action trajectories from real demonstrations, yet they still rely on strong 3D scene parsing and geometry completion, and often produce observations tailored to 3D pointcloud policies rather than RGB-based 2D policies. We propose R2RDreamer, a real-to-real demonstration augmentation framework that preserves the geometric consistency of 3D action-observation editing while moving visual completion to 2D video space. Specifically, R2RDreamer first performs lightweight 3D augmentation by editing incomplete object pointclouds and end-effector trajectories in a shared 3D frame; it then projects the edited scene into masked image-space control videos with occlusion-aware reasoning and uses a dense-control image-to-video model to complete temporally coherent RGB observations. Experiments on spatially shifted manipulation tasks with both 2D diffusion-style policies and vision-language-action policies show that R2RDreamer improves spatial generalization from limited source demonstrations, with analyses validating the contributions of 3D editing, occlusion-aware projection, and video completion.

AI.tldr: 提出R2RDreamer框架，通过3D动作-观测轻量级编辑和基于2D视频的视觉补全，有效提升了模仿学习操控策略的空间泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习策略要实现空间泛化，需大量不同姿态、配置、视角下的演示，收集成本高。数据增强是替代方案，但仿真增强实现复杂且有仿真-现实差距，最新实到实增强方法虽可绕过这些问题，但需要强大的3D场景解析能力，且大多服务于3D点云策略，难以用于RGB-2D策略。
AI.method: R2RDreamer首先在共享三维帧中编辑不完整的物体点云和末端执行器轨迹，进行轻量级3D数据增强；然后将编辑后的场景投影到带遮挡感知的图像空间控制视频，并使用密集控制的图像到视频模型，完成时序连贯的RGB观测补全。
AI.result: 在空间位置变化的操控任务上，R2RDreamer支持2D扩散式策略和视觉-语言-动作联合策略，均展示出在有限演示情况下更好的空间泛化能力。消融分析验证了3D编辑、遮挡感知投影和视频补全的有效性。
AI.conclusion: R2RDreamer框架实现了高效、可控且面向2D图像策略的实到实增强方式，大幅提升了操控任务中模仿学习策略的泛化能力，对实际机器人学习具有实际意义。

title: REFLEX: Reflective Evolution from LLM Experience
summary: Large multimodal language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for guiding evolutionary search toward interpretable programmatic policies. However, existing frameworks rely on a monolithic model call to simultaneously interpret visual behavioral evidence and synthesize corrective code. This diagnosis-repair entanglement creates an opaque feedback loop, obscuring the rationale behind mutations and preventing the retention of algorithmic insights across independent runs. To achieve auditable and efficient policy search, we argue that visual diagnosis must be structurally decoupled from code generation. We present REFLEX, a train-free evolutionary framework that operationalizes this decoupling. In REFLEX, a vision-enabled Critic first distills task-specific behavioral evidence into structured, auditable diagnoses. Subsequently, a text-optimized Actor synthesizes child policies using these diagnoses alongside a persistent, self-evolving Skill Memory of reusable code snippets. This architecture not only provides transparent mutation traces but also enables cross-run programmatic knowledge transfer. Extensive evaluations across control benchmarks (Lunar Lander, Acrobot, Pendulum) and a 36-dimensional antenna array synthesis task demonstrate exceptional sample efficiency. Notably, REFLEX solves Acrobot and Pendulum in under 10 LLM calls and reaches a best Normalized Weighted Score of 1.092 on Lunar Lander, achieving highly competitive final performance while significantly accelerating the early-stage discovery of transparent policies.

AI.tldr: REFLEX是一种新型进化式多模态程序生成框架，将视觉诊断与代码生成解耦，带来更高的透明度和效率，在多项控制任务中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在进化搜索策略中，视觉行为分析与代码修复步骤混杂在一起，使得变异过程不透明，算法知识难以跨实验保留，难以审核和高效优化。
AI.method: 提出REFLEX框架，将视觉诊断(由Critic负责)与代码生成(由Actor负责)结构性解耦。Critic将行为证据转为结构化可审查诊断；Actor基于诊断和可复用代码片段数据库(Skill Memory)进行新策略合成。
AI.result: 在多个控制基准任务(Lunar Lander、Acrobot、Pendulum)及天线阵列综合任务上，REFLEX在样本效率上表现卓越，如Acrobot和Pendulum在10次以内LLM调用即可解出，Lunar Lander获得1.092的最佳归一化加权分数。
AI.conclusion: REFLEX架构带来了更透明的策略进化路径和平台间知识迁移能力，在早期策略发现和整体性能方面都优于现有方法。

title: MNet++: Extended 2D/3D Networks for Anisotropic Medical Image Segmentation
summary: This work demonstrates a full reproduction and extension of MNet, a hybrid 2D/3D convolutional network designed for anisotropic medical image segmentation. The original architecture was re-implemented within the nnU-Net framework to verify its reported performance and robustness to variable voxel spacing, known as anisotropy. Experiments were conducted on PROMISE prostate MRI and a controlled subset of LiTS liver CT under matched preprocessing and compute constraints. The reproduced MNet achieved a Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) of 89.0 +/- 0.9% on PROMISE, within 0.8% of the published result, and 94.3 +/- 1.9% / 54.6 +/- 3.1% for liver and tumor segmentation on LiTS, respectively. Two lightweight extensions were further introduced: (1) a learned Fusion Gating mechanism enabling adaptive 2D-3D feature blending, and (2) a VMamba state-space module for efficient long-range depth modelling. The Spatial Gating variant improved DSC by +0.8% with less than 3% inference overhead, while VMamba improved performance consistency, reducing PROMISE Dice variation to +/- 0.7% and achieving the strongest LiTS liver performance at 95.8% Dice. Both extensions preserved MNet robustness to anisotropy, with delta Dice = 1.5% across 1-4 mm voxel spacing. Overall, the study confirms MNet reproducibility and demonstrates that adaptive fusion and state-space modelling have the potential to further strengthen segmentation reliability under anisotropic conditions. However, further tests are required to provide definitive conclusions.

AI.tldr: 本文全面复现并扩展了MNet混合2D/3D卷积网络，并验证其用于各向异性医学影像分割的鲁棒性。通过引入融合门控和VMamba模块进一步提升了性能和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 原MNet架构被设计用于解决医学影像分割中因体素间距各向异性带来的不适应性。作者复现其在公开框架下的表现，并尝试通过新机制提升分割准确性和稳定性。
AI.method: 作者在nnU-Net框架下复现MNet架构，在PROMISE前列腺MRI和LiTS肝脏CT数据集上严格对比实验。扩展设计包括自适应2D/3D特征融合门控（Fusion Gating）和高效长距建模VMamba模块。
AI.result: 复现的MNet在PROMISE和LiTS数据集上取得与原论文相符的Dice分数。融合门控提高了0.8%的Dice分数且计算开销极小，VMamba提升了性能一致性并在肝分割上达到95.8%的最高分数。
AI.conclusion: MNet具备较好的可复现性和对各向异性数据的稳健性。提出的门控和状态空间机制在改善医学图像分割表现上有潜力，但最终结论仍需更多测试支持。

title: Hierarchical Advantage Weighting for Online RL Fine-Tuning of VLAs from Sparse Episode Outcomes
summary: When pretrained VLA policies are fine-tuned through online RL, each rollout episode produces only a single binary outcome (success or failure), yet the actor update requires per-transition supervision. Existing approaches commonly reduce this sparse outcome to a single scalar reward or advantage signal, which conflates distinct forms of transition-level feedback and provides limited guidance once basic task success becomes achievable. First, a single scalar signal conflates the two objectives of viability and efficiency; once basic success is achieved, the binary label provides no gradient to distinguish efficient completions from slow ones. Second, real-world rollouts mix autonomous and intervention segments; naively assigning episode outcomes across these boundaries introduces incorrect credit assignment. To address these issues, we propose Hierarchical Advantage-Weighted Behavior Cloning (HABC), which trains separate critic heads for these two objectives on different data subsets and combines their outputs with a state-adaptive balance. A state-adaptive gate $g_t$ merges their one-step advantages, prioritizing viability when success is uncertain and shifting to efficiency only when viability is high, and converts the result into per-transition weights on the actor loss. Intervention-aware credit assignment further restricts outcome labels to segments executed by the current policy, preventing supervision from leaking across intervention boundaries. In real-robot experiments on three contact-rich bimanual tasks, HABC raises success from supervised fine-tuning (SFT) baselines of 36%, 44%, and 12% to 92%, 88%, and 38%.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种分层优势加权行为克隆（HABC）的方法，改进了在稀疏二元奖励环境下的在线强化学习（RL）微调预训练多任务策略的监督和效率问题。
AI.motivation: 当前通过在线强化学习微调预训练VLA策略时，每次回合只有一个二元结果（成功或失败），而行为者更新需要每步的监督。现有方法通常将稀疏结果归结为单一的标量奖励，这混淆了可行性和效率，并且在基本任务成功后，无法区分完成得快慢。此外，现实中数据包含自主和人工介入，对回合整体打标签会导致信用分配不准确。
AI.method: 提出HABC方法，通过为可行性（viability）和效率（efficiency）分别训练不同的评价头（critic head），在不同数据子集上学习这两个目标，然后用状态自适应门控机制按情境合并两者的单步优势值，将其作为行为者损失的权重。同时在数据存在人工介入时，只将结果标签赋予算法当前策略执行的片段，避免标签影响介入区域。
AI.result: 在三项实际机器人双手操作任务中，HABC将监督微调（SFT）基线的成功率从36%、44%和12%提升到了92%、88%和38%。
AI.conclusion: HABC有效提升了稀疏成功信号下对微调策略的监督强度和区分力，克服了单一奖励信号的局限性，并且能精确赋予信用，显著提高了真实机器人任务中的成功率。

title: SkillWiki: A Living Knowledge Infrastructure for Agent Skills
summary: While knowledge is managed through Wikipedia and software through GitHub, agent skills still lack an infrastructure for large-scale production, governance, and evolution. SkillWiki is a living knowledge infrastructure that supports the organization, grounding, and continuous evolution of agent skills by transforming heterogeneous knowledge into reusable skill assets linked to their originating evidence. Our demonstration presents the complete skill lifecycle, from knowledge ingestion and skill production to provenance-aware exploration, governance, and execution-driven evolution. SkillWiki highlights a future in which knowledge, skills, and execution experience co-evolve within a shared infrastructure. The live demonstration and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/Huangdingcheng/SkillWiki.

AI.tldr: SkillWiki是一个针对智能体技能的大规模生产、治理和进化的基础设施，通过知识持续演化，类似于Wikipedia之于知识、GitHub之于代码。
AI.motivation: 尽管Wikipedia管理知识、GitHub管理软件，但智能体的技能缺乏对应的统一基础设施，因此急需一种系统支持技能组织、依据溯源、持续演化与复用。
AI.method: SkillWiki通过汇聚异构知识，将其转化为可复用的技能资产，并与原始证据关联，支持技能的全文生命周期管理，包括知识摄取、技能生产、可溯源探索、治理和基于执行的演化。
AI.result: SkillWiki实现了一个实际可用的演示系统，覆盖了技能的摄取、生产、探索、治理与演化全过程，并已开放源代码便于验证和使用。
AI.conclusion: SkillWiki展示了知识、技能和执行经验可在同一基础设施中共同进化的前景，为未来智能体技能的组织和发展开辟了新范式。

title: Timestep Rescheduling in Diffusion Inversion
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. 23 pages, including appendices
summary: Diffusion inversion, which maps images back to the Gaussian latent space of a diffusion model, is a critical task for image reconstruction and editing. While DDIM enables fast deterministic inversion, it inherently introduces deviations that accumulate into noticeable inversion errors. Existing methods often address this by solving a fixed-point problem but largely overlook how the selection of the diffusion timestep in the noise scheduler influences inversion fidelity. In this work, we reveal that the deviation scale in diffusion inversion is strongly dependent on the timestep size, and exhibits a parabolic trend, with larger errors concentrated at both small and large timesteps. Based on this finding, we propose a simple yet effective nonuniform timestep scheduler that integrates a global rescaling with a local dynamic programming based rescheduling, enabling a strategic allocation of computational effort that minimizes the overall inversion error and preserves higher inversion accuracy. Our method serves as an off-the-shelf enhancement for existing inversion techniques and requires no extra parameters or computational overhead. Through extensive experiments, we verify that integrating our scheduler consistently boosts the performance of existing inversion methods, achieving superior results in image reconstruction and editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进扩散模型反演（Diffusion Inversion）过程的非均匀步长调度器，有效提升了图像重建和编辑的准确性，而无需增加额外参数或计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散反演方法（如DDIM）在将图像映射回高斯潜空间时存在不可避免的反演误差，且现有研究对于步长选择对反演保真度的影响关注不足。作者希望通过研究步长与误差的关系，提升反演精度，满足图像重建与编辑的需求。
AI.method: 作者分析发现反演误差与扩散步长之间呈抛物线关系：在初期和后期步长（timestep）误差较大。基于此，提出了一种结合全局重缩放（global rescaling）与基于动态规划的局部调度（local dynamic programming rescheduling）的非均匀步长调度器，有策略地分配反演过程中的计算资源，从而优化整体反演误差。该方法无需新增参数，也不会带来额外计算负担。
AI.result: 实验表明，将作者提出的步长调度器整合到现有反演方法中，可以稳定提升各种扩散反演方法在图像重建与编辑任务上的性能，取得更优结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为现有扩散反演技术提供了即插即用（off-the-shelf）的高效增强方案，能有效提升扩散模型在图像重建和编辑方面的反演效果，具备实际应用前景。

title: Geometric Action Model for Robot Policy Learning
summary: Generalist robot policies must follow user instructions while reasoning about how objects, cameras, and robot actions interact in the 3D physical world. Recent vision-language-action models (VLAs) and video world-action models (WAMs) inherit strong semantic or temporal priors from large-scale foundation models, but they still operate primarily on 2D image frames or 2D-derived latent spaces, leaving implicit the 3D geometry required for contact-rich manipulation. We propose the Geometric Action Model (GAM), a language-conditioned manipulation policy that directly repurposes a pretrained geometric foundation model (GFM) as a shared substrate for perception, temporal prediction, and action decoding. GAM splits the GFM at an intermediate layer: the shallow layers serve as an observation encoder, and a causal future predictor inserted at the split layer forecasts future latent tokens conditioned on language, proprioception, and action history. The predicted future tokens are then routed through the remaining GFM blocks for feature propagation and decoding, allowing a single backbone to produce both future geometry and actions. This design equips the GFM with language-conditioned temporal world modeling through minimal architectural modification while preserving its rich geometric priors. Across a broad suite of simulation and real-robot manipulation benchmarks, GAM is more accurate, more robust, faster, and lighter than current foundation-model-scale baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法（GAM），通过直接利用几何基础大模型来提升机器人对复杂3D世界的理解与操作能力，在仿真和真实机器人测试中表现优于现有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）和视频世界-动作模型（WAM）虽然继承了大模型的强大先验知识，但主要在2D空间操作，难以显式处理复杂3D几何信息，限制了机器人在实际实体世界中的操作能力，特别是需要丰富接触的精细操作任务。
AI.method: 提出了Geometric Action Model（GAM），直接利用预训练的几何基础模型（GFM）作为同一骨干网络。GAM把GFM在中间层进行切分：浅层用于感知编码，在分割层插入有因果结构的未来预测器，预测未来的隐空间Token，并结合语言指令、机器人自身感知和动作历史。预测得到的未来Token通过剩余的GFM模块进行特征传播与动作解码，实现同时预测未来几何结构和动作输出。
AI.result: 在一系列仿真和真实机器人操作基准测试中，GAM在精度、鲁棒性、速度和模型大小等方面都超越当前同级别的基础模型方案。
AI.conclusion: GAM通过最小的结构改动，把强大的几何先验引入了语言条件下的机器人时序世界建模，大幅提升了机器人操控实际复杂物理任务的能力，并优于以往的方法。

title: Can LLM Coding Agents Reason About Time Series?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used for automated decision-making systems in finance, healthcare, or environmental monitoring. Time series data are ubiquitous in these fields, yet hard to process automatically. Can time series be analyzed by LLM agents? We examine three approaches: providing the agent with raw numerical data, using the LLM as a coding agent, or a combination of both. In the coding agent setup, the model iteratively queries the data using Python code. Using two time series understanding benchmarks, we show that agents with code access can outperform models processing raw data by up to 10%. However, even the best performing agent still answers about 22-34% of the questions incorrectly. To get insights into models' strategies and reasoning gaps, we analyze the model outputs with a strong LLM judge. Our analysis reveals that coding agents can select appropriate statistical tests, but often miss important nuances. Meanwhile, models with access to raw data can reach the right conclusions using back-of-the-envelope calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）分析时间序列数据的三种方式，并比较了其自动化决策的表现。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在金融、医疗和环境监测等自动化决策系统中的应用日益广泛，需要研究它们能否有效处理和分析时间序列数据这一难点。
AI.method: 对比了三种分析时间序列的方式：1）直接提供原始数字数据给LLM，2）将LLM作为编码代理（使用Python代码查询和分析时间序列），3）两者结合。采用两个时间序列理解基准测试，并借助强大LLM作为评判辅助，对输出结果进行分析。
AI.result: 具有代码访问权限的LLM代理，在任务表现上可优于仅处理原始数据的模型，准确率提升可达10%。但最佳模型仍有约22-34%的问题解答错误。编码代理擅长选择统计测试，但易忽略细节；原始数据模型则偶尔能用简单估算得出正确答案。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在时间序列分析中仍存在明显的推理缺陷。编码代理方案有提升空间，但在解释、细节处理及推理链条上尚未完善。

title: Segmentation-based Detection for Efficient Multi-Task Spacecraft Perception
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. CVPRW AI4SPACE-SPARK 2026 Challenge Stream-1 First Place Winners. Code is available at https://github.com/sivaastro/segdet-spark
summary: Vision-based perception is fundamental to Space Situational Awareness and autonomous on-orbit operations such as rendezvous, docking, servicing, and navigation. However, progress in this area is limited by the scarcity of annotated space imagery and by challenging visual-domain characteristics including severe illumination changes, low signal-to-noise ratio, and high contrast. We address Stream 1 of the SPARK 2026 Challenge, which requires a single model for spacecraft classification, detection, and fine-grained component segmentation across multiple target types. We propose a compact architecture that integrates a MobileNetV3 encoder with a U-Net-style decoder, combining computational efficiency with accurate dense prediction. Detection is derived analytically from the union of predicted component masks, avoiding a separate bounding-box regression head in the single-spacecraft setting. Our method achieved an overall leaderboard score of 0.9482, with task-specific scores of 1.0000 in classification, 0.9788 in detection, and 0.8917 in segmentation. The proposed approach ranked second overall in the SPARK 2026 Challenge, demonstrating that lightweight encoder-decoder architectures can deliver strong multi-task performance for practical onboard space vision systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种紧凑、高效的视觉模型，在太空场景下实现航天器分类、检测和组件分割，并取得SPARK 2026挑战赛第二名。
AI.motivation: 由于太空视觉数据稀缺，且光照剧烈变化、信噪比低、对比度高，现有基于视觉的空间态势感知和自动在轨操作难以取得重大进展。作者旨在突破现有的感知局限，解决多任务模型部署和实际运行的难题。
AI.method: 提出了结合MobileNetV3编码器和U-Net解码器的紧凑结构，兼具计算高效性和密集预测准确性。创新性地将航天器组件分割掩模的并集用于检测任务，无需单独的边界框回归分支。模型同时支持分类、检测和组件分割多任务。
AI.result: 该方法在SPARK 2026挑战赛中获得了综合分数0.9482，其中分类任务满分1.0000，检测0.9788，分割0.8917，最终排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 轻量化的编码-解码架构在太空视觉系统中可实现高效、强大的多任务性能，为实际的在轨自主操作提供了有力技术支撑。

title: Human Universal Grasping
summary: Humans can grasp objects effortlessly, whereas multi-fingered robots are far from this level of generality. We argue that the most natural source of robot grasping data is from humans, who pick up thousands of objects every day. We present HUG, a flow-matching model that generates diverse human grasps for any user-specified object in a single RGB-D image captured from a stereo camera. Using smart glasses, we first collect 1M-HUGs, an egocentric dataset of human grasps spanning 1M frames (27.8 hrs) and 6,707 object instances across 41 buildings. Next, to model the distribution of natural human grasps, our novel flow-matching model fuses RGB and depth observations to output a grasp parameterized by wrist translation, wrist rotation, and MANO hand pose. Predicted grasps can be retargeted to various robot hands, enabling zero-shot grasping in everyday scenes. To standardize evaluation, we build a new simulated benchmark, HUG-Bench, of 90 unseen objects from five geometric categories and various sizes, with metric-scale 3D meshes. We evaluate HUG in the real world on the 30-object test set of HUG-Bench across multiple stereo cameras, robot embodiments, and household environments. HUG outperforms the state-of-the-art grasping baselines by +23% and +34% on our challenging object set. Code, data, benchmark, checkpoints, and an interactive demo are released on our website: https://grasping.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多指机器人抓取的新方法HUG，通过收集并建模大规模人类抓取数据，实现了机器人对新物体的零样本抓取，显著提升抓取表现。
AI.motivation: 当前多指机器人在通用抓取能力上远落后于人类。人类每天能轻松抓取大量物体，因此作者认为最自然、最有价值的机器人抓取数据应来自于人类实际操作。
AI.method: 作者以佩戴智能眼镜的人为数据源，采集了包含100万帧、6707个物体、41幢建筑的人类抓取场景数据集（1M-HUGs），数据包含RGB-D图像。提出了一种融合RGB和深度的流匹配（flow-matching）模型，对手腕和手势参数进行建模。该模型能针对任何输入物体生成多样化的人类抓取方式，并可适配不同类型的机器人手，实现零样本抓取。
AI.result: 作者构建了一个全新的仿真评测基准HUG-Bench，涵盖90个从未见过的物体，对模型进行全面测试。实际部署实验中，HUG在多个摄像头、不同机器人、多种真实家庭环境下，抓取成功率比现有方法提升了23%和34%。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过大规模人类抓取数据和创新模型，使多指机器人对现实复杂物体的泛化抓取能力有显著提升，推动了基于人类示范的机器人抓取技术发展，相关数据与代码公开，有助于标准化后续研究。

title: The BD-LSC Dataset: Facilitating the Benchmarking of Models for Lexical Semantic Change Detection in Slang and Standard Usage
summary: Automatic semantic change detection aims to identify how word meanings shift over time, offering insights into both linguistic and societal change. Despite recent progress in computational lexical semantic change (LSC), existing benchmarks and methods struggle to capture bi-directional semantic change, particularly cases where words simultaneously gain and lose senses. This problem is especially challenging for words that have both slang and standard meanings. To address these gaps, we introduce two complementary benchmark datasets. The Bi-Directional Lexical Semantic Change (BD-LSC) dataset captures sense gain, sense loss, and stability across three time periods, enabling the study of complex semantic trajectories. The SlangTrack Word Sense Disambiguation (ST-WSD) dataset provides fine-grained, instance-level sense annotations for words combining slang and standard usages, supporting systematic benchmarking of WSD and semantic change detection models. Using these benchmarks, we systematically evaluate models across different methodological families: unsupervised clustering using contextualised embeddings, supervised machine learning, transformer-based models, and state-of-the-art large language models. Among the evaluated systems, the few-shot GPT-4o model achieved the strongest aggregate performance on Exact Sense Match (ESM) and multi-label accuracy; however, Macro-F1 scores near 0.5 across all systems show that rare slang senses remain difficult, which we identify as the central open challenge.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了两个新数据集，专门针对单词双向语义变化及其标准与俚语混合用法，系统评测了多类模型在这些语义变化检测上的能力，并指出对罕见俚语义的检测依然具有挑战性。
AI.motivation: 以往对词义变化的研究很难处理词语同时获得和失去含义的情况，尤其是那些同时具有俚语和标准用法的词。为此，作者希望针对双向语义变化，以及俚语-标准混用的复杂情况，建立更合适的基准和评测方式。
AI.method: 构建了两个数据集：BD-LSC反映词义获取、消失和稳定的三阶段变化；ST-WSD对兼具标准与俚语用法的词进行细致的实例级词义标注。于此基础上，分别用无监督的上下文嵌入聚类、监督机器学习、transformer模型和大语言模型等方法进行系统评测。
AI.result: 在所有方法中，few-shot GPT-4o在精确词义匹配（ESM）和多标签准确率上表现最佳。但总体Macro-F1分数都接近0.5，模型对罕见俚语词义依然效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 新提出的数据集为语义变化尤其是双向和俚语相关变化的研究提供了重要基准。当前最先进方法虽有进步，但对罕见俚语意义的检测是亟待突破的难点。

title: From Frames to Temporal Graphs: In-Context Egocentric Action Recognition with Vision-Language Models
summary: Action reasoning in egocentric video requires capturing fine-grained transitions of hand-object interactions, a task where general-purpose Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often struggle when operating directly on raw pixels. We propose to decouple visual perception from symbolic reasoning by converting videos into Temporal Action Graphs. In a multi-stage prompting pipeline, we first generate dense natural language narratives over short temporal windows as a semantic bottleneck, then formalize them into structured, open-vocabulary graph representations. On the EGTEA and Epic-Kitchens-100 datasets, the symbolic representation unlocks efficient in-context learning: few-shot graph demonstrations yield substantial accuracy gains over zero-shot frame and graph-based inference alike. Even in the zero-shot setting, graph-based reasoning remains competitive with pixel-based inference despite potential pretraining contamination favoring the latter. Across 11 open-weight VLMs from 6 model families ranging from 2B to 235B parameters, our findings indicate that current VLMs are more effective as symbolic reasoners than as direct visual observers. By projecting video into the language domain, we provide a scalable, fine-tuning-free alternative to end-to-end approaches that better leverages these models' latent reasoning strengths. The code will be made public.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将视频中的动作理解转化为时序动作图，并通过自然语言和图结构增强大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）对手-物交互等细粒度动作推理能力。该方法在EGTEA和Epic-Kitchens-100等数据集上的少样本情境下取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs直接从像素端推理细致的动作序列效果有限，缺乏对手-物交互细节的捕捉。本文为提升VLMs在自我视角视频动作推理（如厨房互动）中的效果，尝试代入象征推理方式。
AI.method: 通过多阶段提示策略，先以自然语言生成短时间窗口内的视频描述，再将其形式化为结构化、开放词汇的时序动作图，实现视觉与象征推理的解耦。利用图结构进行少样本及零样本推理，比较象征推理与直接像素推理的表现。
AI.result: 结构化的动作图表示显著提升了VLMs在少样本条件下的推理准确率。在零样本设定下，基于图的推理与传统像素推理相比也表现出竞争力。实验覆盖了6大家族、11个开源VLMs（2B-235B参数）。
AI.conclusion: VLMs作为象征推理工具比直接视觉观察者更有优势。通过投射至语言域，实现可扩展、无需微调的动作推理新范式，为端到端方法提供有效替代方案。代码将公开。

title: T-Rex: Tactile-Reactive Dexterous Manipulation
summary: The ability to react dynamically to tactile signals has long been considered crucial to agile human-level dexterity. Yet contemporary learning-based Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation generally either overlook the tactile modality or are limited to encoders with static cues, due in part to the scarcity of diverse training data and standardized evaluation, architectural constraints in current VLA models, and limitations of static tactile encoders. In this paper, we push the frontier of tactile-reactive manipulation by addressing all of these limitations. We propose a large-scale, 100-hour tactile-rich dataset collected via a novel, data-efficient recipe that prioritizes elementary motor primitives. To effectively exploit naturally high-frequency touch signals without sacrificing the existing capabilities of existing VLAs, we introduce a variable-rate Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture equipped with a novel temporal tactile VQ-VAE encoder. We demonstrate the effectiveness of tactile-reactive policies on 12 manipulation tasks requiring delicate force control and deformable object manipulation, achieving over 30% higher average success rate than the strongest baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个大规模触觉丰富的数据集，以及新颖的可变速率Transformer架构，以提升机器人 manipulation 对触觉信号的反应能力，使得模型在复杂任务中的成功率明显提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型要么忽略了触觉信息，要么仅用静态触觉编码器，限制了对人类级灵巧操作能力的模拟。其原因在于缺乏多样化训练数据、评测手段标准化不足及模型架构对触觉的支持有限。
AI.method: 1）建立了一个涵盖100小时的大规模、高触觉信息量的数据集，重点涵盖基础动作原语。2）提出可变速率Mixture-of-Transformers（MoT）架构，配合创新的时序触觉VQ-VAE编码器，有效利用复杂触觉信号。3）在12项涉及精细控力与可变形物体操作任务上进行实验。
AI.result: 提出的方法相比最强基线提升了30%以上的平均成功率，在多项需要精细力控和变形物体处理的操作任务中展示了显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 引入高质量触觉数据和先进模型架构能显著提升机器人在复杂操作任务中的表现，验证了触觉反应能力对于人类级灵巧操作的关键作用。

title: Fast When, Careful Who: Dual-Process Multiparty Turn-Taking with Diffusion Augmentation
summary: Reliable turn-taking is essential for spoken dialogue systems. However, most existing methods are designed for two-speaker interaction and struggle with realistic multiparty audio containing overlap and rapid speaker changes. We study multiparty turn-taking on the VoxConverse dataset and propose an audio-only two-stage pipeline that separates when to trigger a turn boundary from whether the floor is actually transferring. A fast trigger scans the audio and proposes candidate end-of-turn times, while a lightweight verifier runs only at those times to decide \textsc{Hold} or \textsc{Shift} and support next-speaker prediction. We report results in the full multiparty setting and a controlled dyadic top-2 projection for comparability. We also investigate diffusion-based, label-preserving background-audio mixing as a data augmentation strategy. Results show improved shift detection over a baseline, with further improvements from diffusion augmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于多方语音对话下轮次切换的新方法，通过两阶段音频流处理显著提升对话中“换人”时刻的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有轮次切换方法多针对双人对话设计，难以高效处理真实多方对话环境中的重叠和说话者快速切换问题。
AI.method: 提出音频两阶段处理管线：第一阶段通过快速触发器在音频流内检测候选轮次边界，第二阶段用轻量级验证器对这些时刻做Hold（继续）或Shift（切换）判定，并支持下一个说话人的预测；同时引入扩散式、保标签的背景音混合数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在VoxConverse多方对话数据集和dyadic top-2简化设置下均实现轮次变更检测性能超基线，同时扩散式数据增强进一步提升了检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段音频管线方案有效提升了多方对话中的轮次切换检测能力，并且声音增强策略对模型效果有进一步促进作用。

title: Lesion-DDPM: Lesion-Enhanced 3D Diffusion for MS MRI Synthesis
summary: 3D FLAIR MRI is widely recommended as one of the standard MRI sequences for brain imaging in multiple sclerosis (MS), but publicly available MS datasets remain relatively small and vary across scanners, acquisition protocols, and lesion patterns. This scarcity and variability hinder the development of robust neuroimaging machine learning models and are particularly challenging for generative models that aim to synthesize images while preserving small, sparse lesions. We propose Lesion-DDPM, a 3D conditional diffusion framework for lesion-aware FLAIR synthesis that incorporates multi-level anatomical mask injection together with a lesion-weighted reconstruction loss to emphasize lesion voxels while maintaining global brain structure. Using a curated subset of the MSLesSeg dataset, we compare Lesion-DDPM with representative state-of-the-art GAN- and diffusion-based models, assessing both image-generation metrics and downstream 3D U-Net segmentation. In our experiments, Lesion-DDPM achieved the lowest lesion-region reconstruction error among all methods. In a downstream 3D U-Net lesion segmentation task, a model trained only on Lesion-DDPM-generated scans and evaluated on real MRIs reached a Dice score of 0.616 compared with 0.569 for the best competing synthetic dataset. When Lesion-DDPM images were added to the real training set, the Dice score further increased to 0.685.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D条件扩散模型Lesion-DDPM，用于多发性硬化（MS）脑部MRI中病变感知的FLAIR图像合成，能更好地保留和合成小而稀疏的病变。
AI.motivation: 现有公开MS数据集稀缺且存在扫描仪、协议等异质性，限制了鲁棒生成模型和下游机器学习模型的开发，特别是在合成真实且具备病变细节的图像方面存在困难。
AI.method: 提出Lesion-DDPM，该方法通过多层次解剖掩码注入与病变加权重构损失，有针对性地关注病变体素，同时保持整体脑部结构。使用MSLesSeg数据集子集，与主流GAN和扩散模型对比，评价合成质量和在3D U-Net分割任务中的应用效果。
AI.result: Lesion-DDPM在病变区域重构误差最小，并且只用Lesion-DDPM合成图像训练的U-Net模型在真实MRI测试上的Dice分数为0.616，优于其他合成数据集（最佳竞品为0.569）；将Lesion-DDPM图像加入真实训练集后，Dice分数升至0.685。
AI.conclusion: Lesion-DDPM能有效改善MS MRI病变区域的图像合成质量，提升下游分割模型性能，有助于临床和研究领域扩充和增强MS相关医学影像数据。

title: Can LLM Agents Infer World Models? Evidence from Agentic Automata Learning
summary: We propose agentic automata learning to evaluate the extent to which tool-calling LLM agents can uncover hidden environments through interaction. In our setup, an agent should uncover a hidden deterministic finite automaton (DFA) by interacting with an oracle through (1) membership queries ("Does this string belong to the target language?") and (2) equivalence queries ("Is this the target DFA?"). This yields a scalable testbed with controlled task complexity, measurable interaction efficiency, and strong baselines (classic automata-learning algorithms). Evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs, we find that performance drops sharply as DFA size increases. Reasoning models are markedly stronger than non-reasoning models, yet trajectory analyses reveal recurring failures in query planning, evidence integration, and hypothesis construction. Overall, our results show that current LLM agents can sometimes perform non-trivial interactive discovery, but remain far less robust and efficient than classic algorithms for the task.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于评估工具型LLM代理在探索隐藏自动机环境能力的新测试方法，并发现其在任务复杂性增加时表现显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现有对大型语言模型（LLM）工具使用的评估任务多侧重静态知识或简单交互，缺乏对隐式结构发现能力的严谨测试。本文致力于评估LLM代理能否通过交互主动推理并揭示隐藏环境，如经典有限自动机的学习任务。
AI.method: 设计了一种agentic automata learning的测评框架，设置LLM代理与提供查询反馈的oracle交互，允许其进行成员资格查询和等价查询，用于逐步推理并发现目标DFA。通过多种DFA规模实现任务可伸缩，对比经典自动机学习算法作为基线。分析了现有最先进LLM在推理、证据整合与假说构建过程中的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，LLM性能随DFA规模增加迅速下降。具推理能力的模型明显优于无推理能力者，但在查询规划、信息整合和构建假设等方面仍有反复失败。总体效率和鲁棒性远不及经典算法基线。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM代理在某些情况下可进行一定程度的主动推理和交互探索，但在复杂结构发现任务上，性能与传统算法相距甚远，存在明显局限。

title: Analyzing Visual Aircraft Representations with Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Vision models can achieve strong performance on classification tasks, but the internal representations supporting their predictions are often difficult to interpret. This work investigates whether sparse autoencoders can decompose intermediate representations of a vision model into interpretable features. We train a ConvNeXt classifier on the FGVC-Aircraft dataset, extract spatial activations from its final feature stage, and train a sparse autoencoder on these activations. The learned sparse features are analyzed using top-activating image patches, activation strength, and class selectivity. Qualitative visual inspection reveals that several features correspond to recognizable aircraft structures and visual patterns. We evaluate a subset of selected features using input-space and feature-space ablations, measuring how blurring image patches and suppressing sparse features affect class logits, classification margins, and prediction confidence. The results suggest that sparse autoencoders can reveal partially interpretable, class-relevant visual features associated with aircraft recognition, while also exposing limitations such as polysemanticity and coarse spatial localization.

AI.tldr: 本论文通过在飞机识别任务中训练稀疏自编码器，对视觉模型中间层的表示进行分解，以发现可解释特征，并分析这些特征与模型预测的关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉模型分类表现优秀，但其中间特征难以解释。作者希望借助稀疏自编码器提升对中间表征的可解释能力，从而探索模型如何理解和识别复杂视觉对象。
AI.method: 作者使用ConvNeXt模型在FGVC-Aircraft数据集上进行训练，提取其最后特征阶段的空间激活并利用稀疏自编码器进行训练。通过观察高激活区域、计算激活强度和类别选择性，结合视觉检查探索所得特征的可解释性，并采用输入空间与特征空间消融实验进一步评估特征对分类预测的贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明，学习到的稀疏特征部分对应于飞机的可识别结构和视觉图案。这些特征在消融实验中控制了预测信心和类别分类边界，但同时也表现出多义性与空间定位粗略等局限性。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏自编码器有助于揭示视觉模型中的部分可解释、与任务相关的特征，但存在解释性不完全（如一特征对应多语义、空间定位不精确）等问题。

title: Uncertainty Is Not a Safety Net for Clinical VQA, but Can It Anticipate Model Failure?
summary: Safe deployment of clinical vision-language models (VLMs) requires reliable uncertainty estimation (UE): a signal indicating when predictions should be trusted or escalated to a clinician. We test whether current UE methods actually deliver this signal. Benchmarking 8 methods across 12 VLMs on clinical visual question-answering (VQA), we find that UE quality is not an intrinsic property of the UE method: it tracks model accuracy, degrading precisely where the model performance is weakest, and therefore where reliability is most needed. When we stress-test models by hiding the correct option among the multiple-choice answers (NOTA perturbations), accuracy collapses while uncertainty barely changes, leaving models systematically miscalibrated. Yet, we find that uncertainty on the unperturbed input reliably anticipates which predictions will collapse under NOTA, indicating that UE in current VLMs carries diagnostic information about model fragility. Our results position UE as a diagnostic tool for identifying fragile predictions and motivate perturbation-based evaluation as a path toward safe clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了临床视觉-语言模型（VLMs）中的不确定性估计（UE）方法，发现现有UE手段在最需要时（模型薄弱环节）反而失效，指出UE应作为诊断脆弱预测的工具。
AI.motivation: 临床场景要求视觉-语言模型在高风险情况下能提供可靠的不确定性信号，以便判断模型预测是否可信，需要时能将问题上报给医生。当前UE方法是否真的能够满足这些安全性需求尚未被系统检验。
AI.method: 作者基于12个视觉-语言模型和8种主流UE方法，在临床视觉问答（VQA）任务上进行评测。此外，通过对多选题答案进行“NOTA扰动”（即正确选项被隐藏）进行压力测试，以观测UE信号的稳定性和可靠性。
AI.result: 测试结果显示，现有不确定性估计的效果与模型本身准确率紧密相关——即模型准确率下降的地方，UE表现也最差，而这些恰恰是最需要UE信号的情境。在NOTA扰动下，模型准确性急剧下降，但UE信号却未随之改变，反映出系统性失校准。不过UE在正常输入下可以前瞻性地反映模型在哪些预测遇到扰动时会崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 当前UE方法不能保证在模型最脆弱时提供可靠信号，但UE可作为诊断模型脆弱性的工具。未来应采用扰动评估方式来推动VLM安全性，支持临床安全部署。

title: ST-DiffEye: Diffusion-based Continuous Gaze Generation via Joint Scanpath-Trajectory Modeling
summary: We study the problem of human gaze modeling, which aims to generate the gaze patterns a viewer produces while observing a visual stimulus. Gaze is primarily captured through two modalities: continuous eye-tracking trajectories, which describe fine-grained motion dynamics, and discrete scanpaths, which describe high-level fixation structure. Because gaze varies substantially across viewers and trials, we treat this variability as a defining property rather than noise and model gaze as a stochastic generative process. Existing generative gaze models supervise on only one of these two representations in isolation. We hypothesize that trajectories and scanpaths describe gaze at complementary scales and are jointly informative during training, and test this hypothesis through ST-DiffEye, a joint trajectory-scanpath diffusion framework that couples both modalities by concatenating them as an additional raw input channel, requiring no architectural overhead beyond an input and output channel expansion. We further introduce a principled evaluation framework based on the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS), which generalizes any existing sequence similarity metric into a proper scoring rule that jointly assesses the accuracy and diversity of generated gaze. Experiments on task-driven visual search, covering both target-present and target-absent scenarios, and on free-viewing benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. These results, along with detailed ablations, confirm the benefit of joint modeling and the value of distribution-aware evaluation in capturing the intrinsic variability of human gaze. Project webpage: https://st-diffeye.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合建模人类注视轨迹（连续眼动轨迹）与注视路径（离散扫描路径）的扩散生成模型ST-DiffEye，并通过多种实验验证了该模型在生成真实多样凝视模式方面的先进性。
AI.motivation: 人类注视有显著的个体和试次间变化，传统生成模型通常只关注连续轨迹或离散注视路径中的一种，无法全面刻画凝视的多样性和层次性。本文认为两种表征是互补的，并旨在通过联合建模提升生成效果和多样性。
AI.method: 提出ST-DiffEye模型，将轨迹与扫描路径信息级联作为输入和输出通道，无需架构复杂化，仅扩展输入输出维度。评估方面，创新性地引入了基于CRPS的评价体系，能同时量化生成样本的准确性与多样性。
AI.result: 在含目标/无目标视觉搜索和自由观看公开数据集上，该方法在生成注视分布的准确性和多样性方面均达到了当前最优，并通过消融实验验证了联合建模和分布感知评价的价值。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模连续轨迹和离散路径、采用分布感知的评价方法，有助于更准确、全面捕捉人类凝视的数据分布本质。这对理解和仿真人类视觉关注机制有重要意义。

title: SING: Synthetic Intention Graph for Scalable Active Tool Discovery in LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on agent harnesses that manage context, tools, and multi-turn execution, making tools a central interface for acting in realistic digital environments. As harness-connected tool ecosystems expand to hundreds or thousands of APIs, services, and task-specific skills, exhaustive tool schema injection becomes costly and imposes a closed-world assumption that limits agents to a predefined static inventory. Retrieval-augmented tool selection offers a natural alternative, but existing one-shot retrieval methods often fail to align isolated tool descriptions with the agent's true task intention, especially in long-horizon tasks where required capabilities emerge through decomposition, observations, and newly induced subgoals. We propose SING, an intention-aware active tool discovery framework that builds an intention-tool graph linking user intentions, tool capabilities, and tool collaboration patterns, and dynamically retrieves tools according to evolving task states. Using a unified corpus of 7,471 tools, we evaluate SING on three real-world tool-use benchmarks. SING improves Global Recall@5 by up to 59.8% and downstream success rate by up to 28.9% over baselines, while reducing full-corpus tool-schema exposure by 99.8%, demonstrating that intention-aware graph structure enables more accurate and context-efficient tool discovery in large-scale agentic ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SING框架，通过意图感知的图结构提升大规模工具生态下的检索效率与准确性，大幅减少全工具库的暴露成本。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM代理对工具生态的依赖增加，工具数量爆炸使全量注入变得效率低下且受限于静态库。因此需要新方法动态、高效地发现和利用合适的工具。
AI.method: SING构建意图-工具图，将用户意图、工具能力和工具协作关系连接起来，结合任务状态动态检索相关工具，并在执行过程中不断调整选择。
AI.result: 在7,471个工具的统一语料库及三个真实世界基准上，SING将Global Recall@5提升最多59.8%，任务成功率提升28.9%，同时将全库暴露度降低99.8%。
AI.conclusion: 意图感知、结构化工具发现显著改善了大规模工具环境下的效率与效能，解决了传统方法在动态任务和长期任务中的局限。

title: Selective Synergistic Learning for Video Object-Centric Learning
summary: Typical video object-centric learning (VOCL) approaches employ slot-based frameworks that rely on reconstruction-driven encoder-decoder architectures, where learning is mediated by two spatial maps: attention maps from the encoder and object maps from the decoder. As these two distinct maps exhibit different properties, a recent dense alignment strategy attempted to reconcile this discrepancy by enforcing agreement across all spatio-temporal patches via contrastive learning. However, this indiscriminate alignment inadvertently propagates the inherent weaknesses of each module, such as noisy encoder predictions and blurred decoder boundaries. Moreover, computing dense similarities across all pairs incurs a computational cost quadratic in the total number of spatio-temporal patches, severely limiting scalability. Motivated by this, we propose Selective Synergistic Learning (SSync). Instead of exhaustive patch-to-patch alignment, SSync prevents error propagation by selectively distilling only the most reliable cues: leveraging the encoder strictly for boundary refinement and the decoder for interior denoising. This is realized via a pseudo-labeling with linear complexity, eliminating the need for quadratic spatial comparisons. Also, to prevent the reinforcement of architectural biases like slot redundancy, we introduce a transitive pseudo-label merging that consolidates overlapping slots based on spatio-temporal activation consistency. Extensive studies demonstrate that SSync improves decomposition quality and serves as a versatile, plug-and-play module while also exhibiting exceptional robustness to slot configurations. Code is available at github.com/wjun0830/SSync.

AI.tldr: 本文针对传统视频对象中心学习（VOCL）方法在空间注意力对齐上存在的计算量大与误差传递问题，提出了一种选择性协同学习（SSync）方法，实现高效、鲁棒且更优的视频对象分解。
AI.motivation: 现有VOCL方法利用编码器注意力图与解码器对象图对视频对象进行建模，但二者本质不同、难以完全对齐。已有方法强制对所有时空块进行一致性对比，但这样一方面导致模块缺陷互相传播，另一方面计算量高，不适合大规模数据。因此，亟需低复杂度且能减少误差传播的新策略。
AI.method: 提出Selective Synergistic Learning（SSync），仅有选择地从编码器提取边界信息、从解码器提取内部去噪信号，通过线性复杂度的伪标签传递进行对齐，避免了全量对齐的缺点。为消除结构性偏差（如slot冗余），引入基于时空一致性的伪标签合并策略。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，SSync显著提升了对象分解质量，具备极好的鲁棒性，且能够作为模块插拔到不同架构中，兼容性强。
AI.conclusion: SSync能有效提升VOCL系统的分解性能，具备高效性、鲁棒性与通用性。方法能有效抑制误差传播与结构性偏差，为后续视频对象学习提供了新思路。

title: How Far Can Machine Translation Quality Take You? Extrinsic Discourse Evaluation in Goal-Oriented Setups
summary: Existing machine translation (MT) metrics and discourse-focused evaluations primarily assess translation quality intrinsically, without measuring the downstream consequences of translation errors. In this work, we focus on extrinsic discourse evaluation of machine translation under two distinct regimes: static and interactive. Under the static regime, we propose an entity counting task as a probe of referential consistency in discourse. We show that high intrinsic MT quality does not reliably predict downstream discourse success and strong MT systems still produce referential inconsistencies. For the interactive regime, we study the goal-oriented multi-agent Welfare Diplomacy game as a probe of long-horizon communication and coordination. We find that interaction-specific translation failures impact downstream coordination. Our results highlight goal-oriented environments as a viable framework for discourse-sensitive extrinsic MT evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种关注机器翻译（MT）对下游任务影响的评价方法。通过静态和交互两种评测机制，揭示高质量的传统MT指标不能充分预测下游语篇一致性的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统机器翻译评价方法主要关注翻译本身的质量（如流畅度与准确性），很少考虑翻译错误在实际应用中的下游影响，尤其在需要保持语篇一致性的任务中。这些方法无法充分反映出机器翻译在实际多轮、交互式环境下的表现。
AI.method: 本文从两个方面评估MT的下游语篇影响：1）静态评测中采用实体计数任务，考察翻译的指称一致性；2）交互评测中，在多智能体Welfare Diplomacy游戏中，分析MT对长期沟通与协作的影响。
AI.result: 静态评测结果显示，现有高分MT系统仍出现大量指称不一致的错误，表明传统质量指标与下游语篇一致性表现不相关。在交互任务中，发现因翻译错误导致的沟通失败影响了团队协作与任务完成。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖传统MT指标不足以反映翻译对下游任务的影响；以目标导向型环境进行的外部评测，为评估语篇敏感的翻译质量提供了有效的框架。

title: Track2View: 4D-Consistent Camera-Controlled Video Generation via Paired 3D Point Tracks
summary: Re-rendering an existing video from a novel camera viewpoint requires the output to follow the prescribed camera trajectory while preserving the appearance and dynamics of the original scene across every frame. Existing methods rely on per-frame pose embeddings, noisy point-cloud renderings, or implicit learned correspondences, none of which provides an explicit, temporally continuous link between source and target pixels. We propose Track2View, which conditions a video diffusion transformer on paired 3D point tracks: sparse trajectories of scene points projected into both the source and target camera views. These tracks provide explicit spatiotemporal correspondences that are temporally continuous by construction, encoding what content should appear where and when. At the core of Track2View is a dual-view track conditioner that transfers visual context from source to target view through parameter-free geometric operations and learned temporal aggregation, ensuring generalization to arbitrary camera trajectories without memorizing specific motions. We further introduce a data curation pipeline that extracts one-to-one track correspondences by running a 3D point tracker on temporally concatenated multi-camera view pairs. On a 400-video benchmark spanning static and dynamic scenes, Track2View achieves state-of-the-art results across visual quality, view synchronization, and camera accuracy, reducing rotation error by 30-65% and translation error by 61-72% relative to leading baselines. Project page is available at this https URL: https://qjizhi.github.io/track2view

AI.tldr: 本文提出Track2View方法，实现从任意新的相机视角对已有视频进行高质量重渲染。通过引入3D点追踪作为时空对应，显著提升重建的同步性和准确度，超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多视角视频重渲染方法无法明确地建立源视频像素与目标视频像素之间的连续时空联系，导致效果受限，尤其在动态场景或任意相机路径下表现不佳。该工作旨在解决显式时空对应不足的问题。
AI.method: Track2View方法利用配对的3D点轨迹对视频扩散Transformer进行条件输入。这些3D点轨迹记录源视角和目标视角下的场景点投影，直接提供时空连续的内容对应。提出了无参数几何操作及时序特征聚合的条件模块，并建立数据管线自动提取点对应，实现高效训练。
AI.result: 在包含静态和动态场景的400个视频基准上，Track2View在视觉质量、视角同步及相机轨迹准确性等方面均取得SOTA成绩，相较现有主要方法，旋转误差降低30-65%，平移误差降低61-72%。
AI.conclusion: Track2View用显式3D点轨迹显著提升了泛化能力和重渲染准确度，为多视角视频内容生成树立了新标准。

title: VeriGraph: Towards Verifiable Data-Analytic Agents
summary: LLM-based agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in data-intensive analytical tasks, yet their outputs are rarely verifiable: a reliance on linear text trajectories makes their reasoning difficult to audit.
