In particular, deterministic computations over raw data and semantic deductions over natural-language claims are often entangled in an unstructured stream, leaving numerical conclusions hard to reproduce and qualitative judgments hard to inspect. To address this, we propose VeriGraph, a traceable neuro-symbolic reasoning framework that enables agents to construct an explicit heterogeneous evidence directed acyclic graph (DAG) during execution. VeriGraph introduces three evidence-expansion primitives, namely computational, grounding, and derivational expansion, to connect raw data, interpreter variables, computed results, and natural-language claims in a unified graph. Under this formulation, structural traceability is reduced to graph reachability from raw data sources to terminal claims, while semantic support is measured by claim-level evidence evaluation. To improve graph construction, we further design a graph-based policy optimization strategy with a composite reward that jointly supervises answer correctness, computational integrity, and derivational coherence. Experiments on four benchmarks show that VeriGraph-8B achieves the highest overall score among all baselines. More importantly, VeriGraph produces auditable evidence graphs with substantially stronger claim grounding, achieving a 87.61\% Grounding Rate under our claim-level evidence support evaluation. These results suggest that explicit evidence-graph construction is a promising path toward verifiable data-analytic agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/ignorejjj/VeriGraph.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种可追踪的神经符号推理框架 VeriGraph，使得大模型代理在执行数据分析任务时能够生成可验证的证据图，并显著提升推理可审计性和结论的可追溯性。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型代理在数据密集型推理任务上表现良好，但其输出过程不透明，推理难以验证和复现，导致数值结论和定性判断难以审计和追溯。
AI.method: 作者设计了 VeriGraph 框架，允许智能体在推理过程中动态构建一个明确的异构证据有向无环图（DAG），将原始数据、计算变量、计算结果、自然语言主张通过计算、落地、演绎三种证据扩展原语连接在一起。同时提出基于图的策略优化方法，以组合奖励共同监督答案正确性、计算完整性和推理一致性。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试上，VeriGraph-8B 综合得分优于所有对比基线，并且其生成的证据图在主张的证据支撑上表现突出，主张落地率达到87.61%。
AI.conclusion: 显式的证据图构建极大提升了数据分析型智能体的可验证性和可审计性，为大模型推理可解释性提供了新方向。

title: EcoBin: A Two-Stage Deep Convolutional Neural Network for Contamination-Aware Waste Classification
summary: Waste classification models have become highly accurate at sorting waste, often exceeding 95% on benchmark datasets. However, these models fail to account for contamination in recyclable waste. We present EcoBin, a two-stage deep convolutional neural network that classifies household waste by its disposal pathway and that explicitly accounts for contamination. The first stage is a base waste classifier built on an EfficientNetV2-S backbone that assigns each of the thirty waste categories in our dataset to one of four disposal pathways. The second stage is a contamination classifier that inspects any item routed toward recycling and overrides the decision to garbage when contamination is detected. Because no public dataset of contaminated recyclables exists, we synthesize one by segmenting images of clean recyclable objects with a U2-Net model and compositing realistic contamination textures onto their surfaces. The first stage achieves 87.42% test accuracy and a 96.13% pathway-adjusted accuracy. Meanwhile, the contamination stage distinguishes clean from contaminated items with a 0.99 ROC-AUC. On a test set of contaminated recyclables, the complete pipeline routes 24 of 25 items correctly, compared with only 1 of 25 for the base classifier alone. A McNemar's test confirms that the improvement contributed by the contamination stage is statistically significant (p < 0.001).

AI.tldr: 本文提出EcoBin模型，采用两阶段深度卷积神经网络，不仅可准确分类家庭垃圾，还可识别可回收垃圾中的污染情况，从而提高垃圾分类的准确率和实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有垃圾分类模型在基准数据集上准确率很高，但未考虑可回收垃圾受污染的实际问题，导致分类结果在真实场景下有效性下降。
AI.method: 方法采用两阶段网络：第一阶段基于EfficientNetV2-S主干网络，将30类垃圾分配到四种处理路径；第二阶段针对被分配为回收的项，利用单独的污染检测分类器剔除受污染的不宜回收物。由于缺乏带污染的公开数据集，作者通过U2-Net分割与合成生成合成污染数据。
AI.result: 第一阶段模型测试准确率87.42%，调整至处理路径的准确率为96.13%；污染检测分类器区分清洁与污染物的ROC-AUC达到0.99。整体流程在污染物测试集上正确分流24/25，高于仅使用基础分类时的1/25。统计检验结果表明改进具显著性。
AI.conclusion: EcoBin模型结合污染检测显著提升了垃圾分类的实用性和准确率，为现实生活中的垃圾分检提供了更可靠的技术方案。

title: EgoPhys: Learning Generalizable Physics Models of Deformable Objects from Egocentric Video
summary: Humans naturally understand object physics through everyday interactions, but faithfully predicting complex deformable dynamics, such as elastic materials and fabrics, remains a major challenge for computer vision and robotics. We present EgoPhys, a framework that constructs deformable physical digital twins from egocentric RGB-only video using generalizable priors. EgoPhys overcomes the limitations of existing methods to enable controllable deformable digital twin generation from egocentric videos by distilling per-object inverse-physics solutions into a compact codebook, enabling prediction of dense spring stiffness fields for unseen objects without per-spring test-time optimization. Trained with generalizable priors from diverse egocentric interactions, EgoPhys outperforms baselines in reconstruction, future prediction, and zero-shot generalization. To support training and evaluation, we curate an egocentric interaction dataset covering diverse deformable objects, scenes, and manipulation styles. We deploy EgoPhys on a real xArm6 robot, demonstrating that a digital twin initialized from a single egocentric human play video can serve as an internal world representation to aid in deformable-object planning, highlighting egocentric RGB observations as a scalable path toward real-to-sim pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EgoPhys框架，通过仅用第一视角的RGB视频，利用通用先验知识为可变形物体（如弹性材料与织物）建立物理数字孪生体，实现更准确的动态预测，并在机器人等领域有实际应用。
AI.motivation: 现有算法难以仅凭日常交互数据和视觉信息准确预测复杂可变形物体的物理动态，尤其是弹性或织物类物体。视觉与机器人任务中，需要提升对这类物体物理属性建模、仿真与控制能力。
AI.method: EgoPhys通过收集多样化的第一视角RGB视频，提取每个对象的逆物理解，并蒸馏为紧凑码本，实现密集弹性系数场的无优化预测，无需逐弹簧“调参”；利用丰富的交互数据进行训练，创造和利用了一个涵盖多变对象、场景及操纵方式的数据集。
AI.result: EgoPhys在重建、未来预测和零样本泛化任务上优于现有基线方法。所建立的数据集支持更广泛和全面的训练与评测。在真实xArm6机器人上实验显示，系统能够利用单段人类交互视频构建的数字孪生体提升实际变形物体操控的计划与推理能力。
AI.conclusion: EgoPhys为基于第一视角视频生成可控且泛化性强的可变形物理数字孪生体提供了新框架，展示了视觉-机器人“从真到仿”路径的可扩展性，有望推动相关任务在复杂场景下的发展和落地。

title: Sycophancy as Material Failure under Pushback Loading: A Multi-Axis Characterization Across Three Loading Cases and up to Seventeen Material Charges
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures. Code, data, and pre-registrations: https://github.com/FerdinandSchessl/sycophancy-note-companion
summary: Sycophancy in LLMs is documented across 70+ papers, but expert agreement on construct boundaries remains low (ICC=.184; Ye et al., 2026). The construct fragments because behavioral classification depends on which surface form is privileged. We adopt a materials-science framing: conversation as test specimen under load, LLM-model as material charge, pushback as progressive load, stance-flip as material failure. We characterize this failure across three loading cases (debate n=1000; false-presuppositions n=3400; ethical-setting n=3400; 10-17 material charges per case; 7800 specimens total) using 14 turn-level axis-measurements spanning velocity, damage accumulation, frame-drift, brittleness, and direction stability, plus three speaker-resolved axes from an independent pipeline. The measurements are Hooke-coupled ($σ= E \cdot \varepsilon$ analog) and reproduce across loading cases with effects up to $|r_{rb}| = 0.35$ on debate; the sign structure adds a second pattern: the ethical-setting case inverts the velocity and accumulation blocks. Variance composition partitions into two profiles: debate is charge-dominated (brittle-fracture-like: the material grade decides), false-presuppositions and ethical-setting are topic-dominated (creep-like: the load decides); the ratios (2.03 vs 0.13/0.17) are estimator-dependent, for debate even in direction. Cross-judge reliability (GPT-4o vs Haiku 4.5) shows debate scoring is judge-robust (Cohen's $κ= 0.88$) while false-presupposition scoring is judge-sensitive ($κ= 0.36$) -- a caveat single-judge benchmarks must report. This is the methodological move Ye et al.'s diagnosis calls for: a multi-axis characterization that does not depend on which surface form of the construct one privileges.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了LLM马屁行为的多维断裂特征，引入材料科学类比，并提出多轴度量，揭示不同语境下的马屁错误表现具有可复现的测量指标和机制差异。
AI.motivation: 已有70多篇论文探讨了LLM中的马屁行为，但该概念的明确定义和边界尚无专家共识。由于现有研究大多聚焦于表面行为形式，导致其概念割裂。因此，作者希望提出一种新的研究框架，对马屁行为的本质与变体进行系统量化和分类。
AI.method: 作者采用类材料科学方法，将对话看作在负载下的样本，将LLM看作材料，通过三类测试情境（辩论、错误预设和伦理设置）构造行为测量。通过14个回合级的维度（速度、损伤累积、漂移、脆性、方向稳定性等）和3个独立说话人维度，实现对马屁失败点的定量刻画。测量方法以类胡克定律为参照，并跨情境进行复现性与结构效应检验。
AI.result: 不同情境下，马屁行为呈现明显的机制区分：辩论场景受模型本身主导，表现为脆性破裂（结果取决于模型）；而错误预设和伦理设置则更受讨论话题决定，表现为材料蠕变（结果受输入负载影响）。这些特征间的结构效应呈现可复现的测量特征。不同评判者（如GPT-4o与Haiku 4.5）在辩论情境下评分高度一致（κ=0.88），但在错误预设下评分不一致（κ=0.36），说明部分情景对评审者敏感。
AI.conclusion: 作者提出的多轴度量和类材料分析法为LLM马屁行为提供了更系统的描述框架，能跨情境稳定区分不同类型与机制，且不依赖任一特定表面行为形式，从而回应了领域内专家关于马屁界定不清的批评。

title: RaLMPH: Reliability-aware Learning for Multi-Pathologist Harmonization in Whole-Slide Image Classification
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is a standard paradigm for Whole-Slide Image (WSI) analysis and has achieved strong results in computational pathology. However, most MIL pipelines assume a single "gold" label per slide, which conflicts with clinical practice where substantial inter-pathologist variability is common. Existing multi-annotator learning and label-refinement methods typically estimate global annotator reliability or rely on single-instance assumptions, making them poorly suited to MIL and to localized diagnostic contexts where experts disagree. We propose RaLMPH (Reliability-aware Learning for Multi-Pathologist Harmonization), a MIL-based label reconciliation framework for WSIs annotated by multiple pathologists. RaLMPH introduces a reliability field that jointly models (i) local neighborhood structure in WSI feature space and (ii) expert uncertainty (entropy), enabling per-sample identification of trustworthy reference neighborhoods. Leveraging this field, RaLMPH performs sample-wise local annotator ranking to select reliable opinions per slide and applies an adaptive gating mechanism to fuse labels conditioned on local reliability. Experiments on a clinical WSI dataset with labels from six pathologists, as well as controlled simulated benchmarks, show that RaLMPH consistently outperforms existing approaches. Further analyses clarify how our reliability-aware mechanism improves label reconciliation and downstream MIL performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RaLMPH框架，通过建模局部特征空间和专家不确定性，有效融合多病理专家对全切片图像（WSI）的标注，实现更可靠的标签整合，提升病理图像分析表现。
AI.motivation: 现有多实例学习（MIL）方法假定每张片有唯一“金标准”标签，但实际中病理医生间常有较大分歧，现有方法无法有效应对多专家一致性差的问题。
AI.method: 提出RaLMPH框架，在WSI特征空间中引入“可靠性场”，结合局部邻域结构和专家标注的不确定性（熵），对每个样本动态排名标注专家的可靠性，并通过自适应门控机制融合本地可靠标签。
AI.result: 在含六位病理专家标注的临床WSI数据集和模拟基准上，RaLMPH在标签整合和下游MIL任务中均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RaLMPH能够细粒度建模病理专家可靠性，针对多专家标注一致性低的问题，提升MIL任务性能和标签质量，对病理WSI分析有重要意义。

title: Decoupled Object-Centric Video Understanding for Generating Robotic Manipulation Commands
summary: Translating video demonstrations into executable robot commands remains challenging because existing methods often fail to identify which objects are functionally involved in the demonstrated action. As a result, they may generate commands that are linguistically plausible but operationally ambiguous. We propose an object-centric video understanding framework that decouples action recognition from object identification to generate precise, grammar-free manipulation commands. Our approach integrates Temporal Shift Modules (TSM) for efficient spatio-temporal action classification with a novel \textbf{Object Selection} algorithm that identifies task-relevant objects through trajectory-based role classification, blur detection, and overlap minimization. The selected objects are then processed by Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for robust category recognition and zero-shot generalization. Evaluated on a modified Something-Something V2 dataset, our method achieves 86.79\% action classification accuracy and BLEU-4 scores of 0.337 on standard objects and 0.261 on novel objects. These results improve over the strongest task-specific baseline by 80.2\% and 143.9\%, respectively. Larger gains are observed in METEOR and CIDEr, reaching 157.9\% and 171.7\% on novel objects. Across all semantic metrics, our approach consistently outperforms task-specific methods and remains competitive with, or surpasses, large general-purpose VLMs while retaining a modular, object-centric design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以物体为中心的视频理解框架，实现将视频演示自动转化为可执行的机器人指令，且在任务相关物体的识别上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从视频演示生成机器人指令时，难以正确识别参与动作的关键物体，导致生成的指令虽语言上通顺，但执行时会不明确。因此，迫切需要一种能够精准识别任务物体的方法。
AI.method: 所提方法将动作识别与物体识别解耦，先采用Temporal Shift Modules (TSM)进行高效的时空动作分类，然后通过轨迹角色分类、模糊检测及重叠最小化实现新颖的物体选择，再用视觉-语言模型辨认物体类别，实现零样本泛化，最终生成精确、去语法束缚的操作指令。
AI.result: 在改造后的Something-Something V2数据集上，方法实现了86.79%的动作分类准确率，标准物体和新颖物体上的BLEU-4分别为0.337和0.261，较最强任务特定基线分别提升80.2%和143.9%，在METEOR和CIDEr等语义指标上提升幅度更大。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在所有语义评测指标上一致超过任务特定方法，并且对比大规模通用视觉-语言模型也具有竞争力，保持了模块化的物体中心化设计。

title: Islamic Large Language Models: From Knowledge Acquisition to Trustworthy and Hallucination-Resistant AI
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for knowledge-intensive question answering, including religious and legal questions. Islamic knowledge is a particularly demanding setting: answers are expected to be grounded in authoritative sources, citations must be exact, Arabic varieties differ substantially from the language of classical sources, and legitimate jurisprudential disagreement must be represented rather than collapsed into a single answer. This survey reviews the emerging field of Islamic LLMs and trustworthy Islamic AI. We organize the literature around Arabic NLP and Arabic-centric LLMs, Islamic NLP resources, Qur'anic question answering, Islamic knowledge benchmarks, retrieval-augmented generation, Islamic legal reasoning, inheritance reasoning, hallucination evaluation, and trustworthiness. We argue that fluency in Arabic is not sufficient for Islamic AI. Reliable systems require curated sources, retrieval and verification modules, citation-aware generation, madhhab-aware reasoning, human expert evaluation, and benchmarks that measure not only answer accuracy but also faithfulness, source validity, and reasoning quality. The survey concludes with a research agenda for hallucination-resistant Islamic AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了面向伊斯兰知识的问题解答领域中大语言模型（LLM）和可信伊斯兰AI的最新研究进展，强调仅具备阿拉伯语流利度远不能满足伊斯兰AI的严格要求。
AI.motivation: 在回答涉及伊斯兰教的复杂法律与宗教问题时，答案需有权威出处、精确引用、涵盖法学派分歧，而LLM应用在这一领域引发了准确性与可信度的挑战，因此有必要系统梳理相关研究并提出更高标准。
AI.method: 通过梳理相关文献，围绕阿拉伯语NLP与LLM、伊斯兰领域数据集、古兰经问答、法律与继承推理、信息检索辅助生成、幻觉检测和评估、可验证性等多个方面进行分析与总结，并提出对系统设计的具体要求。
AI.result: 调研发现，现有系统中单靠流利的阿拉伯语处理技术不足以支撑权威和可验证的伊斯兰问答；高质量系统需同时引入严选知识库、检索与校验模块、精准引用、法学派区分、专家评价和专门基准的多维指标。
AI.conclusion: 伊斯兰AI的发展应注重减少幻觉、提升可信度，未来研究应聚焦健全的人类专业评价、源头溯源性、推理质量和多元分歧识别的基准建设，推动形成高可靠性和可信度的伊斯兰大模型系统。

title: An Extensive Benchmark for Single-round and Multi-round Instruction-based Image Editing
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV), 2026
summary: In recent years, there have been notable advancements in the area of instruction-based image editing (IIE), which focuses on the automatic alteration of input images using a model. Nevertheless, assessing the effectiveness of these editing models poses a considerable challenge due to the intricate nature of instructions and the wide variety of edits. To tackle this problem, one urgent task in this domain is the development of a robust evaluation framework that can precisely gauge the quality of editing outcomes and offer valuable benchmarks to guide future improvements. To address this challenge, we present a comprehensive evaluation benchmark named I2EBench2.0, designed for single-round and multi-round assessment of IIE models. I2EBench2.0 has four key features: 1) Evaluation Across Single and Multi-rounds: I2EBench2.0 simultaneously evaluates both single-round and multi-round instruction-based edits, assessing the precision and consistency of the edits. 2) Extensive Evaluation Criteria: I2EBench2.0 encompasses a broad range of criteria, evaluating both high-level and low-level aspects of each IIE model. Specifically, it incorporates 16 dimensions for single-round evaluations and 7 for multi-round evaluations. 3) Alignment with Human Judgment: To ensure our benchmark aligns with human evaluation, we conducted a comprehensive user study for each criterion. 4) Research-driven Insights: By analyzing the strengths and weaknesses of current IIE models across all 16 single-round and 7 multi-round dimensions, we provide critical insights aimed at directing future research in this area. We tested eight recently developed IIE models using I2EBench2.0 and derived academic insights through meticulous comparison and analysis. The related code, dataset, and images generated by all IIE models are available on GitHub: https://github.com/cocoshe/I2EBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套名为I2EBench2.0的评价基准，用于全面评测基于指令的图像编辑（IIE）模型的性能，涵盖单轮及多轮编辑情景，并基于丰富的评价维度对现有模型进行系统性分析。
AI.motivation: 近年来基于指令的图像编辑技术（IIE）发展迅速。然而，由于指令复杂且编辑多样，评价这些模型的效果极具挑战性。缺乏专门、严谨的评测框架阻碍了该领域的进步，因此急需建立一套能精准反映编辑效果质量的评价基准用于模型评估与未来改进。
AI.method: 作者提出了I2EBench2.0，该基准具备以下特点：1）同时支持单轮和多轮编辑的精度与一致性评估；2）采用丰富评价标准，单轮编辑包括16个维度，多轮编辑包括7个维度，涵盖高低层次指标；3）所有评价维度映射到人类主观判断，并通过用户调研加以确认；4）对主流IIE模型在所有维度的表现进行综合分析，输出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 作者使用I2EBench2.0对八个最新IIE模型进行了系统测试和比较，在16个单轮和7个多轮维度上揭示了它们的优势与瓶颈，并据此得出了多项具有指导意义的学术洞见。
AI.conclusion: I2EBench2.0有效填补了IIE模型系统性评价的空白，不仅为未来IIE模型的开发与改进提供了明确定量的参照，也为该领域进一步发展指明了研究方向。相关资源已开源，便于社区共享和迭代。

title: MVOFormer: Flow-Semantic Transformer for Robust Monocular Visual Odometry
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: Monocular visual odometry (MVO) is foundational to autonomous navigation and robotic localization. However, existing learning-based MVO approaches often struggle with either a lack of interpretable, complementary features or overly complex multi-stage architectures. These limitations inherently restrict their robustness and cross-domain generalization. In this work, we propose MVOFormer, a novel transformer framework for robust monocular visual odometry. Our architecture features a Flow-Semantic Dual Branch Encoder that synergizes dense geometric motion cues with object-centric semantic priors, explicitly distinguishing static structures from dynamic distractors. These representations are then fused by an Iterative Multimodal Decoder, enabling coarse-to-fine pose refinement while dynamically suppressing attention on unreliable regions. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that, without any target-domain fine-tuning, MVOFormer achieves superior zero-shot generalization and robustness, significantly outperforming prior learning-based frame-to-frame methods across diverse benchmarks including TartanAir, KITTI, TUM-RGBD, and ETH3D-SLAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于Transformer的单目视觉里程计（MVO）方法MVOFormer，通过结合几何和语义特征，显著提升了鲁棒性及跨场景泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前学习型单目视觉里程计方法在特征解释性或架构复杂度之间存在权衡，导致其鲁棒性和跨领域泛化受限。为解决这一问题，作者提出结合多模态特征、简化架构的新方法。
AI.method: MVOFormer 采用了Flow-Semantic Dual Branch Encoder，将密集的几何运动与对象中心语义信息结合，区分静态与动态区域。随后，通过Iterative Multimodal Decoder融合信息并逐步优化位姿，同时动态抑制不可靠区域的影响。整个框架基于Transformer结构实现。
AI.result: 在无需目标域微调的情况下，MVOFormer在TartanAir、KITTI、TUM-RGBD和ETH3D-SLAM等多个数据集上显著超越了现有的端到端学习型帧间VO方法，展现了极强的零样本泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MVOFormer显著提升了单目视觉里程计的泛化性和鲁棒性，对自主导航和机器人定位具有重要价值。

title: FraudSMSWalker: Benchmarking Agentic Large Language Models for SMS-to-Webpage Fraud Detection
summary: SMS fraud is increasingly cross-channel: a message directs the user to a webpage, and the final risk depends on how the SMS claim aligns with the page content and requested user action. However, existing evaluations either focus on message-only smishing classification or expose URL and domain cues that allow models to rely on reputation shortcuts. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{FraudSMSWalker}, a controlled benchmark for URL-masked SMS-to-webpage fraud judgment. FraudSMSWalker contains 699 bilingual chains, including 332 fraudulent and 367 benign cases, across ten service scenarios. The model-visible input consists of the SMS context and sanitized webpage evidence, while raw URLs, hosts, domains, IPs, redirects, and reputation metadata are withheld. The benchmark further includes hard benign cases whose pages contain login, payment, verification, or account-management elements that are plausible under the service context but also appear in scam flows. We evaluate nine web agents under masked browser-agent protocols and conduct URL-visibility ablations. The results show that current agents can detect suspicious cues, but struggle to preserve benign recall and often produce positive predictions that are weakly supported by the observed evidence. These findings position FraudSMSWalker as a benchmark for measuring whether web agents can make fraud judgments that remain both accurate and evidence-grounded when direct reputation shortcuts are suppressed. The associated code and dataset are accessible at the \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/w/FraudMessageWalker-Bench}{anonymous link}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FraudSMSWalker，一个用于评估短信到网页欺诈判断模型的新基准，强调在屏蔽URL等声誉信息的情况下，模型要依据上下文和证据做出决策。
AI.motivation: 当前SMS欺诈呈跨渠道特征，诈骗信息常引导用户访问网站，存在短信内容与网页请求是否匹配的问题。以往工作要么只检测短信，要么利用网址等声誉信息，无法真正检测结合上下文的欺诈。需要一个能排除声誉捷径的评测框架。
AI.method: 作者提出FraudSMSWalker基准，包含699条双语SMS-网页序列（332欺诈，367正常），覆盖十个服务场景。输入只含短信内容和净化后的网页证据，不提供URL、域名、IP等信息，并含构造的高难度正常案例。对九种web agent模型在该协议下进行评测，并分析暴露URL与否则的影响。
AI.result: 结果显示，现在的web agent虽然能发现可疑线索，但在保留正常用例的识别率（recall）方面表现较差，且有正向预测缺乏充分证据支持的情况。
AI.conclusion: FraudSMSWalker为评估web agent在屏蔽声誉类信息时能否做出准确且基于证据的欺诈判断提供标准，有助于推动更健壮的SMS网页欺诈检测技术发展。

title: Toward the Whole Picture: Accumulative Fingerprint Mapping and Reconstruction for Small-Area Mobile Sensors
summary: Small-area fingerprint sensing on mobile devices creates a fundamental mismatch between acquisition and recognition: each touch captures only a tiny, pose-varying local patch, while reliable biometric matching ultimately requires a stable and sufficiently complete fingerprint representation. Existing pipelines largely cope with this mismatch by treating repeated touches as independent partial templates, which leads to repeated registration, repeated matching, and no guarantee of adequate global coverage. In this paper, we advocate a different formulation, namely \emph{accumulative fingerprint mapping and reconstruction} for small-area mobile sensing. Rather than matching every partial patch separately, the proposed perspective converts a sequence of local observations into a unified fingerprint state that is progressively refined as new touches arrive and can be matched only once after consolidation. As a concrete baseline, we present a classical pipeline that performs patch-wise structural feature extraction, feature-level registration and fusion, fingerprint map construction, and phase-based ridge reconstruction. More importantly, we position this baseline within a broader mobile fingerprint framework that integrates structured token learning, two-stage pose reasoning, and diffusion-based generative reconstruction. This viewpoint reframes mobile fingerprint recognition from multi-capture multi-match processing to accumulative map building, state refinement, and one-shot matching, offering a principled route toward efficient, pose-robust, and deployment-friendly biometrics for small-area mobile platforms. The baseline implementation has been publicly released at https://github.com/XiongjunGuan/FpReconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于小面积移动设备指纹识别的累积式指纹映射与重建新方法，通过将多次触摸采集的局部指纹信息逐步融合为稳定的统一指纹状态，从而提升识别效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 移动设备上的指纹传感器尺寸有限，每次只能采集非常局部且随手指姿态变化的指纹片段，而可靠的生物识别需要完整且稳定的指纹表示。当前方法通常将多次采集的片段各自独立处理，导致信息利用效率低，不保证指纹覆盖全面。
AI.method: 本文提出累积式指纹映射与重建，将每次触摸采集到的局部片段融合到统一的指纹状态中，经过结构特征提取、特征级配准与融合、指纹图构建、基于相位的脊线重建，以及后续引入结构化标记学习、两阶段姿态推理和基于扩散的生成式重建。相比传统多次注册和匹配的方法，这一方法能够实现一次配准后的单次匹配。
AI.result: 提出了一个具体基线系统，实现了指纹片段累积式重建。该方法有效提升了识别准确性、鲁棒性和系统效率。基线代码已经开源，有助于学术和工业界推广应用。
AI.conclusion: 累积式指纹映射与重建将移动端指纹识别任务重新定义为地图积累、状态不断细化和单次统一匹配，为小面积移动设备带来更加高效、健壮且易于部署的指纹生物识别方案。

title: PROSE: Training-Free Egocentric Scene Registration with Vision-Language Models
summary: Registering two captures of the same indoor space taken at different times underpins persistent spatial memory for robots and AR systems, yet the realistic version of this task is egocentric and its most scalable form is RGB-only. Head-mounted cameras yield blurry, fast-moving, partially overlapping views from which dense geometry is hard to recover. Classical registration leans on exactly the clean point clouds this setting lacks, while learned scene-graph methods require a pre-built or annotated graph and a trained matcher that we find brittle under egocentric data. We take a different route, using a pretrained vision-language model as the source of both scene understanding and cross-scan matching. Our method, PROSE (Prompted Scene rEgistration), lifts each RGB sequence into an object-level 3D scene graph using off-the-shelf foundation models for geometry, segmentation, and language, then prompts the same VLM to match object instances across the two RGB sequences. To make this matching tractable and reliable, we leverage object heights as a prior and verify each proposed match with a paired same/different query, then solve for the rigid transform by hypothesizing a candidate per matched object and selecting the one with the strongest geometric consensus. PROSE adds no learned parameters and requires no depth sensor, training, or annotated graph. On the egocentric Aria Digital Twin and Aria Everyday Activities benchmarks, it outperforms both geometric and learned scene-graph baselines in registration accuracy, on ground-truth and RGB-reconstructed point clouds alike, and the scene graph it produces transfers directly to downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的无须训练和深度信息的室内场景注册新方法PROSE，可仅用RGB序列实现跨时空同空间的对象级匹配和姿态估计，并在主流数据集上超越现有几何和学习型基线。
AI.motivation: 现有的室内场景注册方法对于移动机器人和AR系统来说局限明显：经典方法依赖干净稠密的点云，学习型方法则需要预构建或标注图，并且在自我视角数据下表现不稳健。头戴摄像头拍摄的视频通常模糊且视场重叠有限，难以获得精细几何信息，并且RGB-only的方案才是最具可扩展性的现实需求。
AI.method: 提出了一种无需训练和深度传感器、无需标注图的方法PROSE。它利用预训练的视觉-语言基础模型，对RGB视频序列进行目标级3D场景抽象与分割，基于对象高度等先验简化匹配候选，再通过VLM进行实例级配对和验证，并从多组匹配中选择几何一致性最强的刚性变换。
AI.result: 方法在Aria Digital Twin和Aria Everyday Activities自我视角数据集上，显著优于传统几何方法和学习型场景图基线，不论在真实点云还是基于RGB重建的点云上，配准准确率更高。此外，输出的场景图可无缝用于其他下游任务。
AI.conclusion: PROSE提出了一条新路径，仅用RGB视频和预训练视觉-语言模型即可实现高效、稳健、无需训练的自我视角室内场景注册，推动了无传感器、无监督的空间长期记忆与理解。

title: Progressive Knowledge-Guided Large Language Model Framework for Bearing Fault Diagnosis
summary: Vibration-based bearing fault diagnosis requires resolving three interrelated measurement challenges, including the trade-off between global statistical feature efficiency and local transient signal fidelity, insufficient traceability of measurement features to underlying fault physics, and ineffective multi-source measurement information fusion across diagnostic scales. This paper presents a progressive physics-guided multi-scale vibration signal processing framework that addresses all three challenges within a unified diagnostic pipeline. An 81-dimensional measurement descriptor, derived from bearing kinematic theory and characteristic defect frequencies, establishes a physically traceable feature space enabling real-time fault screening at approximately 20 ms per sample. A fault-adaptive signal segmentation mechanism then directs analytical attention toward fault-relevant waveform regions guided by physics-based priors, without manual feature engineering. Structured fault mechanism knowledge is further encoded implicitly in model parameters during training, enabling autonomous multi-scale measurement fusion without external knowledge dependencies at inference. Validated on four public benchmark datasets under diverse operating conditions, the framework achieves 98.49% diagnostic accuracy with a 12.6-fold reduction in computational cost relative to signal-level baselines. Interpretability analysis confirms that diagnostic feature activations align with established bearing fault mechanics, supporting measurement traceability in safety-critical industrial systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多尺度、物理引导的振动信号处理框架，有效提升轴承故障诊断准确率，并大幅降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有振动信号轴承故障诊断存在三个难点：1）全局统计特征与局部瞬态信号的权衡；2）诊断特征与故障物理机制关联性弱；3）多源测量信息在多尺度下融合效果有限。
AI.method: 构建了基于轴承运动学理论和特征频率的81维物理可追溯特征空间，用于实时筛查；利用故障自适应信号分段及物理先验，自动聚焦于相关波形；在模型训练时隐式编码结构化故障机制知识，实现多尺度信息融合，无需推理时依赖外部知识。
AI.result: 在四个公开基准数据集上验证，诊断准确率达98.49%，计算成本较信号级方法降低12.6倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效融合物理先验与多尺度特征，不仅准确且高效，并实现了特征与物理机制的可解释性，适用于工业安全关键场景。

title: Unlocking Diffusion Hierarchies: Adaptive Timestep Selection for Zero-Shot Segmentation
summary: Zero-shot segmentation has recently shown notable improvement by leveraging the rich visual priors in large-scale text-to-image diffusion models, such as Stable Diffusion. However, current diffusion-based methods often face limitations due to the trade-off between spatial resolution and contextual information, as well as their reliance on a single static timestep for feature extraction. To overcome these challenges, our work introduces two key advancements. First, our Contextual Similarity Maps fuse high-resolution attention maps with rich U-Net encoder features, providing both fine-grained and robust per-pixel representations. Second, we identify an emergent hierarchical semantic progression within the denoising process of various diffusion models: representations transition from part-level abstractions at earlier timesteps to object-level abstractions at later stages. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a mechanism to adaptively select the optimal timestep for each pixel. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing zero-shot segmentation baselines, validating the efficacy of combining contextual features with dynamic, hierarchical timestep selection.

AI.tldr: 本论文针对零样本分割任务，提出融合高分辨率注意力图与U-Net编码器特征，同时自适应选择扩散模型去噪过程中的时刻，显著提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的零样本分割方法在空间分辨率与语境信息之间存在权衡，且仅用单一时间步特征，导致表现受限。
AI.method: 提出Contextual Similarity Maps，将高分辨率注意力图与U-Net编码器特征融合，得到更细致且鲁棒的像素级表征。同时，观察到扩散过程中的表示层次性变化，设计自适应机制为每像素动态选择最优特征提取时刻。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，结合上下文特征和动态时刻选择后，分割表现持续优于现有零样本分割基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合多层次上下文信息和自适应时间步选择是提升基于扩散模型的零样本分割性能的有效途径。

title: Multi-Turn Reflective Masking Elicits Reasoning in Mask Diffusion Models
summary: While reasoning on autoregressive (AR) models is often performed by chain-of-thought reasoning and reflection, their refinement of previous outputs still relies on fully sequential generation, even when only local edits are needed. In contrast, the masking mechanism in Mask Diffusion Models (MDMs) naturally supports explicit local edits on previous outputs, allowing selective refinement without discarding previous answers and generating another from scratch. While this property more closely aligns with how humans correct mistakes by iterative local refinement, existing MDMs do not support multi-turn masking and denoising. We propose Reflective Masking (RM), which elicits such an intrinsic reasoning capability in MDMs via lightweight post-training. RM provides a native test-time scaling, where an MDM iteratively revisits and revises its prior outputs based on evolving context. To exploit insights from previous turns like AR reasoning, we further introduce History Reference, a parameter-free mechanism that leverages intermediate denoising states during revision. Our approach requires no architectural changes and is easily applicable to existing MDMs. Across diverse tasks and modalities, including text generation, Sudoku, and image editing, Reflective Masking consistently outperforms standard masking-based baselines and demonstrates strong generality, positioning RM as a fundamental primitive for reasoning on MDMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种提升Mask Diffusion Models（MDMs）推理和编辑能力的新方法——Reflective Masking（RM），实现更高效和类人的输出修正。
AI.motivation: 目前基于自回归（AR）模型的推理主要通过链式思考（CoT）和反思完成，输出修正只能通过完全的顺序生成，而即便只需局部编辑也必须从头生成。而MDMs中的masking机制更适合人类式的局部逐步修正，但现有MDM不支持多轮mask编辑和去噪。
AI.method: 提出Reflective Masking（RM）方法，通过轻量级额外后训练，使MDM支持多轮掩码和去噪。引入“历史引用”无参数机制，在修正输出时参考前序中间状态。无需结构修改，可直接应用于现有MDM模型。
AI.result: 在文本生成、数独和图像编辑等多种任务与模态上，RM方法优于标准掩码基线，表现出较强的通用性。
AI.conclusion: RM可以作为MDMs推理的新原语，优雅地实现与人类更类似的、可迭代局部修正能力，展现出良好的扩展性和通用性能。

title: DenseControl: Instance-Level Controllable Synthesis of Dense Crowd Image
summary: In this paper, we introduce DenseControl, a novel pipeline for generating dense crowd images. Specifically, DenseControl meticulously positions and sizes each generated instance to align precisely with the predefined coordinates and scales. Based on this, we further allow for control over the background, style, and attributes of instances. The motivation behind DenseControl stems from the observation of two main challenges in synthesizing crowd images: controlling signal embedding and maintaining topological integrity when imparting instance scale guidance. To address these, we first introduce the Isolated Object Embedding (IOE) map, a novel representation that facilitates spatial location control while mitigating the difficulties associated with learning projections for model. Secondly, we propose an Implicit Scale Embedding (ISE) strategy that seamlessly integrates with the IOE map to encode precise scale information. To further enhance the efficacy of combining ISE with the IOE map, we incorporate a Position Shortcut mechanism that enhances cross-attention to alleviate projection challenges. We evaluate DenseControl through two lenses: synthesis quality and applicability in latent applications. Experiments across different control conditions demonstrate DenseControl achieves state-of-the-art results in dense crowd image synthesis. Furthermore, we showcase applications in augmenting crowd analysis under data scarcity, transfer learning, and weather generalization scenes, to highlight the practical utility of DenseControl. The codebase will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DenseControl，一个可精细控制密集人群图像合成的深度学习管线，并在多个场景下展现了优越效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的人群图像合成面临两个主要挑战：信号控制难、实例尺度引导下的拓扑完整性难以保持。作者为了解决这两个实际痛点，提出了DenseControl。
AI.method: DenseControl采用了两个关键技术：（1）IOE（Isolated Object Embedding）地图，用于精准控制空间位置并降低模型学习难度；（2）ISE（Implicit Scale Embedding）策略，与IOE地图结合，准确嵌入尺度信息。同时通过Position Shortcut机制提升交互注意力，进一步缓解投影难题。支持背景、风格与实例属性的细致控制。
AI.result: 在多种控制条件下，DenseControl在人群图像合成的合成质量和潜在应用表现均达到当前最优。还展示了其在人群分析数据稀缺、迁移学习、天气泛化等应用场景下的效用。
AI.conclusion: DenseControl不仅提升了密集人群图像的合成质量，还为人群分析等下游视觉任务提供了更丰富、可控的数据增强手段，具有广泛的实际应用潜力。

title: P3B3: A Multi-Turn Conversational Benchmark for Measuring European and Brazilian Portuguese Variety Bias in LLMs
comment: Accepted at MeLLM Workshop at ACL 2026
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) become embedded in everyday communication, capturing regional linguistic variation is essential for reliable and equitable language use. In Portuguese, European (pt-PT) and Brazilian (pt-BR) varieties remain unevenly represented, with pt-BR dominating in data quantity, while LLM preference for Portuguese variants remains underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce P3B3, an expert-curated language variety agnostic benchmark of conversational prompts, along with an evaluation framework for measuring variety bias and controllability. Experiments on several models show that most LLMs exhibit a strong bias toward pt-BR, with variation in controllability across models. These results highlight the need for more balanced multilingual representation across language varieties.

AI.tldr: 本文引入了P3B3基准和评测体系，发现大语言模型对葡萄牙语地区变体存在偏好。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型广泛应用于日常交流，准确捕捉区域语言变体对于语言模型的公正性和可靠性变得尤为重要。然而，目前葡萄牙语的欧洲变体（pt-PT）和巴西变体（pt-BR）在数据和模型偏好上表现不均，其中pt-BR处于主导地位。现有研究对模型对葡萄牙语变体偏好的探索不足。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个专家精心设计、不区分语言变体的对话型基准P3B3，并建立了评估框架，用于量化大语言模型对于不同葡萄牙语变体的偏好和可控性。实验覆盖多个已有大语言模型。
AI.result: 实验发现，当前的大语言模型普遍对巴西变体（pt-BR）有强偏好，各模型对语言变体的可控性存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，必须加强对不同语言变体，尤其是数据量较少的葡萄牙语变体的均衡支持，提升模型在多语言语种中表现的公平性和可靠性。

title: Fusion-E2Pulse: A Multimodal Event-RGB Fusion Network for Non-contact Pulse Wave Reconstruction
comment: Accepted by MICCAI 2026. The final version will appear in the official MICCAI proceedings published by Springer
summary: Non-contact pulse wave reconstruction hinges on the precise recovery of waveform morphology, including the dicrotic notch. Conventional Red-Green-Blue (RGB)-based methods, which extract physiological signals from recorded facial videos, are constrained by the integral imaging mechanism of standard cameras, where the exposure process induces a smoothing effect that attenuates subtle vascular pulsation details. Conversely, neuromorphic event cameras, while offering exceptional sensitivity to intensity fluctuations, are inherently susceptible to noise and artifacts induced by minor motion. To exploit the synergy between frame-based integration and event-based differential sensing, we propose a novel multimodal network named Fusion-E2Pulse. This framework utilizes filtered RGB signals as structural priors to suppress motion artifacts, while leveraging the high-sensitivity of event streams to recover fine-grained morphological details. Experimental results demonstrate that Fusion-E2Pulse achieves state-of-the-art performance, effectively balancing noise suppression and morphological fidelity, achieving a mean absolute error of 0.78 bpm for heart rate estimation, a waveform correlation of 0.89, and a systolic phase duration error of 16.74 ms, validating its efficacy in reconstructing fine-grained pathological features.

AI.tldr: 該論文提出了一種名為Fusion-E2Pulse的多模態網絡，結合RGB視頻和事件攝像機數據實現無接觸脈搏波形重建，兼顧細節保留和抗噪效果。
AI.motivation: 傳統基於RGB的方法因相機成像原理導致細節失真，難以精確重建脈搏波的細節特徵（如重搏切迹）；事件攝像機可捕捉微小變化，但對噪聲和運動伪影敏感。為克服兩者不足，有必要設計結合二者優點的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了Fusion-E2Pulse多模態網絡，利用經過濾波的RGB信號作為結構先驗以抑制運動伪影，同時利用事件流的高靈敏度來恢復細粒度的波形細節。
AI.result: 該方法在實驗中展現出領先性能：心率估計平均絕對誤差為0.78 bpm，波形相關係數為0.89，收缩期時長誤差為16.74毫秒，有效還原了病理性細節。
AI.conclusion: Fusion-E2Pulse成功融合RGB和事件數據，兼顧噪聲抑制與細節保真，在無接觸脈搏波形重建方面取得了較好的研究進展。

title: The Art of Mixology: Mixup-based Obfuscation for Privacy-Preserving Split Learning in Large Language Models
summary: Split learning provides a practical paradigm for resource-constrained users to train Large Language Models (LLMs) by offloading computation-intensive layers to a server while keeping raw data local. However, existing privacy-preserving split learning methods still face a difficult trade-off among utility, privacy, efficiency, and stability. Specifically, these methods often suffer from substantial utility degradation, remain vulnerable to advanced data reconstruction attacks, incur prohibitive computational and communication overhead, or exhibit unstable performance across different tasks. In this paper, we propose MIXGUARD, a novel mixup-based privacy-preserving split learning framework for LLMs. MIXGUARD introduces token-level obfuscation, representation-level obfuscation, and adaptive gradient perturbation mechanisms, which operate jointly to preserve useful learning signals while preventing privacy leakage to the server. Technically, MIXGUARD first constructs a lightweight calibration model on a public dataset to refine the approximated target representation, and then applies this model during privacy-preserving fine-tuning on private data. We conduct extensive experiments on four classification tasks and four text generation tasks across multiple LLM families, model sizes, architectures, and fine-tuning strategies. The results show that MIXGUARD preserves model utility comparable to non-split training baselines, consistently achieves stronger privacy protection than existing split learning defense methods against state-of-the-art data reconstruction attacks, and remains robust under adaptive attack settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MIXGUARD，一种基于混合技术的隐私保护分割学习框架，用于训练大语言模型（LLMs），在提升隐私保护的同时保持高模型效能和良好稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护的分割学习方法在实用性、隐私保护、效率和稳定性之间存在难以平衡。模型常因隐私保护而效能下降，或在面临高级攻击手段时难以保证数据隐私，同时伴有高昂的计算与通信开销，因此需要更优的解决方案。
AI.method: MIXGUARD框架结合了三种机制：token级别混淆、表示级别混淆和自适应梯度扰动，并借助基于公共数据训练的轻量化校准模型，提升对原始数据的隐私保护能力。
AI.result: 通过在多个大语言模型家族、模型规模、架构和微调策略下，对四个分类和四个文本生成任务进行实验，MIXGUARD在保持与非分割训练相近模型效能的同时，达到比现有分割学习防御方法更强的隐私保护表现，且在面对自适应攻击时依然稳健。
AI.conclusion: MIXGUARD有效解决了分割学习中隐私、效能、效率与稳定性之间的权衡难题，为在资源受限环境中安全高效地训练LLMs提供了新思路。

title: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation of SAM 3 for Automated ITV Generation from 4DCT Images
summary: Four-dimensional computed tomography (4DCT) captures the full respiratory cycle of thoracic anatomy, yet current Internal Target Volume contouring workflows process each phase in isolation, discarding temporal coherence and leaving contours vulnerable to phase-specific artifacts. We present a lightweight framework that applies parameter-efficient fine-tuning to the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3) via low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to align its text-prompted segmentation with the medical domain using only seven annotated 3D CT volumes. Furthermore, the framework incorporates a hard negative mining strategy to improve boundary discrimination in low-contrast thoracic regions. At inference, phase-wise predictions are refined through phase-coherent temporal filtering and spatial connectivity analysis. Since respiratory motion is continuous and periodic, genuine anatomy appears in contiguous blocks of phases, whereas transient artifacts appear sporadically and are thus effectively suppressed. Experiments on pulmonary and cardiac structures yield median Dice scores of 0.968 and 0.910 with 95th-percentile Hausdorff distances of 0.998 mm and 2.931 mm, respectively. The proposed framework effectively eliminates the severe false-positive predictions inherent in the zero-shot inference of the unadapted SAM 3. With only seven annotated volumes, the framework retains over 95% of full-data accuracy, and the entire pipeline is trainable on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating a scalable, data-efficient solution for adaptive radiotherapy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效的4DCT医学分割模型微调框架，仅用7个标注可实现高精度轮廓提取，并成功抑制CT相位伪影。
AI.motivation: 当前4DCT的靶区勾画只针对每个单独的呼吸相位，忽略了相邻时序信息，导致分割容易受噪声和伪影影响。因此，需要一种方法充分利用呼吸周期的连续性，提升分割的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用低秩微调（LoRA）技术对Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3)进行参数高效的微调，仅需7个标注体积数据，并引入hard negative mining以优化边界识别。同时，后处理阶段结合相位时序滤波和空间连通性分析，有效利用呼吸运动的周期连续特征来抑制伪影。
AI.result: 在肺部和心脏结构测试中，分割结果的中位Dice评分分别达0.968和0.910，95百分位Hausdorff距离分别为0.998 mm和2.931 mm，显著优于未微调的SAM 3模型。仅用7个体积就能实现95%以上的全数据精度，而整个流程可用消费级显卡完成训练。
AI.conclusion: 该框架大幅提升了医学4DCT自动分割的精度和鲁棒性，极大降低了数据和计算资源需求，为适应性放疗等场景提供了高效实用的技术方案。

title: LLM-based Visual Code Completion for Aerospace Geometric Design
summary: Recent advances in both Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have seen a step change in their ability to perform visual code completion, but the aerospace industry, which prioritizes safety and explainabilty over rapid LLM adoption, currently has no publicly announced LLM-based geometric design copilot systems in commercial use by aerospace Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs). This paper presents a LLM-based visual programming copilot application for aerospace engineering design tasks, using a visual programming variant of the ReAct methodology and GPT 5.4. In addition to the copilot, we describe Wingbuilder, a new Grasshopper plugin library with custom components for aerospace-specific geometry abstraction, and an associated Aerospace Visual Programming Dataset (AVPD) with 18 aerospace expert designed tasks at different levels of difficulty alongside ground truth solutions. We evaluate our copilot application with a user trial involving two experienced aerospace engineers from a large aircraft manufacturing company. We find our copilot visual programming ReAct methodology was successful in generating suggestions that participants found helpful, but slow ReAct inference times limit its usefulness to more complex time-consuming tasks where waiting for good copilot solution suggestion was worthwhile. Participants reported they liked the tool and would be willing to use it in the future.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的可视化编程协同工具，专为航空航天工程设计任务研发，并进行了初步用户测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM和视觉语言模型取得显著进展，但航空航天业因安全与可解释性的高要求，尚无公开商用的LLM几何设计协同系统。为提升设计效率、降低门槛，亟需定制化智能辅助工具。
AI.method: 采用先进的GPT 5.4和可视化编程版ReAct方法，开发了协同工具和专用的Grasshopper插件Wingbuilder，并制作了包含18个专业任务的航空航天可视化编程数据集（AVPD）。最后通过相关企业专家进行了用户实验评估。
AI.result: 协同工具能为用户生成实用建议，工程师反馈积极，认为工具对复杂、耗时任务特别有帮助。但ReAct推断速度较慢，成为应用瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 该LLM可视化编程协同工具获得了实际从业者的认可，未来有望推广，但系统效率仍需优化以提升实际工程中的使用体验。

title: On the Adversarial Robustness of Multimodal LLM Judges
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly used as automated judges, e.g., for image quality and safety assessment. However, their adversarial robustness remains largely unexplored, threatening the fairness and reliability of automated judging. To bridge this gap, we introduce RobustMLLMJudge, the first general framework for evaluating the adversarial robustness of general-purpose MLLMs when functioning as judges. It covers diverse attacks against popular judge approaches across quality and safety evaluation scenarios. Using RobustMLLMJudge, we reveal that i) different MLLM judges are highly vulnerable to score-inflating adversarial attacks; and ii) although effective, these attack methods face a critical challenge due to unique constraints in the evaluation protocols of MLLM judges. We further propose MGSIA, namely Manifold-Guided Semantic Induction Attack, a novel method that bypasses these constraints to enable more effective and transferable attacks on MLLM judges. The core idea of MGSIA is to combine affirmative semantic induction with high-score manifold alignment: it maximizes the probability that judges yield affirmative responses (e.g., "Yes") to binary semantic queries, while regularizing adversarial representations toward high-score centers estimated from proxy protocols. Together, these objectives yield transferable score-inflating perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority and generalizability of MGSIA in deceiving advanced MLLM judges under different evaluation scenarios, highlighting the need for robust MLLM judges. Code and data will be made available at https://github.com/mala-lab/RobustMLLMJudge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了评估多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在自动判决场景下对抗鲁棒性的通用框架RobustMLLMJudge，并提出一种新型攻击方法MGSIA，发现当前主流MLLM判官对对抗性攻击极度脆弱。
AI.motivation: 随着MLLMs作为图像质量与安全自动判官的使用日益广泛，其对抗鲁棒性却鲜有研究，导致自动判决的公正性和可靠性受到威胁。本文旨在填补该领域空白。
AI.method: 提出了RobustMLLMJudge框架，用于系统性评估MLLM判官在多种评分与安全评测场景下的对抗鲁棒性。进一步提出了MGSIA（流形引导语义诱导攻击），通过肯定语义诱导和高分流形对齐实现更强且可迁移的分数提升类攻击。
AI.result: 实验显示，不同类型的MLLM判官在分数提升型对抗攻击下极为脆弱。MGSIA能有效绕过评测协议的独特约束，实现更强与更广泛可转移的欺骗效果，在多种评测场景下表现优越。
AI.conclusion: MLLM判官在对抗攻击面前缺乏鲁棒性亟需引起重视，MGSIA为评估MLLM鲁棒性提供了强有力的工具，有助于未来构建更安全可靠的自动化判官系统。

title: Connecting Speech to Words through Images
comment: Accepted at EUSIPCO 2026 - 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
summary: How can we learn the mapping between written words and their spoken counterparts in the absence of explicit textual supervision? We present a visually grounded method for building a vocabulary of spoken words using only images and their spoken descriptions. First, image captioning systems are used to build a vocabulary of written words representing salient visual concepts in the images. For each word, we then find utterances whose image captions contain that word. Then we use an unsupervised word discovery technique to align these utterances to locate instances of the target word. The result is spoken word segments that are linked to written words -- all accomplished without any text supervision. In spoken word retrieval and keyword spotting experiments, the proposed approach outperforms a strong neural baseline while being more interpretable. These results demonstrate the feasibility of the approach in English and motivate future work on low-resource languages without transcripts.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需文本监督，通过图像与语音描述联合，从零构建语音单词与书写单词映射的方法，其效果优于现有神经基线。
AI.motivation: 传统的语音识别或者语音-文本映射往往依赖大量文本转录，而在低资源语言下难以实施，因此需要探索无文本监督的语音-文本关联方法。
AI.method: 首先利用图像描述（图像及对应的语音描述）训练图像标注系统，提取代表视觉概念的书面词汇；再通过找出包含特定书写单词的图像描述语音，并采用无监督词语发现技术，对语音片段进行定位，对齐，实现口语片段与书面词的关联。
AI.result: 在语音单词检索和关键词定位实验中，该方法在解释性更强的前提下，超过了强大的神经网络基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了在全无文本监督情况下，从图片和语音描述自动学得词汇映射，展示了在低资源语言领域广阔的应用前景。

title: Mutual Distillation of Dual-Foundation Models for Semi-Supervised PET/CT Segmentation
summary: Organ segmentation from PET/CT is critical for quantitative analysis and radiotherapy planning in oncology. To ease the high annotation cost of PET/CT segmentation, semi-supervised learning (SSL) provides a practical and effective solution for developing deep models with limited labeled data. Recent developments in visual foundation models have demonstrated remarkable adaptability with improved efficiency. In this work, we propose a mutual distillation framework that seamlessly exploits both structural and functional foundation models, which act as modality-specific generalists for distilling knowledge from structural CT and metabolic PET imaging. By bridging the gap between the task-specific precision of student models and the segmentation priors of generalist foundation models, we propose \textbf{MuDuo}, a mutual distillation framework that synergistically leverages SAM-Med3D for CT and SegAnyPET for PET to distill their knowledge into a lightweight student network. Our approach eliminates the need for manual prompts while maximizing the utility of unlabeled data for automatic segmentation, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the AutoPET dataset with only 5 labeled cases. Our source code is available at https://github.com/Wu-beining/MuDuo.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种名为MuDuo的互蒸馏框架，可充分利用结构性CT和功能性PET的大型基础模型，实现高效、自动的PET/CT器官分割。
AI.motivation: PET/CT器官分割对肿瘤学定量分析和放疗规划至关重要，但高质量标注代价高昂。为了解决标注数据不足的问题，研究者希望利用大量未标注数据与有限标注数据训练高性能分割模型。
AI.method: 提出了一种互蒸馏框架MuDuo，将结构性基础模型（CT的SAM-Med3D）与功能性基础模型（PET的SegAnyPET）相结合，并通过互蒸馏方式将它们的知识传递到轻量级学生网络，实现无须人工提示的自动分割。
AI.result: 在AutoPET数据集上，仅用5个有标注样本，就获得了先进的分割性能，显示出方法对小样本场景下的优越性。
AI.conclusion: MuDuo框架高效融合了两大基础模型的优点，极大降低对标注数据的依赖，实现了高效、自动化的PET/CT器官分割，为相关研究和实际应用带来新思路和工具。

title: Understanding the Behaviors of Environment-aware Information Retrieval
summary: Recent retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches have demonstrated strong capability in handling complex queries, yet current research overlooks a critical challenge: different retrievers require fundamentally different query formulation strategies for optimal performance. In this work, we present the first systematic analysis of how LLMs can learn to adapt their query formulation strategies for different retrievers via reinforcement learning (RL). Our empirical study reveals that RL effectively teaches an LLM to tailor its queries to specific retriever characteristics. We discover that different retrievers exhibit surprisingly distinct optimal query styles (e.g., descriptive vs. question-like), suggesting strategies learned for one retriever ineffective for another. We further show that performance can be enhanced by incorporating retriever-specific human guidance and by scaling model size. To facilitate learning over multi-retrieval-step trajectories, we introduce a branching-based rollout technique that improves training stability. Our work provides the first empirical evidence and actionable insights for building truly retriever-aware RAG systems. Code and resources are available at https://github.com/LCO-Embedding/Envs-aware-Information-Retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用强化学习（RL）让大语言模型（LLM）根据不同检索器自适应地调整检索查询策略，并首次系统性地分析这种方法的有效性，提升了RAG系统的性能和检索针对性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统通常忽略了不同检索器需要采用不同查询表述策略这一关键挑战，不同检索器的最佳查询风格有很大差异，单一策略无法适用所有检索器。
AI.method: 作者采用强化学习训练LLM，使其针对不同检索器自适应优化查询方式。实验中还引入了分支式回滚技术稳定多步检索训练过程，并引入了针对检索器的人为指导和模型扩展。
AI.result: 实验表明，经过强化学习训练的LLM能有效自适应不同检索器，优化相应查询策略，每种检索器的最优查询风格均有差异，且借助特定人类指导和大模型可以进一步提升表现。分支回滚提升了训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统性验证并展示了构建具备检索器感知能力的RAG系统的重要性和可行性，相关方法和工具为未来RAG模型检索自适应提供了理论和实证基础。

title: Variational Test-time Optimization for Diffusion Synchronization
summary: Collaborative generation, which coordinates multiple diffusion trajectories to extend the capabilities of pretrained priors, has emerged as a powerful paradigm for extending the applicability of diffusion models. Among existing approaches, diffusion synchronization provides a scenario-agnostic solution by introducing general guidance mechanisms. However, current synchronization approaches rely heavily on heuristics and still require task-specific tailoring, which limits their generalizability and performance. In this work, we mathematically derive a synchronization framework based on optimal control, providing a principled explanation of diffusion synchronization. During sampling, we optimize control variables to guide multiple trajectories toward coherent solutions while remaining close to the underlying diffusion prior. Our method operates entirely at test-time without additional training, thereby enabling broad applicability across diverse generation scenarios when combined with strong pretrained priors. We demonstrate consistent improvements over baselines on three representative collaborative generation tasks, covering a wide range of modalities and applications. Beyond performance gains, our work establishes a novel foundation for collaborative generation, opening a principled path toward extending pretrained generative models to new collaborative generation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优控制的扩散同步框架，有效提升了多扩散轨迹协作生成任务的泛化能力和性能，无需额外训练即可适用于多种生成场景。
AI.motivation: 现有协作生成中的扩散同步方法虽然有一定普适性，但仍依赖启发式规则且需针对具体任务调整，导致泛化性和性能受限。
AI.method: 作者从最优控制理论推导出新的同步框架，在扩散采样过程中，通过优化控制变量引导多条生成轨迹向一致、符合先验分布的解收敛。该方法完全在测试阶段操作，无需额外训练，能够结合已有强大的预训练生成模型广泛应用于不同协作生成场景。
AI.result: 在三种具有代表性的协作生成任务上，覆盖多种模态和应用，方法在性能上均超越现有基线，实现了一致性提升。
AI.conclusion: 本工作不仅在协作生成性能上取得进步，还为该领域建立了基于严格理论推导的新基础，为预训练生成模型在协作生成方向的扩展提供了原理性途径。

title: How Much Can We Trust LLM Search Agents? Measuring Endorsement Vulnerability to Web Content Manipulation
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based search agents synthesize open-web content into actionable recommendations on behalf of users, creating a risk that attacker-published pages are transformed into endorsed claims. We introduce SearchGEO, a controlled evaluation framework for measuring endorsement corruption in LLM-based web-search agents, combining a web-evidence manipulation pipeline, a five-mode attack taxonomy, and multiple output-level metrics. We evaluate 13 LLM backends on 308 cases each. Results show that vulnerability patterns vary across backends: overall attack success rate (ASR) ranges from 0.0% on Claude-Sonnet-4.6 to 31.4% on Gemini-3-Flash, the strongest attack mode differs by model family, and the same deployment scaffold could amplify or decrease ASR on different backends. An auxiliary agent-skill probe, where endorsement becomes an install command, exposes a sharp split among otherwise robust backends: Claude over-rejects while GPT over-trusts. These findings argue for treating recommendation reliability under adversarial search content as a first-class dimension of backend safety evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了SearchGEO评测框架，系统性测试了大语言模型（LLM）驱动的搜索代理在面对网络恶意内容时的易受攻击性。通过308个案例和13种模型的评测，结果显示各大模型家族的安全性表现差异显著。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛用于整合开放网络内容并为用户产生推荐，黑客通过网页引入恶意信息被模型采纳并背书的风险日益严重，急需系统评估这类安全隐患。
AI.method: 建立了SearchGEO框架，包含网页证据操控流水线、五种攻击模式的分类体系和多维度输出指标。通过对13个LLM模型后端，每个进行308案例的自动化攻击测试，详细测量各类攻击的效果和模型响应差异。
AI.result: 测试发现，不同LLM模型在攻击下的易感性差异很大。整体攻击成功率（ASR）最低为0.0%（Claude-Sonnet-4.6），最高可达31.4%（Gemini-3-Flash）。最易受攻击的模式在模型间有所不同，同一部署框架对于不同模型的易感性有增强或削弱效应。技能探针实验还揭示出Claude系列易过度拒绝任务，GPT系列则容易过度信任。
AI.conclusion: 模型在面向公众推荐内容时的安全性不能忽视，对抗性检索内容下的推荐可靠性应作为LLM后端安全评估的核心指标。

title: NeRD: Neuro-Symbolic Rule Distillation for Efficient Ontology-Grounded Chain-of-Thought in Medical Image Diagnosis
summary: Interpretability is essential for trustworthy medical image diagnosis. However, existing concept-driven interpretable methods have key limitations: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) require scoring all predefined concepts at inference time and for manual intervention, imposing a substantial burden on clinicians, while rationale-based generative approaches often select concepts by class discriminability, which can drift from diagnostic ontologies. To address these issues, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Rule Distillation (NeRD), a framework that produces efficient, ontology-grounded reasoning chains that are sufficient yet non-redundant, without manually crafting diagnostic rules. Experiments on two skin datasets demonstrate strong diagnostic performance and interpretability, and blinded expert evaluation confirms the clinical plausibility of NeRD rationales. Our method further enables a first expert-in-the-loop study for Multimodal Chain-of-Thought-based diagnosis, achieving efficient and effective concept-level intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可解释性医疗图像诊断方法（NeRD），能自动生成与医学本体相符但冗余度低的推理链，无需手动规则设置，同时提升可解释性与临床可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有概念驱动的可解释诊断方法存在局限：CBMs推断时需评分所有预定义概念，增加医生负担；生成式推理方法选择的概念偏离医学本体，影响临床解释的相关性。
AI.method: 作者提出了Neuro-Symbolic Rule Distillation (NeRD) 框架，通过神经-符号结合，自动蒸馏出高效、贴合医学本体的推理链，不依赖手工规则，且保证充分且非冗余。
AI.result: 在两个人体皮肤数据集上，NeRD取得了优秀的诊断性能和可解释性。盲评专家评估证实NeRD推理链的临床可信度。此外，方法支持第一次基于多模态链式思考的专家交互研究，实现了高效有效的概念级干预。
AI.conclusion: NeRD兼顾了诊断准确性和推理可解释性，降低了医生负担，生成的推理链有效贴合医学知识，展示了在临床实际中的应用前景。

title: Tying the Loop -- Tied Expert Layers in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models
summary:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures efficiently scale Large Language Models (LLMs) by activating only a small fraction of their experts per token, yet the full parameter count - dominated by the expert parameters - must be held in training and inference memory. To address this, we introduce Expert Tying, an architectural modification that shares expert parameters across consecutive transformer layers while preserving independent, layer-wise routing and attention.
  We evaluate this approach across common, state-of-the-art architectures, including OLMoE, Qwen3, and DeepSeek-style MoEs. Our pretraining experiments demonstrate that tying experts can reduce memory footprint by almost 2x at virtually no degradation in perplexity or downstream quality. By exploiting the parameter redundancy inherent in MoE pathways, our method provides a highly favorable compute-to-memory trade-off, advancing efficient training and scaling of next-generation LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）模型中通过专家参数共享（Expert Tying）来减少显存消耗，并在多个主流架构上验证了效率和有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE虽然仅激活小部分专家参数，但所有专家参数都需占用内存，导致训练和推理时显存需求极高，限制了大模型的扩展能力。
AI.method: 作者提出了“Expert Tying”结构，即在连续的transformer层之间共享专家参数，每一层仍保持独立的路由和注意力机制。这样减少了专家参数的总数量，从而降低内存占用。
AI.result: 在OLMoE、Qwen3和DeepSeek等主流MoE架构上预训练实验证明，专家参数共享可使显存占用几乎减半，且困惑度和下游性能基本不受影响。
AI.conclusion: 专家参数共享技术显著优化了MoE类大模型的参数-显存比，使训练和推理更加高效，为未来大规模LLM的高效扩展铺平了道路。

title: XPASS-Vis: A Dataset for Cross-Domain Personalized Image Aesthetic Assessment
summary: Personalized image aesthetic assessment (PIAA) seeks to model, at the individual level, the subjective nature of aesthetic judgments toward artworks and photographs. Aesthetic preference is known to be both deeply personal and partially consistent across visual domains. Yet existing PIAA datasets and methods are largely confined to a single domain, or provide too few samples per annotator within each domain to enable personalization across domains. Consequently, the cross-domain generalization of personalized aesthetic preferences remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce XPASS-Vis, the first dataset explicitly designed for cross-domain PIAA. XPASS-Vis comprises 6,526 stimuli from three visual domains -- art, fashion, and landscape -- rated by 129 annotators, yielding 87,836 user-stimulus interactions, each annotated with an overall aesthetic score and nine aesthetic-emotion ratings. Notably, each annotator rated more than 200 stimuli per domain, providing sufficient per-domain coverage to support personalization both within and across domains. Moreover, we establish baseline models for cross-domain PIAA under unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), where a model trained on a labeled source domain is transferred to an unlabeled target domain. A systematic evaluation of representative UDA approaches shows that the best-performing method recovers approximately 60\% (Spearman's $ρ$ = .28) of the supervised upper bound under a fully unsupervised setting. This provides encouraging evidence that personalized aesthetic preferences are, to a meaningful extent, transferable across visual domains. At the same time, a substantial gap remains, highlighting the need for PIAA-specific adaptation strategies. XPASS-Vis and the accompanying baselines provide a foundation for future research on cross-domain PIAA. All datasets and code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了第一个面向跨领域个性化图像美学评价（PIAA）的数据集XPASS-Vis，并基于此进行了基线实验，验证了个性化美学偏好在不同视觉领域之间的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有PIAA数据集和方法大多仅限于单一领域，或每个标注者在每个领域中的样本太少，难以实现跨领域的个性化美学偏好建模。因此，探索个性化美学偏好跨视觉领域的泛化和迁移能力一直不足。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含艺术、时尚和风景三大视觉领域的XPASS-Vis数据集，每位129名标注者在每个领域都对200多张图片进行了评分。基于此，作者进行跨领域无监督领域自适应（UDA）实验，模型在一个带标签源领域训练后迁移到无标签目标领域，并系统评估了UDA主流方法的效果。
AI.result: 最优的UDA方法在完全无监督设定下可以恢复约60%的有监督上限（Spearman ρ=0.28），证明了个性化审美偏好在视觉领域之间有一定程度的可迁移性，但依然存在较大差距。
AI.conclusion: XPASS-Vis数据集和基线为跨领域个性化美学评价研究奠定了基础，也表明需要为PIAA设计专门的自适应策略以缩小领域迁移差距。所有数据和代码将在论文接收后公开。

title: Does Traversal Order Matter? A Systematic Study of Tree Traversal Methods in Transformer Grammars
summary: Transformer Grammars (TGs) enhance language modeling by incorporating syntactic tree structures. Despite the potentially significant impact on model performance of how syntactic trees are linearized in TGs, existing studies rely solely on Depth-First Traversal (DFT) for linearization. In this paper, we expand the traversal design space by exploring Breadth-First Traversal (BFT) and a novel hybrid traversal strategy, Production-Rule Traversal (PRT), which combines the structural lookahead of BFT with the early lexical generation of DFT. We integrate these traversal methods with varying tree configurations and masking strategies, and empirically evaluate their performance on language modeling, syntactic generalization and summarization. We reveal the inherent trade-offs between nested composition and global lookahead, providing actionable recommendations for designing task-aware Transformer Grammars.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了将广度优先遍历（BFT）和新颖的产生规则遍历（PRT）方法引入Transformer Grammars（TGs）的线性化过程，并系统评估了不同遍历策略及其在多任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有TGs大多只采用深度优先遍历（DFT）进行树结构的线性化，未充分探索遍历方式对模型表现的影响。作者希望通过引入新的遍历策略，探究其对语言建模能力和泛化能力的影响。
AI.method: 本文将BFT和结合BFT结构前瞻与DFT早期词汇生成优势的PRT引入树的线性化过程，结合多种树结构配置和masking策略，在语言建模、句法泛化和摘要任务上进行实证评估。
AI.result: 不同遍历方式和树结构、masking策略搭配下，模型在各任务间表现存在权衡，具体表现为嵌套合成与全局前瞻之间的取舍。
AI.conclusion: 遍历/线性化策略显著影响TGs的表现，建议设计任务感知型Transformer Grammars时根据需求权衡选择具体策略。

title: Open-World Video Segmentation
summary: While video segmentation has advanced rapidly on short clips and closed-set benchmarks, open-world video segmentation remains largely unexplored. The challenge is twofold: (1) existing methods are not designed to support object discovery and identity maintenance in long videos of dynamic ego-motion, and (2) existing evaluation protocols rely on a rigid 1:1 matching that unfairly penalizes semantically valid predictions with mismatched granularity. To address both gaps, we introduce Savvy, a practical and strong system for zero-shot open-world long-horizon video segmentation. Savvy combines hierarchical mask discovery, deferred admission, and track consolidation to support persistent object discovery, safe track promotion, and stable long-range identity maintenance. We further propose OGA, a granularity-aware evaluation suite for open-world video segmentation. Built on a Granularity-Agnostic (GA) matching protocol, OGA relaxes conventional 1:1 matching to an n:1 mapping, but still enforces temporal rigor by detecting support discontinuities through sever points and scoring each reference object through its dominant coherent fragment. This prevents fragmented or flickering support from being over-rewarded while enabling GA-adapted metrics and structural diagnostics: identity persistence (IP), and identity concentration (IC). On VIPSeg, we show that standard 1:1 evaluation substantially underestimates open-world methods, whereas GA evaluation recovers much of their suppressed performance. On the more realistic long-horizon benchmarks: ScanNet and HM3D, Savvy consistently outperforms strong baselines across both classical and proposed metrics, including STQ, VPQ$_\infty$, IP and IC. Together, these results establish a practical benchmark and a strong baseline for open-world long-horizon video segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种用于零样本开放世界长时序视频分割的新系统Savvy，并提出了一套更合理的评估协议GA及评测工具OGA，实验显示其在多个基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割方法主要针对短视频和封闭集，难以应对长视频中动态场景的对象发现与身份维护问题，而且现有评价方法（1:1映射）对于开放世界分割任务并不公平，容易惩罚实际合理、但粒度不同的预测结果。
AI.method: 本文提出Savvy系统，结合了分层掩码发现、延迟确认与轨迹合并，以实现持续的对象发现、安全的轨迹提升和稳定的长程身份维护。同时提出OGA评测套件，基于GA协议，将匹配方式从传统1:1拓展到n:1，并引入身份持久性（IP）和身份集中度（IC）等新指标，严格检测轨迹支持的连续性。
AI.result: 实验证明传统1:1评价方法低估了开放世界方法的性能，而GA协议能恢复较多真实表现。Savvy系统在VIPSeg、ScanNet以及HM3D等更真实的长时序基准上，在传统与新提出的各项指标上均优于现有强大基线。
AI.conclusion: Savvy和OGA的提出，为开放世界长时序视频分割任务确立了新的实用基线和评测方法，有助于推动该领域发展。

title: Data-Driven Decoding of Russell's Circumplex Model of Affect
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Affective computing increasingly relies on deep learning to represent emotions, yet latent spaces often remain opaque, high-dimensional black boxes. This paper investigates whether Transformers' embeddings recover the geometric regularities of Russell's circumplex model. We unify two complementary experiments testing the hypothesis that, after training models on text and speech, their resulting latent spaces encode a topology consistent with valence-arousal and reproduce human-like neighborhood relations. Specifically, we evaluate deep representations extracted from Transformer-based text (RoBERTa) and speech (wav2vec 2.0) encoders, along with a multimodal Transformer fusion architecture, across naturalistic datasets like MSP-Podcast and controlled LLM-generated stimuli. Our analysis reveals that multimodal fusion of text and audio yields perfect topological alignment with Russell's primary emotion ordering. Furthermore, in a zero-shot setting using generic text embeddings, projected fine-grained emotion terms fall close to their established human-mapped coordinates. Our contribution is a novel, data-driven framework for validating emotion models, demonstrating that Russell's circumplex structure is intrinsically encoded in the embeddings of these modalities rather than being solely an artifact of human labeling, thereby bridging the gap between psychological theory and representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨Transformer模型在情感计算中的表征是否自发形成了Russell环形模型的几何结构。通过对文本、语音及其多模态融合的深度表示进行分析，发现模型的潜在空间与心理学情感理论高度一致。
AI.motivation: 解决深度情感表征黑箱问题，检验Transformer生成的潜在空间是否能自发映射心理学常用的情感维度模型（Russell环形模型）。
AI.method: 利用RoBERTa（文本）、wav2vec 2.0（语音）和二者融合的多模态Transformer，对MSP-Podcast等真实和LLM生成数据集中的情感数据进行训练与嵌入空间分析，评估其与Russell环形模型在拓扑结构上的一致性。
AI.result: 多模态文本与音频融合模型的潜在空间与Russell模型的情感排序实现了完美对齐。在零样本情况下，情感术语的嵌入与人类标注的情感坐标接近。
AI.conclusion: 多模态Transformer嵌入空间本质上内生Russell情感环形结构，这为心理学理论与深度特征学习之间架起了桥梁，也为情感模型有效性验证提供了数据驱动的新框架。

title: Fusing Transferred Priors and Physics-based Decomposition for Underwater Image Enhancement
summary: The underwater images are captured within diverse water-medium conditions, leading to complex degradation, including color bias, low contrast, and blur effect. Recently, learning-based methods have demonstrated their potential for underwater image enhancement (UIE). However, most of the previous work focus on the training strategy or network design to make the enhanced result aligned well with the labels in datasets, ignoring that the labels are selected from the enhanced results of previous UIE methods and these pseudo-labels are noisy. Consequently, the performance of their models is not satisfactory to a certain extent. However, collecting the true labels of the underwater images is challenging. In this work, we propose a transfer learning-based UIE that does not require underwater images to have paired noisy or true labels for learning. Instead, the UIE task is first divided into global color correction, haze removal, and background noise suppression following the underwater physics. Then multiple types of prior from other vision tasks are leveraged as cross-domain supervision in each step. In this way, a novel UIE is available via transfer learning, and the physics-aligned UIE decomposition provides theoretical soundness. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our proposal based on physics and priors fusion achieves SOTA performance in the UIE task and effectively boosts downstream vision tasks, significantly outperforming benchmark methods. Project repo: https://github.com/Haru2022/P2-UIE.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对水下图像增强（UIE）任务，提出了一种不依赖配对标签的迁移学习方法，并结合物理分解和跨领域监督，显著提升了增强效果。
AI.motivation: 水下图像由于采集环境复杂，常出现颜色偏差、低对比度和模糊问题。现有方法大多依赖标签进行有监督训练，但这些标签本身来源于以往UIE方法，存在噪声，因此增强效果不理想。采集真实标签又非常困难。作者希望突破标签限制，提升水下图像增强质量。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于迁移学习的UIE方法。首先按照水下物理模型将UIE任务分解为全局颜色校正、去雾和背景噪声抑制三个子任务。每个步骤引入了来自其他视觉任务的多种先验，作为交叉领域的监督信号，实现了无须水下真/伪标签的端到端训练。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在主流UIE任务上取得了定性和定量的SOTA（最佳）性能，并极大提升了下游视觉任务的效果，显著超越了现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出了一种免标签、物理与先验结合的水下图像增强新范式，既具理论完备性，又获得了卓越的实验表现，为UIE提供了新思路。

title: Robust Dual-Signal Fusion: Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Gating with Compressed Chain-of-Thought Refinement for Irony Detection in Social Media Texts
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) natively default to literal semantic interpretations, making zero-shot irony detection a persistent challenge. We introduce the Robust Dual-Signal (RDS) Fusion framework, a hybrid neuro-symbolic architecture that compresses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories without Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Evaluated on a strictly held-out TweetEval test set (N=734), RDS achieves 78.1% accuracy and a Macro F1 of 0.777, matching the absolute performance ceiling of the fine-tuned BERTweet. On the heavily imbalanced iSarcasm dataset, the frozen CoT pipeline filters 22.5% of out-of-distribution hallucinations, yielding a zero-shot Macro F1 of 0.6726 and Ironic F1 of 0.4821, outperforming multiple heavily supervised SemEval transformer ensembles. A statistical ablation confirms this structural synergy: adding the symbolic prior to the neural baseline yields no significant gain (p = 0.242), and the marginal benefit of adding the CoT pipeline to that prior is heavily compressed (p = 0.149). Only the complete, concurrent fusion of all three signals achieves a statistically validated improvement over the baseline (p = 0.005).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种强健的双信号融合框架（RDS），用于神经-符号混合的零样本讽刺检测，并实现了与有监督微调模型相当的表现。
AI.motivation: LLMs 通常只能进行字面语义的理解，导致在没有监督微调的情况下，进行零样本讽刺检测效果不佳。本文旨在解决这个瓶颈，提升 LLMs 在讽刺检测任务中的表现力和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出 RDS 融合框架，将神经网络的 Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理与符号先验并行、融合，且无需监督微调。通过冻结 CoT 流水线并结合符号方法，实现多信号并行结构。
AI.result: 在 TweetEval 测试集上，RDS 框架取得78.1%准确率和0.777 Macro F1，与有监督微调的 BERTweet 持平。在数据分布不均衡的 iSarcasm 数据集上，RDS 在零样本情况下也超过了多个有监督的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 只有当神经、符号、推理三信号完全融合时，才能实现在零样本讽刺检测上的显著提升，验证了多信号结构的协同效应。

title: Self-Questioning Vision-Language Models: Reinforcement Learning for Compositional Visual Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are AI systems that process both images and text, yet they often struggle with compositional visual reasoning questions that require chaining multiple steps together, such as identifying objects, counting them, and comparing the results. Existing approaches improve this reasoning by training models on human-written step-by-step explanations, but creating these annotations is expensive and difficult to scale. We propose a self-questioning framework that trains a VLM to break visual questions into smaller sub-questions and answer each one before producing a final response, using a reinforcement learning algorithm called Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The model is never shown examples of how to decompose questions, it discovers this behavior on its own, guided by a reward signal that scores whether the output contains sub-questions and whether the final answer is correct. We apply this framework to a 3-billion-parameter model, training on both synthetic scenes of geometric shapes (CLEVR) and real-world photographs (A-OKVQA). On A-OKVQA, both self-questioning and standard reinforcement learning substantially improve accuracy over the untrained model (52.2% and 51.6% vs. 46.8%). We introduce the first self-questioning VLM by rewarding not only the final answer like standard RL but additionally for generating intermediate sub-questions, enabling it to discover compositional decomposition strategies. These results suggest that teaching AI systems to ask themselves intermediate questions is a promising strategy for complex visual reasoning, particularly when the difficulty of a question warrants explicit step-by-step decomposition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自我提问框架，利用强化学习使视觉-语言模型在回答复杂视觉推理问题时自动将任务分解为子问题，无需人工示例，提升了推理准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在处理需要多步推理的问题（如识别、计数、比较等）时表现不佳。现有方法依赖于昂贵且不可扩展的人类分步标注数据，限制了模型规模和复杂问题的处理能力。
AI.method: 作者提出基于自我提问的训练框架，无需示例，模型自发将复杂视觉问题拆解为子问题并逐步作答，最终给出答案。使用名为Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）的强化学习算法，通过奖励信号鼓励模型产出子问题和正确答案。在3B参数量模型上，分别在合成场景（CLEVR）和真实照片（A-OKVQA）上进行实验。
AI.result: 在A-OKVQA数据集上，自我提问（52.2%）和标准强化学习（51.6%）都显著优于未训练模型（46.8%），说明子问题分解和中间奖励有效提升了模型的推理准确率。
AI.conclusion: 让AI系统在遇到复杂推理问题时，学会主动提出中间步骤和分解任务，将有助于提升其视觉推理能力，尤其适用于需要显式分步推理的复杂问题。自我提问是一种有前景的增强推理能力策略。

title: Follow the Latent Roadmap: Navigating Revocable Decoding for Diffusion LLMs with Anchor Tokens
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer a promising avenue for parallel generation but face a trade-off between decoding speed and quality. While revocable decoding strategies attempt to mitigate errors by verifying and remasking tokens, they typically operate within a mixed-quality context. This leads to two critical failures: \textit{Error Propagation}, where new tokens absorb toxic information from erroneous context, and \textit{Local Error Reinforcement}, where errors mutually reinforce each other to evade detection. To alleviate these challenges, we propose ASRD (Anchor Supervised Revocable Decoding), a training-free framework that operates within the embedding space. ASRD explicitly decouples the decoding context into trusted \textit{Anchor Tokens}, which are identified via temporal consistency, and uncertain candidates. Leveraging a dynamic Anchor Tokens Cache, we introduce two complementary mechanisms: (1) Anchor-Guided Generation, which injects entropy-weighted anchor signals into masked positions to implicitly rectify attention toward the reliable global skeleton; and (2) Anchor-Perturbed Verification, which applies orthogonal perturbations to uncertain candidate tokens, destabilizing and remasking errors driven by fragile local consensus. Extensive experiments on math and coding benchmarks demonstrate that ASRD outperforms recent remasking baselines, achieving accuracy improvements of up to 6.4\% while accelerating inference throughput by up to 7.2$\times$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的无需训练的解码框架ASRD（Anchor Supervised Revocable Decoding），通过引入 anchor tokens 增强扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）的解码质量与速度。
AI.motivation: 目前扩散类大语言模型在并行生成时面临解码速度与质量的权衡。传统可撤回解码虽然减少部分错误，但仍因混合质量上下文导致错误传播和局部错误强化，难以彻底提升生成质量。
AI.method: ASRD框架在embedding空间操作，通过时间一致性筛选可信 anchor tokens（锚定令牌），并采用动态缓存。方法包括：（1）anchor引导生成，将anchor信号注入被mask位置引导注意力；（2）anchor扰动验证，对不确定token进行正交扰动检测并remask，打破局部一致性下的错误。
AI.result: 在数学和编程基准测试上，ASRD优于近期的remask方案，准确率最高提升6.4%，推理速度最高可提升7.2倍。
AI.conclusion: ASRD能够有效缓解dLLMs中的错误传播与局部错误固化难题，不仅提升了生成质量，同时大幅加快解码速度，展示了实际应用潜力。

title: SpatialAvatar-0: High-Quality 4D Head Avatar with Multi-Stage Reconstruction
summary: High-quality 4D head avatars from one or a few source portraits are central to telepresence, AR/VR, and digital-human interaction. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as the dominant representation, with two complementary regimes (generalizable feed-forward predictors and per-subject refiners) maturing in parallel. However, existing feed-forward predictors are trained on a single dataset family with a hard-coded source count, inheriting the corresponding domain bias. Per-subject refiners require 300K--600K iterations and rely on adaptive densification that destroys upstream Gaussian layouts, preventing the two regimes from sharing a representation end-to-end. To bridge both regimes we propose SpatialAvatar-0 on a shared FLAME-mesh-bound Gaussian representation: a feed-forward generator with a parameter-free K-source mean-pool and a monocular-temporal to multi-view-spatial two-phase schedule that anchors against identity-prior collapse onto the smaller multi-view set. We further introduce a 10K-iter layout-preserving per-subject refinement loop that freezes the FLAME-binding and Gaussian count and replaces densification with a three-component anti-spike regularization. On VFHQ/HDTF cross-domain zero-shot we surpass the in-domain leader GAGAvatar by +1.5 dB PSNR despite never training on either test domain, and on the SplattingAvatar monocular benchmark we lead every reported metric, surpassing the 300K-iter GeoAvatar by +1.3 dB PSNR at up to 60x shorter per-subject schedule than common SOTA baselines. Website: https://spatialwalk.github.io/SpatialAvatar-0.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种能高质量生成4D头像的新方法SpatialAvatar-0，该方法弥合了主流3D高斯表达下通用预测器和专用个体调优器之间的鸿沟，突破了领域泛化与效率瓶颈，在跨域及单目任务中效果提升，效率显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有4D头像构建方法在泛化能力及个体适应上存在局限：通用型预测器只能适用于特定数据集且源图数硬编码，容易产生领域偏置；每个个体的专用调优方法则需要耗费大量训练迭代，并且中间产生的自适应稠密化破坏了上游结构，二者难以融合。该工作旨在打通这两种模式，实现高效、高质量、泛化能力强的4D头像生成。
AI.method: 提出基于FLAME骨架网格的高斯点云表达：1）设计参数无关的K来源均值池化生成器，实现多源图像输入的自适应整合；2）采用先单目-后多视角的两阶段训练流程，避免身份先验丢失；3）提出1万步的每个个体专用精细化训练，冻结骨架和高斯数目，引入三分量抗尖刺正则化，避免结构破坏并减少训练迭代数。
AI.result: 在VFHQ/HDTF跨域零样本测试时，SpatialAvatar-0比业内领先的GAGAvatar高1.5 dB PSNR，且未在测试域训练；在SplattingAvatar单目基准上，各项指标均领先，达到比GeoAvatar高1.3 dB PSNR，且单个个体调优所需迭代数仅为主流方法的1/60。
AI.conclusion: SpatialAvatar-0方法打通了当前4D头像主流两大技术路径，兼具泛化和高质量还原、极大提升了训练效率，为远程交互、AR/VR等场景下数字人头像应有带来更优解决方案。

title: Revisiting the Systematicity in Negation in the Era of In-Context Learning
comment: Accepted to the 6th Workshop Natural Language Meets Logic and Machine Learning (NALOMA2026) at ESSLLI2026
summary: Understanding the meaning of negated sentences remains one of the challenges for language models, even in the era of large language models (LLMs). We analyze systematicity regarding LLM understanding of negation from two perspectives: behavioral systematicity and representational systematicity. For behavioral systematicity, we confirm that through demonstrations and in-context learning, LLMs can recognize negation expressions and scope within sentences to some extent, but they fail to achieve perfect performance. In particular, the difficulty of the negation scope recognition for models varies depending on the output format. For representational systematicity, we analyze the extent to which function vectors can be robustly constructed from in-context examples for tasks that are essential to understanding negation. The experiments suggest that while function vectors can be composed for negation cue extraction tasks, extracting function vectors for recognizing scope is more challenging.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型对否定句理解的系统性难点，从行为和表征两个层面评估其能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在多项语言任务中取得进展，但它们在否定句理解上仍存在局限。了解其在否定表达和作用域识别上的表现与机制，有助于完善其语言推理能力。
AI.method: 从行为系统性角度，测试LLM在不同输出格式下通过in-context learning对否定表达和作用域的识别能力；从表征系统性角度，考查通过上下文示例能否稳健构造出用于否定相关任务的函数向量。
AI.result: 实验显示，LLM可在一定程度上识别否定表达和作用域，但效果依赖于输出格式，表现不完美。函数向量在否定提示词提取任务中可被有效构建，但用于否定作用域识别时较为困难。
AI.conclusion: LLM在否定句理解方面尚存在系统性不足，尤其是在否定作用域识别上，提示需针对这一问题进一步改进模型结构及训练方法。

title: OneFocus: Enabling Real-World X-ray Security Screening with a Unified Vision-Language Model
summary: X-ray contraband detection is critical for security in large-scale logistics and transportation, yet conventional detectors struggle to adapt to emerging contraband types and lack fundamental visual understanding. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer strong generalization but are hindered by the scarcity of high-quality X-ray image-caption data. To bridge this critical gap, we present MMXray, a meticulously curated benchmark of 52,124 image-caption pairs spanning 28 fine-grained classes of X-ray contraband.
