AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的自蒸馏方法OmniOPSD，有效缓解了多模态大语言模型在复杂推理任务中稀疏奖励的问题，并在MER-UniBench上取得了新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在需要复杂推理的人类中心任务(如状态、情感、意图等)中，受限于奖励稀疏与链式思考标注获取困难，表现不佳；直接监督学习会导致捷径学习和解释性不足。因此迫切需要更高效且安全的奖励信号设计。
AI.method: 提出Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation(OmniOPSD)框架，训练时利用由前沿模型生成的理由(rationale)作为‘教师侧特权证据’，而不是直接作为学生模仿目标。学生只依赖原始多模态输入展开自己的策略，教师对学生的生成进行逐token评分，提供密集监督，无需推断时访问理由或标签。
AI.result: 在MER-UniBench基准上，OmniOPSD获得了均分84.19的SOTA成绩，消融实验也验证了特权教师理由的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OmniOPSD显著提升了多模态大模型在复杂推理和人机交互任务中的性能与安全性，无需昂贵的人工标注和前沿模型依赖，具有推广应用价值。

title: TurboGS: Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting via Error-Guided Sparse Pixel Sampling and Optimization
comment: Accepted by ICML2026. Project page: https://zhengdong.site/projects/TurboGS/
summary: Consumer-level applications require fast optimization of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with high-fidelity novel view rendering. However, existing 3DGS acceleration approaches still incur substantial computation on redundant pixels while sacrificing fine details. In this paper, we present TurboGS, an error-guided training framework that accelerates 3DGS by concentrating optimization on perceptually informative pixels. TurboGS is built upon four core components: (1) a tile-wise sparse pixel sampling, which, driven by multi-view reconstruction errors during training, prioritizes challenging regions and skips well-reconstructed ones to avoid redundant gradient computation; (2) a tile-wise structure-aware loss with sparse Normalized Cross-Correlation, which provides sparse yet effective supervision to preserve fine details and stabilize training; (3) an error-driven Gaussian density control strategy, which dynamically allocates model capacity and removes redundant primitives; and (4) a tailored hybrid optimizer that couples Hessian-informed updates with Adam moment damping to stabilize and improve convergence under sparse supervision. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TurboGS can deliver on par or superior rendering quality within 100 seconds on a single RTX 5090 GPU card (up to 10x training speedup over vanilla 3DGS).

AI.tldr: TurboGS是一种加速3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)的训练框架，以保证高保真度的新视角渲染，同时将优化聚焦在有感知价值的像素上显著提升效率，实现了极大提速（最高10倍）。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS加速方法仍需大量冗余像素计算，导致效率低下且细节损失，无法满足消费级应用对高速度和高质量并重的需求。
AI.method: 提出TurboGS训练框架，包含四个核心：1）基于重建误差的分块稀疏像素采样，跳过已良好重建区域，减少冗余梯度计算；2）用稀疏归一化互相关提供结构感知损失，兼顾细节和训练稳定性；3）误差驱动高斯密度控制，动态调整模型容量，移除冗余原语；4）结合Hessian与Adam的混合优化器，提升稀疏监督下的收敛效果。
AI.result: 在标准数据集和单张RTX 5090 GPU上，TurboGS可在100秒内实现与原生3DGS持平或更优的新视角渲染质量，训练速度最高提升10倍。
AI.conclusion: TurboGS显著加速了3DGS训练，同时保持甚至提升了渲染质量，为消费级应用3D场景优化提供实用、有效方案。

title: GOOSE-M2F: Adapting Mask2Former for High-Fidelity, Long-Tailed Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation in Unstructured Outdoor Terrain
comment: This solution has got 3rd position at GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026
summary: We present GOOSE-M2F, a task-specific adaptation of Mask2Former for the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026. The GOOSE benchmark spans 64 fine-grained classes across unstructured outdoor terrain with a severely long-tailed distribution, where rare classes occupy fewer than 50 pixels per image. We extend the Swin-Large Mask2Former baseline with three targeted contributions: (1)200 Object Queries to eliminate representational saturation; (2)a Feature Refinement Module (FRM) combining ASPP-lite and CBAM dual-attention; and (3)an Auxiliary Supervision Head that delivers direct per-pixel gradients for rare classes. A multi-stage training strategy pairs Distribution-Balanced loss, Rare-Class Copy-Paste augmentation, dynamic IoU-aware re-weighting, and EMA. At inference, a dense sliding-window engine with 2D Gaussian kernel blending and 4-scale TTA adds +10.57\%. GOOSE-M2F achieves 70.08\% Official Composite mIoU (63.55\% fine, 76.61\% coarse), placing 3rd on the GOOSE 2D FGSS leaderboard. Code and trained models are publicly available at: \href{https://github.com/Aditya-Lingam-9000/GOOSE-M2F}{Github GOOSE-M2F Code} and \href{https://huggingface.co/XYZ9843/GOOSE-M2F}{Hugging Face GOOSE-M2F}.

AI.tldr: GOOSE-M2F是一种专门针对户外细粒度语义分割挑战的模型，结合了多种新颖方法，有效提升了稀有类别的识别效果，最终在GOOSE 2D FGSS比赛中取得第三名。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度语义分割任务面临类别分布极度不均衡（长尾分布）的问题，尤其是在自然场景中很多稀有类别像素极少，主流模型对这些类别的识别能力不足，因此需要针对稀有类别设计更有效的方法。
AI.method: 基于Swin-Large版本的Mask2Former，提出三点改进：（1）将Object Queries数量扩展至200以避免表示饱和；（2）增加特征精炼模块，融合ASPP-lite和CBAM注意机制；（3）引入辅助监督头，为稀有类别提供强监督。同时，采用多阶段训练，包括分布均衡损失、稀有类别拷贝粘贴增强、动态IoU权重调整和EMA。在推理阶段，使用滑窗引擎和多尺度测试融合提升性能。
AI.result: GOOSE-M2F在GOOSE 2D FGSS基准上获得了70.08%的总mIoU（细粒度63.55%，粗粒度76.61%），名列官方排行榜第三，并且稀有类别分割能力显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过专门设计的特征与训练增强方法，GOOSE-M2F在长尾分布细粒度分割任务上取得优异表现，显著提升了稀有类别的识别，有效推动了细粒度户外语义分割领域的发展。

title: Learning Directional Semantic Transitions for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Analysis
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation often requires longitudinal comparison to assess disease progression. Existing approaches typically rely on temporal feature fusion or inter-study discrepancy modeling, yet remain limited in capturing subtle progression semantics and overlook the inherently directional nature of disease trajectories. In this paper, we propose ProTrans, a novel vision-language pretraining framework that formulates disease progression as a directional semantic transition between paired CXR studies. ProTrans leverages radiology reports to anchor individual CXR representations within interpretable disease states, and introduces a learnable progression feature map to explicitly encode semantic shifts between states, aligned with report-derived progression descriptions. To enforce direction-aware perception, ProTrans incorporates a reversed temporal modeling process and imposes bidirectional reconstruction consistency across states and transitions, thereby disentangling directional semantics and promoting coherent trajectory modeling. Extensive experiments on longitudinal downstream tasks, including disease progression classification and progression captioning, demonstrate that ProTrans consistently outperforms existing methods, establishing a unified pretraining framework for longitudinal CXR understanding. https://github.com/RPIDIAL/ProTrans

AI.tldr: ProTrans是一种新的视觉-语言预训练框架，专门用于纵向胸部X光片（CXR）的疾病进展建模，通过把疾病进展视为语义转变，有效提升了时间序列任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 纵向CXR评估疾病进展依赖于多时点比较，现有方法在捕捉细微进展和方向性方面存在局限，因此需要更精细化、可解释的进展建模方法。
AI.method: ProTrans框架将疾病进展看作是配对CXR之间的定向语义转变，利用影像报告为每张CXR建立语义锚点；引入可学习的进展特征图来明确建模语义变化，并通过正反时间建模、双向重建一致性来强化方向性感知和轨迹建模。
AI.result: ProTrans在疾病进展分类和进展描述等纵向任务上进行了大量实验，结果表明其在表现上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ProTrans为纵向CXR智能解读提供了统一且效果显著的预训练框架，能够更好地理解和建模疾病进展的语义和方向性。

title: You Don't Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences
summary: Progress in AI has largely been driven by methods that assume less. As compute and data increase, approaches with weaker inductive biases generally outperform those with stronger assumptions. This is particularly characteristic of the field of Visual Representation Learning, where approaches have gone from being dominated by Supervised Learning, to Weakly Supervised Learning, to the now widespread success of Self-Supervised Learning without human labels. Yet, even modern Self-Supervised Learning approaches still depend on strong inductive biases such as augmentations, masking, or cropping. If this trend holds, even these remaining biases should become bottlenecks at scale -- and our experiments confirm this: the optimal strength of inductive biases decreases as data grows. This motivates the search for approaches that rely on fewer assumptions. To this end, we introduce Temporal Difference in Vision (TDV), a new paradigm for self-supervised learning from video that avoids existing inductive biases, relying instead on a causal assumption that the past causes the future. TDV functions by jointly training an image encoder and a motion encoder so that the current frame's representation plus the encoded motion equals the next frame's representation. Despite not leveraging any strong inductive biases, TDV matches state-of-the-art recipes on dense spatial tasks, laying the foundation for representation learning without strong assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自监督视觉表征学习方法TDV（Temporal Difference in Vision），摒弃了以往常用的强归纳偏置（如增强、遮挡、裁剪），仅基于因果性假设，通过联合训练图像与运动编码器实现帧间预测，实验证明该方法在无需强假设条件下性能优异。
AI.motivation: 随着算力与数据量提高，表征学习领域趋向于减少人工假设和手工设计偏置，但即使最新的自监督方法仍然大量依赖如数据增强等归纳偏置，制约其大规模表现，因此需要开发更少假设的新方法。
AI.method: 提出TDV范式：在视频自监督学习中，联合训练图像编码器和运动编码器，使得当前帧特征与运动编码之和等于下一帧特征，仅基于“过去决定未来”的因果假设，完全规避了传统增强、裁剪等归纳偏置。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，在不使用任何强归纳偏置的前提下，TDV方法在多项密集空间视觉任务上达到了与现有最佳方法相当的效果。
AI.conclusion: TDV为无强归纳假设的视觉表征学习奠定了基础，技术趋势证明弱化或消除偏置在大规模数据下更具优势，未来视觉学习更应向减少人工假设方向发展。

title: VEPHand: View-Efficient Photometric Hand Performance Capture at Scale
summary: Robust, high-fidelity 3D hand capture, while fundamental to digital human creation, remains challenging with practical multi-view systems that balance rich photometry with the geometric ambiguities of reconstruction arising from limited viewpoint density. This paper presents an end-to-end pipeline for dynamic hand performance capture and registration, specifically designed for view-efficient setups ($\sim$20 views). We address key challenges with two primary innovations. First, to overcome reconstruction difficulties like limited view overlap and background clutter, our mask-free neural method robustly extracts detailed hand geometry and appearance from unmasked images using scene parameterization and scenario-specific density regularization. Second, addressing registration challenges such as accurately capturing non-linear skin deformations and ensuring plausible results during severe self-contact, we propose a physics-inspired framework. It aligns reconstructions to a personalized hand model by optimizing intrinsic volumetric offsets within its canonical tetrahedral mesh, alongside pose parameters. This approach, supported by robust losses and optimization, captures fine surface deformations, ensures plausible results under severe articulation and self-contact, and demonstrates strong tolerance to input noise. We demonstrate the scalability and robustness of our automated pipeline on an extensive dataset of over 12,000 sequences, from which we also derive a large-scale, high-quality synthetic 2D/3D hand dataset for training downstream tasks. This showcases its effectiveness for single hands, intricate two-hand interactions, and natural hand-object manipulations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity in view-efficient, unmasked scenarios and highly accurate registration. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/VEPHand/.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个针对多视角、低视角密度（约20视角）的动态手部捕捉与配准端到端管线，并展示了其在实际同时捕捉精度和效率之间的优秀表现。新方法可实现无遮罩高精度捕捉和鲁棒配准，显著提升了三维手部重建的实用性和自动化程度。
AI.motivation: 当前高保真3D手部捕捉对于数字人创建至关重要，但现有多视角系统要么依赖大量视角、要么难以兼顾捕捉精度与几何歧义，尤其在视角有限和实用环境下更为突出。因此，亟需一种兼顾视角效率、抗遮挡与高精度的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 论文主要有两个创新点：（1）提出一种无需遮罩的神经方法，通过场景参数化和密度正则化，实现在无背景遮罩情况下从有杂乱背景的图像中鲁棒提取手部几何与外观；（2）提出物理启发配准框架，通过在手模型的四面体体素网格上优化体积偏移和姿态参数，捕捉非线性皮肤形变，并保证自接触等复杂动作下的配准真实性。
AI.result: 在超过12,000条序列的大型数据集上，方法展现出极高的自动化、扩展性与鲁棒性，并据此构建出高质量的2D/3D手部数据集。测试表明方法对单手、双手交互和手物交互场景均表现出高准确度，重建与配准精度达业界领先水平，在低视角、无遮罩场景下表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法大幅提升了实际低视角、多场景手部3D捕捉和配准的可靠性与精度，为下游手部相关任务提供了优质数据基础，在数字人及手部交互等领域有广阔应用前景。

title: CRIS: Cross-Plane Self-Supervised Isotropic Restoration for Anisotropic Volumetric Imaging Across Modalities
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, supplementary material included. Submitted to Medical Image Analysis
summary: Anisotropic volumetric acquisitions are common in clinical MRI and volume electron microscopy (vEM), where sparse through-plane sampling creates thick slices or sections that degrade orthogonal reformats and downstream analysis. We present CRIS, a cross-plane self-supervised framework for isotropic restoration without paired isotropic ground truth. CRIS casts 3D restoration as 2D stripe completion on orthogonal reformats of an isotropic grid: high-resolution in-plane slices are synthetically degraded and periodically masked for training, while at inference blank slices define the isotropic grid, two orthogonal reformats are restored, and predictions are fused by multi-view averaging. We evaluate CRIS on two MRI cohorts and two microscopy benchmarks up to 8x anisotropy. On brain MRI, CRIS achieves 32.921 +/- 0.436 dB PSNR and 0.9631 +/- 0.0027 SSIM, outperforming interpolation, SMORE4, SIMPLE, SA-INR, and ATME, and gives the best segmentation consistency (Dice 0.940 +/- 0.004, ASSD 0.245 +/- 0.014 mm, HD99 1.275 +/- 0.061 mm). On reference-free abdominal MRI, CRIS reduces FID/KID to 48.714/0.023. On vEM, CRIS outperforms interpolation, NIIV, and vEMINR, reaching 29.133 dB/0.834 3D PSNR/SSIM at 4x, 27.123 dB/0.734 on EPFL at 8x, and 21.915 dB/0.699 on noisy hemibrain data. In a robustness experiment, one variable-gap CRIS model evaluated across gap factors 3--7 and coronal, axial, and sagittal degradations maintained higher PSNR/SSIM than interpolation (36.36--31.14 dB and 0.977--0.932 vs. 33.07--27.85 dB and 0.951--0.853). These results support CRIS as a modality-flexible route to isotropic restoration without paired isotropic targets or configuration-specific retraining. Code is available at https://github.com/adi-hatav/CRIS.

AI.tldr: CRIS是一种无需配对各向同性真值的数据、可实现各向同性恢复的自监督方法，适用于临床MRI和体积电子显微镜 (vEM) 中的各向异性体积数据，显著提升了重建和下游分析效果。
AI.motivation: 临床MRI和vEM常出现的各向异性体积数据会导致正交方向重建质量下降，影响后续分析。现有方法通常需要配对各向同性真值或存在配置依赖性，限制了实际应用。研究动机在于开发一种无需配对真值、通用性强的方法实现各向同性体积重建。
AI.method: 提出的CRIS框架将三维恢复任务转化为二维条带补全，通过将高分辨率切片人工降质并周期性掩蔽训练模型，推理时利用空白切片定义各向同性网格，再在两个正交方向恢复、预测，并通过多视图平均融合结果，无需配对真值即可实现各向同性恢复。
AI.result: 在两个MRI数据集和两个显微镜数据集（最大8倍各向异性）上，CRIS的恢复PSNR/SSIM及分割一致性都优于插值、SMORE4、SIMPLE、SA-INR、ATME等方法，同时在无参考腹部MRI和vEM数据上FID/KID和PSNR/SSIM指标也有显著提升。单一变间隔模型对多种退化条件下的鲁棒性也优于传统插值。
AI.conclusion: CRIS无需配对各向同性真值即可实现鲁棒、高质量的各向同性体积恢复，适应多种成像模态和配置，提升了MRI与vEM等领域的图像重建和下游分析能力。相关代码已开源。

title: HadBalance: A Plug-and-Play Unified Global Geometric Prior Framework for Generalizable Biomedical Segmentation
comment: Provisionally accepted by the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2026). 11 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
summary: Precise biomedical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis. Geometric cues (e.g., boundary, shape, and topology) can improve structural consistency, yet most are task-specific and lack a unified geometric foundation that generalizes across organs and modalities. We are motivated by the observation that several medical segmentation targets can be approximated as globally near-convex shapes. A convex region is one in which any two interior points can be connected by a line segment entirely contained within the region. In practice, medical targets may exhibit small local concavities or boundary irregularities; we refer to such globally convex-like shapes as near-convex. Motivated by this, we derive Hadwiger Shape Priors from Hadwiger's theorem as an interpretable global regularizer using three 2D measures: area A, perimeter P, and Euler characteristic chi, enabling transfer across organs and modalities. However, because medical datasets are shape-heterogeneous, enforcing near-convex priors uniformly can over-regularize non-convex anatomy with significant concavities, washing out concavities and fine details and degrading segmentation accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose Conflict-Aware Objective Balancing (CAOB), which integrates shape priors with segmentation in a gradient-aware manner. For each prior, CAOB removes only the gradient component that conflicts with segmentation while preserving the remaining aligned component, and adaptively regulates objective influences to prevent prior dominance. This enables stable use of shape priors on shape-heterogeneous data without erasing genuine concavities or fine structural details. We call this plug-and-play framework HadBalance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Hadwiger定理的形状先验（Hadwiger Shape Priors）及其与分割任务自适应平衡的新框架HadBalance，实现了对多器官、多模态生物医学图像的更精确分割。
AI.motivation: 目前生物医学图像分割在结构一致性上表现有限，传统几何先验方法多为任务特定，缺乏统一且可泛化的几何理论支撑。医学图像中的目标常近似全局凸状（near-convex），但现有先验易导致非凸结构被过度规则化，损失细节与真实结构。
AI.method: 基于Hadwiger定理设计可解释的全局几何规则化先验（通过面积、周长、欧拉示性数三种度量），作为正则项泛化到不同器官和模态。提出Conflict-Aware Objective Balancing（CAOB），自适应调节形状先验在分割任务中梯度贡献，仅移除与分割目标矛盾的梯度分量，同时防止先验主导，保持对结构异质的适应。
AI.result: 使用HadBalance框架能在保持分割准确率的同时，有效保留真实解剖结构中的凹陷和细微边界细节，优于传统全局形状先验的过度规则化问题。
AI.conclusion: HadBalance作为插件式框架，将基于Hadwiger定理的全局形状先验与分割任务自适应融合，提升多器官、多模态医学图像分割的结构一致性与细节保留能力，对形状异质数据具有良好泛化性。

title: Mind the Gap: Diagnosing Constraint Discovery Failures in Text-in-Image Editing
summary: A key challenge in multimodal reasoning is determining which visual dependencies become relevant under a specific task, rather than merely recognizing visible content. We study this through edit-induced constraint discovery in text-in-image editing, a controlled diagnostic setting where a local text change can activate secondary consistency constraints: given a valid editing instruction and an image, can a model identify the secondary regions that must also change? Across 461 diagnostic cases, four MLLMs, and 19 constraint subtypes, models recover only 46% case-level macro recall under unguided prompting versus 94% when constraints are explicitly provided, suggesting that a substantial portion of the failure arises when models must decide which unstated dependencies to surface. Oracle-field decomposition shows that case-specific causal explanations are the most effective partial guidance (0.782 recall), above region names (0.610) or type labels (0.646), suggesting that edit-specific causal cues account for much of the oracle gain. A downstream experiment further shows that higher self-discovery recall does not necessarily improve task performance: unverified self-discovery introduces false positives that offset recall gains, motivating precision-aware constraint elicitation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在文本图像编辑任务中，多模态大模型（MLLMs）识别文本变动所涉及的视觉连带约束的能力发现普遍不足。通过精确的约束提示模型性能显著提升，但模型自主发现能力有限且引入噪声。
AI.motivation: 多模态推理中，仅识别可见内容难以满足特定任务需求，关键在于确定何时/哪些视觉依赖和一致性约束变得相关。作者聚焦于文本图像编辑时由文本变化引发的连锁图像变化，旨在揭示MLLMs在发现这些隐含依赖上的短板。
AI.method: 选用文本图像编辑作为受控诊断场景，提出edit-induced constraint discovery设定，构建461个带有不同约束子类型的案例，测试四个主流MLLMs在未提示和显式提示下识别需要同步更改的区域的能力，并通过oracle分解探讨不同辅助方式的效果。
AI.result: 模型在无额外提示下，识别相关约束的召回率仅46%，显式提示时提升到94%。不同辅助信息中，关于案例的因果解释召回率效果最好。自发现能力高并不能保证最终任务表现，因为未精准核实的自发现会引入大量误报。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLMs在自主发现用于文本编辑下的图像一致性约束方面表现有限，需要设计能有效增进精度与回调权衡、更精准引导约束发现的机制。

title: A Text Recognition Dataset from Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts
summary: In this work, we target Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) in low-resource scenarios, which arise from underrepresented languages, rare scripts, and degraded visual conditions typical of historical documents. We introduce SCAM (Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts), a new line-level dataset built from digitized ancient manuscripts written in the extinct Sahidic Coptic dialect. The dataset reflects a realistic and challenging setting, as it combines heterogeneous acquisition conditions across libraries with typical manuscript degradations such as ink fading, bleed-through, and material deterioration. In addition to visual complexity, SCAM poses significant linguistic challenges due to the scarcity of resources for Sahidic Coptic, its uncommon alphabet, and dialect-specific diacritics. To support research in low-resource HTR, we benchmark several state-of-the-art approaches based on different paradigms, highlighting their limitations and strengths in this setting. Our results underline the gap between current HTR performance on well-resourced modern scripts and historically grounded, low-resource scenarios, thus providing a reference point for future developments.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦低资源场景下的手写文本识别（HTR），特别针对稀有语言和退化历史文档，提出了Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts（SCAM）数据集，并用其对多种先进HTR方法进行了基准测试，揭示了当前方法在此类现实复杂情境下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 许多历史手稿因语言资源稀缺、字母表独特及视觉退化等原因，现有HTR技术难以处理。这些低资源场景缺乏有效训练数据，阻碍了对珍贵历史文献的数字化识别和研究。本文通过建立SCAM数据集，旨在推动这些领域的识别与研究。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个涵盖不同采集条件及文档退化问题的Sahidic Coptic手稿数据集，评价了若干主流HTR框架（方法细节未特别说明），对比它们在此低资源、复杂脚本下的表现。
AI.result: 各先进HTR方法在SCAM数据集上性能均显著低于它们在现代常规脚本上的表现，即便方法各有优劣，但整体存在显著gap。数据集的复杂性和语种的特殊性突显当前技术的不足。
AI.conclusion: SCAM数据集为研究低资源手写文本识别提供了高价值的基准和参考，结果强调了当前方法与实际历史低资源场景存在显著差距，呼吁更多针对罕见语言、复杂条件的HTR方法研究。

title: Multi-Task Tennis Stroke Biomechanics Analysis Using MediaPipe Pose
summary: We built a multi-task pipeline for tennis stroke biomechanics from plain RGB video. On top of pose-based stroke recognition, it adds two new tasks, predicting shot direction and grading posture quality, plus a rule-based feedback layer that suggests coaching tips. Strokes are found automatically using a weighted joint velocity score, s(t) = 0.5 v_wrist + 0.3 m_elbow + 0.2 m_shoulder, removing the need for manual annotation. Pose comes from MediaPipe Pose Landmarker (33 landmarks, metric world coordinates), with each stroke turned into a 30-frame by 39-feature sequence for TennisTransformerGPU, a compact 564,103-parameter transformer (4 layers, 4 heads, d=128) with three parallel output heads. Trained on 1,281 labeled strokes from 7 pros and 1 amateur across 11 videos, it hits 83.7% stroke-type accuracy, 61.9% on direction, and 62.6% on posture under a random 80/20 split. The interesting test is cross-player: train on pros, evaluate on the amateur. Stroke type barely budges, 82.9%, a 0.8% drop. Direction prediction does not transfer; it just falls back to the majority class. An ablation shows why world coordinates matter so much here: switching to image-space landmarks tanks cross-player stroke-type accuracy from 83% to 47% and direction from 68% to 21%. Everything runs on Kaggle's free T4 GPU tier and is fully reproducible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于多任务的网球动作分析流水线，能从普通RGB视频中自动识别和评估网球动作，并提供教练反馈。
AI.motivation: 当前利用常规视频进行网球运动分析面临着需要手动标注、任务单一（如仅识别动作类型）、缺乏针对性反馈等问题。本文希望降低手工标注成本，拓展分析维度，并实现自动化个性反馈。
AI.method: 以MediaPipe Pose获得33个身体关键点三维信息，提出加权关节速度打分法自动划分击球动作片段。利用将每个动作片段转化为30帧×39特征的序列，输入轻量化Transformer模型（4层、4头、参数56万），进行动作类型、击球方向、动作质量评分三任务并行。此外有基于规则的反馈模块输出练习建议。
AI.result: 在1281个来自7名职业和1名业余球员的数据集上，动作识别准确率83.7%，方向61.9%，姿态评分62.6%；跨球员迁移（仅用职业训练，测试业余）时动作准确率仅下降0.8%，但方向预测能力大幅下降。消融实验表明若坐标用像素空间，跨域识别性能急剧下降。
AI.conclusion: 流水线可高效自动分析网球动作，在动作类型方面有较好泛化能力，世界坐标显著优于像素坐标。该方法可复现，适合搭建低成本、自动化教练工具。

title: Stringalign: Moving beyond summary statistics with a transparent Unicode-aware tool for evaluating automatic transcription models
summary: Comparing text strings is crucial when evaluating and understanding the performance of various text processing tasks such as document recognition and audio transcription. With an increasingly complex landscape of AI-based handwritten text recognition (HTR), optical character recognition (OCR) and automatic speech recognition (ASR) models, there is a need for tools that facilitate evaluation in a flexible and reproducible way. This paper presents Stringalign, a Python library designed to simplify the evaluation process for automatic transcription projects and facilitate transparent evaluation. Stringalign's tools to examine and visualise both the rate of errors and the types of errors a model makes, give insights into possible improvements and help inform model selection for a particular task. Widely used string comparison metrics, such as the character and word error rates (CER and WER), although useful, can be ambiguous due to varying definitions of what constitutes a character and a word. Stringalign addresses this challenge by ensuring all preprocessing (i.e. normalisation and tokenisation) is transparent and easily replicable, and by providing tools to move beyond summary statistics and analyse common model errors. Moreover, Stringalign adheres to FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, and Reusable) principles for research software while staying lightweight and easy to adapt into researchers existing workflows. In this paper, we discuss challenges with character and word level string comparisons and show through examples that where existing tools can yield opaque and sometimes confusing results, Stringalign provides an easy-to-use and unambiguous alternative.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Stringalign，这是一款Python库，旨在提升文本比对在文档识别、语音转写等任务中的评估透明度和可重复性，其解决了现有评价标准定义模糊和结果不透明的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前HTR、OCR和ASR模型复杂多样，且广泛使用的字符串比对指标如CER、WER因对字符和单词定义不同，导致评估结果常常难以透明和复现。因此，亟需一种工具，能以清晰、统一的方式分析和解释模型错误。
AI.method: 提出并实现了Stringalign库，支持灵活透明的字符串比对与可视化。该工具包括标准化、分词等全流程可控的预处理，以及对常见误差类型的细致分析功能，不仅限于传统总结性统计。
AI.result: Stringalign不仅保证了评估流程透明、易复制，还具备便于集成入现有科研流程的轻量化特性。实验对比显示，Stringalign能够避免主流工具易产生的歧义与不透明现象，便于理解和解析模型不足。
AI.conclusion: Stringalign有效提升了自动转写等文本处理模型的评价透明度和可解释性，可为模型优化及选择提供清晰的依据，并符合FAIR研究软件原则。

title: The Third Challenge on Image Denoising at NTIRE 2026: Methods and Results
summary: This paper reports on the NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Image Denoising, specifically focusing on the high-noise regime ($σ= 50$). The competition investigates advanced neural architectures designed to restore high-fidelity details from images corrupted by additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN). Unlike constrained benchmarks, this track emphasizes peak quantitative performance, measured by Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), without limitations on parameter count or computational overhead. By synthesizing contributions from 20 finalist teams out of 116 registrants, this report benchmarks the latest technical innovations and provides a comprehensive snapshot of the current state-of-the-art in unconstrained image restoration.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了NTIRE 2026图像去噪挑战赛在高噪声环境（σ=50）下的成果，总结了20支决赛队伍的最新技术创新和当前无约束图像恢复领域的技术水平。
AI.motivation: 极高噪声下的图像去噪仍是计算机视觉中的重要难题，许多现有方法受到参数数量和计算开销的限制，该挑战赛旨在推动无约束条件下图像恢复性能的极限。
AI.method: 大赛收集和评测了来自116支队伍中的20支决赛队伍的神经网络架构，这些方法专注提升添加高斯白噪声图像的细节恢复能力，评判标准主要为峰值信噪比（PSNR），并不限制模型参数量或计算复杂度。
AI.result: 汇总了各决赛队伍的去噪方法，并以PSNR为指标进行了横向对比，展示了目前在无参数或算力约束下，图像恢复的顶尖水平和主要技术进展。
AI.conclusion: 本报告不仅对比和总结了多种创新去噪算法的表现，还为后续高噪声环境下的图像恢复研究和技术发展提供了权威参考。

title: Trusting Right Predictions for Wrong Reasons: A LIME Based Analysis of Deep Learning Interpretability in Lung Cancer Diagnosis
summary: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related mortality, with approximately 2.5 million new cases and 1.8 million deaths annually, making reliable diagnosis a clinical priority. Although deep learning models have achieved strong performance in lung cancer classification, evaluation has largely focused on predictive accuracy, leaving their decision-making processes insufficiently examined. This study compares three architecturally distinct models: a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), a pretrained ResNet50, and a Vision Transformer (ViT), trained on the IQ-OTH/NCCD lung cancer CT dataset. Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) were applied to investigate model reasoning. In addition to standard performance metrics, a dual-correlation framework was introduced to measure both prediction agreement and explanation agreement across model pairs. All three models achieved strong classification performance, with ResNet50 attaining 98.61% accuracy, CNN 97.91%, and ViT 93.75%, while all achieved ROC-AUC scores of 0.99. Prediction correlations exceeded 0.99 across all model pairs, indicating highly consistent outputs. However, LIME explanation correlations remained below 0.26, revealing substantial differences in the image regions used to reach those predictions. Analysis of misclassified samples further identified a consistent spatial pattern: incorrect predictions were associated with attention outside the lung parenchyma, whereas correct predictions focused primarily within lung regions. These findings demonstrate that prediction agreement is a poor proxy for reasoning consistency, and that interpretability evaluation must be treated as an independent validation criterion alongside predictive performance in clinical AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种深度学习模型在肺癌CT影像分类中的表现，并用LIME方法分析其决策过程，发现模型预测结果虽高度一致，但解释结果分歧较大，提示仅凭预测一致性无法代表模型推理一致。
AI.motivation: 肺癌死亡率高，可靠诊断至关重要。虽然深度学习模型具有出色的分类能力，但其内部决策机制鲜有深入研究。因此，评估模型的解释性成为亟须探讨的问题，以保证AI系统在临床中的可信度和安全性。
AI.method: 分别采用CNN、预训练ResNet50和ViT三种不同架构的深度学习模型，在IQ-OTH/NCCD肺癌CT数据集上进行训练。利用LIME对模型推理过程进行可解释性分析。同时提出“双相关”框架，度量模型间预测结果与解释结果的一致性，分析错判样本的空间注意模式。
AI.result: 三种模型均取得较高分类性能（ResNet50准确率98.61%，CNN 97.91%，ViT 93.75%；ROC-AUC均为0.99）。模型预测结果高度相关（相关性均大于0.99），但解释一致性较低（LIME相关性低于0.26）。错判样本多关注肺实质外区域，正确预测更聚焦于肺部。
AI.conclusion: 仅有预测结果一致无法代表模型推理过程一致，临床AI系统的可解释性评估应与性能评估同等重要。

title: PointDiffusion: Diffusion-Based Scene Completion in the Point Cloud Domain
summary: Reconstructing dense 3D scenes from sparse LiDAR point clouds is a fundamental challenge in autonomous driving, where latent diffusion models offer a promising solution. However, existing approaches rely on object-level autoencoders that collapse into unstable global representations at outdoor scale and suffer from ground truth data corrupted by odometry drift that systematically degrades supervision quality. Furthermore, multi-step diffusion inference incurs prohibitive latency for real-time deployment. We propose a novel multi-token Gaussian VAE with cross-attention pooling for stable scene-scale LiDAR compression, combined with an anchor-based ICP ground truth refinement pipeline that eliminates drift-induced noise from training supervision. Together, these components enable a scaffold-free single-step diffusion completion model that achieves an approximately 16x reduction in squared Chamfer distance on SemanticKITTI seq. 08 (0.396 m^2 to 0.024 m^2), surpasses LiDiff and ScoreLiDAR by 17-19% and 10-11%, respectively, and operates at 25-143x lower inference latency. Our results demonstrate that data quality dominates model design in this regime and that multi-token latent spaces provide a stable first stage for latent diffusion-based scene completion.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种用于稀疏LiDAR点云密集三维重建的新方法，大幅提升了精度并显著降低了推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶中，如何从稀疏的LiDAR点云高效重建密集3D场景是一大挑战。传统方法依赖对象级编码器，在大尺度场景下表现不稳定且训练数据容易受里程计漂移影响，导致监督质量下降。同时，多步扩散模型的高延迟限制了其实时应用。
AI.method: 本文提出多Token高斯VAE结合跨注意力池化，实现稳定的大场景LiDAR压缩。同时设计了基于锚点的ICP真值数据精炼流程，有效去除了因里程计漂移引入的噪声。最终整合为无脚手架的单步扩散补全模型。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI seq. 08上，平方Chamfer距离从0.396 m^2降至0.024 m^2，提升约16倍。模型表现优于LiDiff（17-19%）和ScoreLiDAR（10-11%），且推理延迟降低25-143倍。
AI.conclusion: 高质量数据对该任务效果至关重要，多Token潜空间能为基于潜扩散的场景补全提供稳定基础。所提方法在效率和精度上均优于现有主流技术。

title: Stepwise Token Selection for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: In multimodal large language models (MLLMs), inference cost is largely dominated by the visual token prefix rather than the language backbone, making token reduction a key factor for improving efficiency. Existing approaches typically assign independent importance scores to visual tokens and retain a fixed number of top-ranked tokens, implicitly assuming token independence and a uniform compression ratio across inputs. In this work, we reformulate visual token pruning as a sequential decision-making process. Specifically, we introduce a pointer-style selection mechanism that iteratively chooses informative tokens, conditioning each decision on previously selected ones, and dynamically determines when to stop via a learned termination action. This enables joint optimization of both the selected subset and its size. To enable end-to-end training under standard language modeling objectives, we design a differentiable relaxation based on a variance-preserving noise interpolation scheme, allowing gradients to propagate through the discrete selection process. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-v1.5-7B and Qwen2.5-VL-7B demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms fixed-ratio baselines across different compression levels. Under aggressive pruning that removes 88.9% of visual tokens, our method preserves 94.6% of the original accuracy while achieving a 1.88x speed-up in prefill latency.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视觉token剪枝方法，通过序列决策与pointer机制动态选择保留信息量大的token，并能自适应地决定剪枝数量，显著提升了多模态大模型的推理效率且几乎无损于准确率。
AI.motivation: 目前多模态大模型在推理时主要耗时于视觉token前缀处理，而非语言backbone，因此如何有效减少视觉token数量是提升速度的关键。现有方法假设token互相独立且压缩比例固定，限制了进一步的效率优化空间。
AI.method: 作者将视觉token剪枝建模为序列决策过程，采用pointer-style选择机制，基于已选token的上下文动态选取下一个token，并通过学习的终止操作决定何时停止选择。同时，设计了基于variance-preserving噪声插值的可微松弛方法，使离散选择过程可以端到端反向传播，从而优化token选择及数量。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-v1.5-7B、Qwen2.5-VL-7B等主流多模态模型上，作者方法能在大幅度剪枝（移除88.9%视觉token）下保持94.6%的原始准确率，同时推理预填阶段提速1.88倍，效果优于固定压缩率的对比方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统视觉token剪枝的独立性和固定比例假设，可以灵活自适应地压缩token数量，显著提升推理效率且准确率几乎未受损，有望广泛应用于高效多模态大模型推理。

title: Tool-IQA: Augmenting Image Quality Assessment with Simple Tools
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have been increasingly adopted for Image Quality Assessment (IQA). However, current methods typically employ a static one-shot scoring paradigm, despite the fact that humans assess image quality through dynamic visual inspection, e.g., selectively adjusting views to verify details and subtle artifacts. Specifically, relying solely on a single-pass observation introduces two primary limitations: first, perceiving the image only at a global scale restricts the assessment of finer local details; second, the original intensity distribution of the image may overwhelm the visibility, leading to insufficient inspection of image quality. To address these issues, we propose Tool-IQA, shifting the assessment mechanism from passive scoring to a tool-augmented workflow. In particular, we equip VLMs with simple yet effective view tools: a Magnifier to inspect local details, and a Gamma Corrector to uncover visibility and hidden artifacts. The assessment follows a structured pipeline that consists of an initial observation with rubric notes, a tool-augmented in-depth inspection, and a final quantification for calibrated quality score. Furthermore, to ensure efficient and purposeful tool callings, we introduce a batch-aware training strategy to reward tool interactions that can yield positive contributions rather than simply encouraging usage. Experiments on a variety of IQA benchmarks demonstrate that, with effective tool calling and calibrated assessment, our proposed Tool-IQA significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models, e.g., it achieves a PLCC of 0.854 on the challenging CLIVE dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的人机协同图像质量评估方法Tool-IQA，通过为视觉-语言模型添加放大镜和伽马校正工具，实现更精细和全面的图像质量分析，性能优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 以往的图像质量评估模型多采用一次性全局打分，但这与人类动态、细致的多步审查过程不符，导致不能很好地捕捉局部细节和图像中隐藏的伪影。
AI.method: 作者提出了Tool-IQA方法，引入“工具增强”的工作流，主要包括放大镜工具（用于检查局部细节）和伽马校正工具（用于揭示隐藏伪影）。评估流程分为初步观察、工具辅助细查、最终评分三步，并设计了批量感知的训练策略，奖励有效、有意义的工具调用行为。
AI.result: 在多个主流的图像质量评测基准上，Tool-IQA均取得了显著性能提升，比如在CLIVE数据集上获得了0.854的PLCC，大幅超越现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 工具增强的动态评估工作流，能更贴近人类的图像质量审查方式，显著提升视觉-语言模型在图像质量评估任务上的准确性和可靠性。

title: VinQA: Visual Elements Interleaved Long-form Answer Generation for Real-World Multimodal Document QA
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Main paper: 5 figures, 4 tables; includes supplementary material
summary: Real-world documents combine text with tables, charts, photographs, and diagrams arranged in diverse layouts, yet existing research on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for document QA predominantly produces text-only responses, underutilizing these visual elements. We introduce VinQA, a dataset for long-form answer generation where cited visual elements are explicitly interleaved with their supporting text and grounded in relevant document pages. To support this task, we study two encoding methods for feeding raw document page images into an MLLM, along with their visual-element citation mechanisms: (1) Page Encoding, which directly encodes full-page images with bounding boxes of visual elements and treats these boxed regions as citable units; and (2) Modality Encoding, which parses each page to extract text and crop visual elements, encodes them separately, and uses these cropped elements as citable units. In our experiments, we propose M-GroSE, a multimodal evaluation framework extending GroUSE to assess answers along four dimensions: completeness, answer relevancy, faithfulness, and unanswerability. We additionally report Visual Source F1 to directly measure visual citation accuracy. Although proprietary frontier models still achieve the best overall scores on the VinQA test split, fine-tuning open Qwen2.5-VL models on the training split substantially improves their performance and narrows this gap. Modality Encoding is initially more robust for complex documents with long text, many visual elements, and diverse citation requirements. After training on VinQA, however, Page Encoding reaches a comparable level, competing effectively even without the explicit parsing used in Modality Encoding. Finally, Visual G-Eval, an MLLM-based judge, confirms that fine-tuned models insert visual elements at semantically appropriate positions with faithful supporting text.

AI.tldr: 提出了VinQA数据集和两种视觉元素编码方法，推动多模态大模型在文档问答场景中生成长文本且能正确引用视觉元素的答案。
AI.motivation: 现实文档包含丰富视觉元素（表格、图像等）且布局多样，但现有多模态大模型主要输出文本，未充分利用这些信息。本研究旨在提升模型对视觉元素的引用与理解能力，实现真实且高质量的文档问答。
AI.method: 1）构建VinQA数据集，支持长文本回答且需准确插入并引用视觉元素。2）比较两种视觉元素编码方法：Page Encoding（整体页面编码并用视觉元素的包围框作为引用单位）及Modality Encoding（文本与视觉元素分开提取和编码，视觉元素裁剪后单独作为引用单位）。3）提出M-GroSE多维度评测框架，并引入Visual Source F1评估视觉引用准确率。4）在VinQA上对开源Qwen2.5-VL模型进行微调，与业界领先模型进行对比。
AI.result: 1）业界前沿模型在VinQA测试集表现最佳，但通过在训练集微调，开源模型性能大幅提升，明显缩小差距。2）Modality Encoding对复杂文档（长文本/多视觉元素）鲁棒性更强，但经过VinQA微调后，Page Encoding效果追平，无需复杂显式解析。3）基于MLLM的Visual G-Eval证明微调后模型能将视觉元素插入语义合适位置并配合相关文本。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集和编码方法显著提升多模态大模型对复杂文档视觉元素的引用与解析能力，推动其在真实文档问答中的应用，提升答案的完整性、相关性和真实性。

title: SceneCraft: Interactive System for Image Editing via Scene Graph
summary: Recent advances in generative AI have enabled natural language-driven image editing, yet existing systems often fail in complex scenes with multiple interacting objects because they rely heavily on users crafting precise text prompts. To address the absence of structured control, we propose SceneCraft, a novel interactive framework that bridges user intent and model execution by representing images as editable scene graphs. Instead of guessing text prompts through trial and error, users interact directly with a visual graph to perform complex spatial and relational operations. These graph modifications are automatically translated into precise, context-aware editing prompts, effectively eliminating linguistic ambiguity. To ensure robust and diverse results, structured prompts are dispatched to multiple state-of-the-art generative models. Evaluations across diverse editing scenarios show that SceneCraft provides a more intuitive control mechanism, significantly reducing the cognitive burden of manual prompt engineering while generating outputs that users consistently rate as higher in quality and fidelity.

AI.tldr: SceneCraft通过引入可编辑的场景图，实现更直观且高质量的自然语言图像编辑，克服传统文本驱动方法在复杂场景下的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本的AI图像编辑系统对复杂多目标场景表现较差，主要因依赖精确的用户描述文本，操作难度大、控制力差。
AI.method: 提出SceneCraft系统，将待编辑图像表示为用户可交互的‘场景图’，支持可视化编辑空间与关系，通过自动生成结构化、上下文感知的编辑提示词，将用户意图精准转化为AI操作，避免了纯文本描述的模糊性，并联合多个主流生成式模型提升稳健性和多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明，在多种编辑场景下，SceneCraft为用户提供了更直观的交互体验，降低了手工设计提示词的认知负担，且生成结果在质量与真实感上明显优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: SceneCraft创新性地将场景结构与生成式AI结合，实现了复杂图像高质量、低门槛的语义控制编辑，为未来交互式视觉内容生成开辟了新途径。

title: EdgeZSAD: Practical Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection on Edge Devices
summary: Industrial inspection needs zero-shot anomaly detection (ZSAD) that remains useful under edge deployment constraints. Recent methods often rely on ViT-L foundation backbones (~300M parameters), which exceed the memory and operator budget of typical embedded hardware. We study this regime through EdgeZSAD, a compact reference system built around a TinyViT-21M-512 backbone, an asymmetric global-local readout (EdgeGLR), and a reproducible source-side training recipe (Real-IAD-DR). We train a single checkpoint in a source-trained, target-unseen protocol and evaluate it across six industrial benchmarks. Across three independent runs, the resulting model reaches an average image AUROC of 91.6 on MVTec-AD and 88.2 on VisA, while remaining directly deployable on Jetson Orin Nano Super (TensorRT FP16) and RB5 Gen2 (QNN GPU FP16). Across the six device-rescored benchmarks, image-AUROC drift stays below 0.2 points, indicating that the exported graph preserves host-side ranking behavior in the evaluated deployment setting.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了EdgeZSAD，一个面向嵌入式设备高效的零样本异常检测系统，并实现了在工业视觉基准上的高性能及跨平台部署能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本异常检测方法多采用超大规模的ViT-L主干，参数量高达3亿，远超嵌入式硬件资源限制。行业应用迫切需要既高效又可落地的ZSAD解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了EdgeZSAD系统，核心包含小型的TinyViT-21M-512主干，非对称的全局-局部读出结构（EdgeGLR），以及可重现的数据端训练方案（Real-IAD-DR）。采用源域训练、目标域未见方式，仅使用一个模型权重文件，对六个工业数据集进行评测。
AI.result: 模型在MVTec-AD数据集上平均AUROC为91.6，在VisA数据集上为88.2，且可直接部署到Jetson Orin Nano Super和RB5 Gen2等主流嵌入式设备。设备重评分数中的AUROC漂移小于0.2，表明部署后模型性能稳定。
AI.conclusion: EdgeZSAD兼顾了高性能与低资源消耗，实现了在主流嵌入式设备上的端到端部署，为工业领域的实际检测问题提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Visual Grounding for Remote Sensing Images and Videos
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to localize a referred target in a remote sensing image or video according to a natural language expression. Existing RSVG methods usually rely on task-specific manual annotations, which are costly to collect and inevitably limited in covering the diversity of real-world geospatial scenarios. As a result, they often struggle to generalize to open-vocabulary queries involving novel objects, fine-grained attributes, complex spatial relationships, and functional semantics. In this paper, we propose RSVG-ZeroOV, a training-free framework that leverages frozen generic foundation models for zero-shot open-vocabulary RSVG. RSVG-ZeroOV follows an Overview-Focus-Evolve paradigm, which exploits the distinct yet complementary attention patterns of vision-language models (VLMs) and diffusion models (DMs) to progressively generate precise grounding results. Specifically, (i) Overview utilizes a VLM to extract cross-attention maps that capture semantic correlations between the referring expression and visual regions; (ii) Focus leverages the fine-grained modeling priors of a DM to compensate for object structure and shape information often overlooked by VLM attention; and (iii) Evolve introduces a simple yet effective attention evolution module to suppress irrelevant activations, yielding purified object masks. To handle video inputs, we further present Video RSVG-ZeroOV, which extends image-level grounding to spatio-temporal grounding through a query-relevant key-frame selector and a temporal propagator, enabling efficient and temporally coherent video grounding without video annotations or fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on six image and video grounding benchmarks show that RSVG-ZeroOV consistently outperforms existing zero-shot baselines and achieves competitive or superior performance compared with weakly- and fully-supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、基于冻结通用基础模型的零样本远程感知视觉定位框架RSVG-ZeroOV，有效提升了自然语言描述下的目标定位能力，并显著超越同类零样本方法，甚至媲美弱监督和全监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有远程感知视觉定位方法高度依赖昂贵的人工标注，且难以适应开放词汇查询、复杂属性和关系，泛化能力不足。因此需要开发具备更强泛化和开放性的新方法。
AI.method: 提出RSVG-ZeroOV框架，充分利用冻结的视觉-语言模型（VLM）和扩散模型（DM）的互补注意模式，实现分步精细化定位（概览-聚焦-进化）。具体：1）用VLM获得语义相关区域的注意力图；2）用DM补充结构和形状信息；3）引入注意力进化模块，抑制无关激活，净化目标掩码。视频任务通过关键帧选择和时序传播机制，无需标注拓展到视频定位。
AI.result: 在六个图像及视频定位基准上广泛实验证明，RSVG-ZeroOV在零样本场景下持续超越现有方法，并在部分任务与弱监督和全监督方法持平甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: RSVG-ZeroOV方法显著提升了远程感知视觉定位在开放词汇和零样本条件下的能力，减少了对人工标注的依赖，并展示了优越的泛化性和应用潜力。

title: Shift-and-Sum Quantization for Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) enables efficient deployment of deep networks using a small set of data. Its application to visual autoregressive models (VAR), however, remains relatively unexplored. We identify two key challenges for applying PTQ to VAR: (i) large reconstruction errors in attention-value products, especially at coarse scales where high attention scores occur more frequently; and (ii) a discrepancy between the sampling frequencies of codebook entries and their predicted probabilities due to limited calibration data. To address these challenges, we propose a PTQ framework tailored for VAR. First, we introduce a shift-and-sum quantization method that reduces reconstruction errors by aggregating quantized results from symmetrically shifted duplicates of value tokens. Second, we present a resampling strategy for calibration data that aligns sampling frequencies of codebook entries with their predicted probabilities. Experiments on class-conditional image generation, inpainting, outpainting, and class-conditional editing show consistent improvements across VAR architectures, establishing a new state of the art in PTQ for VAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向视觉自回归模型（VAR）的后训练量化（PTQ）框架，通过两项创新方法显著提升了PTQ在VAR任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 目前后训练量化（PTQ）在视觉自回归模型（VAR）中的应用很少，主要因为存在两个挑战：一是attention-value乘积在量化后重构误差较大，尤其是在粗尺度高注意力分数情况；二是由于校准数据有限，码本符号的采样频率与预测概率存在差异。
AI.method: 针对上述挑战，作者提出了两个新方法：（1）移位求和量化方法，通过对value token的对称移位复制来汇总量化结果，以减少重构误差；（2）一种针对校准数据的重采样策略，使码本符号的采样频率与预测概率一致。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在类别条件图像生成、修补、拓展和类别条件编辑等多个VAR架构任务上均带来了持续提升，在PTQ for VAR领域达到了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了PTQ应用于VAR模型时的关键难题，并在多种生成视觉任务中实现了性能突破。

title: A Comprehensive Survey of Medical Image Segmentation: Challenges, Benchmarks, and Beyond
comment: 12 pages,3 figures,1 table. All related resources are available at https://github.com/andrew-pengyu/Awsome_MedSeg/tree/main
summary: Medical image segmentation plays a critical role in clinical diagnostics, treatment planning, disease monitoring, and neurological disorder identification. This article presents a comprehensive review of its systematic development, covering widely used public datasets, representative methods built on the U-Net, Transformer, and SAM architectures, and key evaluation metrics with their differences, followed by an analysis of major challenges from multiple perspectives. Unlike surveys that focus on a single model family or a specific clinical application, this review organizes U-Net-, Transformer-, and SAM-based methods within a unified analytical framework, with a particular focus on their effectiveness in improving segmentation accuracy and efficiency. This work aims to guide future research and support clinical translation of medical image segmentation, with all related resources publicly available in our GitHub repository: https://github.com/andrew-pengyu/Awsome_MedSeg/tree/main.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了医学图像分割的最新进展，系统梳理了主流公开数据集、基于U-Net、Transformer和SAM的代表性方法、评估指标及其区别，并从多角度分析了该领域面临的主要挑战。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割在临床诊断、治疗规划、疾病监测和神经疾病识别中至关重要。现有综述多集中于单一模型或特定应用，缺乏对不同主流方法的系统比较，因此有必要梳理、分析这些方法及其优劣，推动该领域发展并促进成果向临床转化。
AI.method: 作者系统性回顾了医学图像分割领域的主流研究，包括：1）公开数据集整理；2）U-Net、Transformer、SAM三大模型架构下的分割方法归纳和比较；3）核心评价指标及其异同比较；并对各方法提升分割精度与效率的效果进行了统一分析。
AI.result: 文章总结了目前主流的数据集和分割方法，明确了U-Net、Transformer和SAM在分割准确性及效率方面的表现差异，比较了不同评估指标，并归纳了当前亟需解决的主要挑战。所有整理资源对外公开。
AI.conclusion: 本综述为医学图像分割研究者及临床应用提供了系统性参考，指出了现有方法的不足及未来发展方向，有助于推动相关技术研究和临床应用落地。

title: Continuous Splatting meets Retinex: Continuous Gaussian Splatting and Implicit Reflectance Modeling for Low-Light Image Enhancement
summary: Low-light image enhancement aims to recover clear images from low-illumination observations and is crucial for high-level downstream vision tasks. However, existing methods frequently encounter color distortion and structural artifacts when balancing global smooth illumination adjustment and local high-frequency detail recovery. To address these issues, we propose CGS-Retinex as the first low-light image enhancement framework based on explicit-implicit joint modeling. Our framework deeply integrates continuous Gaussian splatting with Retinex theory. Specifically, we represent the image grid as a continuous parameter field and propose a continuous Gaussian renderer to estimate the spatially continuous global illumination distribution. This approach fundamentally eliminates grid artifacts caused by discrete Gaussian sampling. Furthermore, we introduce an implicit neural representation to model reflectance independently. We leverage shallow high-frequency features to guide the network in accurately reconstructing degraded texture details. Within the Retinex framework, we incorporate physics-inspired brightness consistency constraints and illumination smoothness regularization to enable explicit illumination and implicit reflectance to maintain proper exposure and achieve high-fidelity recovery of high-frequency structures and colors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CGS-Retinex significantly suppresses dark-region noise and overexposure while achieving exceptional high-frequency structural fidelity and color restoration by precisely decoupling illumination and texture. This work establishes a novel continuous physical representation paradigm for low-light image enhancement.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于显式-隐式联合建模的低光照图像增强方法CGS-Retinex，在减少颜色失真和结构伪影的同时，实现高保真的细节与色彩恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有低光照图像增强方法在平衡全局平滑光照调整和局部高频细节恢复时，容易出现颜色失真与结构伪影，亟需新方法提升增强质量。
AI.method: 将连续高斯溅射（continuous Gaussian splatting）与Retinex理论深度结合。核心方法包括：用连续参数场表示图像网格，采用连续高斯渲染器对全局光照进行平滑估计，并通过隐式神经网络表征反射率以恢复高频纹理细节。此外，引入基于物理的亮度一致性约束与光照平滑正则化，实现光照与反射率的有效解耦。
AI.result: 该方法在大量实验中显著抑制了暗区噪声与过曝现象，能够高保真地恢复图像的结构和色彩细节，超过了以往方法的表现。
AI.conclusion: CGS-Retinex为低光照图像增强建立了全新的连续物理表示范式，有效解决了以往方法中光照与细节恢复难以兼顾的问题。

title: Multimodal LLM-Empowered Re-Ranking for Generalizable Person Re-Identification
summary: Domain Generalizable (DG) person re-identification (Re-ID) has attracted growing research interest due to its potential for deployment in unseen real-world scenarios. Most existing approaches address DG Re-ID by focusing on training domain-generalizable encoders but ignore the possible refinements in inference stage. In contrast, this work explores an alternative direction which improves inference re-ranking to enhance DG Re-ID. Conventional re-ranking methods typically rely on neighborhood-based distances to refine the initial ranking list, inherently depending on features produced by the Re-ID encoder. However, they deteriorate on target domains since the encoder lacks sufficient generalizability to produce reliable feature distances on unseen scenarios. Inspired by the remarkable generalization capabilities of recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), we propose an MLLM-empowered distance metric to improve re-ranking in DG Re-ID. Specifically, we first adapt an MLLM to Re-ID data through supervised fine-tuning, which incorporates a domain-agnostic prompt and a query-candidate hard mining scheme. Then, the adapted MLLM is employed to compute a $μ$-distance during inference, which is robust to domain gap and significantly enhances subsequent re-ranking performance. Our approach is model-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into previous re-ranking frameworks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently yields substantial performance improvements across multiple DG Re-ID benchmarks. The code of this work will be released at https://github.com/RikoLi/MUSE soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用多模态大模型（MLLM）提升推理阶段重排序性能的新方法，有效增强了模型在领域泛化行人重识别（DG Re-ID）中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有DG Re-ID方法主要关注训练阶段的领域泛化编码器，对于在推理阶段可能的重排序改进关注较少，且传统重排序方法在未见领域表现较差。受MLLM强泛化能力启发，作者尝试在推理环节引入更鲁棒的距离度量提升DG Re-ID性能。
AI.method: 方法首先通过有监督微调，使MLLM适应Re-ID数据（包括域无关提示和难例挖掘），再在推理阶段用适配后的MLLM计算新的μ距离进行重排序。该方法可以无缝集成至现有重排序框架中。
AI.result: 在多个DG Re-ID基准数据集上进行大量实验，结果显示该方法在各项指标上均有显著提升，优于传统重排序方案。
AI.conclusion: MLLM结合创新重排序度量的新方法在未知场景下有更强泛化能力，可应用于现有DG Re-ID系统，未来能够为实际部署提供更高可靠性和适应性。

title: Dehaze-GaussianImage: Zero-Shot Dehazing via Efficient 2D Gaussian Splatting Representation
summary: Existing single image dehazing methods are often constrained by computational redundancy in pixel-level optimization and the lack of physical interpretability in implicit neural networks. These limitations hinder the balance between representation efficiency and reconstruction fidelity. To address these issues, we propose Dehaze-GaussianImage, the first zero-shot framework that introduces 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) into the image dehazing domain to break the traditional pixel-grid processing paradigm. Distinct from static convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or Transformers, our approach models hazy images as continuous and dynamically evolvable anisotropic Gaussian fields. Specifically, we propose a novel reconstruction-decoupling zero-shot learning strategy that embeds the atmospheric scattering model into the Gaussian parameter space. This strategy drives Gaussian primitives to adaptively split, clone, and prune during optimization, achieving geometric-level decoupling of the transmission medium and clear textures. Furthermore, explicit structure-preserving constraints are introduced to suppress artifacts commonly caused by traditional physical priors. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in a fully unsupervised manner with minimal parameters, highlighting the potential of explicit Gaussian representation for low-level vision tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的去雾方法Dehaze-GaussianImage，将2D高斯Splatting（2DGS）首次引入单幅图像去雾领域，打破传统像素网格处理方式，实现参数少、无需监督的最新性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去雾技术存在像素级优化计算冗余和隐式网络物理可解释性差的问题，限制了表现效率与重建精度的平衡。
AI.method: 作者提出基于2D高斯场的新方法，通过零样本学习策略将大气散射模型嵌入高斯参数空间，优化过程中支持高斯原语自适应分裂、克隆和剪枝，实现对传输介质和清晰纹理的几何解耦，并增加显式结构保持约束抑制伪影。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在完全无监督、极少参数条件下取得了当前最新的去雾性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式高斯表示在低级视觉任务中的高效性和可解释性得以验证，Dehaze-GaussianImage为后续相关研究提供了新的思路。

title: Fi-Gaussian: Frequency-Aware Implicit Gaussian Splatting for Single Image Dehazing
summary: Single image dehazing continues to be hindered by the loss of high-frequency details and the difficulty of accurate physical scattering modeling. To address these issues, we propose Fi-Gaussian, a frequency-aware implicit Gaussian splatting network for single image dehazing. Unlike explicit rendering methods that rely on 3D point clouds, our method employs implicit Gaussian splatting to adaptively model the underlying distribution of clear images as a continuous representation in 2D feature space. The core of the network is a frequency-aware implicit Gaussian splatting module, which decouples low-frequency structural information and high-frequency texture information in the frequency domain and then performs adaptive Gaussian aggregation with complex-valued weights to recover fine details. In addition, a physics-driven scattering renormalization mechanism is introduced to estimate the transmission map and atmospheric light under the guidance of implicit Gaussian priors. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that Fi-Gaussian achieves state-of-the-art quantitative performance and produces visually superior dehazed results, validating the effectiveness of implicit Gaussian splatting for low-level vision tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率感知的隐式高斯溅射网络（Fi-Gaussian），用于单幅图像去雾，能有效恢复高频细节并克服物理散射建模难题。
AI.motivation: 现有的单幅图像去雾方法难以兼顾高频细节恢复和准确的物理散射建模，导致重建结果在清晰度和真实性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 作者提出了Fi-Gaussian网络，利用隐式高斯溅射在2D特征空间内对清晰图像分布进行连续建模。核心模块在频域中解耦低频结构与高频纹理信息，并通过复权自适应高斯聚合恢复细节。同时，引入基于物理约束的散射重归一化机制，在隐式高斯先验引导下估算透射图与大气光。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上进行的大量实验证明，Fi-Gaussian取得了领先的量化指标和更优的视觉去雾效果。
AI.conclusion: 隐式高斯溅射方法在低层视觉任务（如去雾）中表现优异，可显著提升图像细节恢复和真实性。

title: To forget is to preserve: Machine Unlearning for 3D medical image segmentation
summary: With new data privacy laws such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) [1] that allow individuals to ask that any of their personal information be erased from trained machine learning models, there has been a push to investigate the unlearning of data from models as a way to comply with these laws. In this regard, based on four mechanics, we consider several approximate unlearning strategies applied to the MRBrainS18 dataset [2]. We use a 3D ResNet-50 [3] as a backbone architecture for segmentation that has been pre-trained with the Med3D framework [4]. Considering the pre-trained model as a baseline, we evaluate respective retention accuracy on 2 types of subjects, i.e., retain and forget. We assess these approaches through their Dice similarity coefficient and mean absolute error (MAE) values using two separate training horizons 20 and 50 epochs. The results show that the Noisy Label strategy had the best overall trade-off with a decrease of 93% in the forget set while maintaining 84% accuracy for the retained set after 50 epochs. All other strategies showed extreme levels of forgetting at higher epoch numbers while also demonstrating catastrophic degradation of their retain set performance. The results of this study provide a strict baseline of performance metrics for unlearning on a subject-specific level and provide practitioners with clear criteria for selecting the proper strategies.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文探索了在现有法律（如GDPR）要求下，如何从机器学习模型中移除用户数据（即“数据遗忘”），并比较了多种近似遗忘策略在医学影像分割任务上的表现，以构建严格的基线与选择标准。
AI.motivation: 数据隐私法规如GDPR日益重视用户数据可控性，其中之一是用户有权要求模型遗忘其数据。现有模型通常缺乏方便的数据移除机制，需要研发高效且有效的数据遗忘方法，以符合法规要求。
AI.method: 作者基于四种机理，设计并实现了多种近似遗忘策略，并在MRBrainS18医学影像分割数据集上测试。采用预训练的3D ResNet-50（用Med3D框架）为主干模型，将训练集划分为需保留和需遗忘两类，利用Dice系数和MAE在不同训练周期（20/50轮）下度量策略遗忘和保留的效果。
AI.result: Noisy Label策略在50轮后表现最佳，可使遗忘集准确率降至原始的7%（减少93%），而保留集仍保持84%准确率。其他策略在高轮数下遗忘效果虽理想，但也导致保留集性能“灾难性”下降。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为具体对象级别的遗忘方法性能建立了严谨的评价基线，并为实际技术选择提供了清晰标准，尤其推荐Noisy Label作为性能最佳方案。

title: Closed-Loop Triplet Synergistic Generation for Long-Form Video
summary: Multi-shot long-form video generation remains challenging due to identity drift and compounding inconsistencies across shots. While storyboard-driven pipelines improve controllability, they are often executed in a feed-forward manner, with limited mechanisms to incorporate generated visual evidence back into subsequent conditioning. We propose CoTriSyGen, an agentic framework that formulates multi-shot long video generation as a closed-loop visual-text-memory synergy process, where planned intent, persistent memory, and generated visuals are jointly leveraged for iterative correction and long-range coherence. A vision-language-model-based analyzer reasons over this triplet and produces updates to both prompts and memory along two pathways: (i) intra-shot refinement, which triggers targeted regeneration when semantic or compositional violations are detected and refines image-to-video prompt for coherent motions; and (ii) inter-shot refinement, which rewrites subsequent-shot prompts to propagate newly manifested entities or attributes and improve prompt quality (e.g., compositional grounding and cinematic fluency) based on generated evidence. The loop is grounded in an entity-centric memory modeled as a mutable visual state that evolves as the story progresses, which is continuously updated by both the generator and the analyzer by adding new and evolved entities to reflect appearance changes, accumulated multi-view evidence, and multi-entity compositions. Experiments on our curated StoryBench benchmark demonstrate substantial improvements in cross-shot consistency, prompt adherence, and cinematic continuity over representative methods.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了CoTriSyGen框架，利用视觉-文本-记忆协同机制提升多镜头长视频生成的一致性和连贯性，有效解决了身份漂移和连锁不一致等问题，在StoryBench数据集上取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 当前多镜头长视频生成面临身份漂移、镜头间连贯性差等挑战。现有故事板驱动方法虽然提高了控制性，但缺乏反馈机制，难以让生成过程中的上下文信息反哺后续生成，导致一致性不足。
AI.method: 提出CoTriSyGen，这是一个以Agent为核心的闭环生成框架，将多镜头长视频生成转化为视觉、文本与记忆三者协同迭代的过程。基于视觉-语言模型的分析器对当前画面、文本意图和动态记忆三元组推理，并双路径实时修正：(1) 镜头内细化，发现语义或构图问题时触发局部重生成并优化图文提示以保证运动连贯；(2) 镜头间细化，根据新出现的实体或属性不断重写后续镜头提示以提升故事流畅度和构图扎实性。同时，提出了实体中心动态记忆，将多实体及其外观、构图等随剧情演化的信息持续存储和修正。
AI.result: 在自建的StoryBench基准数据集上，CoTriSyGen在跨镜头一致性、提示遵循度、电影感连贯性等多项核心指标上，相较代表性方法取得了大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: CoTriSyGen为多镜头长视频生成提供了闭环优化解决方案，通过视觉、文本与记忆协同，有效提升了长视频的整体一致性和连贯性，对复杂多镜头视频内容生成具有重要意义。

title: Learned JPEG Compression for DNN Vision
summary: JPEG, a lossy image compression technique designed for human viewers, has maintained its dominance for decades. However, in the era of artificial intelligence (AI), a substantial portion of image data, often compressed by JPEG, is and will continue to be consumed by deep neural networks (DNNs) instead of humans, thus creating a need to optimize JPEG for DNN inference performance. To this end, we propose learned JPEG compression for DNN vision (J4D), a novel training framework for determining JPEG encoding parameters to minimize compression rate while maximizing DNN inference performance. The major challenge of solving this optimization problem lies in representing the JPEG codec and compression rate in closed form. By incorporating a differentiable soft quantizer based on a probabilistic quantization scheme, we not only obtain a differentiable proxy for the JPEG codec, but are also able to compute the entropy of the coded source analytically, which is a close estimate of the actual compression rate. Equipped with both the differentiable JPEG codec and the information-theoretic rate estimator, we are then able to solve the aforementioned optimization problem with backpropagation. After training, the learned encoding parameters will be subsequently used in actual JPEG encoding based on probabilistic quantization. Extensive experimental results across multiple datasets and DNN architectures demonstrate that J4D consistently and significantly outperforms the default JPEG and other competitive JPEG codecs optimized for DNNs. Notably, compared to the default JPEG, J4D achieves an increase in accuracy by as much as 11.60% at the same rate, or a reduction of compression rate up to 80.05% at the same accuracy. Additionally, with the help of J4D, we show the potential to design universal JPEG encoding parameters for various DNN architectures for the first time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向深度神经网络（DNN）视觉推理的JPEG压缩优化框架（J4D），在保证DNN推理性能的同时最大限度减少压缩率。新方法显著优于默认JPEG及其他为DNN优化的JPEG变体。
AI.motivation: 传统JPEG压缩主要服务于人类视觉系统，忽略了越来越多被AI模型直接消费的图像数据需求，导致现有压缩方式可能不适合DNN推理。当前迫切需要针对DNN推理性能调整JPEG压缩参数。
AI.method: 引入可微分的概率量化器，实现JPEG编解码过程和压缩率的可微分建模，使压缩参数可通过反向传播联合优化以兼顾压缩率与DNN推理性能。训练后获得的参数可直接用于JPEG编码。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和神经网络架构上，J4D较默认JPEG在同等压缩率下准确率提高最高11.6%，在同等准确率下压缩率降低最高80.05%。J4D也具备为多种DNN架构通用设计JPEG参数的潜力。
AI.conclusion: J4D显著提升了面向DNN的图像压缩效果，同时展现了JPEG参数可跨模型通用的能力，为AI视觉任务中的压缩效率和推理效果带来双赢。

title: teasr: training-efficient any-step diffusion transformer for real-world image super-resolution
summary: Diffusion models excel in Real-World Image Super-Resolution (Real-ISR) due to their powerful generative priors but suffer from slow iterative sampling. Although existing one-step distillation methods accelerate inference, they typically require auxiliary teacher models that inflate training memory and restrict scalability to large-scale architectures. Furthermore, these fixed-step models lack the flexibility to trade off speed for quality. In this paper, we propose TEASR, a training-efficient any-step diffusion framework for Real-ISR that enables both one-step and multi-step restoration within a unified model. Our key idea is to perform self-adversarial distillation within a single diffusion model, eliminating the need for auxiliary teachers or discriminators. Specifically, we propose a timestep-aware rectification strategy that stabilizes one-step generation across noise levels. These two designs further enables the distillation of 20B-parameter diffusion models on a single GPU, significantly improving training efficiency. Moreover, we introduce a dual-branch diffusion transformer with decoupled timestep condition to separate the current noise state and the denoising target to enhance sampling quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TEASR supports seamless any-step sampling and consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TEASR，一种用于真实图像超分辨率的高效扩散模型，不依赖教师网络且支持单步与多步采样，能够大幅提升效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在真实图像超分辨率任务中表现突出，但采样速度慢且教师蒸馏方法显著增加内存消耗，限制了大规模应用，同时固定步数模型缺乏速度和质量的灵活权衡。
AI.method: TEASR通过单一模型实现自对抗蒸馏，取消了辅助教师网络和判别器。提出了步长感知校正策略，稳定各噪声水平的一步生成，并设计了双分支扩散Transformer，将当前噪声状态和去噪目标解耦以提升采样质量。
AI.result: TEASR能够在单张GPU上蒸馏20B参数的扩散模型，实现无缝的任意步采样。在多个数据集上实验结果显示，其性能优于当前主流方法。
AI.conclusion: TEASR兼顾高效性、灵活性和高性能，为扩散模型在真实超分任务中的大规模、高质量和灵活应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Cascaded Sparse Autoencoders Learn Multi-Level Visual Concepts in Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on vision-language tasks, yet their internal visual representations remain difficult to interpret. Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) provide a scalable way to decompose dense model activations into sparse, interpretable features. However, existing SAE architectures primarily recover flat feature dictionaries and are less suited for explicit multi-level concept organization. In this paper, we introduce cascaded sparse autoencoders (CSAEs) for learning hierarchical visual concepts in MLLMs. Rather than nesting or stacking SAE sparse activation codes, CSAEs train a second-level SAE directly on the decoder weights of the first-level SAE, treating learned low-level feature directions as inputs for higher-level abstraction. This design enables CSAEs to learn "concepts of concepts" while avoiding drawbacks from the shared-prefix coupling of nesting, Matryoshka-style hierarchies and the bottlenecks of naively stacked SAEs. Experiments across Qwen3-VL, Gemma-3, and LLaVA on multiple visual datasets show that CSAEs improve interpretability in terms of hierarchical concept coherence over state-of-the-art SAE baselines. Results on concept steering further demonstrate that the learned concept groups support effective group-level interventions in MLLM outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出级联稀疏自编码器（CSAE），为多模态大模型中的视觉表征构建层次化、可解释的概念结构，提升模型内部机制的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）虽能分解模型激活，但多为平面特征，难以体现多层次视觉概念组织，因此需要新的方法来增强多模态大模型的可解释性。
AI.method: 作者提出CSAE方法，通过在第一层SAE解码器权重上直接训练第二层SAE，实现特征由低层到高层的逐级抽象，避免了嵌套或堆叠SAE带来的不足。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL、Gemma-3、LLaVA等多模态模型和多个视觉数据集上，CSAE在概念结构层次一致性和可解释性上优于主流SAE基线；在概念引导实验上，CSAE支持更有效的组级干预。
AI.conclusion: CSAE能够学习多层次视觉概念，提高多模态大模型内部语义的有序与可解释性，为后续模型调优和应用提供了新手段。

title: GRACE: Boosting Video MLLMs with Grounded Action-Centric Evidence for Viewer Sentiment Prediction
summary: Viewer sentiment prediction in video advertisements aims to infer the latent affective response evoked in the audience. To bridge the gap between what is shown and what is felt, models must deduce hidden viewer emotions from explicit visual narratives, concrete character-object interactions, and visible textual cues. However, standard Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) typically rely on holistic frame representations, which leave these fine-grained, affect-relevant events implicit and complicate precise emotional reasoning. To address this, we propose a grounded action-centric evidence augmentation framework that enhances video MLLMs' clue extraction and comprehension by introducing explicit event structure and localized visual evidence. Our method extracts temporally ordered subject-verb-object (SVO) triplets and auxiliary visible textual cues from action-centric video descriptions, grounds subject and object entities as visual entity crops, and then enables the MLLM to perform clue-enhanced emotional reasoning based on these extracted structured clues. In this way, action triplets specify "what happens", while grounded visual entity crops anchor "who or what participates in each event" to concrete visual evidence. Experiments on the Pitts dataset show consistent improvements over Qwen2.5-VL and Qwen3-VL baselines. Ablation studies, cross-dataset evaluation on AdsQA, and transfer experiments on an emotion-focused TVQA subset further support the effectiveness and generalization of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以动作为核心、强化证据的多模态大模型框架，通过引入明确的事件结构和局部视觉证据，提升视频广告观众情感预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 标准的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）大多使用整体帧表示，这使与观众情感相关的细粒度事件成为隐性信息，从而影响情感推理的精确性。因此，亟需能显式提取影响观众情感的细致线索的新方法。
AI.method: 作者提出基于事件的动词三元组（主语-动词-宾语，SVO）与可见文本线索，从视频描述中提取，并将主宾体作为图片实体裁剪，加入模型输入中。这样模型能够明确“发生了什么”以及“谁/什么参与了事件”，通过丰富的结构化线索进行情感推理。
AI.result: 在Pitts数据集上的实验显示，该方法在Qwen2.5-VL和Qwen3-VL等强基线模型上均取得持续提升。消融实验、跨数据集（AdsQA）、情感聚焦TVQA子集的迁移实验也验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入基于动作的结构化证据，增强了多模态大模型对于视频广告中观众情感的精确推理能力，兼顾效果和泛化性。

title: DynFS-MoE: Dynamic Functional-Structural Mixture-of-Experts for Post-Traumatic Epilepsy Diagnosis
summary: Post-traumatic epilepsy (PTE) is a severe complication of traumatic brain injury (TBI), yet early identification remains challenging due to the complex structural and functional alterations it induces in the brain. To address this, we propose a dynamic multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that integrates functional and structural MRI through time-aware functional-structural encoding and class-conditioned expert routing. Within this framework, modality-specific and cross-modal experts learn complementary representations, while a Modality-Class MoE (MCoE) module dynamically dispatches expert weights according to each classification objective. Experimental results across three binary classification tasks demonstrate that the framework consistently outperforms static fusion baselines, and high-interpretability analyses further reveal meaningful region-of-interest (ROI) interactions. This dynamic multimodal expert framework effectively captures class-dependent brain interaction patterns and provides an interpretable approach for PTE diagnosis and risk stratification.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种动态多模态专家混合（MoE）框架，通过融合功能和结构MRI，有效提升创伤后癫痫（PTE）早期识别能力，并实现高可解释性。
AI.motivation: 创伤性脑损伤（TBI）后发生的癫痫（PTE）早期识别较难，主要因为脑部结构和功能变化复杂。亟需新的方法能有效挖掘多源脑影像特征，提升诊断准确性并实现可解释性。
AI.method: 提出了一种动态多模态专家混合（MoE）框架，结合时间感知的功能-结构编码及类别条件专家分派，利用功能/结构MRI。框架包括模态特定专家与跨模态专家，以及动态分配专家权重的MCoE模块，实现针对不同任务的最优表示提取。
AI.result: 在三个二分类任务中，所提框架在实验上始终优于静态融合基线。高可解释性分析揭示了有意义的脑区交互模式。
AI.conclusion: 该动态多模态专家框架能有效捕捉不同类别相关的脑部交互特征，为PTE的诊断和风险分层提供了可解释的方法学支持。

title: LUCID: Learned Undersampling-Adaptive Consistency-Guided Inference with Deterministic Flow Matching for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
summary: Sparse-view CT reduces radiation dose and scanning time by acquiring fewer projection views, but angular undersampling makes reconstruction severely ill-posed, causing streak artifacts, structural blurring, and loss of fine details. Existing supervised methods are often tied to specific sampling settings, whereas generative methods may introduce anatomically inconsistent hallucination-like structures under severe undersampling. We propose Lucid, a sparsity-adaptive, consistency-guided reconstruction framework based on a Flow Matching generative prior for sparse-view CT. Lucid is trained only on high-quality CT images to learn a continuous transport between a Gaussian distribution and the high-quality CT image distribution, independent of view sampling. During inference, the sampling sparsity level is explicitly incorporated to adapt the generative trajectory of a single pretrained model. Specifically, Lucid constructs a degradation-matched initial state by sparsity-weighted fusion of the sparse-view FBP image and Gaussian noise, performs sparsity-modulated Flow Matching updates, and applies projection-domain data-consistency correction after each prior update. Experiments under multiple sparse-view settings show that Lucid achieves stable reconstruction performance across different sampling densities, improves image quality and structural fidelity, and reduces the risk of hallucination-like structures in generative sparse-view CT reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Lucid的生成式重建框架，能够自适应处理不同采样稀疏度下的稀疏视角CT重建，提高图像质量和结构保真度，并减少假结构的风险。
AI.motivation: 稀疏视角CT在降低辐射剂量和扫描时间的同时，由于角度欠采样使重建问题严重欠定，导致重建图像存在条纹伪影、结构模糊与细节丢失。现有监督式方法局限于特定采样方案，现有生成式方法在强欠采样情况下易引入不合理结构。因此，需要一种通用且结构一致性更好的重建方法。
AI.method: Lucid方法以Flow Matching生成模型作为先验，仅使用高质量CT图像进行训练，学习高斯分布与高质量CT图像分布的连续映射。推理时引入采样稀疏度信息，通过稀疏度加权融合的初始状态和稀疏度调制的Flow Matching更新，并在每步更新后进行投影域数据一致性校正，从而实现单一模型自适应多稀疏度重建。
AI.result: 在多种稀疏视角设置下，Lucid均表现出稳定的重建性能，显著提升了图像质量和结构保真度，同时有效降低了生成式重建中容易出现的假结构风险。
AI.conclusion: Lucid框架能有效自适应不同稀疏采样设置，在保证重建质量的同时增强结构一致性，具有普适性和更高的医学应用价值。

title: Propagating Structural Guidance: Synthesizing Fluorescein Angiography from Fundus Images and Sparse OCT Scans
summary: Fundus fluorescein angiography (FFA) is critical for assessing retinal vascular abnormalities, but its acquisition is invasive and not always feasible. In contrast, color fundus photography (CFP) is non-invasive and widely accessible, which has motivated studies on CFP-to-FFA synthesis. However, prior works rely solely on CFP surface texture, fundamentally limiting the ability to reconstruct functional vascular information and subtle pathological changes. To address this, we propose a novel framework that synthesizes FFA from CFP with structural guidance provided by optical coherence tomography (OCT). We construct a multi-modal retinal imaging dataset with paired CFP, FFA, and OCT from 3,676 patient eyes--the first tri-modally aligned dataset in retinal imaging. To bridge the spatial gap between OCT and fundus modalities, we propose a Spatially Aligned Cross-Modal Fusion (SACMF) module that projects depth-resolved OCT features onto the fundus plane and injects them into the CFP encoder via adaptive layer normalization. Beyond feature fusion, we further introduce Token-wise Cross-Modality Alignment (TCMA), a token-level contrastive learning strategy that explicitly aligns CFP and FFA representations at corresponding spatial positions. Our method achieves superior synthesis performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, extensive experiments demonstrate that the FFA images synthesized by our approach bring greater improvements in downstream disease diagnosis performance than existing methods, highlighting the clinical potential of our approach as a non-invasive decision-support tool in routine workflows. The code is available at https://github.com/while-plus/OCT-guide-FFA-Syn.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用OCT结构信息引导的CFP到FFA图像合成方法，并构建了首个配对CFP、FFA与OCT的大规模三模态视网膜数据集。方法在合成精度及下游疾病诊断上优于现有方法，展示其作为无创临床工具的潜力。
AI.motivation: FFA虽对视网膜血管异常评估至关重要，但操作具有侵入性且难以普及；CFP则无创且易获取。已有CFP到FFA合成方法仅依赖表面纹理，难以重构真实血管功能信息。作者旨在利用OCT提供的结构性指导，突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含三模态（CFP、FFA、OCT）配对的3,676个病例数据集。提出空间对齐跨模态融合（SACMF）模块，将OCT深度特征投影到视网膜底片上，并通过自适应层归一化注入CFP编码器；同时，引入基于对比学习的Token级跨模态对齐（TCMA），显式对齐CFP与FFA在空间上的表示。
AI.result: 新方法在FFA合成质量和下游疾病诊断任务上均优于目前主流方法，证明OCT结构引导和跨模态对齐策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次实现基于结构引导的CFP到FFA三模态合成，为临床提供了一种无创、便捷的辅助工具，有望在常规诊疗中应用。

title: Structure-Semantic Co-optimized Latent Diffusion Model for Fast Visual Anagram Synthesis
summary: Visual anagram is an intriguing form of art creation wherein a single image presents different conceptual interpretations under transformations such as flipping or rotation. Recent work has achieved visual anagram synthesis by leveraging pretrained text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models, yet still suffers from several key limitations including computational inefficiency, suboptimal aesthetic quality, and weak semantic fidelity and expressiveness. This work focuses on generating visual anagrams with substantially improved visual quality at minimal computational cost, thereby advancing intelligent creation of illusionary digital art. To increase image resolution while reducing time overhead, we adapt the cutting-edge parallel denoising algorithm from pixel-based T2I model to the adversarially distilled latent-based one, and accordingly propose a structure-semantic co-optimization (S2CO) framework to counteract the consequent visual degradation. As the core of our approach, S2CO framework comprises three key innovations: (\romannumeral1) null-text structure alignment optimization; (\romannumeral2) semantic enhancement optimization; (\romannumeral3) attention-guided noise fusion. Building upon these components, our method dubbed \textbf{S2CO-Anagram} is able to generate higher-resolution anagram images with noticeably superior visual harmony and semantic faithfulness than related SOTA approaches, all while achieving substantially faster inference speed. Code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的结构-语义协同优化（S2CO）框架，用于高效高质量地生成视觉变形图（visual anagram），在图像分辨率、语义一致性和推理速度上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于T2I（文本到图像）扩散模型的视觉变形图生成方法存在计算效率低、美学质量差以及语义表达弱等问题。为提升智能数字幻像艺术在视觉质量和效率上的表现，亟需改进。
AI.method: 作者将最新的并行去噪算法从像素级T2I模型迁移到基于对抗蒸馏的潜空间模型，并为改善视觉降解问题提出了结构-语义协同优化（S2CO）框架，包括：1）空文本结构对齐优化；2）语义增强优化；3）注意力引导的噪声融合。
AI.result: 新方法S2CO-Anagram在生成更高分辨率视觉变形图像的同时，表现出显著更优的视觉和谐性与语义一致性，并且拥有远快于当前SOTA方法的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: S2CO-Anagram极大提升了视觉变形图生成的美学质量和效率，在智能数字幻像艺术领域推进了前沿技术。代码将公开。

title: Learned Image Compression for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly rely on high-frequency multi-camera observations, making visual communication a major bottleneck for real-time robotic control in bandwidth-constrained or distributed deployment settings. Existing image and video codecs, however, are designed to preserve generic visual fidelity rather than the control performance of downstream VLA policies. In this work, we introduce SPARC (SPatially Adaptive Rate Control), a learned image compression framework tailored for VLA-driven robots. Our key observation is that the importance of visual information varies substantially across both camera views and spatial regions within an image. Based on this observation, SPARC employs a lightweight temporal mask selector that adaptively allocates bitrate over latent representations according to task relevance while leveraging temporal context. We further introduce a tilted rate loss that stabilizes training by reducing the tendency of entropy-based objectives to over-suppress rare yet task-critical visual patterns. Experiments on diverse robotic benchmarks, including RoboCasa365, VLABench, and LIBERO, show that SPARC consistently achieves stronger control performance than conventional image/video codecs and recent learned compression methods under the same bitrate budget. We additionally demonstrate real-world deployment benefits in remote-control settings, where our method substantially improves the bitrate-success tradeoff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向机器人视觉-语言-动作系统（VLA）的自适应图像压缩方法SPARC，能在带宽受限环境下改善实时控制性能，优于现有通用图像/视频编解码器和新近学习型压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像/视频编解码器主要关注通用视觉保真度，而非下游机器人的控制性能。在多摄像头、带宽约束环境下，现有方案成为瓶颈。需要开发能感知任务需求、提升控制效果的专用视觉通信方法。
AI.method: 提出SPARC压缩框架，通过轻量级时序掩模选择器，根据不同相机视角和图像区域对任务的相关性自适应分配比特率；利用时序上下文参考；引入倾斜率损失函数，抑制熵目标对重要但少见视觉模式的过度压制，从而提升压缩中对关键信息的保留。
AI.result: 在RoboCasa365、VLABench、LIBERO等多个机器人控制基准上，SPARC在相同码率下能持续取得优于传统与新兴压缩方法的下游控制表现。实际远程控制部署实验也验证SPARC在比特率与任务成功率间取得更优权衡。
AI.conclusion: SPARC能够在不增加带宽的情况下，显著提升VLA机器人系统的感知-控制性能，适合于带宽受限或分布式部署场景，展现了广泛实际应用价值。

title: UniDDT: Unifying Multimodal Understanding and Generation with Decoupled Diffusion Transformer
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) have emerged as a critical direction for general-purpose multimodal intelligence, integrating understanding and generation into a single framework. However, existing UMMs face prominent challenges: (1) the inherent learning conflicts between visual understanding and generation tasks, leading to suboptimal modeling in both tasks; (2) different understanding and generation visual spaces impeding scalability; (3) over-reliance on task-specific data that neglects the duality of text-image understanding and generation. To address these challenges, we propose UniDDT, which leverages a Noisy ViT encoder along with an LLM to unify semantic encoding for visual generation and understanding tasks, while employing a separate diffusion decoder to decouple diffusion decoding from text decoding. With this Noisy ViT encoder, UniDDT is able to leverage the latent space as a unified visual representation, enabling seamless compatibility between understanding and generation tasks. Thus, the scalability within the generation tasks and the semantic expressiveness within understanding tasks can be balanced. Also, we construct dual data structures from the same image-text pairs, fostering interdependence between the generation and understanding data to exploit their inherent duality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniDDT achieves effective unification of multimodal understanding and generation with enhanced semantic consistency and scalability. For visual generation tasks, our UniDDT achieves 0.87 GenEval score and 86.9 DPG overall score. For multimodal understanding tasks, our UniDDT achieves 1699.5 score on MME benchmark and 76.5 overall score on SEEDbench.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了统一多模态模型UniDDT，通过创新性的Noisy ViT编码器和解耦扩散解码技术，实现了多模态理解与生成任务的高效统一，提升了语义一致性和任务可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有的统一多模态模型在视觉理解与生成任务之间存在学习冲突，不同任务的视觉空间难以兼容，且过度依赖任务特定数据，未能充分利用文本-图像理解与生成的双向性，导致建模和扩展性受限。
