AI.method: 作者提出UniDDT模型，利用Noisy ViT编码器和大语言模型（LLM）统一视觉生成与理解任务的语义编码。同时采用单独的扩散解码器，将扩散解码过程与文本解码过程解耦。模型还通过同一图文对构建双数据结构，使理解与生成任务数据交互，强化二者的内在联系。
AI.result: UniDDT在生成任务上取得0.87的GenEval分和86.9的DPG总分，在多模态理解任务上取得1699.5的MME基准分和76.5的SEEDbench总分，显示出优秀的统一能力和语义表达能力。
AI.conclusion: UniDDT有效统一了多模态理解与生成，提升了语义一致性和可扩展性，为实现通用型多模态智能系统提供了新思路。

title: KeepLoRA++: Continual Learning with Layer-Scaled Residual Gradient Adaptation
summary: Continual learning for pre-trained vision-language models requires balancing three competing objectives: retaining pre-trained knowledge, preserving knowledge from a sequence of learned tasks, and maintaining the plasticity to acquire new knowledge. This paper presents KeepLoRA++, balancing these objectives through a unified dual-dimensional knowledge retention mechanism. We analyze knowledge distribution of Transformer architecture from both inter-layer and intra-layer perspectives. The inter-layer perspective examines how retention is distributed across layers, while the intra-layer perspective focuses on the parameter space within each layer. Our analysis reveals a structural property: general transferable knowledge is mainly encoded in the shallow layers and the principal subspace of the parameters, while task-specific adaptations are localized in the deep layers and the residual subspace. Motivated by this insight, KeepLoRA++ introduces a layer-scaled residual gradient adaptation method. New tasks are learned by restricting LoRA parameter updates to the residual subspace, combined with a shallow-to-deep layer scaling, to prevent interference with previously acquired capabilities. Specifically, the gradient of a new task is projected onto a subspace orthogonal to both the principal subspace of the pre-trained model and the dominant directions of previous task features, while simultaneously assigning smaller update magnitudes to shallow layers and larger ones to deeper layers. Our theoretical analysis and empirical evaluations confirm that KeepLoRA++ successfully balances these three competing objectives, consistently outperforming representative baselines across image classification, visual question answering, and video understanding tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KeepLoRA++的方法，用于在大模型持续学习场景下同时兼顾保留预训练知识、历史任务能力和新任务学习能力。通过理论和实验验证方法优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 持续学习困境在于既不能遗忘原有知识，又要学会新任务，同时还需防止任务间干扰，特别是在视觉-语言大模型中。传统方法在平衡三者时效果有限，且缺少对Transformer知识分布细粒度结构的系统分析。
AI.method: 对Transformer知识分布进行层间（inter-layer）和层内（intra-layer）双重分析，发现通用知识集中在浅层和主子空间，任务特定知识集中在深层和残差子空间。由此设计了层级缩放的残差梯度自适应机制：用LoRA仅在残差空间内更新参数、并采用梯度分层尺度（浅层更新幅度小，深层大），梯度同时正交于预训练主空间及旧任务主方向。
AI.result: 理论分析及实验（图像分类、视觉问答、视频理解等任务）均证明KeepLoRA++能够兼顾和优化三重目标，在主流基线方法上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: KeepLoRA++通过结构性分析和创新的梯度更新策略，实现了对大模型持续学习“三难”问题的有效平衡，推动了视觉-语言模型终身学习能力进步。

title: Contrastive Learning for Seismic Horizon Tracking with Domain-Specific Priors
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to the IEEE GRSL for possible publication
summary: Unsupervised 3D seismic horizon tracking faces a key limitation: signal-based propagators provide accurate trace-level alignment but often fail near faults, whereas texture-driven deep models are more robust to discontinuities, typically at the cost of labeled data requirements and reduced trace-level precision. We propose a self-supervised fusion of both paradigms in which signal-derived local horizon correspondences act as domain-specific priors to train a texture-based deep learning model. Specifically, we estimate reliable trace-to-trace flows from reflector slopes and use them to form positive pairs in a contrastive objective, while restricting training to high-confidence neighborhoods, optionally augmented with a fault mask. The objective is not to infer ambiguous correspondences close to discontinuities, but to preserve horizon identity across them. As a result, the network learns voxel-wise embeddings that preserve local signal continuity while enabling horizon propagation beyond discontinuities through similarity search. Experiments on the public F3 dataset and a faulted synthetic dataset achieve lower mean absolute error (MAE) than unsupervised baselines and competitive performance against a semi-supervised method using a single labeled slice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督方法，将信号驱动和纹理驱动两类地震地层追踪模型结合，实现了高精度且对断层具有鲁棒性的3D地震地层追踪。
AI.motivation: 传统信号驱动方法在正常区域表现准确，但在断层等连续性差的区域经常失败。纹理驱动深度学习方法虽然对断层更鲁棒，但通常需要标注数据且精准度不高。因此需要一种既保留信号精度，又能跨越断层的无监督追踪方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了自监督的融合方法：从地震反射层斜率获取高置信度trace-to-trace的地层对应点，用于构造对比学习的正样本对，仅在高置信邻域（可结合断层掩模）内训练纹理深度模型，引导网络学习既具有信号连续性又能跨越断层的不变特征。
AI.result: 在公开F3数据集和合成断层数据集上，提出方法实现了比无监督基线更低的平均绝对误差（MAE），并且即使与半监督方法（只用一层有标注数据）相比，也具备竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需人工标签，通过自监督方式融合信号与纹理信息，有效提升了地层追踪在断层等复杂区域的精度和鲁棒性，对实际地震数据解释有重要意义。

title: GraphWorld: Long-Horizon Planning with World Models for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving has made significant progress by unifying perception, prediction, and planning within a single learning framework, achieving strong performance in short-horizon decision making. However, most existing E2E-AD methods remain confined to short-horizon planning and lack the ability to model long-term temporal dependencies, which severely limits their generalization and security in complex and highly interactive driving scenarios. In this work, we propose GraphWorld, an E2E-AD framework that explicitly enhances long-horizon planning through latent world modeling. We introduce an Ego-Centric Interaction Graph, which adaptively models critical neighboring agents based on spatial proximity, and propagates relational context to planning queries via cross-node cross-attention. We present a World-State-Conditioned Planning that learns ego-centric latent world representations by modeling interactions between an ego vehicle and surrounding agents. This latent world state captures key interaction dynamics and safety-relevant semantics, and serves as a conditioning signal to guide long-horizon, safety-aware trajectory planning. Extensive experiments on Bench2Drive, NAVSIMv1/2, and nuScenes demonstrate that GraphWorld significantly reduces collision rates and improves long-horizon planning performance, validating its effectiveness in complex driving environments.

AI.tldr: GraphWorld提出了一种结合图结构和潜在世界建模机制的端到端自动驾驶方法，显著提升了长时序规划和安全性能。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法主要专注于短时规划，难以建模长时段的时序依赖，导致在复杂、高交互场景下泛化与安全性不足。
AI.method: 作者提出了GraphWorld框架，利用自适应地构建以自车为中心的交互图，将关键邻居交通体通过空间关系纳入建模，并通过跨节点注意力机制传递关系信息至规划任务。框架还引入了条件世界状态规划，通过建模自车与周围交通体的互动获得语义丰富的潜在世界状态，引导长时、安全相关的轨迹规划。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive、NAVSIMv1/2和nuScenes等数据集上，GraphWorld显著降低了碰撞率，并提升了长时序规划能力。
AI.conclusion: GraphWorld有效提升了端到端自动驾驶在复杂环境下的安全性和长时序泛化能力，是实现更安全智能自动驾驶的重要方法。

title: RealityBridge: Bridging Editable 3D Gaussian Splatting Driving Simulations and Real-World Videos
summary: Long-tail hazardous scenarios are essential for safety-oriented autonomous driving, yet they are difficult to collect and reproduce at scale. Editable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) simulation offers a promising alternative by reconstructing real driving scenes and supporting controllable scene editing. However, edited 3DGS-rendered videos still suffer from a significant Sim-to-Real gap, including rendering artifacts, degraded foreground assets, inconsistent illumination, and temporal flickering. Existing restoration and video generation methods are insufficient for this task, as they often fail to jointly repair 3DGS-specific artifacts, improve visual realism, and ensure temporal consistency. To fill this gap, we propose RealityBridge, a structure-preserving and asset-aware Sim-to-Real framework for edited 3DGS driving videos. RealityBridge uses multimodal controls, including rendered videos, foreground masks, edge maps, and semantic masks, together with a lightweight GateNet for adaptive condition allocation across backbone layers. We further construct targeted training data and introduce autoregressive long-video training with reward-guided post-training to improve restoration quality, temporal stability, and hallucination suppression. Extensive experiments on internal and public driving datasets show that RealityBridge outperforms existing methods in artifact removal, illumination harmonization, and long-sequence temporal consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealityBridge框架，针对可编辑的3D Gaussian Splatting（3DGS）自动驾驶仿真视频，实现结构保持与资产感知的Sim-to-Real优化，大幅提升仿真场景的真实性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 长尾危险场景对于安全驱动至关重要，但难以大规模采集与重现。3DGS仿真虽可编辑重建真实道路场景，但存在渲染伪影、前景资产退化、光照不一致、时间闪烁等Sim-to-Real问题，亟需更有效的修复方法。
AI.method: 提出RealityBridge结构，包括多模态控件（渲染视频、前景掩码、边缘图、语义掩码）；采用轻量化GateNet实现自适应条件分配；设计针对性训练数据，并引入自回归长视频奖励引导式训练，提升恢复质量、时间稳定与虚假内容抑制能力。
AI.result: 在内部与公开驾驶数据集上，RealityBridge在伪影修复、光照协调和长序列时间一致性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RealityBridge显著提升了可编辑3DGS仿真视频在自动驾驶场景中的真实性和一致性，有助于长尾危险场景的仿真训练，为自动驾驶安全研究带来实际促进。

title: Sex-based Network-Specific Differences in Connectomes: A Krakencoder-Based Analysis
summary: This study examines how deficiencies in one brain connectome modality propagate to the other, using the Krakencoder as a simulation framework. Structural and functional connectomes from 702 healthy participants in the Human Connectome Project were analyzed, with the impact of each of the Yeo-7 functional networks assessed separately. Seven scenarios were considered, each involving the removal of a single network while the remaining networks were preserved. The resulting perturbations in cross-modal predictions were quantified using three complementary metrics: KL divergence on eigenvalue spectra, Frobenius norm, and Wasserstein distance. In addition, the persistence of sex-specific information within the predicted connectomes was evaluated. Across all metrics and both prediction directions, the Default Mode Network produced the largest perturbations, whereas the Somatomotor network yielded the smallest. Sex differences in network-level perturbation signatures were subtle, with the best result being an accuracy of 66.09% from connectomes predicted under network-removal conditions. In contrast, connectomes predicted from intact inputs achieved substantially higher sex classification accuracy, reaching up to 84.76%. These findings confirm that full predicted connectomes retain considerably more sex-discriminative information than perturbation-derived signatures alone.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了脑结构连接组与功能连接组间的相互影响，采用Krakencoder模拟框架，通过删除大脑特定功能网络分析其在跨模态预测中的影响及对性别区分能力的变化。
AI.motivation: 连接组成像整合结构和功能信息对于理解大脑疾病和个体差异至关重要，研究不同连接模态间的依赖性有助于揭示其互补性与重要网络。
AI.method: 分析了HCP中702名健康者的大脑结构与功能连接组。依次移除Yeo-7功能网络中的某一网络，通过Krakencoder跨模态预测，并用KL散度、Frobenius范数和Wasserstein距离量化预测结果的扰动，同时评估对性别信息的保留。
AI.result: 移除默认模式网络引起最大扰动，去除体感运动网络影响最小。预测的连接组对性别判别信息的保留效果远好于移除后的扰动特征（完整输入性别判别最高准确率84.76%，扰动情况下最高66.09%）。
AI.conclusion: 完整的预测连接组比基于网络扰动的特征更能保留性别区分信息，说明特定脑网络（如默认模式网络）对连组跨模态表达和个体特征的作用突出。

title: DDTNet: Degradation Disentanglement and Transfer Network for Test-Time All-in-One De-weathering Adaptation
summary: All-in-one adverse weather image restoration aims to remove multiple degradations, such as rain, haze, and snow, using a single unified model. Despite their broad applicability, existing methods typically compromise performance, delivering balanced but suboptimal results for individual degradation types. This issue becomes more pronounced when a domain gap exists between training and testing data. Motivated by the observation that modeling degradation patterns is more feasible than recovering clean content, we propose the Degradation Disentanglement and Transfer Network (DDTNet), which focuses specifically on degradation transfer. By disentangling degradation patterns from target-domain degraded images and transferring them to source domain clean images, DDTNet generates domain-adaptive paired training data. These pairs are then used to fine-tune restoration models, significantly enhancing their adaptability across diverse weather conditions and domains. The core of DDTNet is the Degradation Disentanglement Module (DDM), which comprises Degradation Coupled Attention (DCA) to capture both general and weather-specific features, thereby enabling effective disentanglement and transfer of degradation patterns. Experimental results demonstrate that DDTNet significantly and consistently improves existing all-in-one models across real-world deraining, desnowing, and dehazing datasets.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新方法DDTNet，解决多种恶劣天气图像复原任务，显著提升已存在融合模型的效果和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有一体化的恶劣天气图像复原方法通常在多种退化类型间平衡效果，但每种情况表现都不理想，尤其遇到训练与测试间的领域差异时，性能降幅大。作者观察到模拟退化比还原干净内容更容易，由此出发提出新思路。
AI.method: 提出Degradation Disentanglement and Transfer Network（DDTNet），通过从目标域退化图像中解耦退化模式，并迁移到源域清晰图像上，生成领域自适应的成对训练数据，进而对复原模型进行微调。核心组件为退化解耦模块（DDM）和退化耦合注意力（DCA），能够捕获通用及特定天气特征，实现有效的退化模式解耦与迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，DDTNet对现有一体化模型在真实世界去雨、去雪、去雾数据集上显著且一致地提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过退化模式解耦与迁移，DDTNet提高了恶劣天气图像复原模型的适应性和还原能力，验证了其跨多种天气和领域的有效性。

title: Explainable Flood Segmentation on Sentinel-1 SAR Imagery: A Comparative Study of CNN and Transformer Architectures
summary: Rapid and accurate flood prediction is essential for disaster response and mitigation planning. Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) sensors in satellites are well-suited for this purpose because they operate independently of weather and daylight conditions. Although SAR-based data enable all-weather flood monitoring, distinguishing flooded land from permanent water remains a significant challenge, particularly when flooding is defined strictly as inundated land. This study provides a comprehensive comparison of convolutional neural network (CNN) and vision transformer architectures for multi-class flood segmentation using Sentinel-1 SAR imagery, specifically trained to separate flooded land from permanent water bodies and land. Three state-of-the-art (SOTA)CNN-based models, U-Net, U-Net++, and DeepLabV3 with ResNet-34 backbone, and three SegFormer variants (b0,b1,b2) were evaluated in two benchmark datasets, the ETCI NASA dataset and SenFloods11, using scene-based data splits to ensure a realistic assessment of spatial generalization. The results demonstrate that SegFormer-b2 significantly outperforms the U-Net baseline on the ETCI dataset (higher flood IoU across all 7 test scenes in the Wilcoxon signed-rank test), while after fine-tuning on Sen1Floods11, the advantage narrows to within the range of scene variability and is concentrated in spatially fragmented flood events. The study includes both qualitative and quantitative explainability techniques to visually comprehend model decisions and systematically assess prediction reliability. Qualitative analysis reveals that SegFormer-b2 produces more spatially coherent Grad-CAM activations focused on flood-relevant features, while U-Net generates more informative uncertainty estimates along flood boundaries.

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了CNN与视觉Transformer架构在多类别洪水分割中的表现，发现SegFormer-b2在分割洪水与永久水体方面整体优于U-Net，对预测解释性也进行了分析。
AI.motivation: 洪水快速精准预测对于灾害响应和减灾至关重要，但使用SAR遥感影像区分洪水、永久水体和陆地存在挑战。作者希望通过探讨不同深度学习架构提升对洪水区域的分割能力。
AI.method: 作者基于Sentinel-1 SAR影像，比较了U-Net、U-Net++、DeepLabV3和三种SegFormer Transformer模型在两大数据集（ETCI NASA、SenFloods11）上的多类别（洪水、永久水体、陆地）分割能力，并采用Wilcoxon检验评估表现；同时用可解释性技术（Grad-CAM、不确定性估计）分析模型决策。
AI.result: SegFormer-b2在ETCI数据集的所有测试场景中洪水IoU优于U-Net。SenFloods11微调后，两者差距缩小，优势主要体现在空间破碎型洪水事件。解释性分析发现SegFormer-b2空间焦点更集中，U-Net则在洪水边界处的不确定性提示更强。
AI.conclusion: Vision Transformer（SegFormer-b2）在基于SAR影像的复杂洪水分割中性能突出，特别对于复杂空间结构的洪水，且模型决策更加聚焦于与洪水相关的特征，但U-Net在不确定性提示方面仍有优势。

title: Training-free sparse attention based on cumulative energy filtering
summary:
Sparse attention accelerates Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) for video generation by computing only the important tokens while skipping the rest. The token selection strategy is key to balancing sparsity and accuracy. We formulate the token filtering process as a dual-goal optimization problem: maximizing sparsity and minimizing accuracy degradation. Existing algorithms cannot fulfill both objectives simultaneously. For example, Top-p only considers the accuracy constraint, while Top-k maintains a fixed computational budget but loosens the accuracy constraint.
  This paper demonstrates that maintaining a fixed recall rate is sufficient for ensuring accuracy, whereas a fixed threshold is suboptimal for reducing computational cost. Therefore, we propose a dynamic thresholding scheme to improve sparsity while maintaining the same level of accuracy. Furthermore, our algorithm is deeply integrated with Flash Attention (FA), eliminating the need for any additional masking computation overhead. Experimental results on Wan 2.2 validate that, compared to the BLASST algorithm which is also integrated with FA, our dynamic thresholding strategy enhances sparsity from 61.42\% to 82\% with a VBench metric drop of less than 5\%. This results in an approximate 15\% in attention computation and a $1.61\times$ increase in computational efficiency, which is 1.18x higher than that of BLASST.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于动态阈值的稀疏注意力机制，显著提升了Diffusion Transformers（DiTs）用于视频生成时的计算效率，同时保持了精度。
AI.motivation: 当前稀疏注意力方法在选择保留token时，往往无法兼顾减少计算量与确保精度：如Top-p只关注精度、Top-k只关注计算预算。为此，需要一种新的token筛选策略，能够更好平衡稀疏性与准确性。
AI.method: 将token筛选表述为最大化稀疏性且最小化精度下降的双目标优化问题。提出动态阈值策略，根据固定召回率动态调整，仅保留重要token，并深度整合Flash Attention算法，无需额外mask计算开销。
AI.result: 在Wan 2.2数据集上，动态阈值方法相较于同样集成FA的BLASST算法，稀疏率由61.42%提升至82%，VBench评测指标仅下降不到5%；注意力计算量约下降15%，整体计算效率提升1.61倍，优于BLASST算法1.18倍。
AI.conclusion: 动态阈值稀疏关注策略在提升计算效率的同时，能维持优良的模型精度，优于现有主要方法，为视频生成中的DiTs带来实用高效的改进。

title: HAFMat: Hybrid Priors Guided Adaptive Fusion for Single-Image Human Material Estimation
summary: Physically based rendering (PBR) material estimation is a fundamental appearance decomposition task with broad applications in virtual content creation, relighting, and digital human rendering. However, estimating PBR materials from a single human image remains highly ill-posed, since illumination, geometry, and reflectance are heavily entangled in the observed appearance. To mitigate this ambiguity, we propose HAFMat, a hybrid-prior-guided framework for single-image human material estimation. Our method introduces guidance maps that encode complementary cues, including appearance, body geometry, structure, and prior material predictions from pre-trained models. A key observation is that these guidance cues are heterogeneous: some cues mainly provide texture-level constraints, while others convey higher-level semantic information. To exploit this property, we design a Multi-layer Adaptive Feature Fusion Mechanism, which adaptively fuses guidance features with decoder features at different stages. This design enables texture-dominant and semantic-dominant cues to guide material decoding at appropriate levels, leading to more accurate and physically plausible material estimation. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in material estimation and downstream relighting.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于单张人像图片物理材质估计的新方法HAFMat，并通过充分融合多种先验信息显著提升了估计精度，实验表明在材质估计及光照重现场景中均优于已有方法。
AI.motivation: 单张图片中估计人物的PBR（基于物理渲染）材质具有高度不适定性，因为光照、几何和反射属性在外观表现中混杂，当前方法难以准确估计真实材质。
AI.method: 方法提出HAFMat框架，融合了多种先验（如外观、人体几何、结构信息以及现有模型预测），通过多层自适应特征融合机制，在不同解析层级有效引导材质估计，实现纹理与语义信息的合理耦合。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据的材质估计以及后续重光照任务中，HAFMat均取得了SOTA性能，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态先验信息的分层融合，有效提升了单张人像材质估计的物理合理性和准确性，对虚拟内容生产和数字人领域具有实用价值。

title: Attention-Based Prototype Calibration for Multi-Rater Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Few-shot medical image segmentation methods typically assume a single ground-truth annotation, overlooking systematic variability across expert raters commonly observed in clinical datasets. We propose an attention-based prototype calibration framework for few-shot multi-rater segmentation that models rater-specific deviations from a consensus representation in prototype space. A lightweight yet principled attention operator directly refines rater prototypes without modifying the backbone feature extractor, making the approach fully compatible with existing prototype-based few-shot segmentation methods. This design preserves semantic consistency while enabling personalized segmentation outputs with minimal computational overhead. Experiments on multi-rater medical imaging datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over baseline prototype approaches, highlighting the effectiveness of structured prototype calibration for modeling annotation variability. Our code is available at https://github.com/truong2710-cyber/JAPC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力的原型校准框架，用于解决少样本医学图像分割中多标注者之间的一致性与个体差异问题，能有效提升现有原型方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前少样本医学图像分割方法通常只考虑单一标注者的分割结果，忽略了实际临床数据集中普遍存在的多专家之间的系统性标注差异，因此需要一种能够建模多标注者分割差异的有效方法。
AI.method: 文中提出了一种基于注意力机制的原型校准方法，在原型空间中对每个标注者的原型进行修正，捕捉其与共识的偏离。整个方法无需改变主干特征提取器，通过轻量注意力模块完成原型优化，与现有原型分割框架兼容。
AI.result: 在多标注者医学影像数据集上的实验结果显示，所提方法在分割性能上相较于传统原型法有明显且持续的提升。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的原型校准能够有效建模标注者间的差异，同时保持高效和兼容性，为少样本多标注者分割问题提供了新思路。

title: Differentiable Packing of Irregular 3D Objects with Adaptive Container Estimation
comment: Comments: 20 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables. Under review at Computers & Graphics (Elsevier)
summary: Most existing approaches either fix the container in advance or optimize only a single container dimension through an outer search loop, leaving the remaining dimensions as a manual tuning problem. We present a differentiable packing framework that jointly optimizes all 6N object pose parameters and all three container side lengths inside a single gradient-based loop. The formulation combines six physics-inspired, differentiable loss terms computed directly on triangle meshes through axis-aligned bounding-box proxies. An adaptive squeezing mechanism periodically tightens the container whenever the overlap loss falls below a pair-count-scaled threshold, producing a large initial drop in container volume, followed by small refinements. All pairwise computations are written in tensor-broadcasting form, giving a 3.4 to 54 times speedup over a reference loop-based implementation. The pipeline is implemented in Python and PyTorch, with no physics engine, FFT library, or convex decomposition. On multiple object categories, the method produces containers that are 11 to 32 percent smaller than time-matched DBLF and simulated-annealing baselines at N =100, while running in under 4 minutes per instance on a single consumer GPU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个可微分的打包优化框架，能同时优化所有物体姿态参数和集装箱尺寸，在同一梯度下降环中实现高效的容器压缩，速度和效果均优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常固定容器尺寸或只优化某一个维度，剩余参数需手动调整，操作繁琐且效率不高。为了实现更高效和自动化的多维度联合优化，本文提出新的方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于梯度的可微分打包框架，将物体的6N姿态参数和容器三边长全部纳入统一优化回路。损失函数包括六个基于物理且可微的项，通过三角网格的包围盒计算，并引入自适应压缩机制，根据重叠损失自动收紧容器。所有计算采用tensor广播，实现显著加速。
AI.result: 在多个物体类别和N=100物体情况下，相对DBLF和模拟退火等基线方法，本文方法生成的容器体积小11-32%，单个实例在单块普通GPU上运算时间低于4分钟，速度提升3.4到54倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无物理引擎、高效且易于实现的多物体打包、容器自动压缩，在优化精度及效率方面均优于现有方法，适合实际应用。

title: Chronological Blindness: Benchmarking Temporal Reasoning in Vision-Language Models with CHRONOSIGHT
summary: Human perception of visual scenes is inherently temporal. We instinctively recognise whether a fruit is ripening or rotting, whether construction is progressing or being demolished, and approximately how much time separates two photographs of the same subject. Whether large vision-language models (VLMs) share this competence remains an open and practically important question. We introduce CHRONOSIGHT, a rigorously controlled benchmark evaluating five dimensions of visual temporal reasoning: CHRONORANK (chronological ordering of image sequences), CHRONOLOCATE (ordinal stage localisation from a single image), CHRONODELTA (estimation of time elapsed between two images on a logarithmic scale), CHRONOREVERSE (detection of temporally reversed sequences), and CHRONOODD (identification of a temporal outlier within a set). The benchmark comprises 1{,}000 items across eight process families (biological growth, food transformation, physical weathering, construction, environmental change, human ageing, astronomical phenomena, and urban dynamics) spanning timescales from minutes to millennia. We evaluate eight open-source VLMs (500 M to 19 B parameters) under two prompting regimes and collect human performance baselines. Human performance averages 0.89 across tasks; the best open model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B) reaches 0.40 under direct prompting, a gap we term chronological blindness. Lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on 151 examples raises CHRONODELTA accuracy from near-zero to 0.43, transferring zero-shot to related tasks (CHRONOODD: 0.37; CHRONOREVERSE: 0.64)suggesting the bottleneck is partly instruction following rather than visual perception. Benchmark, code, and predictions will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CHRONOSIGHT基准，用于系统性评估大规模视觉-语言模型（VLM）在视觉时间推理方面的能力，并发现当前VLM与人类在时间感知任务上存在明显差距。
AI.motivation: 人类对视觉场景的时间变化具有本能判断能力，例如能判断水果是成熟还是腐烂、建筑施工还是拆除等。为了检验大型视觉-语言模型是否具备类似时间推理能力，作者设计了全面的基准测试。
AI.method: 作者构建了CHRONOSIGHT基准，涵盖1000个样本，跨越8类真实过程（如生物生长、食物变化等），涉及5类时间推理任务（排序、阶段判定、时间间隔估计等）。用两种提示方式评测了8种主流开源VLM，并采集了人类基线数据，还对模型进行了轻量级LoRA微调实验。
AI.result: 人类平均任务得分为0.89，最佳开源VLM在直接提示下得分为0.40，显示出明显的“时间感盲点”。微调后，相关子任务得分有一定提升，并可零样本迁移到相关任务，表明指令遵循部分限制了VLM表现。
AI.conclusion: 当前大型VLM在视觉时间推理能力上远不及人类，主要瓶颈之一是指令理解而非视觉感知。CHRONOSIGHT基准为相关模型改进和评估提供了有力工具。

title: When the Past Matters: FlashBack Memory for Precipitation Nowcasting
summary: Accurate precipitation nowcasting is crucial for disaster mitigation and socio-economic planning, yet existing methods often struggle with false alarms, missed events, and long range dependency modeling at high spatiotemporal resolution. To address these challenges, we propose FlashBack Memory (FB), a module that dynamically retrieves key historical states and integrates them via an adaptive fusion gate, enhancing the spatiotemporal representation capability of recurrent-based models. We incorporate FB into PredRNN, PredRNNpp, MIM, MotionRNN, and PredRNN-V2, and evaluate on CIKM2017, Shanghai2020, and SEVIR datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that FB significantly improves MSE, MAE, SSIM, and CSI metrics, particularly for high-intensity rainfall and long-sequence predictions, while reducing false alarms and missed events and enhancing temporal consistency and spatial localization. The proposed method provides a general and efficient memory enhancement mechanism, improving the overall performance of recurrent-based precipitation nowcasting models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FlashBack Memory（FB）的新型模块，能够动态检索和融合历史关键信息，大幅提升降水临近预报模型在时空表达和预报精准度上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的降水临近预报模型在高时空分辨率下常常存在误报、漏报以及对长时序依赖建模不足的问题，急需提升模型捕捉复杂时空关系和减少错误预报的能力。
AI.method: 提出FlashBack Memory（FB）模块，通过动态检索历史关键信息并采用自适应融合门进行整合，提高循环神经网络类模型的时空表达能力。FB模块被集成进PredRNN、PredRNNpp、MIM、MotionRNN、PredRNN-V2等主流降水预报模型中。
AI.result: 在CIKM2017、Shanghai2020和SEVIR等多个数据集上，FB模块显著提升了MSE、MAE、SSIM、CSI等评估标准，在强降雨和长序列预测任务中特别有效，同时减少了误报和漏报，并提升了预测的时序一致性和空间定位能力。
AI.conclusion: FB模块是一种通用且高效的记忆增强机制，能够全面提升基于循环神经网络的降水临近预报模型的性能。

title: What Should a Streaming Video Model Remember?
summary: Streaming video understanding models must answer queries at any moment during an ongoing stream, using only what they have observed so far and under fixed memory and computation budgets. Existing methods address this by adding memory banks, retrieval modules, or visual token compression to preserve long-range history. However, strong recent-window baselines show that indiscriminate history injection can dilute current-scene perception, suggesting that the key challenge is not whether to use memory, but how to allocate it selectively. We formulate this as budgeted online latent evidence allocation and propose \textbf{SelectStream}, a selective latent-memory framework that keeps the current observation directly visible to a frozen VLM while exposing historical information only through a compact, query-conditioned evidence budget. Three coordinated mechanisms govern when to write, what to preserve, and how to retrieve: surprise-driven adaptive windowing, priority-preserving consolidation, and query-conditioned graph reasoning over a fixed-capacity latent memory graph. Retrieved evidence is calibrated and injected as latent tokens for answer generation, without replaying frames or growing the context with stream length. Experimental results show that SelectStream achieves strong online streaming performance and preserves general video understanding, reaching 82.67\% on StreamingBench, 67.03\% on OVO-Bench, and 74.4\% average accuracy on offline video benchmarks, while outperforming strong recent-window baselines and prior streaming memory methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SelectStream的流式视频理解模型，在有限的内存与计算预算下，有效选择性使用历史信息，显著提升流式视频问答表现。
AI.motivation: 现有流式视频理解方法依赖内存库等机制记录历史，但盲目注入历史可能损害当前场景感知，因此关键难题是如何高效选择和分配历史记忆资源。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为带预算的在线潜在证据分配，并提出SelectStream框架，通过三种机制（突发驱动窗口、自适应整合、查询条件下图式推理）对潜在证据存储与检索过程进行优化，仅以紧凑的查询相关历史辅助回答，历史证据以潜在token注入，无需回放帧或随着视频增长的上下文扩充，当前观测始终直接可见。
AI.result: SelectStream在多个数据集上取得出色表现，StreamingBench 82.67%、OVO-Bench 67.03%、离线视频平均74.4%，超越了现有强baseline和历史方法。
AI.conclusion: 选择性历史证据分配可有效提升流式视频理解任务表现，SelectStream在不扩大内存消耗的前提下兼顾历史回顾与当前感知，具有实际部署价值。

title: GraphBEV++: Multi-Modal Feature Alignment for Autonomous Driving
summary: Feature misalignment in BEV perception is a critical yet often overlooked challenge in autonomous driving, especially under calibration uncertainties between LiDAR and camera sensors. To address this issue, we propose a robust multi-modal fusion framework, GraphBEV++, which systematically mitigates projection-induced misalignment. The framework consists of two key modules: LocalAlign-v2 and GlobalAlign-v2. LocalAlign-v2 introduces neighborhood-aware depth features via graph matching to correct local misalignment. It supports both LSS-based and query-based BEV representations, making it compatible with BEVFusion and BEVFormer architectures for consistent cross-paradigm alignment. GlobalAlign-v2 encompasses two variants: Deformable and Diffusion. The Deformable variant addresses global misalignment in LSS-based multi-modal BEV by explicitly learning cross-modal feature offsets. In contrast, the Diffusion variant targets implicit misalignment in query-based BEV by injecting noise to simulate misalignment and employing a denoising process to recover aligned features. Experimental results show that GraphBEV++ achieves state-of-the-art performance under misalignment noise on nuScenes and Waymo subset, improves long-range detection on Argoverse2, and generalizes effectively to the 3D occupancy prediction task, consistently improving occupancy estimation accuracy and robustness under both clean and noisy settings. Furthermore, GraphBEV++ effectively alleviates misalignment issues in end-to-end autonomous driving. Compared with five baselines (UniAD, VAD, FusionAD, MomAD, and WoTE), it demonstrates superior performance in both open-loop (nuScenes) and closed-loop (Bench2Drive and NAVSIM) evaluations across perception, prediction, and planning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GraphBEV++多模态融合框架，有效解决自动驾驶中BEV感知的特征错位问题，尤其是在激光雷达与摄像头校准不准的场景下，显著提升了各项任务下的模型鲁棒性和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV感知方法在激光雷达与摄像头融合时，常会因校准不准导致特征错位，影响自动驾驶系统的感知与决策。过去对此问题关注不足，缺乏系统性的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出GraphBEV++多模态融合框架，包括LocalAlign-v2和GlobalAlign-v2两个核心模块。LocalAlign-v2通过图匹配引入邻域深度特征，矫正局部错位；GlobalAlign-v2包含Deformable和Diffusion两种变体，分别针对LSS和Query两种BEV范式下的全局错位，通过显式学习或隐式模拟噪声并去噪实现全局对齐。
AI.result: GraphBEV++在nuScenes、Waymo、Argoverse2等数据集上，在各种存在特征错位噪声的场景下均取得了最优性能。同时在3D占用预测任务中，提升了占用估计的准确性与鲁棒性。在自动驾驶全流程任务中超越了五个主流系统基线。
AI.conclusion: GraphBEV++系统性解决了多模态感知中的特征错位问题，具有良好的通用性、鲁棒性及泛化性，有助于提升自动驾驶感知、预测与规划的整体性能。

title: Towards UAV Image Dehazing: A UAV Atmospheric Scattering Model, Benchmark, and Geometry-Aware Deep Unfolding Network
summary: In UAV applications, haze significantly obscures distant details and weaken structural information, hindering the recovery of details. Current UAV scenarios still face two key challenges: (i) paired hazy/clean images from the real world are unobtainable, while the classical atmospheric scattering model is inadequate for modeling the spatially non-uniform haze in UAV imagery; (ii) existing dehazing methods struggle to remove the heavy haze accumulated in the upper regions of UAV images. To address these issues, we first propose a UAV Atmospheric Scattering Model (UASM), which explicitly incorporates flight altitude, viewing pitch, and extinction to characterize the non-uniform haze distribution in UAV imaging. Based on UASM, we develop a physics-driven dehazing framework, termed Geometry-aware Proximal Deep Unfolding Network (GP-DUN). Specifically, GP-DUN consists of three key modules: a Latent Geometry Estimator (LGE) that infers transmittance consistent with UAV imaging geometry, a Geometry-aware Gradient Descent Module (GeoGDM) that embeds UASM into the data-fidelity term and performs physics-consistent closed-form updates, and an Pooling-Expert Proximal Mapping Module (PE-PMM) that learns an implicit prior to restore textures and structures beyond the capability of explicit physical modeling. In addition, we further construct UASM-HazeSet, which provides controllable paired synthetic data together with 2,285 real UAV haze images for testing. Extensive experiments show that GP-DUN consistently outperforms existing methods on both UASM-HazeSet and real UAV haze benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了面向无人机(UAV)图像去雾的新物理模型和网络方法，有效解决现有去雾方法在现实无人机场景中表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机在空中拍摄时，雾霾往往导致画面结构信息变弱和细节丢失，而现有去雾方法由于缺少真实配对数据，并且大气散射模型难以描述空间非均匀的雾分布，导致效果不佳，尤其是对画面上方厚雾的处理非常有限。
AI.method: 1）提出无人机大气散射模型（UASM），综合考虑飞行高度、俯仰角度和消光系数，准确描述UAV影像中的非均匀雾分布。2）基于UASM设计了物理驱动的解雾框架GP-DUN，包括：（a）全新几何感知的潜在结构估计模块(LGE)；（b）将UASM嵌入数据一致性项并实现物理一致闭式更新的梯度下降模块(GeoGDM)；（c）结合池化专家近端映射模块(PE-PMM)，以隐式先验恢复超出物理建模能力的结构与纹理。3）构建新数据集UASM-HazeSet，含可控的合成雾对和2285张真实UAV雾图像。
AI.result: GP-DUN在UASM-HazeSet和真实UAV雾图像基准上均显著优于现有去雾方法，展现了优异的泛化能力和恢复细节能力。
AI.conclusion: 文中提出的UASM模型与GP-DUN方法能够有效建模和去除无人机影像中的空间非均匀雾分布，为无人机视觉应用带来更清晰的场景理解，且新数据集为领域研究提供重要资源。

title: SP$^3$: Spherical Priors for Plug-and-Play Restoration
summary: In this paper, we introduce SP$^3$, a novel Plug-and-Play algorithm that accelerates maximum a posteriori image restoration by replacing denoisers with Spherical Encoders (SE) as generative priors. SP$^3$ approximates the intractable proximal prior step by utilizing the SE tightly structured latent space as a robust projection onto the natural image manifold. Alternating this projection with a closed-form data-consistency step, via Half-Quadratic Splitting, achieves stable convergence without requiring gradient computation during inference. This unique formulation unlocks "anytime" restoration capabilities, producing sharp, plausible images from the first iteration. Evaluations across a variety of image restoration tasks demonstrate that SP$^3$ achieves perceptual quality comparable to state-of-the-art zero-shot diffusion and flow methods while being $3$-$630\times$ faster.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的即插即用算法SP$^3$，利用Spherical Encoders（SE）作为生成先验以加速最大后验（MAP）图像复原，并在多项任务上实现类似或更快于现有方法的高质量结果。
AI.motivation: 当前很多图像复原方法虽然效果好，但推理速度慢，特别是基于扩散或流的零样本方法，难以满足实际高效处理的需求。
AI.method: SP$^3$将Spherical Encoders（SE）用于替代常规去噪器作为生成式先验，利用其紧凑的潜空间实现对自然图像流形的强投影。算法采用半二次分割法，将这种先验投影与闭式解的数据一致性步骤交替进行，整个过程无需在推理阶段计算梯度。
AI.result: 在多个图像复原任务中，SP$^3$在感知质量上与最新的零样本扩散和流方法相当，但速度提升可达3至630倍。
AI.conclusion: SP$^3$实现了快速、稳定且高质量的图像复原，能够‘随时’输出清晰可信的图像，对实际应用具有重要意义。

title: RGFVR: Reference-Guided Face Video Restoration with Flow Matching
summary: Face video restoration from degraded observations is challenging, as it requires simultaneously recovering visual fidelity, temporal consistency, and subject identity. Existing approaches are often either reference-free, which can lead to identity loss when person-specific facial details are lost, or subject-specific, which limits generalization to unseen identities. We propose a subject-agnostic, reference-guided framework for identity-preserving face video restoration. Our method introduces bimodal perceptual-descriptive identity conditioning into a pretrained flow-based text-to-video generator and employs a two-stage training strategy to strengthen identity guidance during restoration. Experiments show that our approach improves restoration fidelity, temporal consistency, and identity preservation, achieving superior performance under challenging video degradations, including downsampling, blur, noise, and compression artifacts. The code is available under: https://github.com/batuhanntosun/RG-FVR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的人脸视频修复方法，在无须特定参考图像的情况下，有效保护人物身份信息，同时提升视频的视觉质量和时间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法为非参考式或特定主体，前者易丢失身份特征，后者泛化性差，难以适用于未知身份。因此，迫切需要一种既能保持身份一致性又具备广泛适用性的方法。
AI.method: 本研究提出了一种主体无关、参考引导的新框架，将双模态感知-描述的身份条件注入预训练的基于流的文本到视频生成器，并采用两阶段训练策略增强身份指导能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在面临下采样、模糊、噪声及压缩伪影等多种退化情况下，能更好地恢复视觉质量、提升时间一致性，并有效保护人物身份，在主流评测指标上超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高保真、高一致性和身份保护的人脸视频修复，兼具泛化能力与实用价值，对实际应用具有重要意义。

title: Instance-Aware Knowledge Distillation for Semi-Supervised Learning of an On-Board Multi-Task Dense Prediction Model for Collision Avoidance System
summary: Collision avoidance systems have evolved toward camera-based deep learning approaches for driving scene understanding. However, deployment in edge environments such as country clubs is constrained by limited computational resources and unreliable communication infrastructure. Moreover, constructing large-scale datasets for the target domain involves substantial annotation cost. To address these limitations, we propose an instance-aware knowledge distillation framework for semi-supervised learning. Specifically, we generate pseudo labels that mitigate teacher bias by leveraging domain priors from the teacher and instance-centric knowledge from foundation models. The trained lightweight student is deployed in the proposed collision avoidance system and performs multiple dense prediction tasks in real-time. The system detects frontal obstacles and encodes their spatial information into controller area network messages for automated guided vehicle operation. To achieve this, we construct a large-scale country club dataset and perform field validation of the proposed system. Experimental results demonstrate that the student outperforms the large teacher in instance segmentation while mitigating performance degradation in monocular depth estimation. Compared with the teacher, the student reduces FLOPs by 22.68$\times$ and parameters by 14.33$\times$, achieving 6.46 FPS on a low-cost edge device.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种适用于边缘设备、面向半监督学习的实例感知知识蒸馏方法，并将其部署在实际的防碰撞系统中，显著提升了效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的防碰撞系统虽然表现优秀，但受制于边缘设备的算力和数据标注成本高问题，难以在如高尔夫球场等边缘环境落地。
AI.method: 研发了一种实例感知知识蒸馏框架，结合教师模型的领域先验和基础模型的实例知识生成伪标签，用于半监督训练轻量学生模型。同时，构建了大规模场景数据集并进行了实地验证。
AI.result: 学生模型在实例分割上超越了大教师模型，在单目深度估计任务上表现损耗得到抑制。同时，计算量和参数量分别下降了22.68和14.33倍，在低成本设备上达到6.46FPS。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效兼顾了性能与算力开销，适配性强，为实际低算力场景下的防碰撞系统部署提供了可行路径。

title: Beer-Lambert Guided Representation Learning for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Sub-THz Food Inspection Images
summary: Food manufacturing requires reliable inspection systems to detect foreign material contamination and maintain product safety. Sub-THz transmission imaging provides material-dependent attenuation characteristics that are useful for detecting low-density contaminants in food products. However, existing unsupervised anomaly detection methods mainly rely on RGB-pretrained visual representations, which may not adequately capture the transmission behavior of Sub-THz images. This paper proposes a Beer-Lambert guided representation learning framework for unsupervised anomaly detection in Sub-THz food inspection images. The proposed method introduces an attenuation decomposition module as an auxiliary regularization module that constrains student representations through attenuation reconstruction during training. In addition to the conventional one-class setting, we introduce a Leave-One-Food-Out protocol to evaluate generalization capability under unseen food categories. Experimental results on the Inline-Food-Inspection-THz dataset show that the proposed method improves overall anomaly detection performance over the baseline method.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Beer-Lambert原理的表征学习框架，用于亚太赫兹(THz)食品检测图像中的无监督异常检测，通过引入衰减分解模块提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 食品生产需要高效可靠的异物检测系统，但当前无监督异常检测方法依赖于RGB图像预训练特征，难以捕捉亚太赫兹图像的传输衰减特性，影响低密度异物检测效果。
AI.method: 提出基于Beer-Lambert定律的表示学习方法，在训练过程中通过新增的衰减分解模块，对学生网络的表征进行衰减重构正则化，辅助提升特征表征能力，并提出 留一食物不见(Leave-One-Food-Out)协议，评估模型在新食物类别上的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在Inline-Food-Inspection-THz数据集上的实验结果表明，所提方法相比基线方法在整体异常检测性能上有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的Beer-Lambert引导的表示学习框架能够更好地建模亚太赫兹图像的衰减特性，提升了食品异物无监督检测的效果，并在不同食物类别上的泛化能力表现良好。

title: Hierarchical Fine-Grained Aerial Object Detection
summary: Fine-grained aerial object detection, driven by the intrinsic granularity of real-world object categories, is crucial for advanced scene understanding in remote sensing. Existing methods largely inherit the paradigm of coarse-grained object detection, relying solely on single-label supervision and thus struggling to distinguish model-level categories with subtle structural differences. However, for each specific model (e.g., Boeing 787), structured prior knowledge such as attributes and hierarchies offers discriminative semantics across multiple granularities. Motivated by this, we present ExpertDet, a scheme that incorporates expert-informed cues to enhance fine-grained aerial object detection. Specifically, we design Vision-aware Masked Attribute Modeling (VMAM), which aligns attribute semantics with visual structures by reconstructing randomly masked attributes from visual cues, enabling the detector to capture subtle structural distinctions. We further propose Hierarchical Visual Instance Promotion (HierVIP), which builds a visual prototype tree based on hierarchical relations and imposes taxonomy-aware constraints to preserve cross-level semantic continuity while enhancing category discrimination. Moreover, we curate a new fine-grained object detection benchmark for Precise recognition of model-specific Ships and Planes from aerial imagery, PSP, covering 106 ship classes and 30 airplane models, respectively, featuring the most extensive collection of model-specific categories among existing aerial object detection datasets to date. We benchmark state-of-the-art object detection algorithms on the PSP benchmark. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that ExpertDet consistently outperforms other fine-grained competitors across hierarchy levels. The dataset, benchmark, and code are available at https://nnnnerd.github.io/PSP-Benchmark/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ExpertDet的新方法，结合专家知识和多层次语义，实现对遥感影像中精细类别目标的高精度检测，并发布了目前最细粒度的模型级舰船与飞机数据集PSP。
AI.motivation: 现有的遥感目标检测多为粗粒度，仅用单标签监督，难以分辨细微结构差异明显的模型级物体。而实际应用中，具体的模型（如波音787）常有丰富的结构、属性等先验知识，可为精细分类提供更多区分特征。
AI.method: 提出ExpertDet，包括两大核心：1）视觉感知属性遮蔽建模（VMAM），通过遮蔽并重建属性，将属性语义与视觉结构对齐，提升区分类能力；2）层级视觉实例增强（HierVIP），构建视觉原型树，引入分层约束，以增强层级内、层级间的判别性和连贯性。同时，创建PSP数据集，包含106种舰船、30种飞机的模型级实例。
AI.result: 在新提出的PSP数据集上，ExpertDet在不同层级下均显著优于主流细粒度目标检测算法，充分验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合专家属性和层级知识的新方案能有效改善精细化遥感目标检测能力，并为后续研究提供了高质量基准数据集与评测平台。

title: PermaVid: Consistent Video Generation Across Edits via Disentangled Context Memory
summary: Consistent video generation under editing operations requires persistence: when edits modify scene appearance or layout, subsequent generations should remain coherent across time and viewpoints. However, existing memory designs struggle to maintain long-term consistency after such modifications, as stored contexts may become outdated or invalid. To address this, we propose PermaVid, a novel framework built upon a multi-modal context memory that disentangles spatial context into semantic appearance and geometric structure, together with an edit-aware memory update and retrieval strategy that keeps memory evolution aligned with subsequent observations. Specifically, we develop two complementary memory banks: an RGB context memory that captures appearance-aware observations while implicitly encoding geometry, and a depth context memory that preserves geometry-only structure disentangled from semantics. Building on this design, we introduce a memory-guided video generation model that performs multi-modal feature fusion under reference conditions drawn from mixed-modality memory contexts. Experiments demonstrate that our method maintains strong long-term semantic and structural consistency after edits, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的视频生成框架PermaVid，通过分离语义外观和几何结构，并引入编辑感知的记忆更新机制，在视频编辑操作后保持长时一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频生成模型在编辑操作后难以保持场景在时间和视角上的持续一致性，主要因为其记忆机制不能有效应对上下文的动态变化。
AI.method: PermaVid采用多模态上下文记忆，将空间上下文分为语义外观和几何结构两部分。具体设计了两个互补的记忆库：RGB记忆库用于捕捉带外观的观测，深度记忆库则捕捉仅有几何结构的内容。并提出编辑感知的记忆更新和检索策略，保证记忆库内容随编辑动态调整。基于此，模型实现了多模态特征融合的视频生成。
AI.result: 实验证明，所提方法在长期语义和结构一致性方面表现优异，尤其在编辑后，显著优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: PermaVid能在视频编辑场景中有效保持跨时间和视角的语义及结构一致性，为一致性视频生成提供了新的思路和解决方案。

title: ResEdit: Residual embeddings for precise generative image editing
comment: Accepted to the EGSR 2026 journal track
summary: Conditional diffusion image generators can be repurposed for editing through inversion, without the need for large-scale paired fine-tuning data. However, producing high-quality, targeted edits while maintaining image identity and global consistency remains challenging, as weakly conditioned inversion often embeds conflicting image features into the noise. We demonstrate that incorporating a residual image encoding as additional conditioning enables both improved identity preservation and better editability. We optimize this residual encoding to provide a strong conditioning signal for reconstruction, thereby reducing the reliance on inversion and susceptibility to its aforementioned pitfalls. To ensure this residual does not interfere with desired edits, we incorporate a gradient reversal-based optimization strategy that disentangles the residual from the edited condition. We illustrate our method's ability to produce high-fidelity results across precise intrinsic-based editing and relighting, and show proof-of-concept text-guided manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过残差图像编码优化无条件扩散图像生成模型，实现更高质量、更一致的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的条件图像编辑方法，依赖于反演，但经常面临图像身份保持与高质量定向编辑之间的权衡，且反演噪声容易混入冲突性信息。
AI.method: 作者引入残差图像编码作为额外条件，并通过优化，使其为重建提供强信号，减少传统反演依赖。同时用梯度反转的方法优化过程，使残差编码与编辑条件解耦，防止干扰目标编辑。
AI.result: 该方法在身份保持、可控编辑与高保真度方面取得明显提升，支持细粒度属性编辑、重光照与文本引导的编辑效果。
AI.conclusion: 引入残差编码并采用梯度反转优化，实现了扩散模型下高质量且一致的图像编辑，兼顾可编辑性与身份一致性。

title: AURA: Active-Response Attribution under Treatment Ambiguity in Bacterial Cytological Profiling
summary: When a bacterial sample is exposed to several antibiotics, not every applied drug necessarily acts: if the organism is resistant to one of them, that drug leaves no morphological trace. The clinically meaningful quantity is therefore not which antibiotics were applied, but which ones were active. We show that these two are sharply decoupled in real E. coli microscopy - naively assuming the applied combination equals the active one is correct only about 37% of the time - yet existing computational tools are ill-suited to recovering the active set. Forward perturbation models such as scGen, CPA, and IMPA are designed to predict appearance from treatment, not the reverse, and inverting them degrades sharply; discriminative image classifiers tend to memorise strain- and batch-specific texture and fail to transfer across experimental replicates. We introduce AURA, which reframes the task as constrained, energy-based inverse attribution. Its central inductive bias is that the active set must be a subset of the applied set; this collapses the candidate space and lets AURA infer the active subset of applied antibiotics by decomposing residual morphology into antibiotic response atoms and selecting the subset with the lowest reconstruction energy, using no strain label at test time. AURA-E adds evidence-aware abstention, withholding a prediction when candidate explanations remain near-equally plausible. On cross-replicate transfer in an E. coli cytological profiling dataset, AURA recovers the active antibiotic combination with 95.47% exact-match accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种新方法AURA，可以仅通过显微图像准确识别细菌对多种抗生素的实际响应（活性抗生素），相比于常规方法显著提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 在细菌多药处理下，传统认为施加了哪些抗生素就等于哪些抗生素生效（活性）的假设经常错误，实际只对37%的情况成立。而目前的算法无法很好地反推哪些抗生素真正起作用，因此需要更好的分析方法。
AI.method: 作者提出AURA方法，将任务表述为受约束的能量基础逆归因问题。该方法假设‘活性抗生素’必为‘施加抗生素’的子集，大大缩减候选空间。算法对显微镜图像的残差形态进行分解，通过重构能量最低的组合推断出活性抗生素。在AURA-E中，还引入了证据感知选择性拒绝机制，当结果不确定时选择不给出判断。
AI.result: 在E. coli的细胞学数据集上，AURA模型在跨重复实验时能以95.47%的准确率推断出真实活性抗生素组合。
AI.conclusion: AURA显著提升了多抗生素环境下细菌活性抗生素的识别准确性，并具备跨实验场景的鲁棒性，有望替代现有无法逆向归因的算法。

title: Uncertainty Quality of VGGT: An Analysis on the DTU Benchmark Dataset
comment: Accepted for publication in the ISPRS Annals of the Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences
summary: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) has already attracted a great deal of attention in a short period of time, not least due to the Best Paper Award at CVPR-2025. Similar to DUSt3R and MASt3R, VGGT aims to bring about a paradigm shift by replacing established methods like bundle adjustment and feature matching with a simple, unified, feed-forward neural network that predicts camera poses, depth maps, and dense 3D structure directly from multiple images of a scene in a few seconds. A key aspect is its ability to process an arbitrary number of views consistently in a single forward pass without any post-processing or iterative optimization. For photogrammetry, this opens new possibilities for real-time, scalable, and accessible 3D reconstruction. In this context, not only high reconstruction accuracy but also high-quality uncertainty estimates are crucial, as they foster trust and enable robust quality assurance. This paper therefore investigates the quality of VGGT's uncertainty predictions. The analysis identifies an effective confidence threshold for filtering VGGT's raw output and demonstrates that enhancing uncertainty quality holds strong potential for improving the accuracy of its 3D reconstructions.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了VGGT（Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer）这一新方法，用于从多张图像直接预测相机位姿、深度图和稠密3D结构，并重点分析了其不确定性预测的质量及其对3D重建准确性的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统的摄影测量方法依赖繁琐的特征匹配和捆绑调整，效率低且对实时性不友好。本研究旨在简化和加速3D重建流程，同时确保输出结果具有可靠的不确定性估计以提升实际应用的可信度。
AI.method: VGGT通过一个统一的前馈神经网络，在一次前向传播内处理任意数量的视角，无需后处理或迭代优化。作者对VGGT的不确定性预测进行了质量分析，并探索了置信度阈值用于结果筛选的有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，通过滤除置信度较低的预测结果，并提升不确定性估计的质量，能够显著提高VGGT在3D重建任务中的准确性。
AI.conclusion: VGGT不仅实现了高效的3D重建，还具备高质量的不确定性预测能力，为实时、可扩展和高可信度的3D重建技术推进提供了有力支持。

title: Unified Multimodal Model for Brain MRI Imputation and Understanding
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) hold great potential for medicine, as they inherit knowledge from LLM and allow multiple data modalities to be integrated, analysed and interpreted in natural language. However, the field of medical MLLMs is constrained by non-trivial challenges, notably the scarcity of high-quality training data and the frequent occurrence of missing data in the real-world clinical setting. Here, we propose a novel unified multimodal model, UniBrain, for brain magnetic resonance image (MRI) analysis. To address potential missing brain MRI modalities, we employ a unified training strategy to perform joint imaging modality imputation and brain image understanding. During training, an interleaved and description-enriched data flow is constructed to train the model in an autoregressive manner, enabling medical reasoning with generated multimodal data. A self-alignment strategy is introduced to leverage dense image embeddings to learn fine-grained anatomical features without requiring detailed image captions. Furthermore, we propose a dynamic hidden state mechanism to alleviate the exposure bias during long-context multimodal inference. Extensive experiments on multi-disease brain MRI dataset demonstrate that UniBrain achieves high performance for brain image imputation, understanding, and disease diagnosis under various extents of modality incompleteness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UniBrain的统一多模态模型，专为脑部MRI分析而设计，可应对真实临床中脑MRI模态缺失问题，实现影像补全和医学推理，在多病种数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 当前医学多模态大模型（MLLMs）面临高质量训练数据稀缺及临床环境中影像模态缺失的挑战，亟需能够处理模态缺失并提升推理能力的模型。
AI.method: 提出UniBrain多模态模型，融合联合影像模态推断与影像理解，采用交错描述丰富数据流进行自回归训练，引入自对齐策略以无须详细图像注释学习解剖特征，并设计动态隐状态机制减缓多模态长上下文推理的暴露偏差。
AI.result: 在多种脑部疾病的MRI数据集上，UniBrain在影像模态补全、脑部影像理解和疾病诊断任务下，均在多种模态缺失情况下表现出色。
AI.conclusion: UniBrain为医学多模态学习、医学影像分析和临床决策提供了有效手段，验证了其在实际临床不完整数据环境下的广泛适用性和可靠性能。

title: Active Reference Acquisition in Few-Shot Font Generation
summary: Few-shot font generation aims to synthesize the remaining glyphs of a font given one or a few reference glyphs while preserving stylistic consistency, thereby supporting font designers in efficiently completing a typeface. Existing methods primarily focus on improving generation quality given a fixed reference set. However, when the current reference glyphs are insufficient to represent the target style, few-shot font generation may fail to produce satisfactory results. In practical scenarios, additional reference glyphs can often be obtained from the designer when necessary. Accordingly, we propose a new framework, Active Reference Acquisition in Few-Shot Font Generation, in which the model sequentially decides which character to acquire next as an additional reference. Furthermore, we propose a reference part-coverage-based acquisition function to efficiently query the designer. Motivated by the observation that font styles are well characterized by local structural parts, we represent each glyph using a histogram of local features and select query characters that maximize the expected part coverage of the reference set. By prioritizing characters that contain parts not yet covered by the current references, the proposed method progressively expands the diversity of visual parts in the reference set. As a result, generation quality is improved with fewer queries. Experiments on the Google Fonts dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves higher generation quality than random querying and reference-agnostic baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/matsuo-shinnosuke/ActiveRef-FontGen.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动参考获取的少样本字体生成框架，通过智能选取增加参考字形，有效提升生成字体的风格一致性和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本字体生成方法多依赖于一个固定的参考字集，但如果这些参考字不足以表达目标风格，则生成效果往往不理想。设计师在实际工作中可以逐步补充参考字，因此需要一个方法指导选取最佳后续参考字，从而有效丰富风格表达。
AI.method: 作者提出Active Reference Acquisition框架，让模型根据当前参考字动态决定下一个应补充的参考字符。具体方法是基于参考部位覆盖率（part-coverage）设计获取策略：首先将每个字形用局部特征的直方图表示，优先选择能最大补充未覆盖局部结构特征的字符作为新参考，从而更快速提升风格部位的多样性。
AI.result: 在Google Fonts数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法相较于随机选择和不考虑参考信息的基线，在提升生成质量的同时所需查询次数更少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过主动地补充具有结构多样性的参考字符，有效提升了少样本字体生成的质量，为字体设计流程带来更高效的辅助。

title: BadWorld: Adversarial Attacks on World Models
summary: Visual world models (VWMs) synthesize interactive, action-conditioned rollouts from a single context image. However, it remains an open question how robust these models are to adversarial perturbations. Standard adversarial attacks fail to assess this vulnerability because attackers lack ground-truth future videos and cannot predict subsequent user controls. We introduce BadWorld, a label-free adversarial framework tailored for autoregressive VWMs that systematically overcomes both constraints. First, to bypass the need for future supervision, we propose a self-supervised velocity attack that directly disrupts the early denoising dynamics of the model. Second, to ensure the attack generalizes across unpredictable user actions, we formulate a trajectory-adaptive bi-level optimization that actively mines hard control sequences to forge control-agnostic perturbations. Evaluated on representative VWMs with continuous and discrete controls, BadWorld exposes severe structural fragility. Visually indistinguishable adversarial images reliably trigger catastrophic degradation in future rollouts, leading to incomplete denoising, structural collapse, and control inconsistency. These findings reveal critical risks for deploying VWMs in safety-critical systems while highlighting a practical mechanism for privacy protection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对视觉世界模型（VWM）的无标签对抗攻击方法 BadWorld，发现当前 VWM 对细微扰动极为脆弱。
AI.motivation: VWM 能生成与动作有关的互动视频，但其对抗扰动的鲁棒性未知，标准攻击方法因无法获取未来视频标签和用户控制预测而无法评估该漏洞。
AI.method: 提出 BadWorld 框架，第一，通过自监督速度攻击跳过未来监督需求，破坏模型的初期去噪过程；第二，设计轨迹自适应的双层优化方法，寻找难以攻击的控制序列，实现控制无关的对抗扰动。
AI.result: 在多种 VWM（含连续与离散控制）上评估发现，肉眼无法察觉的扰动可导致未来模拟严重崩溃，如去噪失败、结构破坏和控制不一致等问题。
AI.conclusion: VWM 在安全关键应用中存在严重安全隐患，但 BadWorld 也可为隐私保护提供实用机制。

title: Local-GS: Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting via Tile-Local Warp Coherence
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has significantly advanced real-time novel view synthesis by representing scenes as dense collections of anisotropic 3D Gaussian primitives. However, the irregular spatial distribution of Gaussians often leads to poor GPU utilization, as warp divergence and redundant computation degrade rendering performance. To address this, we present Local-GS, a warp-coherent rendering paradigm that, organizes Gaussian primitives with respect to SIMT (Single Instruction, Multiple Threads) execution boundaries rather than scene geometry. Specifically, we propose three warp-coherent stages: a hoisting stage that precomputes shared parameters at tile level, a culling stage that discards warps with no contribution, and a blending stage that replaces per-pixel branching with a uniform instruction stream. Across extensive benchmarks on multiple datasets, Local-GS improves efficiency without compromising quality. As a plug-and-play optimization, it provides additional performance gains to all tested baselines, culminating in a $7.76\times$ speedup on Deep Blending scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的3D高斯渲染方式Local-GS，通过优化GPU执行，提高了渲染效率并大幅加速。
AI.motivation: 现有3D Gaussian Splatting方法渲染新视角时，因高斯分布不规则导致GPU利用率低、性能受限。这严重制约了其实时性和大规模应用。
AI.method: Local-GS从SIMT（单指令多线程）执行机制出发，按GPU执行边界来组织高斯原语，并设计了三阶段：1）tile级别hoisting，提前共用参数；2）warp级culling，快速淘汰无贡献线程组；3）统一blending阶段，消除像素分支，提升并行效率。
AI.result: 广泛基准测试显示Local-GS能不损失画质地提升渲染效率，对各类基线都有加速效果，在Deep Blending场景下最高加速达7.76倍。
AI.conclusion: Local-GS是一种通用、可插拔的优化方案，极大提升了3DGS的实用性和普适性，有望推动其实时新视图合成的落地应用。

title: Transformation-driven generation of comparable projection images from multimodal anatomical scenes
summary: This work addresses the computational problem of generating reproducible projection-space observations from heterogeneous anatomical scenes whose components may undergo independent spatial transformations. We propose a transformation-driven framework for synthetic projection imaging from multimodal anatomical data and demonstrate it on mandibular-motion scenarios. In contrast to conventional Digitally Reconstructed Radiograph (DRR) approaches primarily designed for registration, projection realism, or rendering efficiency, the proposed formulation treats projection imaging as an observation process operating on an explicitly represented anatomical scene. Independently transformable volumetric and surface-based anatomical objects are embedded within a shared scene representation and propagated directly into projection space through explicit transformations. Projection geometry, acquisition modelling, material interpretation, and image presentation remain explicitly separated, enabling controlled exploration of methodological assumptions while preserving reproducibility and direct comparability between generated projections. Particular emphasis is placed on transformation-driven anatomical scenarios relevant to craniofacial analysis, including mandibular motion and therapeutic repositioning. Using a shared anatomical reference scene composed of CT/CBCT volumes, segmented structures, surface models, and auxiliary anatomical or therapeutic objects, the framework enables generation of directly comparable VirtualRTG projections from multiple anatomical configurations while preserving identical imaging assumptions. Rather than aiming at fully physically faithful radiographic simulation, the proposed approach provides a controllable and reproducible methodological environment for studying anatomy--projection relationships, motion observability, and transformation-aware imaging workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向异质解剖场景、可独立进行空间变换的合成投影成像方法，重点用于下颌运动等颅面解剖分析，能够在统一假设下生成可复现、可对比的投影图像。
AI.motivation: 现有数字重建射线图像（DRR）方法主要用于配准或渲染效率，难以处理包含多个可独立变换的解剖结构场景，且对于解剖运动及相关分析的支持有限，缺乏可控性和复现性。
AI.method: 作者提出基于显式表示的解剖场景，将体积和表面结构以独立对象形式嵌入统一场景中，通过显式空间变换直接推进到投影空间，同时将投影几何、数据采集建模、材料解释和图像展示过程分离开，支持复杂的运动与变换场景下的投影成像。
AI.result: 使用包含CT/CBCT体积、分割结构、表面模型等组成的共享解剖参考场景，可以在多种解剖配置下生成直接可比的虚拟投影图像（VirtualRTG），支持类似下颌运动和治疗复位的分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不是追求物理高度真实的放射图像仿真，而是为研究解剖-投影关系、运动可观测性、变换敏感的成像流程提供一个可控、可复现的方法学环境。

title: LOCUS: Local Visual Cue Search for Enhancing Fine-Grained Perception in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) remain unreliable on fine-grained visual perception, even when high-resolution inputs preserve the necessary local details. We identify this limitation as visual context rot: decisive evidence may exist in the full image, yet fail to be reliably selected and used amid redundant visual context. We propose LOCUS (LOcal visual CUe Search), a training framework that teaches MLLMs to internalize local evidence search through a verifiable proxy task. During training, LOCUS provides a local crop as a visual cue and optimizes the model to recover its spatial support in the full image using an IoU-based reward. The visual cue is used only during training, leaving the standard image-question inference interface unchanged. Experiments across fine-grained perception, hallucination, general understanding, and reasoning benchmarks show that LOCUS improves localization-sensitive visual understanding while preserving broad capabilities. Attention analyses further indicate stronger focus on task-relevant evidence regions, suggesting that training-time visual cue search provides an effective route to internalized fine-grained evidence selection.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新训练框架LOCUS，通过在训练时引入局部视觉线索，提升MLLMs在细粒度视觉理解任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: MLLMs（多模态大语言模型）在细粒度视觉感知上不可靠，即使提供高分辨率图像，模型也常常无法有效利用图像中的关键信息。这种问题被称为视觉上下文衰减，即重要证据因上下文冗余被忽略。作者希望解决MLLM对细节证据利用不充分的问题。
AI.method: 提出LOCUS训练框架，在训练时向模型提供图像的局部裁剪作为视觉线索，并要求模型在完整图像中定位该线索（通过IoU奖励机制优化）。这个局部线索只在训练时应用，推理阶段仍使用常规的图像-问题输入接口。
AI.result: 在多个细粒度感知、幻觉检测、通用理解及推理基准测试上，LOCUS框架提高了与定位相关的视觉理解能力，同时维持了模型的广泛功能。注意力分析显示模型更专注于与任务相关的证据区域。
AI.conclusion: 训练中引入视觉线索搜索任务，有效提升了MLLM对细粒度证据的自主捕捉能力，为提升MLLM在细致视觉认知任务中的表现提供了新思路。

title: Rotational Symmetry based Object Pose Estimation from Point Clouds in the Absence of Known 3D Models
summary: Object pose estimation is crucial to many industrial applications, with one example being automated spray painting using a robot. However, confidentiality concerns often limit access to high-quality 3D models, posing a significant challenge for point-cloud-based pose estimation. In such scenarios, rotational symmetry, a readily accessible characteristic of many industrial objects, can provide valuable prior information to facilitate pose estimation.In this paper, we propose a method that leverages the rotational symmetry commonly found in industrial objects to address the challenge caused by the absence of 3D models. The object pose is jointly estimated with point cloud refinement through an iterative optimization process. This optimization relies on a rotational symmetry constraint loss. To construct this loss, each 3D point is rotated according to the currently estimated pose, and multiple correspondences are identified using nearest-neighbor search by exploiting the rotational symmetry property. These correspondences are then used to compute the rotational symmetry constraint loss, which iteratively refines both the pose and the point cloud.By explicitly incorporating rotational symmetry into the optimization process, the proposed method achieves robust pose estimation and generalizes well across diverse object types. The proposed method is evaluated on a dataset specifically created for point clouds without known 3D models, consisting of four categories of synthetic objects and one real wheel hub collected from a production line. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves performance comparable to methods that rely on known 3D models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需高质量3D模型，利用物体旋转对称性的点云位姿估计方法，在多个真实和合成数据集上效果媲美依赖3D模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 工业领域如自动喷涂等场景对物体位姿估计需求很高，但高质量3D模型常因保密无法获得，导致现有点云位姿估计算法难以应用。如何在无3D模型条件下，准确估计物体位姿成为亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 该方法利用许多工业物体普遍具有的旋转对称性。算法在对点云进行位姿估计的同时，结合点云优化，通过迭代优化过程引入旋转对称性约束损失。具体做法是：将每个3D点依据当前估计的位姿进行旋转，利用旋转对称性，通过最近邻搜索找到多个对应点，基于这些对称对应点计算损失函数，进而优化位姿与点云。
AI.result: 在无3D模型的专门数据集（含四类合成物体和一种真实轮毂）上，实验显示该方法的位姿估计性能与依赖已知3D模型的方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过将旋转对称性显式融入优化流程，该方法不仅在无3D模型场景下实现了鲁棒的位姿估计，还具备良好的泛化能力，适用于多种工业物体。

title: DifferAD-R1: A Difference-Guided IndustrialAnomaly Localization with Multimodal LargeLanguage Models
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
summary: Industrial anomaly localization aims to accurately identify and localize abnormal regions in industrial products, addressing the critical challenge of detecting unseen defect categories in real-world scenarios. Traditional closed-set methods often suffer from poor cross-scenario generalization, while existingMultimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based approachesface two core limitations: they either adopt QA-style paradigmsmisaligned with the practical demands of localization, or relyon standard optimization techniques such as Group RelativePolicy Optimization (GRPO), which fails to deliver effectivelearning signals for subtle defects. To tackle these issues, thispaper proposes DifferAD-R1, an MLLM-augmented reinforcement learning framework tailored for industrial anomaly localization. We design a Difference-Guided dual-image paradigm,which reformulates the localization task as a one-shot difference grounding problem to effectively explore cross-scenarioanomalies. A Dual-Consistency Localization Reward is developedfor hard-to-detect anomalies, enhancing optimization stabilityand robustness. Additionally, we integrate a difficulty-awarestrategy with adaptive reweighting and group-wise resamplingto prioritize learning on challenging instances. To facilitateevaluations in real-world industrial settings, we construct theAD-DualDiff dataset, comprising 13K paired images across 20categories. Experimental results demonstrate that DifferADR1 significantly outperforms existing baselines and achievescompetitive performance compared to large-scale models likeQwen3-VL (235B parameters). Our code is publicly availableat: https://github.com/Rong2026/work-1.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了DifferAD-R1，一种结合多模态大模型和强化学习的新方法，用于工业异常定位，在跨场景和难检测缺陷中效果显著，配套发布了新数据集和代码。
AI.motivation: 工业生产中，异常检测与定位经常需要面对前所未见的新缺陷类型，传统方法泛化性差，现有MLLM方法要么与实践需求不符，要么难以有效检测微小缺陷，因此需要新的方法来提升定位准确性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了Difference-Guided双图像范式，把异常定位建模为“一次性差异定位”问题，并引入Dual-Consistency定位奖励来优化难以检测的异常。同时，采用难度感知的自适应重加权和分组重采样策略，优先学习困难实例。此外，构建了包含13K对图像、20类别的新数据集AD-DualDiff以支持评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，DifferAD-R1在多个基准上显著超过现有方法，并在性能上可与超大规模模型（如Qwen3-VL）媲美。
AI.conclusion: DifferAD-R1有效提升了工业异常定位的泛化能力、稳定性和鲁棒性，尤其适用于复杂和跨场景的缺陷检测，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: SUP-MCRL: Subject-aware Unified Pseudo-feature Coded Multimodal Contrastive Representation Learning for EEG Visual Decoding
summary: Non-invasive brain-computer interfaces suffer severe fidelity degradation in neural visual decoding when generalizing to natural visual experiences. Conventional multimodal contrastive representation learning solely optimizes geometric distance alignment, neglecting semantic consistency and subject selectivity, causing spurious zero-shot alignment. We propose SUP-MCRL, a unified framework integrating three collaborative mechanisms: (1) Semantic-entity Aware Visual Encoder (SAVE), learning spatial attention to extract semantic content without pre-trained saliency models; (2 Unified EEG Enhancer (UEE), employing multi-scale atrous convolutions and inter-band attention for adaptive cross-subject robustness; and (3) Prototype-based Progressive Augmenter (PPA), maintaining an EMA-updated pseudo-feature pool to prevent representation collapse. Zero-shot experiments on THINGS-EEG achieve 66.0%/91.9% (Top-1/Top-5) intra-subject and 24.0%/52.9% LOSO accuracy, surpassing state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/NZWANG/SUP-MCRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的脑机接口多模态对比学习框架（SUP-MCRL），显著提升了非侵入式脑信号的视觉解码泛化效果，尤其在零样本情况下取得了领先的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有非侵入式脑机接口在解码自然视觉体验方面精度显著下降，主流的多模态对比学习仅对齐了几何距离，忽略了语义一致性和主体特异性，导致泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出了SUP-MCRL统一框架，包含三个协作机制：（1）语义实体感知视觉编码器（SAVE）：通过空间注意力机制自适应提取图像语义内容，无需额外预训练显著性模型；（2）EEG增强模块（UEE）：利用多尺度扩张卷积和跨频带注意力机制提升跨主体鲁棒性；（3）原型渐进增强器（PPA）：维护指数滑动均值更新的伪特征池，防止表征崩溃。
AI.result: 在THINGS-EEG数据集的零样本测试中，SUP-MCRL达到了Top-1/Top-5单主体内66.0%/91.9%，跨主体（LOSO）24.0%/52.9%的准确率，均优于现有最高水平。
AI.conclusion: SUP-MCRL通过引入多重协作机制，有效提升了脑信号与视觉信号跨模态对齐的语义一致性和泛化能力，为非侵入式脑机接口的视觉解码提供了新的技术路线。

title: DCP-Prune: Ultra-Low Token Pruning with Distribution Consistency Preservation
comment: The code will be released at: https://github.com/EMVision-NK/DCP-Prune
summary: Recent vision token pruning methods effectively preserve model performance under moderate token budgets but become unstable under ultra-low token budget. Our analysis shows that as the pruning budget decreases, accuracy degradation is often accompanied by larger feature distribution shifts. Critically, the degree of this distribution shift strongly correlates with performance degradation. To better characterize this phenomenon, we introduce a lightweight distribution consistency metric to estimate the distribution shift between retained and full tokens. Motivated by these observations, we propose a two-stage pruning framework consisting of Anchor-Context Graph Recovery (ACGR) and Text-Aware Token Cluster Selection (TATCS). Specifically, ACGR transfers contextual information before token removal, while TATCS dynamically re-selects representative tokens when severe distribution shift is detected. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior and more stable performance under ultra-low token budget. Notably, it retains 92.1% of the upper-bound average performance on LLaVA-1.5-7B with only 16 visual tokens.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视觉token剪枝方法，在极低token预算下表现更稳定，有效缓解了分布漂移带来的性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有token剪枝在token极少时性能急剧下降，主要由于保留和完整tokens之间的特征分布漂移加剧。研究表明分布漂移越大，性能损失越严重，因此需设计新方法减少这种影响。
AI.method: 提出两阶段剪枝框架：第一阶段为Anchor-Context Graph Recovery（ACGR）在剪枝前转移上下文信息；第二阶段为Text-Aware Token Cluster Selection（TATCS），当检测到严重分布漂移时动态筛选代表性token，并引入轻量分布一致性指标监控分布变动。
AI.result: 广泛实验显示，该方法在极低token预算（如LLaVA-1.5-7B下仅16个视觉token）下表现稳定，平均性能可达到完整模型的92.1%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在极低token预算时显著减缓分布漂移，保持更高性能，证明其在高效视觉模型剪枝中的实用价值。

title: MVM-IOD: An Industrial Object-Centric Benchmark Dataset for the Evaluation of 3D Reconstruction Methods
summary: 3D object reconstruction, and camera pose estimation in industrial applications are challenging tasks, as errors are costly while the computation time is often limited. The complexity of typical industrial objects further complicates these tasks. Most of the existing datasets in this context do not depict realistic industrial scenarios. Therefore, we introduce the Machine Vision Metrology Industrial Object Dataset (MVM-IOD). Images of typical industrial objects are captured systematically, by moving a camera, mounted at the end effector of an industrial robot arm, on a hemisphere around the objects. MVM-IOD contains reference camera poses and reference 3D point clouds, the acquired RGB images of 9 objects and 2 background choices resulting in 18 scenes, which allows evaluation of all image based methods that compute a 3D reconstruction, camera poses, or novel views of a scene. Based on MVM-IOD, we extensively evaluate current SOTA 3D reconstruction and camera pose estimation methods, such as Structure from Motion, Multi-View Stereo, recent feed forward methods (Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer, π3), and 2D Gaussian Splatting and report our findings as a baseline for future research. The experiments show that capture setups like ours generate out-of distribution images for feed forward methods, leading to suboptimal point clouds and camera poses. However, these out-of-distribution images can be shifted closer to the training distribution by applying simple preprocessing steps. Consequently, in certain industrial applications, feed forward methods should be used with caution.

AI.tldr: 本文引入了一个面向工业场景的三维重建与相机位姿估计新数据集MVM-IOD，系统评估了主流方法并提出在工业场景中需谨慎使用前馈方法。
AI.motivation: 当前工业场景下的三维重建与相机位姿估计任务具有高精度和时效性要求，而主流公开数据集缺乏对真实复杂工业对象的覆盖，限制了相关方法的评估和应用。
AI.method: 作者构建了MVM-IOD数据集，通过工业机器人控制相机从半球面不同角度对九种典型工业对象（两种背景下）采集RGB图像和精确相机位姿、三维点云参考数据，并系统评测了结构光恢复（SfM）、多视图立体、前馈方法（如VGGTransformer、π3）、2D Gaussian Splatting等SOTA方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该采集方式产生的图像易超出现有前馈方法的训练分布，导致点云和相机位姿结果欠佳。但通过简单预处理步骤可将图像分布向训练分布靠拢，改善方法表现。
AI.conclusion: 在工业实际应用中，对前馈法需谨慎采用，建议结合数据预处理或选择鲁棒性更强的传统方法。MVM-IOD为相关领域提供了可靠基准。

title: Vision-Language Models as Zero-Annotation Oracles in Histopathology
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables. Code available at https://github.com/VishalJ99/vlm-wsi-auto-context
summary: Foreground segmentation is the critical first step of every computational pathology pipeline, yet existing methods rely on hand-tuned heuristics or supervised models that overfit to narrow stain and scanner distributions, failing silently on specialised stains such as Jones silver or Elastica van Gieson. We propose a coarse-to-fine approach that recasts foreground segmentation as a visual perception task and leverages general-purpose vision-language models (VLMs) as zero-annotation oracles. Our key insight is that tissue-versus-background discrimination is a natural-image recognition problem, not a histopathological one, so VLMs trained on internet-scale corpora generalise where domain-specific models cannot. We introduce Leica-75, a benchmark of 75 renal transplant whole-slide images spanning three stain families. On Leica-75, our method achieves the highest segmentation quality on out-of-distribution stains (Dice 0.858 +/- 0.027 on Jones, 0.853 +/- 0.041 on EVG) with 7x lower cross-stain variance than the best supervised baseline, while remaining competitive on in-distribution H&E. Few-shot prompting with automatically curated exemplars (Auto-context) rescues hard cases on Stress-32 (n=32), a curated stress-test subset (Dice 0.470 to 0.819 for the 2B model). VLM-based annotation review matches human expert consensus (kappa=0.989 for blur detection; mean precision/recall grading accuracy 0.708 vs. human 0.646 for segmentation mask review). The resulting pseudo-labels are used to distil lightweight student models that are as performant as the teacher model while running for a fraction of the cost. Our framework provides a principled, scalable solution to a persistent infrastructure bottleneck in digital pathology.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于通用视觉-语言模型（VLM）的前景分割新方法，无需人工标注，针对特殊染色病理图像具有更好泛化能力，并发布了Leica-75基准数据集。实验表明，该方法对分布外（ODD）染色的分割质量优于现有监督学习方法，能为数字病理基础设施带来强大可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有前景分割方法严重依赖手工调参或监督模型，容易过拟合于特定染色和扫描仪分布，面对特殊染色时效果差且无错误提示。因此，需要一种不依赖标注且具备广泛泛化能力的新方法。
AI.method: 作者将前景分割转化为一种视觉感知任务，利用训练于互联网大规模语料的通用视觉-语言模型（VLM）作为零标注“判定者”。提出粗到细分割策略，通过自然图像识别思路自动判别组织与背景，并引入Leica-75数据集，评测性能。同时结合Auto-context少样本提示，优化难例分割，并用VLM作为标注审核工具产生高质量伪标签，最后蒸馏训练轻量级学生模型。
AI.result: 在Leica-75三类染色数据集上，该方法显著优于监督学习基线（Jones染色Dice 0.858，EVG 0.853，且跨染色方差低7倍），对常规和特殊染色均有良好表现。Auto-context提升了Stress-32难例分割质量（2B模型Dice从0.470提升至0.819）。VLM标注审核与专家共识高度一致（kappa=0.989），伪标签蒸馏的学生模型能以更低算力达到教师模型水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法打破了专业领域分割模型的泛化瓶颈，通过通用视觉-语言模型实现无需人工标注、高鲁棒性的病理图像前景分割，极大降低了数字病理基础设施建设门槛，并具备良好的推广潜力。

title: Look Again Before You Abstain:Budgeted Conformal Evidence Acquisition for Reliable Vision-Language Model
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) hallucinate: they assert visual details that the image does not support. A principled remedy is selective prediction with a distribution-free guarantee-verify each claim and abstain when the claim is not grounded, so that the hallucination rate among asserted claims is provably bounded. We show, however, that this guarantee is bought at a brutal price: to keep the hallucination rate below $5\%$ on a balanced object-existence benchmark, a state-of-the-art conformal filter must abstain on more than $80\%$ of claims. We argue that abstention is wasteful when more visual evidence is cheaply available, and introduce Budgeted Conformal Evidence Acquisition (BCEA), which replaces the binary answer/abstain decision with a three-way choice: answer, abstain, or acquire additional visual evidence by re-examining the image (zooming, cropping, or applying a claim-specific intervention) under a bounded compute budget. We make two observations. First, acquisition that is plugged naively into a calibrated filter breaks the statistical guarantee -- realized risk overshoots the target by up to $17$ points -- because the acquisition step destroys the exchangeability that conformal calibration relies on. Second, folding the entire acquisition policy into the score function and re-calibrating on post-acquisition scores \emph{restores} the finite-sample guarantee while still recovering coverage. BCEA further uses structured, claim-type-specific interventions. Across the POPE benchmark and COCO-constructed existence and spatial-relation claims, on four open VLMs, BCEA controls the hallucination rate at the target level and consistently improves coverage over a guaranteed-abstention baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Budgeted Conformal Evidence Acquisition (BCEA)方法，旨在在大视觉-语言模型(LVLMs)的低幻觉率条件下，减少对内容回答的过度拒绝，实现更高的内容覆盖率。
AI.motivation: LVLMs经常产生幻觉（即生成错误的视觉细节），为控制其幻觉率，通常采用分布无关的选择性预测（即只在有可信证据时给出答案，否则弃答），但这样会极大牺牲回答覆盖率。本文希望在保证低幻觉率的同时，通过增加信息获取，提高有效回答比例。
AI.method: 提出BCEA，将传统“回答/弃答”二分法扩展为“回答/弃答/申请更多视觉证据”三选。如果模型信心不足，可以通过缩放、裁剪等方式再次处理图片以获取更多信息，并在有限计算预算下重新评估，同时对后处理得分重新校准，从而恢复统计保证。
AI.result: 实验证明，简单地在校准过程中加入获取证据的步骤会破坏分布假设，导致高于目标的幻觉率；而将整个证据获取过程纳入打分并重新校准，可以恢复低幻觉率保证，并且在多个公开VLM和不同数据集（如POPE, COCO相关任务）上，BCEA相较传统方法显著提升了覆盖率，同时控制了幻觉率。
AI.conclusion: BCEA方法能在不牺牲幻觉率保证的前提下，显著提高LVLMs输出的有效回答覆盖面，为大模型实际应用中的安全和可用性提供了有力支持。

title: Sinkhorn-CPD: Robust point cloud registration via unbalanced entropic optimal transport
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures; journal version published in Computer-Aided Design
summary: Coherent Point Drift (CPD) is widely used for rigid point cloud registration because of its soft correspondences and closed-form parameter updates. However, CPD's target-side marginal constraint forces every observation, including outliers, to receive exactly unit probability mass. This assumption degrades registration accuracy under heavy outliers and partial overlap. Optimal transport (OT) methods can handle missing mass through unbalanced formulations, but require hand-tuned annealing schedules. In this paper, we propose Sinkhorn-CPD, which replaces CPD's target-side marginal constraint with dual Kullback-Leibler penalties, allowing the algorithm to discard outliers on both sides. The resulting formulation is a fully unbalanced entropic optimal transport problem, which can be efficiently solved by generalized Sinkhorn iterations. Moreover, Sinkhorn-CPD preserves the closed-form Procrustes and variance updates of CPD. In our method, the variance sigma^2 plays the role of the entropic regularization parameter, which induces an automatic annealing schedule from diffuse to sharp correspondences without manual temperature tuning. Experiments on synthetic, cross-category, and scan-to-CAD benchmarks show that Sinkhorn-CPD achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, with strong robustness to outliers and partial overlap.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的点云配准方法Sinkhorn-CPD，在现有CPD的基础上提升了对离群点和部分重叠的鲁棒性，达到先进水平。
AI.motivation: 传统的CPD算法因目标点边约束，使每个观测点（包括离群点）都分配概率质量，导致在存在大量离群点和部分重叠场景下性能下降。现有的OT方法虽然能处理丢失质量，但需人工调整超参数。
AI.method: 将CPD中的目标边约束改为对偶KL散度惩罚，实现完全不平衡的熵正则最优传输问题，用推广的Sinkhorn迭代高效求解。方法保留了CPD的封闭形式参数更新，并使方差sigma^2充当正则化参数，实现自适应退火，无需人工调温。
AI.result: 在合成数据、跨类别和扫描到CAD配准任务中，Sinkhorn-CPD展现了领先的配准准确性，在大量离群点和部分重叠情况下表现尤为强劲。
AI.conclusion: Sinkhorn-CPD兼具CPD和OT方法的优点，在点云配准领域大幅提升了精度和鲁棒性，为实际应用提供了更强工具。

title: MMDiff: Extending Diffusion Transformers for Multi-Modal Generation
summary: Diffusion transformers have demonstrated remarkable generative capabilities, yet the rich perceptual representations computed across their denoising trajectory are discarded once the content is rendered.
